Ezra4:23 Ngemva kokobana incwadi yekosi u-Aritarhitjhasta ifundwe phambi kwakaRerhumu noTjhimthayi usosiba kanye nabasebenzisani babo, bakhamba ngokurhaba okukhulu baya emaJudeni eJerusalema. Bawajamisa ngekani bona angasarageli phambili nomsebenzi wokwakha." 
Esther8:16 Kwaba sikhathi somkhanyo, ukujabula, ukuthaba nokuhlonipheka emaJudeni." 
Esther8:17 Eemfundeni zoke nemadorobheni woke lapha umthetho wekosi bewufike khona, bekukhona ukujabula nokuthaba emaJudeni, kulilanga lokugidinga nokuphumula kiwo. Yeke abantu abanengi ezizweni baphendukela ebuJudeni ngombana baba nokwesaba amaJuda." 
Esther9:28 Amalanga lawo azakukhunjulwa begodu azakulondwa iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana, imindeni ngemindeni, iimfunda ngeemfunda nemizi ngemizi. Iye, amalanga wePurimu akukameli eqiselwe amehlo emaJudeni namkha aliswe ukugidingwa eenzukulwaneni zawo." 
Esther9:31 Eencwadinezo bekuqiniswa bonyana kugidingwe amalanga wePurimu ngeenkhathi zawo ezijanyisiweko. Lokho bekufanele kube njengesimiso esabekwa nguMoridekayi umJuda emaJudeni besaqiniswa ngu-Esta indlovukazi. Begodu kube ngendlela wona agade azimisele ngayo kanye neenzukulwana zawo ngendaba yokuzila nokulila kwawo. 
Ezekiel25:12 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: “Njengombana u-Edomu azibuyiselele ngesibuyiselelo phezu kwendlu yakwaJuda bewaba nesazela esikhulu, iye, njengombana azibuyiselele emaJudeni," 
Matthew1:1 Incwadi yomlibo wokubelethwa kwakaJesu Krestu iNdodana kaDavida osizukulwana saka-Abrahamu. 
Matthew1:2 U-Abrahamu wabeletha u-Isaka, u-Isaka wabeletha uJakopo, uJakopo wabeletha uJuda nabafowabo." 
Matthew1:3 UJuda wabeletha uPerezi noZara kuTamara, uPerezi wabeletha uHesromu, uHesromu wabeletha u-Aramu," 
Matthew1:4 u-Aramu wabeletha u-Aminadaba, u-Aminadaba wabeletha uNarhitjhoni, uNarhitjhoni wabeletha uSalmoni," 
Matthew1:5 uSalmoni wabeletha uBhowazi kuRarhabi, uBhowazi wabeletha u-Obede kuRute, u-Obede wabeletha uJese," 
Matthew1:6 uJese wabeletha ikosi uDavida. UDavida wabeletha uSolomoni kumka-Uriya," 
Matthew1:7 uSolomoni wabeletha uRerhobhowamu, uRerhobhowamu wabeletha u-Abiya, u-Abiya wabeletha u-Asafa," 
Matthew1:8 u-Asafa wabeletha uJerhotjhafati, uJerhotjhafati wabeletha uJoramu, uJoramu wabeletha u-Uziya," 
Matthew1:9 u-Uziya wabeletha uJotamu, uJotamu wabeletha u-Arhazi, u-Arhazi wabeletha uHezekiya," 
Matthew1:10 uHezekiya wabeletha uManase; uManase wabeletha u-Amosi, u-Amosi wabeletha uJosiya;" 
Matthew1:11 uJosiya wabeletha uKoniya nabafowabo lokha u-Israyeli nagade athunjelwe eBhabheli. 
Matthew1:12 Ngemva kokuthunjelwa eBhabheli, uKoniya wabeletha uTjhaltiyeli; uTjhaltiyeli wabeletha uZerubhabheli." 
Matthew1:13 UZerubhabheli wabeletha u-Abiyudi; u-Abiyudi wabeletha u-Eliyakhimu; u-Eliyakhimu wabeletha u-Azori; 
Matthew1:14 u-Azori wabeletha uTsadoki; uTsadoki wabeletha u-Arhimu; u-Arhimu wabeletha u-Eliyudi; 
Matthew1:15 u-Eliyudi wabeletha u-Elazara; u-Elazara wabeletha uMathani; uMathani wabeletha uJakopo," 
Matthew1:16 uJakopo wabeletha uJosefa, indoda kaMariya unina kaJesu okuthiwa nguKrestu." 
Matthew1:17 Yeke bekuneenzukulwana ezilitjhumi nane kusukela ku-Abrahamu ukuya kuDavida, nezilitjhumi nane kusukela kuDavida kufikela ekuthunjweni eBhabheli, nezilitjhumi nane kusukela ekuthunjweni eBhabheli ukuya ekubelethweni kwakaKrestu." 
Matthew1:18 Ukubelethwa kwakaJesu Krestu kwaba nje: Unina uMariya bekabonwe nguJosefa, kodwana ngaphambi kobana bahlangane, wazifumana asidisi ngoMoya oCwengileko." 
Matthew1:19 Ngebanga lokobana uJosefa isokana lakhe bekumumuntu olungileko, nokobana bekangafuni ukumdalula ebantwini, wahlosa ukumtlhala ngesidu." 
Matthew1:20 Kwathi asakhumbula lokho, ingilozi kaSomnini yazibonakalisa kuye ebhudangweni yathi: “Josefa, sizukulwana sakaDavida, ungesabi ukuthatha uMariya abe mkakho ngombana lokho akubambileko kubuya kuMoya oCwengileko." 
Matthew1:21 UMariya uzakubeletha indodana, uyithiye ibizo bona nguJesu ngombana izakusindisa abantu bayo ezonweni zabo.”" 
Matthew1:22 Koke lokhu kwenzeka kobana kuzaliseke lokho uSomnini akukhuluma ngomphorofidi wathi: 
Matthew1:23 “Qala, itlawu lizakuba sidisi, libelethe indodana; izakubizwa bona ngu-Imanuweli.” Nakutjhugululwako lokhu kutjho bona “uZimu unathi”." 
Matthew1:24 Kwathi uJosefa navukako, wenza njengombana ingilozi kaSomnini imyalile, wathatha uMariya bona abe mkakhe." 
Matthew1:25 Kodwana azange akhe alale naye ngaphambi kobana abelethe indodana. Wathiya indodana leyo bona nguJesu. 
Matthew2:1 Ngemva kobana uJesu abelethwe eBhethelehema eseJudiya emihleni yokubusa kwekosi uHerode, kweza izazi eJerusalema zivela epumalanga." 
Matthew2:2 Zabuza zathi: “Uphi obelethwe bona abe yikosi yamaJuda na? Sibone ikwekwezakhe lokha nayiphuma ngepumalanga, nje-ke size bona sizomkhothamela.”" 
Matthew2:3 Kwathi bona ikosi uHerode izwe lokho, yawurubajeka, neJerusalema loke lawurubajeka nayo." 
Matthew2:4 Sele ibizele ndawonye boke abaphathi babaphristi kanye nabafundisi bomthetho, yababuza bonyana uKrestu ubelethelwephi." 
Matthew2:5 Bayiphendula bathi: “NgeBhethelehema eseJudiya ngombana lokhu ngilokho umphorofidi atlole ngakho nasithi," 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Wena Bhethelehema esenarheni yakwaJuda, awusingomncancani hlangana nababusi bakwaJuda ngombana kuwe kuzokuvela umbusi ozokuba ngumelusi wabantu bami u-Israyeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Yeke uHerode wabizela izazi zepumalanga ngasese wazibuza isikhathi ikwekwezi evele ngaso. 
Matthew2:8 Wazithumela eBhethelehema wathi: “Khambani niyokufunisisa kuhle ngomntwana; nithi ningamfumana, ningazise, khona nami ngizakuya ngiyomkhothamela.”" 
Matthew2:9 Ngemva kobana sele zizwe ikosi, zangena indlela. Qala, ikwekwezi ebeziyibone ngepumalanga yakhamba phambi kwazo beyayokujama ngehla kwendawo lapha bekunomntwana khona." 
Matthew2:10 Kwathi lokha nazibona ikwekwezi, zajabula khulu." 
Matthew2:11 Zathi nazingena ngekumbeni, zabona umntwana anonina uMariya, yeke zakhothama zamlotjha. Zavula amagugwazo zamkhunga ngezipho: igolide, itjhwalo nemire." 
Matthew2:12 Sele ziyelelisiwe ebhudangweni kobana zingabuyeli emuva kuHerode, zaya enarheni yekhabo zikhamba ngenye indlela." 
Matthew2:13 Kwathi bona izazi zikhambe, ingilozi kaSomnini yazibonakalisa kuJosefa ngebhudango yathi: “Vuka uthathe umntwana nonina nibalekele eGibhide. Hlalani lapho benginitjele ngombana uHerode uzokufunana nomntwana kobana ambulale.”" 
Matthew2:14 Yeke wavuka, wathatha umntwana nonina, wakhamba ebusuku waya eGibhide," 
Matthew2:15 lapha ahlala khona uHerode wabe wafa. Kwazaliseka bunjalo-ke okwatjhiwo nguSomnini ngomphorofidi wathi: “Ngabiza indodanami kobana iphume eGibhide.” 
Matthew2:16 Kwathi bona uHerode alemuke bonyana izazi zepumalanga zimkhohlisile, wasilingeka. Wakhupha umyalo bona kubulawe boke abantwana ababesana eBhethelehema neendaweni ezihlanu kwayo, kusukela eminyakeni emibili nengaphasi. Lokhu kwenzeka malungana nalokho akuzwa ngezazi." 
Matthew2:17 Ngaleyondlela kwazaliseka lokho okwatjhiwo ngomphorofidi uJoromiya nasithi: 
Matthew2:18 “Ilizwi lizwakele eRama, ukulila okukhulu nokutlhuwa; uRarheli ulilela abantwabakhe, akafuni nokutjhiriywa ngombana bangasekho.”" 
Matthew2:19 Ngemva kokuhlongakala kwakaHerode, ingilozi kaSomnini yazibonakalisa kuJosefa ngebhudango eGibhide," 
Matthew2:20 yathi: “Vuka, uthathe umntwana nonina, ubuyele enarheni yakwa-Israyeli ngombana labo egade balinga ukubulala umntwana baphangalele.”" 
Matthew2:21 Yeke wavuka, wathatha umntwana nonina, babuyela enarheni yakwa-Israyeli." 
Matthew2:22 Kodwana kwathi bona uJosefa ezwe bonyana u-Aritjhilawosi uthethe isihlalo sakayise uHerode eJudiya, wesaba ukuya lapho. Sele ayeleliswe ebhudangweni, waya esifundeni seGalile," 
Matthew2:23 wayokuhlala edorobheni okuthiwa yiNazaretha. Yeke-ke okwatjhiwo baphorofidi kwazaliseka nabasithi: “Uzakubizwa bona umNazaretha.” 
Matthew3:1 Emihleni leyo kwavela uJwanisi uMbhabhadisi atjhumayela erhalawumbeni leJudiya 
Matthew3:2 asithi: “Phendukani ngombana umbuso wezulu ubandamele!” 
Matthew3:3 UJwanisi lo, nguye umphorofidi u-Isaya akhuluma ngaye nasithi: “Ilizwi lorhuwelela erhalawumbeni lithi: Lungisani indlela yeKosi, yenzeleni imizila enqophileko!”" 
Matthew3:4 Izambatho zakaJwanisi bezenziwe ngoboya bekamela; bekazibophe ngebhande lesikhumba edinini, ukugoma kwakhe kuziintethe neliju lemmangweni." 
Matthew3:5 Abantu beza kuye bavela eJerusalema, kilo loke iJudiya nakiso soke isifunda seJordani;" 
Matthew3:6 babika izono zabo, wababhabhadisa ngeJordani." 
Matthew3:7 Kwathi nabona abaFarisi nabaSadusi abanengi basiza kuye bona bazokubhajadiswa, wathi kibo: “Nina nzalo yeenyoka, ngubani onilemukise bona nibalekele ilaka elizako na?" 
Matthew3:8 Vezani iinthelo ezikhomba ukuphenduka. 
Matthew3:9 Ningadlumbani bona ningazitjela nithi, ‘Sino-Abrahamu njengobabethu’. Ngambala ngiyanitjela bona uZimu angavusela u-Abrahamu abantwana ngamatje la!" 
Matthew3:10 Izembe sele lisemrajini wemithi, omunye nomunye umuthi ongatheli iinthelo ezihle uzakuquntulwa, uphoswe ngemlilweni." 
Matthew3:11 Nginibhabhadisa ngamanzi malungana nokuphenduka, kodwana emva kwami kuzokuza onamandla khulu kunami, engingasililitho bonyana ngingathinta amapatlagwanakhe. Yena-ke uzonibhabhadisa ngoMoya oCwengileko nangomlilo." 
Matthew3:12 Unesibhulo sakhe abhulisisa ngaso eselelweni. Uzakubuthelela ikoroyi yakhe ngesilulwini sakhe, kodwana uzakutjhisa iinhluba ngemlilweni ongacimiko!”" 
Matthew3:13 UJesu wavela eGalile weza eJordani kobana azokubhajadiswa nguJwanisi. 
Matthew3:14 Kodwana uJwanisi walinga ukumkhandela, wathi: “Kufanele bonyana ngibhajadiswe nguwe, kodwana wena uza kimi na?”" 
Matthew3:15 Nje-ke uJesu wamphendula wathi: “Vuma okwagadesi, kusilungele bonyana sikwenze lokhu ukuze kuzaliseke koke ukulunga.” Yeke uJwanisi wavuma." 
Matthew3:16 Kwathi msinyana bona uJesu abhajadiswe, waphuma ngemanzini. Khonokho izulu lavuleka, wabona uMoya kaZimu wehla njengezuba, wahlala phezu kwakhe." 
Matthew3:17 Yeke ilizwi lavela ezulwini lisithi: “Le yiNdodanami engiyithandako nengithokozileko ngayo.” 
Matthew4:1 Yeke uMoya wadosela uJesu erhalawumbeni bona ayokulingwa nguSathana. 
Matthew4:2 Ngemva kobana azile ukudla amalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona, walamba." 
Matthew4:3 Yeke umlingi weza kuye wathi: “Nangabe uyiNdodana kaZimu, tjela amatje la bona aphenduke isikwa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Kodwana uJesu waphendula wathi: “Kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘Umuntu akaphili ngesikwa kwaphela kodwana ngelinye nelinye ilizwi eliphuma emlonyeni kaZimu.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Yeke uSathana wathatha uJesu wamusa edorobheni elicwengileko, wamjamisa esiqongolweni sethempeli;" 
Matthew4:6 wathi kuye: “Nangabe uyiNdodana kaZimu, ziphosele phasi ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘UZimu uzakuyala iingilozi zakhe ngawe; zizakukhakhuna ngezandla zazo, ukuze iinyawo zakho zingabetheki ematjeni.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Godu kutloliwe kwathiwa, ‘Ungamlingi uSomnini uZimakho.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Godu uSathana wathatha uJesu wamusa esiqongolweni sentaba, wamkhombisa yoke imibuso yephasi nobuphaziphazi bayo," 
Matthew4:9 wathi kuye: “Koke lokhu ngizakunikela khona, nange ungaguqa ungilotjhe.”" 
Matthew4:10 Yeke uJesu waphendula wathi: “Suka, Sathana ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘Lotjha uSomnini uZimakho ukhothamele yena kwaphela.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Nje-ke uSathana wamsukela; iingilozi zeza zamsiza. 
Matthew4:12 Kwathi bonyana uJesu ezwe bona uJwanisi ufakwe ngesikhungweni, wabuyela eGalile." 
Matthew4:13 Wasuka eNazaretha, wayokuhlala eKapernawumi, emzini ohlanu kwelwandle leGalile, enarheni yakwaZabuloni neyakwaNafitali." 
Matthew4:14 Lokhu kwenzeka khona kuzakuzaliseka okwakhulunywa mphorofidi u-Isaya nasithi: 
Matthew4:15 “Narha yakwaZabuloni, nawe narha yakwaNaftali, endleleni eya elwandle, ngaphetjheya kweJordani, Galile labatjhili!" 
Matthew4:16 Abantu abahlezi ebumnyameni babone umkhanyo omkhulu, nakilabo abahlezi enarheni yethunzi lokufa ukukhanya kufikile.”" 
Matthew4:17 Ukusuka ngesikhatheso, uJesu wathoma ukutjhumayela wathi: “Phendukani ngombana umbuso wezulu ubandamele!”" 
Matthew4:18 Kwathi uJesu asakhamba eqadi kwelwandle leGalile, wabona izelamani ezimbili, uSimoni ebekuthiwa nguPitrosi nomfowabo u-Andrisi. Begade baphosela inede ngelwandle ngombana gade bababambi beenhlambi." 
Matthew4:19 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Yizani, ngilandelani! Ngizanenza ababambi babantu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Khonokho basukela amanedabo bamlandela. 
Matthew4:21 Wakhamba godu wabona izelamani ezinye ezimbili, uJakopo umsa kaZebediya nomfowabo uJwanisi. Bebangemkhunjini noyise uZebediya, balungisa amanedabo. UJesu wababiza," 
Matthew4:22 khonokho basukela umkhumbi noyise, bamlandela." 
Matthew4:23 UJesu wadabula iGalile, afundisa ngemasinagogini, atjhumayela ivangeli lombuso, apholisa ebebaphethwe malwelwe ahlukeneko kanye nezifo." 
Matthew4:24 Iindaba ngaye zanda kiyo yoke iSiriya, abantu baletha kuye boke ebebagula; baphethwe malwelwe amanengi ahlukeneko nobuhlungu: abantu abanamadimoni, isithunthwana nabakhubazekileko. Boke uJesu wabapholisa." 
Matthew4:25 Iinqubuthu ezikulu zamlandela zisuka eGalile eDekapolisi, eJerusalema, eJudiya nenarheni engaphetjheya kweJordani." 
Matthew5:1 Kwathi lokha uJesu nabona iinqubuthu, wenyukela entabeni. Sele ahlezi phasi, abafundi bakhe beza kuye." 
Matthew5:2 Yeke wathoma ukubafundisa wathi: 
Matthew5:3 “Babusisiwe abaswelako emmoyeni ngombana umbuso wezulu ungewabo. 
Matthew5:4 Babusisiwe abalilako ngombana bazakududuzwa. 
Matthew5:5 Babusisiwe abamnene ngombana bazakugoma ilifa lephasi. 
Matthew5:6 Babusisiwe abalambele bomele ukulunga ngombana bazakusuthiswa. 
Matthew5:7 Babusisiwe abanesirhawu ngombana bazakurhawukelwa. 
Matthew5:8 Babusisiwe abahlanzekileko eenhliziyweni ngombana bazombona uZimu. 
Matthew5:9 Babusisiwe abalamulako ngombana kuzakuthiwa bantwana bakaZimu. 
Matthew5:10 Babusisiwe abazunywa ngebanga lokulunga ngombana umbuso wezulu ungewabo. 
Matthew5:11 “Nibusisiwe lokha nabanithukako, banizuma bebakhulume koke okumbi ngani ngebanga lami." 
Matthew5:12 Thabani nithokoze ngombana umvuzo wenu mkhulu ezulwini. Nabaphorofidi ababakhona ngaphambi kwenu babazuma ngayo indlela le.” 
Matthew5:13 “Nina nilitswayi lephasi, kodwana itswayi nasele liqwatjhile, ubutswayi balo bungabuyiselwa njani na? Alisenamsebenzi, kwaphela selilungele ukulahlelwa ngaphandle, abantu baligadange." 
Matthew5:14 “Nina nimkhanyo wephasi. Umuzi owakhiwe entabeni angekhe wafihleka. 
Matthew5:15 Akakho othi angakhanyisa isibani asibeke ngaphasi kwesitja, kodwana usibeka phezu kwesitja lapha sizakukhanyisela khona woke ongekumbeni." 
Matthew5:16 Ngokunjalo akukhanye ukukhanya kwenu phambi kwabantu ukuze babone imisebenzenu emihle, badumise uYihlo osezulwini.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Ningadlumbani bonyana ngizele ukuzokuchitha umthetho namkha abaphorofidi. Angikazeli ukuzokuchitha, kodwana ngizele ukuzokugcwalisa." 
Matthew5:18 Ngambala ngiyanitjela bona kungakadluli izulu nephasi, akunaledere nalinye, ngitjho nesiqetjhana segama esizokudlula emthethweni bekupheliswe koke." 
Matthew5:19 Yeke, nanyana ngubani owephula ngitjho nomncani wemiyalo le bese afundise nabanye ukwenza njalo, uzakubizwa bona mncani embusweni wezulu. Kodwana nanyana ngubani oyenzako abe ayifundise, uzakubizwa bona mkhulu embusweni wezulu" 
Matthew5:20 ngombana ngiyanitjela bonyana nakube ukulunga kwenu akudluli kwabafundisi bomthetho nabaFarisi, anisoze nangena embusweni wezulu.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Nizwile bona abantu ekadeni batjelwa kwathiwa, ‘Ungabulali; ngiloyo naloyo obulalako uzokugwetjwa.’" 
Matthew5:22 Kodwana kwanjesi ngithi kini ngiloyo naloyo othukuthelela umfowabo uzokugwetjwa. Godu nanyana ngubani othi kumfowabo, ‘Nto ndina!’, uzokudoselwa ebandla. Godu nothi kumfowabo, ‘Sidlhadlha ndina!’, uzokuba sengozini yokuphoselwa emlilweni wesirhogo." 
Matthew5:23 Yeke lokha nawuletha umnikelwakho e-aldarini, khonapho bese uyakhumbula bona umfowenu unamavundo nawe," 
Matthew5:24 tjhiya umnikelwakho lapho phambi kwe-aldari, ukhambe khonokho uyokubuyisana naye bese uyabuya-ke uzokunikela umnikelwakho." 
Matthew5:25 “Rhaba ulungise indaba naloyo okulwisako nisesendleleni yokuya ebandla, nakungasinjalo uzakunikela ezandleni zomgwebi, yena akunikele ezandleni zabalindi, uphoselwe ngesikhungweni." 
Matthew5:26 Ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe uzakubhadla ngapho kufikela bewukhokhe ngitjho nopenyanakho wokugcina.” 
Matthew5:27 “Nizwile bona abantu ekadeni batjelwa kwathiwa, ‘Ungahlobongi.’" 
Matthew5:28 Kodwana ngiyanitjela bona nanyana ngubani oqala umfazi amkhanuke sele ahlobonge naye ngehliziywenakhe. 
Matthew5:29 Nakube ilihlo lakho langesigomeni likwenza wone, ligobhodlhe ulilahle! Kungcono khulu ukulahlekelwa ngesinye sezitho zakho zomzimba kunobanyana umzimbakho woke uphoselwe ngesirhogweni." 
Matthew5:30 Nangabe isandla sakho sangesigomeni sikwenza bona wone, siqunte usilahle! Kungcono khulu ukulahlekelwa sisandla sakho kunobanyana umzimbakho woke uphoselwe ngesirhogweni.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Godu kwathiwa, ‘Nanyana ngubani otlhalana nomkakhe kufanele amnikele incwadi yesahlukaniso.’" 
Matthew5:32 Kodwana ngithi kini nanyana ngubani otlhala umkakhe ngaphandle kweenzathu zokuhlobonga, umbangela bona ahlobonge begodu nanyana ngubani othatha umfazi otlhaliweko uyahlobonga.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Nizwile bona abantu ekadeni batjelwa kwathiwa, ‘Ungafungi ngamanga, kodwana yenza iimfungo owazenza kuSomnini.’" 
Matthew5:34 Kodwana ngiyanitjela bona ningafungi nakanye, kungabi ngezulu ngombana lisihlalo sobukhosi sakaZimu," 
Matthew5:35 namkha ngephasi ngombana lisinabelo seenyawo zakhe, namkha ngeJerusalema ngombana lilidorobho leKosi ekulu." 
Matthew5:36 Ungafungi ngehlokwakho ngombana angekhe watjhugulula ngitjho nasinye isihlutjhwana sibe mhlophe namkha sibe nzima. 
Matthew5:37 Kwaphela yithi, ‘Iye, iye’ namkha, ‘Awa, awa’. Okudlula lokhu kuvela komumbi.”" 
Matthew5:38 “Nizwile bona kwathiwa, ‘Ilihlo ngelihlo, izinyo ngezinyo.’" 
Matthew5:39 Kodwana kwanjesi ngithi kini: Ningajamelani nesikhohlakali. Umuntu nakuwahla emhlathini wangesigomeni, mnikele nomunye umhlathi." 
Matthew5:40 Nakube kukhona ofuna ukukudosela ebandla kobana akwemuke isambatho sakho, mnikele nesinye." 
Matthew5:41 Okukatelela bona ukhambe naye ikhilomitha elilodwa, khamba naye amakhilomitha amabili." 
Matthew5:42 Yipha woke umuntu okubawa okuthileko, ungabagodleli ababoleka kuwe.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Nizwile bona kwathiwa, ‘Thanda umuntu womphakathi uzonde isitha sakho.’" 
Matthew5:44 Kodwana manjesi ngithi kini: Thandani izitha zenu, nithandazele labo abanizumako," 
Matthew5:45 ukuze nibe bantwana bakaYihlo osezulwini ngombana wenza ilanga lakhe liphumele abambi nabalungileko, anise nezulu kabalungileko nabakhohlakeleko." 
Matthew5:46 Yeke nanithanda labo abanithandako, ninomvuzo bani na? Angithi nabathelisi benza njalo?" 
Matthew5:47 Godu nanibingelela abafowenu kwaphela, nizakuthi nibaphala ngani abanye abantu na? Angithi nabatjhili bayakwenza lokho na?" 
Matthew5:48 Yeke yibani ngabapheleleko njengombana noYihlo osezulwini aphelele!” 
Matthew6:1 “Yelelani bona ningenzi izenzo zenu zokulunga phambi kwabantu kobana banibuke ngombana nanenza njalo, angekhe nawufumana umvuzo wenu ovela kuYihlo osezulwini." 
Matthew6:2 “Nje-ke lokha nanipha abadududu, ningamemezeli ngeemporompita njengombana kwenza abazenzisi ngemasinagogini neendledlaneni ukuze bahlonitjhwe babantu. Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona sele bamukele umvuzwabo ngokupheleleko." 
Matthew6:3 Kodwana lokha nawupha abadududu, ungavumeli kobana isincele sakho sazi lokho okwenziwa sisidla sakho" 
Matthew6:4 ukuze umnikelwakho ube sekusithekeni. Ngaleyondlela uYihlo obona ekusithekeni uzakuvuza.” 
Matthew6:5 “Lokha nawuthandazako, ungabi njengabazenzisi ngombana bathanda ukuthandaza bajamile ngemasinagogini nemajikeni weendledlana ukuze babonwe babantu. Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona sele bawufumene umvuzwabo ngokupheleleko." 
Matthew6:6 Kodwana wena nawuthandazako, ngena ngelawini lakho, uvale umnyango bese uthandaza kuYihlo ongabonwako. Nje-ke uYihlo obona lokho okwenziwa ngemsitheleni, uzakuvuza." 
Matthew6:7 “Nanithandazako, ningaratharathi njengabangakholwako, abadlumbana bonyana bazakuzwiwa ngebanga lamezwabo amanengi." 
Matthew6:8 Ningabi njengabo ngombana uYihlo wazi enikudingako ningakambawi. 
Matthew6:9 Nasi-ke indlela ekumele nithandaze ngayo, “ ‘Baba wethu osezulwini, alicwengiswe ibizo lakho," 
Matthew6:10 umbuso wakho awufike, intando yakho yenziwe ephasini njengombana kunjalo ezulwini." 
Matthew6:11 Usiphe namhlanjesi isikwa sethu sangemihla. 
Matthew6:12 Usilibalele amacalethu njengombana sibalibalela abanamacala kithi. 
Matthew6:13 Ungasingenisi ekulingweni, kodwana yewusitjhaphulule kokumbi ngombana umbuso ungowakho, amandla nephazimulo ngokungapheliko. Amen.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Nanilibalela abantu abanitjhapheleko noYihlo osezulwini uzanilibalela. 
Matthew6:15 Kodwana naningalibaleli abantu abanitjhapheleko noYihlo angekhe anilibalela imitjhapho yenu.” 
Matthew6:16 “Nanizila ukudla, ningatjhitjhibalisi ubuso njengabazenzisi ngombana banyukubalisa ubuso babo ukubonisa abantu bonyana bazile ukudla. Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona sele bamukele umvuzwabo ngokupheleleko." 
Matthew6:17 Kodwana wena nawuzilako, hlamba ubuso bakho, ukame iinhluthu zakho" 
Matthew6:18 ukuze ungabonakali ebantwini kobana wena uzile ukudla, ngaphandle kwakaYihlo, ongabonwako. UYihlo obona okwenziwa ekusithekeni, uzakuvuza.”" 
Matthew6:19 “Ningazibekeli umnotho ephasinapha, lapha kunomvunya nokukhuna okurhayilako nalapha amasela afohla khona ebe." 
Matthew6:20 Kodwana zibekeleni umnotho ezulwini lapha umvunya nokukhuna kungeze kwarhayila khona nalapha amasela angeze afohla ebe 
Matthew6:21 ngombana lapha kunomnothwakho khona nehliziywakho ilapho.” 
Matthew6:22 “Ilihlo lisibani somzimba. Nakube amehlwakho alungile, umzimbakho woke uzakuba nokukhanya." 
Matthew6:23 Kodwana nakube amehlwakho mambi, umzimbakho woke uzakwembathwa bumnyama. Yeke nangabe umkhanyo ngaphakathi kwakho ubumnyama, maye bungangani ubumnyamobo!”" 
Matthew6:24 “Akakho ongasebenzela abaphathi ababili. Uzakuzonda omunye athande omunye namkha azinikele ngokupheleleko komunye bese unyaza omunye. Anikwazi-ke ukulotjha uZimu khibe ngapha nilotjhana noMamoni.” 
Matthew6:25 “Ngalokho-ke ngiyanitjela, ningakhathazeki ngepilwenu bona nizogomani namkha nizokuselani. Ningakhathazeki nangemizimbenu bona nizokwembathani. Kghani ipilo ayikaqakatheki khulu ukwedlula ukudla na? Nomzimba awukaqakatheki khulu kunezambatho na?" 
Matthew6:26 Qalani, iinyoni zomkayi azitjali, azivuni namkha zibeke ngeenlulwini. Kodwana uYihlo osezulwini uyazondla. Alo, nina anikaqakatheki khulu kuneenyoni na?" 
Matthew6:27 Ngubani-ke phakathi kwenu ongangezelela i-awara linye epilwenakhe ngokukhathazeka na? 
Matthew6:28 “Kubayini nikhathazeke ngezambatho na? Qalani bona amakhwa wommango amila njani; akasebenzi namkha aphothe intambo. 
Matthew6:29 Kodwana ngiyanitjela bonyana ngitjho noSolomoni kibo boke ubuphaziphazi bakhe azange akhe embathe njengamanye wawo. 
Matthew6:30 Nakube uZimu wembesa utjani bommango obukhona namhlanjesi kusasa butjhiswe ngomlilo, akazunembesa ukwedlula, nina bokukholwa okuncani na?" 
Matthew6:31 “Yeke ningathomi nikhathazeke bese nithi, ‘Alo sizogomani nje?’ namkha, ‘Sizokuselani?’ namkha, ‘Sizokwembathani?’" 
Matthew6:32 Lezi zizinto abangakholwako abazigijimelako. Nje-ke uYihlo osezulwini uyazi bona niyazidinga izintwezi. 
Matthew6:33 Kodwana funani qangi umbuswakhe nakho koke ukulunga kwakhe, nje-ke koke lokhu nakho nizakuphiwa khona." 
Matthew6:34 Yeke ningakhathazeki ngelingomuso ngombana ilingomuso lizakukhathalela kwalo. Elinye nelinye ilanga lineenkathazo zalo ezaneleko.” 
Matthew7:1 “Ningagwebi abanye, nakungasinjalo nani nizokugwetjwa" 
Matthew7:2 ngombana indlela enigweba ngayo abanye nani nizokugwetjwa ngayo. 
Matthew7:3 “Kubayini ukghona ukubona itserana engelihlweni lakamfowenu, kodwana uhlulwe kubona isigodo esingelihlweni lakho na?" 
Matthew7:4 Ungatjho njani kumfowenu uthi, ‘Angikhuphe itserana engelihlweni lakho,’ khisibe wena unesigodokazi ngelihlweni lakho na?" 
Matthew7:5 Wena mzenzisi ndina! Thoma ukhuphe isigodokazi esingelihlweni lakho qangi, nje-ke uzakghona ukubona kuhle ukuze ukhuphe itserana engelihlweni lomfowenu." 
Matthew7:6 “Ninganikeli izinja okucwengileko, ningaphoseli amatjenu aligugu ezavukazaneni. Nanenza njalo, zizawagadangela ngeenyawo bese ziyajika zinidabudabula iinquqwana.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Bawani nizakuphiwa; funani nizakufumana; kokodani nizakuvulelwa 
Matthew7:8 ngombana loyo naloyo obawako uzakuphiwa, ofunako uzakufumana, nokokodako uzakuvulelwa." 
Matthew7:9 Ngubani phakathi kwenu ongathi umntwanakhe nabawa isikwa, amuphe ilitje na?" 
Matthew7:10 Namkha kuthi nabawa ihlambi amuphe inyoka na? 
Matthew7:11 Nakube-ke nina, ngitjho nanyana nikhohlakele kangaka nje, nikwazi ukupha abantwabenu izipho ezihle, kangangani-ke uYihlo osezulwini! Uzabapha izipho ezihle khulu labo abambawako." 
Matthew7:12 “Yeke kikho koke, yenza kabanye lokho ongathanda bonyana bakwenze kuwe ngombana lokhu ngokutjhiwo mthetho nabaphorofidi.”" 
Matthew7:13 “Ngenani ngesango elincani ngombana isango eliya ekubhujisweni likhulu nendlela yakhona ibanzi begodu banengi abakhamba ngayo. 
Matthew7:14 Kodwana isango eliya ekuphileni lincani nendlela yakhona imkghotho begodu balibinzana abayifumanako.” 
Matthew7:15 “Yelelani abaphorofidi bamanga. Beza kini bembethe njengezimvu kodwana ngaphakathi khisibe baziimpisi ezirhiribidelako. 
Matthew7:16 Nizababona ngeenthelo zabo. Abantu bayawakha amadiribe emeveni namkha amakhiwani emthini womunga na? 
Matthew7:17 Ngokunjalo omunye nomunye umuthi omuhle uthela iinthelo ezihle, kodwana umuthi omumbi uthela iinthelo ezimbi." 
Matthew7:18 Umuthi omuhle angekhe wathela iinthelo ezimbi, nomuthi omumbi angekhe wathela iinthelo ezihle." 
Matthew7:19 Omunye nomunye umuthi ongatheli iinthelo ezihle uyaquntulwa uphoswe emlilweni. 
Matthew7:20 Yeke-ke, nizababona ngeenthelo zabo.”" 
Matthew7:21 “Akusuye woke othi kimi, ‘Kosi, Kosi’ ozakungena embusweni wezulwini, kodwana kwaphela loyo owenza intando kaBaba osezulwini." 
Matthew7:22 Mhlokho abanengi bazakuthi kimi, ‘Kosi, Kosi, azange siphorofide ebizweni lakho besaqotjha amadimoni ngalo ibizo lakho senza neemangaliso ezinengi na?’" 
Matthew7:23 Yeke ngizabatjela emehlweni ngithi kibo, ‘Azange khenginazi. Sukani kimapha, nina nkhohlakali ndina!’ ”" 
Matthew7:24 “Yeke nanyana ngubani ozwa amezwami la, awenze, unjengomuntu ohlakaniphileko owakha indlwakhe phezu kwedwala." 
Matthew7:25 Izulu lawuluka, imilambo yaphuphuma, ummoya waphephetha ngamandla phezu kwendlu leyo. Kodwana azange iwe ngombana yakhiwe phezu kwedwala." 
Matthew7:26 “Kodwana nanyana ngubani ozwa amezwami la, angawenzi, unjengomuntu osidlhadlha owakha indlwakhe phezu kwetjhwabatjhwaba." 
Matthew7:27 Izulu lawuluka, imilambo yaphuphuma, ummoya waphephetha ngamandla phezu kwendlu leyo, nje-ke yawa. Kwaba kukhulu ukuwa kwayo!”" 
Matthew7:28 Kwathi bona uJesu aqede ukukhuluma izintwezi, isiqubuthu sarareka ngendlela afundisa ngayo" 
Matthew7:29 ngombana gade afundisa njengonegunya, ingasi ngendlela abafundisi bomthetho bebafundisa ngayo." 
Matthew8:1 Kwathi uJesu selehlile entabeni, isiqubuthu esikhulu samlandela." 
Matthew8:2 Indoda enekhwekhwe yeza kuye, yafese yaguqa phambi kwakhe, yathi kuye: “Kosi, nawuthandako ungangihlambulula.”" 
Matthew8:3 UJesu wathabulula isandla sakhe wakghwatha indoda leyo, wathi: “Ngiyathanda, hlambuluka!” Khonokho indoda leyo yaphola." 
Matthew8:4 Yeke uJesu wathi kiyo: “Qinisekisa bona awutjeli muntu namunye, kodwana khamba unqophe kumphristi, ukhuphe isipho njengokomyalo kaMosi, kube bufakazi kibo.”" 
Matthew8:5 Kwathi uJesu sele angene eKapernawumi, umphathimabutho wamhlangabeza abawa isizo," 
Matthew8:6 wathi: “Kosi, ikhoboka lami liyagula ekhaya le, likhubazekile begodu liseenhlungwini.”" 
Matthew8:7 UJesu wathi: “Ngizakukhamba ngiyolipholisa.” 
Matthew8:8 Umphathimabutho waphendula wathi: “Kosi angikafanelwa kukobana ungeza kwami. Khupha nje ilizwi, ikhoboka lami lizakuphola." 
Matthew8:9 Nami ngokwami ngiphethwe, nginamajoni angaphasi kwami. Nangithi kelinye, ‘Khamba!’ liyakhamba, nangithi, ‘Yizapha!’ liyeza. Ngithi ekhobokeni lami, ‘Yenza lokhu!’ bese liyenza.”" 
Matthew8:10 Lokha uJesu nezwa lokhu, warareka bewathi ebantwini ebebamlandela: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona azange khengifumane noyedwa kwa-Israyeli onokukholwa okungaka." 
Matthew8:11 Nje-ke ngiyanitjela bona abanengi bazakuvela ngepumalanga nangetjingalanga, bahlale phasi esidlweni no-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo embusweni wezulu." 
Matthew8:12 Kodwana labo abangebombuso bazakulahlelwa ngaphandle ebumnyameni, lapha kuzakuba khona ukulila nokugedla kwamazinyo.”" 
Matthew8:13 Yeke uJesu wathi kumphathimabutho: “Khamba! Kuzakwenzeka njengokukholwa kwakho.” Ikhoboka lakhe laphola khonokho. 
Matthew8:14 UJesu waya ngekumbeni kaPitrosi, wafunyana umkhwekazi kaPitrosi alele, aphethwe mgomani." 
Matthew8:15 Wakghwatha isandla sakhe; umgomani wamlisa, wavuka khonokho, wenzela uJesu okugonywako." 
Matthew8:16 Kwathi nakuhlwako kwalethwa kuye abanengi ebebanamadimoni, waqotjha imimoya ngelizwi kwaphela bewapholisa abagulako." 
Matthew8:17 Lokhu kwenzeka khona kuzakuzaliseka okwakhulunywa ngomphorofidi u-Isaya, nasithi: “Khonapho yathwala ukugula kwethu, yatjatha iinsizi zethu.”" 
Matthew8:18 Kwathi uJesu nabona isiqubuthu simzombelezile, wakhupha umyalo wokobana kweyanyelwe ngaphetjheya kwelwandle." 
Matthew8:19 Umfundisi womthetho weza kuye wathi: “Mfundisi, ngizakulandela nanyana kukuphi lapha uya khona.”" 
Matthew8:20 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Iimpungutjha zinemigodi, iinyoni zineenhlakana, kodwana iNdodana yoMuntu ayinandawo yokubeka ihloko.”" 
Matthew8:21 Omunye wabafundi wathi: “Kosi, akhe ngiyokubulunga ubaba ntange.”" 
Matthew8:22 Kodwana wamphendula wathi: “Yewungilandele, lisa abafileko babulungane.”" 
Matthew8:23 UJesu wangena ngemkhunjini; abafundi bakhe bamlandela. 
Matthew8:24 Khonokho, qala kwavuka isiwuruwuru esikhulu ngelwandle, umkhumbi wafuna ukucwila. Kodwana uJesu bekalele." 
Matthew8:25 Abafundi baya kuye bamvusa bathi: “Kosi! Yewusisindise, safa!”" 
Matthew8:26 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Kubayini nesabe nina bokukholwa okuncani na?” Yeke wavuka wakhalimela isiwuruwuru namaza, kwaba khona ukuthula okukhulu." 
Matthew8:27 Abantu barareka, bathi: “Mumuntu onjani-ke lo? Ngitjho isiwuruwuru namaza kuyamlalela!”" 
Matthew8:28 Kwathi bona uJesu afike esifundeni seGadara ngaphetjheya kwelwandle, wahlangatjezwa babantu ababili abanamadimoni abaphuma emalibeni. Abantwaba gade banenturhu kangangobana abantu bebangasakghoni ukukhamba ngendlela leyo." 
Matthew8:29 Qala, barhuwelela bathi: “Usifunani wena Ndodana kaZimu na? Uzele ukuzosihlunguphaza, isikhathi singakafiki na?”" 
Matthew8:30 Mlenzana nalapho bekukhona umhlambi wezavukazana, udla." 
Matthew8:31 Yeke amadimoni arabhela uJesu athi: “Nangabe uzosiqotjha lapha, khona-ke sithumela emhlambini wezavukazana lo.”" 
Matthew8:32 UJesu wathi kiwo: “Khambani!” Yeke akhamba angena ezavukazaneni. Woke umhlambi wagijimela ngerharheni, wadlhumukela ngelwandle, wafela ngemanzinapho." 
Matthew8:33 Abelusi bezavukazana babaleka, bangena ngedorobheni, bafese babika koke lokho ngitjho nokwenzeke ebantwini abanamadimoni." 
Matthew8:34 Yeke boke abantu bedorobho baphuma bayokuhlangabeza uJesu. Kwathi bonyana bambone, bamrabhela bona akhambe esifundeni sekhabo." 
Matthew9:1 UJesu wangena ngemkhunjini, wayamela ngaphetjheya kwelwandle waya edorobheni lekhabo." 
Matthew9:2 Qala abantu baletha kuye umuntu okhubazekileko, alele emkghadini. Kwathi bona uJesu abone ukukholwa kwabo, wathi emuntwini okhubazekileko loyo: “Qina isibindi, ndodana, izono zakho zicolelwe.”" 
Matthew9:3 Qala, abanye babafundisi bomthetho bathi omunye komunye: “Umuntu lo ukhuluma ihlamba!”" 
Matthew9:4 Ngokwazi imizindlo yabo, uJesu wathi: “Kubayini nizindla ngokumbi eenhliziyweni zenu na?" 
Matthew9:5 Ngikuphi okulula kini ukuthi, ‘Izono zakho zicolelwe’, nokuthi, ‘Sikima, ukhambe’ na?" 
Matthew9:6 Ngizanibonisa-ke bona iNdodana yoMuntu inamandla ephasinapha wokucolela izono.” Yeke wathi emuntwini okhubazekileko: “Sikima, uthathe umkghadakho ukhambe uye ekhaya!”" 
Matthew9:7 Umuntu loyo wasikima waya ekhaya. 
Matthew9:8 Kwathi bonyana abantu bakubone lokho, besaba, badumisa uZimu ophe abantu amandla angaka." 
Matthew9:9 UJesu wathi nasuka lapho; wabona umuntu ekuthiwa nguMatewu, ahlezi ngekumbeni yomthelo. Wathi kuye: “Ngilandela.” UMatewu wasikima wamlandela." 
Matthew9:10 Kwathi uJesu asagoma ngekumbeni kaMatewu, kwafika abathelisi abanengi nezoni, bahlanganela noJesu nabafundi bakhe ekudleni." 
Matthew9:11 Lokha abaFarisi nababona lokhu babuza abafundi bakhe bathi: “Kubayini umfundisenu agoma nabathelisi nezoni na?” 
Matthew9:12 UJesu nezwa lokhu wabaphendula wathi: “Abantu abaphilileko abayidingi inyanga, kodwana ifunwa ngabagulako kwaphela." 
Matthew9:13 Kodwana khambani niyokufunisisa bona umtlolo lo uthini lokha usithi, ‘Ngilulukela ukwethembeka, ingasi umhlabelo.’ Angikazeli ukuzokubiza abantu abalungileko, kodwana ngizele ukuzokubiza izoni.”" 
Matthew9:14 Yeke abalandeli bakaJwanisi beza kuJesu bambuza bathi: “Kubangelwa yini thina nabaFarisi sizila ukudla, kodwana abafundi bakho bona abazili ukudla na?”" 
Matthew9:15 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Abayeni bomkhwenyana bangazila njani khisibe usesenabo na? Isikhathi sizakufika sokobana umkhwenyana asuswe kibo, ngesikhatheso-ke, bazakuzila ukudla." 
Matthew9:16 “Akakho otjheza isambatho esidala ngesitjheza esitjha ngombana isitjheza esitjha sizakurharhabuluka esambathwenapho, sidale itjhuba eledlula lokuthoma." 
Matthew9:17 Godu akuthelwa iwayini elitjha ngeenkhwameni ezidala zewayini, nakungasinjalo iinkhwama zizakurathuka, iwayini liphalake, konakale iinkhwamezo. Kunalokho iwayini elitjha lithelwa ngeenkhwameni ezitjha, kulondeke kokubili.”" 
Matthew9:18 Kwathi uJesu asakhuluma lokhu, kweza umphathi wesinagogi wafese waguqa phambi kwakhe, wathi: “Indodakazami iqeda ukuhlongakala, yewuze uzoyibeka izandla khona izakuphila.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yeke uJesu wasikima wamlandela nabafundi bakhe bakhamba naye. 
Matthew9:20 Khonapho umfazi obekaphopha iingazi iminyaka elitjhumi nambili weza ngemva koJesu, wafika wakghwatha umphetho wesambatho sakhe." 
Matthew9:21 Wazitjela wathi: “Nange ngingakghwatha nje isambatho sakhe kwaphela, ngizakuphola.”" 
Matthew9:22 UJesu waphenduka, wambona, wathi: “Yiba nesibindi, ndodakazi! Ukukholwa kwakho kukupholisile.” Nje-ke umfazi loyo waphola khonokho." 
Matthew9:23 Kwathi uJesu nangena ngekumbeni yomphathi wafumana ababethi beempalapala nesiqubuthu ebesenza itjhada," 
Matthew9:24 wathi: “Phumani noke! Umntazana akakafi, ulele.” Kodwana bamhleka." 
Matthew9:25 Kwathi bona kukhutjhelwe isiqubuthu ngaphandle, uJesu wangena ngelawini lomntazana wambamba ngesandla, wavuka." 
Matthew9:26 Iindaba ngalokhu zarhatjheka nesifundeso soke. 
Matthew9:27 UJesu nasuka lapho walandelwa madoda amabili aphopheleko amrhuwelela athi: “Ndodana kaDavida, sirhawukele!”" 
Matthew9:28 Kwathi bona angene ngekumbeni, iimphofu ezimbili zeza kuye, wazibuza wathi: “Niyakholwa bona ngingakghona ukwenza lokho na?” Zamphendula zathi: “Iye, Kosi!”" 
Matthew9:29 Yeke uJesu wakghwatha amehlwazo wathi: “Akwenzeke njengokukholwa kwenu!” 
Matthew9:30 Zaphophuluka. UJesu waziyelelisa khulu, wathi: “Qinisekisani bona kungabi namuntu owazi ilitho ngalokhu!”" 
Matthew9:31 Kodwana zakhamba zarhatjha iindaba ngaye kiso soke isifunda. 
Matthew9:32 Kwathi lokha nabaphumako, kwalethwa kuJesu umuntu ogade anedimoni begodu asimumu." 
Matthew9:33 Ngemva kobana idimoni liqotjhiwe, umuntu obegade asimumu wakhuluma. Isiqubuthu sarareka sabe sathi: “Into enje azange kheyibonwe kwa-Israyeli!”" 
Matthew9:34 Kodwana abaFarisi bathi: “Uqotjha amadimoni ngombusi wamadimoni.” 
Matthew9:35 UJesu wadabula imizi nemizana, wafundisa ngemasinagogini wabo, watjhumayela ivangeli lombuso kaZimu, wapholisa abantu abaphethwe mihlobo ngemihlobo yobulwelwe nezifo." 
Matthew9:36 Kwathi bona abone iinqubuthu, wazirhawukela ngombana gade zihlukumeziwe begodu zinganamandla, zifana nezimvu ezingenamelusi." 
Matthew9:37 Yeke wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Isivuno sinengi, kodwana iinsebenzi zilibinzana." 
Matthew9:38 Bawani iKosi yesivuno bona ithumele iinsebenzi esiminayo yesivuno.” 
Matthew10:1 UJesu wabizela abafundi bakhe abalitjhumi nambili kuye, wabanikela amandla wokuqotjha imimoya emimbi nokwelapha woke amalwelwe nezifo." 
Matthew10:2 Naka amabizo wabapostoli abalitjhumi nambili: Wokuthoma nguSimoni okuthiwa nguPitrosi nomfowabo u-Andrisi; uJakopo nomfowabo uJwanisi, amadodana kaZebediya;" 
Matthew10:3 uFlebhe noBharitholomeyusi, uTomasi noMatewu umthelisi; uJakopo umsa ka-Alfiyosi, uThadiyosi;" 
Matthew10:4 uSimoni umZelothe kanye noJudasi Iskariyodi owakhaphela uJesu. 
Matthew10:5 Laba abalitjhumi nambili bathunywa nguJesu nemilayezo elandelako: “Ningayi hlangana nabatjhili begodu ningangeni ngitjho nakowodwa umuzi wamaSamariya. 
Matthew10:6 Ngangcono niye ezimvini ezilahlekileko zakwa-Israyeli. 
Matthew10:7 Ekukhambeni kwenu, tjhumayelani umlayezo lo, ‘Umbuso wezulu ubandamele!’" 
Matthew10:8 Pholisani abagulako, nivuse abafileko, nihlambulule labo abaphethwe likhwekhwe, niqotjhe amadimoni. Namukeliswe ngesihle, yeke nani yiphani ngesihle." 
Matthew10:9 Ningaphathi igolide, isiliva namkha ikoporo emabhandenenu." 
Matthew10:10 Ningaphathi imbada yokukhombela ekhambeni lenu, esinye isambatho, amapatlagwana namkha intonga ngombana isisebenzi kufanele sinikelwe esikuhlongako." 
Matthew10:11 “Nanyana kungaba ngiliphi idorobho namkha umuzi eningena kiwo, funani umuntu owazisako, nihlale kwakhe bekube kumhlana nikhambako." 
Matthew10:12 Akuthi naningena emzini, nilotjhise." 
Matthew10:13 Nangabe abantu ekhayenelo bayanamukela, ukuthula kwenu akuhlale lapho; kodwana nabanganamukeliko, ukuthula kwenu akubuyele kini." 
Matthew10:14 Nakube anamukeleki namezwenu akalalelwa, yenithintithe ithuli eenyaweni zenu, niphume ekhayenelo namkha emzini lowo." 
Matthew10:15 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona kuzokuba ngcono enarheni yeSodoma neGomora ngomhla wokuphela kunomuzi lowo.” 
Matthew10:16 “Qalani, nginithuma njengezimvu hlangana neempisi. Ngalokho hlakaniphani njengeenyoka, nibe msulwa njengamazuba." 
Matthew10:17 Hlalani nibaqaphele abantu abazanibamba banise ebandla, banirithe ngemasinagoginabo." 
Matthew10:18 Nizakulethwa phambi kwababusi namakhosi ngebanga lami, kube bufakazi kibo nakabatjhili." 
Matthew10:19 Lokha nabanibambako, ningakhathazeki kobana nizokuthini namkha niyibeke njani indaba, nakufika isikhathi nizanikukelwa bona nithini" 
Matthew10:20 ngombana akusini enizabe nikhuluma, kodwana kuzabe kunguMoya kaYihlo okhuluma ngani." 
Matthew10:21 “Umfo uzakukhaphela umfo ekufeni nobaba akhaphele umntwanakhe, abantwana bazakuvukela ababelethi, bababulale." 
Matthew10:22 Boke bazanizonda ngebanga lebizo lami, kodwana loyo obambelela bekube sekupheleni, uzakusindiswa." 
Matthew10:23 Lokha nabanizumako kelinye idorobho, balekelani kelinye. Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona angekhe naqeda ukudabula emadorobheni wakwa-Israyeli, iNdodana yoMuntu ingakafiki." 
Matthew10:24 “Umfundi akasingaphezu komfundisakhe; nekhoboka alisingaphezu kwekosalo. 
Matthew10:25 Kumanele umfundi bona abe njengomfundisakhe, nekhoboka laneliswe kukuba njengekosalo. Nangabe ihloko yomuzi ibizwa bona nguBhelzabhulu, nje-ke amanye amalunga womndeni azakubizwa ngamabizo asabekako!”" 
Matthew10:26 “Ngalokho-ke ningabesabi. Koke okugutjuzesiweko kuzokugutjululwa, yoke ifihlo izokuvezwa emtarini." 
Matthew10:27 Enginitjela khona ebumnyameni kukhulumeni ekukhanyeni, enihletjelwa khona, kurhuweleleni niphezu kwephahla." 
Matthew10:28 Ningabesabi labo ababulala umzimba babhalelwe mphefumulo. Kungcono nesabe loyo okghona ukubhubhisa umphefumulo nomzimba esirhogweni. 
Matthew10:29 Iinyoni ezimbili azithengwa ngesipaparwana sinye semali na? Khonapho ayikho nayinye yazo ezakuwela phasi ngaphandle kwemvumo kaYihlo. 
Matthew10:30 Ngitjho neenhluthu ehlokwakho zibalwe zoke. 
Matthew10:31 Yeke ningesabi; niqakatheke khulu kuneenyoni ezinengi!” 
Matthew10:32 “Ngiloyo naloyo ongivumako phambi kwabantu, nami ngizomvuma phambi koBaba osezulwini." 
Matthew10:33 Kodwana ongiphikako phambi kwabantu, nami ngizomphika phambi koBaba osezulwini." 
Matthew10:34 “Ningadlumbani bona ngilethe ukuthula ephasinapha. Awa, angikalethi ukuthula, kodwana ngilethe isabula." 
Matthew10:35 “Ngize bona ngizokuraranisa indodana noyise, indodakazi nonina, umalukazana nonosokana." 
Matthew10:36 Izitha ezikulu zomuntu izaba ngebekhabo. 
Matthew10:37 “Othanda uyise nonina ukudlula mina, akakangifaneli. Othanda indodanakhe namkha indodakazakhe ukudlula mina, akakangifaneli." 
Matthew10:38 Nanyana ngubani ongatjathi isiphambano sakhe, angilandele, akakangifaneli." 
Matthew10:39 Loyo ogodla ipilwakhe izomlahlekela; kodwana ozokulahlekelwa yipilwakhe ngebanga lami, uzayizuza.”" 
Matthew10:40 “Loyo onamukelako, wamukela mina; loyo owamukela mina, wamukela loyo ongithumileko." 
Matthew10:41 Loyo owamukela umphorofidi ebizweni lomphorofidi, uzakufumana umvuzo womphorofidi, nowamukela olungileko ebizweni lolungileko, uzakufumana umvuzo wolungileko." 
Matthew10:42 Nanyana ngubani oseza omunye wabancancanaba ngitjho ithosana lamanzi aqandako ngombana amfundi wami, ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona angeze alahlekelwa mvuzwakhe.”" 
Matthew11:1 Ngemva kobana uJesu aqede ukuyala abafundi bakhe abalitjhumi nambili, wasuka lapho wayokufundisa bewatjhumayela emadorobheni weGalile." 
Matthew11:2 Kwathi bona uJwanisi ezwe asese ngesikhungweni ngalokho obekwenziwa nguKrestu, wathumela abanye babafundi bakhe kuye" 
Matthew11:3 kobana bayombuza bathi: “Unguye olindelwe bona afike, namkha silinde omunye na?”" 
Matthew11:4 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Khambani nibuyele emuva nifese nibikele uJwanisi ngenikuzwileko nenikubonileko: 
Matthew11:5 Iimphofu ziyabona, iinrhurhubi ziyakhamba, abanekhwekhwe bayahlanjululwa, iinthulu ziyezwa, abafileko bayavuswa begodu ivangeli litjhunyayelwa nakilabo abadududu." 
Matthew11:6 Ubusisiwe ongakhubekiko ngami.” 
Matthew11:7 Kwathi abafundi bakaJwanisi nabakhambako, uJesu wakhuluma ngoJwanisi eenqubuthwini, wathi: “Beniphumele ukuyokubonani erhalawumbeni na? Umhlanga udengezeliswa mumoya na?" 
Matthew11:8 Kanti beniphumele ukuyokubonani na? Umuntu owembethe izambatho zakanokutjho na? Abantu abambatha njalo bahlala ngeenkumbeni zamakhosi! 
Matthew11:9 Kanti beniphumele ukuyokubonani na? Kghani ukubona umphorofidi? Iye, ngiyanitjela nabona okudlula umphorofidi." 
Matthew11:10 Nguye lo okutlolwe ngaye kwathiwa, “ ‘Qala, ngithuma isithunywa sami phambi kwakho, esizakulungisa indlela phambi kwakho.’" 
Matthew11:11 “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona akukho noyedwa phakathi kwalabo ababelethwe ngowesifazi owavela waba mkhulu kunoJwanisi uMbhabhadisi. Nanyana kunjalo, omncani embusweni wezulu, mkhulu kunoJwanisi." 
Matthew11:12 Kusukela emihleni kaJwanisi uMbhabhadisi bekube gadesi, umbuso wezulu bewuseze uphangwa, abantu abawuphangako bayawuhluthula." 
Matthew11:13 Boke abaphorofidi nomthetho baphorofida bekwafika uJwanisi. 
Matthew11:14 Nakube nizimisele ukwamukela lokho, yena ungu-Eliya ozako." 
Matthew11:15 Oneendlebe akezwe! 
Matthew11:16 “Kodwana ngizasifanisa nani nje isizukulwana sanamhlanjesesi? Sinjengabantwana abahlezi eendaweni zokuthengisa baseze babizana bathi," 
Matthew11:17 “ ‘Sanidlalela inghwani, kodwana azange nigide! Sarhahlawula, kodwana azange nilile!’" 
Matthew11:18 “UJwanisi wafika angagomi begodu angaseli, nje-ke bathi, ‘Unedimoni’." 
Matthew11:19 INdodana yoMuntu yafika igoma begodu isela, bathi, ‘Naso-ke isirhiribideli nesidakwa, umngani wabathelisi nezoni!’ Ubuhlakani bubonakala buliqiniso ngezenzo zabo.”" 
Matthew11:20 Yeke uJesu wathoma ukusola amadorobho lapha bekwenziwe khona ubunengi bemikarisomraro ngombana abantu bakhona azange baphenduke," 
Matthew11:21 wathi: “Uzazizwa wena Rhorazini! Uzazizwa nawe Bhethe-Sayida! Nakube imikarisomraro eyenziwe kuwe le beyenziwe eTirosi neTsidoni, ngabe kade baphenduka ngokwembatha iinzilo bebazirhatjhe ngomlotha." 
Matthew11:22 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona ngomhla wokuphela uZimu uzokuba nesirhawu esikhulu ebantwini beTirosi neTsidoni kunani! 
Matthew11:23 “Khulu kuwe Kapernawumi. Uzakuphakanyiselwa ezulwini na? Awa, uzokuphoselwa phasi esirhogweni ngombana nabethana imikarisomraro eyenzeke kuwe beyenzeke eSodoma, ngabe isekhona nanamhlanjesi!" 
Matthew11:24 “Kodwana ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bonyana ngomhla wokuphela, inarha yeSodoma izakurhawukelwa khulu kunani.”" 
Matthew11:25 Ngesikhatheso uJesu wathi: “Ngiyakudumisa Baba, mnikazi wezulu nephasi ngombana abahlakaniphileko nabafundileko ubafihlele lokhu, kodwana wakwembulela abancancani." 
Matthew11:26 Iye Baba, ngaleyondlela kube kuhle kuwe." 
Matthew11:27 “Koke ngikunikelwe nguBaba. Akakho owazi iNdodana ngaphandle koBaba begodu akakho owazi uBaba ngaphandle kweNdodana kanye nalabo iNdodana ethanda ukubambulela yena. 
Matthew11:28 “Yizani kimi noke nina enidiniweko nenidisibezekako, mina ngizaniphumuza." 
Matthew11:29 Thwalani ijogi lami, nifunde kimi ngombana ngimnene begodu ngithobile ngehliziyo, imimoya yenu izakufumana ukuphumula" 
Matthew11:30 ngombana ijogi lami lilula nomthwalo wami awudisibezi.” 
Matthew12:1 Ngesikhatheso uJesu warabhula hlangana namasimu wekoroyi ngeSabatha. Abafundi bakhe bebalambile, yeke bathoma ukukha iinqwambi zekoroyi, bagoma." 
Matthew12:2 Kwathi abaFarisi nababona lokho, bathi kuJesu: “Qala, abafundi bakho benza okuphambene nomthetho weSabatha.”" 
Matthew12:3 Wabaphendula wathi: “Azange khenifunde bona uDavida wenzani lokha yena nabakhambisani bakhe nagade balambile na? 
Matthew12:4 Wangena ngekumbeni kaZimu, yena nabakhambisani bakhe, bagoma izikwa ezahlukaniselweko ebekungasimthetho kobana bangazigoma, kwaphela abaphristi bodwa." 
Matthew12:5 Kghani azange khenifunde emthethweni kaMosi bona ngeSabatha abaphristi bayalona ilangelo kodwana bangabi nomlandu na? 
Matthew12:6 Ngiyanitjela bonyana kukhona lapha okukhulu kunethempeli. 
Matthew12:7 Nabegade nisazi bonyana atjho ukuthini amezwi la, ‘Ngilulukela ukwethembeka, ingasi umhlabelo.’ beningekhe nabalahla abamsulwa" 
Matthew12:8 ngombana iNdodana yoMuntu yiKosi yeSabatha.” 
Matthew12:9 UJesu wasuka lapho waya ngesinagogini," 
Matthew12:10 lapho bekunomuntu wesandla esirholopheleko. Bambuza bathi: “Kumthetho ukupholisa ngeSabatha na?” Bambuza lokho ukuze bakghone ukumsola. 
Matthew12:11 Wathi kibo: “Nakube omunye wenu unemvu, bese irhohlomela ngemgodini ngeSabatha, angeze ayilalamela ayikhuphe na?" 
Matthew12:12 Umuntu uqakatheke khulu kunemvu! Ngalokho-ke kumthetho ukwenza okuhle ngeSabatha.” 
Matthew12:13 Nje-ke wathi emuntwini loyo: “Thabulula isandla sakho.” Yeke wasithabulula, sathabuluka, safana nesinye." 
Matthew12:14 AbaFarisi bakhamba, bayokwenza amano wokubulala uJesu." 
Matthew12:15 Sele akulemukile lokho, uJesu wakhamba lapho; isiqubuthu esikhulu samlandela. Wapholisa boke abagulako." 
Matthew12:16 Wabayelelisa bonyana bangavezi nakoyedwa bonyana ungubani. 
Matthew12:17 Wenza lokhu khona kuzakuzaliseka okwakhulunywa ngomphorofidi u-Isaya nasithi: 
Matthew12:18 “Qala, incekwami engiyikhethileko, engiyithandako nengithokozako ngayo. Ngizakubeka uMoyami phezu kwayo nje-ke izakumemezela iingwebo ezizweni." 
Matthew12:19 Angeze yaba nombango namkha irhuwelele, akunamuntu ozakuzwa iphimbo layo eendledlaneni." 
Matthew12:20 Umhlanga otshinyekileko ayizukuwukhambiselela nesibani esififiyelako ayizukusicima, kufikela lapha iphumelelisa khona ukulunga, kuhlule." 
Matthew12:21 Izizwe zoke zizakubeka ithemba lazo ebizweni layo.” 
Matthew12:22 Yeke kwalethwa kuJesu umuntu onedimoni, asiphofu begodu asimumu. UJesu wampholisa, wakghona ukubona nokukhuluma." 
Matthew12:23 Soke isiqubuthu sarareka, sabuza sathi: “Kungaba yiNdodana kaDavida le na?”" 
Matthew12:24 Kodwana kuthe lokha abaFarisi nabezwa lokhu, bathi: “KungoBhelzabhulu ikosi yamadimoni kwaphela kobana umrhali lo akwazi ukuqotjha amadimoni.”" 
Matthew12:25 UJesu wayazi imizindlo yabo, wathi kibo: “Omunye nomunye umbuso olwa wodwa uzakupheliswa; elinye nelinye idorobho namkha ikhaya elilwa lodwa angeze lajama." 
Matthew12:26 Nakube uSathana uqotjha uSathana, kutjho bona wehlukene yedwa. Alo, umbuswakhe ungajama njani na?" 
Matthew12:27 Nakube mina ngiqotjha amadimoni ngoBhelzabhulu, abantu benu bona bawaqotjha ngani? Ngalokho-ke bazakuba bagwebi benu." 
Matthew12:28 Kodwana nakube ngiqotjha amadimoni ngoMoya kaZimu, khona-ke umbuso kaZimu sewufikile phezu kwenu." 
Matthew12:29 “Godu umuntu angangena njani ngekumbeni yetsitsirimba abe athathe ipahlayo ngaphandle kobana athome ngokubopha itsitsirimba leyo ntange na? Ngemva kwalapho-ke adlelezele ikumba leyo. 
Matthew12:30 “Loyo ongasingakimi ujamelene nami, naloyo ongabutheleli nami uyahlakaza." 
Matthew12:31 Yeke ngithi kini: Abantu bazokulitjalelwa soke isono nokuhlambalaza, kodwana loyo ohlambalaza uMoya oCwengileko angeze alitjalelwa." 
Matthew12:32 Nanyana ngubani okhuluma igama elijamelene neNdodana yoMuntu uzakulitjalelwa, kodwana nanyana ngubani okhuluma ngokujamelana noMoya oCwengileko angeze alitjalelwa, kungaba semihleni le namkha emihleni ezako.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Nanithi umuthi muhle, vumani bona neenthelo zawo zihle, kodwana nanithi umuthi mumbi, vumani bona neenthelo zawo zimbi ngombana umuthi wazeka ngeenthelo zawo." 
Matthew12:34 Nina nzalo yeenyoka ndina, yini ehle eningayikhuluma nanikhohlakele kangaka? Ngambala okuvinyilika ekuphuphumeni kwehliziyo, umlomo ukukhuphela ngaphandle." 
Matthew12:35 Umuntu olungileko ukhupha okulungileko emnonwenakhe olungileko; nomuntu omumbi ukhupha okumbi emnonwenakhe omumbi. 
Matthew12:36 “Kodwana ngiyanitjela bonyana umuntu uzaziphendulela ngelanga lokwahlulelwa mayelana nelinye nelinye ilizwi alikhulume butjhophori. 
Matthew12:37 Ngamezwakho uzakuhlanjululwa, ngamezwakho uzakulahlwa.”" 
Matthew12:38 Yeke abanye babafundisi bomthetho nabaFarisi bathi kuJesu: “Mfundisi, sifuna khewusenzele isibonakaliso somkarisomraro.”" 
Matthew12:39 Waphendula wathi: “Isizukulwana esikhohlakeleko nesihlobongako sibawa isibonakaliso somkarisomraro! Kodwana akukho nasinye isibonakaliso esizakunikelwa sona ngaphandle kwesomphorofidi uJona. 
Matthew12:40 Njengombana uJona wahlala amalanga amathathu nobusuku obuthathu ngendeni yehlambi ekulu, nje-ke neNdodana yoMuntu izakuhlala amalanga amathathu nobusuku obuthathu ngemathunjini wephasi." 
Matthew12:41 Amadoda weNiniva azakujama ebandla amangalele isizukulwanesi ngombana atjhuguluka lokha uJona natjhumayelako. Nje-ke omkhulu kunoJona sele akhona. 
Matthew12:42 Indlovukazi yesewula izakujama ebandla imangalele isizukulwanesi ngombana yona yasuka epelazwe yazokulalela ukuhlakanipha kwakaSolomoni. Nje-ke, omkhulu kunoSolomoni sele akhona.”" 
Matthew12:43 “Lokha ummoya omumbi nawuphuma emuntwini, ugelagela eendaweni ezomileko ufunane nendawo yokuphumula kodwana ungayifumani." 
Matthew12:44 Khonapho-ke uzazitjela uthi, ‘Ngizakubuyela ekumbeni engayitjhiyako’, kuthi nawufikako ufunyane ikumba leyo inganamuntu, ithanyelwe beyabutheka kuhle." 
Matthew12:45 Nawusuka lapho-ke uyakhamba uyokulanda eminye imimoya elikhomba ekhohlakele khulu kunawo bese iyeza izokuhlala ngapho. Isiphetho somuntu loyo siba simbi khulu kunekuthomeni. Kuzakuba njalo-ke nesizukulwaneni esikhohlakelekwesi.” 
Matthew12:46 Kwathi uJesu asakhuluma nesiqubuthu, kwafika unina nabafowabo bajama ngaphandle, bafuna ukukhuluma naye." 
Matthew12:47 Omunye umuntu wathi kuye: “Unyoko nabafowenu bayakufuna ngaphandle, babawa ukukhuluma nawe.”" 
Matthew12:48 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngubani umma, bobani abafowethu na?”" 
Matthew12:49 Waqalisa ngebafundini bakhe wathi: “Qalani! Nangu umma nabafowethu. 
Matthew12:50 Loyo owenza okufunwa nguBaba osezulwini ungumfowethu, ungudadwethu begodu ungumma.”" 
Matthew13:1 Khona mhlokho uJesu waphuma ngekumbeni wayokuhlala eqadi kwelwandle. 
Matthew13:2 Kwabuthana kuye isiqubuthu esikhulu kangangobana wangena ngemkhunjini, wahlala phasi khibe abantu bajame eligwini." 
Matthew13:3 Wabatjela okunengi asebenzisa imifanekiso, wathi: “Kwaphuma umtjali wayokutjala imbewu." 
Matthew13:4 Kwathi nasarhatjha imbewu njalo, enye yawela eqadi kwendlela, kwafika iinyoni zayidla." 
Matthew13:5 Enye yawela ekhetheni, lapha bekunganaqulwani enengi khona. Yamila msinyana ngombana iqulwani gade iyincani." 
Matthew13:6 Kodwana kwathi lokha ilanga naliphumako, iintjalo zarhabuka bezatjhwaba ngombana bezinganamirabhu." 
Matthew13:7 Enye imbewu yawela emeveni, akhula, abe ayiminyezela." 
Matthew13:8 Kodwana enye imbewu yawela equlwanini ehle, yakhiqiza isivuno esathela ngekhulu, ngamatjhumi asithandathu, nangamatjhumi amathathu kwalokho okutjaliweko.”" 
Matthew13:9 “Oneendlebe akezwe!” 
Matthew13:10 Abafundi beza kuJesu, bambuza bathi: “Kubayini ukhuluma nabantu ngemifanekiso na?”" 
Matthew13:11 Waphendula wathi: “Ilwazi leemfihlakalo zombuso wezulu linikelwe nina, kodwana bona abakanikelwa." 
Matthew13:12 Ngambala loyo onelitho uzokungezelelelwa ukuze abe nokunengi. Kodwana onganalitho uzokwemukwa ngitjho nokuncancani anakho. 
Matthew13:13 Kungalokho ngikhuluma nabo ngemifanekiso ngombana, “nanyana barhudule amehlo nje, ababoni ilitho, nanyana badose iindlebe nje, abezwa namkha abalemuki do." 
Matthew13:14 Ngabo, isiphorofido saka-Isaya siyaphetheka sokuthi, ‘Nizakusoloko nisizwa kodwana ningazwisisi. Nizakusoloko nibona kodwana ningalemuki." 
Matthew13:15 Ngambala iinhliziyo zabantwaba zilikhuni, iindlebe zabo zizwela kude namehlwabo bawavalile. Nakungasinjalo bebazakubona ngamehlwabo, bezwe ngeendlebe zabo, balemuke ngeenhliziyo zabo, baphenduke, nje-ke bengizabapholisa.’ ”" 
Matthew13:16 “Kodwana abusisiwe amehlwenu ngombana ayabona, neendlebe zenu ngombana ziyezwa." 
Matthew13:17 Ngambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Abaphorofidi abanengi nabantu abalungileko bakhanukela ukubona lokho enikubonileko, kodwana azange bakubone, nokuzwa enikuzwileko, kodwana azange bakuzwe.”" 
Matthew13:18 “Lalelani-ke bonyana umfanekiso ngomtjali utjho ukuthini. 
Matthew13:19 Nanyana ngubani ozwa umlayezo ngombuso kodwana angawulemuki, unjengembewu ewele eqadi kwendlela, omumbi wafika wahluthula lokho okutjalwe kuye." 
Matthew13:20 Loyo owamukela imbewu eyawela ekhetheni ngiloyo ozwa ilizwi, alamukele msinyana ngethabo." 
Matthew13:21 Kodwana ngebanga lokobana anganamrabhu, ubambelela isikhatjhana kwaphela. Lokha nakufika imiraro namkha ukurhayilwa ngebanga lelizwi, uwohloka msinyana." 
Matthew13:22 Owamukela imbewu eyawela hlangana nameva ngiloyo ozwa ilizwi, kodwana amatshwenyeko wepilo le, kanye nokuyengwa bugwili, kwayiminyanisa bekwayenza yangaba neenthelo." 
Matthew13:23 Kodwana owamukela imbewu eyawela equlwanini ehle ngiloyo ozwa ilizwi, alilemuke. Ukhiqiza isivuno esithela ngokubuyelelwe ngekhulu, ngamatjhumi asithandathu namkha ngamatjhumi amathathu kwalokho okutjaliweko.”" 
Matthew13:24 UJesu wabatjela umfanekiso omunye wathi: “Umbuso wezulu unjengomuntu owatjala imbewu ehle esiminakhe. 
Matthew13:25 Kodwana kwathi woke umuntu asalele, isitha sakhe safika satjala ikhula hlangana nekoroyi sabe sakhamba." 
Matthew13:26 Kwathi lokha ikoroyi nayikhulako ithoma nokuphalaza nekhula nalo lazipha amandla. 
Matthew13:27 Iinceku zomuntu loyo zeza kuye, zafika zathi, ‘Kosi, azange utjale imbewu ehle esiminakho na? Alo, ikhuleli libuyaphi?’" 
Matthew13:28 Waphendula wathi, ‘Sisitha esenze lokhu.’ Zambuza zathi, ‘Ufuna bona siyoliruthula na?’" 
Matthew13:29 Waphendula wathi, ‘Awa ngombana naniruthula ikhula, ningahle niruthule nekoroyi ehlanu kwalo." 
Matthew13:30 Lisani kukhule kokubili njalo ndawonye bekube sikhathi sokuvuna. Ngesikhatheso ngizakutjela abavuni ngithi: Thomani ngokubuthelela ikhula bese nilibopha libe ziinyanda kobana liyokutjhiswa; ngemva kwalokho-ke nibuthelele ikoroyi niyithele ngesilulwini sami.’ ” 
Matthew13:31 UJesu wabatjela umfanekiso omunye godu wathi: “Umbuso wezulu ufana nembewu yemastadi eyathathwa mumuntu wayitjala esiminakhe. 
Matthew13:32 Nanyana iyimbewu encani kinazo zoke, kodwana nayikhulako iba sitjalo esikhulu ukuzedlula zoke esimini, ibe mumuthi lapha iinyoni zomkayi zifika zakhele khona eengaleni zawo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Godu uJesu wabatjela omunye umfanekiso wathi: “Umbuso wezulu ufana nesibiliso esathathwa mfazi wasihlanganisa neflowuru enengi kufikela lapha ihlama ikhukhumala khona.” 
Matthew13:34 UJesu wakhuluma koke lokhu esiqubuthwini ngemifanekiso, akunalitho alikhuluma kiso ngaphandle kokusebenzisa umfanekiso." 
Matthew13:35 Ngalokho kwazaliseka okwakhulunywa mphorofidi nasithi: “Ngizakuvula umlomami ngomfanekiso, ngiphuphume iimfihlakalo zekadeni.”" 
Matthew13:36 Yeke watjhiya isiqubuthu, waya ngekumbeni. Abafundi bakhe beza kuye bathi: “Akhe usihlathululele umfanekiso wekhula esimini.”" 
Matthew13:37 Wabaphendula wathi: “Owatjala imbewu ehle yiNdodana yoMuntu. 
Matthew13:38 Isimu liphasi, imbewu ehle madodana wombuso. Ikhula madodana wokhohlakeleko" 
Matthew13:39 bese isitha esitjala ikhula nguSathana. Isivuno kuphela kwesikhathi; abavuni ziingilozi. 
Matthew13:40 Njengombana ikhula liyabuthelelwa belitjhiswe ngemlilweni, kuzokuba njalo-ke ekupheleni kwesikhathi." 
Matthew13:41 INdodana yoMuntu izakuthumela iingilozi zayo ukuyokubuthelela embusweni wayo yoke into ebanga isono nabo boke abenza ubukhohlakali. 
Matthew13:42 Zizabaphosa ngekehleni yomlilo obukhali, lapha kuzakuba khona ukulila nokugedla kwamazinyo." 
Matthew13:43 Nje-ke abalungileko bazakuphazima njengelanga embusweni kaYise wabo. Oneendlebe akezwe!” 
Matthew13:44 “Umbuso wezulu ufana nomnotho ofihlwe esimini. Lokha umuntu nawufunyanako, uyawufihla godu, bese kuthi ekuthabeni kwakhe akhambe ayokuthengisa koke anakho, athenge isimu leyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Godu umbuso wezulu ufana nomthengi ofunana namatje aligugu. 
Matthew13:46 Lokha nafumana elinenani eliphezulu, uyakhamba ayokuthengisa koke anakho, athenge ilitjelo." 
Matthew13:47 “Godu umbuso wezulu ufana nenede eyehliselwa ngelwandle, yabamba yoke imihlobo yeenhlambi." 
Matthew13:48 Kuthe bona izale, ababambi beenhlambi bayidosela ngaphandle eligwini. Yeke bahlala phasi bahlukanisa iinhlambi; ezihle zafakwa ngeenqwebini, kwathi ezingakalungi bazilahla." 
Matthew13:49 Kuzokuba njalo-ke ekupheleni kwesikhathi. Iingilozi zizakufika zehlukanise abakhohlakeleko kabalungileko," 
Matthew13:50 bese zibaphosela ngekehleni yomlilo obukhali, lapha kunokulila nokugedla kwamazinyo.”" 
Matthew13:51 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Nikuzwisisile lokhu na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Iye.” 
Matthew13:52 Yena wathi kibo: “Yeke woke umfundisi womthetho ofundiswe ngombuso wezulu ufana nomnikazi wekumba okhupha ngebulungelweni lakhe amagugu amatjha namadala.” 
Matthew13:53 Kuthe bona uJesu aqede ukukhuluma imifanekiso le, wasuka endaweni leyo." 
Matthew13:54 Wabuyela edorobheni lekhabo. Wafundisa ngesinagogini, kwathi labo abamuzwako barareka. Babuza bathi: “Umuntu lo ukuthethephi ukuhlakanipha kanye namandla wemikarisomraro engaka na?" 
Matthew13:55 Akusiyindodana yombazi le na? Angithi unina nguMariya? Abafowabo akusinguJakopo, uJosefa, uSimoni noJudasi?" 
Matthew13:56 Angithi abodadwabo boke siyabazi, bahlala lapha? Alo, umrhali lo ukuthethephi koke lokhu na?”" 
Matthew13:57 Yeke bakhubeka ngaye. Kodwana uJesu wathi kibo: “Kusemzini wekhabo nangekumbenakhe kwaphela lapha umphorofidi angahlonitjhwa khona.” 
Matthew13:58 Azange enze imikarisomraro eminengi lapho ngombana bebangakholwa kuhle. 
Matthew14:1 Ngesikhatheso uHerode, umtetrarerhesi gade ezwe imibiko ngoJesu," 
Matthew14:2 yeke wathi eencekwini zakhe: “Lo nguJwanisi uMbhabhadisi. Uvukile kabafileko! Ngikho amandla wemikarisomraro asebenza kuye nje.” 
Matthew14:3 UHerode gade abambe uJwanisi, wambopha bewamdlhunya ngesikhungweni ngebanga lakaHerodiya, umkamfowabo uFlebhe." 
Matthew14:4 Wenza njalo ngombana uJwanisi bekaseze asithi kuye: “Akukavumeleki bonyana ungamthatha.” 
Matthew14:5 UHerode wafuna ukubulala uJwanisi, kodwana gade esaba abantu ngombana bebathatha uJwanisi bonyana umphorofidi." 
Matthew14:6 Kuthe ngelanga lokubelethwa kwakaHerode, indodakazi kaHerodiya yagida phambi kwabantu, yajabulisa uHerode kangangobana" 
Matthew14:7 wayithembisa ngesifungo bonyana uzoyinikela nanyana yini eyibawako. 
Matthew14:8 Ngokutjitjizelwa ngunina, yathi: “Yewungiphe ngesiqwebu ihloko kaJwanisi uMbhabhadisi khona nje!”" 
Matthew14:9 Ikosi yadana, kodwana ngebanga lesifungo esenzileko kanye neenthekeli zayo ezisesidlweni, yayala bonyana isibawo somntazana siphethwe." 
Matthew14:10 Ngalokho yayala bonyana uJwanisi aquntwe ihloko angesikhungweni. 
Matthew14:11 Ngambala ihlokwakhe yalethwa ngesiqwebu yanikelwa umntazana, yena wayithatha wayisa kunina." 
Matthew14:12 Abafundi bakaJwanisi beza, bathatha isidumbu sakhe basibulunga. Basuka lapho bayokutjela uJesu." 
Matthew14:13 Kuthe bona uJesu ezwe okwenzekileko, wasuka lapho wathaya ngomkhumbi, waya emmangweni ayedwa. Emva kobana isiqubuthu sizwe lokho, samlandela ngeenyawo sisuka ngedorobheni." 
Matthew14:14 UJesu waphuma ngemkhunjini, kuthe lokha nabona isiqubuthu esikhulu, ihliziywakhe yarhawuka, wapholisa abagulako." 
Matthew14:15 Kwathi nakuhlwako, abafundi bakhe beza kuye bathi: “Indawo le ikude nemizi kanti nokuhlwa sekuhlwile. Tjela abantu bakhambe ukuze baye emizini bayozithengela ukugoma.”" 
Matthew14:16 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Akunasidingo sokobana bakhambe. Bapheni nina ngokwenu kokugoma!” 
Matthew14:17 Bamphendula bathi: “Thina siphethe izikwa ezihlanu neenhlambi ezimbili kwaphela.” 
Matthew14:18 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kulethenapha.” 
Matthew14:19 Watjela abantu bona bahlale phasi emgwengweni. Wathatha izikwa ezihlanu neenhlambi ezimbili, waqala phezulu ezulwini, wathokoza. Wahlephula izikwa, wanikela abafundi bakhe, bona banikela abantu." 
Matthew14:20 Woke umuntu wagoma ngokwaneleko. Abafundi babutha iintshutshuru eziseleko, zazala iinqwebu ezilitjhumi nambili." 
Matthew14:21 Inani lamadoda elagomako gade liziinkulungwana ezihlanu, kungakabalwa abafazi nabantwana." 
Matthew14:22 Khonokho uJesu watjela abafundi bona bangene ngemkhunjini bakhambe phambi kwakhe baye ngaphetjheya kwelwandle, yena wasala atjela abantu bona bakhambe." 
Matthew14:23 Kuthe bona atjele abantu bonyana bakhambe, wenyukela entabeni ayedwa wayokuthandaza. Kwabe kwahlwa ayedwa lapho." 
Matthew14:24 Ngesikhatheso umkhumbi besele ukude tle nelwandle, uwubawubiwa mamaza ngombana bewuqalene nommoya." 
Matthew14:25 Phakathi komlindo wesine ebusuku, uJesu waya ebafundini bakhe akhamba phezu kwamanzi." 
Matthew14:26 Kuthe lokha abafundi nabambona akhamba phezu kwamanzi, baba nokwesaba bebathi: “Sipuku!” Batjho njalo barhuwelela ngokwesaba." 
Matthew14:27 Kodwana khonokho uJesu wathi kibo: “Yibani nesibindi! Ngimi, ningesabi!”" 
Matthew14:28 UPitrosi waphendula wathi: “Kosi, nakube nguwe, yewungilayele bona ngikhambe phezu kwamanzi ngize kuwe.”" 
Matthew14:29 UJesu wathi: “Yewuze!” Yeke uPitrosi waphuma ngemkhunjini, wakhamba phezu kwamanzi asiya kuJesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kodwana kuthe lokha nabona ummoya, wesaba bewathoma ukutjhingela. Warhuwelela wathi: “Kosi, yewungisindise!”" 
Matthew14:31 Khonokho uJesu wathabulula isandla sakhe wambamba wathi kuye: “Wena onokukholwa okuncani, uzazeleni na?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bangena bobabili ngemkhunjini; ummoya wathula. 
Matthew14:33 Labo ebegade bangemkhunjini bathandaza uJesu bathi: “Kwamambala uyiNdodana kaZimu!” 
Matthew14:34 Kwathi bona beyame umlambo, baya eGenesaretha." 
Matthew14:35 Lokha amadoda walapho nalemuka uJesu, athumela ilizwi kizo zoke iinarha ezibhodileko. Abantu baletha boke abagulako babo kuJesu." 
Matthew14:36 Bamncenga bona avumele boke abagulako bathinte nje kwaphela umphetho wengubakhe, nje-ke boke abamthintako baphola." 
Matthew15:1 Yeke abanye babaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho basuka eJerusalema beza kuJesu bambuza bathi: 
Matthew15:2 “Kubayini abafundi bakho beqa isiko labadala na? Abahlambi izandla zabo nabagomako!” 
Matthew15:3 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kubayini neqa umyalo kaZimu ngebanga lesiko lekhenu na? 
Matthew15:4 Ngambala uZimu wathi, ‘Hlonipha uyihlo nonyoko,’ begodu, ‘Nanyana ngubani othuka uyise namkha unina kufanele abulawe’." 
Matthew15:5 Kodwana nithi umuntu nathi kuyise namkha kunina, ‘Nanyana yini ebegade nginganisiza ngayo sele ngiyinikele kuZimu njengesipho’," 
Matthew15:6 akukameli bona, ‘ahloniphe uyise’ ngento leyo. Ngalokho nilahla ilizwi lakaZimu ngebanga lamasikwenu." 
Matthew15:7 Nina bazenzisi ndina! U-Isaya bekaqinisile lokha naphorofida ngani asithi: 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Abantwaba bangidumisa ngeembhena zabo, khisibe iinhliziyo zabo zikude nami." 
Matthew15:9 Bangidumisa ngelize, iimfundiso zabo zimithetho nje kwaphela efundiswa babantu!’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Yeke uJesu wabizela isiqubuthu kuye, wathi kiso: “Lalelani benilemuke." 
Matthew15:11 Akusikho okungena ngemlonyeni okusilaphaza umuntu; kodwana ngilokho okuphuma ngaphakathi kwakhe.” 
Matthew15:12 Yeke abafundi bakhe beza kuye bathi: “Uthi uyazi nje bona abaFarisi bakhubekile lokha nabezwa lokhu na?” 
Matthew15:13 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Soke isitjalo uBaba osezulwini angakasitjali sizokuruthulwa ngemirabhaso. 
Matthew15:14 Baliseni, babahlahli abaphopheleko. Nakube isiphofu sirhola esinye isiphofu, zizokuwela ngemgodini zombili njalo.”" 
Matthew15:15 UPitrosi wathi: “Sihlathululela umfanekiso lo!” 
Matthew15:16 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kanti nani anikabi ukulemuka na? 
Matthew15:17 Anazi bonyana nanyana yini okungena ngemlonyeni womuntu kuya ngesiswini, kubuye kuphume emzimbeni na?" 
Matthew15:18 Kodwana koke okuphuma ngemlonyeni kuvela ehliziyweni, ngilokho-ke okusilaphaza umuntu." 
Matthew15:19 Iye, ehliziyweni kuvela imizindlo emimbi, ukubulala, ukuhlobonga, ubufebe, ubusela, ukufakaza amala nokuhlambalaza." 
Matthew15:20 Lokho-ke ngikho okusilaphaza umuntu. Kodwana ukugoma ningakahlambi izandla, akumenzi umuntu bonyana asilaphale.”" 
Matthew15:21 UJesu wasuka lapho waya esifundeni seTirosi neTsidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Umfazi womKanana obekahlala endaweni leyo, weza kuye, warhuwelela wathi: “Kosi, Ndodana kaDavida, ngirhawukele! Indodakazami ihlukumezeke khulu ngebanga lokungenwa lidimoni.”" 
Matthew15:23 Kodwana uJesu azange atjho nelilodwa ilizwi kuye. Abafundi bakhe beza kuye bamrabhela, bathi: “Mtjele akhambe ngombana uhlalele ukusirhuwelela!”" 
Matthew15:24 Waphendula wathi: “Ngithunywe kwaphela ezimvini ezilahlekileko zakwa-Israyeli.” 
Matthew15:25 Khonapho umfazi weza waguqa phambi kwakhe wathi: “Kosi, yewungisize!”" 
Matthew15:26 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Akusikuhle ukuthatha ukudla kwabantwana ukuphosele izinja.” 
Matthew15:27 Waphendula wathi: “Kuliqiniso Kosi, kodwana izinja nazo zidla iintshutshuru eziwa etafuleni lomninizo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Yeke uJesu wamphendula wathi: “Awu, mma, ukukholwa kwakho kukhulu! Akube njengokwesibawo sakho.” Khonokho indodakazakhe yaphola." 
Matthew15:29 UJesu wasuka lapho wakhamba magegana nelwandle leGalile. Ngemva kwalapho wakhwela intaba, wafese wahlala phasi." 
Matthew15:30 Iinqubuthu ezinengi zeza kuye, zaletha kuye iinrhurhubi, iimphofu, iinrhole, iimumu nabanye abanengi abagulako, zababeka eenyaweni zakhe; wabapholisa boke." 
Matthew15:31 Abantu barareka nababona iimumu zikhuluma, iinrhole ziphiliswa, iinrhurhubi zikhamba, iimphofu zibona; badumisa uZimu ka-Israyeli." 
Matthew15:32 UJesu wabizela abafundi bakhe kuye wathi: “Ngiyabarhawukela abantwaba, sekumalanga amathathu basoloko sebanami begodu abasenalitho lokugoma. Angifuni kobana bakhambe balambile ngombana bangatsirimezeka endleleni.”" 
Matthew15:33 Abafundi bakhe bambuza bathi: “Sizasifumanaphi isikwa esaneleko endaweni ekude kangaka nemizi kobana siphe isiqubuthwesi na?” 
Matthew15:34 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Ninezikwa ezingaki na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Sinezikwa ezilikhomba neenhlambi ezincani ezimbalwa.” 
Matthew15:35 Yeke uJesu wabawa isiqubuthu bona sihlale phasi emgwengweni. 
Matthew15:36 Wathatha izikwa ezilikhomba neenhlambi, kwathi nasele athokozile, wasihlephula, wanikela abafundi bakhe; bona-ke banikela abantu." 
Matthew15:37 Boke bagoma, basutha. Ngemva kwalapho abafundi babuthelela iintshutshuru, zazala iinqwebu ezilikhomba." 
Matthew15:38 Inani lamadoda agomako laba ziinkulungwana ezine ngaphandle kwabafazi nabantwana. 
Matthew15:39 Ngemva kobana uJesu atjele isiqubuthu bona sikhambe, wangena ngemkhunjini, waya endaweni yeMagadani." 
Matthew16:1 AbaFarisi nabaSadusi beza kuJesu bamlinga ngokumbawa bonyana abakhombise isibonakaliso esibuya ezulwini. 
Matthew16:2 Wabaphendula wathi: “Nakurhwalalako, phele nithi, ‘Lizokubalela ngombana amafu abomvu.’" 
Matthew16:3 Kuthi ekuseni nithi, ‘Namhlanje kuzokuba nesiwuruwuru ngombana amafu aguqubele!’ Niyakwazi ukuhlathulula ubujamo bezulu kodwana anikwazi ukuhlathulula amatshwayo weenkhathi." 
Matthew16:4 Isizukulwana esikhohlakeleko nesihlobongako sifunana namatshwayo wemikarisomraro, kodwana asizukunikelwa ngitjho nasinye ngaphandle kweembonakaliso zakaJona.” UJesu wabatjhiya khonapho." 
Matthew16:5 Abafundi nabayamela ngaphetjheya kwelwandle, balibala ukuthatha isikwa." 
Matthew16:6 UJesu wathi kibo: “Yelelani nitjheje isibiliso sabaFarisi nabaSadusi.” 
Matthew16:7 Bathoma bakhuluma bodwa bathi: “Utjho ngombana asikezi nesikwa.” 
Matthew16:8 UJesu wakwazi egade bakutjho, yeke wabuza wathi: “Nina abanokukholwa okuncani! Kubayini nikhuluma nodwana ngokuthi aninasikwa na?" 
Matthew16:9 Anilemuki nanje na? Anikhumbuli izikwa ezihlanu ezondla iinkulungwana ezihlanu nokobana kwaphuma iinqwebu ezingaki zeentshutshuru enazibutha lapho? 
Matthew16:10 Nithini-ke ngezikwa ezilikhomba ezondla iinkulungwana ezine nokobana kwaphuma iinqwebu ezingaki zeentshutshuru enazibutha lapho? 
Matthew16:11 Alo-ke kwenziwa yini ningalemuki bona bengingakhulumi nani ngesikwa na? Zitjhejeni nina mayelana nesibiliso sabaFarisi nabaSadusi!” 
Matthew16:12 Yeke balemuka bona isibiliso ebegade abasola ngaso bekungasiso esifakwa esikweni, kodwana bekutjho bona bayelele ifundiso yabaFarisi nabaSadusi." 
Matthew16:13 Kwathi lokha uJesu nafika esifundeni seKhesariya-Filipi, wabuza abafundi bakhe wathi: “Abantu bathi iNdodana yoMuntu ingubani na?”" 
Matthew16:14 Bamphendula bathi: “Abanye bathi inguJwanisi uMbhabhadisi namkha ingu-Eliya, abanye godu bathi inguJoromiya namkha ingomunye wabaphorofidi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Wababuza godu wathi: “Alo-ke nina nithi ngingubani na?” 
Matthew16:16 USimoni Pitrosi waphendula wathi: “UnguKrestu, iNdodana kaZimu ophilako.”" 
Matthew16:17 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Ubusisiwe wena Simoni msa kaJona ngombana lokhu akukembulwa mumuntu kuwe kodwana kwembulwe nguBaba osezulwini. 
Matthew16:18 Yeke ngithi kuwe unguPitrosi. Phezu kwedwaleli ngizakwakha ibandla lami, ngitjho namasango weHayidesi angeze ajamelana nalo." 
Matthew16:19 Ngizokunikela iinhluthulelo zombuso wezulu; nanyana yini oyibopha ephasinapha izabe ibotjhiwe nezulwini, nalokho okuthukululako ephasinapha kuzabe kuthukululwe nezulwini.”" 
Matthew16:20 Yeke uJesu wakghala abafundi bakhe bona bangatjeli namunye bonyana unguKrestu. 
Matthew16:21 Kusukela ngesikhatheso uJesu wathoma ukuhlathululela abafundi bakhe bonyana kumele aye eJerusalema lapha azokutlhaga khona ngokunengi ezandleni zabaphathi, abaphristi abakhulu kanye nabafundisi bomthetho. Nokobana kumele abulawe bese kuthi elangeni lesithathu avuke, aphile godu." 
Matthew16:22 UPitrosi wambizela ngeqadi, wamkhalimela, wathi: “Sengathi uZimu angaba nomusa Kosi, koke lokho kungenzeki kuwe!”" 
Matthew16:23 Yeke uJesu waphenduka wathi kuPitrosi: “Suka kimapha, Sathana ndina! Usiqabo endlelenami ngombana imikhumbulwakho akusiyo yokukaZimu, kodwana ingeyabantu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Yeke uJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Nanyana ngubani ofuna ukungilandela, akazidele, atjathe isiphambano sakhe angilandele." 
Matthew16:25 Loyo ofuna ukusindisa ipilo yakhe izomlahlekela; kodwana loyo olahlekelwe yipilo yakhe ngebanga lami uzayifumana. 
Matthew16:26 Kuzamsiza ngani umuntu ukuzuza iphasi loke kodwana alahlekelwe yipilwakhe na? Namkha yini umuntu angenana ngayo ngepilwakhe na? 
Matthew16:27 Ngambala iNdodana yoMuntu izokuza ngephazimulo kaYise neengilozi zayo, yeke izakuvuza omunye nomunye umuntu ngokwemisebenzakhe." 
Matthew16:28 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona abanye abajame lapha njenganje angeze bakubona ukufa bangakaboni iNdodana yoMuntu isiza ngombuswayo.” 
Matthew17:1 Ngemva kwamalanga asithandathu uJesu wathatha uPitrosi, uJakopo noJwanisi umnakwabo kaJakopo, wenyukela nabo entabeni ephakamileko, baba bodwa lapho." 
Matthew17:2 Lapho-ke waphazimuliswa phambi kwabo. Ubuso bakhe baphazima njengelanga nezambatho zakhe zaba mhlophe zakhanya. 
Matthew17:3 Khonapho kwabonakala phambi kwabo uMosi no-Eliya bakhuluma noJesu. 
Matthew17:4 Yeke uPitrosi wathi kuJesu: “Kosi, kuhle kithi ukuba lapha! Nawuthandako, ngizakuhloma imitlhatlhana emithathu lapha, omunye ube ngewakho, omunye ube ngewakaMosi bese omunye ube ngewaka-Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Kwathi asakhuluma njalo, basibekelwa lilifu elidarhileko, bekwazwakala nelizwi libuya elifinapho lathi: “Le yiNdodanami engiyithandako, engithaba khulu ngayo, ilaleleni!”" 
Matthew17:6 Kwathi bona abafundi bezwe lokho, bawa ngobuso phasi baphelile ngevalo." 
Matthew17:7 Kodwana uJesu weza kibo wabakghwatha wathi: “Vukani, ningesabi!”" 
Matthew17:8 Bathi nabaphakamisa amehlo, azange babone umuntu ngaphandle koJesu." 
Matthew17:9 Kwathi nabehla entabeni, uJesu wabayala wathi kibo: “Ningatjeli namunye ngenikubonileko bekube kumhlana iNdodana yoMuntu ivukileko ekufeni!”" 
Matthew17:10 Yeke abafundi bambuza bathi: “Alo-ke kubayini abafundisi bomthetho basithi u-Eliya kufanele eze ntange na?” 
Matthew17:11 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Ngambala u-Eliya uyeza kobana azokubuyisela yoke into. 
Matthew17:12 Kodwana ngiyanitjela bonyana u-Eliya wafika kodwana abantu azange bamazi. Bamphatha ngokuthanda kwabo. NeNdodana yoMuntu izose ihlupheke njalo-ke ezandleni zabo.” 
Matthew17:13 Yeke abafundi balemuka bona bekakhuluma nabo ngoJwanisi uMbhabhadisi. 
Matthew17:14 Kwathi bona bafike esiqubuthwini, kwavela umuntu weza kuJesu, waguqa phambi kwakhe," 
Matthew17:15 wathi kuye: “Kosi, rhawukela indodanami! Inesithunthwana, nje-ke ihlukumezeke khulu. Kanengi iduleka emlilweni nanyana ngemanzini." 
Matthew17:16 Ngayiletha ebafundini bakho, kodwana azange bakghone ukuyipholisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Maye, nina sizukulwana esingakholwako nesonakeleko! Ngizokuhlala nani bekube kunini na? Kuzabe kube nini ngininyamezelela na? Letha indodana leyo kimapha!”" 
Matthew17:18 UJesu wakhalimela idimoni, laphuma emsaneni, yeke waphola khonokho." 
Matthew17:19 Abafundi bakaJesu baya kuye ngasese, bambuza bathi: “Sibangelwe yini kobana singakghoni ukuqotjha idimoneli na?”" 
Matthew17:20 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kungombana ninokukholwa okubogabogako. Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona ingathana beninokukholwa okulingana nembewu yemastadi, beningathi entabeni le, ‘Suka lapha uye laphaya,’ beyizakuvele isuke. Akunalitho ebelizanibhalela!" 
Matthew17:21 Kodwana umhlobo lo awuphumi nje kwaphela ngaphandle komthandazo nokuzila ukudla.” 
Matthew17:22 Kwathi lokha nabahlangana boke eGalile, uJesu wathi kibo: “INdodana yoMuntu izokukhatjhelwa ezandleni zabantu." 
Matthew17:23 Bazoyibulala, kodwana elangeni lesithathu izakuvuswa.” Abafundi badabuka khulu ngalokho." 
Matthew17:24 Ngemva kobana uJesu nabafundi bakhe bafike eKapernawumi, abathelisi bomthelo wethempeli beza kuPitrosi bambuza bathi: “Angithi umfundisenu uyawukhupha umthelo wethempeli?”" 
Matthew17:25 UPitrosi waphendula wathi: “Iye, uyawukhupha.” Kwathi lokha uPitrosi nangena ngekumbeni, uJesu waba ngewokuthoma owakhuluma naye, wambuza wathi: “Simoni, uthini umbono wakho na? Amakhosi wephaseli awuthatha kibobani umthelo na? Kghani awuthatha emadodanenawo namkha emadodaneni wabanye abantu na?”" 
Matthew17:26 UPitrosi wamphendula wathi: “Emadodaneni wabanye abantu.” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Khona-ke amadodana akabalelwa ekukhupheni umthelo. 
Matthew17:27 Kodwana ukuze singabakhubekisi, khamba uye elwandle ufese uphosele isithiyahlambi. Ihlambi yokuthoma ozoyibamba, ithathe uyivule umlomo, uzakufumana iimpaparwana ezine ezilingene umthelo. Zithathe ubanikele zona kube mthelo wami newakho.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ngesikhatheso abafundi beza kuJesu babuza bathi: “Ngubani omkhulu embusweni wezulu na?” 
Matthew18:2 UJesu wabiza umntwana, wamjamisa phakathi kwabo," 
Matthew18:3 wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona ngaphandle kobanyana niphenduke nibe njengabantwana, angekhe nangena embusweni wezulu." 
Matthew18:4 Ngalokho-ke nanyana ngubani ozithoba njengomntwana lo uzakuba ngongomkhulu embusweni wezulu. 
Matthew18:5 Naloyo owamukela umntwana onjengalo ebizweni lami, wamukela mina." 
Matthew18:6 Kodwana nanyana ngubani obangela omunye wabancanaba abakholwa kimi bona one, kuzakuba ngcono kuye kobana abotjhelelwe ilitje lokugaya entanyeni bese acwiliswe ekuzikeni kwelwandle." 
Matthew18:7 “Maye kilo iphasi ngebanga leenkhubekiso! Iinkhubekiso zizakulokhu zivela, kodwana maye emuntwini eziza ngaye!" 
Matthew18:8 “Nangabe isandla sakho namkha inyawo lakho liyakukhuba, liqunte ulilahle. Kungcono ukungena ekuphileni uyingunwana namkha usirhurhubi kunobana ube nezandla zombili namkha iinyawo zombili kodwana uphoselwe emlilweni wesiphelani." 
Matthew18:9 Nangabe ilihlo lakho liyakukhuba, ligobhodlhe ulilahle! Kulula kuwe ukungena ekuphileni nelihlo elilodwa, kunobanyana ube namehlo amabili, kodwana uphoselwe ngemlilweni wesirhogo." 
Matthew18:10 “Qinisekani bonyana aninyazi ngitjho namunye wabancancanaba. Ngambala ngiyanitjela bona iingilozi zabo ezulwini zihlala njalo ziphambi kwakaBaba ezulwini," 
Matthew18:11 ngombana iNdodana yoMuntu ize ukusindisa abalahlekileko. 
Matthew18:12 “Uthini umbono wenu na? Nakube umuntu unezimvu ezilikhulu, kuthi eyodwa idurhe, akazukutjhiya ezimatjhumi alithoba nethoba emibundwini ayokufuna edurhileko na?" 
Matthew18:13 Kuthi angayifumana, ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela wehlelwa lithabo elikhulu ngemvu eyodwa leyo kunalezo ezimatjhumi alithoba nethoba ezingazange zidurhe." 
Matthew18:14 Ngokunjalo-ke noYihlo ezulwini akathandi bona kudurhe ngitjho noyedwa wabancancanaba. 
Matthew18:15 “Nakube umfowenu uyakona, khamba uyombonisa iphoswakhe, kube phakathi kwenu kwaphela. Nakube uyakulalela, uzabe umzuzile umfowenu." 
Matthew18:16 Kodwana nakube uyakhunyalala, thatha munye namkha babili abantu bakhambe nawe ukuze yoke indaba iqiniswe ngabofakazi ababili namkha abathathu." 
Matthew18:17 Nakube nabo akabalaleli, bikela ibandla. Nakube nebandlelo akafuni ukulilalela, khona-ke mphathe njengomrhedeni namkha umthelisi.”" 
Matthew18:18 “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona nanyana yini eniyibopha ephasini izakubotjhwa nezulwini nenikuthukululako ephasini kuzakuthukululwa nezulwini. 
Matthew18:19 “Godu ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona nangabe ababili benu ephasini bavumelana ngananyana yini eniyikhombelako, uBaba osezulwini uzanenzela yona." 
Matthew18:20 Ngambala lapho ababili namkha abathathu bahlangene khona ngebizo lami, nami ngilapho nabo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Nje-ke uPitrosi weza kuJesu wambuza wathi: “Kosi, ngimlibalele kangaki umfowethu naphikelele ukungona na? Kghani bekube kalikhomba?”" 
Matthew18:22 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Awa, ingasi bekube kalikhomba, kodwana kube ngokubuyelelwe amatjhumi alikhomba nakhomba." 
Matthew18:23 Ngalokho-ke umbuso wezulu ufana nekosi eyafuna ukulungisa iimali neenceku zayo. 
Matthew18:24 Kwathi lokha nayithoma ukubala, kwalethwa kiyo indoda ebegade ikoloda ikosi leyo iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi zamatalende." 
Matthew18:25 Njengombana beyingakghoni ukukhokha isikolodo sayo, ikosi yathi ayithengiswe, yona, umkayo, abantwabayo nakho koke enakho ukuze kukhokhelwe isikolodweso." 
Matthew18:26 Inceku yawa ngamadolo phambi kwekosi leyo, yarabhela yathi, ‘Akhese ungibekezelele, ngizakukhokhela koke.’" 
Matthew18:27 Ikosi yayizwela ubuhlungu, yasula isikolodo sayo, yayitjhaphulula bona ikhambe." 
Matthew18:28 “Kodwana kwathi lokha inceku leyo nayiphumako, yahlangana nesinye seensebenzi esisebenza nayo ebegade siyikoloda ikhulu labodenariyu. Yasibamba ngomphimbo, yasikhahlameza yathi, ‘Khokha isikolodo sakho ongibamba sona!’" 
Matthew18:29 “Isisebenzeso saguqa phasi sayirabhela sathi, ‘Yewungibekezelele, ngizakukhokhela!’" 
Matthew18:30 Kodwana yabhala; ebangeni lalokho yenza bona isisebenzeso sidlhunywe ngesikhungweni bekube kumhlana sikhokha isikolodweso. 
Matthew18:31 Kwathi bona ezinye iinsebenzi zibone okwenzakeleko, zadana khulu zaya ekosini zayitjela koke okwenzakeleko."
