Matthew18:32 Yeke ikosi yayo yayibiza yathi: ‘Wena sikhohlakali senceku! Ngesule soke isikolodo sakho ngombana ungirabhele bonyana ngikulibalele sona. 
Matthew18:33 Alo, bewungakameli ukuba nesirhawu esisebenzini esisebenza nawe njengombana nami ngibe nesirhawu kuwe na?’" 
Matthew18:34 Ikosi yayo yathukuthela beyayinikelela ezandleni zabaphathisikhungo kobana bayihlunguphaze beyikhokhe koke ekukolodako. 
Matthew18:35 “Ngiyo-ke indlela le uBaba osezulwini azokuphatha ngayo omunye nomunye wenu naningalibaleli abafowenu ngeenhliziyo zenu zoke.” 
Matthew19:1 Kwathi bona uJesu aqede ukukhuluma izintwezi, wasuka eGalile waya esifundeni seJudiya engaphetjheya komlambo iJordani." 
Matthew19:2 Iinqubuthu ezinengi zamlandela, yeke wazipholisa khonapho." 
Matthew19:3 Abanye abaFarisi beza kuye kobana bamlinge. Bambuza bathi: “Kumthetho bonyana indoda itlhale umkayo nanyana kungasiphi isizathu na?” 
Matthew19:4 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Azange khenifunde bonyana ekuthomeni uMdali wenza omduna nomsikazi na? 
Matthew19:5 Yeke wathi, ‘Ngesizathweso indoda izakutjhiya uyise nonina inamathele kumkayo, nje-ke ababilaba baba yinyama yinye.’" 
Matthew19:6 Ngaleyondlela abasesebabili, kodwana banye. Yeke okuhlanganiswe nguZimu, akungabikhona umuntu okwahlukanisako.”" 
Matthew19:7 AbaFarisi bambuza bathi: “Alo-ke kubayini uMosi akhuphe umthetho wokobana indoda inikele umfazi incwadi yesahlukaniso imqotjhe na?” 
Matthew19:8 UJesu waphendula wathi: “UMosi wanivumela bonyana nitlhale abafazi benu ngombana benineenhliziyo ezikhunyaleleko. Kodwana ekuthomeni bekungasinjalo. 
Matthew19:9 Ngiyanitjela bona nanyana ngubani otlhala umkakhe ngaphandle kwesizathu sokuhlobonga bese uthatha omunye umfazi, uzabe uyahlobonga.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: “Nakube kunjalo hlangana nendoda nomkayo, kungadumbana kungathathwa-ke.”" 
Matthew19:11 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Akusingubani nobani ongamukela amezwi la, kodwana kwaphela labo anikelwe bona." 
Matthew19:12 Abanye babaphakulwa ngokubelethwa, abanye benziwa babantu bona babe njalo kanti abanye badela ukuthatha ngebanga lombuso wezulu. Loyo okghona ukwamukela lokho akenze njalo.”" 
Matthew19:13 Yeke kwalethwa abantwana kuJesu kobana abeke izandla phezu kwabo, abathandazele. Kodwana abafundi bathethisa labo ababalethako." 
Matthew19:14 UJesu wathi: “Vumelani abantwana beze kimi, ningabakhandeli ngombana umbuso wezulu ungewabafana nalaba.”" 
Matthew19:15 Nje-ke wathi bona abeke izandla phezu kwabo, wakhamba." 
Matthew19:16 Kweza umuntu kuJesu wathi: “Mfundisi, ngisiphi isenzo sokulunga engingasenza ukuze ngizuze ukuphila okungapheliko na?”" 
Matthew19:17 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kubayini ungibuze ngokulungileko na? Munye kwaphela olungileko. Nakube ufuna ukungena ekuphileni, londa imiyalo.”" 
Matthew19:18 Umuntu loyo wathi: “Ngimiphi imiyalo leyo na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Ungabulali, ungahlobongi, ungebi; ungafakazi amala;" 
Matthew19:19 hlonipha uyihlo nonyoko; uthande umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena.” 
Matthew19:20 Isokana laphendula lathi: “Koke lokho ngikulondile. Ngikuphi okhunye ekufanele ngikwenze na?” 
Matthew19:21 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nawufuna bona ulunge uphelele, khamba uyokuthengisa koke onakho, unikele abadududu, uzakuba nobugwili ezulwini. Yeke uze ungilandele!”" 
Matthew19:22 Kuthe bona isokanelo lizwe lokho, lakhamba lidanile ngombana gade lisigwili samambala." 
Matthew19:23 Yeke uJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona kulikhuni kobana umuntu osigwili angene embusweni wezulu. 
Matthew19:24 Ngiyabuyelela godu ngithi kulula ukuziluma indololwani kunobanyana umuntu osigwili angene embusweni kaZimu.” 
Matthew19:25 Kwathi lokha abafundi nabezwa lokhu, barareka khulu bebabuza bathi: “Alo, nakunjalo ngubani ongasindiswa na?”" 
Matthew19:26 UJesu wabaqala, wabaphendula wathi: “Ebantiwini lokhu kuyinto engeze yenzeka, kodwana ngoZimu koke kuyenzeka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Yeke uPitrosi wathi: “Sitjhiye koke kobana sikulandele. Alo, sizakuzuzani ngalokho na?”" 
Matthew19:28 UJesu wathi kibo: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona ephasini elitjha lokha iNdodana yoMuntu nayihlezi esihlalweni sayo sobukhosi esiphazimulako, nina ebeningilandela, nani nizokuhlala eenhlalweni zobukhosi ezilitjhumi nambili, nigwebe iinkoro ezilitjhumi nambili zakwa-Israyeli." 
Matthew19:29 Loyo naloyo otjhiye iinkumba namkha abafowabo namkha abodadwabo namkha uyise namkha unina namkha abantwana namkha amasimu ngebanga lami, uzakwamukela ngokubuyelelwe kalikhulu abe azuze nokuphila okungapheliko." 
Matthew19:30 Kodwana abanengi abangebokuthoma bazakuba ngebokugcina, kuthi abanengi ekungebokugcina babe ngebokuthoma.”" 
Matthew20:1 “Umbuso wezulu ufana nomnininarha owaphuma ekuseni wayokuqatjha abantu bona basebenze esidiribeni sakhe. 
Matthew20:2 Wavuma ukubakhokhela udenariyu ngelanga, wabese ubathumela esidiribeni sakhe." 
Matthew20:3 Ngesimbi yethoba waphuma godu wabona abanye abantu bajame endaweni ekuthengiselwa kiyo, bangenzi ilitho." 
Matthew20:4 Yeke wathi kibo, ‘Nani khambani niyokusebenza esidiribeni sami, ngizanikhokhela nanyana yini efaneleko.’" 
Matthew20:5 Yeke bakhamba. Kwathi ngesimbi yetjhumi nambili godu nangesimbi yesithathu wenza godu okufanako. 
Matthew20:6 Godu ngesimbi yesihlanu, waphuma wafunyana abanye nabo bajame khonapho. Wathi kibo, ‘Kubayini nilokhu nijame lapha imini yoke ningenzi ilitho na?’" 
Matthew20:7 Bamphendula bathi, ‘Kungombana akunamuntu osiqatjhako.’ Wathi kibo, ‘Yeke nani khambani niyokusebenza ngesidiribeni sami.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Kwathi bona ukuhlwa kufike, umninisidiribe watjela indunakhe wathi, ‘Biza iinsebenzi uzinikele umrholwazo, uthome ngeziqatjhwe muva, ugcine ngezithome ntange.’" 
Matthew20:9 Abantu abathome ukusebenza ngesimbi yesihlanu bafika, barholelwa udenariyu ngamunye." 
Matthew20:10 Kwathi abantu abaqatjhwe ntange nabafikako, badlumbana bona bazakufumana ngaphezudlwana. Kodwana nabo banikelwa udenariyu ngamunye." 
Matthew20:11 Sele bamukele ikokhelwabo bathoma ukunghonghoyila kumnininarha," 
Matthew20:12 bathi, ‘Abantwaba abaqatjhwe muva basebenze nje i-awara linye kwaphela, khonapho ubalinganisa nathi thina ababhesele iduladula yomsebenzi nomtjhiso welanga!’" 
Matthew20:13 “Kodwana waphendula omunye wabo wathi, ‘Mnganami, angikakugalaji. Angithi uvumile bona uzakusebenzela udenariyu na?" 
Matthew20:14 Yeke thatha ikokhelwakho uye ekhaya. Ngifuna ukukhokhela umuntu oqatjhwe muva lo ngokulingana nalokho engikukhokhele khona. 
Matthew20:15 Anginalungelo lokwenza engikuthandako ngemalami na? Unomona ngombana nginomusa na?’ ” 
Matthew20:16 “Ngaleyondlela bokugcina bazakuba ngebokuthoma nebokuthoma babe ngebokugcina.” 
Matthew20:17 Kwathi uJesu nakhuphukela eJerusalema, wabizela abafundi abalitjhumi nambili ngeqadi," 
Matthew20:18 wathi kibo: “Sikhuphukela eJerusalema lapha iNdodana yoMuntu izokukhatjhelwa khona kubaphristi abakhulu nakubafundisi bomthetho. Bazoyigwebela ukufa," 
Matthew20:19 bayinikele ezandleni zabatjhili kobana bahlekise ngayo, bayirithe bebayibethele esiphambanweni. Kodwana elangeni lesithathu izakuvuka kabafileko.”" 
Matthew20:20 Yeke umkaZebediya namadodanakhe amabili baya kuJesu, bafese baguqa phambi kwakhe bakhombela isisa kuye." 
Matthew20:21 UJesu wambuza wathi: “Ufunani na?” Wamphendula wathi: “Vuma bona amadodanami amabili la akuphahle embuswenakho, enye ibe ngesigomeni sakho, enye ibe ngesinceleni sakho.”" 
Matthew20:22 UJesu waphendula, wathi: “Anikwazi enikubawako. Ningakghona ukusela ikapho engizoyisela le na?” Baphendula bathi: “Singakghona.”" 
Matthew20:23 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kwamambala nizakusela ikapho engiyiselako, kodwana nayikuhlala ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni sami, awa akusingokwami ukutjho lokho. Iindawezi ngezalabo uBaba azilungisele bona.”" 
Matthew20:24 Kwathi bona abalitjhumi bezwe ngalokho, banyenya ngamadodana amabili layo." 
Matthew20:25 Yeke uJesu wababizela ndawonye boke wathi: “Niyazi bona ababusi babatjhili banamandla phezu kwabo neenkhulu zabo eziphezulu zinegunya phezu kwabo. 
Matthew20:26 Yeke, akusinjalo kini! Nanyana ngubani phakathi kwenu ofuna ukuba mkhulu, kufanele abe yincekwenu." 
Matthew20:27 Nofuna ukuba ngewokuthoma akabe likhoboka lenu; 
Matthew20:28 kube njengombana kunjalo ngeNdodana yoMuntu engakezeli ukuzokwenzelwa, kodwana izele ukwenzela nokunikela ipilwayo njengesihlengo sabanengi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Kwathi uJesu nabafundi bakhe nabasuka eJerikho, isiqubuthu esikhulu sabalandela." 
Matthew20:30 Bekuneemphofu ezimbili ebezihlezi eqadi kwendlela, zathi zingezwa bona uJesu uzokudlula lapho, zarhuwelela zathi: “Kosi, Ndodana kaDavida, sirhawukela!”" 
Matthew20:31 Isiqubuthu sazithethisa sathi azithule. Kodwana zarhuwelela khulu kwanjesi zathi: “Kosi, Ndodana kaDavida, sirhawukela!”" 
Matthew20:32 UJesu wajama, wazibiza, wathi kizo: “Nifuna bona nginenzeleni na?”" 
Matthew20:33 Zathi: “Kosi, sifuna ukubona!”" 
Matthew20:34 UJesu wazirhawukela, wakghwatha amehlwazo. Khonokho zabona, zamlandela." 
Matthew21:1 Kwathi bona batjhidele eJerusalema, sele baseBhethifage entabeni ye-Oliva, uJesu wathumela abafundi bakhe" 
Matthew21:2 wathi kibo: “Yeniye emzini ongaphambi kwenu, khonapho nizakufumana udumbana abotjhiwe, udumbanyanakhe aseqadi kwakhe. Mtjhaphululeni nibalethapha." 
Matthew21:3 Nakukhona otjho okuthileko kini nimtjele bona iKosi iyabadinga, yeke izababuyisa msinyana.”" 
Matthew21:4 Lokhu kwenzeka ukuze kuzaliseke okwakhulunywa mphorofidi, nasithi:" 
Matthew21:5 “Yenithi endodakazini yeZiyoni: “Naso ikosakho iza kuwe, ngokuzithoba beyikhwele udumbana, iye, udumbanyana olithole lakadumbana.”" 
Matthew21:6 Yeke abafundi bakhamba bayokwenza njengombana uJesu abayalile. 
Matthew21:7 Baletha udumbana nodumbanyanakhe, babeka izambatho zabo phezu kwabo, yeke uJesu wahlala phezu kwazo." 
Matthew21:8 Isiqubuthu esikhulu saqhisa izambatho zaso endleleni, abanye basika namatjhwaba wemithi bawaqhisa endleleni." 
Matthew21:9 Isiqubuthu esakhamba phambi kwakhe nebesikhamba ngemva kwakhe sarhuwelela sathi: “Hosana kiyo iNdodana kaDavida! Ubusisiwe ozako ebizweni leKosi! Hosana kweliphezulu!” 
Matthew21:10 Kuthe bona uJesu angene ngeJerusalema, idorobho loke lavungazela. Abantu babuza bathi: “Ungubani lo na?”" 
Matthew21:11 Isiqubuthu saphendula sathi: “Lo nguJesu omphorofidi obuya eNazaretha eseGalile.” 
Matthew21:12 UJesu wangena ngethempelini, waqotjha boke ebebathenga bathengisa lapho. Waphekghula iintafula zabatjintji bemali neenhlalo zabathengisa amazuba," 
Matthew21:13 wathi kibo: “Kutloliwe kwathiwa, ‘Ikumbami izakubizwa bona yikumba yokuthandaza’ kodwana nina niyenze irharha labahlanguli!”" 
Matthew21:14 Iimphofu neenrhole zeza kuye ngethempelini, wazipholisa." 
Matthew21:15 Kodwana kwathi lokha abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho nababona izinto ezikarisako ebegade azenza, nabantwana barhuwelela ngethempelinapho basithi “Hosana kiyo iNdodana kaDavida”, banyenya khulu." 
Matthew21:16 Yeke babuza uJesu bathi: “Uthi uyayizwa nje itlabelwana le bona ithini na?” UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Iye ngiyabezwa! Kghani azange khenifunde imitlolo ethi, ‘Emilonyeni yabantwana neyamasana wabeka indumiso’ na?”" 
Matthew21:17 UJesu wabatjhiya, waphuma ngedorobheni waya eBhethaniya, walala khona." 
Matthew21:18 Kuthe nasele asendleleni abuyela eJerusalema ekuseni, walamba." 
Matthew21:19 Wabona umuthi wamakhiwani eqadi kwendlela, waya kiwo, kodwana azange afumane ilitho ngaphandle kwamakari. Yeke wathi emthini lowo: “Inga ungahlala ungasatheli!” Khonokho umuthi wamakhiwani woma." 
Matthew21:20 Abafundi nababona lokho barareka. Babuza bathi: “Umuthi wamakhiwani wome njani msinyana kangaka na?” 
Matthew21:21 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona naninokukholwa ningazazi, anizukwenza kwaphela okwenziwe emthini wamakhiwani lo, kodwana ningatjho nentabenapha nithi, ‘Suka, uziphosele ngelwandle,’ yeke kuzakwenzeka lokho." 
Matthew21:22 Nanikholwako, nizakwamukela nanyana yini eniyikhombelako ngomthandazo.”" 
Matthew21:23 UJesu wangena ngesirhodlweni sethempeli; kwathi asafundisa, abaphristi abakhulu nabaphathi babantu beza kuye bambuza bathi: “Izintwezi uzenza ngegunya lakabani na? Ngubani okuphe amandla la na?”" 
Matthew21:24 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Nami yithi nginibuze umbuzo owodwa kwaphela. Nange ningangiphendula, ngizanitjela bona ngizenza ngegunya lakabani izintwezi." 
Matthew21:25 Umbhabhadiso kaJwanisi ubuyaphi na? Ubuya ezulwini namkha ebantwini na?” Bacocisana babodwa ngendaba le, bathi: “Nasithi ubuya kuZimu, uzasibuza bonyana alo kubayini singakholwa." 
Matthew21:26 Godu nasithi ubuya ebantwini, sesaba abantu ngombana bayakholwa bonyana uJwanisi gade amphorofidi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Yeke bamphendula bathi: “Awa, asazi.” Yeke wathi kibo: “Nami-ke angekhe nganitjela bona ligunyabani engenza ngalo izintwezi.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Nithini ngalokhu na? Bekukhona umuntu onamadodana amabili. Waya kekulu wathi kiyo, ‘Ndodana, khamba uyokusebenza esidiribeni namhlanje.’" 
Matthew21:29 Yaphendula yathi, ‘Angifuni,’ kodwana emva kwesikhathi yazisola, yaya." 
Matthew21:30 Yeke umuntu loyo waya endodanenakhe enye, wafike watjho amezwi afanako, yaphendula yathi, ‘Iye, baba,’ kodwana azange iye." 
Matthew21:31 Ngiyiphi-ke phakathi kwamabili la eyenze ekufunwa nguyise na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Yokuthoma.” Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona abathelisi neengwadla zingena embusweni kaZimu phambi kwenu. 
Matthew21:32 UJwanisi weza kini wanitjengisa indlela yokulunga, azange benimkholwe, kodwana abathelisi neengwadla zamkholwa. Kubhale ngitjho nanyana sele nikubonile lokhu, azange beniphenduke nimkholwe.”" 
Matthew21:33 UJesu wathi kibo: “Lalelani omunye umfanekiso naku: Kwakhe kwaba khona umnininarha owatjala isidiribe, wakha umthangala magegana naso. Wemba ubutlhodlhelo kiso bewakha nesithala sokulinda. Yeke waqatjhisela abalimi abathileko isidiribeso, yena wathatha ikhambo." 
Matthew21:34 Kwathi nakutjhidela isikhathi sokuvuna, wathumela iinsebenzi zakhe ebaqatjhini kobana bayokukha iinthelo zakhe." 
Matthew21:35 Abaqatjhi babamba iinsebenzi zakhe, esinye basibetha, esinye basibulala, sesithathu basikhanda ngamatje." 
Matthew21:36 Godu wathumela ezinye iinsebenzi kibo, zaba zinengi ukudlula zokuthoma, abaqatjhi baziphatha njengezekuthomeni." 
Matthew21:37 Ekugcineni wathumela indodanakhe kibo adlumbana asithi, ‘Nakuyindodanami bazayihlonipha.’" 
Matthew21:38 Kodwana kwathi abaqatjhabo nababona indodana, bakhuluma bodwa bathi, ‘Angithi le yindlalifa! Asiyibulaleni siyithathele ilifa layo.’" 
Matthew21:39 Yeke bayibamba bayiphosa ngaphandle kwesidiribe, bayibulala." 
Matthew21:40 Alo-ke umninisidiribe nafikako uzabenzani abaqatjhaba na?” 
Matthew21:41 Bamphendula bathi: “Iinkhohlakalezo uzozibhubhisa nya, athathe isidiribe sakhe asiqatjhisele abanye abazamnikela isabelo sakhe sesivuno ngesikhathi esifaneleko.”" 
Matthew21:42 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kghani anizange khenifunde emitlolweni na? “ ‘Ilitje abakhi abalilahlako libe lilitje lesisekelo. Lokhu kwenziwe yiKosi; nje-ke kuyamangalisa emehlwenethu.’ ” 
Matthew21:43 UJesu wathi kibo godu: “Ngalokho ngiyanitjela bonyana umbuso wezulu uzokususwa kini unikelwe abantu abazokuthela iinthelo. 
Matthew21:44 Owela phezu kwelitjeli uzakuphuka abe ziinquqwana; kodwana loyo elizakuwela phezu kwakhe yena uzakutshidlheka.” 
Matthew21:45 Kwathi lokha abaphristi abakhulu nabaFarisi nabezwa umfanekiso kaJesu lo, kwabakhanyela bona ukhuluma ngabo." 
Matthew21:46 Yeke balinga ukufumana indlela yokumbamba. Kodwana bebesaba isiqubuthu ngombana abantu bebathatha uJesu njengomphorofidi. 
Matthew22:1 UJesu wakhuluma godu ebantwini ngemifanekiso, wathi:" 
Matthew22:2 “Umbuso wezulu ufana nekosi eyalungiselela indodanayo umnyanya womtjhado. 
Matthew22:3 Yathumela iinceku zayo kilabo ebebamenyelwe emnyanyeni bona ziyobatjela beze, kodwana abantwabo babhala ukuza." 
Matthew22:4 Yeke yathuma ezinye iinceku yathi, ‘Tjelani abamenyiwekwabo bonyana sele ngilungise isidlo. Iinkabi zami kanye namathole anonisiweko sele ahlatjiwe nje-ke yoke into sele ilungile. Yenize emnyanyeni womtjhado.’" 
Matthew22:5 Kodwana azange bayelele, yeke omunye waziyela esiminakhe, omunye waziyela ezintweni zakhe." 
Matthew22:6 Abanye babamba iinceku baziphatha kumbi bebazibulala. 
Matthew22:7 Ikosi yathukuthela. Yathumela ibutho layo, lafese larhayila ababulalabo belatjhisa nedorobho labo." 
Matthew22:8 Yathi eencekwini zayo, ‘Umnyanya womtjhado sewulungile, kodwana abamenyiweko azange bafaneleke ukuza." 
Matthew22:9 Nje-ke khambani niye emajikeni weendledlana nimemele emnyanyeni nanyana ngubani enimfunyanako.’ 
Matthew22:10 Yeke iinceku zaphuma zaya eendledlaneni zabutha boke abantu ezibafumanako, abalungileko nabakhohlakeleko; irhubhe lomtjhado lazala iinthekeli." 
Matthew22:11 “Kwathi ikosi nayingenako bona izokubona iinthekeli, yayelela bonyana bekunomuntu ngapho obegade angakembathi izambatho zomtjhado." 
Matthew22:12 Yabuza yathi, ‘Mngani, ungene njani ngapha ungakembathi izambatho zomtjhado na?’ Kodwana umuntu loyo watlhoga ipendulo." 
Matthew22:13 Ikosi leyo yathi eencekwini zayo, ‘Mbopheni izandla neenyawo nimphosele ngaphandle ebumnyameni lapha kuzakuba khona ukurhahlawula nokugedla kwamazinyo!’ ”" 
Matthew22:14 UJesu waphetha ngokuthi: “Banengi abamenyiweko, kodwana balibinzana abakhethiweko.”" 
Matthew22:15 AbaFarisi bakhamba bayokulumba amano wokubamba uJesu ngamezwakhe. 
Matthew22:16 Bathumela abafundi babo kuye bakhambisana nebakaHerode bathi: “Mfundisi, siyazi bona umumuntu oqotho nokobana ufundisa indlela kaZimu ngokuya ngeqiniso. Awuyi ngabantu ngombana awukhethi ubuso." 
Matthew22:17 Akhe utjho-ke bona umbonwakho uthini na? Kghani kulungile ukukhokha umthelo wombusi omkhulu na?” 
Matthew22:18 Kodwana uJesu ngokwazi kwakhe iqhinga labo elimbi wathi: “Nina bazenzisi ndina! Nilingelani ukungithiya na? 
Matthew22:19 Ngitjengisani imali enithela ngayo!” Bamlethela udenariyu," 
Matthew22:20 wababuza wathi: “Mfanekiso kabani lo na? Mtlolo kabani lo na?” 
Matthew22:21 Bamphendula bathi: “Mfanekiso wombusi omkhulu.” Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Nikelani umbusi omkhulu okungekwakhe, ninikele uZimu okungekwakaZimu.”" 
Matthew22:22 Kuthe bona bezwe lokhu, barareka kwamambala. Yeke bamtjhiya lapho bakhamba." 
Matthew22:23 Khona mhlokho abaSadusi abakholwa bonyana akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko beza kuJesu bambuza 
Matthew22:24 bathi: “Mfundisi, uMosi wasitjela bona indoda nayihlongakala inganabantwana, umfowabo kufanele angene umhlolokazayo bese ambelethele abantwana." 
Matthew22:25 Yeke bekukhona izelamani ezilikhomba ebezihlala khonapha. Izibulo lathatha kodwana lahlongakala linganabantwana, yeke latjhiya umhlolokazalo, wangenwa mfowabo." 
Matthew22:26 Kwenzeka soneso ngeselamani sesibili nesesithathu, bekwaba ngesekhomba." 
Matthew22:27 Ekugcineni umhlolokazi loyo naye wahlongakala. 
Matthew22:28 Manje-ke mhlana abafileko bavukako ekufeni, uzokuba mkabani kabalikhomba njengombana boke gade bamthethe na?”" 
Matthew22:29 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Niyaphosisa niyazi! Kanti aniyazi imitlolo namkha amandla kaZimu na? 
Matthew22:30 Ekuvukeni, abantu angeze bathatha namkha bende ngombana bazokufana neengilozi ezisezulwini." 
Matthew22:31 Kodwana mayelana nokuvuka kwabafileko: Kghani anikafundi bona uZimu wathini kini? 
Matthew22:32 Angithi wathi, ‘NginguZimu ka-Abrahamu, uZimu ka-Isaka noZimu kaJakopo.’ AkasinguZimu wabafileko, kodwana ungowabaphilako.”" 
Matthew22:33 Kwathi lokha iinqubuthu nazizwa lokhu, zarareka ngefundiswakhe leyo." 
Matthew22:34 Kwathi bona abaFarisi bezwe bonyana uJesu uvale abaSadusi umlomo, bahlangana ndawonye." 
Matthew22:35 Omunye wabo, osisazi somthetho, wamlinga ngombuzo lo, wathi:" 
Matthew22:36 “Mfundisi, ngimuphi umyalo ongomkhulu emthethweni na?”" 
Matthew22:37 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “ ‘Thanda uSomnini uZimakho ngehliziywakho yoke, ngomphefumulwakho woke nangomkhumbulwakho woke.’" 
Matthew22:38 Lo myalo wokuthoma nongomkhulu. 
Matthew22:39 Wesibili ofana nawo ngothi, ‘Thanda umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena.’" 
Matthew22:40 Woke umthetho kanye nabaphorofidi kudzimelele emiyalweni emibili le.” 
Matthew22:41 Kwathi abaFarisi basahlangane ndawonye, uJesu wababuza wathi:" 
Matthew22:42 “Nicabangani ngoKrestu na? Uyindodana kabani na?” Bamphendula bathi: “UyiNdodana kaDavida.” 
Matthew22:43 Yeke uJesu wabuza wathi: “Alo, kubayini-ke uDavida nakhuluma ngoMoya ambize bona yiKosi na? Angithi wathi," 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘USomnini wathi eKosinami: Hlala ngesidleni sami bekube kulokha nangenza izitha zakho zibe sinabelo seenyawo zakho.’ 
Matthew22:45 Yeke, nangabe uDavida umbiza ngokuthi ‘Kosi’, angaba yindodanakhe njani na?”" 
Matthew22:46 Akakho noyedwa owakghona ukuphendula uJesu. Nje-ke kusukela mhlokho akakho noyedwa owakhe wagabaza wambuza eminye imibuzo. 
Matthew23:1 Yeke, uJesu wakhuluma eenqubuthwini nebafundini bakhe, wathi:" 
Matthew23:2 “Abafundisi bomthetho nabaFarisi bahlala esihlalweni sakaMosi. 
Matthew23:3 Yeke kufanele nibahloniphe benenze koke abanitjela khona. Kodwana ningalingisi izenzo zabo ngombana abenzi lokho abakutjhumayelako. 
Matthew23:4 Bathwesa abantu imithwalo ebudisi emahlombe, ibe bona abakazimiseli ukuyifukula ngitjho nangomunwabo." 
Matthew23:5 Koke abakwenzako bakwenzela ukubonwa babantu: Benza amafilakteriya wabo abe makhulu namatjharha weemphuraphura zabo made. 
Matthew23:6 Bathanda indawo ephezulu eminyanyeni neenhlalo eziphambili ngemasinagogini. 
Matthew23:7 Bathanda ukulotjhiswa eendaweni okuthengiselwa kizo nokubizwa ngokuthi, ‘Rabi’." 
Matthew23:8 Nina anizukubizwa ngokuthi ‘Rabi’ ngombana ninomfundisi oyedwa, nina noke nje nibabafo." 
Matthew23:9 Godu ningabizi noyedwa ephasinapha ngokuthi ‘Baba’ ngombana ninoBaba oyedwa osezulwini. 
Matthew23:10 Begodu ningabizwa ngokuthi ‘Mfundisi’ ngombana ninomfundisi oyedwa onguKrestu. 
Matthew23:11 Ongomkhulu hlangana nani uzakuba yincekwenu 
Matthew23:12 ngombana loyo oziphakamisako uzakuthotjiswa, naloyo ozithobako uzakuphakanyiswa.”" 
Matthew23:13 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, nina bazenzisi ndina! Nivalele abantu kobana bangangeni embusweni wezulu. Nina ngokwenu aningeni, begodu anivumeli labo abalinga ukungena!" 
Matthew23:14 Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, bazenzisi ndina! Nirhiribidela iinkumba zabahlolokazi, bese nibukisa ngokwenza imithandazokazi emide! Ngalokho nizakuhlunguphazwa khulu." 
Matthew23:15 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, bazenzisi ndina! Nidabula amazwe namalwandle kobana nizuze oyedwa otjhugulukela ebuJudeni, kuthi naphendukileko nimenze abe yindodana yesirhogo ngokubuyelelweko njengani." 
Matthew23:15 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, bazenzisi ndina! Nidabula amazwe namalwandle kobana nizuze oyedwa otjhugulukela ebuJudeni, kuthi naphendukileko nimenze abe yindodana yesirhogo ngokubuyelelweko njengani." 
Matthew23:16 “Maye, kini bahlahli abaziimphofu! Nithi, ‘Nanyana ngubani ofunga ngethempeli, akutjho ilitho lokho, kodwana nakube ufunga ngegolide lethempeli ubotjhelelwe esifungweni sakhe.’" 
Matthew23:17 Nina ndlhadlha eziphopheleko! Ngikuphi okukhulu, ligolide namkha lithempeli elenza bona igolide libe ngelikhethekileko na?" 
Matthew23:18 Godu nithi, ‘Nanyana ngubani ofunga nge-aldari, akutjho ilitho lokho; kodwana nanyana ngubani ofunga ngesipho esiphezu kwalo ubotjhelelwe esifungweni sakhe.’" 
Matthew23:19 Nina bantu abaphopheleko! Ngikuphi okukhulu: sisipho namkha li-aldari elenza bona isipho sibe ngesikhethekileko na? 
Matthew23:20 Ngalokho-ke ofunga nge-aldari ufunga ngalo nakho koke okukilo. 
Matthew23:21 Nofunga ngethempeli, ufunga ngalo nangaloyo ohlala kilo." 
Matthew23:22 Naloyo ofunga ngezulu, ufunga ngesihlalo sobukhosi sakaZimu naloyo ohlala kiso." 
Matthew23:23 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, nina bazenzisi ndina! Ninikela kwetjhumi kweenungo zenu okuyiminti, idili nekumini, kodwana nilahle okuqakatheke khulu komthetho, ubulungiswa, isirhawu nokwethembeka. Benimele ngabe nenze lokhu ngaphandle kokuqalela phasi okhunye." 
Matthew23:24 Bahlahli abaziimphofu! Nikhupha ipukani kwenikuselako, kodwana niginya ikamela!" 
Matthew23:25 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, bazenzisi ndina! Nihlanza ubungaphandle bekapho nesitja kodwana khibe ngaphakathi zizele ubumarhamaru nokuzazi." 
Matthew23:26 BaFarisi abaziimphofu! Thomani ngokuhlanza ubungaphakathi bekapho nesitja ntange ngaleyondlela nobungaphandle buzakuhlanzeka. 
Matthew23:27 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nani baFarisi, nina bazenzisi ndina! Ninjengamathuna apendwe aba mhlophe, aqaleka amahle ngaphandle khibe ngaphakathi azele amathambo wabafileko nakho koke okusilapheleko." 
Matthew23:28 Ngokunjalo nani ngaphandle niqaleka nilungile ebantwini, kodwana ngaphakathi nizele ukuzenzisa nokukhohlakala." 
Matthew23:29 “Maye, kini bafundisi bomthetho nabaFarisi, nina bazenzisi ndina! Nakhela abaphorofidi amathuna amahle, nikghabise namaliba wabalungileko." 
Matthew23:30 Begodu nithi, ‘Nabegade siphile emihleni yabokhokho, besingekhe sazibandakanya nabo ekuthululeni iingazi zabaphorofidi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Ngalokho niyafakaza ngokujamelana nani bonyana niziinzukulwana zalabo ababulala abaphorofidi. 
Matthew23:32 Yeke ragelani phambili, niqedelele isilinganiso sezono zabokhokho benu!" 
Matthew23:33 Nina nyoka ndina! Sizukulwana seenyoka! Nizakubalekela njani ukulahlelwa ngesirhogweni na? 
Matthew23:34 Ngalokho nginithumela abaphorofidi, izazi nabafundisi. Abanye babo nizobabulala benibabethele esiphambanweni, abanye nizobaritha ngemasinagogini wenu nibagijimise ukusuka edorobheni ukuya edorobheni." 
Matthew23:35 Yeke phezu kwenu kuzakwehlela zoke iingazi ezilungileko ezathululwako ephasinapha, ukuthoma ngeengazi zolungileko u-Abela ukuya kezakaZakariya umsa kaBherekiya enambulalela hlangana nethempeli ne-aldari." 
Matthew23:36 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona koke lokhu kuzakwehlela phezu kwesizukulwanesi. 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalema, Jerusalema, wena obulele abaphorofidi, godu wakhanda ngamatje labo abathunywe kuwe, kukangaki ngifuna ukubuthelela abantwabakho njengesikhukhukazi sibuthelela amadzinyanaso ngaphasi kweempiko zaso, kodwana azange ungivumele." 
Matthew23:38 Qala, ikumbakho itjhiywe ingasenamuntu." 
Matthew23:39 Ngambala ngiyanitjela bona angekhe benisangibona godu kufikela mhlana nithi, ‘Ubusisiwe loyo oza ebizweni lakaSomnini!’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 UJesu besele aphumile ngethempelini, akhamba lokha abafundi bakhe nabazakuza kuye bamkhombisa umakhiwo wethempeli." 
Matthew24:2 Wathi kibo: “Niyazibona zoke izintwezi na? Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona akunalitje nalinye lapha elizakusala liphezu kwelinye, elinye nelinye lawo lizokugirika.”" 
Matthew24:3 Kwathi uJesu asahlezi entabeni ye-Oliva, abafundi beza kuye ngasese, bafese bathi: “Akhe usitjele bona izintwezi zizokwenzeka nini? Sizakuba yini isibonakaliso sokuza kwakho nesokuphela kwesikhathi na?”" 
Matthew24:4 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Yelelani bona kungabi nomuntu onikhohlisako 
Matthew24:5 ngombana banengi abazakuza ebizweni lami bathi, ‘NginguMesiya!’ Nje-ke bazakukhohlisa abanengi." 
Matthew24:6 Nizakuzwa ngezipi nangamahlebezi wezipi; kodwana qinisekani bonyana anethuki. Izinto ezinjalo kumele zenzeke, kodwana azitjho bona isiphetho sesifikile." 
Matthew24:7 Isizwe sizakuvukela isizwe nombuso uvukele umbuso. Kuzakuba khona indlala nokusikinyeka kwephasi eendaweni ezahlukahlukeneko. 
Matthew24:8 Koke lokhu kukuthoma kwemirhelo. 
Matthew24:9 “Ngemva kwalapho nizakukhaphelwa ekuhlungaphazweni nekubulaweni. Begodu nizokuzondwa ngizo zoke izizwe ngebanga lami. 
Matthew24:10 Ngesikhatheso abanengi bazakuhlubuka ekukholweni bese bayakhaphelana bebazondane. 
Matthew24:11 Kuzakuba khona abaphorofidi abanengi bamanga bakhohlise abantu abanengi. 
Matthew24:12 Ngenca yokwanda kobukhohlakali, ithando labanengi lizokuya liphola." 
Matthew24:13 Kodwana loyo ozokubambelela bekube sekupheleni uzokusindiswa. 
Matthew24:14 Nje-ke ivangeli lombusweli lizakutjhunyayelwa ephasini loke, kube bufakazi kizo zoke izizwe ngaphambi kobana kufike isiphetho.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Lokha nanibona endaweni ecwengileko kujame isinyenyiso esibhubhisako, okuyinto eyakhulunywa mphorofidi uDanyela, ofundako azwisise." 
Matthew24:16 AbaseJudiya ababalekele eentabeni. 
Matthew24:17 Ophezu kwekumbakhe angahliki athi uyokuthatha okuthileko ngekhaya. 
Matthew24:18 Osesimini angabuyeli ekhaya ayokuthatha isambatho sakhe. 
Matthew24:19 Maye kuzokuthusa kangangani emihleni leyo ebafazini abasemzimbeni nakibomma abamunyisako! 
Matthew24:20 Thandazani bona ukubaleka kwenu kungabi sebusika namkha ngeSabatha 
Matthew24:21 ngombana iinhlupheko ngesikhatheso zizabe zizimbi khulu, zingalingani nalezo ezakhe zaba khona kusukela ekuthomeni kwephasi bekwaba kunjesi nezingasoze zaba khona godu." 
Matthew24:22 Nakube amalanga lawo bekangakancitjhiswa, akakho obezakusinda, kodwana ngenca yalabo abakhethiweko, amalanga lawo azokuncitjhiswa." 
Matthew24:23 “Ngesikhatheso nanyana ngubani othi kini, ‘Qalani nangu uMesiya!’ namkha, ‘Nanguya!’ ningamkholwa umuntu loyo." 
Matthew24:24 Ngambala abosingamesiya nabaphorofidi bamanga bazakuvela, benze iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro emikhulu ukuze nakwenzekileko bakhohlise ngitjho nabakhethiweko." 
Matthew24:25 Qalani, nginitjele lokhu ngaphambi kobana kufike isikhathi." 
Matthew24:26 “Yeke nakube nanyana ngubani uthi kini, ‘Qalani nanguya erhalawumbeni,’ ningayi lapho; nanyana asithi, ‘Nanguya ngemalawini angaphakathi,’ ningakukholwa lokho." 
Matthew24:27 Yeke njengombana umbani ovela ngepumalanga ubonakala ngitjho netjingalanga, kuzokuba njalo ukuza kweNdodana yoMuntu." 
Matthew24:28 “Nanyana kukuphi lapha kunesidumbu khona, amadlanga ahlangana lapho.”" 
Matthew24:29 “Khonokho ngemva kweenhlupheko zemihleni leyo, “ilanga lizakufiphala, inyezi ingakhanyisi, iinkwekwezi zizakuwa emkayini, amandla wezulwini asikinywe." 
Matthew24:30 “Ngesikhatheso isibonakaliso seNdodana yoMuntu sizakuvela emkayini, kuthi zoke izizwe zephasi zilile. Zizakubona iNdodana yoMuntu isiza ngamafu womkayi, ngamandla nangephazimulo ekulu." 
Matthew24:31 Yeke izakuthuma iingilozi zayo ngokulila okukhulu kwepalapala. Zona zizakubuthelela abakhethekileko bayo emagumbini womane wephasi, ukusuka ehlangothini elinye lomkayi bekube kukelinye." 
Matthew24:32 “Nje-ke fundani isifundo nasi ngomuthi wamakhiwani: Msinyana ngemva kobana iimpanjana zawo zihlangene, kumila amakari, seniyazi-ke bonyana ihlobo seliseduze." 
Matthew24:33 Ngokunjalo-ke nanibona zoke izintwezi, nizakwazi bonyana sekuseduze, iye sekusemnyango." 
Matthew24:34 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona isizukulwanesi ngambala asisoze sadlula zingakenzeki zoke izintwezi. 
Matthew24:35 Izulu nephasi kuzakudlula, kodwana amezwami angekhe adlula.”" 
Matthew24:36 “Akakho noyedwa owaziko ngelangelo nangesikhatheso, neengilozi ezisezulwini azazi ilitho, ngitjho neNdodana ngokwayo ayazi; kodwana nguBaba kwaphela owaziko." 
Matthew24:37 Njengombana kwakunjalo emihleni kaNowa, kuzakuba njalo-ke ukuza kweNdodana yoMuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Emihleni leyo ngaphambi komthwalela, abantu bebagoma, basela, batjhada bebatjhadise, kufikela elangeni uNowa angena ngalo ngemkhunjini." 
Matthew24:39 Bebangakhathali ngalokho okuzokwenzeka bekwaba kumhlana kufika umthwalela warhurhula boke. Kuzokuba njalo-ke ukuza kweNdodana yoMuntu. 
Matthew24:40 Ngesikhatheso amadoda amabili azabe asebenza esimini; kuzakuthathwa eyodwa kutjhiywe eyodwa. 
Matthew24:41 Abafazi ababili bazabe basila elitjeni, kuthathwe oyedwa kutjhiywe oyedwa." 
Matthew24:42 “Yeke, hlalani nilindile ngombana anazi bona iKosenu izakuza nini." 
Matthew24:43 Kodwana yazini lokhu: Nakube umninikhaya bekasazi bona isela lizakufika ngasiphi isikhathi sobusuku, ubazakuhlala alindile, ubangekhe avumela bonyana indlwakhe ifahlwe." 
Matthew24:44 Nani-ke kumele nihlale nilindile ngombana iNdodana yoMuntu izakufika ngesikhathi eningakayilindeli ngaso. 
Matthew24:45 “Ngiyiphi-ke inceku ethembekileko nehlakaniphileko umniniyo ayibeke bona yeluse iinsebenzi ekhaya, iziphe ukugoma kwazo ngesikhathi esifaneleko na?" 
Matthew24:46 Kuzakuba kuhle encekwini leyo lokha umniniyo nafikako ayifumana isenza lokho. 
Matthew24:47 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona uzayibeka bona yeluse yoke ipahlakhe. 
Matthew24:48 Kodwana akhesithi inceku leyo ikhohlakele bese izitjela ithi, ‘Ikosami isekukhambeni, kuzayithatha isikhathi ukubuya’," 
Matthew24:49 bese idula ezinye iinceku esebenza nazo, irhiribidele beyidakwe neendakwa." 
Matthew24:50 Umnininceku leyo uzakufika ngelinye ilanga ingakamlindeli ngesikhathi engasaziko. 
Matthew24:51 Uzayidabula iinquqwana ayilahlele endaweni yabazenzisi lapha kuzakuba khona ukurhahlawula nokugedla kwamaziyo.” 
Matthew25:1 “Ngesikhatheso umbuso wezulu uzakufana namatlawu alitjhumi athatha iimbani zawo ayokuhlangabeza umyeni. 
Matthew25:2 Amahlanu wawo gade aziindlhayela, amahlanu ahlakaniphile." 
Matthew25:3 Aziindlhayela athatha iimbani zawo, kodwana azange athathe amafutha." 
Matthew25:4 Kwathi amahlanu ahlakaniphileko akhamba aphethe amafutha ngemijekana. 
Matthew25:5 Umyeni wariyada ukufika, yeke woke ayenda, agcina alele." 
Matthew25:6 “Phakathi kobusuku kwamenyezwa kwathiwa, ‘Nangu umyeni! Phumani nimhlangabeze!’" 
Matthew25:7 Yeke woke amatlawu alitjhumi avuka, akhanyisa iimbani zawo." 
Matthew25:8 Aziindlhayela athi kahlakaniphileko, ‘Akhe nisitopizele amafutha, iimbani zethu ziyacima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Ahlakaniphileko aphendula athi, ‘Nilale nilahlile, nathi angahle asitlhayelele nasizawabelana nani. Khambani niye kabathengisako niyozithengela khona.’" 
Matthew25:10 Kwathi nasesendleleni yokuyokuthenga amafutha lawo, umyeni wafika. Amatlawu ebegade azilungiselele angena naye ngemnyanyeni womtjhado. Umnyango wavalwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Ngemva kwesikhathi amatlawu laya afika athi, ‘Kosi! Kosi! Sivulela singene!’" 
Matthew25:12 Kodwana umyeni wawaphendula wathi, ‘Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela ngithi anginazi.’" 
Matthew25:13 “Ngalokho hlalani nilindile ngombana ilanga nesikhathi anisazi.” 
Matthew25:14 “Godu umbuso wezulu uzakufana nomuntu owathi nazokuthatha ikhambo, wabiza iinsebenzi zakhe wazitjhiya nepahlakhe kobana ziyeluse." 
Matthew25:15 Esinye wasinikela amatalende amahlanu wemali, esinye amatalende amabili kwathi esinye wasinikela italende elilodwa. Esinye nesinye kwaba ngokwekghono laso. Yeke wakhamba." 
Matthew25:16 Isisebenzi esifumene amatalende amahlanu sakhamba khonokho sayokusisa imalaso, sazuza amanye amatalende amahlanu." 
Matthew25:17 Nesifumene amatalende amabili naso sazuza amanye amabili. 
Matthew25:18 Kodwana esafumana italende elilodwa sakhamba sayolembela, salifihla lapho." 
Matthew25:19 “Ngemva kwesikhathi eside ikosi yeensebenzi leyo yabuya, yalungisa iindaba nazo." 
Matthew25:20 Isisebenzi ebesifumene amatalende amahlanu saletha amanye amahlanu sathi, ‘Kosami, unginikele amatalende amahlanu, qala ngizuze amanye amahlanu.’" 
Matthew25:21 Ikosi leyo yaphendula yathi, ‘Wenze kuhle, sisebenzi sami esilungileko nesithembekileko! Wathembeka ezintweni ezincani, yeke ngizakubeka bona uphathe izinto ezinengi. Yewuze uzokuhlanganyela ithabo lekosakho!’" 
Matthew25:22 “Nesisebenzi esanikelwa amatalende amabili naso seza sathi, ‘Kosami, wanginikela amatalende amabili, qala ngizuze amanye amabili.’" 
Matthew25:23 Ikosaso yathi, ‘Wenze kuhle, sisebenzi sami esilungileko nesithembekileko! Wathembeka ezintweni ezincani, yeke ngizakubeka bona uphathe izinto ezinengi. Yewuze uzokuhlanganyela ithabo lekosakho!’" 
Matthew25:24 “Yeke kweza isisebenzi esanikelwa italende elilodwa sathi ekosinaso, ‘Kosami, bengazi bonyana uyindoda elikhuni. Uvuna lapha ungakalimi khona, ubuthe lapha ungakarhatjhi khona." 
Matthew25:25 Nje-ke fese ngesaba, ngakhamba ngayokufihla italende lakhweli equlwanini. Qala, nakhu okungokwakho.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Ikosaso yaphendula yathi, ‘Wena sisebenzi esikhohlakeleko nesivilaphako! Bewazi bonyana ngivuna lapha ngingakalimi khona, ngibuthe lapha ngingakarhatjhi khona?" 
Matthew25:27 Bewufanele ubulunge imali leyo ebulungelwenimali. Nje-ke bekuzakuthi nangibuyako ngiyifumane inamakonyana. 
Matthew25:28 Memukeni italende lelo nilinikele onamatalende alitjhumi. 
Matthew25:29 Ngambala loyo onelitho, uzakungezelelelwa ukuze abe nokunengi ngokweqileko. Kodwana loyo onganalitho, uzakwemukwa ngitjho nokuncancani anakho." 
Matthew25:30 Phoselani isisebenzi esingatjho lithweso ngaphandle ebumnyameni lapha kuzokuba khona ukurhahlawula nokugedla kwamazinyo.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Mhlana iNdodana yoMuntu iza ngephazimulwayo iphekelelwa ziingilozi zayo zoke, izakuhlala esihlalweni sayo sobukhosi ephazimulweni yezulwini." 
Matthew25:32 Zoke izizwe zizakubuthanela phambi kwayo. Izakuhlukanisa boke abantu ngeenqhema njengomelusi nahlukanisa izimvu neembuzi. 
Matthew25:33 Izakubeka izimvu ngesidleni sayo neembuzi ngesinceleni sayo. 
Matthew25:34 Yeke iKosi izakuthi kilabo abangesidleni sayo, ‘Yizani nina enibusiswe nguBaba! Thathani ilifa lenu okumbuso olungiselelwe nina kusukela ekudalweni kwephasi." 
Matthew25:35 Ngambala bengilambile nangondla, ngomile nangiseza, bengimqhamuka nangamukela ngeenkumbeni zenu," 
Matthew25:36 ngihlubule nangembesa. Bengigula nangitjheja, bengingesikhungweni neza nazongibona.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Yeke abalungileko bazayiphendula bathi, ‘Agu Kosi! Sakhe sakubona nini ulambile sakondla, namkha womile sakuseza na?" 
Matthew25:38 Sakhe sakubona nini umqhamuka, sakwamukela emizinethu namkha uhlubule sakwembesa na?" 
Matthew25:39 Sakhe sakubona nini ugula nanyana ungesikhungweni, sazokubona na?’" 
Matthew25:40 IKosi izakuphendula ithi, ‘Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona lokha nanenzela oyedwa wabafowethu abancancanaba, nenzele mina.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Yeke izakuthi kilabo abangesinceleni, ‘Sukani kimapha nina enithuwelelisiweko, niye ngemlilweni wesiphelani olungiselwe uSathana neengilozi zakhe." 
Matthew25:42 Bengilambile, azange ningiphe ilitho eligonywako; bengomile, azange beningiseze ilitho." 
Matthew25:43 Bengimqhamuka, azange ningamukele emizinenu, bengidinga izambatho, azange beningembese. Bengigula, ngingesikhungweni azange beningitjheje.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Yeke nabo bazakuphendula bathi, ‘Agu Kosi! Sakhe sakubona nini ulambile namkha womile, umqhamuka namkha uhlubule, ugula namkha ungesikhungweni, sangakutjheja na?’" 
Matthew25:45 IKosi izakuphendula ithi, ‘Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona nanyana yini eningazange niyenzele ngitjho noyedwa walaba, nami semlunga ningakangenzeli ilitho.’" 
Matthew25:46 Yeke bazakukhamba baye ekuhlunguphazweni okungapheliko, kodwana abalungileko bazakuya ekuphileni okungapheliko.”" 
Matthew26:1 Kwathi bona uJesu aqede ukutjho zoke izintwezi, wathi ebafundini bakhe:" 
Matthew26:2 “Niyazi bona sekusele amalanga amabili kwaphela bona kube liPhasika, yeke iNdodana yoMuntu izakukhatjhelwa kobana ibethelwe esiphambanweni.”" 
Matthew26:3 Khonapho abaphristi abakhulu nabaphathi babantu bahlangana etatawini lomphristi omkhulu ebekuthiwa nguKhayafasi. 
Matthew26:4 Balumba amano wokugola uJesu ngobuqili bese bayambulala. 
Matthew26:5 Bathi: “Singakwenzi ngesikhathi somnyanya lokhu, nakungasinjalo kuzakuvuka umguruguru phakathi kwabantu.”" 
Matthew26:6 Kwathi uJesu aseseBhethaniya emzini wendoda ebekuthiwa nguSimoni onekhwekhwe," 
Matthew26:7 kweza umfazi kuye aphethe umjeka uzele amakha wemali enengi, wawathela ehlokwakhe asahlezi etafuleni." 
Matthew26:8 Lokha abafundi nababona isenzweso basilingeka khulu, bathi: “Kusoziswelani na?" 
Matthew26:9 Amakha la bekangathengiswa ngemali enengi, yabelwe abadududu!”" 
Matthew26:10 UJesu wakulemuka lokho ebebakutjho, yeke wathi kibo: “Nimtshwenyelani umfazi lo na? Ungenzele into ehle." 
Matthew26:11 Abadududu nizokuhlala ninabo njalo, kodwana mina angekhe nahlala ninami." 
Matthew26:12 Lokha nathela amakha la phezu kwami, ulungiselela umzimbami ukuyokubulungwa." 
Matthew26:13 “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona kuphi nakuphi lapha ivangeleli litjhunyayelwa khona ephasini loke, lokho akwenzileko kuzakufakazwa ngakho, kube sikhumbuzo ngaye.”" 
Matthew26:14 Yeke omunye wabalitjhumi nambili, ibizo lakhe elinguJudasi Iskariyodi, waya kubaphristi abakhulu," 
Matthew26:15 wababuza wathi: “Nizangipha ini nangimnikela ezandleni zenu na?” Babala amatjhumi amathathu weempaparwana zesiliva bamnikela zona. 
Matthew26:16 Kusukela lokho uJudasi wafuna ithuba elihle lokukhaphela uJesu kibo. 
Matthew26:17 Ngelanga lokuthoma lomnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo, abafundi beza kuJesu bathi: “Ufuna bona sikulungiselephi isidlo sePhasika na?”" 
Matthew26:18 Wathi kibo: “Ngenani ngedorobheni niye emuntwini othileko nimtjele nithi, ‘Umfundisi uthi, isikhathi sakhe sesifikile. Yena nabafundi bakhe bazokugidingela iPhasika lapha kwakho.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Yeke abafundi benza njengombana uJesu abayalile, balungisa iPhasika." 
Matthew26:20 Kwathi nakuhlwako, uJesu wahlala nabalitjhumi nambili etafuleni." 
Matthew26:21 Kuthe basagoma njalo, uJesu wathi kibo: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona omunye wenu uzongikhaphela.”" 
Matthew26:22 Abafundi badana khulu bathoma ukumbuza ngamunye ngamunye, bathi: “Kghani iKosi itjho mina na?”" 
Matthew26:23 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Loyo ofake isandla sakhe ngesitjeni kanye nami, nguye ozongikhaphela." 
Matthew26:24 INdodana yoMuntu izokukhamba njengombana kutloliwe ngayo. Kodwana maye kiloyo okhaphela iNdodana yoMuntu! Bekuzokuba ngcono emuntwini loyo ngathana azange abelethwe!” 
Matthew26:25 Yeke uJudasi, ekunguye obekazomkhaphela wathi: “Kghani kungaba ngimi Rabi, na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Iye, nguwe.”" 
Matthew26:26 Kwathi basagoma njalo, uJesu wathatha isikwa, wathokoza, wasihlephula, wanikela abafundi bakhe, wathi: “Thathani nigome; lokhu mzimbami.”" 
Matthew26:27 Wathatha ikapho, wathokoza kuZimu, wabanikela wathi: “Selani noke nje" 
Matthew26:28 ngombana lokhu kuziingazi zami zesivumelwano ezaphalakela abanengi, malungana nokulitjalelwa kwezono." 
Matthew26:29 Ngiyanitjela bona angekhe bengisasela isithelo sesidiribesi ukusuka gadesi bekube mhlana ngisisela ngobutjha nginani embusweni kaBaba.” 
Matthew26:30 Kwathi sele bavume ingoma yokudumisa, baphuma baya entabeni ye-Oliva." 
Matthew26:31 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Khona namhlanjesi ebusuku noke nizokukhubeka ngami ngombana imitlolo ithi, “ ‘Ngizakumadlha umelusi, umhlambi wezimvu urhatjheke.’" 
Matthew26:32 “Kodwana ngemva kokuvuka kwami ekufeni, ngizanandulela ngiye eGalile.”" 
Matthew26:33 UPitrosi wathi: “Ngitjho nanyana bangakhubeka boke laba ngebanga lakho, mina angisoze!”" 
Matthew26:34 UJesu wathi kuPitrosi: “Ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe khona ebusuku banamhlanjesobu ngaphambi kobanyana umkukurumbu ulile, uzabe sele ungilandule kathathu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Kodwana uPitrosi waqinisa wathi: “Ngitjho nanyana ngingafa kanye nawe, angeze bengithome ngikulandule.” Boke abafundi batjho okufanako." 
Matthew26:36 Yeke uJesu wakhamba nabafundi bakhe baya endaweni ebizwa bona yiGetsemani, wathi kibo: “Yijani nihlezi lapha, ngisaya laphaya ngiyokuthandaza.”" 
Matthew26:37 Wakhamba noPitrosi namadodana amabili kaZebediya. Wathoma ukutlhuwa nokukhathazeka," 
Matthew26:38 wathi kibo: “Umphefumulwami ubhodwe lisizi bekube sekufeni. Hlalani lapha nilinde kanye nami.” 
Matthew26:39 Waya phambidlana, waguqa, wahloma ihloko phasi wathandaza wathi: “Baba, nakube kuyakghoneka, bengithi ikapho le ayisuswe kimapha! Nokho kungabi ngokuthanda kwami, kodwana kube yintando yakho.”" 
Matthew26:40 Yeke wabuyela ebafundini bakhe, wabafumana balele; wathi kuPitrosi: “Hawu madoda, nibhalelwe kulinda nami i-awara elilodwa na?" 
Matthew26:41 Yelelani nithandaze ukuze ningaweli ekulingweni. Ummoya uyavuma, kodwana inyama ibuthakathaka.”" 
Matthew26:42 UJesu wakhamba kwesibili wayokuthandaza, wathi: “Baba, nangabe ikapho le angekhe yasuswa kimi ngaphandle kobana ngiyisele, akwenzeke intando yakho.”" 
Matthew26:43 Kwathi nabuyako, godu wafumana abafundi balele ngombana amehlwabo gade azele ubuthongo." 
Matthew26:44 Yeke wabatjhiya wakhamba, wathandaza ihlandla lesithathu, atjho wona amezwi lawo." 
Matthew26:45 Wabuyela ebafundini wathi: “Nisalele, nisaphumulile na? Qalani, isikhathi sesifikile bona iNdodana yoMuntu ikhatjhelwe ezandleni zezoni." 
Matthew26:46 Sikimani sikhambeni. Nango umkhaphelami asiza!” 
Matthew26:47 Kwathi asakhuluma, uJudasi ongomunye wabalitjhumi nambili, wafika akhamba nesiqubuthu esikhulu sihlome ngeensabula nangeembhuku, sithunywe baphristi abakhulu nabaphathi babantu." 
Matthew26:48 Nje-ke umkhapheli bekenze nabo isiga wathi: “Loyo engizamncwanga, nguye enimfunako. Mbambeni!”" 
Matthew26:49 UJudasi walunga thwi kuJesu, wathi: “Lotjha Rabi!” Wamncwanga." 
Matthew26:50 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Mngani, uzokwenzani lapha na?” Yeke amadoda atjhidela, abamba uJesu ambopha." 
Matthew26:51 Khonokho omunye wabagade banoJesu warhwatjha isabulakhe, warharhabula isisebenzi somphristi omkhulu, wasisusa indlebe." 
Matthew26:52 Kodwana uJesu wathi kuye: “Buyisela isabulakho endawenayo ngombana boke abarhwatjha isabula bazakufa ngesabula. 
Matthew26:53 Udlumbana bona angeze ngakghona ukubiza uBaba, khonokho athumele ibutho leengilozi elingaphezu kweenkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba nambili na?" 
Matthew26:54 Kodwana ngalokho, imitlolo ingazaliseka njani ethi kumele kwenzeke ngayo yona indlela le na?”" 
Matthew26:55 Khonokho uJesu wakhuluma nesiqubuthu wathi: “Ngirhola izilwi bona ningabeze nize ngeensabula nangeembhuku ukuzongibamba na? Bengihlala ethempelini nematatawini imihla yoke, ngifundisa, azange kheningibambe." 
Matthew26:56 Kodwana koke lokhu kwenzekile ukuze kuzaliseke imitlolo yabaphorofidi.” Yeke boke abafundi bamsukela babaleka. 
Matthew26:57 Labo ababamba uJesu, bamusa kuKhayafasi, umphristi omkhulu, lapha bekuhlangene khona abafundisi bomthetho nabaphathi." 
Matthew26:58 Kodwana uPitrosi wamlandela akudanyana, bewangena ngesirhodlweni somphristi omkhulu. Wangena wahlala phasi nabaqaphi afuna ukubona bonyana kuzokwenzekani." 
Matthew26:59 Abaphristi abakhulu nebandla loke lafuna ubufakazi bamala ukujamelana noJesu ukuze bakwazi ukumbulala. 
Matthew26:60 Kodwana abazange bafumane litho, ngitjho nanyana kweza abofakazi abanengi bamala nje. Ekugcineni kwasikima abantu ababili" 
Matthew26:61 bathi: “Umrhali lo uthe, ‘Ngingabhuruza ithempeli lakaZimu ngilakhe ngobutjha ngamalanga amathathu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Khona umphristi omkhulu wasikima wathi kuJesu: “Uzose uthule nje ungaphenduli na? Uthini ngobufakazi obujamelene nawe obulethwa madoda la, na?”" 
Matthew26:63 Kodwana uJesu wazithulela. Umphristi omkhulu wakhuluma naye godu, wathi: “Ngikufungisa isifungo ngoZimu ophilako ngithi: Sitjela bona unguMesiya, iNdodana kaZimu na?”" 
Matthew26:64 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Iye, kunjengombana utjhwile. Kodwana ngiyanitjela noke nje bona ngokuzako nizokubona iNdodana yoMuntu ihlezi ngesigomeni sakaSomandla begodu isiza ngamafu ivela ezulwini!”" 
Matthew26:65 Khonapho umphristi omkhulu watlebhula izambatho zakhe wathi: “Selebe ahlambalazile! Sisafunelani abanye abofakazi na? Nani nizizwele ukuhlambalaza okungakaya! 
Matthew26:66 Nicabangani na?” Baphendula bathi: “Ufanelwe kubulawa.” 
Matthew26:67 Yeke bamkhafulela ngamathe ebusweni, bambetha ngamaguduva. Abanye bamwakala" 
Matthew26:68 bathi kuye: “Siphorofidela wena Krestu! Ngubani okubethileko na?” 
Matthew26:69 Yeke uPitrosi bekahlezi ngaphandle ngesirhodlweni, kweza isisebenzi somntazana sathi: “Nawe gade unoJesu weGalile.”" 
Matthew26:70 Kodwana wakulandula lokho phambi kwabo boke, wathi: “Angazi bona ukhuluma ngani.”" 
Matthew26:71 Khonapho waphuma waya esangweni, lapha abonwa khona ngomunye godu umntazana owathi ebantwini ebebalapho: “Umrhali lo gade anoJesu weNazaretha.”" 
Matthew26:72 Godu uPitrosi wakulandula lokho wathi: “Angimazi umuntu loyo mina!” 
Matthew26:73 Ngemva kwesikhatjhana abantu ebebajame lapho beza kuPitrosi, bathi kuye: “Ngambala ungomunye wabo ngombana ukukhuluma kwakho kuyakulahla.”" 
Matthew26:74 Yeke uPitrosi wathoma ukuthukana, afunga asithi: “Yeningisusele mina, angimazi umuntu lo!” Khonokho umkukurumbu walila." 
Matthew26:75 Yeke uPitrosi wakhumbula igama uJesu alikhulumileko lokuthi: “Ngaphambi kobana umkukurumbu ulile, uzabe sele ungilandule kathathu bona awungazi!” Nje-ke waphumela ngaphandle wakhihla isililo esibuhlungu." 
Matthew27:1 Kwathi ekuseni ngamasa boke abaphristi abakhulu nabaphathi babantu bathatha iqunto lokubulala uJesu. 
Matthew27:2 Bambopha, bamraga bamusa kuPilatu, umbusi." 
Matthew27:3 Lokha uJudasi omkhapheleko nabona bonyana uJesu ugwetjelwe ukufa, wazisola kabuhlungu, wabuyisela iimpaparwana ezimatjhumi amathathu zesiliva kubaphristi abakhulu kanye nabaphathi." 
Matthew27:4 Wathi: “Ngonile ngokukhaphela iingazi ezinganamlandu.” Bamphendula bathi: “Kusitjhisa ngani-ke thina lokho? Ziimbonwa nguwe lezo.” 
Matthew27:5 Yeke uJudasi wafuthela imali leyo ngethempelini, waphuma. Wasuka lapho wayoziphanyeka." 
Matthew27:6 Abaphristi abakhulu badobha iimpaparwanezo bathi: “Kukuphikisana nomthetho ukufaka imali le emnikelweni wethempeli ngombana kuyimali yeengazi.” 
Matthew27:7 Yeke baqunta ukusebenzisa imali leyo ukuthenga isimu yombumbi kobana ibe yindawo yokubulungela imiqhamuka. 
Matthew27:8 Ngikho indawo leyo nanamhlanjesi ibizwa bonyana: “YiNdawo yeeNgazi.” 
Matthew27:9 Yeke kwazaliseka okwakhulunywa mphorofidi uJoromiya nasithi: “Bathatha iimpaparwana ezimatjhumi amathathu zesiliva, okulinani abantu bakwa-Israyeli abavumelana ukumhlawulela ngalo," 
Matthew27:10 bazisebenzisa ukuthenga isimu yombumbi, njengombana uSomnini bekangiyalile.”" 
Matthew27:11 UJesu wajama phambi kombusi, umbusi loyo wambuza wathi: “Uyikosi yamaJuda na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Iye, kunjengombana usitjho.”" 
Matthew27:12 Kodwana lokha nasolwa baphristi abakhulu nabaphathi, azange aphendule." 
Matthew27:13 Yeke uPilatu wambuza wathi: “Awubuzwa ubufakazi abajamelana nawe ngabo na?” 
Matthew27:14 Kodwana uJesu azange aphendule. Okwarara umbusi kukobana azange aziphendulele ngitjho nakowodwa umlandu athweswa wona. 
Matthew27:15 Yeke gade kusiqhelo kobana umbusi athi njalo ngomnyanya athukulule isibotjhwa esikhethwa siqubuthu. 
Matthew27:16 Ngesikhatheso bekunesibotjhwa esidumileko ibizo laso linguBharabhasi. 
Matthew27:17 Kwathi bona isiqubuthu sibuthane, uPilatu wasibuza wathi: “Ngisiphi enifuna bona nginithukululele sona na? UBharabhasi namkha uJesu, okuthiwa nguKrestu na?”" 
Matthew27:18 Begade asazi bona kungebanga lomona ukobana banikele uJesu kuye. 
Matthew27:19 Kwathi uPilatu asahlezi esihlalweni sokugweba, umkakhe wamthumela umlayezo othi: “Ungabi nesandla endabeni yomuntu omsulwa loyo ngombana ngihlukumezeke khulu ebhudangweni ngaye.”" 
Matthew27:20 Abaphristi abakhulu nabaphathi batjitjizela isiqubuthu kobana sikhethe uBharabhasi bese kubulawe uJesu. 
Matthew27:21 Umbusi wabuza wathi: “Nifuna ngithukulule muphi phakathi kwababilaba na?” Baphendula bathi: “UBharabhasi!” 
Matthew27:22 Yeke uPilatu wabuza wathi: “Alo-ke nithi ngenzeni ngoJesu okuthiwa nguKrestu lo na?” Boke baphendula bathi: “Mbethele esiphambanweni!” 
Matthew27:23 UPilatu wabuza wathi: “Kubayini na? Mlandu bani awenzileko na?” Kodwana barhuwelela khulu bathi: “Mbethele esiphambanweni!” 
Matthew27:24 Kwathi uPilatu nabona bonyana akayindawo nabo, kodwana esikhundleni salokho bathoma ukuguruzela, wathatha amanzi wahlamba izandla zakhe phambi kwesiqubuthu, wathi: “Ngimsulwa ekuthululweni kweengazi zomuntu lo. Sekuziimbonwa ngini!”" 
Matthew27:25 Boke abantu baphendula bathi: “Iingazi zakhe azibe phezu kwethu nesizukulwana sethu!” 
Matthew27:26 Yeke wabathukululela uBharabhasi. Kodwana wathi uJesu arithwe, bewanikela ngaye bona abethelwe esiphambanweni." 
Matthew27:27 Yeke amajoni wombusi athatha uJesu amusa ngesirhodlweni sombusi; soke isiqhema samajoni sambungelela. 
Matthew27:28 Amhlubulisa, amembesa ingubo ebomvu." 
Matthew27:29 Eluka isihlohlo sameva amthwesa sona. Amphathisa umgaba ngesandleni sakhe sesidla; aguqa ngaphambi kwakhe abukisa ngaye athi: “Bayede, kosi yamaJuda!”" 
Matthew27:30 Amkhafulela, athatha umgaba ambetha ngawo kanenginengi ehloko." 
Matthew27:31 Emva kobana abukise ngaye, amhlubulisa ingubo, amembathisa izambatho zakhe. Asuka lapho amraga ayombethela esiphambanweni." 
Matthew27:32 Kwathi nabaphumako, bahlangana nendoda yeSirene ebekuthiwa nguSimoni, amajoni amkatelela bona athwale isiphambano sakaJesu." 
Matthew27:33 Bafika endaweni ekuthiwa yiGolgotha, okutjho iKhakhayi." 
Matthew27:34 Lapho amajoni anikela uJesu iwayini ebeyivangwe nenyongo kobana asele; kodwana kuthe bona ayizwe, wala ukuyisela." 
Matthew27:35 Kwathi bona ambethele esiphambanweni, ahlukaniselana izambatho zakhe ngefumbe ukuze kuzaliseke ilizwi elakhulunywa baphorofidi nabathi, “Bahlukaniselana izambatho zami bebenza ifumbe ngazo.”" 
Matthew27:36 Ngemva kwalokho ahlala phasi ambukela. 
Matthew27:37 Ngehla kwehlokwakhe abeka umtlolo womlandu abamethwesa wona othi: “Lo nguJesu ikosi yamaJuda.” 
Matthew27:38 Wabethelwa kanye namasela amabili, elinye lingesidleni, elinye lingesinceleni." 
Matthew27:39 Abantu ebebadlula lapho bebamhlambalaza, bathintithe iinhloko," 
Matthew27:40 bathi: “Wena ozokugiriza ithempeli bese ulakha ngobutjha ngamalanga amathathu, zisindise-ke! Yehla esiphambanwenapho nakube uyiNdodana kaZimu!”" 
Matthew27:41 Ngokunjalo, abaphristi abakhulu, abafundisi bomthetho nabaphathi babukisa ngaye," 
Matthew27:42 bathi: “Wasindisa abanye, kodwana yena akakwazi ukuzisindisa! Uyikosi yakwa-Israyeli! Akehle khona nje esiphambanweni, yeke sizamkholwa!" 
Matthew27:43 Angithi wethembe uZimu. UZimu akamsize khona nje nakube uyamfuna ngombana bekaseze asithi, ‘NgiyiNdodana kaZimu!’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Ngitjho namasela ebekabethelwe nawo adindela iinhlamba phezu kwakhe. 
Matthew27:45 Kusukela ngesimbi yetjhumi nambili bekube ngesimbi yesithathu ubumnyama bembatha inarha yoke. 
Matthew27:46 Kwathi ngesimbi yesithathu uJesu warhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu wathi: “Eli, Eli, lama sabarhthani?” Okutjho bona: “Zimami, Zimami, ungitjhiyeleni na?”" 
Matthew27:47 Kwathi lokha abanye balabo ebebajame lapho nabezwa lokho bathi: “Ubiza u-Eliya!” 
Matthew27:48 Khonokho omunye wabo wagijima wathatha umfotjhofotjho, wawenya ngaphakathi kweviniga, wawuhloma emhlangeni, wawuphakamisela kuJesu kobana asele." 
Matthew27:49 Abanye bathi, “Jama wena! Akhesibone bona u-Eliya wakhe loyo uzakuza azomsindisa na?”" 
Matthew27:50 Godu uJesu warhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu, wanikela umphefumulwakhe." 
Matthew27:51 Khonokho irharideni lethempeli latlebhuka phakathi, ukuthoma phezulu ukuya phasi. Iphasi lasikinyeka, kwaphadlhuka amadwala." 
Matthew27:52 Amathuna avuleka, iindumbu zabantu abanengi abacwengileko ebebahlongakele bavuswa baphila godu." 
Matthew27:53 Baphuma ngemathuneni, kwathi ngemva kobana uJesu avukile ekufeni, baya ngedorobheni elicwengileko, bazibonakalisa ebantwini abanengi." 
Matthew27:54 Kwathi lokha umphathimabutho nalabo ebebanaye ebebaqaphe uJesu nababona ukusikinyeka kwephasi nakho koke okwenzakeleko, besaba bebathi: “Kwamambala bekayiNdodana kaZimu!”" 
Matthew27:55 Bekukhona abafazi abanengi lapho, bajame kudanyana baqalile. Bebalokhu balandele uJesu ukusukela eGalile kobana bamsize." 
Matthew27:56 Hlangana nabo bekukhona uMariya Magdalina, uMariya unina kaJakopo noJosefa kanye nonina lamadodana kaZebediya." 
Matthew27:57 Kwathi nakuhlwako, kwafika isigwili somuntu sivela e-Arimathiya, ibizo laso linguJosefa, naye egade amfundi kaJesu." 
Matthew27:58 Waya kuPilatu wayokubawa isidumbu sakaJesu, nje-ke uPilatu wayala bonyana anikelwe sona." 
Matthew27:59 UJosefa wasithatha, wasiphuthela ngetjhila elihlanzekileko," 
Matthew27:60 wasifaka ngethuneni lakhe elitjha aligobhodlha edwaleni. Wageda ilitje elikhulu wavala ngalo umnyango wethuna wakhamba. 
Matthew27:61 UMariya Magdalina nomunye uMariya gade bahlezi lapho malungana nethuna. 
Matthew27:62 Ngelanga elilandelako, ebekuliSabatha, abaphristi abakhulu nabaFarisi bahlangana kuPilatu," 
Matthew27:63 bathi kuye: “Kosi, siyakhumbula bona umkhohlisi loya nasaphilako wathi, ‘Ngemva kwamalanga amathathu ngizakuvuka.’" 
Matthew27:64 Yeke, khupha umyalo bonyana ithuneli liyokulindwa kufikela elangeni lesithathu. Nakungasinjalo, abafundi bakhe bangahle beze bazokweba isidumbu sakhe, bese batjela abantu bona uvukile ekufeni. Amala wokugcina la azakudlula waphambilini.”" 
Matthew27:65 UPilatu wathi kibo: “Thathani umlindi nikhambe niyokuqinisekisa bona ithunelo liyavikeleka ngendlela eningakghona ngayo.” 
Matthew27:66 Yeke bakhamba bayokuqinisekisa bona ithunelo livikelekile ngokubeka iphawu lokulivala elitjeni, bebatjhiya abalindi lapho." 
Matthew28:1 Ngemva kweSabatha, ngamasa welanga lokuthoma leveke, uMariya Magdalina nomunye uMariya bakhamba bayokuhlola ethuneni." 
Matthew28:2 Khonokho kwaba khona ukusikinyeka kwephasi okukhulu ngombana kwehla ingilozi kaSomnini ivela ezulwini, yaya ethuneni yafese yageda ilitje yalisusa, yahlala phezu kwalo." 
Matthew28:3 Ubujamo bayo bebunjengombani, izambatho zayo zimhlophe njengeliqhwa." 
Matthew28:4 Abalindi besaba khulu bebaqhaqhazela, baba njengabantu abafileko." 
Matthew28:5 Ingilozi yakhuluma nabafazi yathi: “Ningesabi ngombana ngiyazi bona nifuna uJesu obekabethelwe esiphambanweni. 
Matthew28:6 Akakho lapha; uvukile njengombana agade atjhwile. Yizani nganeno nizokubona lapha bekalele khona. 
Matthew28:7 Nanisuka lapha nirhabe niyokutjela abafundi bakhe, nithi, ‘Uvukile ekufeni, nje-ke usendleleni yokuya eGalile ngaphambi kwenu. Nizakumbona lapho.’ Qalani nginitjelile.”" 
Matthew28:8 Yeke abafazi basuka msinyana ethuneni banokwesaba, kodwana khonapho baphuphuma ithabo, bagijima bayokutjela abafundi bakhe." 
Matthew28:9 Msinyana uJesu wahlangana nabo wathi: “Lotjhani!” Batjhidela, bambamba eenyaweni, bamkhothamela." 
Matthew28:10 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Ningesabi. Khambani niyokutjela abafowethu bonyana baye eGalile, bazangibona lapho.”" 
Matthew28:11 Kwathi abafazi basesendleleni, abanye babalindi bangena ngedorobheni bayokubikela abaphristi abakhulu ngakho koke okwenzakeleko." 
Matthew28:12 Nasele abaphristi abakhulu bahlangene nabaphathi benza neqhinga, banikela amajoni imali enengi," 
Matthew28:13 bathi kiwo: “Nifike nithi, ‘Sithe sisabanjwe sithongwana phakathi kobusuku, abafundi bakhe bafika beba isidumbu sakhe.’" 
Matthew28:14 Nakube umbiko lo ufika kumbusi, sizamanelisa ukuze nina ningangeni ekingeni.”" 
Matthew28:15 Yeke amajoni athatha imali, enza njengombana bekayaliwe. Nje-ke umbiko lo warhatjheka emaJudeni woke ngitjho nanamhlanjesi." 
Matthew28:15 Yeke amajoni athatha imali, enza njengombana bekayaliwe. Nje-ke umbiko lo warhatjheka emaJudeni woke ngitjho nanamhlanjesi." 
Matthew28:16 Abafundi abalitjhumi nanye baya eGalile entabeni lapha uJesu abatjele bona baye khona. 
Matthew28:17 Kwathi nabambonako, bamkhothamela kodwana abanye bazaza." 
Matthew28:18 Yeke uJesu watjhidela kibo wathi: “Nginikelwe woke amandla ezulwini nephasini. 
Matthew28:19 Ngalokho khambani niye ebantwini boke nanyana kukuphi, nibenze abafundi; babhabhadiseni ebizweni lakaBaba neNdodana noMoya oCwengileko," 
Matthew28:20 nibafundise ukwenza koke enginiyale ngakho. Ngambala nginani njalo bekube sekupheleni kwesikhathi.” 
Mark1:1 Ukuthoma kwevangeli ngoJesu Krestu, iNdodana kaZimu." 
Mark1:2 Nakhu okutlolwe encwadini yomphorofidi u-Isaya: “Ngizokuthumela isithunywa sami ngaphambi kwakho, esizokulungisa indlelakho;" 
Mark1:3 iye, ilizwi lorhuwelela erhalawumbeni lisithi, ‘Lungiselani iKosi indlela, yenzeleni indlela enqophileko!’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Nje-ke uJwanisi wafika, wabhabhadisa erhalawumbeni bewatjhumayela umbhabhadiso wokutjhuguluka malungana nokucolelwa kwezono." 
Mark1:5 Yoke imizana yeJudiya nabo boke abantu beJerusalema baphuma baya kuye. Bavuma izono zabo, wababhabhadisa ngemlanjeni iJordani." 
Mark1:6 UJwanisi gade ambatha izambatho ezenziwe ngoboya bekamela, azibophe ngebhande lesikhumba edinini. Gade agoma iintethe neliju lemmangweni." 
Mark1:7 Watjhumayela wathi: “Emva kwami kuza onamandla khulu kunami, engingasililitho kobana ngingabe ngiguqe ngitjhaphulule imitjana yamapatlagwanakhe." 
Mark1:8 Mina nginibhabhadisa ngamanzi, kodwana yena uzanibhabhadisa ngoMoya oCwengileko.”" 
Mark1:9 Emihleni leyo kwafika uJesu avela eNazaretha ngeGalile, wabhajadiswa nguJwanisi ngeJordani." 
Mark1:10 Kuthe asaphuma ngemanzini, wabona izulu livuleka, uMoya wehlela phezu kwakhe njengezuba." 
Mark1:11 Ilizwi lavela ezulwini lithi: “Wena uyiNdodanami ethandekako, ngithabe khulu ngawe.”" 
Mark1:12 Khonokho uMoya wamusa erhalawumbeni. 
Mark1:13 Wahlala lapho amalanga amatjhumi amane, alingwa nguSathana. Bekukhona neembandana, iingilozi zeza zamsiza." 
Mark1:14 Emva kokubotjhwa kwakaJwanisi, uJesu waya eGalile, watjhumayela ivangeli lakaZimu," 
Mark1:15 wathi: “Isikhathi sesifikile! Umbuso kaZimu sewutjhidele! Tjhugulukani, nikholwe ivangeli!”" 
Mark1:16 Kuthe uJesu asakhamba eqadi kwelwandle leGalile, wabona uSimoni nomfowabo u-Andrisi baphosela inedabo ngelwandle ngombana gade bababambi beenhlambi." 
Mark1:17 UJesu wathi kibo: “Ngilandelani, ngizanenza ababambi babantu.”" 
Mark1:18 Khonokho balisa amanedabo, bamlandela." 
Mark1:19 Kwathi sele akhambakhambe ibangana, wabona uJakopo umsa kaZebediya nomfowabo uJwanisi, bebangemkhunjini balungisa amanedabo." 
Mark1:20 Msinyazana wababiza, yeke batjhiya uyise uZebediya angemkhunjini kanye neensebenzi bamlandela." 
Mark1:21 Baya eKapernawumi, kwathi nakufika iSabatha, uJesu wangena ngesinagogini wathoma ukufundisa." 
Mark1:22 Abantu bamangaliswa yindlela uJesu afundisa ngayo ngombana wabafundisa njengomuntu onegunya ingasi ngendlela abavane bafundiswe ngayo bafundisi bomthetho. 
Mark1:23 Khonapho gade kunendoda ngesinagogini ebegade inommoya omumbi, yarhuwelela," 
Mark1:24 yathi: “Usifunani wena Jesu weNazaretha na? Uze ukuzosibhubhisa na? Ngiyakwazi bona ungubani, ungoCwengileko kaZimu!”" 
Mark1:25 UJesu wawukhalimela wathi: “Thula, uphume kiyo!”" 
Mark1:26 Ummoya omumbi warutharutha indoda leyo, waphuma kiyo ngokutlewula okukhulu." 
Mark1:27 Abantu barareka khulu kangangobana babuzana babodwa bathi: “Yintobani esiyibonako le? Yifundiso etja nenamandla! Ukhalimela ngitjho nemimoya emimbi, imlalele!”" 
Mark1:28 Khonokho iindaba ngaye zasabalala nesifunda soke seGalile. 
Mark1:29 Kuthe bona basuke esinagogini, bakhamba noJakopo noJwanisi baya ekumbeni kaSimoni no-Andrisi." 
Mark1:30 Ngesikhatheso umkhwekazi kaSimoni begade alele, aphethwe mgomani. Nje-ke bambika kuJesu khonokho." 
Mark1:31 UJesu weza, wambamba ngesandla, wamphakamisa. Umgomani wamlisa, wabenzela ukudla." 
Mark1:32 Ngokuhlwa kwamhlokho abantu baletha kuJesu boke ebebagula nabanamadimoni. 
Mark1:33 Boke abantu bedorobho babuthelelana emnyango. 
Mark1:34 Wapholisa abanengi ebegade bagula baphethwe malwelwe ahlukahlukeneko, bewaqotjha namadimoni amanengi. Azange avumele amadimoni kobana akhulume ngombana bekamazi." 
Mark1:35 Ngelanga elilandelako ngesamarimarima, kusese mnyama, uJesu wasikima, waphuma ngekumbeni waya endaweni enganamuntu lapha afika khona wathandaza." 
Mark1:36 USimoni nabakhambisani bakhe bakhamba bayomfuna," 
Mark1:37 kwathi nabamfunyanako, bakhuza bathi: “Abantu bafunana nawe!”" 
Mark1:38 Wathi kibo: “Nambani siyeni kwandawo emizini eseduze ukuze ngitjhumayele nakhona. Ngikho lokho engikuphumeleko.” 
Mark1:39 Wayikhamba yoke iGalile atjhumayela ngemasinagogini wabo, waqotjha namadimoni." 
Mark1:40 Indoda enekhwekhwe yeza kuJesu, yamncenga iguqe ngamadolo yathi: “Nakube uyathanda, ungangihlambulula.”" 
Mark1:41 UJesu wayizwela ubuhlungu, wathabulula isandla sakhe, wayikghwatha wathi: “Ngiyathanda, hlambuluka!”" 
Mark1:42 Khonokho ikhwekhwe lasuka, yeke yahlambuluka." 
Mark1:43 UJesu wayitjhaphulula kobana ikhambe, wayiyalisisa" 
Mark1:44 wathi kiyo: “Qinisekisa bonyana awutjeli noyedwa ngalokhu. Kodwana khamba uyozibonakalisa kumphristi bese wenza imihlabelo uMosi ayale ngayo mayelana nokuhlanjululwa kwakho, kube bufakazi kibo.”" 
Mark1:45 Kodwana esikhundleni salokho, indoda leyo yakhamba izikhulumela, irhatjha iindaba zokupholiswa kwayo. Ngebanga lalokho, uJesu azange asakghona ukungena edorobheni bamqalile. Kodwana wahlala ngaphandle kwedorobho eendaweni ezinganabantu. Nanyana kunjalo abantu beza kuye bavela kizo zoke iindawo." 
Mark2:1 Amalangana ngemva kwalokho lokha uJesu nangena eKapernawumi, abantu bezwa bonyana uze ngekhaya." 
Mark2:2 Abantu bahlangana ngobunengi kangangobana kwatlhogeka indawo yokuhlala ngitjho nangaphandle komnyango. Yeke wabatjhumayeza ilizwi. 
Mark2:3 Beza kuye bathwele umuntu okhubazekileko. Bekathwelwe madoda amane. 
Mark2:4 Ngebanga lokobana angazange akghone ukumfikisa kuJesu ngenca yesiqubuthu ebesilapho, amadoda lawo afuza iphahla ngehla kwalapho bekujame khona uJesu. Kwathi bona avule indlela, ehlisela umuntu okhubazekileko loyo phasi ngomkghadi ebegade alele kiwo." 
Mark2:5 UJesu wathi nabona ukukholwa kwawo, wathi emuntwini okhubazekileko: “Ndodanami, izono zakho zilitjalelwe.”" 
Mark2:6 Nje-ke abafundisi abanye bomthetho bebahlezi lapho badlumbana basithi: 
Mark2:7 “Kubayini umrhali lo akhuluma ngalendlela? Uyahlambalaza! Ngubani ongalibalela izono ngaphandle kwakaZimu kwaphela na?” 
Mark2:8 Khonokho uJesu wazi emmoyenakhe bonyana lokhu ngilokho ebebakucabanga eenhliziyweni zabo, nje-ke wathi kibo: “Kubayini nicabanga izintwezi na?" 
Mark2:9 Ngikuphi okulula ukuthi kokhubazekileko, ‘Izono zakho zilitjalelwe,’ namkha ukuthi, ‘Sikima uthathe umkghadi wakho ukhambe,’ na?" 
Mark2:10 Ngizanibonisa-ke bona iNdodana yoMuntu inamandla ephasinapha wokucolela izono.” Yeke wathi kokhubazekileko: 
Mark2:11 “Ngithi kuwe, ‘Sikima uthathe umkghadi wakho, ukhambe uye ekhaya!’ ”" 
Mark2:12 Wasikima wadobha umkghadi wakhe, waphuma wakhamba abantu boke bamqalile. Lokhu kwamangaza woke umuntu, nje-ke badumisa uZimu bathi: “Into enje azange khesiyibone!”" 
Mark2:13 Godu uJesu waya magegana nelwandle, soke isiqubuthu seza kuye wasifundisa." 
Mark2:14 Kwathi nasakhamba lapho wabona uLevi umsa ka-Alfiyosi ahlezi ngendlini yomthelo, wathi kuye: “Ngilandela.” ULevi wasikima wamlandela." 
Mark2:15 Kuthe uJesu asahlezi etafuleni ngendlini kaLevi, abathelisi abanengi kanye nezoni bagoma naye kanye nabafundi bakhe ngombana bebabanengi abamlandelako." 
Mark2:16 Lokha abafundisi bomthetho ababaFarisi nababona uJesu agoma nezoni kanye nabathelisi, babuza abafundi bakhe bathi: “Kanti kubayini agoma nabathelisi nezoni na?”" 
Mark2:17 UJesu nezwa lokho wathi kibo: “Akusibo abaphilileko abafuna inyanga, kodwana ifunwa ngabagulako. Angikezi ukuzokubiza abalungileko kodwana izoni.”" 
Mark2:18 Abafundi bakaJwanisi uMbhabhadisi nabaFarisi bebazilile. Abanye abantu beza kuJesu bambuza bathi: “Kuzanjani bona abafundi bakaJwanisi nebabaFarisi bazile ukudla khibe bakho bona abakazili na?” 
Mark2:19 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Abayeni bomkhwenyana bangazila njani asesenabo na? Angeze bakghona ikani nje asesenabo. 
Mark2:20 Kodwana isikhathi sizakufika lapho umkhwenyani azakususwa khona phakathi kwabo, yeke ngesikhatheso-ke bazakuzila." 
Mark2:21 “Akakho umuntu othungelela isitjheza esitjha esingarhunyeliko esambathweni esidala. Nakube wenza njalo, isitjheza esitjha sizakudoseka sisuke esambathweni esidaleso bese sikhambiselela ukudabuka." 
Mark2:22 Godu akakho othela iwayini elitjha ngeenkhwameni zesikhumba ezidala. Nakube wenza njalo, iwayini lingadabula iinkhwamezo bese kokubili iwayini neenkhwama zesikhumba konakale. Awa, uthela iwayini elitjha ngeenkhwameni zesikhumba ezitjha.”" 
Mark2:23 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga kuliSabatha, uJesu waratha esimini yekoroyi, abafundi bakhe bamlandela, khonapho bathoma bakha iinqwambi zekoroyi." 
Mark2:24 AbaFarisi bathi kuye: “Qala, benzelani okungakavunyelwa ngeSabatha na?”" 
Mark2:25 Wathi kibo: “Akhange khenifunde bona uDavida wenzani lokha yena nabakhambisani bakhe baphethwe yindlala begodu baswela na? 
Mark2:26 Angithi emihleni ka-Abiyathari umphristi omkhulu, wangena ngethempelini lakaZimu wagoma isikwa esahlukaniselweko, esigonywa baphristi kwaphela. Khonapho wapha nabakhambisani bakhe bona nabo bagome.”" 
Mark2:27 UJesu waqeda ngokuthi: “ISabatha lenzelwe abantu, ingasi bona abantu benzelwa iSabatha." 
Mark2:28 Ngokunjalo-ke, iNdodana yoMuntu yiKosi ngitjho naphezu kweSabatha.”" 
Mark3:1 UJesu godu wangena ngesinagogini. Ngaphakathapho gade kukhona indoda enesandla esirholopheleko. 
Mark3:2 Khonapho bekunabanye abantu ebebafunana nesizathu sokusola uJesu, yeke bamqala ngelihlo elibukhali ukubona bonyana uzakuphilisa umuntu loyo ije kuliSabatha njalo na." 
Mark3:3 UJesu wathi emuntwini orholophele isandla loyo: “Sikima ujame phakathi.” 
Mark3:4 UJesu wathi kibo: “Ngikuphi okuvumelekileko ngeSabatha: ukwenza okuhle namkha ukwenza okumbi, ukusindisa ipilo namkha ukubulala na?” Kodwana bathula bathi du." 
Mark3:5 Waqala kibo ngapha nangapha ngokuthukuthela nangokukhathazeka okukhulu ngebanga leenhliziyo zabo ezilikhuni, yeke wathi endodeni: “Thabulula isandla sakho.” Yasithabulula, saphola pholi." 
Mark3:6 Khonokho abaFarisi baphumela ngaphandle, benza isicathana nabantu bakaHerode sokobana bangambulala njani uJesu." 
Mark3:7 UJesu wathatha abafundi bakhe baya elwandle. Isiqubuthu esikhulu esivela eGalile samlandela. 
Mark3:8 Kwathi bona bezwe ngakho koke ebegade akwenza, abantu abanengi beza kuye bavela eJudiya, eJerusalema, e-Idumiya neemfundeni ezingaphetjheya kweJordani namagegana neTirosi neTsidoni." 
Mark3:9 Ngebanga lesiqubuthu esikhulu, uJesu watjela abafundi bakhe bona bamlungisele umkhumbi khona abantu bangazukghona ukumbungelela." 
Mark3:10 Njengombana apholisa abantu abanengi nje, boke abagulako bebasunduzana, balinga ukumkghwatha." 
Mark3:11 Bekuthi njalo lokha imimoya emimbi nayimbonako, idusuke phasi phambi kwakhe irhuwelele ithi: “Wena uyiNdodana kaZimu!”" 
Mark3:12 Kodwana wayidosa ngendlebe bona ingatjeli namunye bona ungubani. 
Mark3:13 UJesu wenyukela entabeni, wabizela kuye labo abafunako nje-ke beza kuye." 
Mark3:14 Wakhetha abalitjhumi nambili, wababiza bona babapostoli ukuze babe naye, abathume bona bayokutjhumayela," 
Mark3:15 begodu babe negunya lokuqotjha amadimoni. 
Mark3:16 Laba ngabalitjhumi nambili abakhethako: NguSimoni, amthiya bona nguPitrosi;" 
Mark3:17 uJakopo nomnakwabo uJwanisi, abamadodana kaZebediya, bona wabathiya bona nguBhowanerigesi, okutjho bona madodana womdumo;" 
Mark3:18 u-Andrisi; uFlebhe; uBharitholomeyusi; uMatewu; uTomasi; uJakopo umsa ka-Alfiyosi; uTadiyosi; uSimoni umZelothe 
Mark3:19 noJudasi Iskariyodi owakhaphela uJesu. 
Mark3:20 UJesu wangena ngekumbeni, godu isiqubuthu sabuthana kangangoba yena nabafundi bakhe babhalelwa kugoma isikwa." 
Mark3:21 Kuthe bona bomndenakhe bezwe ngalokho, beza kobana bamthathe bathi: “Uhlangene ihloko.”" 
Mark3:22 Abafundisi bomthetho ebebavela eJerusalema nabo bathi: “Ungenwe nguBhelzabhulu. Uqotjha amadimoni ngekosana yamadimoni.” 
Mark3:23 Yeke uJesu wababiza wakhuluma nabo ngemifanekiso wathi: “USathana angamqotjha njani uSathana na? 
Mark3:24 Nakube umbuso wehlukene ngokwawo, kutjho bona umbuso lowo angeze wajama." 
Mark3:25 Nakube umndeni wehlukene ngokwawo, umndeni lowo angeze wajama." 
Mark3:26 NoSathana nakube uziphikisa yena ngokwakhe begodu wehlukene phakathi, angeze ajama nesiphetho sakhe sifikile." 
Mark3:27 “Emanyeni akakho umuntu ongangena emzini wetsitsirimba afese athathe ipahlayo ngaphandle kobana athome ngokuyibopha qangi, kukhona angadleleza ikumbayo." 
Mark3:28 “Kwamambala ngiyanitjela bona zoke izono kanye neenhlamba zabantu bazakulitjalelwa zona. 
Mark3:29 Kodwana nanyana ngubani ohlambalaza uMoya oCwengileko angekhe alitjalelwa, unomlandu wokona kwamlibe.”" 
Mark3:30 UJesu watjho njalo ngombana bebasithi: “Unommoya omumbi.” 
Mark3:31 Yeke unina nabafowabo kaJesu bafika bajama ngaphandle, bathumela othileko ngaphakathi bona ayombiza." 
Mark3:32 Bekabungelelwe siqubuthu, abantu bathi kuye: “Unyoko nabafowenu babawa ukukubona ngaphandle.”" 
Mark3:33 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngubani umma nabafowethu na?” 
Mark3:34 Waqala labo ebebahlezi bambungelele wathi: “Nangu umma nabafowethu! 
Mark3:35 Nanyana ngubani owenza intando kaZimu ungumfowethu, nodadwethu nomma.”" 
Mark4:1 Godu uJesu wathoma ukufundisa elwandle, isiqubuthu ebesimbungelele besisikhulu kangangombana wangena ngemkhunjini wahlala ngakiwo ngaphandle kwelwandle. Boke abantu bebagege neligu eduze kwamanzi." 
Mark4:2 Wafundisa izinto ezinengi ngemifanekiso; ekufundiseni kwakhe wathi: 
Mark4:3 “Lalelani! Kwaphuma umtjali wayokutjala. 
Mark4:4 Kwathi nakarhatjha imbewu, enye yawela endleleni, iinyoni zafika zayigobola." 
Mark4:5 Enye yawela eendaweni ezinamatje lapha bekunganaqulwani enengi khona. Yamila masinyana ngombana iqulwani beyiyincani. 
Mark4:6 Kodwana kwathi nakuphuma ilanga, iintjalo zatjha bezatjhwaba ngombana bezinganamirabhu." 
Mark4:7 Enye imbewu yawela hlangana nameva, akhula aminyanisa iintjalo, ngalokho azange zithele." 
Mark4:8 Khonapho enye yawela equlwanini ehle. Yamila, yakhula yabe yathela, yabuyelela ngamatjhumi amathathu, amatjhumi asithandathu ngitjho nangekhulu.”" 
Mark4:9 Yeke uJesu wathi: “Oneendlebe akezwe!” 
Mark4:10 Kwathi nasele ayedwa, abalitjhumi nambili kanye nabanye ebebanaye bambuza ngemifanekiso le." 
Mark4:11 Wathi kibo: “Nina ninikelwe ifihlo yombuso kaZimu, kodwana kilabo abangaphandle, yoke into kibo itjhiwo ngemifanekiso" 
Mark4:12 ukuze “bahlale babona kodwana bangabonisisi, bahlale basizwa kodwana bangezwisisi, nakungasinjalo, bangatjhuguluka, balitjalelwe.”" 
Mark4:13 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Aniwuzwisisi umfanekiso lo na? Alo-ke nizayizwisisa njani eminye imifanekiso na? 
Mark4:14 Umtjali utjala ilizwi. 
Mark4:15 Abanye abantu banjengembewu esendleleni, lokha nakutjalwa ilizwi. Bathi bangalizwa, uSathana afike alithathe ilizwi elitjelwe kibo." 
Mark4:16 Abanye banjengembewu etjalwe eendaweni ezinamatje, bezwa ilizwi, balamukele ngethabo." 
Mark4:17 Kodwana njengombana banganamirabhu, babambelela isikhatjhana nje kwaphela. Nakufika iintjhijilo nokuzunywa, barhirika msinyana." 
Mark4:18 Khonapho abanye banjengembewu etjalwe hlangana nameva. Bezwa ilizwi," 
Mark4:19 kodwana iinhlupheko zobuphilobu nokukhohliswa lithando lobugwili kanye neenkanuko zezinto ezinye, kuyafika kubhibhe ilizwi, kulenze lingatheli." 
Mark4:20 Abanye banjengembewu etjalwe ehlabathini ehle. Bayalizwa ilizwi, balamukele, bathele iinthelo ezibuyelelwe ngamatjhumi amathathu, ngamatjhumi asithandathu ngitjho nangekhulu.”" 
Mark4:21 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Nibeka isibani ngaphasi kwesitja namkha ngaphasi kombhede na? Azakhe nisibeke phezu kwesitja saso na? 
Mark4:22 Ngambala nanyana yini efihlekileko izakuvela emkhanyweni, nalokho okusithekileko kuzakwambulwa." 
Mark4:23 Nakukhona oneendlebe, akezwe!”" 
Mark4:24 Waraga wathi kibo: “Yelelani kuhle lokho enikuzwako! Isilinganiso enahlulela ngaso abanye, nani nizakwahlulelwa ngaso, ngitjho nangaphezulu." 
Mark4:25 Onelitho uzakwengezelwa, loyo onganalitho, uzakwemukwa nalokho anakho.”" 
Mark4:26 UJesu godu wathi: “Umbuso kaZimu unje: Umuntu urhatjha imbewu esimini. 
Mark4:27 Ubusuku nemini, nanyana uyalala namkha uyavuka, imbewu yona iyahluma beyikhule, ije angazi bonyana kwenzeka bunjani lokho." 
Mark4:28 Iqulwani ngokwayo iveza ikoroyi, kuthoma kube lihlanga, kube litjhakazo bese kuba siqwambi esipheleleko." 
Mark4:29 Nasele ikoroyi ivuthiwe, uyigweba ngesegere ngombana sekusikhathi sokuvuna.”" 
Mark4:30 UJesu wabuza wathi: “Umbuso kaZimu ungafaniswa nani na? Singawuhlathulula ngamuphi umfanekiso na? 
Mark4:31 Ufana nembewu yesinapu encancani kiyo yoke imihlobo yembewu etjalwa equlwanini. 
Mark4:32 Kodwana nasele itjelwe, ikhula ibe sitjalo esikhulu kinazo zoke esimini, sibe neempande ezikulu, iinyoni zomkayi zikhosele emthunzinaso.”" 
Mark4:33 UJesu wakhuluma ilizwi kibo ngemifanekiso eminengi efana nale ngendlela ebebangazwisisa ngayo. 
Mark4:34 Akhange atjho ilitho kibo ngaphandle kokusebenzisa imifanekiso. Kodwana kwathi nasele ayedwa nabafundi bakhe, wabahlathululela koke." 
Mark4:35 Mhlokho nakuhlwako wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Nambani siyameleni ngaphetjheya.” 
Mark4:36 Batjhiya isiqubuthu bakhamba naye solo angemkhunjini. Neminye imikhumbi yakhamba nabo. 
Mark4:37 Kwavuka isiwuruwuru esikhulu namaza angena ngemkhunjini, wapheze wazala amanzi." 
Mark4:38 UJesu gade angemkhunjinapho alele emfotjhofotjhweni emsamo. Abafundi bamvusa bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, awutjhiswa bona siyaminza na?”" 
Mark4:39 Wavuka, wakhalimela isiwuruwuru namaza wathi: “Thula uthi du!” Yeke isiwuruwuru sarhobha, sakanye sathula du." 
Mark4:40 Alo-ke wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Nethuswe yini kangaka na? Nisenakho ukukholwa nje na?” 
Mark4:41 Bathuka khulu bebabuzana bathi: “Kanti ngubani umuntu lo na? Ulalelwa ngitjho nangani mumoya nelwandle!” 
Mark5:1 UJesu nabafundi bakhe bayamela ngaphetjheya kwelwandle, enarheni yamaGerasene." 
Mark5:2 Kwathi lokha uJesu nehla ngemkhunjini, wahlangatjezwa mumuntu onommoya omumbi avela emathuneni." 
Mark5:3 Umuntu loyo ubegade ahlala emathunenapho begodu bekungasenamuntu okghona ukumbopha ngitjho nangeenketani. 
Mark5:4 Ngeenkhathi zoke ubegade ahlala abotjhwe izandla neenyawo, kodwana begade adabula iinketani abe ephule neensimbi abekabotjhwe ngazo iinyawo. Gade kungekho omhlulako ngamandla." 
Mark5:5 Ubusuku nemini gade azulazula hlangana namathuna neentatjana, aphele arhuwelele azisike nangamatje." 
Mark5:6 Kwathi nakabona uJesu kudanyana naye, wagijima wafese wawa ngamadolo ngaphambi kwakhe." 
Mark5:7 Warhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu wathi: “Ngikutjhisa ngani wena Jesu Ndodana kaZimu ongoPhezulu na? Funga ngoZimu bonyana awuzukungihlunguphaza!” 
Mark5:8 Watjho lokhu ngombana uJesu bekathe kuye: “Phuma emuntwini lo wena mmoya omumbi!” 
Mark5:9 Yeke uJesu wambuza wathi: “Ungubani ibizo lakho na?” Wamphendula wathi: “Ibizo lami nguLegiyoni ngombana sibanengi.” 
Mark5:10 Waphikelela ngokurabhela uJesu bona angabaqotjhi enarheni le. 
Mark5:11 Umhlambi omkhulu wezavukazana gade udla hlanu kwentatjana. 
Mark5:12 Amadimoni arabhela uJesu athi: “Sithumela ezavukazaneni, usivumele singene kizo.”" 
Mark5:13 Wawavumela, aphuma-ke endodeni leyo angena ezavukazaneni. Umhlambi woke, ongaba zizavukazana eziziinkulungwana ezimbili, wagijimela emehlelweni wesebe, wadlhumukela ngelwandle, wacwila!" 
Mark5:14 Abelusi bezavukazana babaleka, babika isigesi ngedorobheni nemaphandleni. Abantu baphuma bazokubona okwenzekileko." 
Mark5:15 Kwathi nabafika kuJesu, babona indoda ebegade ingenwe liwoma lamadimoni, ihlezi lapho, yembethe begodu seyibuyelwe mkhumbulo, yeke besaba." 
Mark5:16 Labo ababonileko batjela abantu bona kwenzekeni endodeni engenwe mimoya emimbi, babatjela nangezavukazana." 
Mark5:17 Yeke abantu babawa uJesu bona akhambe enarhenabo. 
Mark5:18 Kwathi uJesu nangena ngemkhunjini, umuntu obegade angenwe madimoni wakhombela ukukhamba naye." 
Mark5:19 UJesu azange amvumele kodwana wathi kuye: “Khamba uye ekhaya emndeninakho ufese ubatjele bona kungangani okwenzelwe nguSomnini nokobana ukurhawukele kangangani.” 
Mark5:20 Yakhamba-ke indoda leyo beyathoma ukubika iindabezo eDekapolisi, kobana kungangani ekwenzelwe nguJesu. Boke barareka khulu." 
Mark5:21 Kwathi bona uJesu godu ayamele ngaphetjheya kwelwandle ngomkhumbi, wabungelelwa siqubuthu esikhulu eqadi kwelwandle." 
Mark5:22 Yeke omunye wabaphathi besinagogi ebekuthiwa nguJayirosi weza lapho. Wathi nakabona uJesu, wawela eenyaweni zakhe," 
Mark5:23 wamrabhela khulu wathi: “Indodakazami encani iyahlongakala. Akhese uze uzoyibeka izandla ukuze iphole beyiphile!” 
Mark5:24 Yeke uJesu wakhamba naye. Isiqubuthu esikhulu samlandela sisunduzelana kuye. 
Mark5:25 Bekunomfazi ogade aphopha iingazi, sele kuminyaka elitjhumi nambili anjalo." 
Mark5:26 Wagula khulu akhamba iinyanga ezinengi, waphelelwa ngikho koke agade anakho. Kodwana kunobana aphole, ukugula kwarhagala." 
Mark5:27 Kwathi bona ezwe ngoJesu, weza ngemva kwakhe hlangana nesiqubuthu wafese wakghwatha isambatho sakhe," 
Mark5:28 ngombana ubegade azitjele wathi: “Nange ngingasengikghwathe nje isambatho sakhe kwaphela, ngizokuphola.”" 
Mark5:29 Khonokho ukuphopha kwakhawuka, wazizwa emzimbenakhe bona utjhaphulukile emtlhagwenakhe." 
Mark5:30 Msinyazana uJesu walemuka bona kunamandla aphumileko kuye, waphendukela ngesiqubuthwini wathi: “Ngubani othinte isambatho sami?”" 
Mark5:31 Abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: “Uyabona bona isiqubuthu sabantu sisunduzelana phezu kwakho kodwana khonapho ubuza bona ngubani okuthintileko?” 
Mark5:32 Kodwana uJesu waragela phambili waqala ngapha nangapha ukubona bonyana ngubani omthintileko. 
Mark5:33 Yeke umfazi loyo, ngokwazi bonyana kwenzekeni kuye, weza wafese wawela eenyaweni zakaJesu, athuthumela ngokwesaba; wamtjela loke iqiniso."
