Mark5:34 UJesu wathi kuye: “Ndodakazi, ukukholwa kwakho kukusindisile. Khamba ngokuthula, utjhaphuluke eenhlungwini zakho.”" 
Mark5:35 Kwathi uJesu asakhuluma njalo, kwafika amadoda athileko abuya kwaJayirosi umphathi wesinagogi athi kuye: “Indodakazakho ihlongakele, usamtshwenyelani umfundisi na?”" 
Mark5:36 UJesu akhange ayelele abakutjhoko, wathi kumphathi wesinagogi: “Ungesabi, kholwa nje kwaphela.”" 
Mark5:37 Akhange avumele namunye bona akhambe naye, ngaphandle koPitrosi, uJakopo nomfowabo uJwanisi." 
Mark5:38 Kuthe nabafika emzini womphathi wesinagogi, uJesu wabona isiphithiphithi sabantu balila barhahlawula." 
Mark5:39 Wangena wathi kibo: “Siphithiphithi sani lesi kanye nokurhahlawula okungaka na? Umntwana akakahlongakali kodwana ulele.” 
Mark5:40 Kodwana bamhleka. Wabakhuphela ngaphandle, wathatha uyise lomntwana nonina kanye nabafundi eze nabo, bangena ngapha kunomntwana khona." 
Mark5:41 Wambamba ngesandla wathi kuye: “Thalitha kumi!” Nakutjhugululwako kutjho bona “Mntazanyana, ngithi kuwe, sikima!”" 
Mark5:42 Khonokho umntazana wasikima wakhambakhamba. Gade aneminyaka elitjhumi nambili. Abantu barareka khulu ngalokho. 
Mark5:43 UJesu wabadosa ngendlebe bona bangatjeli noyedwa ngalokho okwenzekileko. Godu wabayala bona baphe umntazanyana loyo okugonywako. 
Mark6:1 UJesu wasuka lapho wabuyela edorobheni lekhabo alandelwa bafundi bakhe. 
Mark6:2 Ngelanga leSabatha wathoma ukufundisa ngesinagogini. Abanengi abamuzwako barareka bathi: “Indoda le, ikuthathaphi koke lokhu na? Buhlakani obungangani lobu aphiwe bona, qala bewenza nemikarisomraro!" 
Mark6:3 Kanti akusimbazi lo na? Angithi yindodana kaMariya nomfowabo kaJakopo, uJosisi, uJudasi noSimoni? Abodadwabo bahlala nathi lapha!” Yeke bakhubeka ngaye." 
Mark6:4 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kusedorobheni lekhabo, hlangana neenhlobo zakhe nangakwabo kwaphela lapha umphorofidi angahlonitjhwa khona.”" 
Mark6:5 Azange enze namunye umkarisomraro lapho ngaphandle kokubeka izandla eengulanini ezimbalwa azipholise. 
Mark6:6 Wararwa kungakholwa kwabo. Yeke uJesu wakhambakhamba lapho, wangena umuzi nomzana, afundisa." 
Mark6:7 Wabizela kuye abafundi abalitjhumi nambili, wabathuma ngababili. Wabanikela amandla phezu kwemimoya emimbi." 
Mark6:8 Wabayala wathi: “Ningaphathi ilitho ekhambeni lenu, ngaphandle kwedondolo. Ningaphathi isikwa, imbada ngitjho nemali ngeenkhwanyeni zenu." 
Mark6:9 Fakani amapatlagwana, kodwana ningaphathi izambatho ezinye ngaphandle kwenizembetheko." 
Mark6:10 Njalo lokha naningena emzini, hlalani kiwapho bekube kumhlana nisukako edorobhenelo." 
Mark6:11 Nakube kunalapha ningamukelekiko khona, namkha lapha ningalalelwako khona, thintithani ithuli eenyaweni zenu nikhambe. Lokho kuzakuba bufakazi obujamelene nabo.”" 
Mark6:12 Bakhamba-ke bayokutjhumayela bona abantu batjhuguluke. 
Mark6:13 Baqotjha amadimoni amanengi, bazesa abanengi abagulako ngamafutha we-oliva, babapholisa." 
Mark6:14 Ibizo lakaJesu laduma kangangombana ikosi uHerode yezwa ngalokho. Abanye bebathi: “UJwanisi uMbhabhadisi uvusiwe kabafileko, ngikho akghona ukwenza imikarisomraro nje.”" 
Mark6:15 Abanye bathi: “Ngu-Eliya.” Godu abanye bathi: “Umphorofidi njengomunye wabaphorofidi bekadeni.” 
Mark6:16 Kodwana kwathi lokha uHerode nezwa lokho, wathi: “Baba-ke! UJwanisi yena lo engamqunta ihloko, uvukileko kabafileko!”" 
Mark6:17 UHerode ngokwakhe wakhupha umyalo bona kubanjwe uJwanisi, wabotjhwa bewafakwa ngesikhungweni. Lokho ubegade akwenze ngebanga lakaHerodiya umkaFlebhe, umfowabo amngenako." 
Mark6:18 UJwanisi bekathe kuHerode: “Akusimthetho bona ungathatha umkamfowenu!” 
Mark6:19 Ngalokho uHerodiya wabambela uJwanisi amavundo, wafuna ukumbulala. Kodwana wabhalelwa" 
Mark6:20 ngombana uHerode ubegade esaba uJwanisi begodu amvikela ngokwazi bona uyindoda elungileko necwengileko. Yeke bekuthi uHerode nezwa uJwanisi akhuluma, arareke khulu kodwana ubegade athanda ukumlalela." 
Mark6:21 Ekugcineni uHerodiya wafumana ithuba lakhe. Bekumhlana welanga lokubelethwa kwakaHerode. Wenzela iinkhulu zombuso, iinduna zepi nabosaziwako beGalile umgidi." 
Mark6:22 Kwathi lokha indodakazi kaHerodiya nayingena, igida, yathokozisa uHerode nabasesidlweni naye. Nje-ke ikosi yathi emntazaneni: “Nawungangibawa nanyana yini oyifunako, ngingakunikela yona.”" 
Mark6:23 Wayithembisa ngesifungo wathi: “Nanyana yini oyibawako ngizakupha yona, ngitjho nesiquntu sombuswami.”" 
Mark6:24 Waphuma waya kunina wafese wathi: “Ngibaweni na?” Waphendula wathi: “Bawa ihloko kaJwanisi uMbhabhadisi.” 
Mark6:25 Khonokho wabuyela ekosini ngebelo, wafika wathi: “Ngifuna bona unginikele ihloko kaJwanisi uMbhabhadisi ngesitja, khona nje.”" 
Mark6:26 Ikosi yezwa ubuhlungu khulu, kodwana ngebanga lesifungo sayo kanye nabayeni abasesidlweni nayo, akhange ithande ukulandulela umntazana lo." 
Mark6:27 Yeke yayala khonokho umbulali kobana eze nehloko kaJwanisi. Umuntu loyo wakhamba-ke, wafese waqunta uJwanisi ihloko angesikhungweni," 
Mark6:28 wayiletha ngesitja. Wayinikela umntazana, yena wayidlulisela kunina." 
Mark6:29 Kwathi bona abafundi bakaJwanisi bezwe lokho, beza, bathatha umzimbakhe bawubulunga ngethuneni." 
Mark6:30 Abapostoli babuthana kuJesu, bambikela koke abakwenzileko nabakufundisileko." 
Mark6:31 Yeke, ngebanga lokobana bekunabantu abanengi ebebasehla benyuka, abafundaba bebatlhoga nethuba lokugoma, uJesu wathi kibo: “Nambani sikhambeni sodwa siyeni endaweni ethulileko lapha singaphumula khona.”" 
Mark6:32 Bakhamba-ke ngomkhumbi, baya endaweni ethulileko." 
Mark6:33 Kodwana inengi labantu elababonako nabakhambako labazi bona bobani, alo-ke laphuma kiyo yoke imizana lagijima ngeenyawo belayokufika lapho phambi kwabo." 
Mark6:34 UJesu wathi nahlika emkhunjini, wabona isiqubuthu esikhulu, wasirhawukela ngombana gade sifana nezimvu ezingenamelusi. Nje-ke wathoma wasifundisa okunengi." 
Mark6:35 Ngesikhatheso besele kuhlwile, abafundi bakhe batjhidela kuye, bathi: “Indawo le ikude nemizi, kanti nokuhlwa sekuhlwile." 
Mark6:36 Tjela abantwaba bakhambe ukuze baye emzini nemizaneni eseduze bazithengele okugonywako.” 
Mark6:37 Kodwana waphendula wathi: “Banikeleni nina okugonywako.” Bamphendula bathi: “Lokho kungathatha umrholo womuntu weenyanga ezibunane! Alo, sizakusebenzisa imali enengi kangaka esikweni siphe abantwaba bona bagome na?”" 
Mark6:38 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Ninezikwa ezingaki na? Khambani niyokuqala.” Kwathi bona babone, bathi kuye: “Zihlanu neenhlambi ezimbili.”" 
Mark6:39 UJesu wabayala bona bahlalise boke abantu emgwengweni ngeenqhema. 
Mark6:40 Nje-ke bahlala phasi ngeenqhema zabalikhulu nezabamatjhumi amahlanu. 
Mark6:41 UJesu wathatha izikwa ezihlanu neenhlambi ezimbili, waqala ezulwini, wathokoza bewahlephula izikwa. Wanikela abafundi bakhe bona bahlukanisele abantu. Godu wabahlukanisela iinhlambi ezimbili boke njalo." 
Mark6:42 Boke bagoma basutha," 
Mark6:43 abafundi babuthelela bazalisa iinqwebu ezilitjhumi nambili ngeentshutshuru ezasalako zezikwa neenhlambi. 
Mark6:44 Isibalo samadoda agomako saba ziinkulungwana ezihlanu. 
Mark6:45 Khonokho uJesu wayala abafundi bakhe bona bangene ngemkhunjini bamtjhiye baye eBhethe-Sayida, yena wasala atjela abantu bona bakhambe." 
Mark6:46 Kuthe bona ahlukane nabo, watjhinga entabeni wayokuthandaza." 
Mark6:47 Kwathi nakurhwalalako, umkhumbi wabe uphakathi kwelwandle, yena gade asese senarheni." 
Mark6:48 Wabona abafundi badosa emhlweni ngokuthayisa umkhumbi ngebanga lokobana ummoya bewubakhandela. Ekuseni ngomlindo wesine, weza kibo akhamba phezu kwelwandle. Gade asele azokudlula ngakibo," 
Mark6:49 kodwana kwathi nabambonako njalo akhamba phezu kwelwandle, badlumbana bona sipuku. Barhuwelela," 
Mark6:50 ngombana boke bambona, yeke bethuka. Khonokho uJesu wakhuluma nabo wathi: “Qinani isibindi. Ngimi, ningesabi.”" 
Mark6:51 Yeke wangena ngemkhunjinabo, ummoya wathula. Bathi dlemelele" 
Mark6:52 ngebanga lokobana bebasamangazwe yindaba yezikwa ngombana iinhliziyo zabo bezingakghoni ukwamukela. 
Mark6:53 Kwathi sele bayamele ngaphetjheya, bafika eGenezaretha, babopha umkhumbi wabo lapho." 
Mark6:54 Nasele baphumile ngemkhunjini, abantu balemuka bona nguJesu." 
Mark6:55 Bagijima bagidizela soke isifundeso, baletha boke abagulako babathwele ngemikghadi, babasa nanyana kukuphi lapha bezwa bona uya ngakhona." 
Mark6:56 Kuphi nakuphi lapha afika khona, emizaneni, emizini nemaphandleni, bakhuphela abagulako ematatawini. Bamrabhela bona abavumele bakghwathe nje kwaphela umphetho wengubakhe. Nje-ke boke abayikghwathako baphola." 
Mark7:1 AbaFarisi kanye nabanye abafundisi bomthetho ebebavela eJerusalema, babungelela uJesu." 
Mark7:2 Khonapho babona abanye babafundi bakhe bagoma ngezandla ezingakahlambuluki okutjho ezingakahlanjwa. 
Mark7:3 AbaFarisi nawo woke amaJuda abagomi bangakahlambululi izandla zabo, ngokwenza njalo balonda isiko labokhokho." 
Mark7:4 Nababuya etatawini lokuthengisela, abagomi bangakahlambi. Godu kukhona amasiko amanengi abawatjhejako njengokuhlanza iinkapho, iimbiza nezitja zekoporo." 
Mark7:5 Yeke abaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho babuza uJesu bathi: “Kubayini abafundi bakho bangaphili ngokwesiko labokhokho kodwana bagoma ngezandla ezingakahlanjwa na?” 
Mark7:6 UJesu waphendula wathi: “U-Isaya bekaqinisile lokha naphorofida ngani bazenzisi ndina njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘Abantwaba bangidumisa ngeembhena zabo, kodwana iinhliziyo zabo zikude nami." 
Mark7:7 Bangidumisa ngelize, iimfundiso zabo zimithetho yabantu.’" 
Mark7:8 “Nilahle imiyalo kaZimu nadzimelela emasikweni wabantu.” 
Mark7:9 Godu wathi kibo: “Ninendledlana ethileko yokuphayilela eqadi imiyalo kaZimu ukuze nilonde amasikwenu! 
Mark7:10 Angithi uMosi wathi, ‘Hlonipha uyihlo nonyoko.’ Godu wathi, ‘Owethuka uyise namkha unina akabulawe.’" 
Mark7:11 Kodwana nifundisa bona umuntu nakathi kuyise namkha kunina, ‘Nanyana ngiliphi isizo enginisize ngalo liyiKorbana’ (okutjho isipho esehlukaniselwe uZimu)," 
Mark7:12 nje-ke anisamlisi bona enzele uyise namkha unina nanyana yini akufunako. 
Mark7:13 Ngaleyondlela nilenza libe lilize ilizwi lakaZimu ngamasikwenu eniwafundisako. Kunengi okufana nalokhu enikwenzako.” 
Mark7:14 Godu uJesu wabizela isiqubuthu kuye, wathi: “Yeningilalele noke nizwisise lokhu." 
Mark7:15 Akunalitho elingaphandle komuntu elingamenza abe ngosilapheleko nalingena ngaphakathi kwakhe. Kodwana ngokuphuma ngaphakathi kwakhe okumenza abe ngosilapheleko. 
Mark7:16 Oneendlebe akezwe!” 
Mark7:17 Ngemva kobana uJesu asukile esiqubuthwini bewangena ngekumbeni, abafundi bakhe bambuza ngomfanekiso lo." 
Mark7:18 Wababuza wathi: “Kanti nani anizwisisi na? Aniboni bona akunalitho elibuya ngaphandle elingena emuntwini bese limenza abe ngosilapheleko na? 
Mark7:19 Iye ngombana akuyi ngehliziyweni kodwana kuya ngesiswini sakhe, kusuke lapho-ke kuphumele ngaphandle komzimbakhe.” Ngokutjho njalo, uJesu bekatjho bona koke okugonywako kuhlambulukile." 
Mark7:20 Waraga wathi: “Okuphuma ngemuntwini ngikho okumenza abe ‘ngosilapheleko’. 
Mark7:21 Ngaphakathi kwehliziyo yomuntu kuvela imikhumbulo emimbi okutjho ukulalana okuthuweleleko, ubusela, ukubulala, ukuhlobonga," 
Mark7:22 ukuba marhamaru, umkhumbulo wokwenza ubumbi, ikohliso, ukungabi nesimilo, umona, ukululaza, ukuzigabisa nobudlhayela." 
Mark7:23 Boke ubusathanobu buvela ngaphakathi begodu ngibo-ke obenza umuntu abe ‘ngosilapheleko’.” 
Mark7:24 UJesu wasuka lapho waya endaweni yeTirosi. Wangena ngekumbeni angafuni bona kube khona owaziko ukuthi ulapho, kodwana azange akghone ukubhaca." 
Mark7:25 Emanyeni kwathi bona unina lomntazana obegade angenwe mimoya emimbi ezwe ngoJesu, waphoseka eenyaweni zakhe." 
Mark7:26 Umfazi lo begade amuGirigi owabelethelwa eSiriya-Funisiya. Warabhela uJesu bona aqotjhe idimoni endodakazinakhe. 
Mark7:27 Kodwana uJesu wathi kuye: “Akugome abantwana qangi banele ngombana akusikuhle ukuthatha isikwa sabantwana usiphosele izinja.” 
Mark7:28 Yena wamphendula wathi: “Iye Kosi, nokho izinja nazo ngaphasi kwetafulapho zidla iintshutshuru eziwe nakugoma abantwana.”" 
Mark7:29 UJesu wathi kuye: “Ngebanga lependulwakho leyo, khamba uye ekhaya; idimoni liphumile endodakazinakho.”" 
Mark7:30 Waya ekhaya, wafumana umntwanakhe alele embhedeni, idimoni sele liphumile kuye." 
Mark7:31 Yeke uJesu wasuka endaweni yeTirosi, wadlula eTsidoni, wehlela elwandle leGalile waya esifundeni seDekapolisi." 
Mark7:32 Lapho abantu baletha kuye isithulu esingakghoni ukukhuluma kuhle, bamrabhela bona asibeke izandla." 
Mark7:33 Emva kobana asidosele eqadi, kude nesiqubuthu, uJesu wahloma iminwakhe ngeendlebeni zaso. Wakhafula wakghwatha ilimu laso." 
Mark7:34 Waqala ezulwini, wadosa ummoya khulu wathi kiso: “Efatha,” okutjho bona “Vuleka.”" 
Mark7:35 Khonapho iindlebe zaso zavuleka, ilimu laso lararuluka besathoma ukukhuluma kuhle." 
Mark7:36 UJesu wabayala bona bangatjeli noyedwa. Kodwana kwathi nakalokho abatjela njalo, bona baphikelela ukukhuluma ngakho." 
Mark7:37 Abantu barareka khulu, bathi: “Koke ukwenze kuhle. Wenza ngitjho nabangezwako bona bezwe, nabangakhulumiko bakhulume.”" 
Mark8:1 Emihleni leyo, kwabuthana esinye isiqubuthu godu. Njengombana besinganalitho lokugoma, uJesu wabizela abafundi bakhe kuye wathi:" 
Mark8:2 “Abantwaba ngiyabarhawukela, sele kumalanga amathathu basoloko banami begodu bangagomi litho." 
Mark8:3 Nangingabathumela emakhaya ngendlala, bangatsirimezeka endleleni. Abanye babo babuya kude.”" 
Mark8:4 Abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: “Kodwana kukuphi lapha umuntu angafumana khona isikwa esaneleko sokubondla njengombana sikude nemizi nje na?” 
Mark8:5 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Ninezikwa ezingaki na?” Bathi: “Ezilikhomba.” 
Mark8:6 Wayala isiqubuthu bona sihlale phasi. Kwathi bona athathe izikwa ezilikhomba bewathokoza, wazihlephula, wanikela abafundi bakhe kobana baphe abantu; yeke benza njalo." 
Mark8:7 Abafundi gade baneenhlambi ezincani ezimbalwa. Kuthe bona uJesu athokoze, wabayala bona babele abantu." 
Mark8:8 Abantu bagoma bebasutha. Ngemva kwalapho abafundi babuthelela bazalisa iinqwebu ezilikhomba ngeentshutshuru ezasalako. 
Mark8:9 Bekubabantu abangaba ziinkulungwana ezine. Ngemva kobana uJesu abatjhaphululile bona bakhambe," 
Mark8:10 yena wangena ngemkhunjini nabafundi bakhe, baya esifundeni seDalmanutha." 
Mark8:11 Kwafika abaFarisi bathoma ukuphikisana noJesu. Bamlinga ngokufuna kuye isibonakaliso esivela ezulwini. 
Mark8:12 Wadosa ummoya kabuhlungu wathi: “Kubayini isizukulwanesi sibawa isibonakaliso na? Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona akunasibonakaliso esizakunikelwa sona.” 
Mark8:13 Nje-ke wabatjhiya, wangena ngemkhunjini wayamela ngaphetjheya." 
Mark8:14 Abafundi bebakhohliwe ukuza nesikwa, bebaphethe sinye tere ngemkhunjini." 
Mark8:15 UJesu wabayala wathi: “Tjhejani, niyelele isibiliso sabaFarisi nesakaHerode.”" 
Mark8:16 Bakhulumisana babodwa bathi: “Kungebanga lokobana singanasikwa.” 
Mark8:17 UJesu walemuka ikulumiswano yabo wathi kibo: “Kubayini nikhuluma ngokungabi nesikwa na? Nisengakaboni begodu anikabukulemuka nanje na? Kghani nineenhliziyo eziqinileko na? 
Mark8:18 Ninamehlo angaboniko neendlebe ezingezwako na? Anikhumbuli na? 
Mark8:19 Lokha ngihlephulela iinkulungwana ezihlanu izikwa ezihlanu nazalisa iinqwebu ezingaki ngeentshutshuru ezasalako na?” Bathi kuye: “Ezilitjhumi nambili.” 
Mark8:20 Wathi: “Lokha nangihlephula izikwa ezilikhomba ngipha iinkulungwana ezine zabantu, nazalisa iinqwebu ezingaki ngeentshutshuru ezasalako na?” Bathi kuye: “Ezilikhomba.”" 
Mark8:21 Wababuza wathi: “Alo, soloko anilemuki na?”" 
Mark8:22 Bafika eBhethe-Sayida, abantu abathileko baletha kuye indoda esiphofu, bamrabhela bona ayikghwathe." 
Mark8:23 Wabamba indoda esiphofu ngesandla waphumela nayo ngaphandle komuzi. Kuthe bona ayikhafulele ngemehlweni, wayibeka izandla. Wayibuza wathi: “Kukhona okubonako na?”" 
Mark8:24 Yaphakamisa amehlo yathi: “Ngibona abantu, bafana nemithi, bayakhambakhamba.”" 
Mark8:25 Godu uJesu wabeka izandla zakhe phezu kwamehlwayo. Yeke amehlwayo avuleka, yakghona ukubona, yabona koke kuhle." 
Mark8:26 Wayithumela ekhaya, wathi kiyo: “Ungabuyeli ngemzini.”" 
Mark8:27 UJesu nabafundi bakhe baya emizini eseKhesariya-Filipi. Endleleni wabuza abafundi bakhe wathi: “Abantu bathi ngingubani na?” 
Mark8:28 Baphendula bathi: “Abanye bathi unguJwanisi uMbhabhadisi; abanye bathi ungu-Eliya, kanti abanye bathi ungomunye wabaphorofidi.”" 
Mark8:29 Wababuza wathi: “Nina-ke, nithi ngingubani na?” UPitrosi wamphendula wathi: “Wena unguKrestu.”" 
Mark8:30 UJesu wabayala bona bangatjeli namunye ngaye. 
Mark8:31 UJesu wathoma ukubafundisa bona iNdodana yoMuntu kumele itlhage khulu, ilahlwe baphathi, abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho, nokobana kumele ibulawe bekuthi ngemva kwamalanga amathathu ivuke." 
Mark8:32 Wakhuluma tjhatjhalazi ngalokhu uPitrosi bewambizela ngeqadi wamkhalimela. 
Mark8:33 Kodwana kwathi lokha uJesu naphendukela ebafundini bakhe, wakhalimela uPitrosi wathi: “Suka phambi kwami Sathana ndina! Awulemuki izinto zakaZimu, ulemuka zabantu kwaphela!”" 
Mark8:34 Wabizela kuye isiqubuthu kanye nabafundi bakhe, wathi kibo: “Nanyana ngubani ofuna ukungilandela, akazidele, atjathe isiphambano sakhe angilandele." 
Mark8:35 Ngambala, ofuna ukusindisa ipilwakhe, izamlahlekela; naloyo olahlekelwa yipilwakhe ngebanga lami nangebanga levangeli, uzayisindisa." 
Mark8:36 “Kuzamsiza ngani umuntu bona azuze iphaseli loke nje, kodwana alahlekelwe mphefumulwakhe na?" 
Mark8:37 Umuntu angawenana ngani umphefumulwakhe na? 
Mark8:38 Nakube umuntu uneenhloni ngami nangamezwami kilesi sizukulwana esihlobongako nesinezonokazesi, iNdodana yoMuntu nayo izakuba neenhloni ngaye nayifikako ephazimulweni kaYise kanye neengilozini ezicwengileko.”" 
Mark9:1 Wathi kibo: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bonyana abanye benu abajame lapha abazukufa bangakaboni umbuso kaZimu usiza ngamandla.” 
Mark9:2 Emva kwamalanga asithandathu, uJesu wathatha uPitrosi, uJakopo noJwanisi wabarholela entabeni ephakemeko lapha baba bodwa khona. Lapho-ke ubujamo bakhe batjhuguluka phambi kwabo." 
Mark9:3 Izambatho zakhe zaba mhlophe, iye, ubumhlophe obunjengeliqwa. Zaba mhlophe ukwedlula indlela nanyana ngubani ephasinapha angenza ngayo." 
Mark9:4 Khonapho kwabonakala u-Eliya noMosi bakhuluma noJesu. 
Mark9:5 UPitrosi wathi kuJesu: “Rabi, kuhle ukuba khona kwethu lapha. Bengithi thana sakha imitlhatlhana emithathu, omunye ube ngewakho, omunye ube ngewakaMosi, omunye ube ngewaka-Eliya.”" 
Mark9:6 Watjho njalo ngombana ubengazi bona angathini, begade banevalo." 
Mark9:7 Kwavela ilifu labagubuzesa, kwezwakala ilizwi emafini lisithi: “Le yiNdodanami engiyithandako. Ilaleleni!”" 
Mark9:8 Bathalaza, akhange babone namunye ngaphandle koJesu yedwa." 
Mark9:9 Kwathi nabehla entabeni, uJesu wabayala bona bangatjeli namunye ngalokho abakubonileko, kufikela mhlana iNdodana yoMuntu ivukako kabafileko." 
Mark9:10 Nje-ke akhange batjele muntu, babuzana bona bodwa bathi: “Kutjho ukuthini ukuvuka kwabafileko?”" 
Mark9:11 Bakanye bambuza bathi: “Kubayini abafundisi bomthetho bathi kufuze kuze u-Eliya qangi na?” 
Mark9:12 UJesu wathi kibo: “Iye kunjalo, u-Eliya uza qangi azokubuyisela koke esigeni. Alo-ke, kubayini kutlolwe bona iNdodana yoMuntu izakutlhaga khulu beyilahlwe na?" 
Mark9:13 Kodwana ngiyanitjela bona u-Eliya ufikile, benza kuye koke abafuna ukukwenza, njengombana kutloliwe ngaye.”" 
Mark9:14 Kwathi nabafika kabanye abafundi, babona isiqubuthu esikhulu sibabungelele nalabo ababafundisi bomthetho baphikisana nabo." 
Mark9:15 Emva kobana abantu babone uJesu, bathaba khulu bagijimela kuye bambingelela." 
Mark9:16 UJesu wabuza abafundi bakhe wathi: “Niphikisana ngani kangaka na?” 
Mark9:17 Kwaphendula indoda hlangana nesiqubuthu yathi: “Mfundisi, ngilethe indodanami engenwe mumoya oyivale bona ingakghoni ukukhuluma." 
Mark9:18 Njalo lokha nawuyibambako, uyidula phasi, ibhubhudlhe amagwebu ngomlomo, iququde amazinyo bese iyomelela. Ngikhombele abafundi bakho bona bawukhuphe ummoya lo, kodwana babhalelwa.”" 
Mark9:19 UJesu wathi kibo: “Maye nina sizukulwana esingakholwako! Ngizokuhlala nani bekube kunini na? Ngizoninyamazelela bekube kunini na? Lethani umsana loyo kimapha.” 
Mark9:20 Yeke bamletha. Kwathi lokha ummoya nawubona uJesu, khonapho wahlukumeza umsana loyo. Wawela phasi wazibhudabhuda, abhubhudlha amagwebu ngomlomo." 
Mark9:21 UJesu wabuza uyise lomsana wathi: “Sekusikhathi esingangani alokhu anje?” Waphendula wathi: “Kusukela ebuncanini bakhe. 
Mark9:22 Bewuphele umphosele emlilweni namkha ngemanzini kobana umbulale. Kodwana nakube kukhona ongakwenza, yewusirhawukele, usisize.”" 
Mark9:23 UJesu wathi kuye: “ ‘Nakube kukhona ongakwenza’? Koke kuyenzeka kiloyo okholwako.” 
Mark9:24 Khonokho uyise lomsana warhuwelela wathi: “Ngiyakholwa; yewungisize ekungakholweni kwami!” 
Mark9:25 Kuthe bona uJesu abone isiqubuthu sigijimela lapho, wakhalimela ummoya omumbi wathi kiwo: “Wena mmoya wobuthulu nobumumu, ngiyakuyala bona uphume kuye bewungasathoma ungene kuye godu!”" 
Mark9:26 Ummoya watlewula, wakhahlumeza umsana loyo khulu, waphuma. Ngemva kwalapho umsana waba ngathi sidumbu, abanengi bebathi: “Uhlongakele.”" 
Mark9:27 Kodwana uJesu wambamba ngesandla wamphakamisa, wavuka wajama ngeenyawo." 
Mark9:28 Kuthe bona uJesu angene ngekumbeni, abafundi bakhe bambizela ngasese bathi: “Kubayini singazange sikghone ukuqotjha ummoya omumbi na?”" 
Mark9:29 Wathi kibo: “Umhlobo lo uphuma kwaphela ngomthandazo.” 
Mark9:30 Basuka lapho badlula eGalile. UJesu azange athande kobana kube nomuntu owaziko bonyana baya kuphi 
Mark9:31 ngombana bekafundisa abafundi bakhe. Wathi kibo: “INdodana yoMuntu izokukhatjhelwa ezandleni zabantu. Bazoyibulala bese ngemva kwamalanga amathathu ivuke.” 
Mark9:32 Kodwana azange bazwisise bonyana bekatjho ukuthini begodu bebesaba ukumbuza ngalokho. 
Mark9:33 Bafika eKapernawumi, kwathi angekumbeni, wababuza wathi: “Beniphikisana ngani endleleni na?”" 
Mark9:34 Bathula bathi du ngombana endleleni bebaphikisana bona ngubani omkhulu. 
Mark9:35 Wahlala phasi wabiza abalitjhumi nambili, wathi kibo: “Nanyana ngubani ofuna ukuba ngewokuthoma, uzakuba ngewokugcina, abe sisebenzi sabo boke.”" 
Mark9:36 Wathatha umntwana wamjamisa hlangana nabo, wamgona wathi kibo:" 
Mark9:37 “Nanyana ngubani owamukela omunye wabantwana abancanaba ebizweni lami, wamukela mina, begodu nanyana ngubani owamukela mina akamukeli mina kodwana wamukela ongithumileko.”" 
Mark9:38 UJwanisi wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, sibone umuntu aqotjha amadimoni ebizweni lakho, yeke samkhandela ngombana ubengasi ngomunye wethu.”" 
Mark9:39 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Ningamkhandeli ngombana akakho noyedwa owenza isimangaliso ebizweni lami ozakghona ukukhuluma kumbi ngami msinyana ngemva kwalokho. 
Mark9:40 Ngambala, loyo ongakajamelani nathi ungowethu." 
Mark9:41 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona nanyana ngubani oninikela ikapho yamanzi ebizweni lami ngombana ningebakaKrestu, ngambala angeze alahlekelwa mvuzwakhe.”" 
Mark9:42 “Godu nanyana ngubani obangela bona omunye wabantwanaba enze isono, kuzakuba ngcono kuye bona abotjhelelwe imbokotho ekulu entanyeni bese uphoselwa ngelwandle." 
Mark9:43 Nakube isandla sakho sikwenza wenze isono, siquntule. Kungcono ukungena epilweni engapheliko unganasandla, kunobanyana uye esirhogweni nezandla zombili, emlilweni ongacimiko." 
Mark9:44 Lapho isibungu sakhona asifi nomlilo awucimi. 
Mark9:45 Nakube inyawo lakho likwenza wenze isono, liquntule. Kungcono ukungena epilweni urholophele, kunobanyana uphoswe ngesirhogweni neenyawo zombili." 
Mark9:46 Lapho isibungu asifi, umlilo awucimi." 
Mark9:47 Nakube ilihlo lakho likwenza wenze isono, likhuphe. Kungcono ukungena embusweni kaZimu unelihlo elilodwa, kunobanyana uphoswe ngesirhogweni unamehlo amabili." 
Mark9:48 Lapho isibungu sakhona asifi nomlilo awucimi. 
Mark9:49 “Omunye nomunye uzakubabulwa ngomlilo. 
Mark9:50 Itswayi lilungile, kodwana nasele liduma ungalivuselela njani na? Yibani netswayi ngaphakathi kwenu, nibe nokuthula komunye nomunye.”" 
Mark10:1 UJesu wasuka lapho waya esifundeni seJudiya nangaphetjheya kweJordani. Godu iinqubuthu zambungelela, wazifundisa njengemhleni." 
Mark10:2 AbaFarisi abathileko beza kuye, bamlinga bathi: “Kumthetho bona indoda itlhale umkayo na?”" 
Mark10:3 Yena wabaphendula wathi: “UMosi waniyala wathini na?” 
Mark10:4 Bamphendula bathi: “UMosi wayivumela indoda bona itlole incwadi yesahlukaniso, imthokoze-ke.”" 
Mark10:5 Godu uJesu wathi kibo: “UMosi wanitlolela umthetho lowo ngebanga leenhliziyokazi zenu ezilikhuni. 
Mark10:6 Kodwana ekuthomeni kwendalo uZimu wababumba, kwaba ngomduna nomsikazi." 
Mark10:7 Umtlolo uthi, ‘Indoda izakutjhiya uyise nonina inamathele emfazinayo" 
Mark10:8 bese baba nyamanye.’ Nje-ke abasesebabili, sele bamunye." 
Mark10:9 Yeke lokho okuhlanganiswe nguZimu akungabi nomuntu ozakwahlukanisa.” 
Mark10:10 Kwathi nasele bangekumbeni abafundi bambuza godu ngendaba le. 
Mark10:11 Wathi kibo: “Loyo otlhala umkakhe athathe omunye, uhlobongile kumkakhe." 
Mark10:12 Godu nakube umfazi utlhala indodakhe, athathwe ngenye, uhlobongile.”" 
Mark10:13 Abantu bebaletha abantwana kuJesu bona abasingathe, kodwana abafundi bakhe babakhalimela." 
Mark10:14 UJesu nakabona lokho, wasilingeka wathi kibo: “Vumelani abantwana beze kimi, ningabakhandeli ngombana umbuso kaZimu ungowabanjengalaba." 
Mark10:15 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona nanyana ngubani ongamukeli umbuso kaZimu njengomntwana, ngeze angena kiwo.”" 
Mark10:16 Nje-ke wathatha abantwana wabasingatha, wabeka izandla phezu kwabo wababusisa." 
Mark10:17 Kuthe uJesu asathoma ikhambo lakhe, indoda yamgijimela yafese yawa eenyaweni zakhe yambuza yathi: “Mfundisi olungileko, ngingenza njani bona ngizuze ipilo engapheliko na?”" 
Mark10:18 UJesu wathi: “Ungibizelani bona ngilungile na? Akakho noyedwa olungileko, ngaphandle koZimu yedwa tere." 
Mark10:19 Uyayazi imiyalo ethi, ‘Ungabulali, ungahlobongi, ungebi, ungafakazi amanga, ungagalaji, hlonipha uyihlo nonyoko.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Yathi kuye: “Mfundisi, ngikulonde koke lokho kwebutjheni bami.”" 
Mark10:21 UJesu wayiqala, wayithanda wathi kiyo: “Yinye kwaphela into otlhayela ngayo: Khamba, uthengise koke onakho unikele abadududu, uzakuba nomnotho ezulwini. Ngemva kwalapho-ke ungilandele.”" 
Mark10:22 Kwathi lokha nayizwa lokho, ubuso bayo bakhena. Yakhamba idanile ngombana beyinomnotho omnengi." 
Mark10:23 UJesu wathalaza wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Maye kubudisi kanganani kilabo abanomnotho kobana bangene embusweni kaZimu!” 
Mark10:24 Abafundi bakhe barareka ngamezwakhe la. UJesu wathi kibo godu: “Bantwana, kubudisi ukungena embusweni kaZimu!" 
Mark10:25 Kulula ukuziluma indololwani kunobana isigwili singene embusweni kaZimu.” 
Mark10:26 Abafundi barareka khulu, bathi omunye komunye: “Alo, nakunjalo ngubani ongasindiswa na?”" 
Mark10:27 UJesu wabaqala wathi: “Emuntwini lokhu kuyinto engekhe yenzeka, kodwana ingasi kuZimu. Koke kuyenzeka kuZimu.”" 
Mark10:28 UPitrosi wathi kuye: “Qala, sitjhiye koke kobana sikulandele.”" 
Mark10:29 UJesu wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona akakho noyedwa otjhiye umuzi, abafo, abodade, umma, ubaba, abantwana namasimu ngebanga lami nevangeli," 
Mark10:30 ongekhe amukela ikhulu elibuyelelwe ngekhulu esikhathinesi, imizi, abafo, abodade, abomma, abantwana namasimu kanye nokuzunywa nesikhathini esizako kanye nepilo engapheliko." 
Mark10:31 Kodwana abanengi abangebokuthoma bazokuba ngebokugcina, kuthi bokugcina babe ngebokuthoma.”" 
Mark10:32 Bebasendleleni basiya eJerusalema, uJesu akhamba phambili. Abafundi bakhe bebamangale, nalabo ebebabalandela bebesaba. Godu wadosela abalitjhumi nambili ngeqadi, wabatjela bona kuzokwenzekani kuye." 
Mark10:33 Wathi: “Qalani! Siyakhamba siya eJerusalema. INdodana yoMuntu izakukhatjhelwa ebaphristini abakhulu nebafundisini bomthetho. Bona bazoyigweba kobana ibulawe, bayinikele kabatjhili." 
Mark10:34 Bazoyiphoqa, bayikhafulele, bayibethe bebayibulale. Ngemva kwamalanga amathathu izakuvuka.”" 
Mark10:35 UJakopo noJwanisi, amadodana kaZebediya, beza kuJesu bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, sifuna bona usenzele nanyana yini esiyikhombelako.”" 
Mark10:36 Wathi kibo: “Nifuna bona nginenzeleni na?” 
Mark10:37 Bathi kuye: “Vuma bona embuswenakho omunye wethu ahlale ngesigomeni sakho omunye ngesinceleni sakho.” 
Mark10:38 UJesu wathi kibo: “Aniyazi into eniyikhombelako le. Ningayisela ikapho engiyiselako namkha nibhajadiswe ngombhabhadiso engibhajadiswe ngawo na?” 
Mark10:39 Bamphendula bathi: “Iye, singakghona.” UJesu wathi kibo: “Nizakusela ikapho le engiyiselako, nibhajadiswe ngombhabhadiso engibhajadiswe ngawo," 
Mark10:40 kodwana nakukuhlala ngesigomeni nangesinceleni sami akusingekwami. Iinkhundlezo zingezalabo ezilungiselwe bona.” 
Mark10:41 Kuthe bona abalitjhumi bezwe lokho, bararana noJakopo noJwanisi." 
Mark10:42 UJesu wababizela kuye wathi kibo: “Niyazi bona labo okuthiwa babusi babatjhili banamandla phezu kwabo, neenkhulu zabo eziphezulu zinegunya phezu kwabo." 
Mark10:43 Kodwana akusinjalo ngani. Esikhundleni salokho, nanyana ngubani ofuna ukuba mkhulu phakathi kwenu kumele abe sisebenzi," 
Mark10:44 naloyo ofuna ukuba ngewaqangi hlangana nani, kufanele abe likhoboka labo boke." 
Mark10:45 Ngitjho neNdodana yoMuntu ayikezeli ukuzokwenzelwa, kodwana ukuzokwenzela nokunikela ipilwayo kobana ibe sihlengo sabanengi.”" 
Mark10:46 Bafika eJerikho. UJesu nabafundi bakhe kanye nesiqubuthu esikhulu nabaphuma ngedorobheni, bekuhlezi isikhombeli esisiphofu eqadi kwendlela esinguBhartimewu, indodana kaThimewu." 
Mark10:47 Nasele sizwile bona nguJesu weNazaretha, sarhuwelela sathi: “Jesu, Ndodana kaDavida, yewungirhawukele!”" 
Mark10:48 Abanengi basikhalimela bathi asithule; kodwana sasolo sirhuwelela sithi: “Ndodana kaDavida, yewungirhawukele!”" 
Mark10:49 UJesu wajama wathi: “Yenisibize.” Basibiza-ke, bathi kiso: “Qina amandla, sikima, uyakubiza.”" 
Mark10:50 Salahla ingubaso, seqa seza kuJesu." 
Mark10:51 UJesu wasibuza wathi: “Ufuna bona ngikwenzeleni na?” Isiphofu sathi kuye: “Rabi, ngifuna ukubona.”" 
Mark10:52 UJesu wasiphendula wathi: “Khamba, ukukholwa kwakho kukusindisile.” Khonokho sabona, salandela uJesu endleleni." 
Mark11:1 Kwathi nabatjhidela eJerusalema, bafika eBhethifage neBhethaniya, entabeni ye-Oliva, uJesu wathumela babili babafundi bakhe phambi kwakhe," 
Mark11:2 wathi kibo: “Khambani niye emzini ophambi kwenu, nizakuthi naningenako, nifumane udumbanyana ongazange akhwelwe, abotjhwe lapho. Mtjhaphululeni nimlethe lapha." 
Mark11:3 Nakukhona onibuzako athi, ‘Nikwenzelani lokhu?’ nimtjele nithi, ‘IKosi iyamdinga, izambuyisa msinyana.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Bakhamba-ke, bamfumana udumbanyana ngaphandle endledlaneni abotjhiwe hlanu komnyango. Kwathi nabasamtjhaphululako," 
Mark11:5 abantu ebebajame lapho babuza bathi: “Nenzani, nitjhaphulula udumbana lo na?”" 
Mark11:6 Babaphendula ngendlela uJesu abayala ngakhona, abantwabo babalisa bakhamba." 
Mark11:7 Baletha udumbanyana kuJesu, babeka izambatho zabo phezu kwakhe, wakhwela." 
Mark11:8 Abantu abanengi baqhisa izambatho zabo endleleni, abanye baqhisa phambi kwakhe amahlahla abawephule emasimini." 
Mark11:9 Labo ebebakhamba phambili nalabo ebebamlandela barhuwelela bathi: “Hosana! Ubusisiwe loyo oza ngebizo lakaSomnini! 
Mark11:10 Ubusisiwe umbuso ozako kababethu uDavida! Hosana kweliphezulu!” 
Mark11:11 UJesu wangena eJerusalema, waya ngethempelini. Waqala koke ebekungapho kodwana njengombana besele kuhlwile, waphuma waya eBhethaniya nabalitjhumi nambili." 
Mark11:12 Ngelanga elilandelako, nabasuka eBhethaniya, uJesu bekaphethwe yindlala." 
Mark11:13 Kudanyana naye wabona umuthi wamakhiwani onamakari. Wayokuqala bona uthelile na. Nafika kiwo akhange afumane ilitho, ngaphandle kwamakari wodwa ngombana bekungasiso isikhathi samakhiwani." 
Mark11:14 Yeke wathi kiwo: “Akungasabi nomuntu ozakugoma iinthelo kuwe godu!” Abafundi bakhe bamizwa asitjho lokho. 
Mark11:15 Ekufikeni kwabo eJerusalema, uJesu wangena ngethempelini, wathoma waqotjha labo ebebathengisa nebebathenga lapho. Wagubuda iintafula zalabo ebebananiselana ngemali, neenhlalo zalabo ebebathengisa amazuba." 
Mark11:16 Azange avumele nanyana ngubani bona avundle nepahla ethengiswako ngesirhodlweni sethempeli. 
Mark11:17 Wabafundisa wathi kibo: “Angithi kutloliwe kwathiwa, ‘Indlwami izakubizwa bona yindlu yokuthandaza yezizwe zoke.’? Kodwana nina niyenze irharha labahlanguli.”" 
Mark11:18 Abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho bakuzwa lokho bafuna amaqhinga wokumbulala; bamesaba ngombana boke abantu barareka ngeemfundiso zakhe. 
Mark11:19 Kuthe nakurhwaqelako, baphuma ngedorobheni." 
Mark11:20 Ekuseni nabadlulako godu, babona umuthi wamakhiwani utjhwabe ukusukela emirajinawo." 
Mark11:21 UPitrosi wakhumbula wathi kuJesu: “Rabi, qala! Umuthi owunikeleleko loya utjhwabile.”" 
Mark11:22 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Kholwani kuZimu. 
Mark11:23 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona loyo othi entabeni le, ‘Khamba uyoziphosela ngelwandle’, angazazi ehliziywenakhe, kodwana akholwe bona lokho akutjhoko kuzakwenzeka, ngambala uzakwenzelwa khona." 
Mark11:24 Ngalokho ngiyanitjela bona nanyana yini eniyikhombela ngomthandazo, kholwani bona seniyifumene, ngambala izakuba ngeyenu." 
Mark11:25 Njalo lokha nanijamako nithandaza, libalelani nanyana ngubani eninamavundo naye ukuze noYihlo osezulwini anilibalele izono zenu." 
Mark11:26 Kodwana naningalibaleliko, noYihlo osezulwini angekhe anilibalele izono zenu.”" 
Mark11:27 Godu bafika eJerusalema, bekwathi uJesu asakhamba ngesirhodlweni sethempeli, abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho kanye nabaphathi beza kuye," 
Mark11:28 bambuza bathi: “Uzenza ngamandla kabani izintwezi na? Njekhona ngubani okunikele igunya lokwenza lokhu na?” 
Mark11:29 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngizanibuza umbuzo owodwa. Ngiphendulani, nami ngizanitjela bona ngizenza ngawaphi amandla izintwezi." 
Mark11:30 Umbhabhadiso kaJwanisi bewuvela ezulwini namkha ebantwini na? Ngiphendulani!” 
Mark11:31 Bakhulumisana bodwa bese bathi: “Nasingathi, ‘Ezulwini,’ uzakuthi, ‘Alo-ke yini beningamkholwa na?’" 
Mark11:32 Alo, kghani sithi, ‘Ebantwini’ ”? Gade besaba abantu ngombana boke bebasithi uJwanisi mphorofidi wamambala." 
Mark11:33 Yeke baphendula uJesu bathi: “Awa, asazi.” UJesu wathi kibo: “Arha-ke, nami angizonitjela-ke bona ngiwathathaphi amandla engenza ngawo izintwezi.”" 
Mark12:1 UJesu wathoma ukukhuluma nabo ngemifanekiso wathi: “Indoda yatjala isidiribe, yasibiyela ngomthangala. Yemba umgodi wobutlhodlhelo bewayini, yakha isithala sabalindi. Yaqatjhisela abalimi isidiribeso, yathatha ikhambo." 
Mark12:2 Ngesikhathi sokuvuna, yathumela ikhoboka ebaqatjhini bona liyokuthatha isabelo sayo." 
Mark12:3 Kodwana balibamba ikhobokelo, balidula, balibuyisela emuva limkhonoze." 
Mark12:4 Yeke yathumela elinye ikhoboka, balikhubaza ehloko, baliphatha ngehlazo." 
Mark12:5 Godu yathumela elinye, nalo balibulala. Yakanye yathumela amanye amanengi, amanye wawo bawadula, amanye bawabulala." 
Mark12:6 Besele isele ngoyedwa ebeyingamthumela. Loyo-ke bekuyindodanayo ethandekako. Ekugcineni yayithumela yathi: ‘Nakuyindodanami, bazayihlonipha.’" 
Mark12:7 Kodwana abaqatjhabo bakhulumisana bodwa bathi: ‘Le yindlalifa. Asiyibulaleni, khona ilifa lizakuba ngelethu.’" 
Mark12:8 Yeke bayibamba bayibulala bebayiphosela ngaphandle kwesidiribe.” 
Mark12:9 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Uzakwenza njani umninisidiribe na? Ngithi uzakuza afese abulale boke abaqatjhi labo, aqatjhisele abanye isidiribeso." 
Mark12:10 Akhange khenifunde umtlolo lo na? “ ‘Ilitje eladelwa babakhi libe ngeliqakathekileko ejikeni. 
Mark12:11 Lokho kuzizenzo zakaSomnini; kusimangaliso emehlwenethu.’ ” 
Mark12:12 Nje-ke bafuna indlela yokumbamba ngombana bebazi bonyana ukhulume umfanekiso lo ngabo. Kodwana bebesaba isiqubuthu, yeke bamsukela bakhamba." 
Mark12:13 Ngemva kwesikhatjhana bathumela abanye babaFarisi nabantu bakaHerode kuJesu kobana bambambe ngamezwakhe. 
Mark12:14 Bafika kuye bathi: “Mfundisi, siyazi bona uyindoda eqotho. Awuthatheki ngomuntu ngombana awukhethi ubuso, kodwana ufundisa indlela kaZimu ngeqiniso. Kulungile ukukhokha umthelo kumbusi omkhulu namkha njani na?”" 
Mark12:15 Kodwana uJesu wakulemuka ukuzenzisa kwabo, wabaphendula wathi: “Ningilingelani na? Lethanapha udenariyu loyo ngimbone.”" 
Mark12:16 Bamnikela isipaparwana, wathi kibo: “Mfanekiso kabani lo? Kutlolwe bani lapha?” Bamphendula bathi: “Ngewombusi omkhulu.”" 
Mark12:17 UJesu wathi kibo: “Arha-ke, nikelani umbusi omkhulu okungekwakhe, ninikele noZimu okungekwakaZimu.” Bamrarekela." 
Mark12:18 Yeke abaSadusi ebebathi akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko, beza kuJesu ngemibuzo" 
Mark12:19 bathi: “Mfundisi, uMosi wasitlolela bona lokha indoda nayihlongakalako itjhiye umkayo khisibe abanabantwana, umfowabo lendoda leyo kufanele athathe umhlolokazi loyo abelethele umnakwabo abantwana." 
Mark12:20 Bekukhona abafo abalikhomba. Izibulo lathatha umfazi, lahlongakala linganamntwana." 
Mark12:21 Umhlolokazi wathathwa ngewesibili. Naye godu wahlongakala anganamntwana. Newesithathu naye kwaba ngisweso. 
Mark12:22 Boke abalikhomba bahlongakala banganabantwana. Ekugcineni kwahlongakala umhlolokazi loyo. 
Mark12:23 Alo, ngelanga lokuvuka kwabafileko uzakuba mkabani njengombana bekamfazi wabo bolikhomba njalo na?”" 
Mark12:24 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Anitjhaphi na? Kuyabonakala bona aniyazi imitlolo namandla kaZimu! 
Mark12:25 Mhlana abafileko bavuka ekufeni, abazokuthatha namkha bende. Bazokufana neengilozi ezulwini." 
Mark12:26 Mayelana nokuvuka kwabafileko, akhange khenifunde encwadini kaMosi ngomlando womuthi ositjhutha kobana uZimu wathi kuye: ‘NginguZimu ka-Abrahamu, uZimu ka-Isaka noZimu kaJakopo.’" 
Mark12:27 Akasuye uZimu wabafileko, kodwana wabaphilako. Nitjhaphe kwamambala!”" 
Mark12:28 Omunye wabafundisi bomthetho wezwa ipikiswano le. Walemuka bona uJesu ubaphendule kuhle, wambuza wathi: “Ngimuphi umyalo ongomkhulu ukwedlula yoke na?”" 
Mark12:29 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Omkhulu uthi, ‘Yizwa wena Israyeli! USomnini nguZimethu, nguye yedwa uSomnini." 
Mark12:30 Kufanele uthande uSomnini uZimakho ngehliziywakho yoke, ngomphefumulwakho woke, ngomkhumbulwakho woke nangamandlakho woke.’" 
Mark12:31 Wesibili ngilo, ‘Thanda umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena.’ Awukho omunye umyalo omkhulu ukwedlula le.”" 
Mark12:32 Umfundisi womthetho wathi kuye: “Iye, mfundisi, uqinisile nawuthi uZimu munye, akakho omunye ngaphandle kwakhe." 
Mark12:33 Ukumthanda ngehliziyo yoke, ngomkhumbulo woke nangamandla woke nokuthanda umakhelwana njengombana sizithanda thina, kuqakatheke khulu ukwedlula yoke imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neminikelo.”" 
Mark12:34 Kwathi bona uJesu abone bonyana uphendule ngokuhlakanipha, wathi kuye: “Awusikude nombuso kaZimu.” Emva kwalokho akakho noyedwa owakhe wagabaza wambuza imibuzo." 
Mark12:35 Kwathi uJesu asafundisa ngesirhodlweni sethempeli, wabuza wathi: “Batjho njani abafundisi bomthetho bona uKrestu yiNdodana kaDavida na?" 
Mark12:36 UDavida ngokwakhe nakhuluma ngokurholwa nguMoya oCwengileko wathi, “ ‘USomnini wathi eKosinami: Hlala ngesidleni sami bekube kulokha nangenza izitha zakho zibe sinabelo seenyawo zakho.’ ”" 
Mark12:37 “UDavida ngokwakhe umbiza ngokuthi, ‘Kosi.’ Alo-ke uKrestu angaba njani yindodanakhe na?” Isiqubuthu samuzwisisa kuhle uJesu." 
Mark12:38 Ekufundiseni kwakhe wathi: “Lemukani abafundisi bomthetho, abathanda ukuzakalala ngeemphuraphura ezide, bathanda ukulotjhiswa eendaweni zokuthengisela." 
Mark12:39 Bathanda iinhlalo eziphambili ngemasinagogini, neendawo ezihlonitjhwako eminyanyeni." 
Mark12:40 Barhiribidela iinkumba zabahlolokazi, babukisa ngokwenza imithandazo emide. Abantu abanjalo bazokuhlunguphazwa kabuhlungu.”" 
Mark12:41 UJesu wahlala phasi malungana nesilulu somnikelo, wabukela isiqubuthu siphosela imalaso ngesilulwini sethempeli. Iinjinga ezinengi zaphosela imali enengi." 
Mark12:42 Khonapho kweza umhlolokazi ochakileko, waphosela iimpaparwana ezimbili ezincani zekoporo ebezilingana nendibilitjhi." 
Mark12:43 UJesu wabizela abafundi bakhe ndawonye, wathi kibo: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona umhlolokazi okhwahlileko lo uphosele enengi ngesilulwini kunabo boke." 
Mark12:44 Boke banikele ngokudzubhula emnothwenabo, kodwana yena ukghuthulele koke anakho okumele aphile ngakho.”" 
Mark13:1 Kuthe uJesu nasele aphuma ngethempelini, omunye wabafundi bakhe wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, akhese uthi uyaqala amatje la! Nakumumakhiwo wona, maye ubuhle obulapha!”" 
Mark13:2 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Uyayibona yoke imakhiwo emikhulu le na? Angekhe kwasala nelilodwa ilitje phezu kwelinye. Elinye nelinye lizakugirizelwa phasi.” 
Mark13:3 Kwathi uJesu asahlezi entabeni ye-Oliva aqalane nethempeli, uPitrosi, uJakopo, uJwanisi no-Andrisi bambuza babodwa bathi:" 
Mark13:4 “Sitjela bona lokhu kuzakwenzeka nini na? Sizakuba yini isibonakaliso sokobana isikhathi sesifikile sokwenzeka kwezintwezi na?” 
Mark13:5 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Yelelani bona kungabikhona namunye onikhohlisako. 
Mark13:6 Abanengi bazakuza ebizweni lami bathi, ‘Nginguye’ bese bakhohlisa abanengi." 
Mark13:7 Nanizwa ngezipi neendumela zezipi, ningesabi. Izinto ezinjalo kufanele bona zenzeke, kodwana isiphetho siseza." 
Mark13:8 Isizwe sizakuvukela isizwe nombuso uvukele umbuso. Kuzakuba nokusikinyeka kwephasi eendaweni ezahlukeneko kanye nendlala. Lokho kukuthoma kwemirhelo. 
Mark13:9 “Yeke ziyeleleni nina ngombana nizokudoselwa emabandla benimadlhwe ngemasinagogini. Nizakujama phambi kwababusi namakhosi ngesimanga sami ninikele ubufakazi ngami kibo. 
Mark13:10 Ivangeli lifanele litjhunyayelwe kizo zoke izizwe qangi. 
Mark13:11 Lokha nabanibambako banisa ebandla, ningathomi nikhathazeke bona nizakuthini. Khulumani lokho eninikelwe khona ngesikhatheso ngombana akusini enikhulumako, kukhuluma uMoya oCwengileko." 
Mark13:12 Umfo uzakukhaphela umfo ekufeni nobaba akhaphele umntwanakhe. Abantwana bazakuvukela ababelethi babo bebabakhaphele ekufeni. 
Mark13:13 Boke abantu bazanihloya ngebanga lami kodwana loyo obambelela bekube sekupheleni uzakusindiswa.” 
Mark13:14 “Lokha nanibona isinyenyiso esibhubhisako esijanyiswe endaweni engasi ngeyaso, umfundi akazwisise; kuthi labo abaseJudiya babalekele eentabeni." 
Mark13:15 Loyo ophezu kwephahla lekumbakhe akangehli namkha angene ngekumbeni ayokuthatha okuthileko. 
Mark13:16 Osemasimini akangabuyeli emuva ayokuthatha isambatho sakhe. 
Mark13:17 Maye kuzokuba buhlungu kangangani mhlokho ebafazini abazithweleko kanye nabamunyisako! 
Mark13:18 Thandazani bona lokhu kungenzeki ebusika 
Mark13:19 ngombana leyo kuzokuba mimihla yesizi engafani neyaphambilini lokha uZimu nakadala iphasi, bekube kunamhlanje, begodu nengasoze yabuye yafana nayo." 
Mark13:20 Ngathana uSomnini akhange anciphise amalanga lawo, bekungekhe kwaphunyurha muntu. Kodwana ngebanga labakhethiweko, iye labo uSomnini abakhethileko, uwanciphisile amalanga lawo." 
Mark13:21 “Ngesikhatheso nanyana ngubani othi kini, ‘Qalani nanguKrestu!’ namkha, ‘Qalani nanguya lapha akhona!’, ningakukholwa lokho." 
Mark13:22 Kuzokuvela abosingaKrestu nabaphorofidi bamanga, benze iimbonakaliso neemangaliso kobana bakhohlise abakhethiweko nakube bayakghona." 
Mark13:23 Yeke tjhejani, sele nginitjele koke ngaphambi kwesikhathi.”" 
Mark13:24 “Kodwana emihleni leyo ngemva kwesizi lelo, “ilanga lizakufiphala nenyezi ingakhanyisi." 
Mark13:25 Iinkwekwezi zizokukhithika emkayini, amandla asezulwini asikinywe." 
Mark13:26 “Ngesikhatheso abantu bazakubona iNdodana yoMuntu isiza emafini ngamandla amakhulu nangephazimulo. 
Mark13:27 Izokuthumela iingilozi zayo beyibuthele ndawonye abakhethiweko bayo emajikeni womane wephasi, epelazwe nemaphelelweni womkayi.”" 
Mark13:28 “Yeke fundani isifundwesi ngomuthi wamakhiwani: Msinyana ngemva kobana amahlumelawo aba buthakathakana bese kutlhurhe amakari, seniyazi bonyana ihlobo litjhidele." 
Mark13:29 Kunjalo-ke, nanibona izintwezi zisenzeka, nizokwazi bona isikhathi sesitjhidele, sele sisemnyango." 
Mark13:30 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona isizukulwanesi ngambala asisoze sadlula kungakenzeki zoke izintwezi. 
Mark13:31 Izulu nephasi kuzokudlula, kodwana amezwami angekhe adlula." 
Mark13:32 “Akakho owaziko ngelangelo namkha nge-awarelo, ngitjho neengilozi ezulwini neNdodana ngokwayo, kodwana nguBaba kwaphela owaziko." 
Mark13:33 Qaphelani! Yelelani! Anazi bona isikhatheso sizokufika nini. 
Mark13:34 Kuzokuba njengendoda enekhambo: Itjhiya umzayo ezandleni zeensebenzi zayo, esinye nesinye isisebenzi sinomsebenzaso bese itjela leso esisesangweni bona sibeke ilihlo." 
Mark13:35 Ngalokho-ke hlalani niqaphile ngombana anazi bona umninimuzi uzokufika nini, kungaba sentambama, phakathi kobusuku, ngamasa namkha ekuseni." 
Mark13:36 Nakeza ningakatjheji, anganifumani nilele." 
Mark13:37 Lokho engikutjho kini, ngikutjho kibo boke: Qaphelani!”" 
Mark14:1 Nje-ke besele kumalanga amabili kwaphela bona kube liPhasika kanye nomnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo. Abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho bebathiya amaqhinga wokubamba uJesu ngesidu, bambulale." 
Mark14:2 Bakhuluma bodwa bathi: “Akungabi ngesikhathi somnyanya ngombana abantu bangaguruzela.” 
Mark14:3 Kwathi uJesu aseBhethaniya azigedle ngekumbeni yendoda ebekuthiwa nguSimoni onekhwekhwe, kweza umfazi aphethe isikurwana se-alabhastara sinamakha wentengo ephezulu, enziwe ngenarada yamambala. Wephula isikurwaneso, wathela amakha phezu kwehlokwakhe." 
Mark14:4 Abanye egade bakhona basilingeka bathi: “Kudlalelwani ngamakha kangaka na? 
Mark14:5 Amakha la, bekangathengiswa ngemali engaphezu komrholo womnyaka bese imali leyo inikelwa abadududu.” Yeke bamkhalimela ngokumkhahlameza." 
Mark14:6 UJesu wathi: “Mliseni, nimtshwenyelani na? Ungenzele into ehle." 
Mark14:7 Abadududu nizokuhlala ninabo njalo phakathi kwenu, yeke ningabasiza ngesinye nesinye isikhathi enifuna ngaso. Kodwana mina angeze naba nami njalo." 
Mark14:8 Wenze akghona ukukwenza: Uzese umzimbami ngamakha ngaphambi kwesikhathi, walungiselela ukubulungwa kwami." 
Mark14:9 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona kuphi nakuphi lapha kutjhunyayelwa khona ivangeli ephasini loke, lokho akwenzileko kuzakhulunywa ngakho kube sikhumbuzo ngaye.”" 
Mark14:10 UJudasi Iskariyodi ongomunye wabalitjhumi nambili, watjhinga kubaphristi abakhulu kobana akhaphele uJesu kibo." 
Mark14:11 Bakuthabela khulu ukuzwa lokho, bebamethembisa ukumnikela imali. Yeke walindela ithuba lokumkhaphela." 
Mark14:12 Ngelanga lokuthoma lomnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo, nabegade kumkhuba wokuhlaba imvana yePhasika, abafundi bakaJesu bambuza bathi: “Ufuna siyokulungiselela kuphi lapha uzakugomela khona iPhasika na?”" 
Mark14:13 Yeke wathumela ababili ebafundini bakhe, wathi kibo: “Khambani niye ngedorobheni, nizakuhlangatjezwa mumuntu otjethe umjeka wamanzi ehlombe. Mlandeleni." 
Mark14:14 Lapha angena khona, nithi kumninimuzi, ‘Umfundisi uyabuza bona liphi ilawu labayeni, lapha yena nabafundi bakhe bazakugomela khona iPhasika na?’" 
Mark14:15 Uzanitjengisa ilawu elikhulu elingaphezulu, elilungeselelwe ngakho koke. Yenisilungiselele lapho-ke.”" 
Mark14:16 Abafundi bakhamba-ke, baya ngedorobheni, bafumana kunjengombana uJesu bekabatjelile. Yeke balungiselela iPhasika." 
Mark14:17 Kuthe bona kuhlwe, uJesu wafika nabafundi bakhe." 
Mark14:18 Kwathi basazigedle etafuleni bagoma, uJesu wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona omunye kinapha uzongikhaphela; iye, loyo onghwatha nami.”" 
Mark14:19 Bathoma ukutlhuwa, bambuza ngokulandelana bathi: “Kungaba ngimi loyo na?”" 
Mark14:20 Wathi kibo: “Ngomunye wabalitjhumi nambili, ngiloyo otjheba isikwa ngesitjeni sinye nami." 
Mark14:21 INdodana yoMuntu izakukhamba njengombana kutloliwe ngayo. Kodwana maye emuntwini okhaphela iNdodana yoMuntu! Bekuzakuba ngcono kuye thana ubengakabelethwa!” 
Mark14:22 Kuthe basagoma, uJesu wathatha isikwa, wathokoza, wasihlephula wapha abafundi bakhe, wathi: “Thathani, lokhu mzimbami.”" 
Mark14:23 Yeke wathatha ikapho, wathokoza kuZimu, wabanikela, boke basela." 
Mark14:24 Wathi kibo: “Lokhu ziingazi zami zesivumelwano eziphalakele abanengi. 
Mark14:25 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona angekhe bengisasela godu isithelo sesidiribe bekube kumhlana ngisisela sisitjha embusweni kaZimu.” 
Mark14:26 Kwathi sele bavume ingoma yokuthokoza, baphuma baya entabeni ye-Oliva." 
Mark14:27 UJesu wathi kibo: “Nizokukhubeka noke ngombana kutloliwe bona: “ ‘Ngizakumadlha umelusi, izimvu ziphadlhalale.’" 
Mark14:28 Kodwana emva kobana ngivukile, ngizanandulela ngiye eGalile.”" 
Mark14:29 UPitrosi wathi kuye: “Nanyana boke bangakhubeka, kodwana mina angekhe.”" 
Mark14:30 UJesu wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngiyakutjela bona ngobusukobu, ngaphambi kobana umkukurumbu ulile kabili, uzabe ungiphike kathathu.”" 
Mark14:31 Kodwana uPitrosi waphikelela wathi: “Ngitjho nanyana sele kungibiza bona ngife nawe, angekhe ngakuphika.” Boke batjho njalo." 
Mark14:32 Baya endaweni ebizwa bona yiGetsemani, uJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Hlalani lapha ngisayokuthandaza.”" 
Mark14:33 Wathatha uPitrosi, uJakopo kanye noJwanisi wakhamba nabo. Wathoma ukukhathazeka khulu, waba lisizi." 
Mark14:34 Wathi kibo: “Ummoyami ulisizi khulu bekube sekufeni. Salani lapha nihlale niqaphile.” 
Mark14:35 Wadlulela phambidlana wawela phasi, wathandaza bonyana nakukghonekako i-awara leli limdlule." 
Mark14:36 Wathi: “Aba! Baba! Zoke izinto ziyenzeka kuwe. Susa ikapho le kimapha, nokho akungabi ngokwentandwami kodwana kube ngeyakho.”" 
Mark14:37 Yeke wabuyela ebafundini bakhe, wabafumana balele. Wathi kuPitrosi: “Simoni, ulele na? Ubhalelwe kulinda i-awara linye nje na?" 
Mark14:38 Lindani, nithandaze ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni. Ummoya uyavuma, kodwana inyama ibuthakathaka.”" 
Mark14:39 Wakhamba godu wayokuthandaza, watjho godu amezwi lawo." 
Mark14:40 Wathi nabuyako godu wabafumana balele ngombana amehlwabo gade azele ubuthongo. Azange bazi bona bangathini kuye. 
Mark14:41 Wabuya kwesithathu wathi kibo: “Nisalele, nisaphumule na? Kuhlezi kwanjesi! Isikhathi sesifikile. Qalani, iNdodana yoMuntu ikhatjhelwe ezandleni zezoni." 
Mark14:42 Vukani! Nambani sikhambeni! Nangu umkhaphelami asiza!” 
Mark14:43 Kwathi asakhuluma njalo, veliyani uJudasi ongomunye wabafundi bakhe abalitjhumi nambili. Begade akhamba nesiqubuthu esihlome ngeensabula nangeembhuku sithunywe baphristi abakhulu, abafundisi bomthetho kanye nabaphathi." 
Mark14:44 Yeke umkhapheli bekabanikela isiboniso wathi: “Loyo engizamcwanga nguye, mbambeni, nikhambe naye nimqaphile.”" 
Mark14:45 Khonapho uJudasi waya kuJesu wathi: “Rabi!” wamcwanga. 
Mark14:46 Amadoda lawo ambamba uJesu, ambopha." 
Mark14:47 Omunye walabo ebebajame lapho warhwatjha isabulakhe, wamadlha inceku yomphristi omkhulu, wasusa indlebayo." 
Mark14:48 UJesu wathi kibo: “Alo-ke bekufanele bona nize neensabula neembhuku ukuzongibamba sengathi ngimhlanguli na? 
Mark14:49 Imihla yoke benginani, ngifundisa ngeenrhodlweni zethempeli, akhange ningibambe. Kodwana kufanele bona imitlolo izaliseke.”" 
Mark14:50 Khonapho boke bamtjhiya babaleka. 
Mark14:51 Kwaba nesokana elalingakembathi ilitho kwaphela lizisonge ngelineni, elalandela uJesu. Kwathi lokha nabambambako," 
Mark14:52 isokanelo labaleka labe latjhiya nelinenanyana leyo lapho. 
Mark14:53 Basa uJesu kumphristi omkhulu. Boke abaphristi abakhulu, abaphathi, nabafundisi bomthetho bahlangana." 
Mark14:54 UPitrosi wamlandela kudanyana, wabe wayokungena ngesirhodlweni somphristi omkhulu. Wahlala lapho nabaqaphi, azothisa emlilweni." 
Mark14:55 Abaphristi abakhulu kanye nebandla loke bafuna ubufakazi ngoJesu ukuze bambulale, kodwana babutlhoga." 
Mark14:56 Abofakazi abanengi bafakaza amanga ngoJesu, kodwana ubufakazi babo akhange buthomane." 
Mark14:57 Yeke amadoda athileko asikima, ethula ubufakazi bamala ngoJesu athi:" 
Mark14:58 “Simzwile nakasithi: ‘Ngizakugiriza ithempeli elakhiwe ngezandla kuthi ngamalanga amathathu ngakhe elinye elingakakhiwa ngezandla!’ ” 
Mark14:59 Khonapho ubufakazi babo akhange buthomane. 
Mark14:60 Umphristi omkhulu wasikima hlangana nabo, wabuza uJesu wathi: “Awuzukuphendula na? Yini into abantwaba abayifakaza ngawe le na?”" 
Mark14:61 Kodwana uJesu wazithulela, akhange aphendule. Umphristi omkhulu wambuza godu wathi: “UnguKrestu, iNdodana yoBusisiweko na?”" 
Mark14:62 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Iye nginguye; “begodu nizakubona iNdodana yoMuntu ihlezi ngesigomeni sakaSomandla, isiza ngamafu wezulwini.”" 
Mark14:63 Umphristi omkhulu watlebhula izambatho zakhe, wathi: “Sisabafunelani abofakazi abanye na?" 
Mark14:64 Nizizwele ukunyefula kwakhe. Alo, nithini na?” Boke bamlahla ngomlandu wokubulawa." 
Mark14:65 Yeke abanye bathoma ukumkhafulela, bamvala amehlo, bamphosa amaguduva, bathi kuye: “Phorofida!” Boke abaqaphi bamthatha, bamdula." 
Mark14:66 Kwathi uPitrosi asese senzasi ngesirhodlweni, kweza omunye wabantazana abaziinsebenzi zomphristi omkhulu." 
Mark14:67 Kuthe lokha nabona uPitrosi azothisa, wamqalela eduze wathi: “Nawe gade unoJesu umNazaretha loya.”" 
Mark14:68 Kodwana wakuphika lokho, wathi: “Angazi begodu angilemuki bona ukhuluma ngani.” Watjho njalo wabe waphuma ngesango." 
Mark14:69 Kwathi lokha umntazana osisebenzi nambonako, wathi ebantwini ebebajame lapho: “Ngambala umrhali lo ungomunye wabo.”" 
Mark14:70 Godu uPitrosi waphika. Ngemva kwesikhatjhana abantu ebebajame lapho, bathi kuPitrosi: “Kwamambala ungomunye wabo ngombana ungumGalile.”" 
Mark14:71 Wathoma ukuthukana, wafunga wathi: “Ngithi angiyazi indoda enikhuluma ngayo le!”" 
Mark14:72 Khonokho umkukurumbu walila kwesibili. UPitrosi wakhumbula ilizwi uJesu ebegade alikhulume kuye lokuthi: “Ngaphambi kobana umkukurumbu ulile kabili, uzabe sewungiphike kathathu bona awungazi.” Waphahluka, walila." 
Mark15:1 Kwathi ngamasa ekuseni, abaphristi abakhulu, abaphathi, abafundisi bomthetho kanye nebandla loke, bathatha isiqunto. Babopha uJesu, bakhamba naye bebamusa kuPilatu." 
Mark15:2 UPilatu wambuza wathi: “Uyikosi yamaJuda na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Sewutjhwile.” 
Mark15:3 Abaphristi abakhulu bamthwesa umlandu ngezinto ezinengi. 
Mark15:4 UPilatu wambuza godu wathi: “Awuphenduli na? Qala bona bakuthwese umlandu ngezinto ezinengi kangangani!” 
Mark15:5 Kodwana uJesu nanyana kunjalo akhange amphendule. UPilatu warareka. 
Mark15:6 Besele kumkhuba bonyana emnyanyeni, uPilatu utjhaphulula isibotjhwa esikhonjelwa babantu." 
Mark15:7 Ngesikhatheso umuntu obekuthiwa nguBharabhasi gade angesikhungweni. Bekangesinye seenlelesi ezavukela umbuso, yena wabe wabulala umuntu emgurugurwini lowo." 
Mark15:8 Isiqubuthu senyuka sazokukhombela uPilatu bona enze njengombana aqhele ukwenza. 
Mark15:9 Wasibuza wathi: “Nifuna bona nginitjhaphululele ikosi yamaJuda na?” 
Mark15:10 Wabona bona abaphristi abakhulu banikele ngoJesu ngebanga lomona. 
Mark15:11 Kodwana abaphristi abakhulu batjitjizela isiqubuthu bona sikhombele uPilatu abatjhaphululele uBharabhasi. 
Mark15:12 UPilatu wabuza isiqubuthu godu wathi: “Alo-ke, nithi ngenzeni ngalo enimbiza ngekosi yamaJuda na?”" 
Mark15:13 Sarhuwelela sathi: “Mbethele esiphambanweni!” 
Mark15:14 UPilatu wasibuza wathi: “Kubayini? Kunobulelesi abenzileko na?” Sarhuwelela khulu sathi: “Mbethele esiphambanweni!” 
Mark15:15 Njengombana uPilatu bekathanda ukukara abantu, wamtjhaphulula-ke uBharabhasi. UPilatu wayala bona uJesu abethwe bewamnikela bona abethelwe esiphambanweni." 
Mark15:16 Amajoni angenisa uJesu ngesigodlweni sombusi, abiza amanye amajoni amanengi." 
Mark15:17 Amembesa ingubo ebubende, eluka isihlohlo sameva amthwesa sona." 
Mark15:18 Athoma amkhulekela athi: “Bayede ngwenyama, kosi yamaJuda!”" 
Mark15:19 Abuyelela kanenginengi ambetha ehloko ngomhlanga, amkhafulela. Aguqa ngamadolo enza sengathi ayamhlonipha." 
Mark15:20 Nasele aqedile ukubukisa ngaye, amhlubulisa ingubo ebubende, amembathisa izambatho zakhe. Akhamba naye ayombethela esiphambanweni." 
Mark15:21 Endleleni akatelela umdluli ngendlela obegade avela emaphandleni bona atjathe isiphambano sakaJesu. Yena bekunguSimoni weSirene onguyise ka-Alekzandra noRufosi. 
Mark15:22 Aletha uJesu endaweni ebekuthiwa yiGolgotha, okutjho iKhakhayi." 
Mark15:23 Endaweni leyo alinga ukumseza iwayini elivanganiswe nemire, kodwana wabhala ukulisela." 
Mark15:24 Ambethela esiphambanweni. Ahlukaniselana izambatho zakhe, aphosa nefumbe ukuze azi bona elinye nelinye lithatheni." 
Mark15:25 Bekuyisimbi yethoba ekuseni nakambethelako esiphambanweni. 
Mark15:26 Isaziso esitloliweko somlandu abekwa wona besifundeka bunje: IKOSI YAMAJUDA. 
Mark15:27 Abethela kanye naye iinlelesi ezimbili, esinye ngesigomeni, esinye ngesinceleni." 
Mark15:28 Ngaleyondlela kwazaliseka umtlolo othi: “Wabalwa kanye neenlelesi.” 
Mark15:29 Labo abadlulako bathintitha iinhloko bamhlambalaza bathi: “Arha! Wena owathi uzakugiriza ithempeli ulakhe ngobutjha ngamalanga amathathu," 
Mark15:30 zisindise-ke, wehle esiphambanwenapho!”" 
Mark15:31 Ngokunjalo nabaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho bamphoqa babodwa bathi: “Wasindisa abanye kodwana yena akakwazi ukuzisindisa! 
Mark15:32 UKrestu lo, oyiKosi yama-Israyeli akehle esiphambanweni ukuze sibone bese siyakholwa.” Nalabo ababethelwe naye nabo bamhlambalaza." 
Mark15:33 Kwathi ngesimbi yetjhumi nambili emini, ubumnyama bembatha iphasi loke bekwaba yisimbi yesithathu ngemva kwedina." 
Mark15:34 Ngesimbi yesithathu ntambama, uJesu warhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu wathi: “Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabarhithani?” Nakutjhugululwako kutjho bona “Zimami, Zimami, ungitjhiyeleni na?”" 
Mark15:35 Kwathi abanye ebebajame lapho nabezwa lokho bathi: “Lalelani, ubiza u-Eliya!”" 
Mark15:36 Omunye wabo wagijima wazalisa isimunyo ngewayini elimunyu wasihloma elithini, wasinikela uJesu bona asele, bewathi: “Kwanjesi akhese nimliseni. Akhesibone bona u-Eliya loyo uzakuza azomehlisa esiphambanwenapha na?”" 
Mark15:37 UJesu warhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu, waphefumula kokugcina." 
Mark15:38 Irharideni lethempeli latlebhuka phakathi ukusuka phezulu ukuya phasi. 
Mark15:39 Kwathi lokha umphathimabutho obekajame lapho phambi kwakaJesu nezwa ukurhuwelela kwakhe nangendlela ahlongakele ngayo, wathi: “Ngambala indoda le beyiyiNdodana kaZimu!”" 
Mark15:40 Bekunabesifazana abathileko ebebabukela bajame kudanyana. Hlangana nabo bekunoMariya Magdalina, uMariya unina kaJakopo omncani noJosisi kanye noSalome." 
Mark15:41 EGalile, besifazanaba bamlandela bebatjheja iindingo zakhe. Abanye besifazana abanengi ebebakhuphuke naye eJerusalema nabo bebakhona." 
Mark15:42 Bekulilanga lamalungiselelo, okutjho ilanga ngaphambi kweSabatha. Kuthe bona kuhlwe," 
Mark15:43 uJosefa we-Arimathiya, olilunga elidumileko lomKhandlu nobegade alinde umbuso kaZimu, wanqopha kuPilatu ngesibindi wayokukhombela umzimba kaJesu." 
Mark15:44 UPilatu wamangala ukuzwa bona uJesu sele ahlongakele. Wabiza umphathimabutho wambuza bona uJesu sele ahlongakele na? 
Mark15:45 Kwathi bona afumane kumphathimabutho bonyana kunjalo, wavumela uJosefa bona athathe umzimba lowo." 
Mark15:46 Yeke uJosefa wathenga itjhila lelineni, wethula umzimba kaJesu, wawuphuthela ngelineni lelo, wawubulunga ngethuneni ebelikghedlhwe edwaleni. Wageda ilitje elikhulu wavala ithuna." 
Mark15:47 UMariya Magdalina noMariya unina kaJosisi, babona lapha abekwe khona." 
Mark16:1 Kuthe bona iSabatha lidlule, uMariya Magdalina, uMariya unina kaJakopo kanye noSalome, bathenga iinthako ukuze bayokuzesa umzimba kaJesu." 
Mark16:2 Ekuseni ngelanga lokuthoma leveke, ngemva kobana kuphume ilanga bangena indlela eya ethuneni." 
Mark16:3 Babuzana bathi: “Ngubani ozasigedela ilitje ebungenweni bethuna na?” 
Mark16:4 Kodwana bathi nabaqalako babona ilitje ebegade lilikhulu ligediwe. 
Mark16:5 Kuthe nabangena ngethuneni babona isokana lihlezi ngesigomeni lembethe izambatho ezimhlophe, bethuka." 
Mark16:6 Lathi kibo: “Ningethuki. Nifuna uJesu weNazaretha obekabethelwe esiphambanweni na? Awa, uvukile, akakho lapha! Qalani indawo lapha bekabekwe khona." 
Mark16:7 Nje-ke khambani niyokutjela abafundi bakhe noPitrosi nithi, ‘Ungaphambi kwenu endleleni eya eGalile. Nizambona lapho njengombana bekanitjelile.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Baphuma ngethuneni bathathela ngebelo ngombana bebaqhaqhazela begodu bararekile. Azange batjho ilitho ebantwini ngombana bebathukile. 
Mark16:9 UJesu navuka ekuseni elangeni lokuthoma leveke, waziveza qangi kuMariya Magdalina aqotjha kuye amadimoni alikhomba." 
Mark16:10 Wakhamba wayokubikela labo ebegade banaye nebegade bahloboka, balila." 
Mark16:11 Kuthe bona bezwe ukuthi uJesu uyaphila, nokobana umbonile, akhange bamkholwe." 
Mark16:12 Emva kwalokho, uJesu waziveza ngobunye ubujamo ebafundini bakhe ababili lokha nagade basendleleni eya emaphandleni." 
Mark16:13 Bona-ke babuyela emuva bayokubikela abanye, kodwana nabo akhange babakholwe." 
Mark16:14 Ngemva kwesikhathi uJesu waziveza kabalitjhumi nanye basagoma. Wabasola ngokutlhoga kwabo ukukholwa kanye nangekanabo yokwala ukukholwa labo abambonileko ngemva kokuvuka kwakhe. 
Mark16:15 Wathi kibo: “Khambani iphasi loke, nitjhumayele ivangeli kikho koke okudaliweko." 
Mark16:16 Loyo okholwako abhajadiswe, uzakusindiswa kodwana loyo ongakholwako, uzakulahlwa." 
Mark16:17 Iimbonakaliswezi zizakulandela labo abakholwako: Ebizweni lami bazakuqotjha amadimoni, bazakukhuluma ngeenlimi ezitjha;" 
Mark16:18 bazakudobha iinyoka ngezandla zabo, nabasela okubulalako, abazokwenzeka ilitho; bazakubeka izandla phezu kwabagulako, baphole.”" 
Mark16:19 Emva kobana iKosi uJesu sele ikhulumile nabo, yanyuselwa ezulwini, yayokuhlala ngesigomeni sakaZimu." 
Mark16:20 Abafundi baphuma bayokutjhumayela yoke indawo. IKosi yasebenza nabo, yafakazela ilizwi layo ngeembonakaliso ezalilandelako." 
Luke1:1 Abanengi baba nokuzimisela kobana batlole umlando wezehlakalo ezizalisekileko phakathi kwethu," 
Luke1:2 njengombana sazinikelwa ngilabo okwathi kusukela ekuthomeni baba bofakazi kanye neenceku zelizwi. 
Luke1:3 Ngalokho-ke nami, ngemva kokuhlolisisa koke kusukela ekuthomeni, ngiqunte ukukutlolela umlando ohlelekileko wena Theyofilusi odumileko" 
Luke1:4 ukuze wazi iqiniso loke ngezinto oyalwe ngazo. 
Luke1:5 Emihleni kaHerode ikosi yeJudiya, bekukhona umphristi, ibizo lakhe linguZakariya, ogade alilunga lobuphristi baka-Abiya. Umkakhe bekungu-Elisabethi, naye asizukulwana saka-Aroni." 
Luke1:6 Bobabili bebalungile phambi koZimu, balandela yoke imiyalo neemiso zakaSomnini." 
Luke1:7 Kodwana bebanganabantwana ngombana u-Elisabethi gade ayinyumba begodu bobabili besele baluphele. 
Luke1:8 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga uZakariya asenza umsebenzakhe wobuphristi ngethempelini phambi kwakaZimu," 
Luke1:9 wakhethwa ngefumbe ukuya ngokomkhuba wobuphristi kobana angene ngethempelini ayokutjhisela uSomnini itjhwalo. 
Luke1:10 Nakufika isikhathi sokutjhisa itjhwalo, woke umkhambathi wahlangana, wathandaza ngaphandle." 
Luke1:11 Ingilozi kaSomnini yazibonakalisa kuye, ijame ngesigomeni se-aldari letjhwalo." 
Luke1:12 Kwathi bona uZakariya ayibone, wethuka wafikelwa kukwesaba." 
Luke1:13 Kodwana ingilozi yathi kuye: “Ungesabi Zakariya! Umthandazwakho uzwakele. Umkakho u-Elisabethi uzakubelethela indodana; uyithiye ibizo bona nguJwanisi. 
Luke1:14 Izakuba lithabo nokuthokoza kuwe begodu abanengi bazakujekezela ngebanga lokubelethwa kwayo 
Luke1:15 ngombana izakuba yikulu emehlweni kaSomnini. Ingaseli iwayini namkha esinye nesinye isiselo esiwunyelweko. Izakuzaliswa ngoMoya oCwengileko kwekubelethweni kwayo. 
Luke1:16 Izakubuyisela inengi labantu bakwa-Israyeli kuSomnini uZimabo. 
Luke1:17 Yeke izakukhamba phambi kweKosi ngommoya nangamandla ka-Eliya kobana itjhugululele iinhliziyo zaboyise ebantwaneni, kuthi abangalaleliko batjhugulukele ekuhlakanipheni kwabalungileko. Godu izakwenza bona isizwe silungele iKosi.”" 
Luke1:18 UZakariya wabuza ingilozi wathi: “Nginesiqiniseko siphi ngalokhu na? Sengiyindoda elupheleko, nomkami selaluphele.”" 
Luke1:19 Ingilozi yamphendula yathi: “NginguGabhariyeli; ngijame ebukhoneni bakaZimu. Ngithunywe bona ngizokhuluma nawe, ngikutjele iindaba ezimnandezi." 
Luke1:20 Qala-ke, njengombana ungazange ukholwe amezwami azakuzaliseka ngesikhathi sawo, uzakuba simumu ungakghoni ukukhuluma bekube kumhlana kuphethakalako lokhu.”" 
Luke1:21 Kwenzeka koke lokhu nje, abantu bebasoloko balindele uZakariya, bararekile bona uhlaleleni kangaka ngethempelini." 
Luke1:22 Wathi naphumako, wabhalelwa kubakhulumisa. Yeke balemuka bona ubone umbono ngethempelini ngombana bekalokhu abenzela amatshwayo kodwana abhalelwa kuphimisela." 
Luke1:23 Kwathi bona kuphele isikhathi somsebenzakhe ngethempelini, wabuyela ekhaya." 
Luke1:24 Ngemva kwamalanga lawo umkakhe u-Elisabethi waba sidisi. Wahlala iinyanga ezihlanu zoke azifihlile. 
Luke1:25 Wathi: “Ekhu! USomnini ungenzele lokhu. Ube nomusa kimi, wasusa ihlazo lami ebengiseze ngilithwele hlangana nabantu.”" 
Luke1:26 Enyangeni yesithandathu, uZimu wathumela ingilozi uGabhariyeli edorobheni leGalile ekuthiwa yiNazaretha," 
Luke1:27 entombini ebegade yethenjiswe ukuthathwa lisokana ebekuthiwa nguJosefa, osizukulwana sakaDavida. Ibizo lentombi leyo belinguMariya." 
Luke1:28 Ingilozi yeza kuye yathi: “Lotjha wena othandekileko! USomnini unawe!” 
Luke1:29 Kodwana uMariya watshwenyeka khulu ngomlayezo lo, wazibuza bona kulotjhisa okunjani-ke lokhu." 
Luke1:30 Ingilozi yathi kuye: “Ungesabi Mariya ngombana ufumene umusa emehlweni kaZimu. 
Luke1:31 Uzakuba sidisi, ubelethe indodana, uzayithiya ibizo bona nguJesu." 
Luke1:32 Izakuba yikulu, ibizwe bona yiNdodana kaZimu ongoPhezulu. USomnini uZimu uzayinikela isihlalo sobukhosi sakayise uDavida." 
Luke1:33 Izakubusa phezu kwekumba kaJakopo ngokungapheliko. Umbuswayo angekhe waphela!” 
Luke1:34 UMariya wabuza ingilozi wathi: “Lokhu kungenzeka njani ngombana azange khengihlangane nendoda?” 
Luke1:35 Ingilozi yamphendula yathi: “UMoya oCwengileko uzakuba phezu kwakho, namandla wongoPhezulu azakusibekela. Yeke ocwengileko ozakubelethwa uzakubizwa bona yiNdodana kaZimu." 
Luke1:36 Ngitjho nesihlobo sakho u-Elisabethi usidisi nanyana sele amdala nje. Sele aphethe inyanga yesithandathu, yena lo ebekuthiwa uyinyumba" 
Luke1:37 ngombana ayikho into engenzekiko kuZimu.” 
Luke1:38 UMariya waphendula wathi: “Ngiyincekukazi kaSomnini, akwenzeke kimi njengombana utjhwile!” Yeke ingilozi yasuka kuye." 
Luke1:39 Ngesikhatheso uMariya wazilungiselela waya edorobheni leJudiya elingenarheni yeentatjana. 
Luke1:40 Wafika lapho wangena kwaZakariya, walotjhisa u-Elisabethi." 
Luke1:41 Kwathi bona u-Elisabethi ezwe ukulotjhisa kwakaMariya, umntwana weqayeqa ngesibelethweni sakhe. U-Elisabethi wazaliswa ngoMoya oCwengileko." 
Luke1:42 Warhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu wathi: “Ubusisiwe hlangana nabafazi, sibusisiwe nesithelo sesibeletho sakho!" 
Luke1:43 Kubayini ngithandwe kangaka bona ngithekelwe ngunina leKosami na? 
Luke1:44 Kuthe nje nangizwa ukulotjhisa kwakho, umntwana wathaba beweqayeqa ngaphakathi kwami." 
Luke1:45 Ubusisiwe umfazi ofese wakholwa bonyana okutjhiwo nguSomnini kuye kuzakuzaliseka!” 
Luke1:46 UMariya wathi: “Umphefumulwami udumisa uSomnini. 
Luke1:47 Ummoyami uyenama kuZimu uMsindisami 
Luke1:48 ngombana ungikhumbulile, mina ncekukazi yakhe enyazekako. Kusukela kwanjesi, zoke iinzukulwana zizongibiza ngobusisiweko," 
Luke1:49 ngombana ongoPhezulu, ungenzele okukhulu. Ibizo lakhe licwengile." 
Luke1:50 Umusakhe ungowabamesabako, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Luke1:51 Ukhombise amandlakhe ngengalwakhe, wahlakaza abakhukhumeleko emizindlwenabo." 
Luke1:52 Wehlise amakhosi eenhlalweni zawo, waphakamisa abathobekileko." 
Luke1:53 Usuthise abalambileko ngokuhle, iinkhumkani waziqotjha zimkhonoze." 
Luke1:54 Uyisizile incekwakhe u-Israyeli, wakhumbula isirhawu sakhe," 
Luke1:55 njengombana athembisa ku-Abrahamu nakizo zoke iinzukulwana zakhe ngokungapheliko.” 
Luke1:56 UMariya wahlala pheze iinyanga ezintathu no-Elisabethi, wabuyela ekhaya." 
Luke1:57 Kwathi nakufika isikhathi sokobana u-Elisabethi abelethe, wabeletha indodana." 
Luke1:58 Abomakhelwana kanye neenhlobo zakhe zezwa bona uSomnini umenzele isirhawu esikhulu, zathaba kanye naye." 
Luke1:59 Ngelanga lobunane zeza bona zizokusoka umntwana, yeke bezizomthiyelela ngoyise uZakariya," 
Luke1:60 Kodwana unina wathi: “Awa! Ibizo lakhe lizakuba nguJwanisi.” 
Luke1:61 Zathi kuye: “Kodwana akukho noyedwa hlangana neenhlobo zakho onebizo elinjalo.” 
Luke1:62 Zakhuluma noyise ngezandla, zambuza bona yena angathanda ibizo lomsana libe ngubani na." 
Luke1:63 UZakariya wakhombela umqebethu wokutlolela, watlola wathi: “Ibizo lakhe nguJwanisi.” Barareka boke." 
Luke1:64 Khonokho umlomakhe wavuleka nelimu lakhe lararuluka, wathoma ukukhuluma, wadumisa uZimu." 
Luke1:65 Boke abomakhelwana behlelwa kukwesaba bekwathi kiyo yoke inarha yeentatjaneni zeJudiya, abantu bakhuluma ngeendabezi." 
Luke1:66 Woke owakuzwako lokho wazindla ngakho wabuza wathi: “Alo, umntwana lo uzokuba yini na?” Isandla sakaSomnini besiphezu kwakhe." 
Luke1:67 Khonapho uZakariya uyise wagcwala ngoMoya oCwengileko, waphorofida wathi:" 
Luke1:68 “Akadunyiswe uSomnini, uZimu ka-Israyeli! Ngambala ube nesirhawu, wahlenga abantu bakhe." 
Luke1:69 Usivusele uMsindisi onamandla ngekumbeni yencekwakhe uDavida," 
Luke1:70 njengombana akhuluma ekadeni ngomlomo wabaphorofidi bakhe abacwengileko 
Luke1:71 bonyana sizakusindiswa ezitheni zethu nemandleni wabo boke abasizondako. 
Luke1:72 Ngalokho ukhombise isirhawu asithembisa abokhokho bethu, wakhumbula isivumelwano sakhe esicwengileko" 
Luke1:73 okusifungo asifunga kukhokho wethu u-Abrahamu 
Luke1:74 sokobana uzosenyela ezandleni zezitha zethu, asivumele simlotjhe ngaphandle kokwesaba," 
Luke1:75 ngokucwenga nangokulunga, ebusweni bakhe imihla yoke yokuphila kwethu." 
Luke1:76 “Wena mntanami, uzakubizwa bona umphorofidi wongoPhezulu ngombana uzakukhamba phambi kweKosi, uyilungisele indlela," 
Luke1:77 kobana utlhadlhule abantu bayo mayelana nelwazi lesindiso ngokuthethelelwa kwezono zabo. 
Luke1:78 Ngesirhawu esikhulu sakaZimethu, ukusa kuzakudabuka kuvela phezulu," 
Luke1:79 kukhanyisele abaphila ebumnyameni nethunzini lokufa, kunqophise iinyawo zethu endleleni enokuthula.”" 
Luke1:80 Umntwana wakhula, waqina emmoyeni. Wahlala erhalawumbeni bekwaba kumhlana abonakala tjhatjhalazi kwa-Israyeli." 
Luke2:1 Emihleni leyo umbusi omkhulu u-Arhostosi wakhupha isimemezelo bona kubalwe boke abantu ephasini loke leRoma. 
Luke2:2 Lokhu bekukubalwa kokuthoma ngesikhathi uKureniyosi ambusi weSiriya. 
Luke2:3 Ngiloyo naloyo waya edorobheni lekhabo kobana ayokubalwa khona. 
Luke2:4 UJosefa naye wasuka edorobheni leNazaretha eGalile, waya eJudiya emzini kaDavida ebekuthiwa yiBhethelehema ngombana ubegade asizukulwana sekumba nomndeni kaDavida." 
Luke2:5 Waya wayokutlolisa yena noMariya, ebegade azomthatha bona abe mkakhe. UMariya gade asidisi." 
Luke2:6 Kwathi nabasese lapho, kwafika isikhathi sokobana abelethe." 
Luke2:7 Wabeletha, wazibula ngendodana, wayiphuthela ngamatjhila. Wayilalisa ngekerebheni ngombana bekunganandawo ngekumbeni yeenkhambi." 
Luke2:8 Esifundeneso bekunabelusi ebebahlala emrhuleni baqaphe imihlambabo ebusuku. 
Luke2:9 Khonapho ingilozi kaSomnini yeza kibo, iphazimulo kaSomnini yabakhanyisa mahlangothi woke. Besaba kwamambala." 
Luke2:10 Kodwana ingilozi yathi kibo: “Ningesabi! Qalani, nginilethele iindaba ezimnandi neziletha ithabo ebantwini boke." 
Luke2:11 Khona namhlanjesi ngemzini kaDavida nibelethelwe uMsindisi onguMesiya, iKosi!" 
Luke2:12 Nakhu okuzakuba siboniso kini: Nizakufumana umntwana aphuthelwe ngamatjhila alaliswe ngekerebheni.” 
Luke2:13 Khonokho kwabonakala umkhambathi wezulwini ukanye nengilozi leyo, udumisa uZimu usithi:" 
Luke2:14 “Idumo kuZimu keliphezulu nokuthula ephasini, ebantwini abathokozelwa nguye.”" 
Luke2:15 Kwathi bona iingilozi zemuke kibo zibuyele ezulwini, abelusi bathi komunye nomunye: “Nambani siye eBhethelehema siyokubona lokho okwenzekileko, uSomnini asitjele ngakho.”" 
Luke2:16 Yeke barhaba, bafumana uMariya noJosefa kanye nomntwana alele ngekerebheni." 
Luke2:17 Kwathi nasele bambonile, bakhuluma ilizwi mayelana nalokho abakutjelwe ngomntwana lo." 
Luke2:18 Nje-ke boke abakuzwako lokho barareka khulu ngeendaba zabelusaba. 
Luke2:19 Kodwana uMariya wawalonda woke amezwi la, wazindla ngawo ngehliziywenakhe." 
Luke2:20 Abelusi babuyela emva, badumisa, baphakamisa uZimu ngakho koke abakuzwileko nabakubonileko; okwaba njengombana bebatjeliwe." 
Luke2:21 Elangeni lobunane, sele kusikhathi bona umntwana asokwe, wathiywa ibizo bona nguJesu, ibizo aliphiwa yingilozi angakabiphi ngesiswini sakanina." 
Luke2:22 Kwathi bona kuphele amalanga wokuhlanjululwa kwabo ngokomthetho kaMosi, uJosefa noMariya bathatha umntwana bamusa eJerusalema kobana bayomveza phambi kwakaSomnini," 
Luke2:23 njengombana kutloliwe emthethweni kaSomnini bona: “Lelo nalelo izibulo eliduna lizakwehlukaniselwa uSomnini.” 
Luke2:24 Godu bebayokwenza nomhlabelo njengombana kusitjho umthetho kaSomnini nawuthi: “Amazuba amabili wekhaya namkha amabili wommango.” 
Luke2:25 Bekunendoda eJerusalema, ibizo layo linguSimeyoni. Beyilungile begodu yesaba uZimu. Begade ilindele induduzo ka-Israyeli, yeke uMoya oCwengileko gade uphezu kwayo." 
Luke2:26 USimeyoni loyo gade embulelwe ngoMoya oCwengileko bonyana angekhe afe angakaboni uKrestu kaSomnini. 
Luke2:27 Ngokurholwa nguMoya oCwengileko, waya ngesirhodlweni sethempeli. Kwathi lokha ababelethi nabaletha umntwana uJesu kobana bazokwenza kuye umkhuba wabo ukuya ngokomthetho," 
Luke2:28 uSimeyoni wathatha umntwana wamgona, wadumisa uZimu, wathi:" 
Luke2:29 “Kwanjesi sewungalitjhaphulula likhambe ngokuthula ikhoboka lakho Kosi. Kube njengokwelizwi lakho 
Luke2:30 ngombana amehlwami ayibonile isindiswakho 
Luke2:31 oyilungiselele phambi kwabantu boke. 
Luke2:32 Umkhanyo wesambulo sabatjhili nephazimulo ebantwini bakho u-Israyeli.” 
Luke2:33 Uyise lomntwana kanye nonina barareka ngalokho okukhulunywe ngaye. 
Luke2:34 Yeke uSimeyoni wababusisa, wathi kuMariya unina: “Umntwana lo ukhethelwe ukuwa nokuvuka kwabanengi kwa-Israyeli nokuba litshwayo elizakuphikiswa," 
Luke2:35 ukuze kwambulwe imizindlo yabanengi. Isabula izakukhekhebula ngitjho neyakho ihliziyo.” 
Luke2:36 Godu bekunomphorofidikazi ebekuthiwa ngu-Ana, indodakazi kaFanuweli wekoro ka-Atjheri. Bekasele aluphele khulu. Wahlala iminyaka elikhomba kwaphela nomyenakhe ngemva kobana amthethe." 
Luke2:37 Ngemva kwalapho waba mhlolokazi bewaba neminyaka ematjhumi abunane nane. Azange akhe asuke ethempelini kodwana bekadumisa ubusuku nemini, azila ukudla athandaza." 
Luke2:38 Khonapho naye weza, waphakamisa uZimu bewakhuluma ngomntwana kibo boke ebebalindele ukuhlengwa kweJerusalema." 
Luke2:39 Kwathi bona uJosefa noMariya baqede ukwenza koke ebekufunwa mthetho kaSomnini, babuyela eGalile edorobheni lekhabo eNazaretha." 
Luke2:40 Umntwana wakhula waba namandla, gade ahlakaniphile, nomusa kaZimu uphezu kwakhe." 
Luke2:41 Umnyaka nomnyaka ababelethi bakhe bebasiya eJerusalema emnyanyeni wePhasika. 
Luke2:42 Kwathi naneminyaka elitjhumi nambili ubudala, bakhuphukela emnyanyeni njengokujayelekileko." 
Luke2:43 Ngemva kobana umnyanya uphele, ababelethi bakaJesu babuyela ekhaya, kwabe yena usele eJerusalama. Kodwana bebangakatjheji bona usele ngemuva." 
Luke2:44 Badlumbana bona uphakathi kwesiqubuthu seenkhambi. Sele bakhambe ibanga lelanga loke, bathoma ukumfuna eenhlotjeni zabo nebanganini babo." 
Luke2:45 Bathi nabangamfumaniko, babuyela eJerusalema ukuyomfuna khona." 
Luke2:46 Ngemva kwamalanga amathathu, bamfumana ngesirhodlweni sethempeli ahlezi hlangana nabafundisi, abalalele begodu ababuza imibuzo." 
Luke2:47 Boke abamzwako barareka ngendlela azwisisa ngayo nangeempendulo zakhe. 
Luke2:48 Kwathi ababelethi bakhe nabambonako, barareka. Unina wathi kuye: “Mntwanami, ukwenzeleni lokhu kithi na? Sinoyihlo besitshwenyekile ngawe, sikhamba sikufuna.”" 
Luke2:49 Wabaphendula wathi: “Beningifunelani na? Beningazi bona kufanele ngibe ngekumbeni kaBaba?” 
Luke2:50 Kodwana azange bayilemuke ipendulwakhe. 
Luke2:51 Yeke wehlela nabo eNazaretha, wabalalela. Kodwana unina wabulunga zoke izintwezi ngehliziywenakhe." 
Luke2:52 UJesu wakhula ngokuhlakanipha nangesithunzi, wathandwa nguZimu nabantu." 
Luke3:1 Ngomnyaka wetjhumi nahlanu wokubusa kombusi omkhulu uTibheriyasi, uPontiyasi Pilatu gade ambusi weJudiya, uHerode yena angumtetrarerhesi wesifunda seGalile, umfowabo uFlebhe angumtetrarerhesi wesifunda se-Ithuriya kanye neTrakoniti, uLisaniya angumtetrarerhesi wesifunda se-Abileni." 
Luke3:2 U-Anasi noKhayafasi bona bebabaphristi abakhulu. Ngesikhatheso ilizwi lakaZimu lafika kuJwanisi, umsa kaZakariya, aserhalawumbeni." 
Luke3:3 Wakhamba yoke inarha magegana neJordani, atjhumayela umbhabhadiso wokuphenduka mayelana nokucolelwa kwezono." 
Luke3:4 Njengombana kutloliwe encwadini yamezwi womphorofidi u-Isaya nakasithi: “Ilizwi lorhuwelela erhalawumbeni, lithi: ‘Lungisani indlela yeKosi; yenzeleni indlelakhe enqophileko." 
Luke3:5 Yoke imirhoba kumele ihlelenjwe, zoke iintaba nemibundu zibe libhabhadu; iindawo ezimigodigodi zenziwe itatawu neziziindunduma zilelezwe." 
Luke3:6 Boke abantu bazakubona isindiso kaZimu.’ ” 
Luke3:7 UJwanisi wakhuluma neenqubuthu zabantu ezeza kuye bona azozibhabhadisa, wathi: “Nina nzalo yeenyoka ndina! Ngubani onitjele bona nibalekele ubukhali obuzako na?" 
Luke3:8 Vezani isithelo esikhambisana nokuphenduka kwenu. Ningathomi nizitjele nithi, ‘Sino-Abrahamu ongubabethu’ ngombana ngiyanitjela bona uZimu angavusela u-Abrahamu abantwana ematjeni la." 
Luke3:9 Izembe selibekiwe emirajini yemithi, nje-ke woke umuthi ongatheli iinthelo uzokugawulwa, uphoselwe emlilweni.”" 
Luke3:10 Isiqubuthu sambuza sathi: “Alo-ke kufanele senze njani na?” 
Luke3:11 Waphendula wathi: “Loyo onezambatho ezimbili akabelane naloyo onganalitho, naloyo onokudla enze njalo.”" 
Luke3:12 Nabathelisi beza kobana bazokubhajadiswa, bambuza bathi: “Mfundisi, alo, kufuze senzeni na?”" 
Luke3:13 Wabaphendula wathi: “Ningathelisi ngaphezu kokufaneleko.” 
Luke3:14 Nje-ke namanye amajoni ambuza athi: “Kumele senzeni na?” Waphendula wathi: “Ningemuki umuntu imali godu ningasoleli abantu ngokungekho. Yaneliswani ngomrholo wenu.” 
Luke3:15 Abantu bebalinde ngethemba, bararekile eenhliziyweni zabo bona kghani uJwanisi lo angaba nguKrestu na." 
Luke3:16 Yeke, uJwanisi wathi kibo boke: “Nginibhabhadisa ngamanzi kodwana ukhona ozako onamandla khulu kunami, engingakafaneli ukutjhaphulula amapatlagwanakhe. Yena uzanibhabhadisa ngoMoya oCwengileko nangomlilo." 
Luke3:17 Uphethe iforogwakhe yokwela kobana ahlwengise iselelo sakhe nokubuthelela ikoroyi ayifake ngesilulwini sakhe, kodwana uzokutjhisa iinhluba ngemlilweni ongekhe wacima.”" 
Luke3:18 Ngamezwi ahlukahlukeneko wokuyelelisa, uJwanisi watjhumayela iindaba ezimnandi ebantwini." 
Luke3:19 Kodwana kwathi lokha uJwanisi nasola uHerode umtetrarerhesi, ngokungena kwakhe uHerodiya umkamfowabo, nangakho koke okumbi akwenzileko," 
Luke3:20 wenza okungaphezu kwalokho, wavalela uJwanisi ngesikhungweni." 
Luke3:21 Ngemva kobana boke abantu sebabhajadisiwe, uJesu naye wabhajadiswa. Kwathi asathandaza, izulu lavuleka." 
Luke3:22 UMoya oCwengileko wehlela kuye ngesibumbeko sezuba. Khonapho kwavela ilizwi ezulwini lisithi: “Wena uyiNdodanami ethandekako. Ngeneme ngawe.” 
Luke3:23 UJesu begade aneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu lokha nathoma umsebenzakhe. Ngokwemicabango yabantu, begade amsa kaJosefa omsa ka-Eli," 
Luke3:24 umsa kaMathati omsa kaLevi, umsa kaMelirhi omsa kaJanayi, umsa kaJosefa" 
Luke3:25 omsa kaMatathiyasi, umsa ka-Amosi omsa kaNawumi, umsa ka-Esili omsa kaNagayi," 
Luke3:26 umsa kaMathi omsa kaMatathiyasi, umsa kaSimeyini omsa kaJoserha, umsa kaJoda" 
Luke3:27 omsa kaJowanani, umsa kaResa omsa kaZerubhabheli, umsa kaTjhaltiyeli omsa kaNeri," 
Luke3:28 umsa kaMelirhi omsa ka-Adi, umsa kaKosamu omsa ka-Elimadamu, umsa ka-Eri" 
Luke3:29 omsa kaJotjhuwa, umsa ka-Eliyezeri omsa kaJorima, umsa kaMathati omsa kaLevi" 
Luke3:30 umsa kaSimiyoni omsa kaJuda, umsa kaJosefa omsa kaJonamu, umsa ka-Eliyakimu" 
Luke3:31 omsa kaMeleya, umsa kaMena omsa kaMatatha, umsa kaNathani omsa kaDavida," 
Luke3:32 umsa kaJese omsa ka-Obede, umsa kaBhowazi omsa kaSala, umsa kaNarhitjhoni" 
Luke3:33 omsa ka-Aminadaba, umsa ka-Adimini omsa ka-Areni, umsa kaHesromu omsa kaPerezi, umsa kaJuda" 
Luke3:34 omsa kaJakopo, umsa ka-Isaka omsa ka-Abrahamu, umsa kaTerarhi, omsa kaNarhori," 
Luke3:35 umsa kaSerugu omsa kaRewu, umsa kaPelegi omsa ka-Ebhere, umsa kaTjhelarhi" 
Luke3:36 omsa kaKenamu, umsa ka-Aripakitjhadi omsa kaTjhemu, umsa kaNowa omsa kaLemeki," 
Luke3:37 umsa kaMetutjhelarhi omsa ka-Inogo, umsa kaJeredi omsa kaMahalaleli, umsa kaKhenani" 
Luke3:38 omsa ka-Enotjhi, umsa kaSethi omsa ka-Adamu, umsa kaZimu." 
Luke4:1 UJesu wabuya eJordani azele uMoya oCwengileko, wamdosela erhalawumbeni"
