Luke4:2 lapho alingwa khona nguSathana amalanga amatjhumi amane. Azange agome ilitho emalangeni lawo, kwathi ekupheleni kwawo, walamba." 
Luke4:3 USathana wathi kuye: “Nakube uyiNdodana kaZimu, tjela amatje la aphenduke isikwa.”" 
Luke4:4 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kutloliwe kwathiwa, ‘Umuntu akaphili ngesikwa kwaphela.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Yeke uSathana wamkhuphulela ekuphakameni, wamtjengisa yoke imibuso yephasi ngokuphazima kwelihlo." 
Luke4:6 Wathi kuye: “Ngizakunikela boke ubuphaziphazi bayo kanye nawo woke amandla ngombana kusezandleni zami. Koke lokhu ngingakunikela nanyana ngubani ngendlela engifuna ngayo. 
Luke4:7 Yeke nawungangilotjha, koke lokhu kuzakuba ngekwakho.”" 
Luke4:8 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘Thandaza uSomnini uZimakho, ulotjhe yena yedwa!’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Yeke uSathana wamthatha wamusa eJerusalema, wamjamisa esiqongolweni sethempeli, wathi kuye: “Nakube uyiNdodana kaZimu, ziphosele phasi lapha," 
Luke4:10 ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘Uzakuyala iingilozi zakhe ngawe kobana zikulonde.’" 
Luke4:11 “Godu kwathiwa, “ ‘Zizakuthwala ngezandla zazo ukuze inyawo lakho lingakhutjwa lilitje.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Kodwana uJesu wamphendula wathi: “Kutloliwe kwathiwa, “ ‘Ungamlingi uSomnini uZimakho.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Kuthe bona uSathana aqede ngazo zoke iinlingo zakhe, wamgadunga isikhatjhana." 
Luke4:14 UJesu wabuyela eGalile ngamandla kaMoya oCwengileko. Iindaba ngaye zarhatjheka kiyo yoke inarha yakhona. 
Luke4:15 Wafundisa ngemasinagoginabo, wadunyiswa ngiwo woke umuntu." 
Luke4:16 UJesu waya eNazaretha, lapha akhulela khona. Kwathi ngeSabatha waya ngesinagogini njengombana bekajayele ukwenza. Wasikima kobana afunde imitlolo ecwengileko." 
Luke4:17 Wanikelwa umtlolo womphorofidi u-Isaya. Wawuthabulula, wafumana lapha kuthi:" 
Luke4:18 “UMoya kaSomnini uphezu kwami ngombana ungizesile kobana ngilethe iindaba ezimnandi kabadududu. Ungithume bona ngizokumemezela ukuthukululwa kwabathunjiweko, ukubona kwabaphopheleko, ukuthukululwa kwabagandelelweko" 
Luke4:19 nokumemezela umnyaka wesisa sakaSomnini.” 
Luke4:20 Yeke wasonga umtlolo, wawubuyisela kugosa, wahlala phasi. Woke amehlo walabo ebebangesinagogini anamathela kuye." 
Luke4:21 Wathoma ngokuthi kibo: “Namhlanjesi umtlolo lo uzalisekile eendlebeni zenu.” 
Luke4:22 Boke bakhuluma kuhle ngaye begodu bebararekile ngamezwi anesisa esingako aphuma emlonyenakhe. Bathi: “Akusuye umsa kaJosefa na?” 
Luke4:23 Wathi kibo: “Kwamambala nizakutjho isitjhwesi kimi nithi, ‘Nyanga, yewuzelaphe!’ godu nithi, ‘Yenza khona ekhenwapha owasenza eKapernawumi.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 UJesu waraga wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona akunamphorofidi owakhe wamukeleka enarheni yekhabo. 
Luke4:25 Kodwana iqiniso kukobana bekunabahlolokazi abanengi kwa-Israyeli ngesikhathi saka-Eliya, lokha izulu nalizakuvaleka iminyaka emithathu nesiquntu; kwaba nendlala ekulu phezu kwayo yoke inarha." 
Luke4:26 Khonapho u-Eliya azange athunywe ngitjho nakoyedwa wabo kwaphela emhlolokazini weSarephitha eseTsidoni. 
Luke4:27 Bekunabantu abanengi kwa-Israyeli ebebaphethwe likhwekhwe ngesikhathi somphorofidi u-Eliya, kodwana akakho noyedwa wabo owapholiswako ngaphandle koNamani umSiriya.”" 
Luke4:28 Kwathi lokha nabezwa lokho, boke abantu abangesinagogini, babibhelana." 
Luke4:29 Basikima, bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwedorobho, bamusa ekuthulameni kwentatjana lapha bekwakhiwe khona idorobho, kobana bamsunduzele ngerharheni." 
Luke4:30 Kodwana wangena hlangana nesiqubuthu wazikhambela. 
Luke4:31 Yeke uJesu wehlela eKapernawumi ebekulidorobho leGalile, wafundisa khona abantu ngeSabatha." 
Luke4:32 Boke bamangala ngefundiswakhe ngombana umyalezwakhe bewunamandla. 
Luke4:33 Ngesinagogini bekunomuntu onedimoni, okutjho ummoya osilapheleko. Warhuwelela khulu wathi:" 
Luke4:34 “Hlukana nathi! Unandabani nathi wena Jesu weNazaretha na? Uze ukuzosirhayila na? Ngiyakwazi bona ungubani, ungoCwengileko kaZimu.”" 
Luke4:35 UJesu wawukhalimela wathi: “Thula! Phuma kuye!” Yeke idimoni ladula umuntu loyo phasi phambi kwabo boke, laphuma ngaphandle kokumkhubaza." 
Luke4:36 Boke abantu barareka babuzana bathi: “Lilizwi bani-ke leli? Ngegunya nangamandla, uyala imimoya emimbi bese iyaphuma!”" 
Luke4:37 Kwanda idumo ngaye kiyo yoke indawo esifundeneso. 
Luke4:38 UJesu waphuma ngesinagogini waya emzini kaSimoni. Yeke umkhwekazi kaSimoni gade aphethwe mgomani onamandla. Bakhombela uJesu kobana amsize. 
Luke4:39 Wamengama wabese ukhalimela umgomani, ngambala waphuma kuye. Wavuka khonokho, wabatenda." 
Luke4:40 Kwathi bona kutjhinge ilanga boke abantu baletha kuJesu abagulako abanezifo ezihlukeneko. Wabeka izandla phezu komunye nomunye wabo, wabapholisa." 
Luke4:41 Amadimoni aphuma ebantwini abanengi, arhuwelela asithi: “Wena uyiNdodana kaZimu!” Kodwana wawakhalimela, wangawavumela bona akhulume ngombana gade amazi bona unguKrestu." 
Luke4:42 Kwathi nakusako uJesu waphuma, waya emmangweni. Isiqubuthu samfuna besayokufika lapha akhona, salinga ukumvimba bona angakhambi." 
Luke4:43 Kodwana wathi kiso: “Kufanele ngitjhumayele iindaba ezimnandi ngombuso kaZimu nakezinye iindawo ngombana ngithunyelwe khona lokho.” 
Luke4:44 Yeke waragela phambili watjhumayela ngemasinagogini eJudiya. 
Luke5:1 Ngelinye ilanga uJesu asajame eqadi kwelwandle leGenesaretha, isiqubuthu safuhlezelana kuye kobana silalele ilizwi lakaZimu." 
Luke5:2 Wabona imikhumbi emibili ijame eligwini lelwandle, ababambi beenhlambi bebahlikile kiyo, bahlanza amanedabo." 
Luke5:3 UJesu wakhwela ngakomunye wemikhumbi ekungewakaSimoni, wamkhombela bona atjhide kancani eligwini lelwandle. Yeke wahlala ngemkhunjini wafundisa isiqubuthu." 
Luke5:4 Kwathi bona aqede ukukhuluma, wathi kuSimoni: “Sunduzelani umkhumbakho phakatjhana, niphosele amanede wenu kobana nibambe.”" 
Luke5:5 USimoni wamphendula wathi: “Kosi, sisebenze kabudisi ubusuku boke akhange khesibambe ilitho, kodwana ngombana utjho njalo, ngizawehlisa amanede.”" 
Luke5:6 Kwathi bona benze njalo, babamba iinhlambi ezinengi kangangobana amanedabo athoma ukudabuka." 
Luke5:7 Yeke bakhwaya abangani babo abangemkhunjini omunye bona bazobasiza. Beza bebazalisa yomibili imikhumbi, yazala kangangobana yabe yafuna ukucwila." 
Luke5:8 Kwathi lokha uSimoni Pitrosi nabona lokho, wawa emadolweni kaJesu wathi: “Suka kimapha Kosi ngombana ngimumuntu osisoni!”" 
Luke5:9 Yena nabanye agade anabo barareka kwamambala ngeenhlambi ezinengi abazibambileko. 
Luke5:10 Kwaba njalo nakuJakopo noJwanisi amadodana kaZebediya ababasebenzisani bakaSimoni. Yeke uJesu wathi: “Ungesabi, ukusukela namhlanjesi uzokubamba abantu.”" 
Luke5:11 Bakhuphela imikhumbabo eligwini batjhiya koke khonapho bamlandela. 
Luke5:12 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga uJesu akomunye umuzi, kweza indoda ebegade ikghamathelwe likhwekhwe. Yathi ingabona uJesu, yaguqa yahloma ihloko phasi beyamrabhela yathi: “Kosi, nawuthandako ungangihlambulula!”" 
Luke5:13 UJesu wathabulula isandla sakhe wakghwatha indoda leyo wathi: “Ngiyathanda, hlambuluka!” Khonokho ikhwekhwe lasuka kiyo." 
Luke5:14 UJesu wayiyala wathi: “Ungatjeli namunye, kodwana khamba ulunge kumphristi akuhlolisise bewenze umhlabelo njengokutjho kwakaMosi mayelana nokuhlanjululwa kwakho, kube bufakazi kibo.”" 
Luke5:15 Kodwana kwanjesi iindaba ngoJesu zanda khulu, iinqubuthu ezinengi bezibuthelelana kobana zimlalele bezipholiswe emagulwenazo." 
Luke5:16 Kodwana begade aphele atsomuka aye emmangweni ayokuthandaza. 
Luke5:17 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga uJesu asafundisa, abaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho bebahlezi eduze nalapho, bavela kiyo yoke imizi yeGalile, eJudiya neJerusalema, amandla kaSomnini gade anaye kobana apholise." 
Luke5:18 Khonapho kweza amadoda athwele umuntu orhwahlapheleko ngomkghadi, alinga ukumngenisa ngekumbeni kobana ambeke phambi kwakaJesu." 
Luke5:19 Kodwana kwathi nabhalelwa kungena ngebanga lesiqubuthu, akhwela phezu kwephahla, avula itjhuba, amehlisela ngaphakathi ngomkghadi hlangana nesiqubuthu, afese ambeka phambi kwakaJesu." 
Luke5:20 UJesu wathi nabona ukukholwa kwawo wathi: “Mngani, izono zakho zicolelwe.”" 
Luke5:21 Abafundisi bomthetho nabaFarisi bathoma ukuzindlekela bathi: “Ngubani umrhali ohlambalazako lo? Ngubani ongacolela izono ngaphandle kwakaZimu na?” 
Luke5:22 UJesu bekayazi imikhumbulwabo, wathi kibo: “Nizindlelani ngezinto ezinje na?" 
Luke5:23 Ngikuphi okulula ukuthi, ‘Izono zakho zicolelwe,’ namkha ukuthi, ‘Vuka ukhambe’ na?" 
Luke5:24 Nokho-ke ngizanikhombisa bonyana iNdodana yoMuntu inamandla ephasinapha wokucolela izono.” Yeke wathi emuntwini orhwahlapheleko: “Ngithi kuwe, vuka uthathe umkghadi wakho ukhambe, uye ekhaya!”" 
Luke5:25 Khonokho umuntu loyo wavuka phambi kwabo boke, wathatha umkghadi agade alele kiwo waya ekhaya, adumisa uZimu." 
Luke5:26 Boke barareka kwamambala, badumisa uZimu banokwesaba bathi: “Namhlanje khona sibone amabono!”" 
Luke5:27 Ngemva kwalokho uJesu waphumela ngaphandle, wabona umthelisi, ibizo lakhe linguLevi ahlezi ngendlwanenakhe yokuthelisela. UJesu wathi kuye: “Ngilandela.”" 
Luke5:28 ULevi wasikima, watjhiya koke, wamlandela." 
Luke5:29 Yeke uLevi wenzela uJesu imbedla yesidlo kwakhe, khonapho begade kunesiqubuthu sabathelisi kanye nabanye abantu ebebagoma nabo." 
Luke5:30 Kodwana abaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho ebebangebesiqubuthu sabo, banghonghoyila ebafundini bakhe bathi: “Nigomelani benisele nabathelisi nezoni na?”" 
Luke5:31 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Akusibo abaphilileko abadinga inyanga, kodwana ngabagulako." 
Luke5:32 Angikezi ukuzokubiza abalungileko, kodwana ngizokubiza izoni bona zitjhuguluke.”" 
Luke5:33 Abanye abantu bathi kuJesu: “Abafundi bakaJwanisi bazila njalonjalo ukudla bathandaze, nabafundi babaFarisi nabo benza njalo, kodwana bakho abafundi bayagoma, bayasela.”" 
Luke5:34 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Nitjho bona kungenzeka abantu emtjhadweni bazile umyeni asesenabo na? Awa, angekhe!" 
Luke5:35 Kodwana lizakufika ilanga mhlana umyeni azakususwa hlangana nabo, mhlokho bazakuzila ukudla.”" 
Luke5:36 UJesu wabatjela umfanekiso lo: “Akakho ongadabula isitjheza sesambatho esitjha, ayokutjheza isambatho esidala. Nangakwenza lokho, uzabe udabule isambatho esitjha, nje-ke isitjheza esitjha angekhe safanela isambatho esidala." 
Luke5:37 Nanjalo-ke akakho ongathela iwayini elitjha ngeenkhwameni zesikhumba ezidala. ngombana iwayini elitjha lizazirathula iinkhwama, iwayini liphalake, iinkhwama zonakale." 
Luke5:38 Endaweni yalokho iwayini elitjha kufanele lithelwe eenkhwameni ezitjha. 
Luke5:39 Begodu akakho ofuna iwayini elitjha, nakhe wasela elidala phele athi: ‘Elidala limnandi.’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Kwathi ngeSabatha uJesu warabhula hlangana namasimu wekoroyi. Abafundi bakhe bakha iinqwambi zekoroyi bazihlikihla ezandleni, bagoma." 
Luke6:2 Abanye babaFarisi bambuza bathi: “Kubayini nenza okungasisemthethweni ngeSabatha na?” 
Luke6:3 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Azange khenifunde bona uDavida wenzani lokha yena nabakhambisani bakhe nabalambileko na? 
Luke6:4 Wangena ngekumbeni kaZimu, wathatha isikwa esahlukaniselweko, wagoma ebekuvunyelwe bona kugonywe baphristi kwaphela. Wanikela nabakhambisani bakhe bona bagome.”" 
Luke6:5 Godu wathi kibo: “INdodana yoMuntu iyiKosi yeSabatha.” 
Luke6:6 Kwathi ngelinye iSabatha waya ngesinagogini wafundisa. Khonapho bekunomuntu obekakokorene isandla sangesigomeni. 
Luke6:7 AbaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho bebafuna isizathu sokusola uJesu, yeke bamtjhejisisa bona akazukupholisa ngeSabatha nje na." 
Luke6:8 Kodwana uJesu wakwazi ebebakucabanga, wathi emuntwini okokorene isandla: “Sikima ujame ngaphambi kwawo woke umuntu.” Wasikima wayokujama lapho." 
Luke6:9 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Akhe ngibuze, ngikuphi okusemthethweni ngeSabatha, ukwenza okuhle namkha okumbi, ukusindisa ipilo namkha ukuyitjhabalalisa na?”" 
Luke6:10 Wabaqala boke, wathi emuntwini loyo: “Thabulula isandla sakho.” Wasithabulula, isandla sakhe sabuyela esigeni ngokupheleleko." 
Luke6:11 Bathukuthela bebathoma ukubonisana bona bangenzani ngoJesu. 
Luke6:12 Ngelinye lamalanga lawo uJesu wenyukela entabeni wayokuthandaza, wahlala lapho ubusuku boke athandaza kuZimu." 
Luke6:13 Kwathi bona kuse, wabizela abafundi bakhe kuye, wakhetha abalitjhumi nambili, wababiza bona babapostoli:" 
Luke6:14 Bona bekunguSimoni, amthiya bona nguPitrosi, nomfowabo u-Andrisi, uJakopo, uJwanisi, uFlebhe, uBharitholomeyusi," 
Luke6:15 uMatewu, uTomasi, uJakopo umsa ka-Alfiyosi, uSimoni ebekuthiwa mZelothe," 
Luke6:16 uJudasi umsa kaJakopo noJudasi Iskariyodi owathengisa uJesu. 
Luke6:17 Wehla nabo, wajama endaweni ehlelembekileko. Bekunesiqubuthu esikhulu sabafundi bakhe lapho kanye nabantu abanengi abavela kilo loke leJudiya, eJerusalema kanye neligwini leTirosi neTsidoni" 
Luke6:18 ebebezele ukumlalela nokobana abaphilise ezifeni zabo. Labo ebebatshwenywa mimoya emimbi bapholiswa. 
Luke6:19 Boke abantu balinga ukumkghwatha ngombana kuye bekuphuma amandla, abapholisa boke." 
Luke6:20 UJesu waqala abafundi bakhe wathi kibo: “Nibusisiwe nina enidududu ngombana umbuso kaZimu ungewenu. 
Luke6:21 Nibusisiwe nina enilambileko gadesi ngombana nizakusuthiswa! Nibusisiwe nina enililako gadesi ngombana nizakuhleka! 
Luke6:22 “Nibusisiwe lokha abantu nabanihloyako, baninina bebanithuke, balahla amabizwenu bathi mambi ngebanga leNdodana yoMuntu!" 
Luke6:23 “Thabani mhlokho neqayeqe ngetokozo ngombana mkhulu umvuzo wenu ezulwini. Naboyisemkhulu babaphatha ngayo indlela le abaphorofidi. 
Luke6:24 “Kodwana maye kini eninjingileko ngombana senikufumene ukunethezeka kwenu. 
Luke6:25 Maye kini enisuthako gadesi ngombana nizokulamba. Maye kini enihlekako gadesi ngombana nizokulila nirhahlawule. 
Luke6:26 “Maye kini lokha boke abantu bakhuluma kuhle ngani ngombana nabaphorofidi bamala babaphatha ngaleyondlela.” 
Luke6:27 “Kodwana nina eningizwako ngithi kini: Thandani izitha zenu, nenze okulungileko kilabo abanizondako." 
Luke6:28 Busisani abanithukako, nithandazele nalabo abaniphatha kumbi." 
Luke6:29 Lokha umuntu nakuwahla emhlathini, mnikele nomunye umhlathi godu. Lokha omunye nakuthathela imbajakho, mlise athathe nejasakho." 
Luke6:30 Yipha woke umuntu okukhombela okuthileko, begodu nanyana ngubani okuthathela ekungekwakho, ungamtjeli bona akubuyise." 
Luke6:31 Yenza kabanye njengombana nawe ungathanda bona benze kuwe. 
Luke6:32 “Nanithanda kwaphela labo abanithandako, kunisiza ngani lokho na? Ngitjho nezoni zithanda labo abazithandako!" 
Luke6:33 Nanenza okulungileko kilabo abalungileko kini, kunisiza ngani lokho na? Ngitjho nezoni zenza njalo!" 
Luke6:34 Naniboleka kwaphela labo enaziko bona bazakubuyisa, kunisiza ngani lokho na? Ngitjho nezoni ziyabolekana, bese zilindele ukubuyiselwa ngokuzeleko." 
Luke6:35 Nje-ke nina thandani izitha zenu nizenzele okulungileko, zibolekeni ningafuni imbuyiselo. Yeke umvuzo wenu uzakuba mkhulu bese niba madodana wongoPhezulu ngombana yena ulungile kilabo abangathokoziko nabakhohlakeleko." 
Luke6:36 Yibani nesirhawu njengombana noYihlo anesirhawu.” 
Luke6:37 “Ningagwebi ukuze nani ningagwetjwa. Ningalahli ukuze nani ningalahlwa. Colelani ukuze nani nicolelwe. 
Luke6:38 Yiphani, nani nizakuphiwa. Isilinganiso esihle, esigandelweko, sakutluzwa besaphuphuma, sizakuthelwa ezandleni zakho. Ngambala isilinganiso osisebenzisa ukupha abanye, sizakusetjenziselwa ukupha wena.”" 
Luke6:39 Godu wabatjela umfanekiso lo: “Isiphofu singakhe sidose esinye na? Azizukuwela zombili njalo ngemgodini? 
Luke6:40 Umfundi akasingaphezu komfundisakhe, kodwana woke obandulwe ngokuzeleko uzakuba njengomfundisakhe." 
Luke6:41 “Uqalelani itserana engelihlweni lakamfowenu, kodwana ungaboni isigodokazi esingelihlweni lakho na?" 
Luke6:42 Ungatjho njani kumfowenu uthi, ‘Mfowethu, yithi ngikhuphe itserana ngelihlweni lakho,’ khisibe wena ubhalelwa kubona isigodokazi ngelihlweni lakho na? Wena mzenzisi ndina! Thoma ngokukhupha isigodokazi esingelihlweni lakhwelo qangi, yeke uzakukghona ukubona kuhle, ukghone ukukhupha itserana engelihlweni lomfowenu.”" 
Luke6:43 “Akunamuthi omuhle othela iinthelo ezimbi, namkha omumbi othela iinthelo ezihle." 
Luke6:44 Ngilowo nalowo muthi waziwa ngeenthelo zawo. Abantu abakhi amakhiwani esitjhutheni sameva namkha amadiribe emeveni. 
Luke6:45 Umuntu olungileko uveza okulungileko okuvela ngehliziywenakhe, ngokunjalo nomuntu omumbi uveza okumbi okuvela ngehliziywenakhe. Ngambala umlomo ukhuluma ukuphuphuma kwehliziyo.”" 
Luke6:46 “Ningibizelani nithi, ‘Kosi, Kosi,’ khisibe kanti anikwenzi enginitjela khona na?" 
Luke6:47 Ngizanikhombisa bonyana unjani loyo oza kimi bese ulalela amezwami awenze. 
Luke6:48 Unjengendoda eyathi nayakha ikumbayo, yemba kwatjhinga yabese ibeka isisekelo phezu kwedwala. Kwathi nakufika iinkhukhula, zabetha phezu kwayo kodwana azange ziyinyakazise ngombana beyakhiwe kuhle." 
Luke6:49 Kodwana ozwa amezwami angawenzi, unjengendoda eyakha ikumbayo equlwanini ngaphandle kwesisekelo. Kwathi nakufika iinkhukhula zayimadlha, yabhusuka, begodu kwaba kukhulu ukonakala kwayo.”" 
Luke7:1 Kwathi bona uJesu aqede ukukhuluma koke lokhu eendlebeni zabantu, wangena eKapernawumi." 
Luke7:2 Ikhoboka lomphathimabutho weRoma ebelithandeka khulu kuye beligulela ukufa. 
Luke7:3 Umphathimabutho wezwa ngoJesu, nje-ke wathumela abaphathi abathileko bamaJuda kuye bayomkhombela kobana eze azokupholisa ikhoboka lakhe." 
Luke7:4 Bathi nabafika kuJesu bamrabhela khulu kwamambala bathi kuye: “Iyafaneleka indoda le kobana isizwe nguwe 
Luke7:5 ngombana iyasithanda isizwe sekhethu begodu ngiyo esakhele isinagogi.” 
Luke7:6 Yeke uJesu wakhamba nabo. Bekangasikude nekumba lokha umphathimabutho nathumela abangani bakhe kobana bathi kuye: “Kosi, ungazitshwenyi ngombana akukangifaneli bona umuntu onjengawe angangena ngaphasi kwephahla lami." 
Luke7:7 Kungebangelo azange bengizibone ngifanelekile bona ngingeza kuwe ngokwami. Bengithi yewukhulume ilizwi nje kwaphela, isisebenzi sami sizakuphola." 
Luke7:8 Nami ngokwami ngimumuntu ongaphasi kweemphathimandla, nginamajoni angaphasi kwami. Nangithi komunye, ‘Khamba,’ uyakhamba; ngithi komunye, ‘Yizapha,’ eze; ngithi ekhobokeni lami, ‘Yenza lokhu,’ likwenze.”" 
Luke7:9 Kwathi uJesu nezwa lokho, wamrarekela khulu, waphendukela ngesiqubuthwini ebesimlandela wathi: “Ngiyanitjela ngithi azange khengifunyane ukukholwa okungaka ngitjho nakwa-Israyeli!”" 
Luke7:10 Iinthunywa zabuyela emzini womphathi zafumana isisebenzi sipholile. 
Luke7:11 Msinyazana ngemva kwalokho, uJesu waya edorobheni elibizwa bona yiNayini, akhamba nabafundi bakhe nesiqubuthu esikhulu." 
Luke7:12 Kwathi bona afike esangweni ledorobho, wabona umngcwabo uphuma. Umufi loyo bekuyindodana eyodwa tere yomhlolokazi. Nje-ke isiqubuthu esikhulu sedorobhenelo besinaye." 
Luke7:13 Kwathi bona iKosi imbone, yamdabukela kwamambala yathi kuye: “Ungalili!”" 
Luke7:14 Yatjhidela yafese yakghwatha ihlaka, kwathi ebebalithwele bajama. Yathi: “Sokana! Ngithi kuwe, vuka!”" 
Luke7:15 Umufi wavuka wathoma wakhuluma, uJesu wayithatha wayibuyisela kunina." 
Luke7:16 Boke bafikelwa kukwesaba bebadumisa uZimu, bathi: “Umphorofidi omkhulu ufikile hlangana nathi!” Godu bathi: “UZimu uze ukuzokusiza abantu bakhe!”" 
Luke7:17 Iindabezi ngoJesu zarhatjheka eJudiya loke kanye neenarheni ezilibhodileko. 
Luke7:18 Abafundi bakaJwanisi bambikela ngakho koke lokhu. Wabiza babili babo," 
Luke7:19 wabathumela eKosini bona bayokubuza bathi: “Unguye olindelwe bona afike namkha silindele omunye na?” 
Luke7:20 Kwathi bona bafike kuJesu, bathi: “UJwanisi uMbhabhadisi usithume kuwe bona sizokubuza sithi, ‘Unguye olindelwe bona afike namkha silindele omunye na?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Khonokho uJesu wapholisa abanengi ebebanezifo, bagula begodu banemimoya emimbi, wenza nabanengi abaphopheleko babona." 
Luke7:22 Waphendula iinthunywa wathi: “Buyelani emuva niyokubikela uJwanisi ngalokho enikubonileko nenikuzwileko: Iimphofu seziyabona, abarholopheleko sebayakhamba, abanekhwekhwe bapholile, iinthulu ziyezwa, abafileko bayavuswa neendaba ezimnandi zitjhunyayelwa kabadududu." 
Luke7:23 Ubusisiwe umuntu ongakhubekiko ngami!” 
Luke7:24 Ngemva kobana iinthunywa zakaJwanisi sezikhambile, uJesu wathoma ukukhuluma ngoJwanisi esiqubuthwini wathi: “Beniyokubonani lokha naniye erhalawumbeni na? Umhlanga ophephethwa mumoya na?" 
Luke7:25 Kanti beniyokubonani na? Umuntu owembethe izambatho zakanokutjho? Awa, abantu abembatha izambatho ezibizako bebahlale emnonweni bafunyanwa ngeengodlweni!" 
Luke7:26 Emanyeni naniyokubonani na? Kghani umphorofidi? Iye, ngiyanitjela ngithi ongaphezu komphorofidi." 
Luke7:27 UJwanisi nguye okwatlolwa ngaye kwathiwa, “ ‘Ngizakuthumela isithunywa sami ngaphambi kwakho, esizakulungisa indlelakho.’" 
Luke7:28 “Ngiqinisile ngithi phakathi kwalabo ababelethwe ngowesifazana akakho omkhulu kunoJwanisi, kodwana omncancani embusweni kaZimu mkhulu kunaye.”" 
Luke7:29 Boke abantu ngitjho nabathelisi bawezwa amezwi kaJesu, bavuma bonyana indlela kaZimu iliqiniso ngombana bebabhajadiswe nguJwanisi." 
Luke7:30 Kodwana abaFarisi nezazimthetho bawulahla umnqopho kaZimu ngabo ngombana bebangakabhajadiswa nguJwanisi. 
Luke7:31 UJesu wathi: “Alo-ke ngingabafanisa nani abantu banamhlanjesaba na? Kghani bafana nani na? 
Luke7:32 Banjengabantwana abahlezi endaweni yokuthengisela barhuwelelana basithi, “ ‘Sanibethela inghwani, akhange nigide; sanivumela iingoma zesililo, kodwana akhange nilile.’" 
Luke7:33 “UJwanisi uMbhabhadisi wafika angagomi sikwa begodu angaseli wayini, nina nathi, ‘Unedimoni!’" 
Luke7:34 INdodana yoMuntu yafika igoma begodu isela, nina nathi, ‘Nasi-ke isirhiribideli nesidakwa, umngani wabathelisi nezoni!’" 
Luke7:35 Kodwana ukuhlakanipha kuqinisekiswa ngibo boke abantwana bakho.” 
Luke7:36 Nje-ke omunye wabaFarisi wamema uJesu bona azokugoma naye isidlo sakusihlwa. UJesu waya emzini womFarisi, wazigedla etafuleni." 
Luke7:37 Kwathi lokha umfazi obegade aphila ipilo yesono edorobhenelo nalemuka bonyana uJesu gade agoma ngekumbeni yomFarisi, waletha umjekana uzele amakha." 
Luke7:38 Wajama ngemva kwakhe eenyaweni zakhe walila, wathambisa iinyawo zakhe ngeenyembezi. Wazesula ngeenhluthu zakhe, wazincwanga bewazithela ngamakha." 
Luke7:39 Kuthe umFarisi omumemileko nabona lokhu, wazibuza wathi: “Nakube kwamambala umuntu lo mphorofidi, bekazakwazi bona ngubani omkghwathako lo nokobana umhlobo bani womfazi, okutjho bona usisoni!”" 
Luke7:40 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Simoni, ikhona into engifuna ukukutjela yona.” USimoni wathi: “Yewungitjele mfundisi.”" 
Luke7:41 UJesu wathi: “Bekukhona abantu ababili ebebakoloda umbolekisimali. Omunye bekamkoloda abodenariyu abahlanu, omunye amkoloda abodenariyu abamatjhumi amahlanu." 
Luke7:42 Bobabili azange babe nemali yokumbuyisela, nje-ke wasula isikolodo sabo bobabili. Alo-ke ngongiwuphi phakathi kwabo ozomthanda khulu na?”" 
Luke7:43 USimoni wathi: “Ngicabanga bona ngiloyo owesulelwe isikolodo esikhulu.” UJesu wathi: “Ubone kuhle.” 
Luke7:44 Yeke waphendukela ngemfazini wathi kuSimoni: “Uyambona umfazi lo na? Ngize ngakwakho, akhange unginikele ngitjho namanzana wokwesula iinyawo zami, kodwana yena uthambise iinyawo zami ngeenyembezi zakhe bewazesula ngeenhluthu zakhe." 
Luke7:45 Akhange ungamukele ngokungincwanga emhlathini, kodwana umfazi lo, akhange alise ukuncwanga iinyawo zami solo ngingene lapha." 
Luke7:46 Akhange ungizese ngamafutha ehloko, kodwana yena uthele iinyawo zami ngamakha." 
Luke7:47 Yeke ngiyakutjela bona izono zakhe ezinengi zicolelwe ngombana utjengise ithando elikhulu. Kodwana ocolelwe kancani naye uthanda kancani.” 
Luke7:48 UJesu wathi emfazini loyo: “Izono zakho zicolelwe.” 
Luke7:49 Ezinye iinthekeli zathoma ukubuzana zathi: “Ngubani lo, ocolela ngitjho nezono?”" 
Luke7:50 UJesu wathi emfazini loyo: “Ukukholwa kwakho kukusindisile, khamba ngokuthula.”" 
Luke8:1 Ngemva kwalokho uJesu wakhamba wadabula hlangana nedorobho nomuzi atjhumayela iindaba ezimnandi ngombuso kaZimu. Abalitjhumi nambili gade bakhamba naye," 
Luke8:2 kanye nabafazi abathileko ebebapholisiwe emimoyeni emimbi nezifeni: uMariya Magdalina, okwakhutjhwa kuye amadimoni alikhomba;" 
Luke8:3 uJwana umkaKhuza, umphathi womkhaya kaHerode, uSusana kanye nabanye abanengi. Abafazaba ngibo ebegade basiza ngokusekela uJesu nabafundi bakhe ngeendleko zabo." 
Luke8:4 Kwathi nakusabuthene isiqubuthu esikhulu nabantu basiza kuJesu bavela emizini ehlukeneko, wacoca naku umfanekiso:" 
Luke8:5 “Umlimi waphuma wayokutjala imbewakhe. Kwathi nasarhatjha imbewu esimini, enye yawela endleleni, yagadangwa ngeenyawo neenyoni zomkayi zayidobha zayidla." 
Luke8:6 Enye yawela ekhetheni, kwathi nayimilako yabuna ngombana bekomile." 
Luke8:7 Enye yawela hlangana nameva, akhula nayo ayiminyezela yafa." 
Luke8:8 Enye yawela ehlabathini evundileko. Yamila beyathela isivuno, kwaba ngokubuyelelwe kalikhulu kunangaphezu kwalokho ebekutjaliwe.” Wathi naqeda ukutjho lokho warhuwelela wathi: “Loyo oneendlebe akezwe!”" 
Luke8:9 Abafundi bakhe bambuza bona umfanekiso lo utjho ukuthini na. 
Luke8:10 Wabaphendula wathi: “Nina niphiwe ilwazi lokulemuka ifihlo yombuso kaZimu, kodwana kabanengi ngikhuluma ngemifanekiso ukuze kuthi, “ ‘nanyana babona, kodwana bangabonisisi, nanyana basizwa kodwana bangalemuki.’ ”" 
Luke8:11 “Nakhu okutjhiwo mfanekiso: Imbewu lilizwi lakaZimu. 
Luke8:12 Abasendleleni ngilabo abezwako, bese uSathana uyeza afese ahlwithe ilizwi eenhliziyweni zabo ukuze bangakholwa bese basindiswe." 
Luke8:13 Abasekhetheni ngilabo abathi nabezwa ilizwi balamukele ngethabo, kodwana banganayo imirabhu. Bayakholwa kwesikhatjhana, kodwana nakufika isikhathi sokulingwa bawe." 
Luke8:14 Abasemeveni ngilabo abezwako kodwana nabalokhu bakhamba endleleni baminyaniswe matshwenyekwabo, umnotho kanye nobumnandi bepilo, bese bangatheli iinthelo ezivuthiweko." 
Luke8:15 Yeke labo abasequlwanini evundileko ngilabo abathi nabezwa ilizwi balibulunge ngeenhliziyo ezithembekileko nezihle, bese bathela isithelo ngokubekezela.”" 
Luke8:16 “Akakho okhanyisa isibani asifihle ngesitjeni namkha asibeke ngaphasi kombhede. Esikhundleni salokho usibeka elithini laso ukuze labo abangenako bakwazi ukubona umkhanyo. 
Luke8:17 “Ngambala akunanto efihliweko engeze yavezwa emtarini, godu akunanto esitheziweko engeze yaziwa namkha yembulwa." 
Luke8:18 “Yeke yelelani bona nizwa njani ngombana loyo onelitho uzakungezelelelwa, kodwana loyo onganalitho uzakwemukwa ngitjho nokuncancani anakho.”" 
Luke8:19 Unina nabafowabo kaJesu beza bazombona, kodwana babhalelwa kufika kuye ngebanga lesiqubuthu." 
Luke8:20 Omunye wamtjela wathi: “Unyoko nabafowenu bajame ngaphandle bafuna ukukubona.” 
Luke8:21 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Umma nabafowethu ngilabo abezwa ilizwi lakaZimu bebalenze.” 
Luke8:22 Ngelinye ilanga uJesu wakhwela ngemkhunjini nabafundi bakhe, wathi kibo: “Nambani seyamele ngaphetjheya kwelwandle.” Yeke bakhamba-ke." 
Luke8:23 Kuthe basathaya njalo, uJesu walala. Khonokho kwavuka isiwuruwuru esikhulu ngelwandle kangangobana umkhumbi wazala amanzi, boke baba sengozini ekulu." 
Luke8:24 Abafundi baya kuye bamvusa bathi kuye: “Kosi, Kosi! Safa!” UJesu wavuka, wakhalimela isiwuruwuru kanye namaza agubhuzelako, khonapho isiwuruwurweso sathula, kwathi du." 
Luke8:25 Yeke wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Kuphi ukukholwa kwenu na?” Besaba, barareka bebabuzana bodwa bathi: “Kanti ngubani umuntu lo okghona ukukhalimela imimoya namaza kumlalele na?”" 
Luke8:26 Bayamela esifundeni samaGerasene esingaphetjheya kwelwandle ukusuka eGalile. 
Luke8:27 Kuthe bona uJesu ehlele eligwini, wahlangatjezwa yindoda enamadimoni ivela ngedorobheni. Besele kusikhathi eside indoda le isoloko ikhamba bulanzi begodu ingahlali ekhaya, kodwana ihlala emathuneni." 
Luke8:28 Kwathi nayibona uJesu yarhuwelela beyaziphosela eenyaweni zakhe, yamemeza yathi: “Utjhiswa yini ngami wena Jesu, Ndodana kaZimu ongoPhezulu na? Ngiyakurabhela ungangihlukumezi!”" 
Luke8:29 UJesu begade ayale ummoya omumbi kobana uphume endodeni leyo. Esikhathini esinengi idimoneli beliyibamba, kuthi nanyana ibotjhwe ngeenketani izandla neenyawo begodu iqaphelwe, iqhusule iinketanezo, idimoni liyithumele erhalawumbeni." 
Luke8:30 UJesu wayibuza wathi: “Ungubani ibizo lakho na?” Yathi: “NginguLegiyoni.” Yatjho njalo ngombana bekungene amadimoni amanengi kiyo. 
Luke8:31 Amadimoni arabhela uJesu kanenginengi bona angawayali kobana aye ngemgodini otjhingako. 
Luke8:32 Bekukhona umhlambi omkhulu wezavukazana utlabe entatjaneni. Yeke imimoya emimbi yarabhela uJesu bona ayithumele ngezavukazaneni, wayinikela-ke imvumo." 
Luke8:33 Amadimoni lawo aphuma endodeni, angena ngezavukazaneni, umhlambi wagijimela emthewukeleni weligu wadlhumukela ngelwandle, wacwila." 
Luke8:34 Kwathi lokha abelusi bezavukazana nababona okwenzekileko, bagijimela ngedorobheni nemaphandleni bayokubika." 
Luke8:35 Abantu baphuma bayokuqala bona kwenzekeni. Kwathi bona bafike kuJesu, bafumana indoda ekukhutjhwe kiyo amadimoni ihlezi eenyaweni zakaJesu, yembethe begodu ihlokwayo ithatha kuhle; boke bangenwa kukwesaba." 
Luke8:36 Labo ababonako batjela abantu bona ipholiswe njani indoda ebeyinemimoya emimbi leyo. 
Luke8:37 Yeke boke abantu besifunda samaGerasene bakhombela uJesu bona abagadunge ngombana bebangenwe kukwesaba. Yeke uJesu wangena ngemkhunjini wakhamba. 
Luke8:38 Indoda ekwakhutjhwa kiyo amadimoni yarabhela yathi ifuna ukukhamba noJesu. Kodwana uJesu wathi kiyo: 
Luke8:39 “Buyela ekhaya uyobatjela bona kungangani uZimu akwenzele khona.” Yeke indoda leyo yakhamba-ke yangena loke idorobho ikhuluma bona kungangani ekwenzelwe nguJesu. 
Luke8:40 Kwathi bona uJesu abuye, isiqubuthu sabantu samhlangabeza ngombana besimlindele." 
Luke8:41 Khonapho kwafika kuye indoda ebekuthiwa nguJayirosi, imphathi wesinagogi, yafese yazilahlela eenyaweni zakhe. Yamrabhela bona eze emzinayo" 
Luke8:42 ngombana indodakazayo ekukuphela kwayo, umntazanyana weminyaka elitjhumi nambili, beyigulela ukufa. Kwathi asakhamba, isiqubuthu samuminyanisa." 
Luke8:43 Hlangana nesiqubuthweso bekunomfazi ogade aphopha iingazi iminyaka elitjhumi nambili. Begade arhutjhulele koke anakho eenyangeni, kodwana ayikho neyodwa eyakghona ukumelapha." 
Luke8:44 Weza ngemva kwakaJesu wafese wakghwatha umphetho wesambatho sakhe, ukuphopha kwakhe kwaphela khonokho." 
Luke8:45 UJesu wabuza wathi: “Ngubani ongikghwathileko na?” Boke balandula, uPitrosi wamphendula wathi: “Agu, Kosi! Qala bonyana abantu bakuminyezele kangangani.”" 
Luke8:46 Kodwana uJesu wathi: “Kukhona ongikghwathileko ngombana ngizwile lokha amandla naphumako kimi.” 
Luke8:47 Kwathi lokha umfazi lo nabona bonyana angeze akwazi ukuzifihla, weza athuthumela wafese waguqa phambi kwakaJesu. Phambi kwabo boke abantu, wazihlambulula bonyana kubayini amkghwathile nokobana uphole njani khonokho." 
Luke8:48 UJesu wathi kuye: “Ndodakazi, ukukholwa kwakho kukusindisile. Khamba ngokuthula.”" 
Luke8:49 Kwathi uJesu asakhuluma njalo, kwafika othileko avela emzini kaJayirosi, umphathi wesinagogi wathi: “Indodakazakho ihlongakele. Ungasatshwenya umfundisi.”" 
Luke8:50 Kodwana uJesu wakuzwa lokho wathi kuJayirosi: “Ungesabi, kholwa nje kwaphela, izakuphila.”" 
Luke8:51 Kwathi bona afike emzini kaJayirosi, akhange avumele namunye bona angene naye ngaphandle kwakaPitrosi, uJwanisi noJakopo kanye noyise lomntwana nonina." 
Luke8:52 Ngesikhatheso boke ebebalapho begade barhahlawula bamlilela. UJesu wathi kibo: “Lisani ukurhahlawula! Akakahlongakali kodwana ulele.” 
Luke8:53 Bamhleka ngombana gade basazi bona uhlongakele. 
Luke8:54 Kodwana uJesu wambamba ngesandla wathi kuye: “Mntwanami, vuka!”" 
Luke8:55 Ummoyakhe wabuyela kuye, khonapho wasikima. Yeke uJesu wabatjela bona bamuphe okugonywako." 
Luke8:56 Ababelethi bakhe barareka khulu, kodwana uJesu wabayala bona bangatjeli namunye ngokwenzekileko." 
Luke9:1 UJesu wabizela kuye abafundi bakhe abalitjhumi nambili, wabapha amandla negunya lokuqotjha woke amadimoni nokupholisa izifo." 
Luke9:2 Yeke wabathuma bona bayokutjhumayela ngombuso kaZimu bebapholise nabagulako. 
Luke9:3 Wathi kibo: “Ningaphathi ilitho ekukhambeni kwenu, ingaba yintonga, imbada, isikwa, imali nanyana isambatho ngaphezu kwaleso enisembetheko." 
Luke9:4 Nanyana ngiyiphi ikumba eningena kiyo, hlalani lapho bekube kumhlana nikhambako emzini lowo." 
Luke9:5 Nakube abantu balapho abanamukeli, thintithani ithuli eenyaweni zenu naniphuma ngemzinabo, lokho kube bufakazi obujamelene nabo.”" 
Luke9:6 Yeke bakhamba-ke bangena umuzi nomzana, batjhumayela iindaba ezimnandi, bapholisa nabantu kizo zoke iindawo." 
Luke9:7 UHerode umtetrarerhesi wezwa ngakho koke okwenzekako. Warareka khulu ngombana abanye bebasithi uJwanisi uvusiwe kabahlongakeleko. 
Luke9:8 Abanye bebasithi u-Eliya ubonakele, abanye godu bathi omunye wabaphorofidi bekadeni uvukile." 
Luke9:9 Kodwana uHerode wathi: “UJwanisi ngamqunta ihloko. Alo, ngubani-ke engizwa izinto ezinjalo ngaye lo?” Nje-ke walinga ukubonana naye." 
Luke9:10 Abapostoli nababuyako, babikela uJesu ngalokho abakwenzileko. Wabathatha wakhamba nabo bodwa baya edorobheni ebekuthiwa yiBhethe-Sayida." 
Luke9:11 Kodwana isiqubuthu sabantu sezwa ngalokho, samlandela. Wabamukela, wakhuluma nabo ngombuso kaZimu, wapholisa labo ebebafuna ukwelatjhwa." 
Luke9:12 Sekuhlwile ngemva kwedina, abafundi bakhe beza kuye bathi: “Besithi tjhaphulula abantwaba baye ngemizini neendaweni eziseduze bayokufuna okugonywako nendawo yokulala ngombana sisemmangweni lapha.”" 
Luke9:13 Kodwana uJesu wathi kibo: “Bapheni okugonywako.” Bamphendula bathi: “Esinakho sezizikwa ezihlanu neenhlambi ezimbili. Kuzakufuneka bona siyokuthengela soke isiqubuthwesi okugonywako.” 
Luke9:14 Bekunamadoda angaba ziinkulungwana ezihlanu. UJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Bahlaliseni phasi ngeenqhema zamatjhumi amahlanu ngasinye.” 
Luke9:15 Abafundi bakwenza lokho, yeke woke umuntu wahlala phasi." 
Luke9:16 UJesu wathatha izikwa ezihlanu neenhlambi ezimbili waqala ezulwini, wathokoza wazihlephula. Wanikela abafundi bakhe bona baphe isiqubuthu." 
Luke9:17 Boke bagoma basutha, abafundi bakhe babuthelela iintshutshuru bazalisa iinqwebu ezilitjhumi nambili." 
Luke9:18 Kwathi uJesu asathandaza ngasese, abafundi bakhe banaye lapho, wababuza wathi: “Abantu bathi ngingubani na?”" 
Luke9:19 Bamphendula bathi: “Abanye bathi unguJwanisi uMbhabhadisi. Abanye bathi ungu-Eliya, godu abanye bathi ungomunye wabaphorofidi bekadeni ovukileko.”" 
Luke9:20 Wababuza wathi: “Alo-ke, nina nithi ngingubani na?” UPitrosi wamphendula wathi: “UnguKrestu kaZimu.”" 
Luke9:21 UJesu wabadosa ngendlebe bona bangatjeli namunye ngalokho. 
Luke9:22 Godu wathi: “INdodana yoMuntu kumele itlhage ngezinto ezinengi beyilahlwe baphathi, baphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho. Godu kumele ibulawe bese elangeni lesithathu ivuswe ekufeni.”" 
Luke9:23 Yeke wathi kibo boke: “Nakube kukhona ofuna ukungilandela, akazidele, atjathe isiphambano sakhe malanga woke angilandele." 
Luke9:24 Ngambala nanyana ngubani ofuna ukusindisa ipilwakhe, izomlahlekela, kodwana nanyana ngubani olahlekelwa yipilwakhe ngebanga lami, uzabe uyisindisile." 
Luke9:25 Kuzamsiza ngani umuntu ukuzuza iphaseli loke nje, kodwana yena alahleke namkha azilobe yena ngokwakhe na?" 
Luke9:26 Nanyana ngubani oba neenhloni ngami nangamezwami, neNdodana yoMuntu izakuba neenhloni ngaye lokha nayifika ephazimulwenayo, nephazimulweni kaBaba kanye neengilozini ezicwengileko." 
Luke9:27 Kodwana nginitjela iqiniso, abanye benu abajame lapha angekhe bakuzwa ukufa bangakawuboni umbuso kaZimu.”" 
Luke9:28 Emalangeni abunane ngemva kobana uJesu akhulume lokho, wathatha uPitrosi, uJwanisi noJakopo wakhuphukela nabo entabeni wayokuthandaza." 
Luke9:29 Kuthe asathandaza, ubuso bakhe baphenduka nezambatho zakhe zadarha njengokunyazima kombani." 
Luke9:30 Khonapho amadoda amabili, uMosi no-Eliya," 
Luke9:31 babonakala ngephazimulo ekulu, bakhuluma noJesu. Bakhuluma ngokwemuka kwakhe ebekuzakwenzeka eJerusalema." 
Luke9:32 UPitrosi nabangani bakhe gade baphethwe buthongo, kodwana kwathi nabaphaphamako babona iphazimulo kaJesu namadoda amabili agade ajame naye." 
Luke9:33 Kwathi lokha amadoda lawo nasuka kuJesu, uPitrosi wathi kuye: “Kosi, maye kuhle kangangani bona sibe lapha! Yeke asakheni imitlhatlhana emithathu, owodwa ube ngewakho, owodwa ube ngewakaMosi, owodwa ube ngewaka-Eliya.” Bekangazizwa bona uthini." 
Luke9:34 Kuthe asakhuluma njalo kwavela ilifu labagubuzesa, abafundi bethuka nabangena ngelifwini." 
Luke9:35 Kwezwakala ilizwi livela elifwini lithi: “Le yiNdodanami, engiyikhethileko, ilaleleni!”" 
Luke9:36 Ngemva kobana ilizwelo likhulumile, bafunyana uJesu ayedwa. Abafundi bayigcina kibo indaba le, akhange batjele muntu ngalokho abakubonileko." 
Luke9:37 Ngelanga elilandelako nabehla entabeni, bahlangatjezwa siqubuthu esikhulu." 
Luke9:38 Kwarhuwelela indoda hlangana nesiqubuthu yathi: “Mfundisi, ngiyakurabhela! Akhe uqale indodanami ekungiyo kwaphela, umntwana enginaye!" 
Luke9:39 Ummoya uyayibamba, khonapho bese iyarhuwelela, uyidule phasi ibe nesithunthwana, ibhubhudlhe amagwebu ngomlomo. Awuyiphi ithuba kanti nokuyilimaza uyayilimaza." 
Luke9:40 Fese ngarabhela abafundi bakhwaba bona bawuqotjhe, kodwana babhalelwa.”" 
Luke9:41 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nina sizukulwana esingakholwako nesikhohlakeleko! Ngizakuhlala nginani bekube kunini na? Letha indodanakho leyo lapha.” 
Luke9:42 Kuthe umsana aseza kuJesu, idimoni lamdula phasi, waba nesithunthwana. Kodwana uJesu wakhalimela ummoya omumbi lowo, wapholisa umsana bewambuyisela kuyise." 
Luke9:43 Boke abantu barareka ngobukhulu obungaka bakaZimu. Kwathi woke umuntu asararekile ngakho koke okwenziwe nguJesu, wathi ebafundini bakhe:" 
Luke9:44 “Lalelisisani kuhle lokho engizonitjela khona: INdodana yoMuntu izokukhatjhelwa ezandleni zabantu.” 
Luke9:45 Kodwana abafundi akhange bazwisise bona kutjho ukuthini lokhu. Bekufihlekile kibo ukuze bangalemuki, ngalokho bebesaba ukumbuza ngendaba le." 
Luke9:46 Kwaba khona ukuphikisana hlangana nabafundi bakaJesu, bafuna ukwazi bona ngubani ozokuba mkhulu hlangana nabo." 
Luke9:47 UJesu ngokwazi imikhumbulwabo, wathatha umntwana omncani wamjamisa eqadi kwakhe." 
Luke9:48 Wathi kibo: “Nanyana ngubani owamukela umntwana omncani lo ebizweni lami, wamukela mina; naloyo owamukela mina, wamukela loyo ongithumileko. Ngambala loyo ongomncani phakathi kwenu noke nguye ongomkhulu.”" 
Luke9:49 UJwanisi wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, sibone umuntu aqotjha amadimoni ngebizo lakho, salinga ukumkhandela ngombana angasuye omunye wethu.”" 
Luke9:50 Kodwana uJesu wathi: “Ningamkhandeli ngombana loyo ongararani nani ungowenu.” 
Luke9:51 Kwathi lokha isikhathi nasitjhidelako sokobana enyuselwe ezulwini, uJesu wakhumbula ukuya eJerusalema." 
Luke9:52 Wathumela iinthunywa ngaphambi kwakhe bona ziye ngemzini weSamariya ziyomlungisela. 
Luke9:53 Kodwana abantu balapho azange bamamukele ngombana bekasiya eJerusalema. 
Luke9:54 Kwathi lokha abafundi bakhe, uJakopo noJwanisi, nababona lokhu bathi kuye: “Kosi, ufuna bona sibize umlilo ezulwini wehle ubaqothule na?”" 
Luke9:55 Kodwana uJesu waphenduka, wabakhalimela." 
Luke9:56 Yeke uJesu nabafundi bakhe baya emzini omunye. 
Luke9:57 Kwathi basakhamba endleleni, umuntu omunye wathi kuJesu: “Ngizakulandela koke lapha uya khona.”" 
Luke9:58 UJesu wathi kuye: “Iimpungutjha zinemigodi, iinyoni zomkayi zineenhlakana, kodwana iNdodana yoMuntu ayinalapha ingabeka khona ihloko.”" 
Luke9:59 Wathi emuntwini omunye: “Ngilandela!” Kodwana umuntu loyo wathi: “Kosi, angibuyele ekhaya ngiyokubulunga ubaba qangi.”" 
Luke9:60 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Lisani abafileko babulunge abafileko babo. Kodwana wena khamba uyokumemezela umbuso kaZimu.” 
Luke9:61 Omunye godu wathi: “Kosi ngizakulandela, kodwana akhe ngibuyele ekhaya qangi, ngiyokulayelisa.”" 
Luke9:62 UJesu wathi kuye: “Umuntu obeka isandla sakhe eplurhwini, aphele arhedlule emuva, akakafaneli ukusebenzela umbuso kaZimu.”" 
Luke10:1 Ngemva kwalokho iKosi yakhetha abanye abamatjhumi alikhomba nambili, yabathuma ngababili bona bakhambe phambi kwayo baye kiyo yoke imizi nakizo zoke iindawo lapha beyizakuya khona." 
Luke10:2 Yathi kibo: “Isivuno sinengi, kodwana iinsebenzi zimbalwa. Yeke khombelani eKosini yesivuno kobana ithumele iinsebenzi esiminayo." 
Luke10:3 Khambani! Qalani, nginithuma njengeemvana hlangana neempisi." 
Luke10:4 Ningaphathi isikhwama, imbada namkha amapatlagwana begodu ningabingeleli muntu endleleni." 
Luke10:5 Naningena kinanyana ngimuphi umuzi nithome ngokuthi, ‘Ukuthula akube nekhayeli.’" 
Luke10:6 Nakube lapho kunendoda yokuthula, kuzakuhlala phezu kwayo. Nakungasinjalo ukuthula kuzakubuyela kini." 
Luke10:7 Hlalani emzini lowo, nigome benisele nanyana yini abanipha yona ngombana isisebenzi sifanelwa mrholo waso. Ningasoloko nitjhida niphuma kilomuzi ningene kilowaya." 
Luke10:8 Lokha naningena ngemzini bese niyamukeleka, gomani okubekwe phambi kwenu." 
Luke10:9 Pholisani abagulako abalapho, nithi kibo, ‘Umbuso kaZimu ubandamele kini.’" 
Luke10:10 Kodwana naningena ngemzini banganamukeli, yiyani eendledlaneni nithi," 
Luke10:11 ‘Sitjho nethuli lomuzi wenu elikghamathele eenyaweni zethu, silesulela phezu kwenu. Kodwana qinisekani ngalokhu: Umbuso kaZimu sewubandamele!’" 
Luke10:12 Ngiyanitjela ngithi iSodoma izokuba ngcono khulu mhlokho kunomuzi lowo.” 
Luke10:13 “Maye kuwe Rhorazini! Maye kuwe Bhethe-Sayida! Nakube imikarisomraro eyenziwe kini beyenziwe eTirosi neTsidoni, ngabe yaphenduka yembatha iinzilo beyahlala emlotheni." 
Luke10:14 Kodwana kuzokuba ngcono khulu kilo iTirosi neTsidoni kunakini. 
Luke10:15 Wena-ke Kapernawumi, udlumbana bona uzokuphakanyiselwa emkayini na? Uzokwehliselwa phasi endaweni yabafileko.”" 
Luke10:16 “Loyo onilalelako, nami uyangilela; loyo onalako nami uyangala kodwana owala mina, wala loyo ongithumileko.”" 
Luke10:17 Abamatjhumi alikhomba nambili babuya bathabe kwamambala, bathi: “Kosi, awukhuzi namadimoni asilalele lokha siwakhalimelako ngebizo lakho!”" 
Luke10:18 Wabaphendula wathi: “Ngibone uSathana awa njengombani ovela ezulwini. 
Luke10:19 Lalelani-ke, ngininikele amandla wokukhamba phezu kweenyoka nabofezela benehlule woke amandla wesitha. Akunalitho elizanikhubaza." 
Luke10:20 Nokho ningathatjiswa kukobana imimoya emimbi inilalele, kodwana thokoziswani kukobana amabizwenu atloliwe ezulwini.”" 
Luke10:21 Khonapho uJesu waba nethabo lakaMoya oCwengileko wathi: “Ngiyakuthokoza, Baba, mnikazi wezulu nephasi ngombana izintwezi uzifihlile emehlweni wabahlakaniphileko nabanelemuko, kodwana wazembulela abantwana abancani. Iye, Baba ngombana lokhu kwaba yitokozo yakho ehle." 
Luke10:22 “Zoke izinto uBaba uzibeke ezandleni zami. Akakho noyedwa owaziko bona ngubani iNdodana ngaphandle koBaba, begodu akakho noyedwa owaziko bona uBaba ngubani ngaphandle kweNdodana kanye nalabo iNdodana ekhetha ukumbonakalisa kibo.”" 
Luke10:23 Yeke waphendukela ebafundini bakhe wathi kibo ngasese: “Abusisiwe amehlo abona enikubonako," 
Luke10:24 ngombana ngiyanitjela bona banengi abaphorofidi namakhosi ebekafuna ukubona izinto enizibonakwezi, kodwana azange azibone bekafisa nokuzwa enikuzwako, kodwana azange akuzwe.”" 
Luke10:25 Qalani, kwasikima isazimthetho kobana simzizinye, sathi: “Mfundisi, ngingenza njani ukufumana ipilo engapheliko na?”" 
Luke10:26 UJesu wasiphendula wathi: “Kutlolweni emthethweni na? Uwufunda njani?” 
Luke10:27 Saphendula sathi: “Thanda uSomnini uZimakho ngayo yoke ihliziywakho nangomphefumulwakho woke, ngawo woke amandlakho nangomkhumbulwakho woke begodu uthande umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena.”" 
Luke10:28 UJesu wathi kiso: “Uphendule kuhle, yenza lokho, uzakuphila.”" 
Luke10:29 Kodwana safuna ukuzibeka ngebuhleni sathi kuJesu: “Alo, ngubani umakhelwanami na?”" 
Luke10:30 UJesu wasiphendula wathi: “Kwaba nomuntu ogade asuka eJerusalema asiya eJerikho, wawela ezandleni zabadlelezeli. Bamhlubulisa izambatho zakhe, bambetha, bamtjhiya lapho afe isigiyani." 
Luke10:31 Kwenzeka bona umphristi akhambe ngendlela leyo, kwathi lokha nabona umuntu loyo, wamdlula, agegeda eqadi kwakhe." 
Luke10:32 Ngokunjalo nomLevi wathi nafika lapho, wambona, wamgegeda." 
Luke10:33 Kodwana kwathi umSamariya asakhamba, wafika lapha bekunomuntu loyo, yeke kwathi nambonako, wamrhawukela." 
Luke10:34 Waya kuye, wafese wambopha amanceba, wathela amafutha we-oliva newayini emancebeni. Wamkhweza kudumbanakhe, wamusa ngekumbeni yeenkhambi wamnakekela." 
Luke10:35 Elangeni elilandelako wakhupha iimpaparwana zesiliva ezimbili wanikela umninikumba, wathi kuye: ‘Yewumhlenge, kuzakuthi nangibuyako, ngikukhokhele zoke iindleko ezinye obe nazo ngaye.’ ”" 
Luke10:36 “Alo-ke, ngimuphi kilaba abathathu ocabanga bona ube ngumakhelwana emuntwini owele ezandleni zabadlelezeli na?”" 
Luke10:37 Isazimthetho sathi: “Ngiloyo omrhawukeleko.” UJesu wathi kiso: “Arha-ke! Khamba nawe uyokwenza njalo.” 
Luke10:38 UJesu nabafundi bakhe bakhamba, bafika emzini lapha bekunowesifazana ebekuthiwa nguMarta, wamamukela." 
Luke10:39 Bekanodadwabo ebekuthiwa nguMariya, owahlala eenyaweni zeKosi, walalela lokha nayifundisako." 
Luke10:40 Kodwana uMarta wakhathazeka ngawo woke umsebenzi ebekumele awenze, yeke wathi kuJesu: “Kosi, awukhathazeki bona udadwethu ungiliselele ngomsebenzi omkhulu kangaka na? Mtjele bona azongisiza!”" 
Luke10:41 IKosi yamphendula yathi: “Marta, Marta-ke! Ukhathazeka bewuwurubajeke ngezinto ezinengi," 
Luke10:42 kodwana kunye kwaphela okufunekako: UMariya ukhethe okungcono, yeke angekhe emukwa khona.”" 
Luke11:1 Ngelinye ilanga uJesu bekathandaza endaweni ethileko. Kwathi bona aqede, omunye wabafundi bakhe wathi kuye: “Kosi, yewusifundise ukuthandaza njengombana noJwanisi afundise abafundi bakhe.”" 
Luke11:2 Wathi kibo: “Nanithandazako, yithini: “ ‘Baba, ibizo lakho alicwengiswe, umbuswakho awufike." 
Luke11:3 Yewusiphe ngamalanga isikwa sethu sangemihla. 
Luke11:4 Usicolele izono zethu ngombana nathi siyabacolela boke abasonako. Ungasirholeli ekulingweni.’ ” 
Luke11:5 Yeke wathi kibo: “Akhe sithi omunye wenu unomngani, bese uya kuye phakathi kobusuku afese athi, ‘Mngani, yewungiboleke izikwa ezintathu" 
Luke11:6 ngombana ngifikelwe mnganami osekukhambeni, yeke anginanto engingamphakela yona!’" 
Luke11:7 Yena-ke aphendule angaphakathi athi kuwe, ‘Yewungisusele mina! Ibadi lihluthulelwe, begodu mina nabantwabami sesilele. Angeze ngavuka ngazokuphana nawe ilitho.’" 
Luke11:8 Ngiyanitjela bona nanyana angeze avuka amuphe isikwa ngombana amnganakhe, kodwana ngebanga lokuphikelela kwakhe, uzakuvuka amuphe isikwa esinengi ngendlela afuna ngayo." 
Luke11:9 “Yeke ngithi kini: Khombelani nizakuphiwa, funani nizakufumana, kokodani nizakuvulelwa" 
Luke11:10 ngombana loyo okhombelako uzakuphiwa, nofunako uzakufumana, nokokodako uzakuvulelwa." 
Luke11:11 Ngubani kini bobaba ongathi lokha indodanakhe nayikhombela ihlambi ayiphe inyoka; 
Luke11:12 namkha ayiphe ufezela, lokha ikhombela iqanda na?" 
Luke11:13 Nakube nina-ke, ngitjho nanyana nibambi kangaka nje, niyakwazi ukupha abantwana benu izipho ezihle, kangangani-ke uYihlo osezulwini, uzakuphana ngoMoya oCwengileko kilabo abamkhombelako.”" 
Luke11:14 UJesu bekaqotjha idimoni elibanga ubumumu. Kwathi bona idimonelo liphume, umuntu obekasimumu wakhuluma. Isiqubuthu sarareka." 
Luke11:15 Kodwana abanye babo bathi: “Uqotjha amadimoni ngoBhelzabhulu ikosana yamadimoni.” 
Luke11:16 Abanye bamlinga ngokumkhombela isibonakaliso esivela ezulwini. 
Luke11:17 Kodwana uJesu wakwazi ebebakucabanga, yeke wathi kibo: “Nanyana ngiwuphi umbuso owahlukene phakathi uzakutjhabalala, nomndeni owahlukene phakathi uzakuwa." 
Luke11:18 Nakube uSathana uhlukene ayedwa, umbuswakhe ungadzimelela njani na? Ngitjho lokhu ngombana nithi ngiqotjha amadimoni ngoBhelzabhulu." 
Luke11:19 Yeke nakube ngiqotjha amadimoni ngoBhelzabhulu, abalandeli benu bawaqotjha ngebizo lakabani na? Ngaleyondlela-ke bazakuba bagwebi benu." 
Luke11:20 Kodwana nakube ngiqotjha amadimoni ngomuno kaZimu, khona-ke kutjho bona umbuso kaZimu sewufikile kini." 
Luke11:21 “Lokha indoda enamandla nehlomileko nayiqaphe umuzayo, yoke ipahlayo iphephile." 
Luke11:22 Kodwana lokha onamandla kunayo nayisahlelako, ayihlule, uthumba zoke iinhlabano zayo ebigade ithembele kizo bese waba ipango yayo." 
Luke11:23 “Loyo ongasingakimi ujamelene nami; naloyo ongabutheleli kanye nami, uyahlikiliza.”" 
Luke11:24 “Lokha ummoya omumbi nawuphuma ngemuntwini, ukhamba eendaweni ezomileko ufunana nendawo yokuphumula, kuthi nawungayifumaniko uzitjele uthi, ‘Yeke ngizakubuyela ngekumbenami.’" 
Luke11:25 Nawufikako, ufumana ikumba leyo ihlanzekile iyihle," 
Luke11:26 ukhambe-ke uyokubutha eminye imimoya elikhomba nekhohlakele khulu kunawo, bese ingene ihlale ngapho. Ubujamo bomuntu loyo bukhambelela khulu kunekuthomeni.”" 
Luke11:27 Kwathi uJesu asakhuluma lokhu, kwarhuwelela umfazi hlangana nesiqubuthu wathi: “Sibusisiwe isibeletho esakuthwalako kanye namabele akumunyisako!”" 
Luke11:28 Waphendula wathi: “Kuhlekuhle ababusisekileko ngilabo abezwa ilizwi lakaZimu bebalilalele!” 
Luke11:29 Kwathi isiqubuthu nasilokhu sanda, uJesu wathi: “Lesi sizukulwana esikhohlakeleko. Sikhombela isibonakaliso kodwana asizukuphiwa ilitho ngaphandle kwesibonakaliso sakaJona." 
Luke11:30 Njengombana umphorofidi uJona waba sibonakaliso ebantwini beNiniva, ngokunjalo iNdodana yoMuntu izakuba sibonakaliso esizukulwanenesi." 
Luke11:31 Indlovukazi yesewula izakuphakama ekugwetjweni ijamelane nesizukulwanesi isilahle ngecala ngombana yavela epelazwe kobana izokulalela ukuhlakanipha kwakaSolomoni, yeke gadesi okukhulu kunoSolomoni kulapha." 
Luke11:32 Amadoda weNiniva azakusikima ngelanga lokugwetjwa ajamelane nesizukulwanesi asilahle ngecala ngombana saphenduka nakutjhumayela uJona kodwana kwanjesi omkhulu kunoJona ulapha.” 
Luke11:33 “Akakho okhanyisa isibani asibeke ekusithekeni namkha ngaphasi kwesitja. Kunalokho usibeka ngesitjeni saso ukuze labo abangenako bakwazi ukubona umkhanyo. 
Luke11:34 Ilihlo lakho lisibani somzimbakho. Amehlwakho nalungileko, umzimbakho woke uyakhanya, kodwana nakube akakalungi, umzimbakho woke usebumnyameni." 
Luke11:35 Qiniseka-ke bonyana umkhanyo ongaphakathi kwakho awubi bumnyama. 
Luke11:36 Yeke umzimbakho woke nawunokukhanya, kungekho indawana yawo emnyama, uzakukhanya woke, lokha umkhanyo wesibani nawukukhanyiselako.”" 
Luke11:37 Kuthe bona uJesu aqede ukukhuluma, umFarisi wamumema bona ayokugoma naye kwakhe. Yeke waya-ke wafese wazigedla etafuleni." 
Luke11:38 Kodwana umFarisi nabona bonyana uJesu akhange ahlambe qangi ngaphambi kobana agome, warareka." 
Luke11:39 Yeke iKosi yathi kuye: “Iye, nina baFarisi nihlanza iinkapho nezitja zenu ngaphandle, kodwana ngaphakathi nizele ubumarhamaru nokukhohlakala." 
Luke11:40 Ndlhayela ndina! Owadala ilingaphandle akusuye owadala nelingaphakathi na? 
Luke11:41 Yeke nikelani abatlhagileko okungaphakathi kweenkapho nezitja begodu koke kuzakuba ngokuhlambulukileko kini. 
Luke11:42 “Maye kini baFarisi! Ninikela uZimu kwetjhumi komnono wenu, umkhiqizo kanye nayo yoke imihlobo yemirorho yeemvande zenu, kodwana aniyeleli ukulunga nokuthanda uZimu. Benifanele nenze koke lokho, kodwana ningakulisi nokhunye." 
Luke11:43 “Maye kini baFarisi! Nithanda iinhlalo eziphambili ngemasinagogini nokubingelelwa eendaweni okuthengiswa kizo. 
Luke11:44 Maye kini! Nifana namathuna angakabekiswa, abantu abakhamba phezu kwawo bangawaboni.”" 
Luke11:45 Omunye wezazimthetho wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, nawutjho njalo uyasethuka!”" 
Luke11:46 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Maye kini nina zazimthetho! Nithwesa abantu imithwalo abangekhe bayikghone, kuthi nina ngokwenu nihlulwe kuphakamisa ngitjho nomnwana wenu kobana nibasize." 
Luke11:47 Maye kini! Nakhela abaphorofidi amathuna khisibe boyihlomkhulu abababulalako. 
Luke11:48 Nani ngokwenu niyakuvuma lokho okwenziwa boyihlomkhulu; babulala abaphorofidi, nina nakha amathunabo." 
Luke11:49 Ngebanga lalokho-ke, uZimu ngokuhlakanipha kwakhe wathi, ‘Ngizabathumela abaphorofidi nabapostoli, abanye bazababulala, abanye babaphathe kumbi.’" 
Luke11:50 Ngalokho-ke isizukulwanesi sizaziphendulela ngeengazi zabo boke abaphorofidi ezathululwa ukusuka ekubunjweni kwephaseli. 
Luke11:51 Iye, ukuthoma ngeengazi zaka-Abela ukufikela kezakaZakariya, owabulawa hlangana ne-aldari nethempeli. Ngambala ngiyanitjela bona isizukulwanesi sizoziphendulela ngakho koke lokho." 
Luke11:52 “Maye kini zazimthetho! Nisuse isihluthulelo somnyango welwazi. Nani ngokwenu azange ningene, navimbela nabagade basithi bayangena.”" 
Luke11:53 Kuthe uJesu nasuka lapho, abaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho bajamelana naye kabuhlungu bamvimbezela ngemibuzo," 
Luke11:54 bamquphile kobana bambambe ngokuthileko angahle akutjho. 
Luke12:1 Ngesikhatheso iinkulungwana ngeenkulungwana zabantu bezidindelana, kangangombana bebagadangelana, uJesu wathoma ukukhuluma qangi ebafundini bakhe wathi: “Yelelani ingumelo yabaFarisi ekukuzenzisa." 
Luke12:2 Akukho okugutjuziweko okungeze kwagutjululwa namkha okufihliweko okungeze kwaziwa. 
Luke12:3 Nje-ke koke enikukhulumela ebumnyameni kuzakuzwakala ekukhanyeni, nenikuhlebako ningemalawini angaphakathi kuzakumenyezelwa ephahleni.”" 
Luke12:4 “Kodwana ngiyanitjela nhlobo zami ngithi: Ningabesabi labo ababulala umzimba ngemva kwalokho bangasakghona ukwenza ilitho. 
Luke12:5 Yeke ngizanitjengisa bona nesabe bani: Yesabani loyo othi ngemva kokubulala umzimba abe namandla wokuniphosela ngesirhogweni. Iye, ngiyanitjela ngithi mesabeni loyo!" 
Luke12:6 “Iinyoni ezihlanu azithengiswa ngeempaparwana ezimbili na? Kodwana akukho neyodwa yazo uZimu ayikhohlwako. 
Luke12:7 Ngambala, ngitjho nazo iinhluthu zeenhloko zenwezo zibalwe zoke. Ningesabi ngombana nina niqakatheke khulu kuneenyoni ezinengi.”" 
Luke12:8 “Ngiyanitjela bona nanyana ngubani ongivuma phambi kwabantu, iNdodana yoMuntu nayo izamvuma phambi kweengilozi zakaZimu." 
Luke12:9 Kodwana loyo ongiphika phambi kwabantu, naye uzakuphikwa phambi kweengilozi zakaZimu." 
Luke12:10 “Woke umuntu okhuluma ngokujamelana neNdodana yoMuntu uzakucolelwa, kodwana nanyana ngubani ohlambalaza uMoya oCwengileko, angekhe acolelwa." 
Luke12:11 “Lokha nanilethwa ngemasinagogini, phambi kwabaphathi nababusi, ningatshwenyeki bona nizazivikela njani namkha nizakuthini," 
Luke12:12 ngombana uMoya oCwengileko uzanifundisa ngesikhatheso bona nithini.” 
Luke12:13 Omunye esiqubuthwini wathi kuJesu: “Mfundisi, tjela umfowethu bona ahlukaniselane nami ilifa.”" 
Luke12:14 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Ndoda, ngubani ongibeke ukuba mgwebi namkha umabi phakathi kwenu na?”" 
Luke12:15 Godu uJesu wakhuluma kibo boke wathi: “Yelelani! Hlalani niqaphele boke ubumarhamaru ngombana ipilo yomuntu ayikabunjwa ngobunengi bepahlakhe.” 
Luke12:16 Yeke wabatjela umfanekiso lo: “Iqulwani yomuntu othileko nosikhumkani, yaba nesithelo esihle." 
Luke12:17 Wadlumbana wathi, ‘Ngizokwenza njani ngombana nakhu anginandawo yokubuthelelela isivuno sami nje?’" 
Luke12:18 Yeke wathi, ‘Nakhu engizokwenza: Ngizakugiriza iinlulu zami, ngakhe ezikulu lapha ngizakubeka khona woke amabele nepahlami." 
Luke12:19 Alo-ke ngizakuthi emphefumulwenami: Mphefumulo, unepahla enengi engathatha iminyaka. Zigedle, ugome bewusele uthokoze!’" 
Luke12:20 Kodwana uZimu wathi kuye, ‘Wena sidlhayela ndina! Ebusukwinobu umphefumulwakho uzokubizwa, alo-ke ngubani ozakufumana zoke izintwezi ozibekele zona na?’ ”" 
Luke12:21 “Kuzakuba njalo-ke nakinanyana ngubani ozibekela izinto kodwana abe angakanothi ngehlangothini laka Zimu.” 
Luke12:22 UJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Yeke-ke ngiyanitjela bona ningatshwenyeki ngepilwenu ukobana nizokugomani namkha nitshwenyeke ngemizimbeni ukobana nizokwembathani. 
Luke12:23 Ipilo iqakatheke ukwedlula ukugoma nomzimba uqakatheke ukwedlula izambatho. 
Luke12:24 Qalani amagubulu: Akalimi namkha avune, akanazo nezindlu zamagugu namkha iinlulu, khonapho uZimu uyawondla. Nina-ke niqakatheke khulu kuneenyon!" 
Luke12:25 Ngubani phakathi kwenu ngokutshwenyeka ongandisa ipilwakhe nge-awara linye na? 
Luke12:26 Njengombana ningakghoni ukwenza okuncanokhu nje, alo nitshwenyekelani ngokunengi na?" 
Luke12:27 Qalani bona amakhwa wenarha akhula njani. Akasebenzi namkha aluke intambo, kodwana ngiyanitjela bona ngitjho nekosi uSolomoni kibo boke ubuphaziphazi bakhe azange embathe njengokhunye kwalokhu." 
Luke12:28 Nakube uZimu wembesa utjani benarha, obukhona namhlanjesi kuthi kusasa bufakwe emlilweni, angabhalelwa yini-ke ukwembesa nina na? Maye nina eninokukholwa okuncani!" 
Luke12:29 “Yeke ningabeki iinhliziyo zenu ekuthini nizagomani namkha niseleni, ningatshwenyeki ngalokho" 
Luke12:30 ngombana abantu bephaseli ngibo abagijimela ezintweni ezinjalo. UYihlo uyazi bona niyazidinga izintwezo. 
Luke12:31 Kodwana funani umbuswakhe, yeke koke lokhu nakho nizakuphiwa khona.”" 
Luke12:32 “Ningesabi nina mhlanjana omncani ngombana uYihlo kwamthokozisa khulu ukunipha umbuso. 
Luke12:33 Thengisani ipahlenu bese nabela abadududu, ngokwenza njalo nizabe nizibonelela ngeenkhwanyana zemali ezingekhe zoma, okumnono wezulwini ongekhe waphela. Iye, lapha kungekhe kwangena khona isela nomvunya." 
Luke12:34 Ngambala lapha umnonwakho ukhona, ilapho nehliziywakho." 
Luke12:35 “Yembathani nilungele umsebenzi, neembani zenu zihlale zivutha," 
Luke12:36 njengamadoda alindele ikosawo kobana ibuye emnyanyeni womtjhado ukuze kuthi nayifikako, ikokoda, ayivulele umnyango msinyazana." 
Luke12:37 Kuzakuba kuhle eencekwinezo ekuzakuthi ikosazo nayifikako izifunyane ziqaphile. Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona izakwembatha izambatho zokusebenza, izihlalise etafuleni bese iyazitenda." 
Luke12:38 Kuzakuba kuhle eencekwinezo, ikosazo ezifumana zizilungiselele, ngitjho nanyana ifika ngomlindo wesibili namkha wesithathu wobusuku." 
Luke12:39 Kodwana lemukani lokhu: Nakube umninikhaya bekasazi bonyana isela lizakuza ngasiphi isikhathi, ubangekhe avuma bonyana ikhaya lakhe lifahlwe." 
Luke12:40 Nani ngokunjalo kumele nihlale nilungile ngombana iNdodana yoMuntu izakufika ngesikhathi eningakayilindeli ngaso.” 
Luke12:41 UPitrosi wathi: “Kosi, utjela thina sodwa umfanekiso lo, namkha utjela woke umuntu na?”" 
Luke12:42 IKosi yaphendula yathi: “Alo-ke ngubani umphathi othembekileko nohlakaniphileko na? Ngiloyo ikosi ezambeka bona aqale iinceku zayo kobana aziphe ukugoma kwazo ngesikhathi esifaneleko na? 
Luke12:43 Kuzakuba kuhle encwekini leyo ikosi ezayifunyana isenza njalo nayibuyako. 
Luke12:44 Kwamambala ngiyanitjela bona ikosi izakwenza inceku leyo ilawule yoke ipahla yayo. 
Luke12:45 Kodwana akhe sithi inceku leyo izitjela ithi, ‘Ikosami ithatha isikhathi eside ukubuya’, bese ithome ukubetha iinceku neencekukazi ezinye, igome, isele beyidakwe." 
Luke12:46 Ikosi yenceku leyo izakubuya ngelanga inceku leyo ingakayilindeli nangesikhathi engakatjheji ngaso. Izayiqunta iinquqwana iyilahlele endaweni yabangakholwako. 
Luke12:47 “Inceku ethi iyazi kuhle intando yekosayo, kodwana ingazimiseli bona iyenze namkha ingeze yenza ekufunwa yikosayo, izakubethwa imivuvu eminengi." 
Luke12:48 Kodwana inceku engaziko bese yenza izinto ezibanga ukuhlunguphazwa, izakubethwa imivimbo embalwa. Woke ophiwe okunengi, kuzakuthathwa okunengi kuye; kuthi ophathiswe okunengi, kubizwe kuye okunengi ngaphezu kwalokho.”" 
Luke12:49 “Ngizele ukuzokuphosela umlilo ephasini begodu ngifisa kangangani ukube thana sele uvutha! 
Luke12:50 Kodwana nginombhabhadiso ekumele ngibhajadiswe ngawo; begodu ngizasoloko ngikhathazekile bewufike! 
Luke12:51 Nidlumbana bona ngilethe ukuthula ephasinapha na? Awa, ngiyanitjela bona ngilethe ukwahlukana." 
Luke12:52 Ukusukela gadesi bazakuba bahlanu emndenini munye abalwa babodwa, abathathu bazakulwa nababili, nababili balwe nabathathu." 
Luke12:53 Iye bazakuhlukana, ubaba ajamelane nendodana nendodana ijamelane nobaba, umma ajamelane nendodakazi nendodakazi ijamelane nomma, unosokana ajamelane nomalukazana nomalukazana ajamelane nonosokana.”" 
Luke12:54 UJesu wathi esiqubuthwini: “Nanibona ilifu livela ngetjingalanga, khonapho nithi, ‘Lizokuna’, kwamambala line." 
Luke12:55 Lokha ummoya wesewula nawuvunguzako nithi, ‘Kuzokutjhisa’, kwamambala kube njalo." 
Luke12:56 Bazenzisi ndina! Nanikghona ukuhlathulula ubujamo bephasi nomkayi, kwenziwa yini-ke ningakghoni ukuhlathulula isikhathi sagadesi na?”" 
Luke12:57 “Kubayini ningaqunti nina ngokwenu bona ngikuphi okulungileko na? 
Luke12:58 Nawuya nomjamelanakho ebandla, linga ngamandla ukubuyisana naye nisesendleleni, nakungasinjalo uzakudosela kumgwebi bese umgwebi akunikelele ngesikhulu, isikhulu sikuphosele ngesikhungweni." 
Luke12:59 Ngiyakutjela bona awuzukuphuma ngapho kufikela ukhokhe upenyanakho wokugcina.” 
Luke13:1 Ngesikhatheso bekukhona abantu abatjela uJesu ngamaGalile, uPilatu avanganisa iingazi zabo nemihlabelwabo." 
Luke13:2 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Nidlumbana bona amaGalile la bekazizoni ezikulu ukudlula boke abantu beGalile ngombana bahlunguphazwa ngalendlela na? 
Luke13:3 Ngithi kini, awa! Kodwana naningaphendukiko, nani nizokubhubha noke nje." 
Luke13:4 Nithini ngabalitjhumi nabunane abahlongakala lokha umtlomogo weSilowamu nawuwela phezu kwabo na? Nidlumbana bona bebanomlandu khulu ukwedlula boke abanye abahlala eJerusalema na? 
Luke13:5 Ngithi kini, awa! Kodwana naningaphendukiko, nani nizokubhubha noke nje.”" 
Luke13:6 Yeke wabatjela umfanekiso lo: “Umuntu othileko gade anomuthi wamakhiwani obewutjalwe esidiribeni sakhe. Waya kiwo wayokuqala iinthelo zawo, kodwana azange afumane ilitho." 
Luke13:7 Yeke wathi endodeni ebeyinakekela isidiribe, ‘Sele kuminyaka emithathu kwanjesi ngiseze ngiza lapha ngizokufuna iinthelo emthini womkhiwani lo, kodwana azange ngifunyane ilitho. Ugawule! Sizawuliselani usebenzise iqulwani ngelize na?’" 
Luke13:8 Indoda leyo yathi, ‘Kosami, ulise umnyaka munye kwaphela. Ngizakwemba ngemaqadi kwawo ngithele umsuqwa." 
Luke13:9 Nakube uyathela umnyaka ozako lo, kulungile, kodwana nakube awutheli, khona-ke ngizawugawula.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 UJesu gade afundisa ngakelinye lamasinagogi ngeSabatha. 
Luke13:11 Khonapho bekunomfazi ogade anommoya ombangela ukugula, sele agule iminyaka elitjhumi nobunane. Begade akhamba agugubele angakghoni ukuthabuluka nakancani." 
Luke13:12 Kwathi bona uJesu ambone, wambizela kuye wathi: “Mma, utjhatjhululiwe ekuguleni kwakho!”" 
Luke13:13 Wambeka izandla, khonokho wathabuluka wadumisa uZimu." 
Luke13:14 Umphathi wesinagogi wasilingeka ngombana uJesu bekapholise ngeSabatha, yeke wathi ebantwini: “Kukhona amalanga amathandathu ekufanele sisebenze ngawo. Yeke yizani nizokupholiswa emalangeni lawo, ingasi ngeSabatha!”" 
Luke13:15 IKosi yamphendula yathi: “Nina bazenzisi ndina! Akwenzeki bona omunye nomunye wenu atjhaphulule ikomakhe namkha udumbanakhe ngesibayeni amdose ayomseza amanzi na? 
Luke13:16 Alo bekungakameli bona umma lo, oyindodakazi ka-Abrahamu, uSathana asoloko ambopha iminyaka elitjhumi nabunane yoke swana, atjhatjhululwe kilokho okumbophileko ngeSabatha na?”" 
Luke13:17 Kwathi natjho njalo boke abajamelani bakhe bahlaziseka, kodwana abantu bebathabile ngakho koke okuhle ebegade akwenza." 
Luke13:18 Nje-ke uJesu wababuza wathi: “Umbuso kaZimu ufana nani na? Ngingawufanisa nani na? 
Luke13:19 Unjengembewu yemastadi umuntu ayithatha ayitjale esivandeni. Yakhula beyaba mumuthi, iinyoni zomkayi zakhela eempandeni zawo.”" 
Luke13:20 UJesu godu wabuza wathi: “Umbuso kaZimu ngingawufanisa nani na? 
Luke13:21 Unjengesibiliso umfazi asithatha asihlanganise neflowuru enengi kufikela lapha kuba yihlama khona.” 
Luke13:22 Yeke uJesu wadlula hlangana nemizi nemizana, wafundisa asendleleni yokuya eJerusalema." 
Luke13:23 Umuntu othileko wambuza wathi: “Kosi, kuzokusindiswa abantu abalidlanzana na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi:" 
Luke13:24 “Lingani ngamandlenu woke bona ningene ngesango elincani ngombana ngiyanitjela bona abanengi bazokulinga ukungena kodwana abazokukghona. 
Luke13:25 Nasele umninimuzi asikimile wavala ibadi, nizakujama ngaphandle nikokode benirabhele nithi, ‘Kosi, yewusivulele.’ Kodwana uzakuphendula athi, ‘Anginazi, angazi nokobana nibuyaphi!’" 
Luke13:26 Yeke nizakuphendula nithi, ‘Sagoma besasela nawe; wafundisa neendledlaneni zekhethu!’" 
Luke13:27 “Kodwana uzakuphendula athi, ‘Anginazi, abengazi nokobana nibuyaphi. Sukani kimapha noke nina benzi bokumbi!’" 
Luke13:28 Kuzakuba khona ukulila nokugedla kwamazinyo lokha nanibona u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo kanye nabo boke abaphorofidi embusweni kaZimu, kodwana nina nizakulahlelwa ngaphandle." 
Luke13:29 Abantu bazakuvela epumalanga netjingalanga, etlhagwini nesewula, bahlale eendaweni ababekelwe zona emnyanyeni embusweni kaZimu." 
Luke13:30 Ngambala kunalabo abangebokugcina abazakuba ngebokuthoma, nebokuthoma abazakuba ngebokugcina.”" 
Luke13:31 Ngesikhatheso abaFarisi abathileko beza kuJesu bathi kuye: “Suka endaweni le uye kenye ngombana uHerode ufuna ukukubulala.” 
Luke13:32 Waphendula wathi: “Khambani niyokutjela ipungutjha leyo bona ngizokuqotjha amadimoni ngipholise nabagulako namhlanje nakusasa bese kuthi ngelanga lesithathu ngifikelele emnqophweni wami. 
Luke13:33 Kokwakho ngifanele ukukhamba namhlanjesi, kusasa, nangomuso ngombana ngambala akunamphorofidi ongahlongakalela ngaphandle kweJerusalema!" 
Luke13:34 “Maye Jerusalema, Jerusalema! Wena obulala abaphorofidi bewukhande ngamatje labo abathunyelwe kuwe. Kukangaki ngiseze ngikhanukela ukubuthelela abantwabakho ndawonye njengesikhukhukazi sibuthelela amadzinyanaso ngaphasi kwamaphikwaso! Kodwana azange uthande." 
Luke13:35 Qalani, ikumbenu itjhiywe kini ingasenamuntu. Ngiyanitjela bona asoze benisangibona kufikela lapha nithi khona, ‘Ubusisiwe loyo oza ebizweni lakaSomnini.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Ngelinye lamaSabatha lokha uJesu nayokugoma ngekumbeni yomFarisi odumileko, begade atjhejwe ngelihlo elibukhali." 
Luke14:2 Lapho ngaphambi kwakhe bekunendoda ebegade iphethwe sisifo samanzi. 
Luke14:3 UJesu wabuza abaFarisi nezazimthetho wathi: “Kumthetho ukupholisa ngeSabatha namkha njani na?” 
Luke14:4 Kodwana bazithulela. Yeke uJesu wathatha indoda leyo, wayipholisa, wathi ikhambe." 
Luke14:5 Yeke wababuza wathi: “Nakube omunye wenu unomntwana namkha ikomo ewele ngemgodini ngeSabatha, angekhe ayoyikhupha khonokho na?”" 
Luke14:6 Kodwana boke batlhoga umlomo. 
Luke14:7 Kwathi uJesu nabona bonyana abamenywa bazikhethela iindawo ezihloniphekileko etafuleni, wabatjela umfanekiso lo:" 
Luke14:8 “Lokha omunye nakumemela emtjhadweni, ungahlali endaweni ehloniphekileko ngombana kungenzeka bona kukhona omenyiweko oqakatheke khulu kunawe." 
Luke14:9 Kuthi kusesenjalo onimemileko, eze afese athi kuwe, ‘Akhe utjhidele umuntu lo esihlalweneso,’ yeke uzakuhlaziseka ukhambe uyokuhlala endaweni enyazekako." 
Luke14:10 Kodwana nawumenyiweko, hlala endaweni enyazekako khona kuzakuthi okumemileko nezako, athi kuwe, ‘Mngani, yewenyukele endaweni engcono.’ Ngaleyondlela uzakuhlonitjhwa phakathi kwabo boke abamenyiweko." 
Luke14:11 Ngambala woke oziphakamisako uzakuthotjiswa naloyo ozithobako uzakuphakanyiswa.” 
Luke14:12 Yeke uJesu wathi komumemileko: “Lokha nawenza isidlo semini namkha sakusihlwa, ungamemi abangani bakho, abafowenu, iinhlobo zakho namkha abomakhelwana bakho abanjingileko ngombana nawenza njalo, nabo bazakumema ngaleyondlela uzakuvuzwa." 
Luke14:13 Kodwana nawenza umnyanya, mema abadududu, abarholopheleko, abangakwazi ukukhamba neemphofu," 
Luke14:14 khona-ke uzakubusiswa. Nanyana bangekhe bakuvuze, uzakuvuzwa ekuvusweni kwabalungileko.”" 
Luke14:15 Kwathi lokha omunye wabagade bahlezi naye etafuleni ezwe lokho, wathi kuJesu: “Ubusisiwe umuntu ozakugoma emnyanyeni embusweni kaZimu!”" 
Luke14:16 UJesu wathi kuye: “Umuntu othileko bekalungiselela umnyanya omkhulu, wamema nabantu abanengi." 
Luke14:17 Ngesikhathi somnyanya, wathuma ikhoboka lakhe kobana liyokuthi kabamenyiweko, ‘Yizani, koke sekulungile!’" 
Luke14:18 Kodwana ngokufanako, boke bathoma ukuzilandula. Wokuthoma wathi, ‘Ngiqeda ukuthenga isimu, yeke kumele ngiyoyibona. Uzangilibalela, angiphumeleli.’" 
Luke14:19 Wesibili wathi, ‘Ngiqeda ukuthenga itjhumi leenkomo ezibotjhelwako, yeke ngisendleleni yokuzibona bona zidosa njani. Uzangilibalela, angiphumeleli.’" 
Luke14:20 Khonapho omunye naye wathi, ‘Ngiqeda ukuthatha, ngaleyondlela angiphumeleli ukuza.’" 
Luke14:21 “Ikhoboka labuyela ekosinalo layokubika. Umninikhaya wathukuthela khulu, wayala ikhoboka lakhe wathi, ‘Phuma msinyana ungene eendledlaneni nemikghotheni yedorobho ubize abadududu, abarholopheleko, iimphofu neengoga.’" 
Luke14:22 Ikhoboka lathi, ‘Kosami, ngiwuphethile umyalwakho, kodwana kusese nendawo.’" 
Luke14:23 Yeke ikosi yathi ekhobokeni layo, ‘Phuma uye eendleleni nemikghotheni yemaphandleni, ubabize ukuze ikumbami igcwale." 
Luke14:24 Ngiyanitjela bona akakho noyedwa kilabo abamenyiweko ozakufumana ukunandipha komnyanyami!’ ” 
Luke14:25 Isiqubuthu esikhulu besikhamba noJesu, khonapho waphendukela kiso wathi:" 
Luke14:26 “Nanyana ngubani oza kimi kodwana angazondi uyise nonina, umkakhe nabantwana, abafowabo nabodadwabo, ngitjho nepilwakhe, angeze aba mfundi wami." 
Luke14:27 Nanyana ngubani ongatjathi isiphambano sakhe angilandele, angekhe aba mfundi wami." 
Luke14:28 “Akhe sithi omunye wenu ufuna ukwakha umtlomogo. Akazokuhlala phasi ntange alinganise iindleko ukuze abone bonyana unemali eyaneleko yokuwakha bewuphele na? 
Luke14:29 Ngambala nakube ubeka isisekelo kodwana angasakghona ukuqedelela, boke abakubonako lokho bazamphoqa" 
Luke14:30 bathi, ‘Umrhali lo uthome ukwakha, kodwana wangakghona ukuqeda!’" 
Luke14:31 “Namkha akhe sithi ikosi izilungiselela ukuya epini ukuyokulwa nenye ikosi. Ayizokuhlala phasi ntange bese icabangisise bona izakukghona ngamadoda aziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi ukujamelana nenamadoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili na? 
Luke14:32 Nayingakghoniko, izakuthumela abazenda ekosini leyo isesekude, ikhombele bonyana kukhulunyiswane ngokuthula." 
Luke14:33 Ngokunjalo-ke, nanyana ngubani wenu ongatjhiyi koke anakho angeze aba mfundi wami.”" 
Luke14:34 “Itswayi lilungile, kodwana nasele liqwatjhile, lingavuselelwa njani na?" 
Luke14:35 Alikalungeli iqulwani ngitjho nanyana kungaba msuqwa, liyalahlwa. Oneendlebe zokuzwa akezwe.”" 
Luke15:1 Nje-ke abathelisi nezoni boke bebabuthene kuJesu ukuzomuzwa. 
Luke15:2 Kodwana abaFarisi nabafundisi bomthetho baguguneka bathi: “Umrhali lo wamukela izoni, agome nazo!”" 
Luke15:3 Yeke uJesu wabatjela umfanekiso lo: 
Luke15:4 “Akhe sithi omunye wenu unezimvu ezilikhulu bese ulahlekelwa ngeyodwa kizo. Akatjhiyi ezimatjhumi alithoba nethoba erhalawumbeni, akhambe ayokufuna elahlekileko abe ayifumane na?" 
Luke15:5 Athi angayifumana, athabe khulu, ayitjathe emahlombakhe" 
Luke15:6 aye nayo ekhaya. Abizele abangani nabomakhelwana bakhe ndawonye athi kibo, ‘Thabani kanye nami; ngiyifumene imvu yami ebeyilahlekile!’" 
Luke15:7 Nje-ke ngiyanitjela bona ngokunjalo kuzakuba khona ithabo elikhulu ezulwini ngesoni esisodwa esiphendukako kunalabo abamatjhumi alithoba nethoba abalungileko nabangadingi ukuphenduka.” 
Luke15:8 “Namkha akhe sithi-ke umfazi oneempaparwana ezilitjhumi zesiliva, ulahlekelwa ngesisodwa. Akakhanyisi isibani, athanyele ikumba, afunisise kuhle abe asifunyane na?" 
Luke15:9 Kuthi angasifumana, abizele abangani nabomakhelwana bakhe ndawonye athi kibo, ‘Thabani kanye nami; isipaparwana sami ebesilahlekile ngisifumene!’" 
Luke15:10 Ngokunjalo ngiyanitjela bona kunethabo elikhulu phambi kweengilozi zakaZimu ngesoni esisodwa esiphendukako.” 
Luke15:11 UJesu waraga wathi: “Kwakhe kwaba khona umuntu onamadodana amabili. 
Luke15:12 Encani yathi kuyise, ‘Baba, nginikela isabelo sami selifa.’ Yeke wawahlukanisela ilifa." 
Luke15:13 Kwathi kungakabi malanga mangaki ngemva kwalapho, indodana encani yabutha koke enakho, yemuka yaya enarheni ekude. Nayifika lapho yathuthudlha loke ilifa layo ngokuphila umathanda." 
Luke15:14 Ngemva kobana isaphaze koke, kwaba khona indlala ekulu kiyo yoke inarha leyo. Nje-ke yathoma ukuswela." 
Luke15:15 Yeke yakhamba yayozithengisa kesinye sezakhamuzi zalapho. Sona sayithumela esiminaso kobana yeluse izavukazana zaso. 
Luke15:16 Yakhanukela ukuzisuthisa ngokudla kwezavukazana, kodwana akakho noyedwa owayipha okuthileko." 
Luke15:17 Kwathi nayiqaqulukako, yathi, ‘Bangaki abaqatjhwa bakababa abadla kusale na? Qala, mina indlala ingiphodlha kokufa lapha!" 
Luke15:18 Yeke ngizakusuka ngiye kubaba, ngifike ngithi kuye: Baba, ngonile phambi kwezulu naphambi kwakho." 
Luke15:19 Angisafaneli ukubizwa ngendodanakho; yewungithathe njengomunye wabaqatjhwa bakho.’ 
Luke15:20 Yasuka-ke yaya kuyise. “Kodwana kuthe isesekude, uyise wayibona, wayirhawukela, wayigijimela wafese wayigona, wayincwanga emhlathini." 
Luke15:21 Indodana yathi kuye, ‘Baba, ngonile phambi kwezulu naphambi kwakho. Angisafanelanga ukubizwa ngendodanakho.’" 
Luke15:22 Kodwana uyise wabiza amakhobokakhe wathi kiwo, ‘Rhabani! Lethani isambatho sakanokutjho niyembathise. Ifakeni idzilamnwana emunwenayo namapatlagwana eenyaweni." 
Luke15:23 Lethani ithole elinonisiweko nilihlabe. Asibeni nomnyanya sigidinge 
Luke15:24 ngombana indodanami le beyifile nje-ke iyaphila, beyilahlekile nje-ke itholakele.’ Yeke bathoma ukugidinga." 
Luke15:25 “Ngesikhatheso indodana ekulu beyisemasimini. Kwathi nayitjhidela ekhaya, yezwa kuvunywa ingoma kugidwa." 
Luke15:26 Yeke yabiza elinye lamakhoboka yabuza bona kwenzekani. 
Luke15:27 Lona lathi, ‘Umfowenu ubuyile, nje-ke uyihlo umhlabele ithole elinonisiweko ngombana ubuye aphilile begodu aphephile.’" 
Luke15:28 “Indodana ekulu yathukuthela khulu yabe yabhala ukungena ngendlini. Yeke uyise waphumela ngaphandle wayirabhela. 
Luke15:29 Kodwana yaphendula uyise yathi, ‘Qala! Yoke iminyaka le bengiseze ngikusebenzela njengekhoboka begodu azange khengiphule imiyalwakho. Khonapho azange khewungiphe ngitjho imbuzana yakombuzana bona nami ngizithabise nabangani bami." 
Luke15:30 Kodwana indodanakho le ethuthudlhe ipahlakho neengwadla, nayibuyela ekhaya uyihlabela ithole elinonisiweko!’" 
Luke15:31 Uyise waphendula wathi, ‘Ndodanami, uhlala unami soke isikhathi begodu koke enginakho ngekwakho." 
Luke15:32 Kodwana kufanele sigide sithabe ngombana umfowenu lo bekafile, kodwana gadesi uyaphila, bekalahlekile, kodwana ufunyenwe.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 UJesu watjela abafundi bakhe wathi: “Kwakhe kwaba khona umuntu osikhumkani ogade anomphathi owasolwa ngokusaphaza ipahlakhe. 
Luke16:2 Yeke wambiza wathi kuye, ‘Kuyini lokhu engikuzwako ngawe na? Akhe uziphendulele ngokuphatha kwakho ngombana angeze bewusaba mphathi.’" 
Luke16:3 Umphathi wazitjela wathi, ‘Alo ngizakwenzani-ke gadesi? Ikosami ingemuka umsebenzami. Anginamandla angako wokulima begodu ngineenhloni zokukhombela." 
Luke16:4 Ngiyazi bonyana ngizakwenzani ukuze abantu bakwazi ukungamukela emizinabo nangilahlekelwa msebenzi lapha.’ 
Luke16:5 “Yeke wabiza boke abantu abakoloda ikosakhe. Wabuza wokuthoma wathi, ‘Uyikoloda kangangani ikosami na?’" 
Luke16:6 Waphendula wathi, ‘Iinkulungwana ezintathu zamalitha wamafutha we-oliva.’ “Umphathi wathi, ‘Thatha nasi incwadakho yesikolodo, hlala phasi msinyana utlole bona yikulungwana namakhulu amahlanu.’" 
Luke16:7 Yeke wabuza wesibili wathi, ‘Wena ukoloda kangangani?’ “Yena wathi, ‘Ikhulu lemigodla yekoroyi.’ “Umphathi wathi, ‘Thatha nasi incwadakho yesikolodo, itlole ibe matjhumi abunane.’" 
Luke16:8 “Ikosi yakhuza umphathayo onganaqiniso ngombana wenze ubugirikijani. Nje-ke abantu bephaseli banobugirikijani obukhulu ekusebenzeni kwabo nabantu abafana nabo kunabantu bokukhanya. 
Luke16:9 Yeke ngiyanitjela bona nisebenzise umnono wephaseli ukuzizuzela abangani ukuze kuthi nabuphelako, namukeleke ekuphileni okungapheliko." 
Luke16:10 “Othembeke kokuncani, angathembeka nakokukhulu nongathembekiko kokuncani angeze athembeka kokukhulu." 
Luke16:11 Alo-ke, nangabe azange khenethembeke ekuphatheni umnono wephaseli, ningathenjwa njani ngomnono wamambala na?" 
Luke16:12 Nangabe anizange nethembeke entweni yomunye umuntu, ngubani ozaninikela ipahla bona ibe ngeyenu na?" 
Luke16:13 “Akunakhoboka elingakhonza emakhosini amabili. Nakungasinjalo, lizokuzonda enye, lithande enye namkha lizinikele kenye, linyaze enye. Angekhe nalotjha uZimu nemali ngasikhathi sinye.”" 
Luke16:14 AbaFarisi abathanda imali bezwa koke lokho, bakokomeja uJesu." 
Luke16:15 UJesu wathi kibo: “Nina nizenza abalungileko phambi kwamehlo wabantu, kodwana uZimu wazi iinhliziyo zenu. Lokho abantu abakuthathela phezulu, kusinyenyiso phambi kwakaZimu." 
Luke16:16 “Umthetho nemitlolo yabaphorofidi kwamenyezelwa kufikela ngesikhathi sakaJwanisi. Soloko kwangesikhatheso, kutjhunyayelwa iindaba ezimnandi zombuso kaZimu, yeke, woke umuntu ufuhlezela ukungena endimeni leyo." 
Luke16:17 Kulula bonyana izulu nephasi kuphele kunobana kungawa ithorwana yomthetho. 
Luke16:18 “Nanyana ngubani otlhala umkakhe bese uthatha omunye, uyahlobonga, nendoda ethatha umfazi otlhaliweko, iyahlobonga." 
Luke16:19 “Bekunomuntu ebegade asikhumkani, ambatha izambatho ezibubende nezelineni ecolisiweko ngamalanga." 
Luke16:20 Esangweni lakwakhe bekubekwe isikhombeli ebekuthiwa nguLazaru, sikghamathele ikhwekhwe." 
Luke16:21 Besirhuluphela ukudobhelela iintshutshuru eziwa etafuleni lesikhumkanesi. Ngitjho nezinja bezifika zizokukhotha iinlonda zaso. 
Luke16:22 “Kwafika isikhathi sokobana isikhombeli sihlongakale, iingilozi zafika zasithatha zasibeka hlanu kwaka-Abrahamu. Isikhumkani naso sahlongakala, sabulungwa." 
Luke16:23 Sathi nasisendaweni yabafileko lapha besihlunguphazeka khona, saqala phezulu, sabona u-Abrahamu kude le, anoLazaru hlanu kwakhe." 
Luke16:24 Sarhuwelela sathi, ‘Baba Abrahamu! Yewungirhawukele, uthumele uLazaru azokutlubhuza umunwakhe ngemanzini apholise ilimu lameli ngombana ngisebuhlungwini obukhulu ngemlilwenapha.’" 
Luke16:25 “Kodwana u-Abrahamu wathi, ‘Ndodana, khumbula bonyana esikhathini sakho sokuphila wanikelwa zoke izinto ezihle, uLazaru yena wafumana okumbi. Nje-ke uyaduduzwa lapha, kodwana wena usebuhlungwini." 
Luke16:26 Ngaphandle kwakho koke lokho, phakathi kwethu nawe kunerharha elikhulu, abafuna ukusuka nganeno beze ngapho abakghoni godu akakho nongeyamela nganeno.’" 
Luke16:27 Yeke isikhumkani sathi, ‘Ngiyakurabhela baba, khona-ke thumela uLazaru ekhaya emzini kababa" 
Luke16:28 ngombana nginabafowethu abahlanu. Akakhambe ayobayelelisa ukuze bangezi lapha endaweni yobuhlungu le.’ 
Luke16:29 “U-Abrahamu wathi, ‘Abafowenu banoMosi nabaphorofidi, ababalalele.’" 
Luke16:30 Isikhumkani saphendula sathi, ‘Awa baba u-Abrahamu, kodwana nange kusuka othileko kabafileko aye kibo, bazakuphenduka.’" 
Luke16:31 Kodwana u-Abrahamu wathi, ‘Nakube abakghoni ukulalela uMosi nabaphorofidi, angekhe baphenduka ngitjho nanyana kungavuka umuntu kabafileko.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 UJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Izinto ezenza abantu bone zimele ukubakhona, kodwana maye kiloyo eziza ngaye!" 
Luke17:2 Bekungaba ngcono kuye bona kubotjhelelwe ilitje lokusila entanyenakhe aphoselwe ngelwandle, kunobanyana enze abancancanaba bone." 
Luke17:3 Yeke yelelani enikwenzako! “Nakube umfowenu uyona, mkhalimele; naphendukako, mlibalele." 
Luke17:4 Nakube ukone kalikhomba ngelanga, eze kuwe kalikhomba athi, ‘Ngiyaphenduka,’ mlibalele.”" 
Luke17:5 Abapostoli bathi eKosini: “Yandisa ukukholwa kwethu.” 
Luke17:6 IKosi yaphendula yathi: “Nakube beninokukholwa okungangembewu yemastadi, benizakuthi emthini womurbheyi lo, ‘Ruthuka uyokutjaleka ngelwandle,’ bewuzanilalela.”" 
Luke17:7 “Akhe sithi omunye wenu unekhoboka elilima namkha elelusa izimvu. Bekazakuthi ekhobokenelo nalibuya esimini, ‘Ngena uhlale phasi sigome’ na?" 
Luke17:8 Esikhundleni salokho ubangekhe athi, ‘Lungisa isidlo sami sakusihlwa, uzilungiselele bese ujama etafuleni mina lokha nangigoma bengisele, ngemva kwalapho-ke nawe ugome bewusele’ na?" 
Luke17:9 Ubezalithokoza ikhoboka ngokwenza kwalo elikutjelwako na? 
Luke17:10 Ngokunjalo-ke nani, nasele nenze koke enitjelwe bona nikwenze, kumele nithi, ‘Simakhoboka anganabubhadekelo, senze umsebenzethu nje kwaphela.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Lokha uJesu nasendleleni eya eJerusalema, wadlula hlangana neSamariya neGalile." 
Luke17:12 Kwathi nasangena ngemzini othileko, wahlangatjezwa madoda alitjhumi anobulwelwe bekhwekhwe. Ajamela kudanyana" 
Luke17:13 arhuwelela athi: “Jesu, Kosi, sirhawukele!”" 
Luke17:14 UJesu wawabona wathi kiwo: “Khambani niyoziveza kubaphristi.” Kuthe asakhamba, ahlanjululwa." 
Luke17:15 Enye yawo yathi ingabona bonyana ipholile, yabuya idumisa uZimu ngelizwi elikhulu." 
Luke17:16 Yaziphosa eenyaweni zakaJesu, yamthokoza. Begade imSamariya." 
Luke17:17 UJesu wathi: “Azange kuhlanjululwe woke wolitjhumi na? Alo, aphi-ke amanye alithoba?" 
Luke17:18 Azange kufunyanwe namunye obuyako kobana azokudumisa uZimu ngaphandle komqhamuka lo na?” 
Luke17:19 Yeke wathi kuye: “Sikima ukhambe, ukukholwa kwakho kukusindisile.”"
