Luke17:20 Kwathi bona abuzwe baFarisi bona umbuso kaZimu uzakuza nini, uJesu waphendula wathi: “Umbuso kaZimu awuzi ngokuyelela kwenu okubukhali," 
Luke17:21 namkha lokha abantu nabasithi, ‘Naku lapha ukhona’, namkha ‘Nakuya laphaya’ ngombana umbuso kaZimu ungaphakathi kwenu.”" 
Luke17:22 Yeke wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Isikhathi siyeza lapha nizakukhanukela khona ukubona elinye lamalanga weNdodana yoMuntu, kodwana anizulibona." 
Luke17:23 Abantu bazanitjela bathi, ‘Qalani nanguya!’ namkha bathi, ‘Qalani nangu!’ Ningagijimi ngemva kwabo." 
Luke17:24 INdodana yoMuntu ngelanga layo, izakufana nombani ophazima bewukhanyise umkayi ukusuka ngapha ukuya ngale." 
Luke17:25 Kodwana kufanele itlhage qangi, ilahlwe sizukulwanesi." 
Luke17:26 Njengombana gade kunjalo emihleni kaNowa, kuzakuba njalo nemihleni yeNdodana yoMuntu." 
Luke17:27 Abantu bebagoma, basela, bathatha begodu benda kufikela mhla uNowa angena khona ngemkhunjini. Yeke kwafika umthwalela, wabatjhabalalisa boke." 
Luke17:28 Kwaba njalo nangesikhathi sakaLothi. Abantu bebagoma begodu basela, bathenga begodu bathengisa, batjala begodu basakha." 
Luke17:29 Kodwana ngelanga uLothi asuka ngalo eSodoma, kwehla umlilo nesibabuli ezulwini, kwabaqothula boke." 
Luke17:30 Kuzakuba njalo-ke namhlana iNdodana yoMuntu ibonakaliswako. 
Luke17:31 “Mhlokho ophezu kwephahla lekumbakhe angehliki aye ngekhaya athi uyokuthatha ipahlakhe. Ngokunjalo nosesimini angabuyeli kwakhe athi uyokuthatha okuthileko. 
Luke17:32 Khumbulani umkaLothi! 
Luke17:33 Loyo olinga ukuzuza ipilwakhe izamlahlekela. Loyo olahlekelwa yipilwakhe uzayibulunga. 
Luke17:34 Ngiyanitjela bona ngobusukobo, abantu ababili abazabe balele emsemeni owodwa, oyedwa uzakuthathwa, oyedwa atjhiywe." 
Luke17:35 Abafazi ababili bazabe basila ndawonye, oyedwa uzakuthathwa, oyedwa atjhiywe." 
Luke17:36 Amadoda amabili azabe asesimini, eyodwa izakuthathwa, eyodwa itjhiywe.”" 
Luke17:37 Abafundi bambuza bathi: “Kuphi, Kosi na?” Wathi kibo: “Lapha kunesidumbu khona, ubona ngamadlanga.”" 
Luke18:1 Yeke uJesu watjela abafundi bakhe umfanekiso abakhombisa bonyana bafanele bahlale bathandaza njalo bangapheli amandla. 
Luke18:2 Wathi: “Emzini othileko bekunomgwebi obegade angesabi uZimu, anganandaba nabanye abantu." 
Luke18:3 Godu khona emzini loyo bekunomhlolokazi obekaphele aye kuye ayokubawa isizo athi, ‘Yewungihlambulule kumjamelanami!’" 
Luke18:4 Kwaba sikhathi eside alokhu angafuni. Kodwana ekugcineni wazitjela wathi, ‘Ngitjho nanyana ngingamesabi uZimu namkha nginganandaba nabanye abantu," 
Luke18:5 kodwana ngombana nakhu umhlolokazi lo uhlalele ukungifundekela, ngizakwenza bonyana afumane ubulungiswa ukuze angasangikhathaza ngokuza kwakhe lapha.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 IKosi yaraga yathi: “Yizwani bona umgwebi ongakalungi uthini. 
Luke18:7 Alo, nithi uZimu angeze abazwela abakhethiweko bakhe, abalilela kuye imini nobusuku na? Uzalokhu abaphayela ngeqadi na?" 
Luke18:8 Ngiyanitjela bona uzobazwela msinyana. Nokho-ke nitjho bona iNdodana yoMuntu mhla ibuyako izakufumana ukukholwa ephasinapha na?” 
Luke18:9 Godu wakhuluma umfanekiso lo kilabo ebebazethemba ngokulunga kwabo, banyaza boke abanye, wathi:" 
Luke18:10 “Abantu ababili benyukela ethempelini ukuyokuthandaza. Omunye bekumFarisi, omunye kumthelisi." 
Luke18:11 “UmFarisi wajama, wazithandazela wathi, ‘Zimu, ngiyakuthokoza ngombana mina angifani nabanye abantu: ababadlelezeli, abenzi bokumbi, iinhlobongi ngitjho naye umthelisi olapha lo." 
Luke18:12 Ngizila ukudla kabili ngeveke, ngikhupha umnikelo wokwetjhumi kwakho koke engikuzuzako.’" 
Luke18:13 “Kodwana umthelisi wajamela kudanyana. Wahlulwa ngitjho nakuqala ezulwini, kodwana wabetha isandla phezu kwesinye wathi, ‘Zimu, ngirhawukele, mina soni!’ ”" 
Luke18:14 UJesu wathi: “Ngiyanitjela bona umthelisi wabuyela ekhaya alungisisiwe phambi kwakaZimu kunomFarisi ngombana nanyana ngubani oziphakamisako uzakwehliswa, nozithobako uzakuphakanyiswa.”" 
Luke18:15 Abantu baletha abantwana kuJesu kobana abathinte. Kwathi lokha abafundi bakhe nababona lokho, babakhalimela." 
Luke18:16 Kodwana uJesu wabizela abantwana kuye wathi: “Lisani abantwana beze kimi ningabakhandeli ngombana umbuso kaZimu ungewabanjalo. 
Luke18:17 Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona nanyana ngubani ongekhe amukela umbuso kaZimu njengomntwana, angekhe angena kiwo.”" 
Luke18:18 Umbusi othileko wambuza wathi: “Mfundisi olungileko, ngingenza njani ukuze ngizuze ukuphila okungapheliko na?”" 
Luke18:19 UJesu wathi: “Kubayini ungibize ngolungileko na? Akakho noyedwa olungileko ngaphandle kwakaZimu kwaphela. 
Luke18:20 Uyayazi imiyalo, ‘Ungahlobongi, ungabulali, ungebi, ungafakazi amanga, hlonipha uyihlo nonyoko.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Umbusi loyo wathi: “Koke lokho bengiseze ngikwenza kusukela ngisesemsana.” 
Luke18:22 Kwathi bona uJesu ezwe lokho, wathi: “Kusasele into eyodwa ekufanele uyenze. Thengisa koke onakho, wabele abatlhagileko, nje-ke uzakuba namagugu ezulwini. Ngemva kwalapho-ke ungilandele.”" 
Luke18:23 Kwathi bona ezwe lokho, watlhuwa khulu ngombana bekasikhumkani samambala." 
Luke18:24 UJesu wamqala wathi kuye: “Kubudisi kangangani bona abantu abaziinkhumkani bangene embusweni kaZimu! 
Luke18:25 Ngambala kulula bona uzilume indololwani kunobana isikhumkani singene embusweni kaZimu.” 
Luke18:26 Abantu abamzwako bambuza-ke bathi: “Alo, ngubani-ke ongasindiswa na?”" 
Luke18:27 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Lokho okungenzekiko ebantwini kuyenzeka kuZimu.” 
Luke18:28 UPitrosi wathi kuye: “Qala, sitjhiye koke esinakho bona sikulandele!”" 
Luke18:29 UJesu wathi kibo: “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona akakho noyedwa otjhiye ikhaya lakhe namkha umkakhe, abafowabo, ababelethi bakhe nabantwabakhe ngebanga lombuso kaZimu," 
Luke18:30 ozakubhalelwa kuzuza ipilo engapheliko ngokubuyelelwe kanengi esikhathinesi, nesikhathini esizako.”" 
Luke18:31 UJesu wabizela abafundi bakhe ngeqadi wathi kibo: “Sizokwenyukela eJerusalema, lapho koke okutlolwe baphorofidi ngeNdodana yoMuntu kuzakuzaliseka khona." 
Luke18:32 Izakunikelwa kwabatjhili. Bazayiphoqa, bayithuke, bayikhafulele ngamathe, bayimadlhe bebayibulale." 
Luke18:33 Ngelanga lesithathu izakuvuka godu.” 
Luke18:34 Kodwana abafundi bakhe akhange bazwisise nakunye kwalokho. Begade kufihlakele kibo bebangazi bonyana ukhuluma ngani. 
Luke18:35 Bekunesiphofu ebesihlezi ngeqadi kwendlela sikhombela lokha uJesu natjhidela eJerikho. 
Luke18:36 Kwathi nasizwa isiqubuthu sidlula, sabuza bona kwenzekani." 
Luke18:37 Basitjela bathi: “UJesu weNazaretha uyadlula.” 
Luke18:38 Sarhuwelela sathi: “Jesu, Ndodana kaDavida, ngirhawukela!”" 
Luke18:39 Abantu ebebaphambi kwaso basikhalimela bathi asithule. Kodwana sarhuwelela khulu, sathi: “Ndodana kaDavida, ngirhawukela!”" 
Luke18:40 UJesu wajama, wathi abasilethe kuye. Kwathi nasitjhidelako, uJesu wasibuza wathi:" 
Luke18:41 “Ufuna ngikwenzeleni na?” Samphendula sathi: “Kosi, ngifuna ukubona.”" 
Luke18:42 UJesu wathi kiso: “Bona! Ukukholwa kwakho kukusindisile.” 
Luke18:43 Khonokho sabona, besalandela uJesu sithokoza uZimu. Kwathi lokha boke abantu nababona lokho, nabo badumisa uZimu." 
Luke19:1 UJesu wangena eJerikho, wadabula khona." 
Luke19:2 Lapho bekunendoda ebekuthiwa nguZakewu imthelisi omkhulu begodu isikhumkani. 
Luke19:3 Yena wafuna ukubona bonyana uJesu lo ungubani, kodwana ngombana bekamfitjhani azange akghone ukumbona ngebanga lesiqubuthu." 
Luke19:4 Yeke wagijimela ngaphambili wayokukhwela emthini wamakhiwani wommango ngombana uJesu begade azokudlula lapho. 
Luke19:5 UJesu wathi nafika lapho, waqala phezulu wathi: “Zakewu, rhaba wehle emthinapho ngombana ngifanele ngiyokuhlala ngakwakho namhlanjesi.”" 
Luke19:6 Yeke wehla msinyana, wamamukela ngethabo." 
Luke19:7 Boke abantu bakubona lokho, nje-ke bathoma ukunghonghoyila bathi: “Ungene kobana abe myeni emzini wesoni!”" 
Luke19:8 Kodwana uZakewu wasikima wathi eKosini: “Qala, Kosi! Nginikela abadududu isiquntu selifa lami khona nje, begodu nakube kukhona engimgalaje ngananyana yini, ngizakukhokhela ngokubuyelelwe kane kwalokho.”" 
Luke19:9 UJesu wathi: “Namhlanjesi isindiso ingene kilelikhaya ngombana naye lo uyindodana ka-Abrahamu. 
Luke19:10 INdodana yoMuntu izele ukuzokufuna nokusindisa okulahlekileko.” 
Luke19:11 Kuthe abantu basalalele lokho, uJesu waraga ngokubatjela umfanekiso ngombana begade aseduze kweJerusalema begodu abantu bebadlumbana bona umbuso kaZimu bewuzokuvela khonokho." 
Luke19:12 Wathi kibo: “Umuntu obegade abelethwa emzini ohloniphekileko waya enarheni ekude ayokwenza bona abekwe ikosi bese uyabuya. 
Luke19:13 Yeke wabiza itjhumi lamanye wamakhobokakhe, wawanikela abomina. abalitjhumi wathi kiwo, ‘Sebenzisani lokhu kufikela bengibuye.’" 
Luke19:14 Kodwana abantu bakhe bebamhloyile, yeke bathumela abazenda ngemva kwakhe bona bayokuthi, ‘Asimfuni umuntu lo bona abe yikosethu.’" 
Luke19:15 “Nanyana kunjalo, wabekwa waba yikosi, yeke wabuyela ekhaya. Khonokho wabiza amakhoboka ebegade awanikele imali ukuze afunyane bona azuzeni ngayo." 
Luke19:16 Lokuthoma leza lafika lathi, ‘Kosi, umina wakho uzuze itjhumi ngaphezulu.’" 
Luke19:17 Wathi kilo, ‘Wenze kuhle, khoboka lami elilungileko! Njengombana wethembekile kokuncani, ngizakubeka bona uphathe amadorobho alitjhumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Lesibili nalo leza lathi, ‘Kosi, abomina bakho bazuze abahlanu ngaphezulu.’" 
Luke19:19 Kilelo wathi, ‘Uzakuphatha amadorobho amahlanu.’" 
Luke19:20 “Yeke kweza elinye ikhoboka lathi, ‘Kosi, nangu umina wakho, bengimfihlile ngimphuthele ngetjhila." 
Luke19:21 Bengikwesaba ngombana umumuntu olikhuni. Uthatha ongakakubeki, uvune ongakakutjali.’" 
Luke19:22 Wathi kilo, ‘Ngizokugweba ngamagamakho wena khoboka elikhohlakeleko ndina. Angithi bewazi bonyana ngimumuntu olikhuni, ngithatha engingakakubeki, ngivune engingakakutjali?" 
Luke19:23 Alo, kubayini-ke ungazange usisise imalami ebulungelweni ukuze kuthi nangibuyako ngiyifunyane inenzalo na?’" 
Luke19:24 “Yeke wathi kilabo ebegade bajame lapho, ‘Lemukeni umina lo, ninikele onabomina abalitjhumi.’" 
Luke19:25 Kodwana bamphendula bathi, ‘Kosi, angithi loyo sele anabomina abalitjhumi!’" 
Luke19:26 Wabaphendula wathi, ‘Ngiyanitjela bona woke onokunengi, uzakuphiwa ngaphezu kwalokho, kodwana onganalitho yena, uzakwemukwa ngitjho nalokho anakho." 
Luke19:27 Nje-ke ngithi nakuzizitha zami ebezingafuni bona ngibe yikosi phezu kwazo, yeniziletheni lapha, nizibulale phambi kwamapha.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 UJesu watjho lokho wakhamba wayokungena eJerusalema. 
Luke19:29 Kuthe natjhidela eBhethifage neBhethaniya embundwini obewubizwa bona yintaba ye-Oliva, wathumela babili babafundi bakhe," 
Luke19:30 wathi kibo: “Khambani niye emzini ongaphambi kwenu, nizakuthi naningenako nifumane udumbana okungazange kukhwele muntu phezu kwakhe abotjhiwe. Mtjhaphululeni, nimlethapha." 
Luke19:31 Nakukhona onibuza athi, ‘Nimtjhaphululelani?’, nimtjele nithi, ‘IKosi iyamdinga.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Labo ebebathunyiwe bakhamba, bafunyana koke kunjengombana uJesu atjhwile." 
Luke19:33 Kwathi nabasatjhaphulula udumbana, umnikazi wababuza wathi: “Nimtjhaphululelani udumbana na?”" 
Luke19:34 Bamphendula bathi: “IKosi iyamdinga.” 
Luke19:35 Baletha udumbana loyo kuJesu, babeka izambatho zabo phezu kwakhe, bakhweza uJesu." 
Luke19:36 Kwathi nakhambako, abantu baqhisa izambatho zabo endleleni." 
Luke19:37 Nafika emehlelweni wentaba ye-Oliva, soke isiqubuthu sabafundi sathoma sadumisa uZimu ngetokozo, sihlokoma ngayo yoke imikarisomraro esiyibonileko," 
Luke19:38 sathi: “Ubusisiwe loyo ozako, iye, iKosi eza ebizweni lakaSomnini! Ukuthula ezulwini nephazimulo keliphezulu!”" 
Luke19:39 Yeke abanye babaFarisi hlangana nesiqubuthu bathi kuJesu: “Mfundisi, khalimela abafundi bakhwaba!”" 
Luke19:40 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Ngiyanitjela bona nabathulako laba, amatje azakurhuwelela.”" 
Luke19:41 Kwathi natjhidelako, abona idorobho, walililela" 
Luke19:42 wathi: “Ngathana namhlanjesi bewusazi bona yini engakulethela ukuthula! Kodwana kufihlekile emehlwenakho! 
Luke19:43 Uzakufikelwa malanga lapho izitha zakho zizakwakhela khona isiqabo, zikuzombeleze bezikuvimbezele mahlangothi woke." 
Luke19:44 Zizakumadlha phasi, wena nabantwana abangaphakathi kwemithangalakho. Azizokutjhiya ngitjho nalinye ilitje phezu kwelinye ngombana awuzange ulemuke isikhathi sokuza kwakaZimu kuwe!”" 
Luke19:45 Yeke wangena ngethempelini wathoma ukuqotjha ebebathengisa. 
Luke19:46 Wathi kibo: “Kutloliwe kwathiwa, ‘Ikumbami izakuba yikumba yokuthandaza’ kodwana nina niyenze irharha labahlanguli!”" 
Luke19:47 Ngamalanga uJesu bekafundisa ngethempelini. Abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho kanye nabarholi babantu balinga ukumbulala. 
Luke19:48 Kodwana azange bafunyane indlela yokwenza lokho ngombana boke abantu babambelela emezwinakhe. 
Luke20:1 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga uJesu asafundisa abantu ngesirhodlweni sethempeli begodu atjhumayela iindaba ezimnandi, abaphristi abakhulu, abafundisi bomthetho kanye nabaphathi beza kuye" 
Luke20:2 bathi: “Sitjela bona uzenza ngaliphi igunya izintwezi? Ngubani okuphe igunyelo na?” 
Luke20:3 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Jamani-ke, nami khenginibuze umbuzo." 
Luke20:4 Akhe ningitjele, umbhabhadiso kaJwanisi bewubuya ezulwini namkha ebantwini na?”" 
Luke20:5 Bakhulumisana babodwa ngalokho bathi: “Nange singathi, ‘Ezulwini’, uzosibuza athi, ‘Alo, kubayini ningazange nimkholwe na?’" 
Luke20:6 Godu sathi, ‘Ebantwini’, abantwaba bazosikhanda ngamatje boke nje ngombana sele bakholwa bonyana uJwanisi bekamphorofidi.”" 
Luke20:7 Yeke baphendula bathi: “Awa, asazi bona wabuyaphi.”" 
Luke20:8 UJesu wathi: “Nami-ke angekhe nganitjela bona ngizenza ngegunyana lakabani izintwezi.” 
Luke20:9 Waragela phambili watjela abantu umfanekiso lo: “Umuntu watjala isidiribe, wasiqatjhisela abalimi abathileko, wakhamba ekhaya isikhathi eside." 
Luke20:10 Ngesikhathi sokuvuna, wathumela ikhoboka kubaqatjhi kobana bamuphe iinthelo zesidiribe. Kodwana abaqatjhabo balidula balibuyisela emuva limkhonoze." 
Luke20:11 Wathumela elinye ikhoboka; nalwelo balidula bebaliphatha ngehlazo, balibuyisela emuva limkhonoze." 
Luke20:12 Wathumela ikhoboka lesithathu, balikhubaza bebaliphosela ngaphandle." 
Luke20:13 Yeke umninisidiribe wathi, ‘Ngizokwenza njani na? Ngizakuthumela indodanami engiyithandako, mhlambe yona bangayihlonipha.’" 
Luke20:14 Kodwana kwathi lokha abaqatjhi nabayibonako, bakhulumisana ngendaba le, bathi, ‘Nasi indlalifa. Asiyibulaleni ukuze ilifa layo libe ngelethu!’" 
Luke20:15 Yeke bayiphosela ngaphandle kwesidiribe, bayibulala.” UJesu wabuza-ke wathi: “Alo-ke umninisidiribe uzabenzani abaqatjhabo na?" 
Luke20:16 Uzakuza afese abulale abaqatjhabo, athathe isidiribe asinikele abanye.” Kwathi abantu nabezwa lokho, bathi: “Awa, akungabi njalo!”" 
Luke20:17 Yeke uJesu wabaqala, wababuza wathi: “Alo-ke, yini-ke ihlathululo yalokhu okutloliweko na? “ ‘Ilitje eladelwa babakhi libe ngeliqakathekileko ejikeni.’" 
Luke20:18 “Woke owela phezu kwelitjelo uzakufahlaka abe ziincucwana, kodwana loyo eliwela phezu kwakhe uzokutshidlheka.”" 
Luke20:19 Abafundisi bomthetho nabaphristi abakhulu bafuna indlela yokumbamba khonokho ngombana bebasazi bona ukhulume umfanekiso lo alunganise kibo. Kodwana bebesaba abantu. 
Luke20:20 Bamtjheja ngelihlo elibukhali, bamthumelela ngeenhloli ezazenza inga zibabantu abathembekileko. Bebanethemba lokobana bazakubamba uJesu ngento ethileko angayitjho ukuze bakwazi ukumnikela emandleni negunyeni lababusi." 
Luke20:21 Yeke iinhlolezo zambuza zathi: “Mfundisi, siyazi bona ukhuluma bewufundise okuliqiniso, begodu awukhethi ubuso kodwana ufundisa indlela kaZimu ngeqiniso." 
Luke20:22 Akhe usitjele kuhle bona sikhokhe umthelo wombusi omkhulu namkha njani na?” 
Luke20:23 Kodwana uJesu wawabona amaqhinga wabo wathi kibo: 
Luke20:24 “Ngitjengisani abodenariyu. Mfanekiso nebizo lakabani leli na?” Baphendula bathi: “Ngelombusi omkhulu.” 
Luke20:25 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Arha-ke, nikelani umbusi omkhulu okungekwakhe noZimu okungekwakaZimu.”" 
Luke20:26 Bahluleka ukumcupha ngalokho akukhulume tjhatjhalazi. Bararwa yipendulwakhe, nje-ke bathula bathi du." 
Luke20:27 Yeke abanye babaSadusi, abathi akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko, beza kuJesu ngemibuzo" 
Luke20:28 bathi: “Mfundisi, uMosi wasitlolela bona indoda nayihlongakalako, itjhiye umfazi anganabantwana, umfowabo lendoda leyo kufanele angene umhlolokazi loyo, abelethele umfowabo abantwana." 
Luke20:29 Nje-ke bekunezelamani ezilikhomba. Wokuthoma wathatha umfazi, wahlongakala anganabantwana." 
Luke20:30 Wesibili wangena umhlolokazi loyo," 
Luke20:31 kwaba njalo nangewesithathu, bekwaba ngewekhomba, bahlongakala boke njalo banganabantwana." 
Luke20:32 Ekugcineni kwazokuhlongakala umhlolokazi. 
Luke20:33 Alo, ekuvukeni kwabafileko, uzokuba mfazi kabani njengombana bekathethwe madoda alikhomba nje na?”" 
Luke20:34 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Abantu besikhathinesi bayathatha begodu bayenda. 
Luke20:35 Kodwana labo abazakufunyanwa balungele ukubandakanyeka esikhathineso nekuvukeni kwabafileko, angeze bathatha namkha bende" 
Luke20:36 begodu abasoze bafa ngombana bazabe bafana neengilozi. Babantwana bakaZimu ngombana babantwana bokuvuka ekufeni. 
Luke20:37 Kodwana endabeni yemthini, ngitjho noMosi wabonisa bona abafileko bayavuka ngombana wabiza uSomnini bona nguZimu ka-Abrahamu, uZimu ka-Isaka noZimu kaJakopo." 
Luke20:38 Akasuye uZimu wabahlongakeleko, kodwana unguZimu wabaphilako.”" 
Luke20:39 Abanye babafundisi bomthetho baphendula bathi: “Mfundisi, uphendule kuhle!”" 
Luke20:40 Azange bekusaba khona ombuza eminye imibuzo. 
Luke20:41 UJesu wababuza wathi: “Batjho njani bathi uKrestu uyiNdodana kaDavida na? 
Luke20:42 Angithi uDavida ngokwakhe uthi encwadini yamaRhubo, “ ‘USomnini wathi eKosinami: Hlala ngesidleni sami" 
Luke20:43 bekube kulokha nangenza izitha zakho zibe sinabelo seenyawo zakho.’ 
Luke20:44 “UDavida ngokwakhe umbiza ngeKosi. Alo, angaba yindodanakhe njani-ke na?”" 
Luke20:45 Kuthe abantu boke basamlalele, uJesu wathi ebafundini bakhe:" 
Luke20:46 “Yelelani abafundisi bomthetho. Bathanda ukukhambakhamba bazakalele ngeemphuraphura, bathanda nokulotjhiswa eendaweni zokuthengisela begodu baneendawo ezingeziqakatheke khulu ngemasinagogini neendaweni ezihlonitjhwako emicimbini." 
Luke20:47 Barhiribidela iinkumba zabahlolokazi bese babukisa ngokwenza imithandazokazi emide. Abantu abanjalo bazokuhlunguphazwa khulu.” 
Luke21:1 Kwathi uJesu naqalako, wabona iinkhumkani ziletha iminikelwazo ngethempelini." 
Luke21:2 Godu wabona nomhlolokazi odududu anikela ngeempaparwana zekoporo ezimbili ezincani khulu. 
Luke21:3 Wathi: “Nginitjela iqiniso bona umhlolokazi odududu lo unikele ukwedlula boke abanye. 
Luke21:4 Boke abantwaba banikele ngokuthatha emnothwenabo; kodwana yena ebuchakeni bakhe unikele ngakho koke aphila ngakho.” 
Luke21:5 Abanye babafundi bakhe bebakhuluma ngendlela ithempeli libatjazwa ubuhle ngakhona, basitjho bona liqaleka kuhle kangangani ngamatje walo amahle nezipho ezinikelwe uZimu. Kodwana uJesu wathi:" 
Luke21:6 “Nakungilokho enikubona laphokhu, kuzokufika isikhathi lapha kungekhe kwasala khona ngitjho nelitje linye phezu kwelinye; elinye nelinye lawo lizokugirizwa.”" 
Luke21:7 Bambuza uJesu bathi: “Mfundisi, zizokwenzeka nini izintwezo na? Zizokuba yini iimbonakaliso zokobana sele zizokwenzeka na?”" 
Luke21:8 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Tjhejani bona ningakhohliswa ngombana abanengi bazakuza ebizweni lami bathi, ‘Nginguye!’ begodu, ‘Yeke isikhathi sitjhidele!’ Kodwana ningabalandeli." 
Luke21:9 Nanizwa ngezipi nokuvukelana, ningethuki. Izintwezi kumele zenzeke qangi, kodwana isiphetho asizukufika msinyna.”" 
Luke21:10 Waraga wathi kibo: “Isizwe sizakuvukela isizwe nombuso uvukele umbuso. 
Luke21:11 Kuzakuba khona ukusikinyeka kwephasi okukhulu, indlala namatshwenyeko iindawo ngeendawo, kube nezehlakalo ezethusako kanye neembonakaliso ezikulu ezivela ezulwini." 
Luke21:12 Kodwana ngaphambi kwakho koke lokho, bazonibamba bese bayanitlhorisa. Bazonisa emasinagogini neenkhungweni begodu nidoselwe phambi kwamakhosi nababusi, koke njalo kube ngebanga lami." 
Luke21:13 Ngalokho nizakuba bofakazi kibo. 
Luke21:14 Kodwana qedani nemikhumbulwenu bona ningakhathazeki isikhathi singakafiki ngokuthi nizozivikela njani. 
Luke21:15 Ngizonipha amezwi nokuhlakanipha okuzakwenza bona kungabikho noyedwa wabajamelani benu ozakukghona ukuphikisana namkha ukuphambana nakho. 
Luke21:16 Nizokukhatjhelwa ngitjho nangani babelethi benu, abafowenu, iinhlobo zenu nabangani benu; begodu abanye benu bazakubulawa ngibo." 
Luke21:17 Boke bazonihloya ngebanga lami. 
Luke21:18 Kodwana akunasihluthu nasinye seenhloko zenu esizakulahleka. 
Luke21:19 Ngokubambelela kwenu nizakuzuza ipilo.” 
Luke21:20 “Lokha nanibona iJerusalema iragelelwe mabutho, nizakwazi bona ukubhujiswa kwayo sekutjhidele." 
Luke21:21 Yeke akuthi labo abaseJudiya babalekele eentabeni, abangaphakathi kwalo baphume, nalabo abasemaphandleni bangangeni kilo." 
Luke21:22 Ngambala lesi kusikhathi sesibetho nokuzaliseka kwakho koke okutloliweko. 
Luke21:23 Maye kuzokwesabeka kangangani emihleni leyo ebafazini abazithweleko nabamunyisako! Kuzokubakhona ukutshwenyeka okukhulu enarheni nobukhali phezu kwabantwaba. 
Luke21:24 Abanye bazokubulawa ngesabula, abanye benziwe iimbotjhwa kizo zoke izizwe. IJerusalema izakugadangelwa phasi ngabatjhili kufikela lapha isikhathi sabo siphela khona.”" 
Luke21:25 “Kuzokuba khona iimbonakaliso elangeni, enyezini neenkwekwezini. Ephasini, izizwe zizakuba sesizini begodu zikhene lokha ilwandle nalihlokomako begodu likhiphizela." 
Luke21:26 Abantu bazakuyatha ngevalo ngalokho okuzokwehlela iphasi loke ngombana umkhambathi wezulu uzakunyakaziswa. 
Luke21:27 Ngesikhatheso bazakubona iNdodana yoMuntu isiza elifwini ngamandla nangephazimulo ekulu. 
Luke21:28 Lokha izintwezi nazithoma ukwenzeka, sikimani niphakamise iinhloko zenu ngombana ukuhlengwa kwenu kutjhidele.”" 
Luke21:29 Yeke uJesu wabatjela umfanekiso lo: “Qalani umuthi wamakhiwani nayo yoke eminye imithi. 
Luke21:30 Lokha nayitlhurha amakari, nani niyazibonela begodu niyazi bonyana ihlobo selitjhidele." 
Luke21:31 Ngokunjalo-ke nani nanibona izintwezi zisenzeka, niyazi bona umbuso kaZimu sewutjhidele." 
Luke21:32 “Ngiqinisile ngiyanitjela bona isizukulwanesi angeze sadlula kungakenzeki zoke izintwezi. 
Luke21:33 Izulu nephasi kuzadlula, kodwana amezwami angekhe adlula.”" 
Luke21:34 “Yelelani, nakungasinjalo, iinhliziyo zenu zizakudisibezwa kurhiribidela, kudakwa kanye neemfiso zepilo. Ilangelo lizanembatha njengesifu ningakatjheji." 
Luke21:35 Lizakwembatha boke abahlala ebusweni bephasi loke. 
Luke21:36 Yeke hlalani nilindile, nithandaze njalo ukuze nikghone ukuphunyurha koke okuzokwenzeka nokobana nikghone ukujama phambi kweNdodana yoMuntu.”" 
Luke21:37 Ilanga nelanga uJesu bekafundisa ethempelini, kuthi njalo nakuhlwako aphume ayokulala entabeni ye-Oliva." 
Luke21:38 Njalo ekuseni, boke abantu bephele baye ngethempelini bayomlalela." 
Luke22:1 Nje-ke umnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo ebekuthiwa yiPhasika besele utjhidele. 
Luke22:2 Abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho bebafuna indlela yokususa uJesu ngombana begade besaba abantu. 
Luke22:3 Kodwana uSathana wangena kuJudasi okuthiwa ngu-Iskariyodi, ongomunye wabafundi abalitjhumi nambili." 
Luke22:4 Yena wakhamba wayokukhuluma nabaphristi abakhulu neenkhulu zethempeli bona angamkhaphela njani uJesu. 
Luke22:5 Bathaba kwamambala, bavuma bona bazamkhokhela." 
Luke22:6 UJudasi wakuvuma lokho, wathoma ukufuna ithuba lokunikela ngoJesu kibo, isiqubuthu singekho." 
Luke22:7 Lafika-ke ilanga lomnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo lapha bekuzokuhlatjwa khona imvana yePhasika. 
Luke22:8 UJesu wathumela uPitrosi noJwanisi wathi: “Khambani niyokwenza amalungiselelo ukuze sigome iPhasika.” 
Luke22:9 Bambuza bathi: “Bewufuna siyokulungiselela kuphi na?” 
Luke22:10 Wabaphendula wathi: “Kuzakuthi naningena ngedorobheni, nihlangatjezwe mumuntu athwele umjeka wamanzi. Mlandeleni beniyokungena emzini angena kiwo," 
Luke22:11 nithi kumninimuzi loyo, ‘Umfundisi uyabuza bona liphi ilawu labayeni lapha azakugomela khona iPhasika nabafundi bakhe na?’" 
Luke22:12 Uzanikhombisa ilawu elikhulu elingaphezulu, elinepahla. Yenzani lapho-ke amalungiselelo.”" 
Luke22:13 Bakhamba, bafumana kunjengombana uJesu bekabatjelile. Yeke balungiselela iPhasika." 
Luke22:14 Kwathi nakufika isikhathi, uJesu nabafundi bakhe bazigedla etafuleni." 
Luke22:15 Wathi kibo: “Bengithande khulu bona ngigome iPhasikeli nani ngaphambi kobanyana ngitlhagiswe! 
Luke22:16 Ngambala ngiyanitjela bona angekhe ngaligoma godu bekube kulapha lizaliseka khona embusweni kaZimu.” 
Luke22:17 Nje-ke wathatha ikapho, wathokoza uZimu, ngemva kwalapho wathi: “Thathani lokhu nirhamulisane," 
Luke22:18 ngombana ngiyanitjela bona angeze bengisasela godu esithelweni sesidiribe bekube kumhlana kufika umbuso kaZimu.” 
Luke22:19 Yeke wathatha isikwa, wathokoza uZimu, wasihlephula wabanikela, asithi: “Lokhu kumzimbami, onikelwe nina. Yenzani lokhu ukuze ningikhumbule.”" 
Luke22:20 Ngokunjalo, kwathi ngemva kwesidlo santambama, wathatha ikapho wabanikela, asithi: “Ikapho le isivumelwano esitjha eengazini zami ezithululelwa nina." 
Luke22:21 “Kodwana qalani, isandla saloyo ozongikhaphela sinami etafulenapha." 
Luke22:22 INdodana yoMuntu izokukhamba njengombana sele kuquntiwe, kodwana maye kiloyo muntu oyikhaphelako!”" 
Luke22:23 Yeke bathoma ukubuzana babodwa bonyana ingaba ngubani hlangana nabo ozokwenza lokho. 
Luke22:24 Kwaqubuka ipikiswano phakathi kwabo kobana ngubani wabo othathwa bona ngomkhulu. 
Luke22:25 UJesu wathi kibo: “Amakhosi wabatjhili abusa phezu kwabo, bese kuthi labo abanegunya phezu kwabo bazibize bona babasekeli babo." 
Luke22:26 Kodwana anikameli ukuba njalo. Esikhundleni salokho, omkhulu phakathi kwenu kumele abe njengomncani bese kuthi obusako abe njengosebenza etafuleni." 
Luke22:27 Ngubani omkhulu na? Ngiloyo ohlezi etafuleni namkha ngiloyo osebenzako na? Akusingiloyo osetafuleni? Kodwana mina ngiphakathi kwenu njengaloyo osebenzako. 
Luke22:28 “Nina ningilabo abangisekeleko ekulingweni kwami. 
Luke22:29 Nje-ke nginethwesa umbuso njengombana noBaba angethwese wona 
Luke22:30 ukuze nigome benisele etafuleni lami embuswenami, nihlale eenhlalweni zobukhosi, nigwebe iinkoro ezilitjhumi nambili zakwa-Israyeli.”" 
Luke22:31 UJesu wathi: “Simoni, Simoni! Qala, uSathana ukhombele ukukuhlunga njengekoroyi," 
Luke22:32 kodwana ngikuthandazele Simoni kobana ukukholwa kwakho kungabhalelwa. Wena-ke nasele uphendukile, uqinise abafowenu.”" 
Luke22:33 UPitrosi waphendula wathi: “Kosi, ngilungele ukuya nawe ngesikhungweni nekufeni!”" 
Luke22:34 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngiyakutjela Pitrosi, ngaphambi kobana umkukurumbu ulile namhlanjesi uzabe sele ungiphike kathathu bona awungazi.”" 
Luke22:35 Yeke uJesu wabuza abafundi bakhe wathi: “Mhlana nginithume ninganasikhwama, imbada namapatlagwana nakhe naswela okuthileko na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Azange.”" 
Luke22:36 UJesu wathi: “Kodwana kwanjesi onesikhwama akasithathe, nonembada ayithathe, onganasabula akathengise isambatho sakhe ayoyithenga." 
Luke22:37 Ngambala ngithi kini umtlolo lo kumele uzaliseke kimi, ‘Wabalwa kanye nezoni.’ Iye okutlolwe ngami kuyazaliseka.”" 
Luke22:38 Abafundi bamphendula bathi: “Qala, Kosi, nanzi iinsabula ezimbili.” UJesu wathi: “Kwanele.”" 
Luke22:39 UJesu waphuma emzini njengokujayelekileko waya entabeni ye-Oliva, abafundi bakhe bamlandela." 
Luke22:40 Kwathi nabafika endaweni leyo, wathi kibo: “Thandazani bona ningangeni ekulingweni.”" 
Luke22:41 Yeke wasuka kibo waba sebangeni elingaba kuphoswa kwelitje, waguqa, wathandaza" 
Luke22:42 wathi: “Baba, nawuthandako susa ikapho le kimapha, nokho kungabi ngentandwami kodwana kwenziwe yakho.”" 
Luke22:43 Kweza kuye ingilozi ivela ezulwini yamqinisa. 
Luke22:44 Kwathi asebuhlungwini njalo, waqinisela khulu emthandazweni, umjulukwakhe waba njengamathosi weengazi athontela equlwanini." 
Luke22:45 Kwathi bona asikime lapha begade athandaza khona, walunga ebafundini bakhe, wabafumana balele, badiniwe ngokudabuka." 
Luke22:46 Wathi kibo: “Nilaleleni na? Sikimani nithandaze, khona ningazukungena ekulingweni.”" 
Luke22:47 Kwathi asakhuluma, kwafika isiqubuthu sirholwa mumuntu ebekuthiwa nguJudasi nebegade angomunye wabafundi abalitjhumi nambili. Weza kuJesu kobana amncwange emhlathini." 
Luke22:48 Kodwana uJesu wathi kuye: “Judasi, ukhaphela iNdodana yoMuntu ngokuyincwanga na?”" 
Luke22:49 Kwathi bona abafundi ebebanoJesu babone bonyana kuzokwenzekani, babuza bathi: “Kosi, sibamadlhe ngeensabula zethu na?”" 
Luke22:50 Khonapho omunye wabo wakhekhebula ngesabula indlebe yangesidleni yekhoboka lomphristi omkhulu. 
Luke22:51 Kodwana uJesu wathi: “Kwanele lokho!” Wathinta indlebe yekhobokelo, walipholisa." 
Luke22:52 Yeke uJesu wathi kubaphristi abakhulu, iinkhulu zethempeli nakubaphathi ebebazombamba: “Ngimrholi wabokanabo kobana ningabeze ningiphumele ngeensabula nangeembhuku na?" 
Luke22:53 Benginani ngesirhodlweni sethempeli woke amalanga, azange niphakamisele isandla phezu kwami. Kodwana lesi sikhathi senu namandla wobumnyama.”" 
Luke22:54 Yeke bambamba uJesu bakhamba naye bamusa ngekumbeni yomphristi omkhulu. UPitrosi walandela kudanyana. 
Luke22:55 Babasa umlilo ekabeni yesirhodlo, bahlala phasi botha ndawonye. UPitrosi naye weza wazokotha kanye nabo." 
Luke22:56 Ikhobokakazi lambona ahlezi emlilweni. Lamqalisisa lathi: “Umrhali lo gade anaye!” 
Luke22:57 Kodwana uPitrosi waphika wathi: “Heyi wena mfazi, angimazi umuntu loyo!”" 
Luke22:58 Ngemva kwesikhatjhana omunye wambona wathi: “Wena ungomunye wabo!” Kodwana uPitrosi waphendula wathi: “Madekhethu, ngithi angisuye!”" 
Luke22:59 Ngemva kwe-awara, omunye naye wayiqinisa indaba le wathi: “Ngambala umrhali lo bekakhamba naye ngombana naye umGalile!”" 
Luke22:60 Kodwana uPitrosi waphendula wathi: “Heyi wena ndoda ndina, angazi bona ukhuluma ngani!” Khonapho asakhuluma njalo, umkukurumbu walila." 
Luke22:61 IKosi yaphenduka yaqala poro kuPitrosi. UPitrosi wakhumbula ilizwi iKosi elikhulume kuye lokuthi: “Ngaphambi kobana umkukurumbu ulile namhlanjesi, uzabe sele ungiphike kathathu.”" 
Luke22:62 Waphumela ngaphandle, walila kabuhlungu." 
Luke22:63 Amadoda ebegade aqaphe uJesu amphoqa abe ambetha. 
Luke22:64 Ambopha ngetjhila emehlweni athi: “Phorofida! Ngubani okubethileko?” 
Luke22:65 Ambiza ngeenhlamba ezinengi. 
Luke22:66 Kwathi bona kuse, isigungu sabaphathi babantu, abaphristi abakhulu kanye nabafundisi bomthetho bahlangana ndawonye, uJesu walethwa phambi kwabo." 
Luke22:67 Bathi kuye: “Nakube unguKrestu, yewusitjele.” Wabaphendula wathi: “Nanginganitjela, angekhe nangikholwa." 
Luke22:68 Begodu nanginganibuza, angekhe nangiphendula." 
Luke22:69 Kodwana kusukela gadesi, iNdodana yoMuntu izakuhlaliswa ngesidleni sakaZimu uMninimandlawoke.”" 
Luke22:70 Boke bathi: “Alo-ke, uyiNdodana kaZimu na?” Wabaphendula wathi: “Kunjengombana nisitjho.”" 
Luke22:71 Yeke godu bathi: “Alo, sisafunelani obunye ubufakazi na? Angithi sele sizizwele asitjho ngomlomakhe!”" 
Luke23:1 Yeke, woke umkhambathi wasikima, wamdosela kuPilatu." 
Luke23:2 Bathoma ukumsola ngomlandu bathi: “Sifumene umuntu lo akhohlisa isizwe sekhethu. Ujamelene nokukhokhwa komthelo wombusi omkhulu, begodu ukhamba azitjho bona yena unguKrestu.”" 
Luke23:3 UPilatu wambuza wathi: “Uyikosi yamaJuda na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Iye, kunjengombana usitjho.”" 
Luke23:4 Yeke uPilatu wathi kumphristi omkhulu nesiqubuthwini: “Angisifumani isizathu sokuthwesa indoda le umlandu.” 
Luke23:5 Kodwana baphikelela bathi: “Idlhadlhabalisa abantu kilo loke leJudiya ngefundiswayo le. Ithome le eGalile kwanjesi sele ilapha.” 
Luke23:6 Ekuzweni kwakhe lokho, uPilatu wabuza bona umuntu lo mGalile na?" 
Luke23:7 Kwathi bona alemuke bonyana uJesu bekangaphasi kwelawulo lakaHerode, wamthumela kuHerode ogade aseJerusalema isikhatheso." 
Luke23:8 UHerode wathaba kwamambala lokha nabona uJesu ngombana besele kusikhathi eside amfuna. Ukuya ngalokho ebekakuzwe ngaye, begade anethemba lokobana uzambona asenza imikarisomraro." 
Luke23:9 Yeke uHerode wabuzabuza uJesu imibuzo eminengi, kodwana akhange amphendule." 
Luke23:10 Abaphristi abakhulu nabafundisi bomthetho bebajame ubuhlomohlomo lapho basola uJesu kumbi ngomlandu. 
Luke23:11 UHerode namajoni wakhe bahlekisa ngaye bebamphoqa. Bamembathisa ingubo ehle, bambuyisela kuPilatu." 
Luke23:12 Mhlokho uHerode noPilatu baba bangani, ngaphambi kwalokho gade bazizitha." 
Luke23:13 UPilatu wabizela ndawonye abaphristi abakhulu, ababusi kanye nabantu," 
Luke23:14 wathi kibo: “Ningilethele umuntu lo, nathi utjitjizela abantu bona bahlubuke. Yeke ngimhlolisisile phambi kwenu noke, angisifumani isizathu sokumsola kwenu ngomlandu." 
Luke23:15 NoHerode azange amfumane amlandu ngombana nakhu umbuyisele kithi. Njengombana nani nibona nje, umuntu lo akakenzi ilitho bonyana angabulawa." 
Luke23:16 Ngalokho ngizakuthi akarithwe bese ngiyamtjhaphulula.” 
Luke23:17 Ubegade akatelelekile bona abatjhaphululele isibotjhwa sinye njalo ngomnyanya wePhasika. 
Luke23:18 Isiqubuthu soke sarhuwelela ngalizwi linye sathi: “Yewusisusele thina ngomuntu lo! Sitjhaphululela uBharabhasi!” 
Luke23:19 UBharabhasi bekadlhunywe ngesikhungweni ngebanga lomguruguru obegade ungedorobheni kanye nokubulala. 
Luke23:20 UPilatu bekafuna ukuthukulula uJesu, yeke wakhuluma nesiqubuthu godu." 
Luke23:21 Kodwana salokhu sirhuwelela sisithi: “Mbethele! Mbethele esiphambanweni!” 
Luke23:22 Wakhuluma nabo ihlandla lesithathu wathi: “Kubayini? Ngibuphi ubelelesi abenzileko na? Azange ngifunyane kuye iinzathu zokumgweba isigwebo sokufa! Yeke ngizakuthi akabethwe bese ngimtjhaphulule.” 
Luke23:23 Kodwana ngokurhuwelela okukhulu bathi akabethelwe esiphambanweni, yeke ukurhuwelela kwabo kwaphumelela." 
Luke23:24 UPilatu waqunta ukubanikela abakufunako. 
Luke23:25 Watjhaphulula umuntu obegade afakwe ngesikhungweni ngebanga lokubanga umguruguru nokubulala, yena loyo abambawileko, wanikela uJesu entandwenabo." 
Luke23:26 Kwathi nabakhamba naye njalo, bahlangana noSimoni weSirene, ebegade asiya ngemzini avela ngaphandle. Bathatha isiphambano bamthwesa sona kobana alandele uJesu." 
Luke23:27 Isiqubuthu esikhulu sabantu samlandela, kukhona nabafazi ebebalila bamrhahlawulela." 
Luke23:28 UJesu waphendukela ngakibo wathi: “Madodakazi weJerusalema! Ningangilileli, kodwana zilileleni nina nabantwabenu." 
Luke23:29 Mbala isikhathi siyeza lapha nizakuthi khona, ‘Babusisiwe abafazi abaziinyumba, iimbeletho ezingazange zibelethe, namabele angazange amunyise!’" 
Luke23:30 Yeke “bazokuthi eentabeni, ‘Sigubuzesani!’ bese bathi emibundwini, ‘Sigirikelani!’" 
Luke23:31 “Nakube abantu benza lokhu emthini omanzi, kuzakwenzakani-ke kowomileko na?”" 
Luke23:32 Amadoda amanye amabili ebegade aziinlelesi, nawo athathwa kanye naye kobana ayokubulawa." 
Luke23:33 Kwathi nabafika endaweni ekuthiwa liKhakhayi, bambethela lapho kanye neenlelesi. Esinye ngesidleni, esinye ngesinceleni." 
Luke23:34 UJesu wathi: “Baba, balibalele ngombana abakwazi abakwenzako.” Bahlukaniselana izambatho zakhe ngokwenza ifumbe." 
Luke23:35 Abantu bajama, babukela. Nakubabusi bona bebamphoqa nokumphoqa bathi: “Wasindisa abanye, akazisindise-ke nakube mbala unguKrestu kaZimu, ongoKhethiweko.”" 
Luke23:36 Amajoni nawo akhuphuka, afese amphoqa. Amnikela iwayini elinesibharha" 
Luke23:37 athi kuye: “Nakube uyikosi yamaJuda, zisindise!”" 
Luke23:38 Ngehla kwakhe bekutlolwe amezwi la: LE YIKOSI YAMAJUDA. 
Luke23:39 Esinye seenlelesi ebesibethelwe lapho samthela ngeenhlamba sathi: “AwusinguKrestu na? Zisindise bese usindisa nathi!” 
Luke23:40 Esinye iselelesi sasikhalimela sathi: “Awumesabi uZimu na? Angithi nawe ulapho nje ngesigwebo esifanako? 
Luke23:41 Thina sibethwa ngokusifaneleko ngokwezenzo zethu. Kodwana indoda le ayikenzi ilitho elimbi.” 
Luke23:42 Yeke sathi kuJesu: “Jesu, ungikhumbule nawufika embuswenakho!”" 
Luke23:43 UJesu wathi kiso: “Ngiqinisile ngiyakutjela bona namhlanjesi uzakuba nami ePharadesi.” 
Luke23:44 Besele kuyisimbi yetjhumi nambili emini, ubumnyama bembatha yoke inarha bekwaba yisimbi yesithathu ngemva kwedina" 
Luke23:45 ngombana ilanga lafiphala. Kwathi irharideni lethempeli latlebhuka phakathi. 
Luke23:46 UJesu warhuwelela khulu wathi: “Baba, nginikela umphefumulwami ezandleni zakho!” Wathi bona atjho njalo, wahlongakala!" 
Luke23:47 Umphathimabutho wathi nabona okwenzekileko, wadumisa uZimu, wathi: “Kwamambala umuntu lo bekalungile!”" 
Luke23:48 Kwathi bona boke abantu ebegade babuthene lapho ukuzokubukela, babone okwenzekileko, bathwala imikhono ehloko, baphadlhalala." 
Luke23:49 Kodwana boke ebegade bamazi, nabafazi abamlandelako bavela eGalile, bajamela kude, babukela koke lokhu kusenzeka." 
Luke23:50 Bekunendoda ebekuthiwa nguJosefa, alilunga lesigungu begodu ayindoda elungileko neqotho." 
Luke23:51 Yena akazange azihlanganise nesiqunto kanye nesenzo sabo. Bekavela eJudiya edorobheni le-Arimathiya, alindele umbuso kaZimu." 
Luke23:52 Waya kuPilatu wayokubawa isidumbu sakaJesu. 
Luke23:53 Yeke wasethula isidumbu sakaJesu, wasiphuthela ngetjhila, wasibulunga ngethuneni ebelikghedlhwe edwaleni ebelingazange lisetjenziswe." 
Luke23:54 Bekulilanga lokulungiselela iSabatha ebesele lizokuthoma. 
Luke23:55 Abafazi ebegade beze noJesu basuka eGalile balandela uJosefa, babona ithuna nangendlela umzimba kaJesu bewulaliswe ngakhona kilo." 
Luke23:56 Yeke babuyela ekhaya bayokulungisa amakha wokuzesa isidumbu sakhe. Kodwana baphumula ngeSabatha njengokutjho komyalo. 
Luke24:1 Elangeni lokuthoma leveke, ngovivi, abafazi bathatha amakha ebebawalungisile, baya ethuneni." 
Luke24:2 Bafumana ilitje ebelivale ithuna ligediwe," 
Luke24:3 kodwana nabangenako, azange basifumane isidumbu seKosi uJesu." 
Luke24:4 Kwathi basararekile ngalokho, khonapho kwaba khona amadoda amabili embethe izambatho eziphazima njengombani ajame hlanu kwabo." 
Luke24:5 Ngokwesaba okukhulu, abafazi bahloma iinhloko phasi, kodwana amadoda lawo athi kibo: “Nifunelani ophilako hlangana nabafileko na?" 
Luke24:6 Akakho lapha, uvukile! Khumbulani bona wathini kini lokha nasese nani eGalile." 
Luke24:7 Angithi wathi, ‘INdodana yoMuntu kufanele inikelwe ezandleni zezoni, ibethelwe esiphambanweni, kuthi ngelanga lesithathu ivuke.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Yeke bakhumbula amezwakhe. 
Luke24:9 Bathi nababuya ethuneni, batjela abafundi abalitjhumi nanye kanye nabanye zoke iindabezi." 
Luke24:10 Begade kunguMariya Magdalina, uJwana, noMariya unina kaJakopo kanye nabanye abatjela abapostoli iindabezi." 
Luke24:11 Kodwana abapostoli azange bakholwe abafazaba ngombana kibo amezwabo azwakala kuyintolwani nje kwaphela. 
Luke24:12 Nanyana kunjalo, uPitrosi weqa wagijimela ethuneni. Wafika wagugubala, wabona itjhila lilodwa linganamuntu. Wabuyela emuva ararekile ngokwenzekileko." 
Luke24:13 Yeke khona mhlokho abalandeli ababili bakaJesu gade basiya emzini ebekuthiwa yi-Emawusi, kulibanga elingaba makhilomitha alitjhumi nanye ukusuka eJerusalema." 
Luke24:14 Bebakhamba bakhuluma ngakho koke okwenzekileko. 
Luke24:15 Kwathi basakhuluma njalo babonisana ngezintwezi, uJesu ngokwakhe watjhidela wakhambisana nabo;" 
Luke24:16 kodwana kwafihleka kibo kobana bamazi. 
Luke24:17 UJesu wathi kibo: “Nikhulumisana ngani ekhambeni lenweli na?” Bajama, ubuso babo bukhathazekile." 
Luke24:18 Omunye wabo ebekuthiwa nguKleyopasi, wambuza wathi: “Senguwe kwaphela isikhambi lapha eJerusalema esingaziko ngezinto ezenzeke lapha amalangana la na?”" 
Luke24:19 Wabuza wathi: “Zizinto bani lezo?” Bamphendula bathi: “Zizinto ezenzeka kuJesu weNazaretha. Begade amphorofidi, anamandla ngelizwi nangezenzo phambi kwakaZimu nebantwini boke." 
Luke24:20 Abaphristi abakhulu nababusi bamnikela kobana agwetjelwe ukufa, yeke bambethela esiphambanweni." 
Luke24:21 Kodwana besinethemba lokobona ungiloyo ozokuhlenga u-Israyeli. Okukhulu-ke kukuthi sele kulilanga lesithathu kwenzekile lokhu. 
Luke24:22 Phezu kwalokho abafazi besiqhema sethu basimangazile. Baye ethuneni ngamasa ekuseni nje 
Luke24:23 kodwana akhange bafunyane umzimbakhe. Babuyile-ke bazositjela bona babone umbono weengilozi ezibatjele bona uvukile, uyaphila." 
Luke24:24 Yeke abanye besiqhema sethu bayile ethunenapho, bafumana kunjengombana abafazi bebatjhwile, kodwana yena azange bambone.”" 
Luke24:25 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Maye niziindlhayela kangangani! Nibuthaka eenhliziyweni ukukholwa koke okwakhulunywa baphorofidi! 
Luke24:26 Kanti uKrestu ubekangakafaneli adlule emtlhagweni lo ngemva kwalapho-ke angene ephazimulwenakhe na?” 
Luke24:27 Yeke uJesu wabahlathululela bona kwathiwani ngaye kiyo yoke imitlolo ecwengileko, kusukela emthethweni kaMosi nakiyo yoke imitlolo yabaphorofidi." 
Luke24:28 Kuthe nasele batjhidele emzini ogade beze kiwo, uJesu wenza sengathi udlulela phambili." 
Luke24:29 Kodwana bamrabhela bathi: “Hlala nathi, qala sekuhlwile. Ilanga selitjhingile.” Yeke wangena, wahlala nabo." 
Luke24:30 Kwathi nasetafuleni kanye nabo wathatha isikwa, wathokoza uZimu, wasihlephula wabapha." 
Luke24:31 Yeke amehlwabo avuleka, khonapho bamazi, kodwana wanyamalala emehlwenabo." 
Luke24:32 Babuzana bathi: “Iinhliziyo zethu bezingavuthi ngaphakathi kwethu lokha nakhuluma nathi endleleni nazasihlathululela imitlolo na?” 
Luke24:33 Basikima khonokho babuyela emuva eJerusalema. Lapho bafumana abafundi abalitjhumi nanye nalabo ebebanabo bahlangene ndawonye 
Luke24:34 basithi: “Kuliqiniso! IKosi ivukile beyazibonakalisa kuSimoni.” 
Luke24:35 Yeke ababili bademba ngalokho okwenzeke endlelenabo nangendlela amehlwabo avuleke ngakhona lokha uJesu nahlephula isikwa. 
Luke24:36 Kwathi nabasakhuluma ngezintwezi, uJesu ngokwakhe wajama hlangana nabo wathi kibo: “Ukuthula akube nani!”" 
Luke24:37 Barareka bethukile, badlumbana bona babona isipuku." 
Luke24:38 Kodwana wathi kibo: “Nikhathazekeleni na? Kubayini kuvuka ukuzaza emikhumbulweni yenu na? 
Luke24:39 Qalani izandla zami neenyawo zami. Ngimi ngenyama! Ngikghwathani nizizwele ngokwenu, isipuku asinanyama namathambo njengombana nibona nje.”" 
Luke24:40 Wathi bona atjho njalo, wabatjengisa izandla neenyawo zakhe." 
Luke24:41 Kwathi khonapho bangakakholwisisi ngebanga lethabo nokurareka, wababuza wathi: “Ninakho okugonywako lapha na?”" 
Luke24:42 Yeke bamupha isiqana sehlambi ebasiweko," 
Luke24:43 wasithatha wasigoma phambi kwabo. 
Luke24:44 Wathi kibo: “Lezi zizinto enganitjela zona ngisesenani. Zoke izinto ezitlolwe ngami emthethweni kaMosi nemitlolweni yabaphorofidi kanye nakumaRhubo, zimele zizaliseke.”" 
Luke24:45 Yeke waqaqulula imikhumbulwabo ukuze bazwisise imitlolo. 
Luke24:46 Wathi kibo: “Nakhu okutloliweko: UKrestu uzokutlhaga bese avuke kabafileko elangeni lesithathu. 
Luke24:47 Nje-ke kuzokutjhunyayelwa ukuphenduka nokuthethelelwa kwezono ebizweni lakhe kizo zoke izizwe, ukuthoma eJerusalema." 
Luke24:48 Nina nibofakazi bezintwezi. 
Luke24:49 Ngizonithumela lokho uBaba akwethembisileko. Kodwana hlalani ngedorobheni kufikela lapha nembeswa khona ngamandla avela phezulu.” 
Luke24:50 Waphuma nabo baya endaweni yeBhethaniya, waphakamisa izandla, wababusisa." 
Luke24:51 Kwathi asababusisa njalo, waphuma hlangana nabo wanyuselwa ezulwini." 
Luke24:52 Bamlotjha, babuyela emuva eJerusalema ngethabo elikhulu." 
Luke24:53 Bahlala soke isikhathi ngethempelini, badumisa uZimu." 
John1:1 Ekuthomeni uLizwi bekakhona, uLizwi bekakuZimu, uLizwi bekanguZimu." 
John1:2 BekakuZimu kusukela ekuthomeni. 
John1:3 Koke kwavela ngaye. Akukho nokukodwa okwabunjwa ngaphandle kwakhe. 
John1:4 Ukuphila bekukuye; ukuphila lokho kwaba kukhanya kwabantu. 
John1:5 Ukukhanya kwakhanya ebumnyameni nobumnyama azange buhlule ukukhanya. 
John1:6 Kwabakhona umuntu othunywe nguZimu, ibizo lakhe linguJwanisi." 
John1:7 Weza kobana azokufakaza ngokukhanya, khona boke bazakukholwa ngaye." 
John1:8 Yena bekangasikho ukukhanya, kodwana weza kobana azokufakaza ngokukhanya." 
John1:9 Lowo bekumkhanyo wamambala, obuzakuza ephasinapha uzokukhanyisela woke umuntu." 
John1:10 ULizwi bekakhona ephasini begodu iphasi ladalwa ngaye, kodwana iphasi azange khelimazi." 
John1:11 Weza ephasini lekhabo, abantu bekhabo azange bamamukele." 
John1:12 Kodwana boke abamamukelako bebakholwa ebizweni lakhe, wabapha ilungelo lokuba bantwana bakaZimu," 
John1:13 iye, labo abangakabelethwa ngeengazi nangentando yenyama namkha yomuntu kodwana ngentando kaZimu." 
John1:14 ULizwi waba yinyama, wakha phakathi kwethu azele umusa neqiniso. Sabona iphazimulwakhe, iphazimulo ayamukela kuYise njengeNdodanakhe eyodwa tere." 
John1:15 UJwanisi wafakaza ngaye, arhuwelela athi: “Nguye lo ebengikhuluma ngaye ngisithi, ‘Loyo oza emva kwami mkhulu kunami ngombana yena gade akhona ngingakabikho.’ ”" 
John1:16 Ngokuzala kwakhe umusa saphiwa soke umusa phezu komusa. 
John1:17 Umthetho weza ngoMosi, kodwana umusa neqiniso kweza ngoJesu Krestu." 
John1:18 Akakho noyedwa owakhe wabona uZimu, ngaphandle kweNdodanakhe ebelethwe yodwa esesifubeni sakaYise, ngiyo kwaphela embonakalisileko." 
John1:19 Lobu bufakazi bakaJwanisi ngesikhathi amaJuda nakathumela abaphristi namaLevi basuka eJerusalema bambuza bathi: “Kanti wena ungubani?” 
John1:20 Yena wavuma azange aphike, wakhuluma waphandlesela wathi: “Angisuye uKrestu mina.”" 
John1:21 Bambuza bathi: “Alo-ke ungubani na? Ungu-Eliya?” Waphendula wathi: “Awa, angisuye.” Bambuza godu bathi: “Umphorofidi na?” Waphendula wathi: “Awa angisuye.”" 
John1:22 Bathi kuye: “Yeke sitjela bona ungubani. Kufanele sibuyisele ipendulo kilabo abasithumileko. Zitjho bona ungubani?” 
John1:23 Yena wabaphendula njengombana kwatjho umphorofidi u-Isaya, wathi: “Mina ngililizwi laloyo orhuwelelako erhalawumbeni asithi, ‘Yenzani indlela yeKosi inqophe!’ ”" 
John1:24 Nje-ke abazenda ebegade bathunywe baFarisabo," 
John1:25 bambuza bathi: “NawungasinguKrestu namkha u-Eliya nanyana umphorofidi, alo-ke ubhabhadiselani?”" 
John1:26 UJwanisi wabaphendula wathi: “Mina ngibhabhadisa ngamanzi, kodwana hlangana nani kujame eningamaziko," 
John1:27 iye, oza emva kwami nengingakafaneli ukutjhaphulula umutjana wamapatlagwanakhe.”" 
John1:28 Koke lokhu kwenzeka eBhethaniya ngaphetjheya kweJordani, lapha uJwanisi gade abhabhadisa khona." 
John1:29 Ngomuso uJwanisi wabona uJesu asiza kuye, wathi: “Qalani nasiya iMvana kaZimu, esusa isono sephasi!" 
John1:30 Nguye ebengikhuluma ngaye nangisithi, ‘Oza emva kwami, mkhulu kunami ngombana gade akhona ngingakabikho.’" 
John1:31 Nami ngokwami azange khengimazi, kungalokho ngize kobana ngibhabhadise ngamanzi khona azakubonakaliswa kwa-Israyeli.”" 
John1:32 UJwanisi waveza ubufakazi wathi: “Ngibone uMoya ehla njengezuba avela ezulwini, wahlala phezu kwakhe." 
John1:33 Nalapho azange ngazi bona nguye. Kodwana owangithuma bona ngibhabhadise ngamanzi, wathi kimi, ‘Loyo okuzakuthi nawubona uMoya ehla abe ahlale phezu kwakhe, nguye obhabhadisa ngoMoya oCwengileko.’" 
John1:34 “Ngalokho ngikubonile lokho begodu ngiyafakaza bona lo yiNdodana kaZimu.” 
John1:35 Ngelanga elilandelako godu uJwanisi bekajame lapho nabafundi bakhe ababili; 
John1:36 waqala wabona uJesu asekhambeni wathi: “Qalani, naso iMvana kaZimu!”" 
John1:37 Kwathi bona abafundi ababili bamuzwe atjho njalo, balandela uJesu." 
John1:38 UJesu waphenduka, wababona bamlandela, wababuza wathi: “Nilila ngani?” Bona bathi kuye: “Rabi,” (nakutjhugululwako kutjho bona Mfundisi) “uhlalaphi na?”" 
John1:39 Wabaphendula wathi: “Yizani nizokubona.” Besele lithambeme, yeke bakhamba naye bayokubona lapha ahlala khona, bahlala lapho naye imini yoke." 
John1:40 Omunye wababilabo gade kungu-Andrisi, umfowabo lakaSimoni Pitrosi." 
John1:41 Kokuthoma u-Andrisi wafumana umfowabo uSimoni, wamtjela wathi: “Simfumene uMesiya.” (Nakutjhugululwako kutjho uKrestu.)" 
John1:42 Yeke wathatha uSimoni wamusa kuJesu. UJesu wamqala wathi kuye: “Ibizo lakho nguSimoni, umsa kaJwanisi, uzakubizwa bona unguKhefasi.” (Kuyafana nokuthi Pitrosi nakutjhugululwako.)" 
John1:43 Ngelanga elilandelako uJesu wazilungiselela ukuya eGalile. Wafumana uFlebhe wathi kuye: “Namba sikhambe!” 
John1:44 UFlebhe bekungeweBhethe-Sayida edorobheni lekhabo laka-Andrisi noPitrosi. 
John1:45 UFlebhe wafumana uNathaniyeli, wathi kuye: “Simfumene loyo uMosi atlole ngaye encwadini yomthetho, ngitjho nabaphorofidi abatlola ngaye. UnguJesu, indodana kaJosefa, weNazaretha.”" 
John1:46 UNathaniyeli wabuza wathi: “Kukhona okulungileko okungavela eNazaretha na?” UFlebhe waphendula wathi: “Yiza uzokubona!” 
John1:47 UJesu wabona uNathaniyeli asiza kuye, wakhuluma ngaye wathi: “Nangu umIsrayeli wamambala, onganamanga.”" 
John1:48 UNathaniyeli wambuza wathi: “Ungazelaphi na?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Ngikubone ngaphambi kobana uFlebhe akubize usesengaphasi komuthi wamakhiwani.” 
John1:49 UNathaniyeli wamphendula wathi: “Mfundisi, uyiNdodana kaZimu! UyiKosi yakwa-Israyeli!”" 
John1:50 UJesu wathi kuye: “Ukholwa ngombana ngithe kuwe ngikubone ngaphasi komuthi wamakhiwani na? Uzokubona okukhulu kunalokhu!” 
John1:51 Wathi godu kibo: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi: Nizokubona izulu livuleka, iingilozi zakaZimu zehla zenyuka phezu kweNdodana yoMuntu.”" 
John2:1 Ngelanga lesithathu kwaba nobukhazi eKana leGalile, unina lakaJesu akhona naye lapho." 
John2:2 UJesu nabafundi bakhe gade bamenyiwe ebukhazinobo. 
John2:3 Kwathi bona iwayini liphele, unina lakaJesu wathi kuye: “Abasenalo iwayini.”" 
John2:4 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Umma angakhathazeki ngokuqalene nami, isikhathi sami asikafiki.”" 
John2:5 Yeke unina wathi eencekwini: “Yenzani nanyana yini akutjhoko.” 
John2:6 Bekurheme lapho imijeka yamanzi emithandathu, ibekwe ngekwesiko lesiJuda lokuzihlambulula. Ngamunye gade ungamumatha amalitha angapheze abe likhulu." 
John2:7 UJesu wathi eencekwini: “Zalisani imijeka le ngamanzi.” Bayizalisa, yaphuphuma." 
John2:8 Wathi kizo: “Khelelani-ke niyokunikela usomnyanya.” Mbala bamkhelela. 
John2:9 Kwathi lokha usomnyanya nakandipha amanzi ebesele aphenduke iwayini, azange azi bona iwayini leli livelaphi. Kodwana iinceku ezakhelela amanzi zazi bonyana libuyaphi; yeke wabiza umkhwenyani." 
John2:10 Wathi kuye: “Woke umuntu ukhupha iwayini elimnandi qangi, kuthi nakube abathekeli abaneli ngokusela, kukhutjhwe itlwembu. Kodwana wena usalokho ukhupha iwayini elimnandi bekube kunje!”" 
John2:11 UJesu wenza isibonakaliso sakhe sokuthoma eKana engeGalile lapha abonakalisa khona iphazimulwakhe, abafundi bakhe bamkholwa." 
John2:12 Ngemva kwalokho, uJesu nonina, abafowabo nabafundi bakhe baya eKapernawumi, bahlala lapho amalangana." 
John2:13 Isikhathi somnyanya wePhasika besesitjhidele, yeke uJesu waya eJerusalema." 
John2:14 Lapho wafumana abantu ngethempelini bathengisa iinkomo, izimvu namazuba; nabatlharulula imali bahlezi eentafuleni zabo." 
John2:15 Yeke wenza isibebhu ngeentambo wabaqotjha boke ngethempelini, kanye nezimvu neenkomo; wapewula iintafula zabatlharululi bemali warhatjha imali yabo." 
John2:16 Watjela labo abathengisa amazuba wathi: “Asuseni lapha! Lisani ukwenza ikumba kaBaba indawo yokuthengisela!” 
John2:17 Abafundi bakhe bakhumbula bona umtlolo uthi: “Ukutjhisakalela indlwakho kungidlile.” 
John2:18 AmaJuda ambuza athi: “Ungenza mmangaliso bani khona uzasibonisa bonyana unalo ilungelo lokwenza lokhu na?” 
John2:19 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Girizani ithempeli, ngizalakha ngamalanga amathathu.”" 
John2:20 Ambuza athi: “Uzalakha godu ngamalanga amathathu na? Kuthethe iminyaka ematjhumi amane nesithandathu ukulakha ithempeli.” 
John2:21 Kodwana ithempeli uJesu agade akhuluma ngalo, mzimba wakhe." 
John2:22 Kwathi bona avuke kabafileko, abafundi bakhe bakhumbula bona ubasitjho lokhu, bayikholwa imitlolo ecwengileko nalokho uJesu akutjhwileko." 
John2:23 UJesu asesengeJerusalema ngesikhathi somnyanya wePhasika, abanengi bamkholwa nababona iimangaliso azenzako." 
John2:24 Kodwana uJesu azange abathembe ngombana gade abazi boke. 
John2:25 Bekungakatlhogeki bona omunye angakhe amtjele ngabo ngombana yena bekagade asazi okungeenhliziyweni zabo. 
John3:1 Bekukhona ebaFarisini umuntu ekuthiwa nguNikhodemusi, yena ubesikhulu samaJuda." 
John3:2 Langelinye ebusuku weza kuJesu wafese wathi: “Rabi, siyazi bona umfundisi othunywe nguZimu ngombana akakho noyedwa ongenza iimangaliso ozenzakwezi ngaphandle kobana uZimu abe naye.”" 
John3:3 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi: Akakho noyedwa ozakubona umbuso kaZimu ngaphandle kobanyana abelethwe butjha.” 
John3:4 UNikhodemusi wambuza wathi: “Umuntu omdala angabelethwa njani butjha na? Kghani angabuyela ngesiswini sakanina abelethwe kwesibili?” 
John3:5 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Akakho noyedwa ozakungena embusweni kaZimu ngaphandle kobana abelethwe ngamanzi nangoMoya. 
John3:6 Okubelethwe yinyama kuyinyama, nalokho okubelethwe nguMoya kumumoya." 
John3:7 Ungarareki ngombana ngithe kuwe kufanele ubelethwe butjha. 
John3:8 Ummoya uvunguza ngapha ufuna ngakhona; uzwa ukuphephetha kwawo, kodwana awazi lapha uvela khona nalapha uya khona. Kunjalo kiloyo naloyo obelethwa nguMoya.”" 
John3:9 UNikhodemusi wabuza wathi: “Lokhu kungenzeka njani na?” 
John3:10 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Wena umfundisi wakwa-Israyeli, kodwana awukwazi lokhu na?" 
John3:11 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Sifakaza ngalokho esikwaziko, sibike lokho esikubonileko, khonapho nina bantu anamukeli ubufakazi bethu." 
John3:12 Ngikhulume nani mayelana nezinto zephaseli kodwana anikholwa; alo-ke ningakholwa njani nanginitjela ngezinto zezulwini na? 
John3:13 Akakho okhe waya ezulwini ngaphandle kwaloyo owehla avela ezulwini, iNdodana yoMuntu." 
John3:14 “Njengombana uMosi waphakamisa inyoka erhalawumbeni, njalo-ke neNdodana yoMuntu kufanele iphakanyiswe," 
John3:15 ukuze kuthi loyo okholwa kiyo abe nepilo engapheliko. 
John3:16 Mbala uZimu walithanda kangaka iphasi, wabe wanikela ngeNdodanakhe ebelethwe yodwa, khona kuzakuthi loyo okholwa kiyo angabhubhi, kodwana abe nepilo engapheliko." 
John3:17 Iye, akakathumeli iNdodanakhe bona izokugweba iphasi, kodwana kobana iphasi lisindiswe ngayo." 
John3:18 “Loyo oyikholwako, akagwetjwa; kodwana loyo ongakholwako, ugwetjiwe ngombana azange akholwe eNdodaneni kaZimu ekukuphela kwayo." 
John3:19 Isigwebo singilokhu: Ukukhanya kufikile ephasini, kodwana abantu bakhetha ubumnyama kunomkhanyo ngombana izenzo zabo zimbi." 
John3:20 Woke umuntu owenza okumbi, uwuhloyile umkhanyo, akezi emkhanyweni ngombana wesaba bona izenzo zakhe ezimbi zizakudaluleka." 
John3:21 Kodwana loyo owenza iqiniso, uyavela emkhanyweni khona kuzakubonakala bonyana izenzo zakhe zenziwe kuZimu.”" 
John3:22 Ngemva kwalokho uJesu nabafundi bakhe baya enarheni yeJudiya. Lapho wahlala isikhatjhana nabo, abhabhadisa." 
John3:23 UJwanisi naye bekabhabhadisa nge-Ayinoni, eduze neSalima ngombana lapho bekunamanzi amanengi. Abantu beza kuye bona babhajadiswe." 
John3:24 Lokhu bekungaphambi kobanyana uJwanisi avalelwe ngesikhungweni. 
John3:25 Nje-ke kwaqubuka ukuphikisana ngokuhlambulula phakathi kwabafundi bakaJwanisi namaJuda. 
John3:26 Baya kuJwanisi, bafika bathi: “Mfundisi, umuntu obekanawe ngaphetjheya kweJordani, ngitjho loyo ogade ufakaza ngaye, qala uyabhabhadisa, begodu boke baya kuye!”" 
John3:27 UJwanisi waphendula wathi: “Akakho ongaba nento ngaphandle kobanyana uZimu amuphe ivela ezulwini. 
John3:28 Nani ngokwenu nibofakazi bami bona ngithe angisuye uKrestu, kodwana ngithunywe ngaphambi kwakhe." 
John3:29 Onomlobokazi umyeni; kodwana umngani womkhwenyani ojama amlalele, uyathaba nakezwa ilizwi lomkhwenyani. Yeke ithabo lami seliphelele." 
John3:30 Kufanele yena akhule, mina nginciphe.”" 
John3:31 “Ovela ngehla, ungehla kwabo boke. Loyo ongowephasi ngewephasinapha, begodu ukhuluma ngezephasi. Kodwana loyo ovela ezulwini ungaphezu kwakho koke." 
John3:32 Ufakaza lokho akubonileko nakuzwileko, kodwana akakho noyedwa owamukela ubufakazi bakhe." 
John3:33 Kodwana loyo owamukela ubufakazi bakhe uqinisa bona uZimu uliqiniso. 
John3:34 Loyo uZimu amthumileko ukhuluma amezwi kaZimu ngombana uZimu unikela uMoya ngokungalinganisi. 
John3:35 UBaba uyayithanda iNdodanakhe begodu unikele koke esandleni sayo. 
John3:36 Loyo okholwako eNdodaneni unokuphila okungapheliko; kodwana ongakholwa eNdodaneni ngekhe akubona ukuphila, kodwana uzakuhlala ngaphasi kobukhali bakaZimu.”" 
John4:1 AbaFarisi bezwa bona uJesu uzuze bewabhabhadisa abafundi abanengi kunoJwanisi. 
John4:2 Eqinisweni, uJesu azange akhe abhabhadise kodwana bekubhabhadisa abafundi bakhe." 
John4:3 Yeke wasuka eJudiya wabuyela eGalile. 
John4:4 Bekufanele bona adlule eSamariya. 
John4:5 Khona wafika eSamariya emzini okuthiwa yiSikhari eduze kwesimu uJakopo ayinikela indodanakhe uJosefa. 
John4:6 Umthombo kaJakopo gade ulapho, nje-ke uJesu sele adiniwe ekhambeni lakhe, wahlala phasi eqadi komthombo; bekusemini ekulu." 
John4:7 Kweza umfazi weSamariya azokukhelela amanzi, uJesu wathi kuye: “Akhe ungiphe amanzi, ngisele.”" 
John4:8 Abafundi bakhe bebasaye ngemzini ukuyokuthenga ukudla. 
John4:9 Umfazi womSamariya wathi: “Wena umJuda, mina ngimSamariya, alo-ke ungangibawa njani amanzi wokusela na?” AmaJuda akadlelani namaSamariya." 
John4:10 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ingathana bewazi isipho sakaZimu, nokobana ngubani othi kuwe, ‘Ngiseza’ bewuzambawa, yena ubazakupha amanzi wokuphila.”" 
John4:11 Umfazi wathi kuye: “Mnimzana! Awunanto yokukha, begodu umthombo lo uyatjhinga. Uzawafumanaphi amanzi wokuphila lawo na?" 
John4:12 Utjho bona wena umkhulu kukhokho wethu uJakopo owasipha umthombo lo bewasela kiwo yena namadodanakhe nefuywakhe na?” 
John4:13 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nanyana ngubani osela amanzi la uzakoma godu," 
John4:14 kodwana ngiloyo naloyo osela amanzi engizamupha wona angekhe abe asoma godu. Amanzi engizamupha wona azakuphenduka isiyalu ngaphakathi kwakhe simondle ngamanzi wokuphila okungapheliko.” 
John4:15 Umfazi wathi: “Mnimzana, ngipha amanzi lawo ukuze ngingasoma namkha ngibuye lapha ngizokukhelela.”" 
John4:16 UJesu wathi kuye: “Khamba uyokubiza indodakho uze nayo.” 
John4:17 Umfazi waphendula wathi: “Anginandoda.” UJesu wathi kuye: “Uqinisile lokha nawuthi awunandoda 
John4:18 ngombana bewunamadoda amahlanu, naleyo ohlala nayo nje, akusingeyakho. Yeke ungitjele iqiniso.”" 
John4:19 Umfazi wathi: “Ngiyabona bonyana umphorofidi, Mnimzana." 
John4:20 Abokhokho bethu bathandaza entabeni le, kodwana nina maJuda nithi iJerusalema yindawo lapha kufanele sithandazele khona.”" 
John4:21 UJesu wathi kuye: “Yewungikholwe mfazi, isikhathi siyeza lapha uBaba angekhe athandazwa entabeni le namkha eJerusalema." 
John4:22 Nina nithandaza eningakwaziko, kodwana thina sithandaza esikwaziko ngombana isindiso ivela emaJudeni." 
John4:22 Nina nithandaza eningakwaziko, kodwana thina sithandaza esikwaziko ngombana isindiso ivela emaJudeni." 
John4:23 Kodwana isikhathi siyeza, begodu sebesifikile, lapha abathandazako bazakuthandaza uBaba ngommoya nangeqiniso ngombana uBaba uthanda abamlotjha njalo." 
John4:24 UZimu unguMoya, labo abamthandazako kufuze bamthandaze ngommoya nangeqiniso njengombana anjalo.”" 
John4:25 Umfazi wathi kuye: “Ngiyazi bona uMesiya okuthiwa nguKrestu, uzakuza; nakafikako uzasihlathululela koke.”" 
John4:26 UJesu wathi kuye: “Nginguye, okhuluma nawe.”" 
John4:27 Khonokho abafundi bakhe bafika. Barareka ngokukhuluma kwakhe nomfazi. Kodwana akakho owathi kuye, “Ufunani na?” namkha, “Ukhulumelani naye na?”" 
John4:28 Yeke umfazi wasukela umjekakhe lapho wabuyela ngemzini, wathi ebantwini:" 
John4:29 “Yizani nizokubona umuntu ongitjele koke engakhe ngakwenza. Angaba nguKrestu na?” 
John4:30 Baphuma ngemzini baya kuJesu. 
John4:31 Kusenjalo abafundi bamncenga bathi: “Mfundisi, akhe ugome!”" 
John4:32 Kodwana waphendula wathi: “Nginokudla engikugomako eningazi ilitho ngakho.” 
John4:33 Yeke abafundi babuzana bathi: “Kghani omunye umlethele ukudla na?” 
John4:34 UJesu wathi kibo: “Ukudla kwami kukwenza intando yongithumileko nokuqeda umsebenzakhe. 
John4:35 Azakhe niphele nitjho nithi, ‘Kusele iinyanga ezine bona kuvunwe!’ Kodwana ngithi kini qalani mazombe, amasimu sele alungele ukuvunwa." 
John4:36 Ovunako sele amukeliswa umvuzo begodu ubuthelela iinthelo zokuphila okungapheliko ukuze otjalileko novunako bathabe boke. 
John4:37 Ngokunjalo siliqiniso isitjho esithi, ‘Omunye uyatjala, omunye uyavuna.’" 
John4:38 Nginithume bona niyokuvuna lapha ningasebenzi khona, abanye balimile, nina nizakuzuza emsebenzinabo.”" 
John4:39 AmaSamariya amanengi ngemzini akholwa kuye ngebanga lobufakazi bomfazi obuthi: “Ungitjele koke engakhe ngakwenza.” 
John4:40 Yeke kwathi abantu beSamariya nabeza kuye, bambawa bona ahlale nabo; nje-ke wahlala lapho amalanga amabili." 
John4:41 Abanengi godu bakholwa ngomlayezwakhe. 
John4:42 Bathi emfazini: “Siyakholwa gadesi, ingasingalokho okutjhwileko ngombana nathi ngokwethu simzwile, besiyazi bona nguye uMsindisi wephasi.”" 
John4:43 Ngemva kokuphela kwamalanga amabili, wasuka lapho waya eGalile" 
John4:44 ngombana yena ngokwakhe wathi: “Umphorofidi akahlonitjhwa endaweni yekhabo.” 
John4:45 Kwathi bona afike eGalile, abantu bamamukela ngombana bebakubonile koke akwenze emcimbini eJerusalema." 
John4:46 Yeke uJesu wabuyela eKana ngeGalile, lapha bekaphendule khona amanzi aba liwayini. Nje-ke bekukhona induna egade inendodana egulako eKapernawumi." 
John4:47 Kwathi bona izwe bonyana uJesu ubuyile eJudiya useGalile, yaya kuye yayombawa bona ehle ayokupholisa indodanayo, ebesele iseduze nokufa." 
John4:48 UJesu wathi kiyo: “Ngaphandle kobana nibone iimbonakaliso neemangaliso angeze nakholwa.” 
John4:49 Induna yaphendula yathi: “Kosi, yehla ngaphambi kobana indodanami ife.”" 
John4:50 UJesu wathi kiyo: “Khamba, indodanakho izakuphila!” Yawakholwa amezwi kaJesu yakhamba." 
John4:51 Kuthi isendleleni isiya ekhaya, iinceku zayo zayihlangabeza ngombiko oyazisa bonyana indodanayo ipholile." 
John4:52 Nje-ke yazibuza bona bekusikhathi bani lokha indodanyo iba ngcono. Zayiphendula zathi: “Bekuyisimbi yokuthoma izolo ntambama lokha umgomani nawuyilisako.” 
John4:53 Yeke uyise wakhumbula bona sikhatheso lokha uJesu namtjelako asithi: “Indodana yakho izakuphila.” Yeke yena nekumba yakhe yoke bakholwa. 
John4:54 Leso-ke simangaliso sesibili uJesu asenzako ukusuka eJudiya ukuya eGalile. 
John5:1 Ngemva kwalokho, uJesu wakhuphukela eJerusalema emnyanyeni wamaJuda." 
John5:2 Nje-ke hlanu kwesango iMvu eJerusalema bekukhona isiziba ekuthiwa ngesiHebheru yiBhethesda egade sinamathuri amahlanu. 
John5:3 Lapho-ke bekulele abantu abagulako: iimphofu, iinrhurhubi nabafe ihlangothi. Bebalindele amanzi bona asikinyeke" 
John5:4 ngombana ingilozi kaSomnini bephele ingene ngesizibeni izamazise amanzi, kuthi wokuthomo ongena ngemanzini asinde kunanyana ngisiphi isifo anaso." 
John5:5 Bekukhona lapho umuntu ogade agule iminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nabunane. 
John5:6 UJesu wambona alele lapho begodu asazi bona besele anesikhathi eside agula, wambuza wathi: “Ufuna ukuphola na?”" 
John5:7 Isigulani samphendula sathi: “Kosi, anginaye noyedwa ongangifaka ngesizibeni lokha amanzi nazamazisiweko. Nangithi ngilinga ukungena, omunye nje ungena phambi kwami.”" 
John5:8 UJesu wathi kiso: “Sikima, uthathe umsemakho ukhambe.”" 
John5:9 Khonokho umuntu loyo waphola, wathatha umsemakhe wakhamba. Mhlana kwenzeka lokhu, bekungeSabatha." 
John5:10 Yeke amaJuda athi emuntwini opholisiweko: “Namhlanjesi liSabatha, kuphambene nomthetho wethu bona ungaphatha umsemakho.”" 
John5:11 Waphendula wathi: “Umuntu ongipholisileko uthe, ‘Thatha umsemakho ukhambe.’ ”" 
John5:12 Bambuza bathi: “Ungubani umrhali loyo okutjele bona uguge umseme ukhambe na?” 
John5:13 Nje-ke umuntu opholisiweko azange azi bona bekungubani ngombana uJesu besele akhambile begodu bekunesiqubuthu lapho. 
John5:14 Ngemva kwalokho uJesu wamfumana ngethempelini wathi kuye: “Lalela, uphilisiwe, yeke lisa ukona nakungasinjalo okumbi khulu kungakuvelela.”" 
John5:15 Nje-ke umuntu loyo wakhamba wayokutjela amaJuda bona uphiliswe nguJesu. 
John5:16 AmaJuda athoma ukuzumana noJesu ngombana bekenze lokho ngeSabatha. 
John5:17 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: “UBaba uhlala asebenza, nje-ke nami ngiyasebenza.”" 
John5:18 Ngokutjho lokho kwarhagalisa amaJuda bona afune ukumbulala ingasingombana wephule iSabatha kwaphela, kodwana ngombana ubize uZimu ngoyise, ngebangelo uzenze bona alingane noZimu." 
John5:19 Yeke uJesu waphendula wathi: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: INdodana angekhe yenza ilitho ngokwayo, yenza lokho ebone uYise akwenza. Okwenziwa nguYise, neNdodana iyakwenza" 
John5:20 ngombana uYise uyayithanda iNdodana, uyitjengisa koke akwenzako yena. Uzayitjengisa ngitjho nemisebenzi emikhulu kunale ukuze nimangale." 
John5:21 Iye, njengombana uYise avusa abafileko bona baphile godu, nayo iNdodana iphilisa labo ethanda bona baphile." 
John5:22 UYise ngokwakhe akagwebi muntu kodwana unikele koke ukugweba eNdodaneni," 
John5:23 ukuze boke bahloniphe iNdodana njengombana bahlonipha uYise. Ngiloyo naloyo ongahloniphi iNdodana akamhloniphi noYise oyithumileko. 
John5:24 “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Ozwa amezwami akholwe kongithumileko, unokuphila okungapheliko. Angekhe agwetjwa, kodwana udlulile ekufeni, usekuphileni." 
John5:25 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Isikhathi siyeza, nanje sesifikile, lapho abafileko bazakuzwa ilizwi leNdodana kaZimu, labo abazalizwa bazakuphila." 
John5:26 Njengombana uYise anokuphila ngokwakhe, ngokunjalo unikele neNdodana bona ibe nokuphila ngokwayo." 
John5:27 Begodu uyinikele igunya lokugweba ngombana iyiNdodana yoMuntu. 
John5:28 Ningarareki ngalokhu; siyeza isikhathi lapha boke abasemalibeni bazalizwa ilizwi layo," 
John5:29 bavuke; labo abenze okulungileko bazakuvukela ekuphileni; abenze okumbi bavukele ekulahlweni.” 
John5:30 “Angekhe ngenza ilitho ngokwami; ngigweba ngapha uZimu atjho ngakhona nokugweba kwami kungikho ngombana angiphikeleli ukwenza intando yami kodwana intando yongithumileko. 
John5:31 “Nangizifakazela ngokwami, khona ubufakazi bami abusilo iqiniso." 
John5:32 Ukhona omunye ofakaza ngami, godu ngiyazi bona akutjhoko ngami kuliqiniso." 
John5:33 Nathumela kuJwanisi iinthunywa, yena walifakazela iqiniso." 
John5:34 Ayisikukobanyana ngifuna ubufakazi bomuntu; ngitjho lokhu khona nizakuphuluka. 
John5:35 UJwanisi bekanjengesibani, sivutha sikhanyisa, navuma isikhatjhana ukuzitika ngomkhanyo wakhe." 
John5:36 Nginobufakazi obukhulu kunebukaJwanisi. Imisebenzi uBaba anginikele bona ngiyiphelelise, ekungileyo engiyenzako, iyafakazela bona mbala uBaba ungithumile." 
John5:37 UBaba ongithumileko ufakazile ngami, yena azange khenizwe ilizwi lakhe namkha nibone ubuso bakhe" 
John5:38 begodu ilizwi lakhe alihlali phakathi kwenu ngombana anikholwa amthumileko. 
John5:39 Niphenya imitlolo ngombana nidlumbana bona kiyo ninepilo engapheliko. Kodwana ngiyo efakaza ngami! 
John5:40 Khonapho nala ukuza kimi khona nizakufumana ubuphilo. 
John5:41 “Mina angilamukeli idumo ebantwini. 
John5:42 Kodwana ngiyazi bona aninathando noZimu ngeenhliziyweni zenu. 
John5:43 Ngize ebizweni lakaBaba, kodwana azange ningamukele; njeke-ke omunye nezako ebizweni lakhe, nizamamukela." 
John5:44 Ningakholwa njani nanidumisana nodwa nje, ningafuni idumo elivela kiloyo onguZimu yedwa na?" 
John5:45 Ningadlumbani bona ngizonimangalela phambi kwakaBaba; ummangaleli wenu nguMosi enithembela kuye. 
John5:46 Nangabe nakholwa uMosi, nami nganangikholwa ngombana watlola ngami." 
John5:47 Kodwana nanikholwa akutlolileko, ningakholwa njani engikutjhoko na?”" 
John6:1 Isikhatjhana ngemva kwalokho, uJesu wayamela ngaphetjheya kwelwandle leGalile, laphakhunye kuthiwa lilwandle leThibheriyasi." 
John6:2 Isiqubuthu esikhulu samlandela ngombana sabona iimangaliso azenza phezu kwabagulako. 
John6:3 UJesu wenyukela entabeni, wafika wahlala phasi nabafundi bakhe." 
John6:4 Isikhathi somnyanya wePhasika lamaJuda besesitjhidele. 
John6:5 Kwathi lokha uJesu abona isiqubuthu esikhulu sisiza kuye, wabuza uFlebhe wathi: “Singakuthengaphi ukudla ukupha abantwaba na?”" 
John6:6 Wabuza lokhu amzizinya ngombana gade sele asazi bona uzokwenza njani. 
John6:7 UFlebhe wamphendula wathi: “Isikwa seempaparwana ezimakhulu amabili wesiliva angekhe sabanela kobana omunye nomunye afumane okuncani.” 
John6:8 Omunye wabafundi bakhe, u-Andrisi, umfowabo lakaSimoni Pitrosi, wathi:" 
John6:9 “Kunomsana lapha ophethe imilombo emihlanu yesikwa sebhali neenhlambi ezimbili; kodwana kuyini lokho kwabanengi kangaka na?” 
John6:10 UJesu wabatjela bona bahlalise abantu phasi. Bekukhona lapho utjani obunengi, yeke abantu bahlala phasi, pheze bekuziinkulungwana ezihlanu zamadoda." 
John6:11 UJesu wathatha isikwa wathokoza kuZimu wabela boke abantu egade bahlezi lapho. Wenza njalo nangeenhlambi. 
John6:12 Kwathi boke sebasuthi, wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Buthelelani iintshutshuru eziseleko; kungalahleki ilitho.”" 
John6:13 Yeke bazibuthelela zoke, bazalisa iinqwebu ezilitjhumi nambili ngeentshutshuru ezisele emilombeni emihlanu yesikwa sebhali ebegade igonywa babantu." 
John6:14 Kwathi lokha abantu nababona iimangaliso ezenziwa nguJesu, bathoma ukuthi: “Kwamambala, lo mphorofidi obekufanele eze ephasinapha!”" 
John6:15 UJesu asazi bonyana bazimisele ukuza kobana bamkatelele abe yikosi, wazirhotjha wabuyela entabeni yedwa." 
John6:16 Kwathi sekurhwaqele, abafundi bakhe behlela ngelwandle," 
John6:17 lapha bafese bangena ngemkhunjini bayamela eKapernawumi. Besele kusebusukwaneni, uJesu angakezi kibo." 
John6:18 Ngesikhatheso ummoya onamandla bewuvunguza namanzi akhephuzela. 
John6:19 Sele bathaye amakhilomitha amahlanu ukuya kwamathandathu, babona uJesu akhamba ngaphezu kwamanzi, atjhidela ngemkhunjinabo, bethuka kwamambala." 
John6:20 Kodwana wathi kibo: “Ningesabi! Ngimi!” 
John6:21 Yeke bamamukela ngemkhunjini, khonokho umkhumbi wafika endaweni lapha gade basiya khona." 
John6:22 Ngelanga elilandelako isiqubuthu egade sihlezi ngaphetjheya kwelwandle, sakhumbula bona bekunomkhumbi owodwa kwaphela lapho. Begodu bebazi bonyana uJesu azange angene nabafundi bakhe nokobana bakhambe ngaphandle kwakhe." 
John6:23 Eminye imikhumbi evela eThibheriyasi, yafika hlanu kwalapha isiqubuthu besigomela khona isikwa ngemva kobana iKosi uJesu ithokozile." 
John6:24 Kwathi bona isiqubuthu sibone bonyana uJesu bekangekho lapho nabafundi bakhe, sangena ngaphakathi kwemikhumbi saya eKapernawumi, simfuna." 
John6:25 Kwathi bona abantu bafumane uJesu ngaphetjheya kwelwandle, bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, ufike nini lapha na?”" 
John6:26 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Aningifuni ngombana nabona iimbonakaliso, kodwana ningifuna ngombana nadla izikwa, nasutha." 
John6:27 Ningasebenzeli ukudla okuphelako, kodwana ukudla kokuphila okungapheliko, lokho iNdodana yoMuntu ezanipha khona. Phezu kwayo uZimu uYise, ubeke igunya lakhe.”" 
John6:28 Yeke bambuza bathi: “Alo-ke kufuze senzeni ukwenza okufunwa nguZimu na?” 
John6:29 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Umsebenzi kaZimu kukobana nikholwe kiloyo amthumileko.” 
John6:30 Baphendula bathi: “Ungenza isibonakaliso bani esingenza bona sikukholwe na? Ungenzani na? 
John6:31 Abokhokho bethu bagoma imana ngerhalawumbeni, njengombana kutloliwe ukuthi, ‘Wabapha amabele wezulwini bona bagome.’ ”" 
John6:32 Yeke uJesu wathi kibo: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi: Akusuye uMosi owanipha isikwa esivela ezulwini; nguBaba opha isikwa samambala esivela ezulwini 
John6:33 ngombana isikwa sakaZimu ngiloyo owehla ezulwini, anikele ukuphila ephasini.”" 
John6:34 Bathi kuye: “Kosi, sipha isikweso njalonjalo.”" 
John6:35 UJesu wathi kibo: “Mina ngisisikwa sokuphila, loyo ozako kimi angekhe alamba; naloyo okholwako kimi angekhe oma." 
John6:36 Nje-ke, nginitjelile bonyana ningibonile, kodwana anikholwa." 
John6:37 Koke uBaba anginikela khona kuzakuza kimi; ozako kimi angekhe ngamnina 
John6:38 ngombana ngivela ezulwini, ingasibona ngenze intando yami kodwana kobana ngenze intando yaloyo ongithumileko." 
John6:39 Godu kuyintando yongithumileko bona ngingalahlekelwa lilitho lalokho anginikele khona, kodwana ngikuvuse ngomhla wokuphela." 
John6:40 Lokhu kuyintando kaBaba kobana omunye nomunye obona iNdodana akholwe kiyo uzokuba nokuphila okungapheliko, yeke ngizamvusa ngomhla wokuphela.”" 
John6:41 Abantu bathoma ukurhonona ngaye ngombana uthe: “Ngisisikwa esivela ezulwini.” 
John6:42 Yeke bathi: “Kanti lo akasuye uJesu indodana kaJosefa esazi uyise nonina na? Alo-ke, utjho njani gadesi bona uvela ezulwini?”" 
John6:43 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Lisani ukurhonona phakathi kwenu! 
John6:44 Akakho ongeza kimi nakube uBaba ongithumileko akamdoseli kimi; mina-ke ngizamvusa ngomhla wokuphela. 
John6:45 Kutloliwe kubaphorofidi kwathiwa, ‘Boke bazakufundiswa nguZimu.’ Ngiloyo naloyo ozwa uBaba afunde kuye, uza kimi." 
John6:46 Akakho owakhe wabona uBaba ngaphandle kwaloyo obuya kuZimu; ngiloyo-ke kwaphela obone uBaba. 
John6:47 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Okholwako unokuphila okungapheliko. 
John6:48 Mina ngisisikwa sokuphila. 
John6:49 Abokhokho benu bagoma imana erhalawumbeni, kodwana bafa." 
John6:50 Kodwana nasi isikwa esivela ezulwini okuthi umuntu angasigoma angafi. 
John6:51 Mina ngisisikwa sokuphila esehla ezulwini, osigomako uzakuphila ngokungapheliko. Isikwesi siyinyamami engiyinikela kobana ibe kuphila kwephasi.”" 
John6:52 Yeke kwathoma ukuphikisana hlangana namaJuda, athi: “Umuntu lo angasipha njani inyamakhe bona sigome na?”" 
John6:53 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Naningagomi inyama yeNdodana yoMuntu nisele neengazi zayo, angekhe naba nokuphila." 
John6:54 Loyo ogoma inyamami asele neengazi zami, unokuphila okungapheliko; ngizamvusa ngomhla wokuphela" 
John6:55 ngombana inyamami ikukudla kwamambala neengazi zami zisiselo samambala. 
John6:56 Loyo ogoma inyamami, asele iingazi zami, uhlala ngaphakathi kwami nami ngaphakathi kwakhe." 
John6:57 Njengombana uBaba ophilako angithumile, nami ngiphila ngoBaba; njalo-ke loyo ogoma mina uzakuphila ngebanga lami." 
John6:58 Lesi sisikwa esehla sivela ezulwini. Abokhokho benu badla imana bafa, kodwana ogoma mina uzakuphila ngokungapheliko.”" 
John6:59 Lokhu wakutjho lokha nafundisa ngesinagogini eKapernawumi. 
John6:60 Lokha abanengi babafundi bakhe nabezwa lokhu, bathi: “Ifundiso le ibudisi, ngubani ongayamukela na?”" 
John6:61 UJesu wayelela bona abafundi bakhe bayarhonona ngalokhu, wathi kibo: “Lokhu kuyanikhubekisa na?" 
John6:62 Alo, kuzokubanjani lokha nanibona iNdodana yoMuntu inyukela lapha ivela khona na?" 
John6:63 NguMoya onikela ukuphila; inyama ayisizi ngalitho. Amezwi engiwakhulume kini anguMoya nokuphila. 
John6:64 Kodwana nanyana kunjalo, kukhona abanye benu abangafuni ukukholwa!” UJesu bekasazi kwekuthomeni bona bobani ebebangakholwa nokobana ngubani ozamkhaphela." 
John6:65 Godu wathi: “Kungebangelo nginitjele bonyana akakho ongeza kimi ngaphandle kobana enziwe nguBaba.” 
John6:66 Ngesikhathesi inengi labafundi bakhe lajika, azange belisamlandela godu." 
John6:67 Yeke uJesu wabuza abalitjhumi nambili wathi: “Angithi nani nifuna ukutlhera, akusinjalo?”" 
John6:68 USimoni Pitrosi wamphendula wathi: “Kosi, sizakuya kubani na? Nguwe onamezwi wokuphila okungapheliko." 
John6:69 Nje-ke siyakholwa besiyazi bona ungoCwengileko ovela kuZimu.” 
John6:70 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Angithi ngakhetha nina abalitjhumi nambili, kodwana omunye wenu nguSathana!”" 
John6:71 Bekakhuluma ngoJudasi, indodana kaSimoni Iskariyodi, obangomunye wabalitjhumi nambili ozomkhaphela." 
John7:1 Ngemva kwalokhu uJesu wazomba eGalile; angafuni ukukhamba ngeJudiya ngombana amaJuda bekafuna ukumbulala. 
John7:2 Kwathi lokha isikhathi somnyanya wemitlhatlhana nasele sitjhidele," 
John7:3 abafowabo lakaJesu bathi kuye: “Kufuze usuke lapha uye eJudiya, khona abafundi bakho bazakubona okwenzako." 
John7:4 Akakho ofihla akwenzako nafuna ukwaziwa. Njengombana wenza izintwezi nje, zibonakalise ephasini loke!”" 
John7:5 Ngitjho nabafowabo akhange khebamkholwe. 
John7:6 UJesu wathi kibo: “Isikhathi sami asikafiki, kodwana senu sona sihlala sikhona." 
John7:7 Iphasi angekhe linihloye nina, kodwana lihloye mina ngombana ngifakaza bona izenzo zalo zimbi." 
John7:8 Khambani niye emnyanyeni. Mina angikazukuya nje emnyanyeni lowo ngombana isikhathi sami esifaneleko asikafiki.” 
John7:9 Sele atjhwile lokhu, wahlala eGalile." 
John7:10 Ngemva kobana abafowabo sebakhambile baye ngemnyanyeni, naye waya; kodwana akhange aye bamqalile, waya bukhukhutha." 
John7:11 Nje-ke emnyanyeni, amaJuda bekamfuna, abuza athi: “Kanti uphi?”" 
John7:12 Bekukhona ukuwomuzela okukhulu ngaye esiqubuthwini. Abanye bathi: “Umumuntu olungileko.” Abanye bathi: “Awa, udosela abantu ngerharheni.”" 
John7:13 Kodwana ngokwesaba amaJuda akakho owakhuluma ngaye tjhatjhalazi. 
John7:14 Kuthe sekuphakathi komnyanya, uJesu wenyukela ethempelini wathoma ukufundisa." 
John7:15 AmaJuda bekararekile, yeke athi: “Kwenziwa yini umuntu lo azi kangaka angakafundi na?”" 
John7:16 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: “Ifundiswami akusiyo yami kodwana ivela kongithumileko. 
John7:17 Nanyana ngubani ozimisela ukwenza intando kaZimu, uzakwazi bona lokho engikufundisako kuvela kuZimu namkha ngizikhulumela kwami." 
John7:18 Umuntu ozikhulumela ngeyakhe intando, ulinga ukuzizuzela idumo. Kodwana osebenzela idumo laloyo omthumileko umumuntu weqiniso, akukho okumamanga ngaye." 
John7:19 Angitjho uMosi wanipha umthetho? Kodwana akakho noyedwa kini olonda umthetho. Alo, nilingelani ukungibulala na?”" 
John7:20 Isiqubuthu saphendula sathi: “Unedimoni wena! Ngubani ofuna ukukubulala na?” 
John7:21 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngenze isimangaliso esisodwa, noke nirarekile." 
John7:22 Ngebanga lokobana uMosi wanipha ukusoka, nanyana bekungasuye uMosi kodwana bekubokhokho benu abakuthomako, ngalokho nisoka umntwana ngeSabatha." 
John7:23 Nakube namukela ukusoka ngeSabatha ukuze umthetho kaMosi ungaphuki, alo-ke nithukuthelelani ngami nangipholisa umuntu ngeSabatha na?" 
John7:24 Ningagwebi ngokwamehlo, kodwana gwebani ngokulungileko.”" 
John7:25 Abanye babantu beJerusalema bebabuza bathi: “Kanti akusuye umuntu abafuna ukumbulala lo na? 
John7:26 Qalani ukhuluma tjhatjhalazi, abebatjho ilitho kuye! Ingabe abaphathi bamukele bona unguKrestu na?" 
John7:27 Umuntu lo siyamazi lapha avela khona, kodwana uKrestu nakezako akakho ozakwazi bona ubuyaphi.”" 
John7:28 UJesu asafundisa ngethempelini, wathi ngelizwi elikhulu: “Iye, niyangazi mina, nalapha ngibuya khona, kodwana angikazizeli ngokwami. Loyo ongithumilekho uneqiniso; nina animazi," 
John7:29 kodwana mina ngiyamazi ngombana ngibuya kuye, ungithumile.”" 
John7:30 Yeke balinga ukumbamba, kodwana akakho noyedwa okhe wamphakamisela isandla ngombana isikhathi sakhe besingakafiki." 
John7:31 Nokho abanengi esiqubuthwini bamkholwa bebathi: “Lokha uKrestu nezako, uzakwenza iimbonakaliso ezinengi kunomuntu lo na?”" 
John7:32 AbaFarisi bezwa isiqubuthu sihlebeza izintwezi ngaye; yeke abaphristi abakhulu nabaFarisi bathumela abalindi bethempeli bona bayombamba. 
John7:33 UJesu wathi kibo: “Nginani isikhatjhana esifitjhani bese ngibuyela kiloyo ongithumileko. 
John7:34 Nizangifuna ningangifumani, nalapha ngikhona angekhe nifike.”" 
John7:35 AmaJuda athi omunye komunye: “Umuntu lo uyaphi lapha esingekhe samfumana khona na? Kghani uzakuya lapha abantu bekhethu bahlakazekele khona hlangana namaGirigi na? 
John7:36 Bekatjho ukuthini lokha nakathi, ‘Nizangifuna kodwana angekhe ningifumane’, nokuthi, ‘Lapha ngiya khona angekhe nafika’?”" 
John7:37 Ngelanga lamaphelelo neliqakathekileko lomnyanya, uJesu wasikima wathi ngelizwi elikhulu: “Loyo owomileko akeze kimi azokusela." 
John7:38 Okholwa kimi njengokutjho komtlolo, imilambo yamanzi aphilako izakugeleza ngaphakathi kwakhe.”" 
John7:39 Watjho lokho ngoMoya oCwengileko ebebazamamukela abakholwa kuye ngombana uMoya bekangakanikelwa, ngebanga lokobana uJesu bekangakaphazimuliswa." 
John7:40 Abanye esiqubuthwini nabezwa amezwi lawo, bathi: “Kwamambala umuntu lo mphorofidi!”" 
John7:41 Abanye bathi: “UnguKrestu!” Kodwana abanye bathi: “UKrestu angavela njani eGalile! 
John7:42 Kanti umtlolo akhange utjho bonyana uKrestu uzakuvela emndenini kaDavida, eBhethelehema emzini lapha bekuhlala uDavida.”" 
John7:43 Yeke kwaba khona ukwahlukana ebantwini ngebanga lakaJesu. 
John7:44 Abanye bafuna ukumbamba, kodwana akakho owambeka isandla." 
John7:45 Nje-ke abalindi bethempeli babuyela emuva ebaphristini abakhulu nebaFarisini abababuza bathi: “Kubangelwe yini ningamlethi na?” 
John7:46 Abalindi baphendula bathi: “Akakho owakhe wakhuluma njengomuntu loyo!” 
John7:47 AbaFarisi babuza bathi: “Nitjho bona nani unikhohlisile na? 
John7:48 Ukhona umrholi namkha umFarisi okholwa kuye na? 
John7:49 Kodwana isiqubuthu esingazi ilitho ngomthethwesi, sinikelelwe!”"
