John7:50 UNikhodemusi owakhe waya kuJesu ngaphambilini nobekungomunye wabo wabuza wathi: 
John7:51 “Ingabe umthetho uyamlahla umuntu ngaphandle kokobana ezwiwe kufunyaneke bona wenzeni na?” 
John7:52 Baphendula bathi: “Kghani nawe ubuya eGalile na? Hlolisisa kuhle, uzakufunyana bonyana azange khekuvele umphorofidi eGalile.”" 
John7:53 Yeke woke umuntu wabuyela ekhaya. 
John8:1 Khona uJesu waya entabeni ye-Oliva. 
John8:2 Kwathi ekuseni ngesamarimarima wabuyela ngethempelini lapha abungelelwa khona babantu; nje-ke wahlala phasi bona abafundise. 
John8:3 Abafundisi bomthetho nabaFarisi baletha kuye umfazi obanjwe ahlobonga, bamjamisa phambi kwabo boke." 
John8:4 Bathi kuJesu: “Mfundisi, umfazi lo simbambe sele asendimeni yokuhlobonga." 
John8:5 Emthethweni uMosi wasiyala bona umfazi onjalo simkhande ngamatje. Alo, wena uthini na?”" 
John8:6 Batjho lokhu bathiya uJesu, khona bazakuba nesibambelelo sokummangalela. Kodwana uJesu wakhothama watlola phasi ngomunwakhe." 
John8:7 Basajame lapho bambuza imibuzo, wathabuluka wathi kibo: “Onganaso isono phakathi kwenu, akabe ngewokuthoma ukumkhanda ngelitje.”" 
John8:8 Wakhothama godu watlola phasi. 
John8:9 Bathi ukuzwa lokho, bakhamba boke ngamunye ngamunye, abaphathi ntange. UJesu wasala yedwa, nomfazi loyo asolo ajame lapho." 
John8:10 UJesu wathabuluka godu wathi kuye: “Sifazana, baphi na? Akakho noyedwa okulahlileko na?”" 
John8:11 Waphendula wathi: “Sengitjho namunye, Kosi.” UJesu wathi: “Njeke-ke nami angikulahli ngomlandu, ngalokho khamba kodwana ungabe usona.”" 
John8:12 UJesu wakhuluma ebaFarisini godu wathi: “Mina ngikukhanya kwephasi. Loyo ongilandelako angekhe akhamba ebumnyameni kodwana uzakuba nokukhanya kokuphila.” 
John8:13 AbaFarisi bathi kuye: “Manjesi khona, uzifakazela wena ngekwakho; nje-ke okutjhoko akutjho ilitho.”" 
John8:14 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nanyana ngizifakazela ngokwami, ubufakazi bami buqinisile ngombana ngiyazi lapha ngivela khona nalapha ngiyako. Kodwana nina anazi lapha ngibuya khona nalapha ngiyako." 
John8:15 Nina nigweba ngokwabantu, mina angigwebi muntu." 
John8:16 Kodwana nangabe bekufanele ngenze njalo, ukugweba kwami bekuzokuba ngokweqiniso ngombana angisingedwa; uBaba ongithumileko unami." 
John8:17 Angithi kutloliwe emthethweni wekhenu bona ubufakazi bababili buliqiniso. 
John8:18 Mina ngingozifakazelako noBaba ongithumileko uyangifakazela.” 
John8:19 Nje-ke bambuza bathi: “Ukuphi uyihlo na?” UJesu waphendula wathi: “Mina aningazi, noBaba animazi. Nakube beningazi mina noBaba benizomazi naye.”" 
John8:20 Wakhuluma amezwi lawo afundisa ngethempelini lapha bekubekwe iinlulu zomnikelo. Akakho noyedwa owambambako ngombana isikhathi sakhe besingakafiki. 
John8:21 Godu uJesu wathi kibo: “Ngizakukhamba, nina nizangifuna kodwana nizakufela ezonweni zenu. Angekhe naya lapha ngiyako.”" 
John8:22 Lokhu kwenza amaJuda azibuze athi: “Kghani uzazibulala na? Kungabe libangelo asithi, ‘Lapha ngiya khona angeze nafika’?”" 
John8:23 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nina ningebephasinapha, mina ngingowaphezulu. Mina angisuye wephaseli." 
John8:24 Ngithe nizakufela ezonweni zenu ngombana mbala naningakholwako bona nginguye enginguye, nizakufela ezonweni zenu.”" 
John8:25 Bambuza bathi: “Ungubani wena na?” UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nginguloyo ebe soloko ngizitjho bona nginguye. 
John8:26 Nginakunengi engingakutjho nenginganigweba ngakho. Kodwana loyo ongithumileko wethembekile begodu lokho engikuzwe kuye ngikutjela iphasi.” 
John8:27 Azange balemuke bona gade akhuluma kibo ngoYise. 
John8:28 Nje-ke uJesu wathi: “Nasele niphakamise iNdodana yoMuntu, nizakwazi bona nginguye engizitjho bona nginguye, nokobana angenzi ilitho ngokwami kodwana ngikhuluma lokho uBaba angifundise khona." 
John8:29 Loyo ongithumileko unami, akakangitjhiyi ngedwa ngombana ngenza njalo okumthokozisako.”" 
John8:30 Asakhuluma lokhu, abanengi bamkholwa." 
John8:31 Yeke emaJudeni amkholwako uJesu wathi: “Nanijame efundiswenami, nibafundi bami bamambala." 
John8:31 Yeke emaJudeni amkholwako uJesu wathi: “Nanijame efundiswenami, nibafundi bami bamambala." 
John8:32 Nje-ke nizakwazi iqiniso neqiniso lizanitjhaphulula.” 
John8:33 Bamphendula bathi: “Siziinzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu, azange khesibe makhoboka wamuntu. Alo-ke utjho ukuthini nawuthi sizakutjhaphululwa na?”" 
John8:34 UJesu wathi kibo: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi: Woke owonako ulikhoboka lesono. 
John8:35 Ikhoboka alinayo indawo yesiphelani emndenini, kodwana indodana ingeyomndeni nini nanini." 
John8:36 Lokha iNdodana nayinitjhaphululako nizabe nitjhaphulukile kwamambala. 
John8:37 Ngiyazi bona niziinzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu. Kodwana nilinga ukungibulala ngombana ilizwi lami alinandawo kini. 
John8:38 Nginitjela lokho engikubone kuBaba, kodwana nina nenza lokho uyihlo anitjele khona.”" 
John8:39 Bamphendula bathi: “Ubaba wethu ngu-Abrahamu.” UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Nangabe benibantwana baka-Abrahamu, ngabe nenza lokho u-Abrahamu gade akwenza." 
John8:40 Njengombana nifuna ukungibulala mina muntu onitjele iqiniso engilizwe kuZimu, kodwana u-Abrahamu azange akhe akwenze okufana nalokhu." 
John8:41 Nenza lokho ubaba wenu akwenzako.” Bamphendula bathi: “Asisibo abantwana bokonakala, sinoBaba oyedwa, nguZimu ngokwakhe.”" 
John8:42 UJesu wathi kibo: “Nangabe kwamambala uZimu bekanguBaba wenu, benizangithanda ngombana ngibuya kuZimu, nje-ke ngilapha. Angikazizeli ngeyami intando, kodwana yena ungithumile." 
John8:43 Kubayini ningazwisisi engikutjhoko na? Kungombana aniwuzwa umlayezwami. 
John8:44 Nibantwana bakayihlo uSathana, nithanda ukwenza iinkanuko zakayihlo. Kusukela ekuthomeni bekambulali, azange akhabe neqiniso ngombana akukho iqiniso kuye. Nakaleya amanga, ukhuluma lokho okuyimvelo yakhe ngombana ungusomalakazi noyise wamanga." 
John8:45 Kodwana ngombana mina nginitjela iqiniso, aningikholwa." 
John8:46 Kukhona phakathi kwenu ongafakaza bona nginomlandu wesono na? Alo-ke nangabe nginitjela iqiniso, kubayini ningakholwa na?" 
John8:47 OngewakaZimu ulalela amezwi kaZimu. Isizathu sokobana ningalaleli kungoba anisibo bakaZimu.” 
John8:48 AmaJuda amphendula athi: “Utjho bona besingakaqinisi lokha sithi wena umSamariya begodu unedimoni na?” 
John8:49 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Anginadimoni, ngihlonipha uBaba; kodwana nina niyangilulaza." 
John8:50 Angizifuneli mina idumo lami, kodwana kukhona olifunako nogwebako." 
John8:51 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Olonda ifundiswami angeze afa.” 
John8:52 Bathi kuye: “Kwanjesi khona sesineqiniso bona unedimoni. U-Abrahamu wafa nabaphorofidi bafa, nanyana kunjalo uthi loyo olonda ifundiswakho angeze ezwa ngitjho ukufa." 
John8:53 Wena umkhulu kunobaba wethu u-Abrahamu na? Yena walala, ngokunjalo nabaphorofidi. Alo, wena udlumbana bona ungubani na?”" 
John8:54 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nangabe bengingazidumisa mina, idumo lami lingaba lilize. UBaba, ngitjho loyo enimthatha njengoZimenu, nguye ongidumisako." 
John8:55 Azange khenimazi, kodwana mina ngiyamazi. Ngathana bengingathi angimazi, bengingaba ngusomanga njengani. Kodwana ngiyamazi, begodu ngiyalihlonipha ilizwi lakhe." 
John8:56 Uyihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu wakuthabela ukubona ilanga lami, iye, walibona bewathaba.”" 
John8:57 Bathi kuye: “Abe awunayo neminyaka ematjhumi amahlanu. Alo, sewumbone nini u-Abrahamu?”" 
John8:58 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kwamambala ngithi kini: Angakabikho u-Abrahamu, mina besele ngikhona.”" 
John8:59 Yeke badobha amatje bona bamkhande, kodwana uJesu wazifihla waphuma ngethempelini wakhamba." 
John9:1 Kwathi uJesu asakhamba, wabona umuntu owabelethwa asiphofu." 
John9:2 Abafundi bakhe bambuza bathi: “Mfundisi, ngubani owonileko, mumuntu lo namkha babelethi bakhe ukuze abelethwe asiphofu na?”" 
John9:3 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Akhange kone yena namkha ababelethi. Lokhu kwenzeka khona amandla kaZimu azakubonakala ngaye. 
John9:4 Ikani kusemini, kufanele sisebenze umsebenzi waloyo ongithumileko. Ubusuku buyeza lapha kungekhe kwasebenza muntu khona." 
John9:5 Ikani ngisesephasini, ngimkhanyo wephasi.”" 
John9:6 Ngemva kobana atjho lokhu, wakhafulela equlwanini wabhica idaka ngamathe, walininda emehlweni womuntu loyo." 
John9:7 Wathi kuye: “Khamba uyokuhlamba ngesizibeni seSilowama.” (Ibizweli litjho ukuthi Thunyiwe). Yeke wakhamba wayokuhlamba, wabuya sele abona." 
John9:8 Abomakhelwana bakhe nabantu abambona nakhombelako ngaphambi kwalokhu, bathi: “Akusuye umuntu lo ogade aphele ahlale phasi akhombele na?”" 
John9:9 Abanye bathi: “Nguye,” kodwana abanye bathi: “Awa, akasuye; uzifanela naye kwaphela.” Yeke umuntu ngokwakhe wathi: “Nginguye.”" 
John9:10 Bathanda ukwazi bathi: “Kwenzeke njani bona amehlwakho avuleke?” 
John9:11 Waphendula wathi: “Umuntu okuthiwa nguJesu wabhica idaka, walininda emehlwenami wathi, ‘Khamba uye eSilowama uyokuhlamba khona.’ Yeke ngaya ngahlamba, ngase ngiyabona.”" 
John9:12 Bambuza bathi: “Alo, uphi umuntu loyo na?” Waphendula wathi: “Angazi.”" 
John9:13 Yeke umuntu ogade angaboni loyo, bamusa ebaFarisini." 
John9:14 Mhlana uJesu enza idaka amphophulula, bekungeSabatha." 
John9:15 AbaFarisi bambuza godu umuntu loyo bona waphophuluka njani. Wabatjela wathi: “Waninda idaka emehlwenami; ngahlamba ngase ngiyabona.” 
John9:16 Abanye babaFarisi bathi: “Umuntu loyo akaveli kuZimu ngombana akalilondi iSabatha.” Kodwana abanye bathi: “Kungenzeka njani isoni senze iimangaliso ezinje na?” Ngalokho kwaba nokuhlukana phakathi kwabo. 
John9:17 Ekugcineni bambuza obekaphophele, bathi: “Alo-ke wena uthini ngaye njengombana avule amehlwakho nje?” Waphendula wathi: “Umphorofidi.”" 
John9:18 AmaJuda akhange akholwe bona bekasiphofu manjesi selabona, kufikela babiza khona ababelethi bomuntu loyo." 
John9:19 Bababuza bathi: “Yindodana yenu le na? Nithi yabelethwa isiphofu; nje-ke kwenzeke njani bonyana kwanjesi ibone na?” 
John9:20 Ababelethi bakhe baphendula bathi: “Siyazi bona yindodana yethu, besiyazi bona yabelethwa isiphofu." 
John9:21 Kodwana bonyana kuze bunjani ikghone ukubona nokobana iphophululwe ngubani, thina asazi. Ibuzeni, ikhulile ingakghona ukuziphendulela!”" 
John9:22 Ababelethi bayo batjho lokhu ngombana gade besaba amaJuda, ngebanga lokobana amaJuda besele enze isiqunto bona nanyana ngubani ovuma bona uJesu unguKrestu uzakurijwa ngesinagogini." 
John9:23 Kungebangelo ababelethi bayo bathi: “Ikhulile, buzani yona.”" 
John9:24 Kwesibili godu bambiza umuntu owabelethwa asiphofu, bathi kuye: “Funga phambi koZimu bona uzakhuluma iqiniso! Siyazi thina bona umuntu lo sisoni.”" 
John9:25 Waphendula wathi: “Ukuthi sisoni namkha akasiso, lokho angikwazi. Kunye engikwaziko kukobana bengisiphofu, manjesi sengiyabona.”" 
John9:26 Bambuza bathi: “Ukwenzeni na? Ukuphophulule njani na?” 
John9:27 Waphendula wathi: “Senginitjelile, kodwana anifuni ukuzwa. Yini enifuna ukukuzwa godu na? Nani nifuna ukuba bafundi bakhe na?”" 
John9:28 Bamtemeleja ngamagama bathi: “Nguwe omfundi womrhali loyo! Thina sibafundi bakaMosi! 
John9:29 Siyazi bona uZimu wakhuluma noMosi, kodwana nakumrhali loyo, asazi bona uvelaphi!”" 
John9:30 Umuntu loyo waphendula wathi: “Lokho kuyinto erarako! Abe anazi bona uvelaphi, nanyana kunjalo mina ungiphophulule!" 
John9:31 Siyazi bona uZimu akazilaleli izoni kodwana ulalela loyo omlotjhako enze intando yakhe. 
John9:32 Kwakade azange khekuzwakale bona kukhona owakhe waphophulula obelethwe asiphofu. 
John9:33 Nakube umuntu lo bekangaveli kuZimu, bengekhe enza ilitho.”" 
John9:34 Bamphendula bathi: “Wena watlujuzwa ngesonweni usabelethwa; alo, ungalinga ukufundisa thina na?” Bamribha ngesinagogini." 
John9:35 UJesu wezwa bonyana umuntu loyo urijiwe, nje-ke kwathi nakamfumanako wathi: “Uyakholwa eNdodaneni yoMuntu na?”" 
John9:36 Umuntu loyo wathi: “Nomzana, ingubani yona na? Ngitjele khona ngizakukholwa kiyo!”" 
John9:37 UJesu wathi kuye: “Sele uyibonile, begodu ngiyo okhuluma nayo njenganje.”" 
John9:38 Wathi: “Ngiyakholwa, Kosi!” Waguqa phambi koJesu." 
John9:39 UJesu wathi: “Ngize ephasinapha ukuzokugweba kobana iimphofu zibone, kuthi labo ababonakho baphophale.”" 
John9:40 Abanye abaFarisi egade banaye lapho nabamuzwa atjho lokhu, bambuza bathi: “Uthini? Utjho bona nathi siphophele na?”" 
John9:41 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nakube beniziimphofu, beningekhe nibe nomlandu wesono; kodwana njengombana nithi niyabona, umlandu wenu uhlezi.”" 
John10:1 “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Umuntu ongangeni esibayeni sezimvu ngesango, kodwana ongena ngokweqa ngenye indlela, ulisela nomdlelezeli." 
John10:2 Umuntu ongena ngesango ngumelusi wezimvu. 
John10:3 Umlindisango uyamvulela isango nezimvu zakhe ziyalilalela ilizwi lakhe. Ubiza izimvu zakhe ngamabizo azirholele ngaphandle. 
John10:4 Nasele akhuphele zoke zakhe ngaphandle, ukhamba phambi kwazo, izimvu zakhe zimlandele ngombana ziyalazi ilizwi lakhe." 
John10:5 Kodwana angekhe zamlandela ezingamaziko; kunalokho zizambalekela loyo ngombana azilazi ilizwi lotjhili.” 
John10:6 UJesu wabatjela umfanekiso lo, kodwana azange bamlemuke bona bekathini kibo." 
John10:7 Yeke uJesu wathi godu: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Ngilisango lezimvu. 
John10:8 Boke abafika ngaphambi kwami masela nabadlelezeli, ngalokho izimvu azange zabalalela." 
John10:9 Mina ngilisango. Ongena ngami uzakusinda; uzakungena aphume afumane idlelo. 
John10:10 Isela liza kwaphela kobana lizokweba, libulale belirhayile. Mina ngize bona zibe nokuphila zibe nakho kuphuphume." 
John10:11 “Mina ngingumelusi olungileko. Umelusi olungileko udela ukuphila kwakhe ngebanga lezimvu zakhe. 
John10:12 Oqatjhiweko akasuye umelusi omninizimvu. Uthi nakabona ipisi isiza, asukele izimvu abaleke. Yeke ipisi isahlela umhlambi iwuhlakaze." 
John10:13 Umuntu oqatjhiweko uyabaleka ngombana uqatjhiwe, begodu akanandaba nezimvu." 
John10:14 “Mina ngingumelusi olungileko, ngiyazazi izimvu zami nazo ziyangazi;" 
John10:15 njengombana uBaba uyangazi, nami ngiyamazi uBaba; ngidela ukuphila kwami ngebanga lezimvu." 
John10:16 Nginazo nezinye izimvu ezingasizo zesibayesi. Nazo kufanele ngizilethe. Nazo zizalizwa ilizwi lami, kube mhlambi owodwa nomelusi oyedwa." 
John10:17 “UBaba uyangithanda ngombana nginikela ipilwami ukuze ngiyifumane godu. 
John10:18 Akakho namunye ongangimuka ipilwami. Ngiyinikela mina ngokuthanda kwami. Nginawo amandla wokuyinikela, nginawo amandla wokuyizuza godu. Umyalo lowo ngiwamukele kuBaba.”" 
John10:19 Ngamezwi lawo amaJuda ahlukana phakathi godu. 
John10:20 Abanengi bawo gade basithi: “Unedimoni! Uyahlanya! Nimlalelelani na?” 
John10:21 Kodwana abanye bebasithi: “Lawa akusiwo amezwi womuntu onedimoni. Idimoni lingaphophulula abaphopheleko na?” 
John10:22 Ngesikhatheso kwabakhona umnyanya wokuhlanjululwa kwethempeli eJerusalema. Bekusebusika," 
John10:23 uJesu wakhambakhamba ngemathurini kaSolomoni ngethempelini. 
John10:24 Nje-ke amaJuda ambungelela, athi: “Kuzabe bekube kunini usoloko usilibazisa na? Nakube unguKrestu, phuma eqinisweni, usitjele.”" 
John10:25 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Senginitjelile, kodwana anikholwa. Iimangaliso engizenza ebizweni lakaBaba ziyangifakazela." 
John10:26 Kodwana angekhe nakholwa ngombana anisizo izimvu zami. 
John10:27 Izimvu zami zizwa ilizwi lami. Ngiyazazi, nazo ziyangilandela." 
John10:28 Ngizipha ipilo engapheliko, angekhe zabhubha. Akakho ongazihlwitha esandleni sami." 
John10:29 UBaba ongiphe zona mkhulu kunakho koke, akakho ongazihlwitha esandleni sakaBaba." 
John10:30 Mina noBaba simunye.” 
John10:31 Godu amaJuda adobha amatje kobana amkhande. 
John10:32 UJesu wathi kiwo: “Nginitjengise iimangaliso ezinengi nezikulu ezivela kuBaba. Alo, ezintwenezo ngiyiphi-ke into enifuna ukungikhandela yona na?”" 
John10:33 Bamphendula bathi: “Akusingebanga lento nayinye yalezi esenza sikukhande, kodwana kungebanga lokuhlambalaza ngombana umumuntu nje, nalapho uzenza uZimu!”" 
John10:34 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kanti akukatlolwa emthethweni wekhenu ukuthi, ‘Ngathi, nina nibozinyana.’ na?" 
John10:35 Nakube labo ilizwi lakaZimu elafika kibo babizwa bona ‘bozimu’, nje-ke imitlolo angekhe yaba lilize." 
John10:36 Alo, ningatjho bona loyo uBaba amhlukaniseleko wabe wamthuma ephasini uyahlambalaza ngombana ngithe, ‘ngiyiNdodana kaZimu’ na?" 
John10:37 Nangabe angenzi imisebenzi kaBaba, khona musani ukungikholwa." 
John10:38 Kodwana nangabe ngiyayenza, nanyana ningakholwa mina, okungasenani-ke kholwani izenzo, khona nizakwazi benizwisise bonyana uBaba ukimi nami ngikuye.”" 
John10:39 Godu balinga ukumbamba, kodwana waphunyuka ezandleni zabo." 
John10:40 Yeke uJesu wabuyela emuva ngaphetjheya kweJordani, endaweni lapha uJwanisi gade abhabhadisela khona, wahlala lapho." 
John10:41 Abanengi beza kuye bathi: “UJwanisi azange akhe enze iimangaliso, kodwana koke akutjhwileko ngomuntu lo, liqiniso.”" 
John10:42 Abanengi lapho bakholwa kuJesu. 
John11:1 Umuntu okuthiwa nguLazaru begade agula. Yena bekungeweBhethaniya, umuzi wekhabo lakaMariya nodadwabo uMarta." 
John11:2 UMariya ogade agulelwa ngumnakwabo lo, ngiloyo owathela iKosi ngamakha eenyaweni bewazisula ngeenhluthu zakhe." 
John11:3 Nje-ke abodadwabo bathumela ilizwi kuJesu bathi: “Kosi, loyo omthandako uyagula.”" 
John11:4 UJesu sele akuzwile lokho, wathi: “Isiphetho sokugulokhu ayizukuba kukufa; kunalokho kuzokuletha iphazimulo kuZimu, khona iNdodana kaZimu izakudunyiswa ngakho.”" 
John11:5 UJesu bekathanda uMarta nodadwabo kanye noLazaru. 
John11:6 Kwathi bona ezwe bonyana uLazaru uyagula, wahlala lapha gade akhona amalanga amanye amabili godu." 
John11:7 Yeke wathi ebafundini bakhe: “Asikhambeni sibuyele eJudiya.” 
John11:8 Abafundi bamphendula bathi: “Mfundisi, isikhatjhana esifitjhani esidlulileko amaJuda gade afuna ukukukhanda ngamatje, alo-ke ubhincela ukubuyela emuva godu na?”" 
John11:9 UJesu wathi: “Angithi ilanga linama-awara alitjhumi nambili na? Nje-ke loyo okhamba emini, akazukukhutjwa ngombana uyawubona umkhanyo wephaseli." 
John11:10 Kodwana okhamba ebusuku uyakhutjwa ngombana akanawo umkhanyo.” 
John11:11 UJesu watjho lokhu, godu wangezelela wathi: “Umnganethu uLazaru ulele, kodwana ngizakukhamba ngiyomvusa.”" 
John11:12 Abafundi bamphendula bathi: “Kosi, nangabe ulele, uzakuphola.”" 
John11:13 UJesu bekasitjho bona uLazaru uhlongekile. Kodwana bebadlumbana bona utjho ukulala ubuthongo. 
John11:14 Yeke uJesu wabatjela pha wathi: “ULazaru ufile. 
John11:15 Kodwana ngebanga lenu ngithabile ngombana bengingekho lapho khona nizakukholwa. Yeke asikhambeni siye kuye.” 
John11:16 UTomasi obizwa bona nguDidumosi, wathi ebafundini: “Asikhambeni nathi khona sizakufa naye!”" 
John11:17 UJesu wafika, wafumana uLazaru sele anamalanga amane abulungiwe." 
John11:18 IBhethaniya beyingaphasi kwamamayela amabili ukusuka eJerusalema. 
John11:19 AmaJuda amanengi bekeze ukuzokutjhiriya uMarta noMariya ngokufa komfowabo. 
John11:20 Kwathi bona uMarta ezwe bona uJesu uyeza, waphuma wayomhlangabeza, kodwana uMariya wahlala ngendlini." 
John11:21 UMarta wathi kuJesu: “Kosi, ngathana gade ulapha, umfowethu ngangakafi!" 
John11:22 Kodwana ngiyazi bona uZimu uzakupha nanyana yini oyibawako.” 
John11:23 UJesu wathi kuye: “Umfowenu uzakuvuka aphile godu.” 
John11:24 Waphendula wathi: “Ngiyazi uzakuvuka aphile godu ngokuvuka komhla wokuphela.” 
John11:25 UJesu wathi kuye: “Ngingukuvuka nokuphila, loyo okholwa kimi uzakuphila, ngitjho nanyana angafa." 
John11:26 Naloyo ophilako akholwe kimi angekhe afa nanini. Uyakukholwa lokhu na?” 
John11:27 Waphendula wathi: “Iye, Kosi! Ngiyakholwa bona unguKrestu, iNdodana kaZimu, ebekufanele ize ephasini.”" 
John11:28 Ngemva kobana uMarta atjho lokhu, wabuyela emuva wayokubiza udadwabo uMariya ngasese wathi: “Umfundisi ufikile, uyakufuna.”" 
John11:29 Kuthe bona uMariya ezwe lokhu, wasuka msinyana waya kuye." 
John11:30 UJesu bekangakafiki ngemzini, kodwana bekasesendaweni lapha uMarta amhlangabeze khona." 
John11:31 AmaJuda agade angendlini noMariya amtjhiriya, amlandela lokha nakayelela ukuphuma kwakhe masinyana. Wona bekadlumbana bona uya elibeni uyokulila khona." 
John11:32 Kwathi bona uMariya afike lapha kunoJesu khona ambone, waguqa eenyaweni zakhe wathi: “Kosi, ngathana gade ulapha umfowethu ngangakafi!”" 
John11:33 UJesu nakambona alila, namaJuda eze naye nawo alila; ihliziywakhe yakghwatheka wakhathazeka kwamambala." 
John11:34 Wabuza wathi: “Nimbulungephi na?” Amphendula athi: “Kosi, yiza uzokubona.”" 
John11:35 UJesu walila. 
John11:36 AmaJuda athi: “Qalani bona ubamthanda kangangani!” 
John11:37 Kodwana amanye wawo athi: “Alo, nitjho bona owaphophulula isiphofu ubangekhe avikele umuntu lo bona angafi na?”" 
John11:38 UJesu asakhathazeke khulu njalo, wafika elibeni. Gade lilirharha livalwe ngelitje emnyango." 
John11:39 UJesu wathi: “Susani ilitje!” UMarta, udadwabo lomufi, waphendula wathi: “Kosi, kuzakuba nephunga elimbi, selanamalanga amane abulungiwe!”" 
John11:40 UJesu wathi kuye: “Azange ngikutjele bona uzakubona iphazimulo kaZimu nawukholwako na?” 
John11:41 Balisusa ilitje. UJesu waqala phezulu wathi: “Ngiyakuthokoza, Baba ngombana ungilalele." 
John11:42 Ngiyazi bona ungilalela njalo. Kodwana lokhu ngikutjho ngebanga labantu abajame lapha, khona bazakholwa bona ungithumile.”" 
John11:43 Kwathi bona uJesu atjho lokho, wabiza ngelizwi elikhulu wathi: “Lazaru, phuma!”" 
John11:44 Ofileko waphuma izandla neenyawo zakhe ziphuthelwe ngamatjhila weliba netjhila elimhlophe ebusweni. UJesu wabatjela bona bamtjhaphulule bamlise akhambe. 
John11:45 AmaJuda amanengi ebekeze kuMariya nakabona lokho uJesu akwenzileko, amkholwa." 
John11:46 Kodwana amanye abuyela ebaFarisini ayobatjela bona uJesu wenzeni. 
John11:47 Yeke abaFarisi nabaphristi abakhulu bahlangana nebandla bathi: “Sizakwenza njani na? Qalani zoke iimangaliso umuntu lo azenzako! 
John11:48 Nasingamlisa aragele phambili enze nje, woke umuntu uzokukholwa kuye. AmaRoma azokuza athathe indawethu le nesizwe sethu!”" 
John11:49 Nje-ke omunye wabo obizwa bona nguKhayafasi, obegade amuphristi omkhulu umnyaka lowo, wathi kibo: “Niziindlhayela kangangani!" 
John11:50 Anilemuki bonyana kungcono kufe umuntu oyedwa afele abantu kunobanyana kurhayilwe soke isizwe na?” 
John11:51 Gade angatjho lokhu ngokwakhe, kodwana njengomphristi omkhulu umnyaka lowo, bekaphorofida bona uJesu uzokufela isizwe samaJuda," 
John11:52 ingasi isizwe kwaphela kodwana abuthelele ndawonye abantwana abarhatjhekileko bakaZimu. 
John11:53 Nje-ke kusukela khona mhlokho benza amaqhinga wokubulala uJesu. 
John11:54 Ngalokho uJesu azange abe asakhamba umathanda hlangana namaJuda. Kunalokho wazitsomula waya esifundeni esiseduze nerhalawumbeni, emzaneni okuthiwa yi-Efrayimi, lapha ahlala khona nabafundi bakhe." 
John11:55 Kwathi lokha isikhathi somnyanya wePhasika lamaJuda nasele sitjhidele, abanengi ababuya emaphandleni bakhuphukela eJerusalema kobana bayokuhlanjululwa ngaphambi komnyanya." 
John11:56 Bebafuna uJesu njengombana bebahlangana ngethempelini, babuzana bathi: “Nibona njani? Nitjho bona angekhe alibhada emnyanyenapha na?”" 
John11:57 Abaphristi abakhulu nabaFarisi benza isimemezelo bona loyo owaziko bona uJesu ukuphi, kufanele abike, khona bazambamba." 
John12:1 Sekusele amalanga amathandathu ngaphambi kwePhasika, uJesu weza eBhethaniya ekhabo lakaLazaru, umuntu amvusa ekufeni." 
John12:2 Lapho-ke bebamlungisele ukudla. UMarta gade atinazela aphakulula, uLazaru yena angomunye wabahlezi noJesu etafuleni." 
John12:3 Yeke uMariya wathatha isithaba samafutha abizako wenaridi, wazesa iinyawo zakaJesu, wesula ngeenhluthu zakhe. Iphunga elinuka kamnandi lamafutha lazala ikumba yoke." 
John12:4 Omunye wabafundi bakaJesu uJudasi Iskariyodi, loyo ogade azomkhaphela, wathi:" 
John12:5 “Kungebanga lani amafutha la angakathengiswa, kuthi imali leyo yabelwe abadududu na?”" 
John12:6 Wakutjho lokho ingasibona uzwela abadududu, kodwana gade alisela, njengombana gade amlondisikhwama nje bephele ebe okungaphakathi." 
John12:7 Kodwana uJesu wathi: “Mlise, alondele amafutha la ilanga lokuthunwa kwami." 
John12:8 Abadududu nizakuhlala njalo ninabo, kodwana mina angekhe nihlale ninami.”" 
John12:9 Isiqubuthu samaJuda sezwa bona uJesu useBhethaniya, yeke seza lapho. Bekungasingebanga lakhe kwaphela kodwana nokuzokubona uLazaru obegade amvuse ekufeni." 
John12:10 Nje-ke abaphristi abakhulu baluka amano wokubulala noLazaru 
John12:11 ngombana ngebanga lakhe amaJuda amanengi asuka kibo akholwa kuJesu. 
John12:12 Ngelanga elilandelako isiqubuthu ebesize emnyanyeni wePhasika sezwa bona uJesu usendleleni uza eJerusalema. 
John12:13 Sathatha amahlahla womuthi wesundu saphuma sayomhlangabeza sarhuwelela, sathi: “Dumisani uZimu! Ubusisiwe ozako ebizweni lakaSomnini! Iye, ibusisiwe iKosi yakwa-Israyeli!”" 
John12:14 UJesu wafumana udumbana, wamkhwela njengombana imitlolo isithi:" 
John12:15 “Ungesabi, ndodakazi yeZiyoni! Nasi iKosakho isiza, ikhwele udumbana osemutjha.”" 
John12:16 Abafundi bakhe azange bakuzwisise lokhu ekuthomeni; kwaba ngemva kokuphazimuliswa kwakaJesu lapha balemuka khona bona izintwezi bezitlolwe ngaye nokobana benze izintwezi kuye. 
John12:17 Nje-ke isiqubuthu ebesinaye lokha nabiza uLazaru bona aphume ngelibeni amvusa ekufeni, saragela phambili nokusabalalisa ilizwi." 
John12:18 Godu kwaba ngebanga lokobana besele bezwile bonyana wenze isimangaliswesi ukuze bamhlangabeze. 
John12:19 Yeke abaFarisi bathi omunye komunye: “Niyabona bonyana asiyindawo na? Qalani, loke iphaseli liyamlandela!”" 
John12:20 Bekukhona amaGirigi athileko hlangana nalabo egade baye eJerusalema ukuyokulotjha emnyanyeni. 
John12:21 Baya kuFlebhe, obekavela eBhethe-Sayida ngeGalile, bathi: “Mnimzana, sibawa ukubona uJesu.”" 
John12:22 UFlebhe wayokutjela u-Andrisi, bobabili baya kuJesu." 
John12:23 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Isikhathi sesifikile bona iNdodana yoMuntu iphazimuliswe. 
John12:24 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Lokha ithoro yekoroyi iwela equlwanini ingafi, ihlala injalo. Kodwana nangabe iyafa, ihloma iinthelo ezinengi." 
John12:25 Loyo othanda ipilwakhe, izomlahlekela; loyo ohloya ipilwakhe ephasineli, uzayilondela ukuphila okungapheliko." 
John12:26 Nanyana ngubani oyincekwami kufuze angilandele; nalapho ngikhona nencekwami izakubakhona. UBaba uzamdumisa umuntu oyincekwami.” 
John12:27 “Nje-ke ihliziywami itshwenyekile, alo ngingathini na? Kghani ngithi, ‘Baba, ngisindise esikhathinesi’? Awa, kungesizathwesi kobana ngize esikhathinesi." 
John12:28 Baba, phazimulisa ibizo lakho!” Yeke kwafika ilizwi livela ezulwini lisithi: “Sengiliphazimulisile; ngisazaliphazimulisa godu.”" 
John12:29 Isiqubuthu ebesijame lapho sakuzwa lokho sathi beliduma, abanye bathi ingilozi beyikhuluma naye." 
John12:30 UJesu wathi kibo: “Ilizweli lize ngebanga lenu kungasi ngenca yami. 
John12:31 Kwanjesi sekusikhathi bona iphaseli ligwetjwe; nje-ke umphathi wephaseli uzokuqotjhelwa ngaphandle. 
John12:32 Lokha nangiphakanyiswako mina ephasini, ngizakudosela woke umuntu kimi.”" 
John12:33 Wakutjho lokho abonisa indlela azokufa ngayo. 
John12:34 Isiqubuthu saphendula sathi: “Sizwile emthethweni bona uKrestu uzakuphila ngokungapheliko. Alo-ke ungatjho njani bona iNdodana yoMuntu kufanele iphakanyiswe na? Kwakhona ingubani iNdondana yomuntu le na?” 
John12:35 UJesu wathi kibo: “Umkhanyo usazakuba nani isikhatjhana nje. Yeke khambani nisesenomkhanyo, ubumnyama bungakabi ukunehlela. Umuntu okhamba ebumnyameni, akaboni lapha ayakhona." 
John12:36 Kholwani emkhanyweni, ikani nisesenawo, khona nizakuba bantwana bomkhanyo.” UJesu selaqedile ukukhuluma, wakhamba wayozifihla." 
John12:37 Kwathi nanyana uJesu enze zoke iimbonakaliso zeemangaliswezi phambi kwabo, azange bamkholwe." 
John12:38 Lokho bekukuzalisa ilizwi lomphorofidi u-Isaya nakasithi: “Somnini, ngubani owakholwa ngesikuzwileko na? Ingalo kaSomnini yembulelwe bani na?”" 
John12:39 Nje-ke azange bakholwe ngombana u-Isaya wathi godu: 
John12:40 “Yenza iinhliziyo zabantwaba ziyathe, neendlebe zabo zibe buthuntu, uphophaze namehlwabo, ukuze bangaboni ngawo, bezwe ngeendlebe zabo, balemuke ngeenhliziyo zabo, bebaphenduke bese bayaphiliswa.”" 
John12:41 U-Isaya watjho lokhu ngombana bekabone iphazimulo kaJesu bewakhuluma ngaye. 
John12:42 Nanyana kunjalo abanengi ngitjho neemphathimandla zakholwa kuJesu. Kodwana ngebanga labaFarisi azange bakhulume ngaye pha ngombana bebesaba bonyana bebangaqotjhwa ngesinagogini; 
John12:43 iye, bebesaba ngombana bebathanda ukudunyiswa babantu kunokudunyiswa nguZimu." 
John12:44 Nje-ke uJesu wamemeza wathi: “Loyo okholwa kimi, akakholwa kimi kwaphela, kodwana ukholwa nakiloyo ongithumileko." 
John12:45 Obona mina, ubona ongithumileko." 
John12:46 Ngize ephasinapha njengomkhanyo, khona kuzakuthi woke okholwa kimi angahlali ebumnyameni." 
John12:47 Umuntu ozwa amezwami angawalondi, angimgwebi mina ngombana angikazeli ukugweba iphaseli, kodwana ukulisindisa." 
John12:48 Kukhona umgwebi waloyo ongininako ongamukeli amezwami. Lona ilizweli engilikhulumileko lizamgweba ngomhla wokuphela! 
John12:49 Angikakhulumi okungekwami, kodwana uBaba ongithumileko nguye ongiyale bona ngikhulume ini nokuthi ngikhulume njani." 
John12:50 Ngiyazi bona umyalwakhe urholela epilweni engapheliko. Yeke nanyana yini engikutjhoko, ngilokho uBaba angitjele bona ngikutjho.”" 
John13:1 Bekungaphambi komnyanya wePhasika, uJesu asazi bona isikhathi sakhe sesifikile sokutjhiya iphaseli aye kuYise. Bekabathandile ekungebakhe abasephasinapha, wabathanda bekwaba sekupheleni." 
John13:2 UJesu nabafundi bakhe gade basesilalelweni, uSathana besele afake ehliziyweni kaJudasi indodana kaSimoni Iskariyodi bona akhaphele uJesu." 
John13:3 UJesu bekazi bonyana uYise ubeke zoke izinto emandlenakhe; bekasazi nokobana ubuya kuZimu begodu ubuyela kuZimu. 
John13:4 Yeke wasikima ekudleni, wahlubula isambatho sakhe, wazisonga ngethawula edinini." 
John13:5 Wathela amanzi ngesitjeni wathoma ukuhlamba iinyawo zabafundi bakhe, wazomisa ngethawula egade isedinini lakhe." 
John13:6 Weza kuSimoni Pitrosi, owathi kuye: “Uzokuhlamba iinyawo zami, Kosi, na?”" 
John13:7 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Okwagadesi awukabi ukwazi engikwenzako, kodwana uzakulemuka muva.”" 
John13:8 UPitrosi wathi: “Angekhe walinga nanini uhlambe iinyawo zami!” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Nangingekhe ngahlamba iinyawo zakho, khona awunabudlelwano nami.”" 
John13:9 USimoni Pitrosi waphendula wathi: “Kosi, yeke ungahlambi iinyawo zami kwaphela, kodwana izandla nehlokwami!”" 
John13:10 UJesu wathi: “Okhe wahlamba umzimba, uhlanzekile umzimba woke, yeke akusafuneki bona ahlambe ngaphandle kweenyawo zakhe kwaphela. Nje-ke nina nihlanzekile kodwana ingasi noke.”" 
John13:11 UJesu gade asele asazi bona ngubani ozomthengisa, kungalokho bekathe: “Anikahlambuluki noke.”" 
John13:12 Ngemva kobana ahlambe iinyawo zabo, wembatha isambatho sakhe wabuyela endawenakhe etafuleni, wababuza wathi: “Niyalemuka engikwenzileko kini na?" 
John13:13 Ningibiza ngokuthi, ‘Mfundisi namkha Kosi!’, kulungile lokho ngombana ngilokho engingikho." 
John13:14 Njengombana mina Kosi noMfundisenu, ngihlambe iinyawo zenu, nani kufuze nihlambe iinyawo zomunye nomunye." 
John13:15 Nginenzele isibonelo sokobana nani kufuze nenze njengombana ngenze kini. 
John13:16 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Ayikho inceku ekulu kunekosayo, akakho nomzenda omkhulu kunaloyo omthumileko." 
John13:17 Njengombana senazi izintwezi, nizakubusiswa nanizenzako." 
John13:18 “Angikhulumi ngani noke; ngiyabazi labo engibakhethileko. Kodwana kufanele kuzaliseke imitlolo ethi, “ ‘Iye, loyo onghwatha nami ungiphendukele waba mkhapheli.’" 
John13:19 “Nginitjela kwanje ngaphambi kobana kwenzeke, khona kuzakuthi nakwenzekako nikholwe bona nginguye." 
John13:20 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Owamukela engimthumileko wamukela mina; owamukela mina wamukela loyo ongithumileko.” 
John13:21 Emva kobana atjho lokhu, uJesu watshwenyeka khulu emmoyeni wathi: “Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Omunye wenu uzongikhaphela emanabeni.”" 
John13:22 Abafundi baqalana, barareka bona utjho bani." 
John13:23 Omunye wabo omfundi uJesu agade amthanda, bekazeyame ngaye." 
John13:24 USimoni Pitrosi wamkhweba wathi: “Mbuze bona ukhuluma ngobani.” 
John13:25 Yeke umfundi loyo wasusa ihlokwake kuJesu, wabuza wathi: “Ngubani loyo, Kosi na?”" 
John13:26 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ngiloyo engizamnikela igedzwana lesikwa ngemva kobana ngilitjhebe ngesitjeni.” Yeke watjheba igedzwana lesikwa, walinikela uJudasi umsa kaSimoni Iskariyodi." 
John13:27 Msinyana emva kobana uJudasi athathe isikwa, uSathana wangena kuye. UJesu wathi kuye: “Kwenze msinyana ofuna ukukwenza.”" 
John13:28 Akakho noyedwa wabo obekasetafuleni ogade asazi bona bekakutjhwelani lokhu kuye. 
John13:29 Njengombana uJudasi gade amlondisikhwama semali, abanye abafundi badlumbana bona uJesu bekamtjela bona akayokuthenga abakufunela umnyanya, namkha abele abadududu." 
John13:30 Sele amukele isikwa uJudasi, khonokho waphumela ngaphandle; bekusebusuku." 
John13:31 Kwathi bona akhambe, uJesu wathi: “Kwanjesi-ke iNdodana yoMuntu iphazimulisiwe noZimu uphazimulisiwe ngayo." 
John13:32 Nangabe uZimu uphazimulisiwe kiyo, khona uZimu uzakuphazimulisa iNdodana kuye, begodu lokho uzakwenza msinyana." 
John13:33 Bantwabami, ngizokuba nani isikhatjhana esincani kwaphela. Nizangifuna, njengombana ngatjho kumaJuda bona lapho ngiya khona angeze eza wona, ngitjho njalo nakini." 
John13:34 “Nginipha umyalo omutjha ngithi: Thandanani. Njengombana nginithandile, nje-ke nani nifanele ukuthandana." 
John13:35 Ngalokhu boke abantu bazakwazi bona nibafundi bami, nanithandanako.”" 
John13:36 USimoni Pitrosi wambuza wathi: “Kosi, kanti uya kuphi?” UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Angekhe wangilandela lapha ngiyako khona nje, kodwana uzangilandela kamva.”" 
John13:37 UPitrosi wambuza godu wathi: “Kosi, kungani ngingeze ngakulandela khona nje na? Sengikubhincele ukudela ukuphila kwami ngebanga lakho.”" 
John13:38 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Kungabe uqinisile bona sewubhincele ukudela ukuphila kwakho ngebanga lami na? Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Umkukurumbu ungakalili, uzabe sele ungiphike kathathu.”" 
John14:1 “Iinhliziyo zenu azingakhathazeki. Kholwani kuZimu, nikholwe nakimi." 
John14:2 Kukhona iinkumba ezinengi ekhaya lakaBaba, nakube bekungasi njalo, ngabe nginitjelile. Nje-ke ngiyakhamba ngiyonilungisela indawo." 
John14:3 Nasele ngikhambile nginilungisele indawo, ngizakubuya ngizonithatha, khona nizakuba lapho ngikhona." 
John14:4 Niyayazi indlela enqophe endaweni lapha ngiya khona.” 
John14:5 UTomasi wathi kuye: “Kosi, asazi lapha uya khona, alo-ke singayazi njani indlela eya lapho na?”" 
John14:6 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Mina ngiyindlela, iqiniso nokuphila; akakho noyedwa ozakuya kuBaba ngaphandle kwami." 
John14:7 Nakube beningazi mina benizamazi noBaba; kusukela khona gadesi niyamazi, begodu nimbonile.”" 
John14:8 UFlebhe wathi kuye: “Kosi, sibonisa uBaba lokho kuzabe kusanele.”" 
John14:9 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Isikhathi eside benginani Flebhe, utjho bona awungazi na? Loyo ongibonileko, ubone uBaba. Utjho njani bona, ‘Sikhombisa uBaba’ na?" 
John14:10 Awukholwa bona ngikuBaba noBaba ukimi na? Amezwi engiwakhuluma kini akusiwo engizikhulumela wona ngokwami. Kodwana nguBaba ohlezi kimi owenza umsebenzakhe. 
John14:11 Ngikholwani nangithi ngikuBaba noBaba ukimi. Nakungasinjalo, kholwani imisebenzi engiyenzako ngokwayo." 
John14:12 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Loyo okholwa kimi, uzakwenza lokho engikwenzako. Iye, uzakwenza ngitjho izinto ezikulu kunalezi ngombana ngiya kuBaba." 
John14:13 Ngizakwenza koke enikubawako ngebizo lami ukuze uBaba aphazimuliswe ngeNdodana. 
John14:14 Nanibawa nanyana yini ngebizo lami, ngizayenza.”" 
John14:15 “Naningithandako, nizakulonda imiyalwami." 
John14:16 Ngizakubawa uBaba, uzanipha omunye uMsizi, ozokuhlala nani nini nanini;" 
John14:17 ngitjho uMoya weqiniso, iphasi engekhe lamamukela ngombana lingamboni befuthi lingamazi. Kodwana nina niyamazi ngombana uhlala nani begodu ukini." 
John14:18 “Angekhe nginitjhiye niziintandani, ngizakuza kini." 
John14:19 Kungakabi sikhathi eside, iphasi angekhe lisangibona, kodwana nina nizangibona ngombana mina ngiyaphila nani niyokuphila." 
John14:20 Mhlokho, nizakulemuka bona ngikuBaba nani nikimi, nami ngikini." 
John14:21 “Loyo owamukela imiyalwami ayenze, ngongithandako-ke loyo. Ongithandako uzakuthandwa nguBaba, nami ngizamthanda bengizibonakalise kuye.”" 
John14:22 UJudasi, (ingasi uJudasi Iskariyodi), wathi: “Kosi, kubayini unqophe ukuzibonakalisa kithi ingasi ephasini na?”" 
John14:23 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Loyo ongithandako uzakuhlonipha ifundiswami. UBaba uzamthanda, begodu sizakuza kuye sihlale naye." 
John14:24 Ongangithandiko akahloniphi ifundiswami. Ilizwi enilizwilekweli akusilo lami, kodwana ngelakaBaba ongithumileko." 
John14:25 “Ngikhulume koke lokho ngisesenani. 
John14:26 UMsizi, uMoya oCwengileko, uBaba azamthumela ngebizo lami, uzanifundisa yoke into anikhumbuze koke enginitjele khona." 
John14:27 “Ukuthula ngikutjhiya nani. Ukuthula kwami ngininikela khona. Angininikeli khona njengombana iphasi lisenza. Ningavumeli iinhliziyo zenu zitshwenyeke begodu ningesabi. 
John14:28 Ningizwile ngisithi kini, ‘Ngiyakhamba kodwana ngizakubuya kini.’ Ngathana beningithanda, benizokuthaba bona ngiya kuBaba ngombana uBaba mkhulu kunami." 
John14:29 Nginitjelile lokhu ngaphambi kobana kwenzeke, khona kuzakuthi nakwenzekako, nikholwe." 
John14:30 Angisakwazi ukukhuluma nani isikhathi eside ngombana umbusi wephaseli selasiza. Akanawo amandla kimi. 
John14:31 Kodwana iphasi lifanele ukwazi bona ngiyamthanda uBaba nokobana ngenza poro njengombana uBaba angiyalile. “Sikimani, sikhambeni lapha.”" 
John15:1 “Mina ngisidiribe samambala, uBaba mlimi." 
John15:2 Ususa kimi yoke ipande engatheliko, kuthi leyo naleyo ipande ethelako ayihlunge khona izakuthela khulu." 
John15:3 Senihlambulukile ngelizwi engilikhulume kini. 
John15:4 Hlalani kimi, nami ngizakuhlala kini. Njengombana ipande angekhe yathela ngokwayo kwaphela nayihlezi esidiribeni sayo. Kunjalo-ke nani angekhe nathela naningakahlali kimi." 
John15:5 “Mina ngisidiribe, nina niziimpande. Ohlala kimi, nami ngihlala kuye, loyo-ke uzakuthela khulu ngombana ngaphandle kwami angekhe nenze ilitho." 
John15:6 Loyo ongahlali kimi uzakulahlwa njengepande, ome; iimpande ezinjalo ziyabuthelelwa ziphoswe ngemlilweni, zitjhiswe." 
John15:7 Nanihlala kimi namezwami ahlala kini, nizakubawa nanyana yini enikufunako, nizakwenzelwa." 
John15:8 UBaba uphazimuliswa kuthela kwenu iinthelo ezinengi, khona nizakuba bafundi bami." 
John15:9 Nginithande njengombana uBaba angithandile; nje-ke hlalani ethandweni lami. 
John15:10 Nanilonda imiyalwami, nizakuhlala ethandweni lami njengombana nami ngilonde imiyalo kaBaba ngahlala ethandweni lakhe." 
John15:11 “Nginitjele lokhu ukuze ukuthaba kwami kube kini nokobana ukuthaba kwenu kuphelele. 
John15:12 Umyalwami ngilo: Thandanani njengombana nami nginithandile. 
John15:13 Ithando elikhulu umuntu angaba nalo kudela ipilwakhe ngebanga labangani bakhe. 
John15:14 Niziinini zami nanenza lokho enginiyala ngakho. 
John15:15 Anginibizi godu bona niziinceku ngombana inceku ayazi bona ikosayo yenzani. Nina nginibiza bona nibangani ngombana nginazise koke engikuzwe kuBaba. 
John15:16 Azange ningikhethe nina, kodwana mina ngikhethe nina. Nganikhetha bona niyokuthela iinthelo nokobana iinthelwezo zihlale ukuze nanyana yini eniyibawa ngebizo lami uBaba aninikele yona." 
John15:17 Nginiyala ngezintwezi kobana nithandane.” 
John15:18 “Nangabe iphasi liyanihloya, yazini bona lihloye mina qangi." 
John15:19 Nangabe beningebephasi, iphasi belizanithanda njengabalo. Kodwana nginikhethe kilo iphasi, anisingebalo; ngikho iphaseli linihloyile nje." 
John15:20 Khumbulani ilizwi engilikhulume kini nangithi, ‘Ayikho inceku ekulu kunekosayo.’ Nakube mina bangizumile, nani bazonizuma. Nangabe balonde ilizwi lami nelenu bazalilonda." 
John15:21 Kodwana bazakwenza zoke izintwezi kini ngombana ningebami nangebanga lokobana bangakhange bamazi ongithumileko. 
John15:22 Ngathana azange ngize ngikhulume nabo, ngabe banganaso isono; kodwana manje abasenayo incancabe ngesono sabo." 
John15:23 Ohloye mina uhloye noBaba godu. 
John15:24 Ingathana azange ngenze hlangana nabo iimangaliso ezingazange zenziwe mumuntu omunye, bebangekhe babe nomlandu wesono. Kodwana gadesi sebabonile engikwenzileko, bangihloyile mina noBaba." 
John15:25 Lokhu kuzaliseka ilizwi elitlolwe emthethwenabo othi, ‘Bangihloye kunganasizathu.’" 
John15:26 “Lokha nasele afikile uMsizi, engizamthumela abuya kuBaba, uMoya weqiniso ovela kuBaba, uzokufakaza ngami." 
John15:27 Nani godu nizakufakaza ngombana gade ninami kusukela ekuthomeni.” 
John16:1 “Lokho ngikukhulume kini ukuze ningakhubeki. 
John16:2 Nizakuqotjhwa ngemasinagogini, kodwana kuzakufika isikhathi lapha nanyana ngubani onibulalako azakudlumbana bona usebenzela uZimu." 
John16:3 Lokhu bazakwenza kini ngombana bangamazi uBaba nami. 
John16:4 Kodwana ngikhulume lokhu kini ukuze kuthi isikhathi sabo nasifikako, nikhumbule bona nganitjela izintwezi. “Azange nginitjele lokhu ekuthomeni ngombana gade nginani." 
John16:5 Nje-ke kwanjesi ngiya kuye ongithumileko kodwana akakho noyedwa ongibuzako bona ngiyaphi. 
John16:6 Yeke njengombana sengikhulume izintwezi, iinhliziyo zenu zembethwe lisizi." 
John16:7 Kodwana nginitjela iqiniso nangithi kunilungele bonyana ngikhambe; nangingakhambiko, uMsizi angekhe eza kini. Kodwana nangikhambako, ngizamthumela kini." 
John16:8 Begodu nakafikako yena, uzakwembulela iphasi mayelana nesono nokulunga nokugweba:" 
John16:9 Mayelana nesono ngombana bangakholwa kimi; 
John16:10 mayelana nokulunga ngombana ngiya kuBaba angekhe nisangibona; 
John16:11 mayelana nokugweba ngombana umbusi wephaseli selagwetjiwe. 
John16:12 “Ngisenokunengi engifuna ukunitjela khona, kodwana angekhe nikwazi ukukuthwala kwanjesi." 
John16:13 Kodwana kuzakuthi lokha uMoya weqiniso nasele afikile, uzanidosela kilo loke iqiniso ngombana akakazokukhuluma okungekwakhe, kodwana uzakukhuluma lokho akuzwako, anibikele nangalokho okuzako." 
John16:14 Uyongiphazimulisa ngombana uzokuthatha okwami anazise khona. 
John16:15 Koke uBaba anakho kungekwami, ngikho lokhu ngithe uzakuthatha kokwami anibekele khona.”" 
John16:16 “Kuzakuba sikhatjhana ningangiboni; kuthi isikhatjhana ningibone godu.” 
John16:17 Abanye babafundi bakhe babuzana bathi: “Utjho ukuthini nakathi, ‘Kuzakuba sikhatjhana ningangiboni; kuthi isikhatjhana ningibone godu’ nokuthi, ‘Ngombana ngiya kuBaba’ na?”" 
John16:18 Ngalokho bebabuza basithi: “Kutjho ukuthini ukuthi isikhatjhana na? Asazi thina bona ukhuluma ngani!” 
John16:19 UJesu bekasazi bona bafuna ukumbuza, yeke wathi kibo: “Nibuzana bona ngitjho ukuthini nangithi, ‘Kuzakuba sikhatjhana ningangiboni; kuthi isikhatjhana ningibone godu?’" 
John16:20 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Nizakulila nibibitheke, kodwana iphasi lizakuthaba. Nina nizakuba lisizi kodwana isizi lenu lizakuphenduka ukuthaba." 
John16:21 Umfazi nasele atjhidele ukubeletha, uzwa iinhlungu ngombana isikhathi sakhe vane sesifikile; kodwana umntwana nasele abelethiwe akasakhumbuli ubuhlungu ngombana sekubelethwe umntwana ephasini." 
John16:22 Kunjalo-ke nangani: Kwanjesi nilisizi, kodwana ngizakubuye nginibone godu, ihliziywenu ithabe; nethabelo angekhe lathathwa mumuntu kini." 
John16:23 “Mhlokho angekhe nabawa ilitho kimi. Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kini: UBaba uzanipha nanyana yini enizayibawa ngebizo lami. 
John16:24 Kufikela njesi anikabawi ilitho ebizweni lami. Bawani nizakuphiwa khona kuzakuzala ithabo lenu.” 
John16:25 “Ngikhulume kini ngemifanekiso. Siyeza isikhathi lapha ngingasazukukhuluma ngemifanekiso, kodwana ngizakukhuluma ngoBaba kukhanye." 
John16:26 Mhlokho nizakubawa ebizweni lami, angitjho bona ngiyonibawela mina kuBaba." 
John16:27 Ngombana uBaba ngekwakhe uyanithanda ngombana nani ningithandile benakholwa bona ngivela kuZimu. 
John16:28 Ngavela kuBaba, ngeza ephasinapha; kwanjesi ngitjhiya iphasi ngiya kuBaba.”" 
John16:29 Yeke abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: “Kwanjesi sewukhuluma kuzwakale ingasi ngokufanekisa. 
John16:30 Siyazi kwanjesi bonyana wazi koke, awufuni omunye ongakubuza imibuzo. Lokhu kusenza sikholwe bona uvela kuZimu.”" 
John16:31 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Niyakholwa kwanjesi na? 
John16:32 Isikhathi siyeza, sebesilapha, lapha noke nje nizakurhatjheka khona, omunye nomunye aye kwakhe mina ngisale ngingedwa. Nokho angisingedwa ngombana uBaba unami." 
John16:33 Nginitjele izintwezi, khona nizakuba nokuthula kimi. Ephasinapha nizakuhlupheka, kodwana yibani nesibindi iphasi ngilahlulile!”" 
John17:1 Kuthe bona uJesu aqede ukukhuluma lokhu, waqala phezulu ezulwini wathi: “Baba, isikhathi sesifikile; phazimulisa iNdodanakho khona iNdodana izakukuphazimulisa." 
John17:2 Uyinikele amandla phezu kwawo woke umuntu, khona izakunikela ukuphila okungapheliko kibo boke obaphe yona." 
John17:3 Ukuphila okungapheliko ngilokho bona bazi wena wedwa Zimu weqiniso nokwazi uJesu Krestu, omthumileko." 
John17:4 Ngikuphazimulisile ephasini ngokuqeda umsebenzi onginikele wona bona ngiwenze. 
John17:5 Kwanjesi Baba, ngiphazimulise phambi kwakho ngephazimulo egade nginayo kuwe iphasi lingakabi ukubakhona." 
John17:6 “Ngilazisile ibizo lakho kilabo ongiphe bona ephasini. Bebavele bangebakho wangipha bona; begodu balilondile ilizwi lakho. 
John17:7 Nje-ke bayazi bona koke ongiphe khona kuvela kuwe. 
John17:8 Ngibaphe umlayezo onginikele wona, bawamukela. Bayazi ngeqiniso bonyana ngivela kuwe, begodu bayakholwa bona ungithumile." 
John17:9 “Ngiyabathandazela. Angithandazeli iphasi, kodwana labo ongiphe bona ngombana ngebakho." 
John17:10 Koke enginakho ngekwakho nokwakho koke ngekwami. Nje-ke iphazimulwami ibonakaliswe ngabo. 
John17:11 Kwanjesi angisesekho ephasini, kodwana bona basesephasini mina sengiza kuwe. Ngalokho Baba oCwengileko, balonde ebizweni lakho, iye, ibizo owangipha lona, khona bazakuba munye njengami nawe." 
John17:12 Lokha nangisesenabo ngibavikele bengabalonda ngebizo lakho owangipha lona. Akakho noyedwa wabo owalahlekako ngaphandle kwaloyo ebekufanele bona alahleke, khona kuzakuzaliseka imitlolo." 
John17:13 “Kwanjesi sengisiza kuwe, kodwana ngikhuluma lokhu ngisesephasinapha khona bazakuba nethabo lami elipheleleko ngaphakathi kwabo." 
John17:14 Ngibanikele ilizwi lakho, iphasi labahloya ngombana abasese ngebephasi njengombana nami ngingasi ngewephasi." 
John17:15 Angikubawi bona ubasuse ephasinapha, kodwana bona ubavikele komumbi." 
John17:16 Abasingebephasi njengombana nami ngingasingewephasi. 
John17:17 Bacwengise ngeqiniso; ilizwi lakho liliqiniso. 
John17:18 Njengombana ungithumele ephasini, nami ngibathumela ephasini." 
John17:19 Ngebanga labo ngiyazicwengisa, khona nabo bazakucwengiswa ngeqiniso." 
John17:20 “Angithandazeli bona kwaphela, kodwana ngithandazela nalabo abazakukholwa kimi ngebanga lomlayezwabo," 
John17:21 kobana boke njalo babe munye njengombana nawe Baba ukimi nami ngikuwe. Kwanga nabo bangaba kithi khona iphasi lizakukholwa bona ungithumile. 
John17:22 Ngibaphe iphazimulo owanginikela yona khona bazakuba munye njengombana simunye: 
John17:23 Mina ngikibo, wena ukimi. Nje-ke bazakuba munye ngokupheleleko ukuze iphasi lazi bona ungithumile begodu ubathandile njengombana ungithandile mina." 
John17:24 “Baba, bengithanda bonyana labo ongiphe bona babe nami lapha ngikhona, khona bazakubona iphazimulwami. Iye, iphazimulo ongiphe yona ngombana wangithanda iphasi lingakabi ukubakhona." 
John17:25 Baba olungileko, iphasi akhange likwazi kodwana mina ngikwazile begodu laba bayazi bona ungithumile." 
John17:26 Ibizo lakho ngilazisile kibo, ngizasolo ngiraga ngokwenza njalo ukuze ithando onalo kimi libe nakibo nokobana nami ngibe kibo.”" 
John18:1 Ngemva kobana uJesu selathandazile, wakhamba nabafundi bakhe wayamela ngaphetjheya komlanjana iKedroni endaweni lapha bekunesimu khona. Yena nabafundi bakhe bangena kiyo." 
John18:2 UJudasi owamkhaphelako gade ayazi indawo leyo ngombana kanengi uJesu gade ahlanganela lapho nabafundi bakhe. 
John18:3 Yeke uJudasi weza esimini, akhamba namabutho wamajoni nezinye zeenkhulu zabaphristi abakhulu nabaFarisi. Bebahlomile baphethe iinhlothi ezivutako, iimbani neenkhali." 
John18:4 UJesu selasazi koke okuzokwenzeka kuye waphuma waya kibo wababuza wathi: “Nifuna bani na?” 
John18:5 Bamphendula bathi: “UJesu weNazaretha.” UJesu wathi kibo: “Nginguye.” UJudasi owamkhaphelako gade ajame nabo lapho. 
John18:6 Lokha uJesu nasithi kibo, “Nginguye” babuyela sinyovana baduleka phasi." 
John18:7 UJesu wababuza godu wathi: “Nifuna bani na?” Baphendula bathi: “UJesu weNazaretha.” 
John18:8 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: “Senginitjelile bona nginguye, yeke nangabe nifuna mina, abanye laba abakhambe-ke.”" 
John18:9 Lokhu bekukuzaliseka kwelizwi alitjhwileko lokuthi: “Angikalahlekelwa nangoyedwa kilabo ongiphe bona.” 
John18:10 USimoni Pitrosi ogade anesabula, wayirhwatjhula wasusa indlebe yangesigomeni yekhoboka lomphristi omkhulu. Ibizo lekhobokelo bekunguMalirhusi." 
John18:11 Yeke uJesu wathi kuPitrosi: “Buyisela isabulakho endawenayo! Kanti angizuyisela ikapho engiyinikelwe nguBaba na?” 
John18:12 Yeke ibutho lamajoni neenduna zalo kanye neenkhulu zamaJuda babamba uJesu bambopha; 
John18:13 bamusa qangi ku-Anasi ogade ongumkhwe kaKhayafasi obegade amphristi omkhulu umnyaka lowo. 
John18:14 Nguye uKhayafasi owaluleka amaJuda bonyana bekungaba ngcono kufe umuntu oyedwa afele boke abantu. 
John18:15 USimoni Pitrosi nomunye umfundi bebalandela uJesu. Ngebanga lokobana umfundi loyo gade aziwa mphristi omkhulu, wangena noJesu ngesirhodlweni somphristi omkhulu," 
John18:16 uPitrosi yena wasala ngaphandle esangweni. Umfundi obegade asaziwa mphristi omkhulu loyo wabuyela ngaphandle, wakhuluma nomntazana omlindi esangweni, wangenisa uPitrosi." 
John18:17 Umntazana omlindisango loyo wathi kuPitrosi: “Angithi nawe ungomunye wabafundi bomuntu loya na?” UPitrosi wamphendula wathi: “Angisinguye.” 
John18:18 Gade kumakhaza, yeke iinceku neenkhulu gade ziphembe umlilo ziwuragelele, zisotha. UPitrosi naye bekajame nabo, azothisa." 
John18:19 Umphristi omkhulu wabuza uJesu ngabafundi bakhe nangefundiso yakhe. 
John18:20 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Ephasini bephele ngikhulume emtarini. Ngafundisa ngemasinagogini nangethempelini, lapha woke amaJuda ahlanganela khona. Azange khengitjho ilitho ngasese." 
John18:21 Alo-ke ubuzelani kimi na? Buza labo abangizwileko, ngineqiniso bayazi engikutjhwileko.”" 
John18:22 Kuthe bona uJesu atjho lokhu, omunye weenkhulu wamwahla ngepama bewathi kuye: “Leyo yindlela yokuphendula umphristi omkhulu na?”" 
John18:23 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Nangabe kukhona okumbi engikukhulumileko, veza ubufakazi balokho. Kodwana nangabe ngikhulume iqiniso, alo, ungibethelani na?”" 
John18:24 Yeke u-Anasi wamthumela kumphristi omkhulu uKhayafasi, asoloko abotjhiwe njalo." 
John18:25 Kuthe uPitrosi asajame azothisa njalo, bambuza bathi: “Awusingomunye wabafundi bomuntu loya na?” Yena walandula wathi: “Awa, angisinguye.”" 
John18:26 Omunye weenceku zomphristi omkhulu, obekasihlobo somuntu uPitrosi amsusa indlebe, wambuza wathi: “Azange khengikubone unaye esimini na?”" 
John18:27 Godu uPitrosi wabuye walandula; nje-ke khonokho umkukurumbu walila. 
John18:28 Nje-ke bakhupha uJesu kuKhayafasi bamusa esigodlweni sombusi wamaRoma. Bekusekuseni ngondi, kodwana bona akhange bangene esigodlwenapho ngombana bebafuna ukuhlala bahlanzekile, khona bazakukghona ukugoma iPhasika." 
John18:29 Yeke uPilatu waya kibo ngaphandle wababuza wathi: “Umuntu lo nimthwesa umlandu bani na?” 
John18:30 Ipendulwabo yathi: “Besingekhe samletha kuwe nakube azange enze umlandu.” 
John18:31 UPilatu wathi kibo: “Yeke nina ngokwenu mthatheni niyomgweba ngokomthetho wenu.” AmaJuda aphendula athi: “Asikavunyelwa ukubulala umuntu.” 
John18:32 Lokhu kwenzeka ukuze kuzaliseke amezwi akhulunywa nguJesu lokha nabonisa indlela azokufa ngayo. 
John18:33 Nje-ke uPilatu wabuyela ngesigodlweni, wabiza uJesu wambuza wathi: “Uyikosi yamaJuda na?”" 
John18:34 UJesu wambuza wathi: “Umbuzo lo uvela kuwe, namkha uzwe ngabanye abakutjele ngami na?”" 
John18:35 UPilatu waphendula wathi: “Udlumbana bona ngiliJuda na? Angitjho babantu bekhenu nabaphristi abakhulu abakuthumele kimi. Wenzeni na?” 
John18:36 UJesu wathi: “Umbuswami awusiwo wephaseli; nangabe bewunjalo, iinceku zami gade zizokulwa zivimbele bona ngingabanjwa maJuda. Kodwana umbuswami akusiwo walapha.”" 
John18:37 UPilatu wambuza wathi: “Alo-ke uyikosi na?” UJesu waphendula wathi: “Utjho khona, ngiyikosi, kuhlekuhle ngabelethelwa lokho begodu kungalokho ngeza ephasinapha ukuze ngifakaze iqiniso. Ngabelethwa, ngeza ephasinapha ukuzokukhuluma ngeqiniso. Boke abaseqinisweni bayalilalela ilizwi lami.”" 
John18:38 UPilatu wambuza wathi: “Alo-ke liyini iqiniso na?” Ngalokho uPilatu waphuma wabuyela kumaJuda wafese wathi: “Angisifumani isizathu sokumthwesa umlandu. 
John18:39 Kodwana ngesiko eninalo, phele njalo nginithukululele isibotjhwa ngesikhathi sePhasika. Nifuna bona nginithukululele ikosi yamaJuda na?”" 
John18:40 Bamphendula ngetjhada elikhulu bathi: “Awa, ingasiyena! Sifuna uBharabhasi!” UBharabhasi bekasigebengu." 
John19:1 Yeke uPilatu wathatha uJesu wayala bona abethwe. 
John19:2 Amajoni aluka isihlohlo sameva amthwesa sona; amembesa iphuraphura ebubende. 
John19:3 Anande eza kuye athi: “Ngwenyama, kosi yamaJuda!” Amwahla." 
John19:4 UPilatu waphuma godu waya emaJudeni wathi: “Qalani, ngimkhuphela kini kobana nazi bonyana angisifumani isizathu sokumbeka umlandu.”" 
John19:4 UPilatu waphuma godu waya emaJudeni wathi: “Qalani, ngimkhuphela kini kobana nazi bonyana angisifumani isizathu sokumbeka umlandu.”" 
John19:5 Yeke uJesu waphuma, athwele isihlohlo sameva embethe nephuraphura ebubende. UPilatu wathi kibo: “Nangu-ke umuntu loyo!”" 
John19:6 Kwathi bona abaphristi abakhulu neenkhulu bambone, barhuwelela bathi: “Mbethele! Mbethele!” UPilatu wathi kibo: “Mthatheni nina nimbethele ngombana mina angifumani umlandu kuye.”" 
John19:7 AmaJuda amphendula athi: “Sinomthetho thina, nje-ke ngokuya ngomthetho lowo, kufanele afe ngombana uthe uyiNdodana kaZimu.”" 
John19:8 Kuthe lokha uPilatu nakezwa lokhu, kwaba kukhona esaba khulu." 
John19:9 Wabuyela godu ngesigodlweni, wabuza uJesu wathi: “Ubuyaphi na?” Kodwana uJesu akhange amphendule." 
John19:10 UPilatu wathi kuye: “Awufuni ukukhuluma nami na? Awazi bona nginamandla wokukuthukulula newokukubethela na?” 
John19:11 UJesu waphendula wathi: “Bewungekhe waba namandla kimi nangabe bewungakawaphiwa avela phezulu. Yeke loyo onginikele kuwe unomlandu wesono esikhulu.” 
John19:12 Ukusukela lapha, uPilatu walinga ukufumana indlela yokuthukulula uJesu, kodwana amaJuda arhuwelela athi: “Nawungamthukulula, kungatjho bona awusimngani wombusi omkhulu! Loyo ozitjhaya sakosi, urarana nombusi omkhulu!”" 
John19:13 Kuthe lokha uPilatu nakezwa amezwi la, wakhuphela uJesu ngaphandle, wahlala esihlalweni somgwebi endaweni okuthiwa yiGabatha ngesiHebheru." 
John19:14 Bekulilanga lokulungiselela iPhasika, kusemini ekulu, uPilatu wathi emaJudeni: “Nasi ikosenu!”" 
John19:14 Bekulilanga lokulungiselela iPhasika, kusemini ekulu, uPilatu wathi emaJudeni: “Nasi ikosenu!”" 
John19:15 Barhuwelela bathi: “Msuse! Msuse! Mbethele esiphambanweni!” UPilatu wababuza wathi: “Nifuna bona ngibethele ikosenu na?” Abaphristi baphendula bathi: “Asinayo ikosi ngaphandle kombusi omkhulu!” 
John19:16 Yeke wamnikela kibo bona abethelwe. Bamthatha-ke uJesu bakhamba naye. 
John19:17 Waphuma azitjathele isiphambano sakhe, waya endaweni ekuthiwa yiKhakhayi, (ebizwa ngesiHebheru bona yiGolgotha.)" 
John19:18 Lapho-ke bambethela khona anamadoda amanye amabili, enye ngesigomeni enye ngesinceleni, aphahla uJesu." 
John19:19 UPilatu bekatlole isaziso, wasiphanyeka esiphambanweni. Sifundeka bunje: “UJesu weNazaretha, ikosi yamaJuda.”" 
John19:20 AmaJuda amanengi asifunda isazisweso ngombana indawo lapha uJesu abethelwa khona beyingasikude nedorobho. Isaziso besitlolwe ngesiHebheru, ngesiLathini nangesiGirigi." 
John19:21 Abaphristi abakhulu bathi kuPilatu: “Ungatloli uthi, ‘Ikosi yamaJuda,’ kodwana uthi, ‘Uthe uyikosi yamaJuda.’ ”" 
John19:22 UPilatu waphendula wathi: “Lokho engikutlolileko ngikutlolile.” 
John19:23 Sele amajoni abethele uJesu, athatha izambatho zakhe azahlukanisa izabelo ezine, omunye nomunye waba nesabelo kwasala iphuraphura. Iphuraphura leyo beyinganamthungo kodwana beyelukiwe kusuka ehla ukuya enzasi." 
John19:24 Amajoni athi kelinye nelinye: “Asingayidabuli, kodwana asiyenzeleni ifumbe sibone bona ngubani ezakuba ngeyakhe.” Lokhu kwenzeka khona kuzazaliseka imitlolo ethi: “Babelana iimpahla zami zokwembatha, benzelana ifumbe ngesambatho sami.” Lokhu ngilokho amabutho akwenzileko." 
John19:25 Hlanu kwesiphambano sakaJesu bekujame unina nodadwabo lakanina, uMariya umkaKlopasi noMariya Magdalina." 
John19:26 Kwathi lokha uJesu nakabona unina nomfundi egade amthanda ajame hlanu komma loyo, wathi kunina: “Mma, naso indodanakho!”" 
John19:27 Godu wathi emfundini: “Nango ummakho.” Kusuka lapho umfundi loyo wamthatha wamusa emzinakhe. 
John19:28 Emva kwalokhu uJesu sele asazi bona koke sekuphethekile, nokobana kuzakuzaliseka umtlolo, wathi: “Ngomile.”" 
John19:29 Bekukhona isitja lapho sizele isibharha, nje-ke batjheba umtjhofotjhofana ngakiso, bawuhlomela elithini lehisophi, balisa emlonyenakhe." 
John19:30 Kwathi bona uJesu amukele isibharha, wathi: “Sekuphethekile!” Wakhothamisa ihloko, wafa." 
John19:31 Bekulilanga lokulungiselela begodu nelanga elilandelako bekuzokuba liSabatha elikhethekileko. Nje-ke ngebanga lokobana amaJuda bekangafuni bona iindumbu ziliselelwe esiphambanweni ngeSabatha, abawa uPilatu bona abavumele bephule imilenze yamadoda abethelweko, behlise neendumbu zabo." 
John19:32 Yeke amajoni eza, ephula imilenze yendoda yokuthoma neyesibili egade ibethelwe noJesu." 
John19:33 Kodwana kwathi lokha nafika kuJesu, amfumana sele afile. Yeke azange asaphula imilenzakhe." 
John19:34 Kunalokho omunye wamajoni wagwaza ihlangothi lakhe ngomkhonto, khonokho kwaphuma iingazi namanzi." 
John19:35 Loyo owabona lokhu kusenzeka ufakazile, nobufakazi bakhe buliqiniso, begodu uyazi bona ufakaza iqiniso." 
John19:36 Lokhu kwenzeka khona kuzakuzaliseka imitlolo ethi: “Alikho nalinye ithambo lakhe elizakwephulwa.” 
John19:37 Kukhona omunye umtlolo othi: “Abantu bazamqala loyo abamgwazileko.” 
John19:38 Ngemva kwalokho, uJosefa we-Arimathiya, ogade amlandeli kaJesu ngasese ngombana esaba amaJuda, wabawa isidumbu sakaJesu kuPilatu. UPilatu wamvumela, yeke uJosefa wakhamba wayokususa isidumbu." 
John19:39 Bekaphekelelwa nguNikhodemusi, umuntu owakhe weza azokubona uJesu ebusuku. UNikhodemusi lo, gade eze aphethe amakhilogramu amatjhumi amathathu weenthako zamakha wemire nomarobazibukhali." 
John19:40 Amadoda amabili la awuthatha umzimba kaJesu awuphuthela ngetjhila lelineni awuzesa ngamakha njengendlela yesiko lamaJuda lokungcwaba. 
John19:41 Endaweni lapho uJesu bekabethelwe khona esiphambanweni bekukhona isimu; ngesiminapho bekukhona ithuna elitjha elingazange khelibulungele. 
John19:42 Njengombana bekulilanga lokuzilungiselela kwamaJuda mayelana neSabatha, nethuna liseduze, bathuna umzimba kaJesu lapho." 
John20:1 Ekuseni ngelanga lokuthoma leveke, kusesenzima ngondi, uMariya Magdalina waya ethuneni, wafumana ilitje ebelivale umnyango wethuna ligediwe." 
John20:2 Nje-ke wagijimela kuSimoni Pitrosi nemfundini ogade athandwa nguJesu, wafese wathi: “IKosi bayithethe ngethuneni, asazi bona bayibekephi!”" 
John20:3 Yeke uPitrosi nomfundi omunye baya ethuneni. 
John20:4 Bobabili njalo gade bagijima, kodwana umfundi lo watjhiya uPitrosi ngebelo wafika ethuneni maqangi." 
John20:5 Wahlola, wabona itjhila lelineni ebebamphuthele ngalo, akhange angene." 
John20:6 Nje-ke uSimoni Pitrosi obegade amlandela ngemuva wafika walunga poro ngethuneni. Wabona itjhila lelineni ebebamphuthele ngalo lilele lapho," 
John20:7 netjhila ebebambophe ngalo ehloko, lilodwa eqadi lisongiwe." 
John20:8 Yeke umfundi lo, owafika ethuneni qangi, naye wangena; wabona, wakholwa." 
John20:9 Bebasengakazwisisi imitlolo ethi kumele avuke kabafileko. 
John20:10 Yeke abafundabo babuyela emakhaya. 
John20:11 Kodwana uMariya bekajame ethuneni alila. Asalila njalo, wakhothama wahlola ngethuneni;" 
John20:12 qala wabona iingilozi ezimbili lapho zembethe okumhlophe, zihlezi lapho bekunomzimba kaJesu, enye ngehlokweni enye ngeenyaweni." 
John20:13 Zambuza zathi: “Mma, ulilelani na?” Waphendula wathi: “Bathethe iKosami, nje-ke angazi bona bayibekephi!”" 
John20:14 Sekatjhwile lokho watjhuguluka waqala, wabona uJesu ajame lapho; kodwana akhange azi bona nguJesu." 
John20:15 UJesu wambuza wathi: “Mma, ulilelani na? Ngubani omfunako na?” Wadlumbana bona mlimisimu, wathi kuye: “Nangabe umthethe, Mnimzana, ngitjela lapha umuse khona ngizakuya ngiyomthatha.”" 
John20:16 UJesu wathi kuye: “Mariya!” UMariya watjhidela kuye warhuwelela ngesiHebheru wathi: “Rabuni!” (okutjho bona “mfundisi”). 
John20:17 UJesu wathi: “Ungangibambi ngombana angikayi kuBaba. Kodwana khamba uye kubazalwana bami ubatjele uthi, ‘Ngibuyela kuBaba onguYihlo wenu noZimami onguZimenu.’ ”" 
John20:18 Yeke uMariya Magdalina wakhamba wayokutjela abafundi wathi: “Ngiyibonile iKosi!” Watjho nokobana itheni kuye. 
John20:19 Kusihlwa ngelanga lokuthoma leveke, abafundi bandawonye neminyango ivaliwe ngokwesaba amaJuda, uJesu wafika wazokujama hlangana nabo, wathi: “Ukuthula akube nani!”" 
John20:20 Ngemva kobana atjho lokho, wabatjengisa izandla nehlangothi lakhe. Abafundi bathaba kwamambala lokha nababona iKosi." 
John20:21 Godu uJesu wathi kibo: “Ukuthula akube nani! Njengombana uBaba angithumile mina, nami ngiyanithuma nina.”" 
John20:22 Kwathi bona atjho lokho, wabaphefumulela wathi: “Yamukelani uMoya oCwengileko." 
John20:23 Nanilibalela abantu izono zabo, zizakulitjalelwa; naningabalibaleliko, azizukulitjalelwa.”" 
John20:24 Nje-ke uTomasi, obizwa bona nguDidimosi nongomunye wabafundi abalitjhumi nambili, bekangekho ebafundini lokha uJesu nafikako." 
John20:25 Yeke abafundi abanye bamtjela bathi: “Siyibonile iKosi!” Kodwana uTomasi wathi kibo: “Ngaphandle kobana ngibone amanceba weempikiri ezandleni zayo, ngifake umunwami lapha bekuneempikiri khona, nesandla sami ehlangothini layo, angeze ngakholwa.”" 
John20:26 Ngemva kweveke abafundi bebahlangane ngendlini godu, noTomasi anabo. Nanyana iminyango beyihluthulelwe, uJesu weza wajama hlangana nabo wathi: “Ukuthula akube nani!”" 
John20:27 Yeke wathi kuTomasi: “Faka umunwakho lapha, qala izandla zami. Yelula isandla sakho usifake ehlangothini lami. Lisa ukuzaza, ukholwe.”" 
John20:28 UTomasi wamphendula wathi: “Kosami, Zimami!”" 
John20:29 UJesu wathi kuye: “Ukholwa ngombana ungibona na? Babusisiwe labo abathi bangakaboni nokho bakholwe.” 
John20:30 UJesu wenza nezinye iimangaliso ezinengi phambi kwabafundi bakhe ezingakatlolwa encwadini le. 
John20:31 Kodwana lokhu kutloliwe khona nizakukholwa bona uJesu unguKrestu, iNdodana kaZimu, nokuthi ngokukholwa kuye nibe nokuphila." 
John21:1 Ngemva kwalokho, uJesu wazibonakalisa godu ebafundini bakhe elwandle leThibheriyasi. Wazibonakalisa ngendlela le:" 
John21:2 USimoni Pitrosi, uTomasi obizwa bona nguDidumosi noNathaniyeli ovela eKana eseGalile, amadodana kaZebediya nabanye abafundi bebandawonye." 
John21:3 USimoni Pitrosi wathi kibo: “Ngisayokuthiya iinhlambi.” Baphendula bathi: “Sizokukhamba nawe.” Nje-ke bakhamba ngomkhumbi, kodwana ubusukobo akhange babambe ilitho." 
John21:4 Kuthe sekusile, uJesu wajama eligwini, kodwana abafundi azange balemuke bona nguJesu." 
John21:5 Yeke wababuza wathi: “Bantwana bakwethu, anikabambi ilitho na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Awa.”" 
John21:6 Wathi kibo: “Phoselani inede yenu ngesigomeni somkhumbi nizakubamba.” Yeke bayiphosela, babhalelwa kuyidosa ngebanga lobunengi beenhlambi." 
John21:7 Nje-ke umfundi ogade athandwa nguJesu wathi kuPitrosi: “YiKosi!” Kwathi uPitrosi bona ezwe bonyana yiKosi, wambatha isambatho sakhe ngombana gade selahlubule, weqela ngemanzini." 
John21:8 Abanye abafundi beza ngomkhumbi, badosa inede ezele iinhlambi ngombana bebangasikude neligu, bekungaba mamitha amatjhumi alithoba." 
John21:9 Kwathi bona bafike eligwini, babona lapho umlilo wamalahle kukhona phezu kwawo ihlambi nesikwa." 
John21:10 UJesu wathi kibo: “Lethani ezinye zeenhlambi enisanda ukuzibamba.” 
John21:11 USimoni Pitrosi wakhwela wadosela inede eligwini izele iinhlambi ezikulu ebegade zilikhulu namatjhumi amahlanu nantathu sezizoke; ngitjho nanyana gade zizinengi kangako, inede azange irathuke." 
John21:12 UJesu wathi kibo: “Yizani nizokugoma.” Akakho noyedwa wabafundi owakhe walokotha ukumbuza bona: “Ungubani na?” Gade basazi bona yiKosi. 
John21:13 Yeke uJesu wabandamela kibo wafese wathatha isikwa wabanikela, wenza njalo godu nangeenhlambi." 
John21:14 Lokhu-ke gade sele ingekwesithathu uJesu azibonakalisa ebafundini bakhe ngemva kobana selavukile kabafileko. 
John21:15 Ngemva kobana sebadlile, uJesu wathi kuSimoni Pitrosi: “Simoni msa kaJwanisi, mbala ungithanda ukudlula laba na?” Yena wathi: “Iye, Kosi, uyazi bona ngiyakuthanda.” UJesu wathi kuye: “Yondla iimvana zami.”" 
John21:16 Godu uJesu wathi kuye: “Simoni msa kaJwanisi, mbala uyangithanda na?” Waphendula wathi: “Iye, Kosi, uyazi bona ngiyakuthanda.” UJesu wathi kuye: “Lusa izimvu zami.”" 
John21:17 Kwesithathu wathi kuye: “Simoni msa kaJwanisi, uyangithanda na?” UPitrosi wadabuka ngombana uJesu wambuza kwesithathu asithi: “Uyangithanda na?” Yeke wathi kuJesu: “Kosi, wazi koke; uyazi bona ngiyakuthanda!” UJesu wathi kuye: “Yondla izimvu zami." 
John21:18 Kwamambala ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Nawusemutjha bephele ubhince uye nanyana kukuphi lapha uthanda khona. Kodwana nasele uluphele, uzakuthabulula izandla zakho omunye akwembese akuse lapha ungafuni ukuya khona.”" 
John21:19 Ngokutjho lokhu, uJesu bekatjengisa indlela uPitrosi azakufa ngayo alethe iphazimulo kuZimu. Yeke uJesu wathi kuye: “Ngilandela!”" 
John21:20 UPitrosi watjhuguluka wabona umfundi ogade athandwa nguJesu abalandela. Lo ngiloyo ebekazigudle ngoJesu ngephasika nowabuza wathi: “Kosi, ngubani ozokuthengisa na?”" 
John21:21 Kwathi bona uPitrosi ambone, wabuza wathi: “Kosi, uthini ngaye na?”" 
John21:22 UJesu wamphendula wathi: “Nangifuna bona aphile kufikela mhlana ngibuyako, kukutshwenya ngani lokho na? Wena ngilandela!”" 
John21:23 Yeke iindaba zarhatjheka hlangana nabalandeli bakaJesu bona umfundi lo angekhe afa. Kodwana uJesu akhange atjho bona akazukufa, kwaphela wathi: “Nangifuna bona aphile kufikela mhlana ngibuyako, kukutshwenya ngani lokho?”" 
John21:24 Nguye umfundi lo owafakaza ngezintwezi, bewazitlola phasi; begodu siyazi bona ubufakazi bakhe buliqiniso." 
John21:25 Zinengi ezinye izinto uJesu azenzako. Ngathana bezitlolwe ngazinye, ngitjho nephasi loke belingekhe lakghona ukulonda iincwadi ebezingatlolwa." 
Acts1:1 Indaba yokuthoma Theyofilusi, ngatlola ngazo zoke izinto uJesu athoma ukuzenza nokuzifundisa," 
Acts1:2 kufikela mhlana enyuselwa ezulwini, emva kobana ayale ngoMoya oCwengileko abapostoli abakhethileko." 
Acts1:3 Wazibonakalisa kibo aphilile ngemva kokuhlupheka kwakhe, wabakhombisa ngeendlela ezinengi eziliqiniso bona uyaphila. Wabonakala kibo esikhathini esimalanga amatjhumi amane, akhuluma ngombuso kaZimu." 
Acts1:4 Ngesikhathi asahlanganyele nabo asidla, wabayala wathi: “Ningasuki eJerusalema, kodwana lindelani isipho uBaba anithembisa sona, okutjho leso enezwa ngikhuluma ngaso" 
Acts1:5 ngombana uJwanisi wabhabhadisa ngamanzi, kodwana nina nizokubhajadiswa ngoMoya oCwengileko emalangeni ambalwa ezako.”" 
Acts1:6 Labo ebebahlangene ndawonye, bambuza bathi: “Kosi, ingabe esikhathinesi sewuzowubuyisela umbuso ku-Israyeli na?”" 
Acts1:7 Yena wabaphendula wathi: “Akusikho kwenu ukwazi iinkhathi namkha amalanga uBaba awabeke ngentando yakhe. 
Acts1:8 Kodwana nizakwamukela amandla lokha uMoya oCwengileko nasele ehlele phezu kwenu. Nizakuba bofakazi bami eJerusalema, kiyo yoke iJudiya neSamariya kufikela emaphethelweni wephasi.”" 
Acts1:9 Emva kokutjho lokho, wenyuselwa ezulwini bamqalile; ilifu lamsusa emehlwenabo." 
Acts1:10 Basasoloko baqhusululele amehlwabo phezulu, yena enyuka, khonokho kwabonakala kujame hlanu kwabo amadoda amabili embethe ezimhlophe," 
Acts1:11 athi: “Madoda weGalile, nijameleni lapho niqale ezulwini na? Yena uJesu lo osuswe kini owenyuselwe ezulwini, uzakubuya ngawo wona umukghwa lo enimbone enyuka ngawo.”" 
Acts1:12 Nje-ke babuyela eJerusalema basuka entabeni ekuthiwa yi-Oliva egade ilibanga lekhambo leSabatha ukusuka edorobheni. 
Acts1:13 Kuthe bona bafike, balunga elawini eliphezulu egade bahlala kilo; bekunguPitrosi, uJwanisi, uJakopo no-Andrisi, uFlebhe noTomasi, uBharitholomeyusi noMatewu, uJakopo umsa ka-Alifiyosi, uSimoni umZelothe noJudasi indodana kaJakopo." 
Acts1:14 Boke laba bebaphele bahlangane njalo bazokuthandaza ndawonye kanye nabesifazana noMariya unina lakaJesu nabafowabo. 
Acts1:15 Emihleni leyo uPitrosi wasikima wakhuluma hlangana nabazalwana ebebangaba likhulu namatjhumi amabili," 
Acts1:16 wathi: “Bazalwana, kufuze kuzaliseke imitlolo eyakhulunywa nguMoya oCwengileko ngomlomo kaDavida, waphorofida ngoJudasi ogade amhlahli walabo ababamba uJesu." 
Acts1:17 Yena bekangomunye wethu begodu ayingcenye yomsebenzi lo. 
Acts1:18 “Nje-ke, ngomvuzo azizuzela wona ngobukhohlakali bakhe, uJudasi wathenga isimu lapha awa khona ngobuso, kwadabuka isisu amathumbakhe aphareka phasi." 
Acts1:19 Boke beJerusalema bezwa ngalokho; nje-ke babiza isimu leyo ngesikhabo bonyana yi-Akelidama, okutjho bona ‘Yisimu yeengazi’." 
Acts1:20 “Kutloliwe encwadini yamaRhubo bona, ‘Ikumbakhe ayigedeze, kungahlali namunye ngaphakathi kwayo.’ “Begodu kutloliwe bona, ‘Kwanga omunye angathatha isikhundla sakhe.’" 
Acts1:21 “Nje-ke kufanelekile ukukhetha yinye yamadoda walawo ebegade asoloko anathi isikhathi soke lokha uJesu nabekanande aphuma angena phakathi kwethu," 
Acts1:22 kusukela ekubhabhadiseni kwakaJwanisi kufikela lapha uJesu enyuselwa khona ezulwini asuswa kithi. Kumele bona enye kiwo ibe ngufakazi kanye nathi wokuvuka kwakaJesu.” 
Acts1:23 Yeke baphakamisa amadoda amabili: uJosefa, ogade abizwa bona nguBharisabhasi, obekabuye abizwe nguJustusi, kanye noMatiyasi." 
Acts1:24 Alo-ke bathandaza bathi: “Kosi, wena wazi ihliziyo yomunye nomunye umuntu. Nje-ke, sitjengisa bona ngubani wababilaba omkhethileko" 
Acts1:25 bona azokuthatha isikhundla sobupostoli, esitjhiywe nguJudasi waziyela endawenakhe.”" 
Acts1:26 Benza ifumbe, yona yadla uMatiyasi, nje-ke wabalwa kanye nabapostoli abalitjhumi nanye." 
Acts2:1 Lokha ilanga lePentekoste nalifikako, bebaboke bahlangene ndawonye." 
Acts2:2 Kungakatjhejeki kwaba khona itjhada elavela ezulwini lazwakala njengommoya omkhulu uvunguza, lazala ikumba yoke egade bahlezi kiyo." 
Acts2:3 Babona amalangabu anjengamalimu ahlukeneko ehlela phezu kwaloyo naloyo wabo. 
Acts2:4 Boke bazala ngoMoya oCwengileko bebathoma ukukhuluma ngeenlimi ezitjhili njengombana uMoya wabapha ukukhuluma. 
Acts2:5 Nje-ke bekukhona amaJuda ebegade esaba uZimu ahlala eJerusalema, avela ezizweni zoke ezingaphasi kwezulu." 
Acts2:6 Kuthe lokha nakuzwakala itjhadeli, isiqubuthu sahlangana ngokuphithizela ngombana ngiloyo naloyo wezwa bakhuluma ngelimi lekhabo." 
Acts2:7 Ngokurareka nangokukakamala isiqubuthweso sabuza sathi: “Angitjho woke amadoda akhulumako la, amaGalile?" 
Acts2:8 Alo, kuza njani bona omunye nomunye wethu abezwe ngelimi adabuka kilo na?" 
Acts2:9 AmaPhathiya, amaMede ama-Elamu, abahlali beMesopotamiya, beJudiya beKaphadosiya, bePontusi nebe-Asiya;" 
Acts2:10 beFrigiya, bePhamfiliya, beGibhide nebeengceyeni zeLibhiya hlanu kweSirene iinthekeli zeRoma;" 
Acts2:11 amaJuda nabatjhugulukele ebuJudeni; amaKrete nama-Arabhu, soke sibezwa bakhuluma iimangaliso zakaZimu bengamalimi wemakhethu!”" 
Acts2:11 amaJuda nabatjhugulukele ebuJudeni; amaKrete nama-Arabhu, soke sibezwa bakhuluma iimangaliso zakaZimu bengamalimi wemakhethu!”" 
Acts2:12 Boke bamangala bebasambatheka, babuzana bodwa bathi: “Kutjho ukuthini lokhu na?”" 
Acts2:13 Kodwana abanye bebenza amahlaya ngabo, bathi: “Baburhenge!”" 
Acts2:14 Alo-ke uPitrosi wasikima nabalitjhumi nanye, waphakamisela ilizwi lakhe esiqubuthwini wathi: “Madoda wamaJuda nani noke enihlala eJerusalema, kufuze nazi begodu nilalele engikutjhoko:" 
Acts2:15 Amadoda la akasiburhenge njengombana nidlumbana ngombana kusese yisimbi yethoba ekuseni. 
Acts2:16 Kodwana lokhu ngokwakhulunywa mphorofidi uJuweli nakasithi," 
Acts2:17 “ ‘USomnini uthi: Ngemihla yokuphela ngizakuthululela uMoyami kibo boke abantu; amadodanenu namadodakazenu azakuphorofida, abatjha benu bazakubona imibono, abadala benu babhudange amabhudango." 
Acts2:18 Iye, emalangeni lawo ngizakuthululela uMoyami naphezu kweenceku neencekukazi, ziphorofide." 
Acts2:19 Ngizakuveza amabono ezulwini nephasini okutjho iingazi nomlilo nesimukumuku sentuthu. 
Acts2:20 Ilanga lizakuphenduka libe nzima nenyezi ibe ziingazi ngaphambi kokuza kwelanga lakaSomnini elikhulu nelesabekako. 
Acts2:21 Kuzakuthi boke ababiza ibizo lakaSomnini basindiswe.’ 
Acts2:22 “Nje-ke lalelani la, nina ma-Israyeli: UJesu weNazaretha bekumumuntu ofakazelwe kini nguZimu ngemikarisomraro, ngeemangaliso nangeembonakaliso uZimu azenza phakathi kwenu ngaye, njengombana nani ngokwenu nazi." 
Acts2:23 Umuntu lo, owanikelwa kini ngokuya ngokwehlelo lakaZimu nangokwazi kwakhe ngaphambili, nina nambethela esiphambanweni benambulala ngezandla zabanganamthetho." 
Acts2:24 Kodwana uZimu wamvusa kabafileko; wamthukulula ebuhlungwini bokufa ngombana bekungekhe kwenzeke bona abanjwe ngikho. 
Acts2:25 UDavida wathi ngaye, “ ‘Ngesikhathi soke ngibeka uSomnini phambi kwami, njengombana angesidleni sami angeze nganyakaziswa." 
Acts2:26 Ngalokho ihliziywami yenamile; ngihlokoma ngamandla ngombana umzimbami ulondekile. 
Acts2:27 Angeze watjhiya umphefumulwami endaweni yabafileko, namkha uvumele othembekileko wakho abone ukubola." 
Acts2:28 Wena ungikhombisa indlela yokuphila. Ukujabula okwanelisako kuphambi kwakho.’ 
Acts2:29 “Nje-ke bafowethu, kufuze nginitjele ngesibindi bona ukhokho uDavida wahlongakala bewangcwatjwa nethuna lakhe lisesekhona lapha nanamhlanjesi." 
Acts2:30 Yena gade amphorofidi owazi bona uZimu ufunge ngesifungo bona uzakubeka omunye wesizukulwana sakhe esihlalweni sakhe. 
Acts2:31 Abona okungaphambili, wakhuluma ngokuvuka kwakaKrestu bonyana akhange atjhiywe endaweni yabafileko namkha umzimbakhe ubone ukubola." 
Acts2:32 “UZimu uvuse uJesu lo kabafileko begodu soke sibofakazi balokho. 
Acts2:33 Sele akhutjhulelwe ngesigomeni sakaZimu, wamukela kuYise isithembiso sakaMoya oCwengileko, nje-ke uthulule lokho nani enikubonako nenikuzwako." 
Acts2:34 UDavida akakakhutjhulelwa ezulwini, kodwana wathi, “ ‘Naku umlayezo kaSomnini oya ekosinami: Hlala ngesidleni sami" 
Acts2:35 bekube kulokha nangenza izitha zakho zibe sinabelo seenyawo zakho.’ 
Acts2:36 “Ngalokho indlu yoke yakwa-Israyeli kufuze yazi bona kwamambala uZimu wenze uJesu enambethela esiphambanweni lo, abe yiKosi noKrestu.”" 
Acts2:37 Lokha abantu nabezwa lokho, bahlabeka eenhliziyweni bebathi kuPitrosi nabanye abapostoli: “Alo-ke bafowethu, sizakwenza njani na?”" 
Acts2:38 UPitrosi wathi kibo: “Phendukani, omunye nomunye wenu abhajadiswe ebizweni lakaJesu Krestu ukuze nithethelelwe izono, khona nizakwamukela isipho sakaMoya oCwengileko" 
Acts2:39 ngombana isithembiso singesenu nabantwana benu nakibo boke abakude; iye, boke uSomnini uZimethu azababizela kuye.”" 
Acts2:40 Wafakaza nangamanye amezwi amanengi wabakhalima wathi: “Zisindiseni nina ngokwenu esizukulwaneni esonakelekwesi!” 
Acts2:41 Labo abamukela umlayezwakhe, babhajadiswa. Mhlokho kwangezeleleka pheze iinkulungwana ezintathu zabantu." 
Acts2:42 Abazalwana bebazinikele efundisweni yabapostoli nebudlelwaneni, ekwabelaneni isikwa nemthandazweni." 
Acts2:43 Woke umuntu wafikelwa kukwesaba ngombana abapostoli benza iimangaliso neembonakaliso ezinengi. 
Acts2:44 Woke amakholwa araga ndawonye ahlanganyela ezintweni zoke. 
Acts2:45 Athengisa ipahlawo neengugudlhelo zawo, abelana omunye nomunye njengokwesidingo sakhe." 
Acts2:46 Woke amalanga araga ngokuhlangana ngethempelini. Ukusuka lapho angena ikhaya ngekhaya ahlephulelana isikwa, agoma ndawonye anamile neenhliziyo zimhlophe," 
Acts2:47 adumisa uZimu begodu athatjelwa babantu boke. Nje-ke imihla ngemihla uSomnini wangezelela ebandleni labo abasindiswako. 
Acts3:1 Ngelinye ilanga uPitrosi noJwanisi baya ngethempelini kusikhathi sokuthandaza ngesimbi yesithathu malangantambama. 
Acts3:2 Khonapho kwalethwa indoda ebegade isirhole kwekubelethweni kwayo. Indoda leyo beyigugwa imihla ngemihla ibekwa esangweni lethempeli ebekuthiwa lisango uMuhle kobana izozibawela izipho ebantwini ebebangena ngethempelinapho. 
Acts3:3 Kuthe lokha umuntu loyo nakabona uPitrosi noJwanisi sele bazokungena, wababawa isipho." 
Acts3:4 UPitrosi wamqala poro banoJwanisi, wathi kuye: “Siqala!”" 
Acts3:5 Yeke naye wabaqala poro, asithi mhlamunye uzakufumana ilitho kibo." 
Acts3:6 UPitrosi wathi kuye: “Isiliva negolide anginalo, kodwana enginakho ngikupha khona: Ebizweni lakaJesu Krestu weNazaretha, sikima ukhambe!”" 
Acts3:7 Wambamba ngesandla sesigoma wamsikimisa. Khonokho iinyawo neengogoriyana zakhe zaqina. 
Acts3:8 Weqela phezulu wajama ngeenyawo, wathoma wakhambakhamba. Nje-ke wangena ngesirhodlweni sethempeli kanye nabo, akhamba aseqa, adumisa uZimu." 
Acts3:9 Kuthe lokha boke abantu nabambona akhamba adumisa uZimu," 
Acts3:10 babona bonyana nguye yena loya obegade anande ahlala abawa esangweni ebekuthiwa lisango uMuhle. Nje-ke barareka bebakakamala ngokwenzekileko kuye. 
Acts3:11 Kuthe umuntu loyo asanamathele kuPitrosi noJwanisi njalo, boke abantu ngokurareka bagijimela kibo endaweni ebizwa bona lithuri lakaSolomoni." 
Acts3:12 Kwathi lokha uPitrosi nakabona lokho, wathi kibo: “Ma-Israyeli, kunirarelani lokhu na? Kwakhona kubayini nisirhudulele amehlo ngokungathi kube mamandlethu namkha ikolwethu eyenze umuntu lo bona akhambe na?" 
Acts3:13 UZimu ka-Abrahamu, ka-Isaka noJakopo, uZimu wabokhokho bethu, uphazimulise uJesu incekwakhe. Iye, loyo nina enamkhaphela bona abulawe, namlandula phambi koPilatu, ngitjho nanyana besele aqede ngokuthi uyamthukulula." 
Acts3:14 Nina nalandula oCwengileko noLungileko ngaphezu kwalokho nabawa bona nithukululelwe umbulali. 
Acts3:15 Nabulala umsunguli wepilo. Kodwana uZimu wamvusa kabafileko, ekuyinto esibofakazi bayo thina." 
Acts3:16 Ngokukholwa ebizweni lakhe, iye, ibizo lakhe ngokwalo, ngilo elenze umuntu lo waqina. Yena enimbonako nenimaziko lo; ukukholwa okuza ngoJesu, kumnikele ukuphiliswa okupheleleko lokhu njengombana nani noke nibona." 
Acts3:17 “Nje-ke bafowethu, ngiyazi bona nenza lokhu ngokungazi njengombana kwenza abaniphetheko." 
Acts3:18 Lokhu kuyindlela uZimu azalise ngayo lokho akumemezela ngaphambilini ngabo boke abaphorofidi bakhe bona uKrestu wakhe uzakuhlupheka. 
Acts3:19 Ngalokho tjhugulukani nibuyele kuZimu, khona kuzakusulwa izono zenu," 
Acts3:20 ukuze isikhathi sokuvuselelwa sivele kuSomnini onithumelele uKrestu onguJesu amkhethela nina," 
Acts3:21 okufanele izulu limamukele bekufike isikhathi lapha uZimu enza khona zoke izinto butjha, njengombana athembisa ekadeni ngabaphorofidi bakhe abacwengileko." 
Acts3:22 NoMosi wathi, ‘USomnini uZimenu uzanivusela umphorofidi onjengami phakathi kwenu, kubafowenu. Nguye okufanele nimlalele." 
Acts3:23 Nanyana ngubani ongeze alalele umphorofidi loyo, uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo.’" 
Acts3:24 “Mbala boke abaphorofidi kusukela kuSamyela nabalandelako, nabo boke abakhulumako, bamemezela ngamalanga wanamhlanjesi." 
Acts3:25 Nina niziinzukulwana zabaphorofidi nabesivumelwano uZimu asenza naboyihlo, njengombana wathi ku-Abrahamu, ‘Zoke iinkoro zephasi zizakukhanukela ukubusiswa njengeenzukulwana zakho.’" 
Acts3:26 Yeke lokha uZimu avusa incekwakhe, wayithumela kokuthoma kini kobana inibusise ngokunitjhugulula eendleleni zenu zobukhohlakali.”" 
Acts4:1 Kuthe uPitrosi noJwanisi basakhuluma nabantu njalo, abaphristi nomphathi wabalindithempeli nabaSadusi beza kibo," 
Acts4:2 banyenyile ngombana abapostoli bebafundisa abantu begodu batjhumayela ukuvuka kwabafileko ngoJesu. 
Acts4:3 Nje-ke bababamba babadlhunya ngesikhungweni kufikela ngakusasa ngombana gade sekuhlwile. 
Acts4:4 Kodwana abanengi abawuzwako umlayezo bakholwa; inani lamadoda landa lafika pheze eenkulungwaneni ezihlanu. 
Acts4:5 Ngakusasa kwakhona ababusi, abaphathi nabafundisi bomthetho bahlangana eJerusalema."
