Acts4:6 Bebahlangene no-Anasi umphristi omkhulu noKhayafasi, uJwanisi no-Alekzandra nabanye bomndeni womphristi omkhulu." 
Acts4:7 Bathi akulethwe abapostoli bajanyiswe phambi kwabo, bababuza bathi: “Lokho nikwenze ngawaphi amandla namkha ngaliphi ibizo na?”" 
Acts4:8 Nje-ke uPitrosi azele uMoya oCwengileko wathi kibo: “Babusi nabaphathi babantu," 
Acts4:9 nangabe sibuzwa namhlanjesi ngesenzo esihle esenziweko emuntwini obekabuthakathaka bona wathabuluka njani," 
Acts4:10 akwazeke kini namhlanje nebantwini boke bakwa-Israyeli bona umuntu lo ujame phambi kwenwapha athabulukile aphilile ngamandla webizo lakaJesu Krestu weNazaretha, loyo enambethelako esiphambanweni, uZimu wamvusa kabafileko." 
Acts4:11 “Yena lilitje eladelwa babakhi esele libe ngeliqakathekileko ejikeni. 
Acts4:12 “Ayikho isindiso ngomunye ngombana alikho elinye ibizo ezulwini nephasini esinikelwe lona bona sisindiswe ngalo.” 
Acts4:13 Kwathi lokha nababona isibindi uPitrosi noJwanisi abanaso nokulemuka bona bekubabantu abangakafundi, barareka khulu bebalemuka bona bebakhamba noJesu." 
Acts4:14 Kodwana ngokubona umuntu opholisiweko ajame nabo lapho, akhange babe nelizwi." 
Acts4:15 Babatjela bona baphumele ngaphandle, nje-ke bakhulumisana bodwa," 
Acts4:16 babuzana bathi: “Sizokwenza njani ngabantwaba? Phela kusepanyameni bona umuntu ohlala eJerusalema uyazi bonyana isimangaliswesi senziwe ngibo begodu angekhe sakulandula lokho. 
Acts4:17 Kodwana ukuze senze indaba le ingarhatjheki ukuya phambili ebantwini, asibakhalimeleni abantwaba bona bangasathomi godu bakhulume nanyana kubani ngebizweli.”" 
Acts4:18 Nje-ke bababizela ngesigungwini godu, babayala bona bangasakhulumi namkha bafundise ngebizo lakaJesu." 
Acts4:19 Kodwana uPitrosi noJwanisi babaphendula bathi: “Gwebani ngokwenu bona ngikuphi okulungileko emehlweni wakaZimu, ukulalela nina namkha uZimu na?" 
Acts4:20 Mbala thina angekhe salisa ukukhuluma ngesikubonileko nesikuzwileko ngokwethu.” 
Acts4:21 Ngemva kobana sele babakhalimele, babatjhaphulula bona bakhambe ngombana akhange bakwazi ukubabhambalalisa ngesizathu sokobana woke umuntu bekadumisa uZimu ngokwenzekileko:" 
Acts4:22 Umuntu okwenzeka kuye isimangaliso sokuphulukiswa lo, bekeqile ematjhumini amane weminyaka ngobudala." 
Acts4:23 Emva kokuthukululwa, uPitrosi noJwanisi babuyela kubafowabo bababikela bona abaphristi abakhulu neenkhulu zitheni." 
Acts4:24 Sele bakuzwile lokho, baphakamisela ilizwi lomthandazo ngahliziyonye kuZimu bathi: “Somandla, Mdali wezulu nephasi nelwandle nakho koke okukilo," 
Acts4:25 wakhuluma ngoMoya oCwengileko ngomlomo wakakhokho wethu uDavida, inceku yakho, nawusithi, “ ‘Kubayini bezizwe bayaluza, nabantu bahumuzela na? Kungelize!" 
Acts4:26 Amakhosi wephasi ayazihlela, nababusi baluka amaqhinga ngoSomnini nangozesiweko wakhe.’" 
Acts4:27 “Ngambala uHerode noPontiyasi Pilatu bahlangene nabezizwe nabantu bakwa-Israyeli emzini lo kobana bajamelane nencekwakho ecwengileko uJesu nowayizesa 
Acts4:28 bona izokwenza nanyana yini isandla sakho esakuhlosa bona kwenzeke. 
Acts4:29 Nje-ke Somnini, yelela ukusongela kwabo bese unikela iinceku zakho bona zikhulume ilizwi ngesibindi esikhulu." 
Acts4:30 Yelula isandla sakho upholise, wenze imikarisomraro neemangaliso ngebizo lencekwakho ecwengileko uJesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Kuthe sebathandazile, indawo ebebahlanganele kiyo yadedemela. Boke bazaliswa ngoMoya oCwengileko bakhuluma ilizwi lakaZimu ngesibindi." 
Acts4:32 Boke abakholwako bebamunye ngehliziyo nangomkhumbulo. Akakho noyedwa owathi ipahlakhe ngeyakhe yedwa, kodwana bahlanganyela koke abanakho." 
Acts4:33 Ngamandla amakhulu abapostoli bafakaza ngokuvuka kweKosi uJesu, godu nesisa esikhulu besikibo boke." 
Acts4:34 Akakho noyedwa ogade adududu phakathi kwabo. Ngalokho labo egade baneendawo namkha izindlu bebazithengisa balethe imali abathengelwe ngayo," 
Acts4:35 bayibeke eenyaweni zabapostoli. Nje-ke omunye nomunye wabelwa njengokuswela kwakhe. 
Acts4:36 UJosefa umLevi weSayipurasi, abapostoli egade bambiza bona nguBharinabhasi, nakutjhugululwako kutjho bona “indodana yenduduzo”," 
Acts4:37 wathengisa indawakhe, waletha imali wafese wayibeka eenyaweni zabapostoli." 
Acts5:1 Indoda ibizo layo elingu-Ananiyasi nomkayo uSafira, yathengisa ingcenye yendawo," 
Acts5:2 yagodla enye imali nomkayo anokwazi okupheleleko ngalokho. Yaletha yoke eseleko yafese yayibeka eenyaweni zabapostoli. 
Acts5:3 Nje-ke uPitrosi wathi kiyo: “Ananiyasi, kuze njani bona uvumele uSathana azalise ihliziywakho kobana ukhulume amanga kuMoya oCwengileko, uzitjhiyele enye imali kileyo oyizuzileko ngendawo na?" 
Acts5:4 Kanti ungakayithengisi bekungasingeyakho na? Nangemva kobana seyithengisiwe imali beyingekho kanti elawulwenakho na? Alo-ke, kuyini ekwenze bona ucabange ukwenza into enje na? Awukakhulumi amanga ebantwini kodwana kuZimu!”" 
Acts5:5 Kuthe bona u-Ananiyasi ezwe lokho, waduleka phasi, wafa. Ukwesaba okukhulu kwehlela boke abezwe okwenzekileko." 
Acts5:6 Nje-ke amasokana angena, aphuthela umzimbakhe, amkhupha ayombulunga." 
Acts5:7 Pheze ngemva kwama-awara amathathu kwafika umkakhe, kodwana bekangazi okwenzekileko." 
Acts5:8 UPitrosi wambuza wathi: “Akhese ungitjele, kungabe leli linani enithengise ngalo indawo na?” Yena wathi: “Iye, linani lakhona lelo.”" 
Acts5:9 Nje-ke uPitrosi wathi kuye: “Kubayini nivumelene ngokulinga uMoya kaSomnini na? Qala-ke, iinyawo zamadoda abulunge indodakho zisemnyango, nawe azokuthwala, akukhuphe!”" 
Acts5:10 Khonokho waduleka phasi ngeenyaweni zakhe, wafa. Kuthe lokha amasokana nangenako amfumana afile, amthwala ayombulunga eqadi kwendodakhe." 
Acts5:11 Ukwesaba okukhulu kwabamba ibandla loke nabo boke abezwe ngezehlakalwezi. 
Acts5:12 Abapostoli benza iimbonakaliso neemangaliso ezinengi hlangana nabantu begodu bebamunye bahlanganyela ndawonye ngethurini lakaSolomoni. 
Acts5:13 Akakho noyedwa owaba nesibindi sokuhlanganyela nabo; nanyana kunjalo bebanedumo elihle ebantwini. 
Acts5:14 Abantu abakholwako bebasiya bangezeleleka ngobunengi eKosini, iye isibalo esikhulu samadoda namakhosikazi." 
Acts5:15 Ngemiphumela yalokho, abantu bebakhuphela abagulako eendledlaneni ngaphandle, babalalise emikghadini nemisemeni khona kuzakuthi lokha uPitrosi nadlulako, isithunzi sakhe sisithibeze abanye babo." 
Acts5:16 Iinqubuthu zabantu zavela kiyo yoke imizi ezombeleze iJerusalema, zaletha abagulako nalabo egade banemimoya emimbi; boke bapholiswa." 
Acts5:17 Yeke umphristi omkhulu nabo boke ababambisene naye, ebekumalunga womkhandlu wabaSadusi, baba nomona." 
Acts5:18 Babopha abapostoli, babadlhunya ngesikhungweni somphakathi." 
Acts5:19 Kodwana phakathi kobusuku ingilozi kaSomnini yavula iminyango yesikhungo, yabakhuphela ngaphandle yathi kibo:" 
Acts5:20 “Khambani niyokujama eenrhodlweni zethempeli, nitjele abantu umlayezo wobuphilo obutjhobu.”" 
Acts5:21 Sebezwile lokho bangena ngethempelini sekusile, bathoma ukufundisa abantu. Kwathi lokha umphristi omkhulu nababambisene naye nabafikako, babizela ndawonye soke isigungu sabarholi bamaJuda nabaphathi boke bakwa-Israyeli; bathumela esikhungweni bona kulethwe abapostoli." 
Acts5:22 Kodwana iinthunywa nazifika esikhungweni, akhange zibafunyane lapho. Nje-ke zabuyela emuva zayokubika zathi:" 
Acts5:23 “Nasifikako esikhungweni, sifumene kukhiyiwe nabalindi boke baqalile emasangweni, kodwana nasivula amasango, akhange sifumane muntu ngaphakathi!”" 
Acts5:24 Ngokuzwa lokho induna yabalindithempeli nabaphristi abakhulu bakhungatheka, barareka bona kungaba mhlolo bani-ke lo." 
Acts5:25 Khonapho kwafika indoda eyathi kibo: “Qalani! Amadoda eniwadlhunye ngesikhungweni ajame ngeenrhodlweni zethempeli afundisa abantu!” 
Acts5:26 Yeke induna yakhamba nabalindithempeli bayobathatha babaletha. Akhange basebenzise amandla ngombana gade besaba bona abantu bangabakhanda ngamatje. 
Acts5:27 Sele babalethile babajamisa phambi kwesigungu sabarholi bamaJuda, umphristi omkhulu wababuza wathi:" 
Acts5:28 “Sanikhalimela bona ningafundisi ngebizwelo! Kodwana nanyana kunjalo nirhatjhe ifundiswenu kilo loke iJerusalema benafuna bona sibe nomlandu weengazi zendoda le!” 
Acts5:29 UPitrosi nabanye abapostoli baphendula bathi: “Kufuze bona silalele uZimu kunabantu. 
Acts5:30 UZimu wabobaba bethu wamvusa uJesu kabafileko, enimbuleleko nina ngokumphanyeka esiphambanweni." 
Acts5:31 UZimu wamphakamisela ngesigomeni sakhe njengomrholi nomsindisi, khona azakunikela abantu bakwa-Israyeli ithuba lokutjhuguluka nokulitjalelwa kwezono." 
Acts5:32 Thina sibofakazi bezintwezi kanye noMoya oCwengileko uZimu amuphe labo abamlalelako.” 
Acts5:33 Kuthe bona bakuzwe lokho, batjhitjhibala bacabanga ukubabulala." 
Acts5:34 Kodwana umFarisi obizwa bona nguGamaliyeli, umfundisi womthetho ogade ahlonitjhwa khulu babantu, wasikima hlangana nesigungu wabawa bona amadoda lawo akhutjhelwe ngaphandle kwesikhatjhana." 
Acts5:35 Wathi esigungwini: “Ma-Israyeli, yelelani enihlose ukukwenza emadodeni la." 
Acts5:36 Esikhathini esinye esadlulako uTheyudasi wakhe wavela wazikhuluma bona yena mkhulu, walandelwa madoda amakhulu amane. Yena wabulawa, abalandeli bakhe boke barhatjheka, koke kwaphenduka ilize." 
Acts5:37 Emva kwalokho uJudasi, umGalile, wavela naye ngesikhathi sokubalwa kwabantu wadosa abantu abanengi ekuvukeleni uburholi. Kodwana naye wabulawa, abalandeli bakhe boke bahlakazeka." 
Acts5:38 Yeke, mayelana nendaba le nginiyelelisa ngokuthi, ‘Hlukanani namadoda! Aliseni akhambe ngombana nangabe amano nomsebenzawo kuvela ebantwini, kuzakuhluleka." 
Acts5:39 Kodwana nangabe kuvela kuZimu, angekhe naphumelela ukuwavimba; nakungasinjalo, nizazifumanisa ngokwenu nisilwa noZimu!’ ”" 
Acts5:40 Isigungu salandela ikhalimo kaGamaliyeli. Yeke babizela abapostoli ngaphakathi, babaritha bebabakhalima bona bangasakhulumi ngebizo lakaJesu, babathukulula." 
Acts5:41 Abapostoli basitjhiya isigungu sabarholi bamaJuda, bakhamba ngombana bazibona bafanele ukuhlunguphazwa ngebanga lebizwelo." 
Acts5:42 Ilanga nelanga ngethempelini nendlini ngendlu akhange balise ukufundisa nokumemezela ivangeli bona uJesu unguKrestu. 
Acts6:1 Kwathi lokha inani labafundi nalisiya lisanda, kwaba khona ukukhalala hlangana namaJuda akhuluma isiGirigi ngamaJuda akhuluma isiHebheru ngombana athi abahlolokazi bawo abatjhejwa ekwabelweni kwangamalanga." 
Acts6:2 Abapostoli abalitjhumi nambili babiza soke isiqubuthu sabafundi bathi: “Akukalungi bona singatjhiya ilizwi lakaZimu ngebanga lokwabela ukudla. 
Acts6:3 Alo-ke bafowethu, khethani hlangana nani amadoda alikhomba okwaziwa bona azele uMoya oCwengileko nobuhlakani, siwabeke bona ibe ngiwo aqala umsebenzi lo." 
Acts6:4 Thina ngokwethu sizakunikela soke isikhathi sethu ekuthandazeni nemsebenzini wokutjhumayela.” 
Acts6:5 Ilizwi leli lanelisa woke umphakathi. Yeke, bakhetha uStefani, indoda egade izele uMoya oCwengileko nokukholwa, uFlebhe, uProrhoro, uNikanori, uTimoni, uPharimenasi noNikolawu ovela e-Anthiyorhiya owatjhugululelwa ebuJudeni." 
Acts6:5 Ilizwi leli lanelisa woke umphakathi. Yeke, bakhetha uStefani, indoda egade izele uMoya oCwengileko nokukholwa, uFlebhe, uProrhoro, uNikanori, uTimoni, uPharimenasi noNikolawu ovela e-Anthiyorhiya owatjhugululelwa ebuJudeni." 
Acts6:6 Babajamisa phambi kwabapostoli; abapostoli bathandaza bababeka izandla. 
Acts6:7 Njalo-ke ilizwi lakaZimu laya lirhatjheka lisanda. Inani labafundi eJerusalema landa nenani elinengi labaphristi lamukela ukukholwa. 
Acts6:8 UStefani, azele umusa namandla, wenza iimbonakaliso neemangaliso ezikulu hlangana nabantu." 
Acts6:9 Kodwana amanye wamalunga wesinagogi elaziwa bona ngelabaTjhaphulukileko, asikima athoma ukuphikisana noStefani. BekumaJuda avela eSirene ne-Alekzandriya. Wona asekelwa ngamanye avela eSilisiya ne-Asiya." 
Acts6:10 Kodwana azange akghone ukujamelana nokuhlakanipha kwakhe namkha uMoya oCwengileko agade akhuluma ngaye. 
Acts6:11 Nje-ke bahlohlozela amadoda athileko ngasese bona athi: “Simzwile ahlambalaza uMosi noZimu!” 
Acts6:12 Ngalokho baphehla abantu, abaphathi nabafundisi bomthetho, balunga kuye, bambamba, bamusa esigungwini sabarholi bamaJuda." 
Acts6:13 Bahlela abofakazi bamanga abamrhwayela bathi: “Indoda le, ayilisi ukuhlambalaza indawo ecwengileko le nomthetho kaMosi." 
Acts6:14 Mbala siyizwe isithi uJesu weNazaretha loyo, uzakurhayila indawo le abe aphendule namasiko uMosi asinikela wona!”" 
Acts6:15 Boke egade bahlezi esigungwini, bamqalisisa uStefani, babona ubuso bakhe bufana nebengilozi." 
Acts7:1 Umphristi omkhulu wambuza wathi: “Ngambala lokhu kunjalo na?” 
Acts7:2 Yena waphendula wathi: “Bafowethu nani bobaba, ngilalelani! UZimu wephazimulo wabonakala kubaba u-Abrahamu asahlala eMesopotamiya, angakahlali eRharana," 
Acts7:3 wathi kuye, “ ‘Tjhiya inarhekhenu, abantu bekhenu nendlu kayihlo, uye enarheni engizakutjengisa yona.’" 
Acts7:4 “Mbala wayitjhiya inarha yamaKasidi wayokuhlala eRharana. Emva kokufa kwakayise, uZimu wamfudusela enarheni enihlala kiyo nina nje." 
Acts7:5 Kodwana akhange amnikele ilifa lapho, ngitjho nomtletlana wendawo. Kunalokho ngesikhathesi wamthembisa nanyana gade anganamntwana bona ngemuva kwakhe izakuba ngeyakhe neenzukulwana zakhe." 
Acts7:6 UZimu wakhuluma kuye bunje wathi, ‘Yazi mbala bona iinzukulwana zakho zizakuba ziinkhonzi enarheni engasiyo yazo. Zizakulotjha abantu benarha leyo abazazigandelela iminyaka emakhulu amane." 
Acts7:7 Kodwana ngizakugweba isizwe esibagandelelekweso. Kuzakuthi emva kwalokho baphume lapho bazongilotjha endaweni le.’ 
Acts7:8 Yeke wenza naye isivumelwano sokusoka. Nje-ke u-Abrahamu waba nguyise ka-Isaka bewamsoka anamalanga abunane abelethiwe. U-Isaka yena wabeletha uJakopo, uJakopo waba ngubaba wabokhokho abalitjhumi nambili." 
Acts7:9 “Abokhokho baba nomona ngoJosefa, bamthengisa bona ayokuba likhoboka eGibhide. Kodwana uZimu gade anaye," 
Acts7:10 wamvikela kizo zoke iimbandezelo zakhe. Wamupha ukuhlakanipha wenza nokobana azuze umusa phambi kwakaFaro, ikosi yeGibhide. Ngalokho uFaro wamenza umbusi phezu kweGibhide nesigodlweni sakhe soke." 
Acts7:11 “Nje-ke kwaba khona indlala ekulu eGibhide neKanana, yaletha ukuhlupheka okukhulu, abokhokho bebatlhoga ukudla." 
Acts7:12 Kuthe bona uJakopo ezwe bona kukhona ukudla eGibhide, wathumela abokhokho bethu kokuthoma lapho." 
Acts7:13 Kwathi kwesibili nabafikako, uJosefa wazazisa kibomnakwabo, uFaro naye wathoma ukwazi ngebekhabo lakaJosefa." 
Acts7:14 Yeke uJosefa wathumela ilizwi kuyise uJakopo amazisa bona yena nendlu yakhe bafudukele eGibhide, kubabantu abamatjhumi alikhomba nesihlanu ngesibalo." 
Acts7:15 Ngokunjalo-ke uJakopo wehlela eGibhide, lapha yena nabokhokho bethu bafela khona." 
Acts7:16 Iindumbu zabo zalethwa eTjhekemu, babulungwa ngethuneni u-Abrahamu alithenga emadodaneni kaRhamori eTjhekemu ngenani elithileko lemali." 
Acts7:17 “Kwathi isikhathi sisabandamela bona uZimu agcine isithembiso asenzako ku-Abrahamu, inani labantu bekhethu eGibhide landa labuyeleleka." 
Acts7:18 Nje-ke kwavela enye ikosi ebeyingamazi uJosefa yabusa eGibhide. 
Acts7:19 Yona yaphatha abantu bekhethu ngelunya, yakatelela abokhokho bona balahle amasana wabo ukuze angaphili." 
Acts7:20 UMosi wabelethwa ngesikhatheso, amntwana omuhle phambi kwakaZimu. Waba ngaphasi kwetjhejo lendlu kayise iinyanga ezintathu." 
Acts7:21 Kuthe bona akhutjhwe ngekhaya, indodakazi kaFaro yazithathela yena yazikhulisela njengomntwanayo." 
Acts7:22 Yeke uMosi wafundiswa boke ubuhlakani bamaGibhide, waba namandla ngekulumo nangezenzo." 
Acts7:23 “Kuthe uMosi selaneminyaka ematjhumi amane, wakhumbula ukuthekela ama-Israyeli wekhabo." 
Acts7:24 Wabona omunye aphethwe kumbi mGibhide, wavikela umuntu ophethwe kumbi loyo, wambuyiselela ngokubulala umGibhide." 
Acts7:25 Ngokwenza njalo wadlumbana bona abantu bekhabo bazakulemuka bonyana uZimu bekasebenzisa yena ekubathukululeni, kodwana akhange bakulemuke lokho." 
Acts7:26 Ngakusasa godu wabona ama-Israyeli amabili asilwa wodwa, walinga ukuwalamula ngokuthi athi, ‘Madoda, nibomfo nina; alo kubayini niphathane kumbi nje?’" 
Acts7:27 Kodwana loyo ogade aphethe omunye kumbi wasunduza uMosi wathi, ‘Ubekwe ngubani bonyana ube mbusi nomgwebi phezu kwethu?" 
Acts7:28 Kghani ucabanga ukungibulala nami njengomGibhide ombuleleko izolo?’ 
Acts7:29 Kuthe bona uMosi ezwe lokho, wabalekela eMidiyana, lapho ahlala khona njengesikhonzi bewaba namadodana amabili." 
Acts7:30 “Emva kweminyaka ematjhumi amane, kwabonakala ingilozi kuMosi iselangabini lomlilo esithukghwaneni esivuthako erhalawumbeni eduze nentaba yeSinayi." 
Acts7:31 Kwathi lokha nakabona lokhu, warareka ngakubonako. Asatjhidela bona aqale aseduze, wezwa ilizwi lakaSomnini lithi," 
Acts7:32 ‘NginguZimu wabokhokho bakho, uZimu ka-Abrahamu, ka-Isaka noJakopo.’ UMosi wadedemela ngevalo wabhalelwa nakuqala." 
Acts7:33 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi kuye, ‘Hlubula amapatlagwanakho ngombana lapha ujame khonapho yindawo ecwengileko." 
Acts7:34 Ngambala ngibonile amatlhuwiso wabantu bami eGibhide. Ngisizwile isililo sabo; ngalokho ngehlile kobana ngibasindise. Nje-ke yewuze, ngizokuthuma eGibhide.’" 
Acts7:35 “Nguye kanye yena Mosi loyo ebamdela ngamezwi wokuthi, ‘Ubekwe ngubani bonyana ube mbusi nomgwebi?’ Yena loyo bekathunyelwe nguZimu ngesandla sengilozi eyabonakala kuye esithukghwaneni bona abembusi nomsindisi." 
Acts7:36 Wabakhupha eGibhide, iye, wenza iimangaliso neembonakaliso eGibhide, elwandle lomGaba kanye nerhalawumbeni iminyaka ematjhumi amane." 
Acts7:37 Nguye uMosi loyo owatjela ama-Israyeli wathi, ‘UZimu uzanivusela phakathi kwabafowenu umphorofidi onjengami.’" 
Acts7:38 Nguye loyo ogade asehlanganweni erhalawumbeni kanye nengilozi eyakhuluma kuye nakibokhokho bethu entabeni yeSinayi. Wamukela amezwi aphilako wakaZimu bona awadlulisele kithi. 
Acts7:39 “Kodwana abokhokho bethu akhange bavume ukumlalela. Kunalokho bamkhaphela ngeqadi nangeenhliziyo zabo babuyela eGibhide 
Acts7:40 bebathi ku-Aroni, ‘Sikima usenzele abozinyana abazasikhokhela ngombana nakhu uMosi okunguye owasikhupha enarheni yeGibhide asazi bonyana kwenzekeni ngaye.’" 
Acts7:41 Kwaba kulokha nabenza isithombe sekonyana, baletha imihlabelo kiso benama ngemisenzi yezandla zabo." 
Acts7:42 Kodwana uZimu wabafulathela, wabaliselela bona balotjhe umkhambathi womkayi njengombana kutloliwe encwadini yabaphorofidi ukuthi, ‘Ngakhe nganiyala bonyana ningilethele imihlabelo neminikelo eminyakeni ematjhumi amane eniyihlezi erhalawumbeni, nina ndlu yakwa-Israyeli na?" 
Acts7:43 Niphakamise ithempedlana lakaMoleki nekwekwezi yakazinyanenu uRefani okumifanekiso yeenthombe enayenzako kobana niyilotjhe. Yeke ngizonithumela ekuthunjweni ngaphetjheya kweBhabheli.’ 
Acts7:44 “Abokhokho bethu babanethaberinakeli lobufakazi hlangana nabo erhalawumbeni. Belenziwe njengombana uZimu gade akhombise uMosi, ngokuya ngomfanekiso awubonako." 
Acts7:45 Bangena nalo bakhamba noJotjhuwa lokha nabathumba inarha yezizwe uZimu aziqotjhako ngaphambi kwabo. Ithaberinakelelo laba senarheni leyo bekwaba sesikhathini sakaDavida," 
Acts7:46 owamukela umusa ebusweni bakaZimu bewabawa bonyana akhele uZimu kaJakopo indlu. 
Acts7:47 Kodwana nguSolomoni owamakhela indlu. 
Acts7:48 “Nokho uZimu ongoPhezulu akahlali ngendlini eyakhiwe babantu, njengombana umphorofidi asitjho," 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Izulu sihlalo sami sobukhosi, iphasi lisinabelo seenyawo zami. Alo, yikumba bani-ke enizangakhela yona, indawami yokuphumula ibe yini?" 
Acts7:50 Kanti akusisisandla sami esenze koke lokho na?’ 
Acts7:51 “Nina bontanyana, abaneenhliziyo neendlebe ezingakasokwa, ninjengaboyihlo! Ngesikhathi soke nijamelana noMoya oCwengileko!" 
Acts7:52 Nitjho bona ukhona umphorofidi abokhokho benu abangakhange khebamphathe kumbi na? Angithi babulala ngitjho nalabo abamemezela ngokuza koLungileko. Nje-ke nina nimkhaphele benambulala. 
Acts7:53 Angitjho ngini enamukela umthetho owalethwa ngomyalo weengilozi, kodwana akhange kheniwulalele?”" 
Acts7:54 Kuthe bona bezwe lokho bavutha ngelaka, bamgugudela amazinyo ngokubila." 
Acts7:55 Kodwana uStefani azele uMoya oCwengileko, waqala phezulu ezulwini wabona iphazimulo kaZimu noJesu ajame ngesigomeni sakaZimu." 
Acts7:56 Wathi: “Qalani! Ngibona izulu livuleka neNdodana yoMuntu ijame ngesigomeni sakaZimu!” 
Acts7:57 Ngalokho bavala iindlebe zabo bamemeza, batheleka boke." 
Acts7:58 Bamrhudulela ngaphandle kwedorobho, bathoma ukumkhanda ngamatje. Abofakazi babeka izambatho zabo eenyaweni zesokana elinguSawula." 
Acts7:59 Basamkhanda ngamatje njalo, uStefani wathandaza asithi: “Kosi Jesu, yamukela ummoyami.”" 
Acts7:60 Waguqa phasi warhuwelela wathi: “Kosi! Ungabali isonwesi phezu kwabo.” Sele atjhwile lokhu, walala ubuthongo besiphelani." 
Acts8:1 USawula wavumelana nabo ngokubulawa kwakaStefani. Khona mhlokho ibandla eJerusalema lathoma ukuzunywa. Boke bahlakazeka emazweni weJudiya neSamariya, kwasala abapostoli kwaphela." 
Acts8:2 Amadoda ebegade esaba uZimu ambulunga uStefani, abe amzilela ngokulila okukhulu." 
Acts8:3 Kodwana uSawula warhayila ibandla, akhamba angena indlu ngendlu arhurhubisa amadoda nabafazi, abadlhunya ngesikhungweni." 
Acts8:4 Labo ebegade bahlakazekile batjhumayela ilizwi lapha bakhamba khona. 
Acts8:5 UFlebhe wehlela edorobheni leSamariya watjhumayela khona uKrestu. 
Acts8:6 Iinqubuthu zabantu zalalelisisa uFlebhe ngahliziyonye; iye, bezizwa begodu zibona iimbonakaliso azenzako." 
Acts8:7 Kabanengi imimoya emimbi beyiphuma ngokulila okukhulu, abafe ihlangothi nabaziinrhole bapholiswa." 
Acts8:8 Ngalokho kwaba khona ukuthaba okukhulu eSamariya. 
Acts8:9 Edorobheni lelo bekunendoda, ibizo layo elinguSimoni, okwathi eenkhathini warara amaSamariya ngemilingo; wazikhuluma bona yena mkhulu." 
Acts8:10 Boke abantu, okutjho abaphezulu nabaphasi, bebamlalelisisa, barhuwelela basithi: “Umuntu lo umamandla kaZimu, aziwa bona mamandla amakhulu.”" 
Acts8:11 Bamnamathela ngombana gade sele abarare isikhathi eside ngemilingo yakhe. 
Acts8:12 Kodwana kuthe nabakholwa umlayezo kaFlebhe ngeendaba ezimnandi zombuso kaZimu nebizo lakaJesu Krestu, kwabhajadiswa amadoda kanye nabafazi." 
Acts8:13 USimoni naye wakholwa bewabhajadiswa. Walandela uFlebhe kiyo yoke indawo, ararwa ziimbonakaliso neemangaliso ezikulu ebegade azibona." 
Acts8:14 Lokha abapostoli eJerusalema nabezwa bona abantu beSamariya sebalamukele ilizwi lakaZimu, bathumela uPitrosi noJwanisi kibo." 
Acts8:15 Kuthe bona bafike, bathandazela bona bamukele uMoya oCwengileko" 
Acts8:16 ngombana uMoya oCwengileko bekangakehleli nakoyedwa wabo; kodwana bebabhajadiswe kwaphela ebizweni leKosi uJesu. 
Acts8:17 Yeke uPitrosi noJwanisi bababeka izandla, bamukela uMoya oCwengileko." 
Acts8:18 Kuthe bona uSimoni abone bonyana uMoya bekamukelwa ngokubekwa bapostoli izandla, waletha imali," 
Acts8:19 wathi: “Nginikelani nami amandla la, khona kuzakuthi woke engimbeka izandla, amukele uMoya oCwengileko.”" 
Acts8:20 Kodwana uPitrosi wamphendula wathi: “Kwanga ungabhubha nemadlanakho leyo ngombana ucabanga bona ungathenga isipho sakaZimu ngemali! 
Acts8:21 Awunangcenye namkha isabelo emsebenzini lo ngombana ihliziywakho ayikalungi phambi kwakaZimu. 
Acts8:22 Nje-ke phenduka ebukhohlakalini bakho uthandaze uZimu bona akulibalele. Mhlamunye uzakukulibalela emicabangweni enje yehliziyo 
Acts8:23 ngombana ngiyabona bonyana usenyongweni ebabako nemakhamandeleni wesono.” 
Acts8:24 Nje-ke uSimoni waphendula wathi: “Yeningithandazele kuZimu kobana koke enikutjhwileko kungangehleli.” 
Acts8:25 Emva kobana banikele ubufakazi bebatjhumayela ilizwi leKosi, uPitrosi noJwanisi babuyela eJerusalema, bakhamba batjhumayela ivangeli emizaneni eminengi yeSamariya." 
Acts8:26 Nje-ke ingilozi kaZimu yathi kuFlebhe: “Iya ngesewula endleleni enganabantu, eyehla ukusuka eJerusalema itjhinga eGaza.”" 
Acts8:27 Yeke uFlebhe wathoma ikhambo lakhe. Endleleni wahlangana nomphakulwa weTopiya obekasikhulu esiqakathekileko esiphethe amagugu wendlu yendlovukazi yeTopiya. Indoda le beyiye ukuyokulotjha eJerusalema. 
Acts8:28 Nje-ke sele ibuyela ekhaya, beyihlezi ekaranenayo ifunda incwadi yomphorofidi u-Isaya." 
Acts8:29 UMoya wathi kuFlebhe: “Tjhidela ekaraneni leyo ukhambe nayo.” 
Acts8:30 Mbala uFlebhe wagijimela ekaraneni, wezwa indoda leyo ifunda incwadi yomphorofidi u-Isaya, wabuza wathi: “Uyakuzwa lokho okufundako na?”" 
Acts8:31 Yona yathi: “Ngingakuzwa njani, ngaphandle kobana kube khona ongihlathululelako na?” Nje-ke yabawa uFlebhe bona akhwele ahlale hlanu kwayo." 
Acts8:32 Indima yomtlolo egade ifundwa mphakulwa ngile: “Njengemvu esiwa ekuhlatjweni nanjengemvana ethulileko phambi komrhunayo, ngaleyondlela azange ivule umlomayo." 
Acts8:33 Ekuthotjisweni kwayo yadinywa ubulungiswa. Ngubani ongahlathulula isizukulwana sayo? Mbala, ipilwayo yasuswa ephasini.”" 
Acts8:34 Umphakulwa wabuza uFlebhe wathi: “Akhese ungitjele, umphorofidi ukhuluma ngobani, uzitjho yena namkha omunye?”" 
Acts8:35 UFlebhe wathoma ukukhuluma ngendimana le yemitlolo wamtjela ivangeli ngoJesu. 
Acts8:36 Basakhamba endleleni, bafika endaweni lapha bekunamanzi khona, umphakulwa wathi: “Qala naka amanzi, ngingakhandelwa yini bona ngingabhajadiswa na?”" 
Acts8:37 UFlebhe wathi kuye: “Ungabhajadiswa nawukholwa ngehliziywakho yoke.” Yena waphendula wathi: “Ngiyakholwa bona uJesu Krestu yiNdodana kaZimu.” 
Acts8:38 Umphakulwa wayala bonyana ikarana ijame. Nje-ke uFlebhe nomphakulwa behlela ngemanzini, uFlebhe wambhabhadisa." 
Acts8:39 Kuthe bona baphume ngemanzini, uMoya kaSomnini wahlutha uFlebhe. Umphakulwa akhange abe asambona godu; yeke-ke waraga ngendlelakhe, athabile." 
Acts8:40 UFlebhe wazifunyana asele ase-Atjhidodi, waraga njalo atjhumayela ivangeli emizaneni yoke bewafika eKhesariya." 
Acts9:1 USawula waphikelela ngokusongela ukubulala abafundi bakaJesu, waya kumphristi omkhulu" 
Acts9:2 wayokubawa iincwadi zokuya esinagogini eDamaseku, khona kuzakuthi nafumana nanyana ngubani weNdlela leyo kungaba madoda namkha abafazi, ababuyisele eJerusalema babotjhiwe." 
Acts9:3 Asakhamba njalo atjhidele eDamaseku, khonokho umkhanyo ovela ezulwini wabaneka kuye mahlangothi woke." 
Acts9:4 Waduleka phasi, wezwa ilizwi lisithi kuye: “Sawula, Sawula, ungizumelani na?”" 
Acts9:5 Wabuza wathi: “Ungubani wena, Kosi, na?” Ilizwi lathi: “NginguJesu ozumana naye." 
Acts9:6 Nje-ke vuka, uye ngedorobheni; uzakutjelwa bona wenzeni.”" 
Acts9:7 Amadoda agade akhamba noSawula ajama lapho akakamele; ezwa ilizwi kodwana akhange abone muntu. 
Acts9:8 USawula wasikima, kodwana kwathi nanyana amehlwakhe bekavulekile, akhange abone ilitho. Yeke bambamba ngesandla bamngenisa ngeDamaseku." 
Acts9:9 Amalanga amathathu bekangaboni, angagomi begodu angaseli ilitho." 
Acts9:10 EDamaseku bekunomfundi obizwa bona ngu-Ananiyasi; iKosi yathi kuye ngombono: “Ananiyasi!” Yena wathi: “Ngilapha, Kosi!”" 
Acts9:11 IKosi yathi kuye: “Khamba uye endlini kaJudasi endledlaneni ekuthiwa nguNqophile, ufune indoda evela eTarsusi enguSawula; qala iyathandaza." 
Acts9:12 Yena ubone ngombono indoda engu-Ananiyasi ingena, ibeka izandla phezu kwakhe khona azakubona godu.”" 
Acts9:13 Kodwana u-Ananiyasi waphendula wathi: “Kosi, ngizwe imibiko eminengi ngendoda leyo, nangazo zoke izinto ezimbi ezenzileko ngabacwengileko bakho eJerusalema." 
Acts9:14 Yona yeza ngegunya labaphristi abakhulu bona ibophe boke abantu abathandaza ebizweni lakho.” 
Acts9:15 Kodwana iKosi yathi kuye: “Khamba ngombana nguye osisitja sami esikhethiweko sokuphatha ibizo lami ebantwini abatjhili, emakhosini nebantwini bakwa-Israyeli." 
Acts9:16 Begodu ngizamtjengisa bona kufuze ahlupheke kangangani ngebanga lebizo lami.” 
Acts9:17 Yeke u-Ananiyasi waya endlini leyo wafese wangena kiyo. Wabeka uSawula izandla, wathi: “Mfowethu Sawula, iKosi uJesu eyazibonakalisa kuwe usendleleni usiza lapha, ingithume kobana ubuye ubone bewuzaliswe ngoMoya oCwengileko.”" 
Acts9:18 Khonokho into enjengepepha yasuka emehlweni kaSawula, wabuye wabona godu. Wasikima, wabhajadiswa." 
Acts9:19 Kwathi selagomile, amandlakhe abuya. Wahlala amalangana ambalwa nabafundi eDamaseku." 
Acts9:20 Masinyana wathoma ukutjhumayela emasinagogini bona uJesu uyiNdodana kaZimu. 
Acts9:21 Boke abamzwako barareka bathi: “Kanti lo akasiyo indoda eyabanga isiphithiphithi eJerusalema ngalabo abathandaza ebizweneli na? Angithi ize lapha kobana izobabamba ibase ebaphristini abakhulu baziimbotjhwa?” 
Acts9:22 Ukuya ngokuya uSawula wakhula emandleni, wamangaza amaJuda ahlala eDamaseku ngokubonisa bona uJesu unguKrestu." 
Acts9:23 Ekukhambeni kwesikhathi, amaJuda abopha izungu lokumbulala." 
Acts9:24 USawula wabazi ubukhwebetjhana babo. Ubusuku nemini bamlalela emasangweni wedorobho kobana bambulale. 
Acts9:25 Kodwana abafundi bakhe bamthatha ngobusuku bamehlisa ngesiqwebu ngetjhuba elisemthangaleni. 
Acts9:26 Kwathi lokha nakabuyela eJerusalema walinga ukuzihlanganisa nabafundi, kodwana boke bamesaba bangakholwa bona mbala umfundi." 
Acts9:27 UBharinabhasi weza wamthatha wamusa ebapostolini. Wabahlathululela bona uSawula wayibona njani iKosi endleleni, nokobana iKosi yakhuluma njani naye. Wabatjela nokobana uSawula waba nesibindi esingangani ngokutjhumayela ngebizo lakaJesu eDamaseku." 
Acts9:28 Alo-ke, uSawula wahlala nabo wakhamba yoke indawo eJerusalema, akhuluma ngesibindi ebizweni leKosi." 
Acts9:29 Wakhuluma waphikisana namaJuda akhuluma isiGirigi, kodwana balinga ukumbulala." 
Acts9:30 Kuthe bona abazalwana bezwe ngalokhu, bamthatha bamehlisela eKhesariya bamthumela eTarsusi." 
Acts9:31 Yeke-ke ibandla laba nokuthula kilo loke iJudiya, iGalile neSamariya. Lakheka, landa ngokuqiniswa nguMoya oCwengileko, lakhamba ngokwesaba iKosi." 
Acts9:32 UPitrosi asakhamba kizo zoke iindawo, wathekela nabacwengileko ngeLida." 
Acts9:33 Lapho wahlangana nendoda engu-Ayeniya, egade ife ihlangothi iminyaka ebunane ilele ingakwazi ukuvuka phasi." 
Acts9:34 UPitrosi wathi kiyo: “Ayeniya, uJesu Krestu uyakupholisa. Vuka uqhusulule.” Khonokho u-Ayeniya wasikima." 
Acts9:35 Boke abahlala ngeLida nangeTjharoni bambona, batjhugulukela eKosini." 
Acts9:36 NgeJopa bekukhona umfundikazi, ibizo lakhe elinguThabitha, nakutjhugululwako ngesiGirigi kutjho uDorkasi. Gade azinikele ukwenza okulungileko asiza nabadududu." 
Acts9:37 Ngesikhatheso wahlatjwa kugula wafa. Isidumbu sakhe sahlanjiswa salaliswa ngelawini elingehla. 
Acts9:38 IJopa gade ingasikude neLida; nje-ke kuthe bona abafundi bezwe bonyana uPitrosi ungeLida, bathumela kuye amadoda amabili nomlayezo othi: “Siyakuncenga yewuze msinyana kithi.”" 
Acts9:39 UPitrosi wasikima wakhamba nabo. Nafikako, bamusa ngelawini elingehla. Boke abahlolokazi bamzomba, balila bamkhombisa izambatho neempahla ezinye uDorkasi azithunga asaphila nabo." 
Acts9:40 UPitrosi wabakhuphela boke ngaphandle kwelawu; nje-ke waguqa phasi wathandaza, waphendukela ngesidunjini wathi: “Thabitha, vuka!” Wavula amehlo wakhe wabona uPitrosi, wathabuluka wahlala." 
Acts9:41 UPitrosi wamsiza ngokumsikimisa, wabiza abacwengileko nabahlolokazi wabanikela yena sele aphila." 
Acts9:42 Lokhu kwazeka kiyo yoke iJopa, abanengi bakholwa eKosini." 
Acts9:43 UPitrosi wahlala ngeJopa amalanga amanengi nomtjhukiinkhumba uSimoni. 
Acts10:1 EKhesariya bekukhona indoda, ibizo layo linguKorneliyasi umphathimabutho ebekuthiwa mabutho weTariyana." 
Acts10:2 Yena nomndenakhe bekubabantu abesaba uZimu nabazinikeleko kuye. Gade abela abadududu, ahlala njalo athandaza uZimu." 
Acts10:3 Kwathi langelinye ngesimbi yesithathu malangantambama waba nombono. Ngokucacileko wabona ingilozi kaZimu ifika kuye isithi: “Korneliyasi!” 
Acts10:4 Yena wayiqala ngokuyesaba, wabuza wathi: “Kosi, kwenze njani?” Ingilozi yaphendula yathi: “Imithandazwakho nokwabela kwakho abadududu kwenyukele kuZimu njengesikhumbuzo." 
Acts10:5 Nje-ke, thumela amadoda eJopa ayokubiza uSimoni ekuthiwa nguPitrosi." 
Acts10:6 Yena uhlala kwaSimoni umtjhukiinkhumba onendlu hlanu kwelwandle.” 
Acts10:7 Kwathi lokha ingilozi egade ikhuluma naye nasele ikhambile, uKorneliyasi wabiza iinsebenzi zakhe ezimbili nejoni elesaba uZimu egade limelusa." 
Acts10:8 Wabatjela koke ekwenzekileko bewabathuma eJopa. 
Acts10:9 Ngakusasa basesesendleleni, sele batjhidele edorobheni, uPitrosi wenyukela phezu kwephahla lekumba wayokuthandaza kusemini ekulu." 
Acts10:10 Walamba bewakhanuka kobana angadla. Nje-ke kwathi ukudla kusalungiswa waba semmoyeni. 
Acts10:11 Wabona izulu livuleka, kwaba nento eyehlako injengetjhila elikhulu lehliselwa phasi ngeentsutsungu zalo zozine." 
Acts10:12 Ngaphakathi kwalo bekukhona imihlobohlobo yazo zoke iimbandana ezineenyawo ezine, iimphili ezikhakhabako neenyoni zomkayi." 
Acts10:13 Nje-ke ilizwi lathi kuye: “Pitrosi, vuka, uhlabe, ugome!”" 
Acts10:14 Kodwana uPitrosi wathi: “Awa, Kosi ngombana azange khengigome okusilapheleko namkha okungakahlambuluki.”" 
Acts10:15 Ilizwi lakhuluma naye godu, lathi: “Lokho uZimu akuhlambululileko ungakubizi bona kusilaphele.”" 
Acts10:16 Lokho kwenzeka amahlandla amathathu, yeke itjhilelo lathathwa khonokho labuyiselwa ezulwini." 
Acts10:17 UPitrosi asararekile bona umbono utjho ukuthini, amadoda athunywe nguKorneliyasi sele afunyene indlu kaSimoni bona ikuphi, ajama esangweni layo." 
Acts10:18 Arhuwelela, abuza bona kungabe ukhona umyeni lapha, ibizo lakhe elinguSimoni Pitrosi na?" 
Acts10:19 Kuthe uPitrosi asazindla ngombono lowo, uMoya oCwengileko wathi kuye: “Qala, kunamadoda amathathu afuna ukukubona!" 
Acts10:20 Sikima, wehle uye kiwo! Ungazazi ukukhamba nawo ngombana athunyelwe ngimi.”" 
Acts10:21 Yeke uPitrosi wehla waya kiwo, wafika wathi: “Nginguye enimfunako. Alo, nize ngani?”" 
Acts10:22 Aphendula athi: “Umphathimabutho, uKorneliyasi usithumile. Uyindoda eqotho eyesaba uZimu begodu ukhulunywa kuhle esizweni soke samaJuda. Uyalwe yingilozi ecwengileko bona akumemele emzinakhe ukuze ezwe bonyana umphathele ndaba bani.”" 
Acts10:23 UPitrosi wawabawa bona angene ngendlini; wahlala nawo ubusukobo. Ngakusasa wakhamba nawo; nabanye abazalwana beJopa bakhamba naye. 
Acts10:24 Ngelanga elilandelako wafika eKhesariya, lapha uKorneliyasi gade abalindele khona begodu gade ameme iinhlobo nabangani bakhe abakhulu." 
Acts10:25 UPitrosi asangena endlini, uKorneliyasi wamhlangabeza wahloma ihloko phasi eenyaweni zakhe ngokumhlonipha." 
Acts10:26 Kodwana uPitrosi wamphakamisa wathi kuye: “Sikima, nami ngimumuntu nje.”" 
Acts10:27 Asakhuluma naye njalo, wangena ngendlini, wafumana kuhlangene abantu abanengi." 
Acts10:28 Wathi kibo: “Nani ngokwenu niyazi bona kuphambene nomthetho wethu kobana umJuda ahlanganyele namkha athekele wesinye isizwe. Kodwana uZimu ungibonisile bona ngingathi umuntu othileko usilaphele namkha akakahlambuluki. 
Acts10:29 Nje-ke kungalokho kuthe nangibizwako ngeza ngaphandle kokuzaza. Alo-ke, ngingabuza bona kubayini ningibizile na?”" 
Acts10:30 UKorneliyasi waphendula wathi: “Amalanga amane adlulileko, bengithandaza ngingendlinami ngesikhathesi, ngesimbi yesithathu malangantambama: Khonokho kwajama phambi kwami indoda yembethe izambatho eziphazimako." 
Acts10:31 Yathi kimi, ‘Korneliyasi! UZimu uwuzwile umthandazwakho bewakhumbula nokwabela kwakho izipho kwabadududu." 
Acts10:32 Nje-ke, thumela eJopa, uyokubiza uSimoni ekuthiwa nguPitrosi. Yena umyeni emzini kaSimoni umtjhukiinkhumba, ohlala hlanu kwelwandle.’" 
Acts10:33 Yeke ngathumela bona bayokubiza msinyana; wenze kuhle wafika. Soke sesilapha phambi koZimu, sesilindele ukuzwa koke uZimu akuyale bona usitjele khona.”" 
Acts10:34 UPitrosi wathoma ukukhuluma, wathi: “Sekuyangikhanyela bona uZimu akakhethi ubuso." 
Acts10:35 Kodwana omesabako enze okulungileko nanyana angewasiphi isizwe uyamukeleka kuye. 
Acts10:36 Niyawazi umlayezo uZimu awuthumela ebantwini bakwa-Israyeli, akhuluma ivangeli lokuthula eliza ngoJesu Krestu oyiKosi yabo boke." 
Acts10:37 Niyakwazi bona kwenzekeni kilo loke iJudiya, kusukela eGalile ngemva kombhabhadiso owatjhunyayelwa nguJwanisi;" 
Acts10:38 kobana uZimu wajamisa uJesu weNazaretha ngoMoya oCwengileko namandla, wakhamba yoke indawo enza okuhle, apholisa boke egade bangaphasi kwamandla kaSathana ngombana uZimu gade anaye." 
Acts10:39 Sibofakazi bakho koke akwenzileko elizweni lamaJuda neJerusalema. Bambulala ngokumphanyeka esiphambanweni," 
Acts10:40 kodwana uZimu wamvusa kabafileko ngelanga lesithathu, wenza bona abonwe," 
Acts10:41 ingasingibo boke abantu, kodwana abonwe ngithi uZimu asikhetha njengabofakazi. Iye, thina esadla besasela naye emva kokuvuka kwakhe kabafileko." 
Acts10:42 Wasiyala bona sitjhumayele ebantwini besifakaze bona nguye uZimu amkhethileko bona abe mgwebi wabaphilako nabafileko. 
Acts10:43 Boke abaphorofidi bafakaza ngaye bona woke okholwa kuye wamukeliswa ukulitjalelwa kwezono ngebizo lakhe.” 
Acts10:44 Kwathi uPitrosi asakhuluma amezwi la, uMoya oCwengileko wehlela phezu kwabo boke egade balalele umlayezo." 
Acts10:45 Amakholwa asokiweko nebegade eze noPitrosi, arareka khulu ngombana isipho sakaMoya oCwengileko besithelwe naphezu kwabatjhili." 
Acts10:46 Babezwa bakhuluma ngeenlimi ezitjhili badumisa uZimu. Nje-ke uPitrosi wathi: 
Acts10:47 “Ukhona ongakhandela bona abantwaba babhajadiswe ngamanzi na? Nabo bamukele uMoya oCwengileko njengathi.” 
Acts10:48 Yeke wathi ababhajadiswe ebizweni lakaJesu Krestu. Bambawa bona ahlale nabo amalangana. 
Acts11:1 Abapostoli nabazalwana kilo loke iJudiya bezwa bona nabatjhili sebamukele ilizwi lakaZimu. 
Acts11:2 Nje-ke kwathi bona uPitrosi aye eJerusalema, labo ebegade bafuna ukusoka abatjhili bamsola," 
Acts11:3 bathi: “Wena uye emzini wabatjhili abangakasoki, wagoma nabo!”" 
Acts11:4 UPitrosi wathoma ukubahlathululela koke njengombana kwenzekile, wathi:" 
Acts11:5 “Bengithandaza, ngisedorobheni leJopa, khonapho ngehlelwa siyezi ngabona umbono. Ngabona into efana netjhila isehliselwa phasi ngeentsutsungu zayo ezine ivela ezulwini; yehlela lapha ngikhona." 
Acts11:6 Ngaqalisisa ngaphakathi kwayo, ngabona iinlwana zephasi ezineenyawo ezine, iimbandana, iimphili ezikhakhabako neenyoni zomkayi." 
Acts11:7 Ngezwa ilizwi lithi kimi, ‘Pitrosi, vuka, uhlabe, ugome!’" 
Acts11:8 Kodwana ngaphendula ngathi, ‘Awa Kosi, akunalitho elisilapheleko namkha elingakahlambuluki elakhe langena ngemlonyenami.’" 
Acts11:9 Ilizwi elivela ezulwini lakhuluma kwesibili lathi, ‘Lokho uZimu akuhlambululileko, ungakubizi bona kungokusilapheleko.’" 
Acts11:10 Lokho kwenzeka amahlandla amathathu, nje-ke koke kwabuyiselwa ezulwini godu." 
Acts11:11 Khonokho amadoda amathathu agade avela eKhesariya athunywe kimi, afikela ngendlini ebengihlala kiyo." 
Acts11:12 UMoya oCwengileko wangitjela bona ngikhambe nawo ngaphandle kokuzaza. Abazalwana abasithandathu laba bakhamba nami nje-ke soke sangena ngendlini yendoda leyo. 
Acts11:13 Yona yasitjela bona yabona njani ingilozi egade ijame endlinayo isithi, ‘Thumela umuntu eJopa ayokubiza uSimoni okuthiwa nguPitrosi." 
Acts11:14 Uzokulethela umlayezo ozakusindisa wena nomndenakho woke.’ 
Acts11:15 Kwathi ngisathoma ukukhuluma, uMoya oCwengileko wehlela phezu kwabo, njengombana wehlela phezu kwethu ekuthomeni." 
Acts11:16 Alo-ke ngakhumbula lokho iKosi eyakutjhoko nayithi, ‘UJwanisi wabhabhadisa ngamanzi, kodwana nina nizakubhajadiswa ngoMoya oCwengileko.’" 
Acts11:17 Nje-ke, nakube uZimu wabapha isipho njengombana apha thina esakholwa kuJesu Krestu; alo-ke, bengingubani mina bona bengingaliya uZimu?”" 
Acts11:18 Kwathi bona bezwe lokho, balisa ukusola, badumisa uZimu basithi: “Yeke uZimu selabaphile abatjhili ithuba lokutjhugulukela ekuphileni!”" 
Acts11:19 Labo abahlakazeka ngebanga lokuhlutjhwa okwathoma ngemva kokufa kwakaStefani, bafika ngitjho eFunisiya, eSayipurasi ne-Anthiyorhiya, barhatjha umlayezo emaJudeni kwaphela." 
Acts11:19 Labo abahlakazeka ngebanga lokuhlutjhwa okwathoma ngemva kokufa kwakaStefani, bafika ngitjho eFunisiya, eSayipurasi ne-Anthiyorhiya, barhatjha umlayezo emaJudeni kwaphela." 
Acts11:20 Kodwana phakathi kwawo bekumadoda avela eSayipurasi neSirene, wona aya e-Anthiyorhiya ayokhuluma ilizwi nemaGirigini awatjela ivangeli ngeKosi uJesu." 
Acts11:21 Amandla weKosi gade anamadoda lawo nenani elikhulu labantu lakholwa latjhugulukela eKosini. 
Acts11:22 Iindaba ngalokho zafika eendlebeni zebandla eJerusalema, yeke bathumela uBharinabhasi e-Anthiyorhiya." 
Acts11:23 Kwathi lokha nakafikako abona umusa kaZimu, wathaba kwamambala bewabakhuthaza boke bonyana bathembeke eKosini ngokudzimelela ngeenhliziyo zabo zoke." 
Acts11:24 Bekuyindoda elungileko, izele uMoya oCwengileko nokukholwa; abantu abanengi bazinikela eKosini." 
Acts11:25 Yeke uBharinabhasi waya eTarsusi ukuyokufuna uSawula. 
Acts11:26 Kwathi bona amfunyane, wamusa e-Anthiyorhiya. Nje-ke umnyaka woke bahlanganyela nebandla bafundisa abantu abanengi. Kwaba se-Anthiyorhiya lapha abafundi babizwa khona kokuthoma bona maKrestu." 
Acts11:27 Ngesikhatheso kwehla abanye babaphorofidi basuka eJerusalema baya e-Anthiyorhiya. 
Acts11:28 Omunye wabo okuthiwa ngu-Agabhusi, wasikima wathukula ngoMoya oCwengileko bona kuzakuba khona indlala ekulu kilo loke iphasi. Kwamambala yaba khona ngesikhathi sokubusa kombusi omkhulu uKlawudiyusi." 
Acts11:29 Abafundi omunye nomunye ngokukghona kwakhe waqunta ukusiza abazalwana abahlala eJudiya. 
Acts11:30 Lokho bakwenza ngokuthumela izipho zabo ebaphathini ngoBharinabhasi noSawula. 
Acts12:1 Ngesikhatheso uHerode ikosi wabamba amanye amalunga webandla kobana awahlukumeze. 
Acts12:2 Wabulala uJakopo, umnakwabo kaJwanisi, ngesabula." 
Acts12:3 Nakabona bonyana lokhu kuwakarile amaJuda, waraga wabopha noPitrosi. Lokho kwenzeka ngesikhathi somnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo." 
Acts12:4 Ngemva kokumbopha wamdlhunya ngesikhungweni, wamnikela ngaphasi kweenqhema ezine, sisinye sinamajoni amane; bekaneqhinga lokumkhuphela phambi kwabantu emva kwePhasika." 
Acts12:5 Yeke uPitrosi wagcinwa ngesikhungweni, kodwana ibandla lamthandazela ngesineke kuZimu." 
Acts12:6 Kuthe khona ngabo ubusukobo phambi kobana uHerode akhuphele uPitrosi phambi kwabantu, uPitrosi bekalele hlangana namajoni amabili, abotjhwe ngeenketani ezimbili, begodu kukhona nabalindisango ababili emsebenzini." 
Acts12:7 Khonokho kwabonakala ingilozi yeKosi bekwaba khona ukukhanya ngaphakathi kwesikhungo. Yapasula uPitrosi ehlangothini, yamvusa yathi: “Vuka! Yenza msinyana!” Khonokho iinketani zakhithika ezandleni zakaPitrosi." 
Acts12:8 Nje-ke ingilozi yathi kuye: “Thekeleza ufake amapatlagwanakho.” UPitrosi wenza njalo. Ingilozi yathi kuye godu: “Yembatha isambatho sakho ungilandele.” 
Acts12:9 UPitrosi wayilandela, baphuma ngesikhungweni. Kodwana akhange azi bona ingilozi leyo ekwenzako gade ingikho na; wadlumbana bona gade abona umbono." 
Acts12:10 Badlula esiqhemini sabalindi bokuthoma nabesesibili bebafika esangweni lesimbi elivulekela ngedorobheni. Isango lazivulekela ngokwalo, baphuma. Sebadlule indledlana yaba yinye, khonapho ingilozi yamtjhiya uPitrosi." 
Acts12:11 Yeke uPitrosi sele asangulukile wathi: “Kwanje ngiyazi bona ngambala uZimu uthumele ingilozakhe kobana ingisindise emandleni kaHerode nakizo zoke izinto amaJuda agade alindele bona zizokwenzeka.” 
Acts12:12 Sekumkhanyele lokho, waya emzini wakaMariya, unina lakaJwanisi godu okuthiwa nguMarkosi, lapha bekuhlangene khona abantu abanengi bathandaza." 
Acts12:12 Sekumkhanyele lokho, waya emzini wakaMariya, unina lakaJwanisi godu okuthiwa nguMarkosi, lapha bekuhlangene khona abantu abanengi bathandaza." 
Acts12:13 UPitrosi wakokoda emnyango wangaphandle, incekukazi uRoda weza azokuhlola bona ngubani." 
Acts12:14 Kuthe lokha nakalemukako bona lilizwi lakaPitrosi, wathaba kwamambala bewagijima wabuyela emuva angakavuli, warhuwelela wathi, “UPitrosi ujame ngaphandle emnyango!”" 
Acts12:15 Bona bathi: “Uyarhapha!” Kodwana nalokhu aphikelele bona liqiniso, bathi: “Yingilozakhe.”" 
Acts12:16 UPitrosi waphikelela akokoda. Kuthe bona bavule umnyango bambone, barareka kwamambala." 
Acts12:17 Watjengisa ngesandla bona bathule, nje-ke wabahlathululela bona iKosi imkhuphe njani ngesikhungweni, bewathi: “Tjelani uJakopo nabazalwana ngalokhu.” Wakhamba waya kenye indawo." 
Acts12:18 Ngakusasa, kwaba khona ukuphithizela hlangana namajoni afuna ukwazi bonyana kwenzekeni ngoPitrosi." 
Acts12:19 Emva kobana uHerode akhuphe umlayezo bona afunwe kodwana angafunyaneki, waphenyisisa abalindi bewayala bona babulawe. Emva kwalokho uHerode wasuka eJudiya waya eKhesariya, wahlala lapho isikhatjhana." 
Acts12:20 UHerode wasilingeka khulu ngabantu beTirosi neTsidoni; bona baya kuye basiqubutjhwana ukuyombona. Sele bazuze uBhulastusi obegade ayinceku ethembekileko yekosi bona abe ngakibo, babawa ukuthula ngombana inarha yekhabo beyifumana ukudla okuvela enarheni yekosi uHerode." 
Acts12:21 Ngelanga elibekiweko uHerode wembatha isambatho sakhe sobukhosi wahlala esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi, wethula ikulumo ebantwini." 
Acts12:22 Barhuwelela bathi: “Akusimumuntu okhulumako, kodwana nguzimu!”" 
Acts12:23 Msinyazana ngebanga lokobana uHerode angakhange adumise uZimu, ingilozi kaSomnini yamdula phasi, bewadliwa ziimpethu, wafa." 
Acts12:24 Kodwana ilizwi lakaZimu laragela phambi ngokwanda nokwenaba. 
Acts12:25 UBharinabhasi noSawula baqeda ikhambo labo, babuyela eJerusalema, bathatha noJwanisi okuthiwa nguMarkosi." 
Acts12:25 UBharinabhasi noSawula baqeda ikhambo labo, babuyela eJerusalema, bathatha noJwanisi okuthiwa nguMarkosi." 
Acts13:1 Ebandleni elise-Anthiyorhiya bekukhona abaphorofidi nabafundisi okutjho uBharinabhasi, uSimiyoni okuthiwa nguNigeri, uLukiyusi weSirene, uManayeni, owakhula noHerode umtetrarerhesi noSawula." 
Acts13:2 Kuthe basadumisa iKosi bazilile, uMoya oCwengileko wathi: “Ngahlukaniselani uBharinabhasi banoSawula kobana baye emsebenzini engibabizele wona.”" 
Acts13:3 Emva kobana bazile ukudla bathandaza, bababeka izandla." 
Acts13:4 UBharinabhasi noSawula, bathunywa nguMoya oCwengileko baya eSelukiya, bathaya kusuka lapho basiya eSayipurasi." 
Acts13:5 Kuthe bona bafike eSalamisi, batjhumayela ilizwi lakaZimu ngesinagogini lamaJuda. UJwanisi bekanabo azobasiza." 
Acts13:6 Bakhamba badabula soke isihlengele bebafika ePhafosi. Lapha-ke bahlangana nomJuda ongusomlingo nomphorofidi wamanga okuthiwa nguBhari-Jesu. 
Acts13:7 Yena bekazihlanganise nombusi wesihlengeleni, uSerigiyusi Powula, obekayindoda ehlakaniphileko. Umbusi loyo wabiza uBharinabhasi noSawula ngombana bekafuna ukuzwa ilizwi lakaZimu." 
Acts13:8 Kodwana u-Elimasi, ibizo lakhe ngesiGirigi elitjho bona ngusomlingo, walinga ukuphambukisa umbusi ekukholweni." 
Acts13:9 Yeke uSawula ogade aziwa bona nguPowula, azele uMoya oCwengileko; waqala usomlingo eenhlonzeni wathi:" 
Acts13:10 “Wena ndodana kaSathana! Usisitha sayo yoke into elungileko. Uzele yoke imihlobo yamano amambi, ulinga njalo ukuphendula iqiniso leKosi ulenze amanga!" 
Acts13:11 Isandla sakaZimu sizokwehlela phezu kwakho khona nje; uzakuba siphofu, awuzukubona umkhanyo welanga isikhathi esithileko.” Khonokho wembeswa yikungu nobumnyama, wakhamba aphumbutha afuna umuntu ongamdosa ngesandla." 
Acts13:12 Kuthe lokha umbusi nakabona okwenzekileko wakholwa begodu bekararwe ngilokho akufunde ngeKosi. 
Acts13:13 UPowula nabalandeli bakhe bathaya kusukela ePhafosi ukuya ePherge ngePhamfiliya, lapha uJwanisi Markosi abatjhiya khona wabuyela emva eJerusalema." 
Acts13:13 UPowula nabalandeli bakhe bathaya kusukela ePhafosi ukuya ePherge ngePhamfiliya, lapha uJwanisi Markosi abatjhiya khona wabuyela emva eJerusalema." 
Acts13:14 Kusukela ePherge bakhamba bafika e-Anthiyorhiya esePhisidiya. NgeSabatha baya ngesinagogini bahlala phasi. 
Acts13:15 Emva kokufunda umthetho kaMosi nemitlolo yabaphorofidi, abaphathi besinagogi baphosa ilizwi ngakibo bathi: “Bafowethu, nakube kukhona umlayezo wokukhuthaza ebantwini, sibawa nikhulume.”" 
Acts13:16 UPowula wasikima waphakamisa isandla wathi: “Ma-Israyeli nani bakosozizwe enesabe uZimu, ngilalelani!" 
Acts13:17 UZimu wabantu bakwa-Israyeli laba wakhetha abokhokho bethu, bewabenza isizwe esikhulu ngesikhathi basahlezi njengeenkhonzi eGibhide. Nje-ke wabakhupha enarheni leyo ngamandla amakhulu." 
Acts13:18 Wababekezelela baserhalawumbeni iminyaka ematjhumi amane. 
Acts13:19 Warhayila izizwe ezilikhomba enarheni yeKanana, wanikela inarha leyo abantu bakhe bona ibe lilifa labo." 
Acts13:20 Koke lokho kwathatha pheze iminyaka emakhulu amane namatjhumi amahlanu. “Emva kwalokho wabanikela abagwebi kufikela ngesikhathi somphorofidi uSamyela. 
Acts13:21 Nje-ke abantu babawa ikosi, uZimu wabanikela uSawula umsa kaKhitjhi, wekoro yakwaBhenjamini, owabusa iminyaka ematjhumi amane." 
Acts13:22 “Emva kokususa uSawula, uZimu wabeka uDavida bona abe yikosabo bewafakaza ngaye wathi, ‘Ngifunyene uDavida indodana kaJese, umuntu wehliziywami, uzakwenza koke engifuna bona akwenze.’" 
Acts13:23 Esizukulwaneni sakhe uZimu wavusela u-Israyeli uMsindisi uJesu njengombana athembisa. 
Acts13:24 “Kodwana ngaphambi kokuza kwakaJesu, uJwanisi watjhumayela ukuphenduka nombhabhadiso kibo boke bakwa-Israyeli." 
Acts13:25 Ekuphetheni kwakhe umsebenzi, uJwanisi wathi ebantwini: ‘Nicabanga bona ngingubani na? Angisinguye enimlindileko. Kodwana qalani, uyeza ngemva kwami, loyo engingakafaneli ukutjhaphulula amapatlagwanakhe.’" 
Acts13:26 “Nje-ke bafowethu, nzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu nani enesaba uZimu, umlayezo wesindiso lo uthunyelwe kithi." 
Acts13:27 Abantu beJerusalema nabarholi babo akhange bamazi uJesu; nje-ke ngokumlahla bazalisa amezwi wabaphorofidi afundwa njalo ngeSabatha. 
Acts13:28 Nanyana bangazange bafunyane isizathu sokumgwebela ukufa, babawa uPilatu bona abulawe." 
Acts13:29 “Sele benze koke ebekutlolwe ngaye, bamphanyula esiphambanweni bambulunga ngelibeni." 
Acts13:30 Kodwana uZimu wamvusa kabafileko. 
Acts13:31 Amalanga amanengi wabonwa ngilabo agade akhamba nabo kusukela eGalile ukuya eJerusalema. Labo-ke ngibo esele babe bofakazi ebantwini bekhethu. 
Acts13:32 “Thina sinitjela ivangeli: Lokho uZimu akuthembisa abokhokho bethu," 
Acts13:33 ukuzalisile kithi, thina nzukulwana zabo ngokuvusa uJesu, njengombana kutloliwe eRhubeni lesibili bona, “ ‘Wena uyiNdodanami; namhlanje ngiyakuvuselela.’" 
Acts13:34 “Indaba yokuthi wamvusa kabafileko kobana angabuyi abole, kukhulunywe emezwini la, ‘Ngizaninikela iimbusiso ezicwengileko zamambala engazithembisa uDavida.’" 
Acts13:35 “Njengombana asitjho kenye indimana asithi, ‘Angekhe uvumele othembekileko wakho abone ithuna.’" 
Acts13:36 “Emva kokobana uDavida aqede ukukhonza esizukulwaneni sakhe ngokwehloso kaZimu, walala; wabulungwa kiboyisemkhulu, wabola." 
Acts13:37 Kodwana loyo uZimu amvusa kabafileko akhange abone ukubola. 
Acts13:38 “Ngalokho bafowethu, ngithanda nazi bona kungebanga lakaJesu ukuthethelelwa kwezono kumenyezelwa kini." 
Acts13:39 Ngaye woke okholwako ulungisiswa kikho koke egade ningekhe nalungisiswa ngakho ngomthetho kaMosi. 
Acts13:40 Nje-ke yelelani, bona lokho abaphorofidi abakutjhwileko kungenzeki kini." 
Acts13:41 Bathi, “ ‘Qalani nina nyefuli ndina, nizitjhejisise nikakamale benikhungatheke ngombana kunento engizayenza emihleni yenu; eningazukuyikholwa nanyana sele niyitjelwa.’”" 
Acts13:42 Kuthe uPowula noBharinabhasi basaphuma ngesinagogini, abantu babawa bona baragele phambili ngeendabezi ngeSabatha elilandelako." 
Acts13:43 Nje-ke kwathi bona ikonzo iphume, amaJuda amanengi nalabo abesaba uZimu abatjhugulukele ebuJudeni balandela uPowula noBharinabhasi. Labo-ke bakhuthazwa ngokuragela phambili emseni kaZimu." 
Acts13:43 Nje-ke kwathi bona ikonzo iphume, amaJuda amanengi nalabo abesaba uZimu abatjhugulukele ebuJudeni balandela uPowula noBharinabhasi. Labo-ke bakhuthazwa ngokuragela phambili emseni kaZimu." 
Acts13:44 NgeSabatha elilandelako, pheze woke umuntu edorobheni weza ukuzokulalela ilizwi leKosi." 
Acts13:45 Kwathi bona amaJuda abone isiqubuthu esikhulu azala umona abe anyefula lokho uPowula agade akutjhoko. 
Acts13:46 Nje-ke uPowula noBharinabhasi bawaphendula ngesibindi bathi: “Bekufanele bona ilizwi lakaZimu litjhunyayelwe kini qangi. Kodwana njengombana nililahlile benazibona ningakafaneli ipilo engapheliko, yelelani, sesiphendukela kabatjhili" 
Acts13:47 ngombana nakhu uSomnini asiyale ngakho, “ ‘Ngikubeka bona ube mkhanyo ezizweni ukuze ulethe isindiso emikhawulweni yephasi.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Kuthe abatjhili bona bezwe lokhu, bathaba tle, badumisa ilizwi leKosi. Boke labo abakhethe ukuphila okungapheliko baba makholwa." 
Acts13:49 Ilizwi leKosi lenaba kizo zoke iimfunda. 
Acts13:50 Kodwana amaJuda atjitjizela abafazi abesaba uZimu nabanesithunzi kanye namadoda aziinkhulu edorobheni kobana badunge uPowula noBharinabhasi, babaqotjhe esifundeni sabo." 
Acts13:51 Nje-ke bona babahloboka abantu balapho bathintitha iinyawo zabo, bakhamba baya e-Ikhoniyo." 
Acts13:52 Abafundi nge-Anthiyorhiya bebazele uMoya oCwengileko, bathabile." 
Acts14:1 E-Ikhoniyo, uPowula noBharinabhasi baya ngesinagogini lamaJuda njengokuvamileko. Lapho bakhuluma kangangobana inani elikhulu lamaJuda nabatjhili lakholwa." 
Acts14:2 Kodwana amaJuda lawo agade ala ukukholwa ahlohlozela abatjhili abenza babe nehliziyo embi ebazalwaneni. 
Acts14:3 Nokho uPowula noBharinabhasi bahlala lapho isikhathi eside, bakhuluma ngesibindi ngeKosi, eyafakazela ilizwi lomusa wayo ngokubanikela amandla wokwenza iimbonakaliso neemangaliso." 
Acts14:4 Abantu bedorobho lelo bebahlukene kabili; abanye banyula amaJuda, abanye banyula abapostoli." 
Acts14:5 Kwathi lokha abatjhili, amaJuda kanye nabarholi bakhona nabasongela ukubalimaza nokubakhanda ngamatje," 
Acts14:6 bakulemuka lokho, yeke babalekela emadorobheni weLikhawoniya okuyiListra neDerbe neendaweni eziseduze." 
Acts14:7 Lapho baragela phambili nokutjhumayela ivangeli. 
Acts14:8 Bekukhona indoda ehlala eListra iinyawo zayo bezirholophele, isirhole kwekubelethweni kwayo ingazange ikhe ikhambe." 
Acts14:9 Yona beyisoloko ilalele uPowula nakakhulumako. Nje-ke uPowula wayiqala poro, wayibona bona iyakholwa bonyana ingaphuluka." 
Acts14:10 Wathi ngelizwi elikhulu: “Sikima, ujame thwi ngeenyawo zakho!” Indoda yeqa, yathoma ukukhambakhamba." 
Acts14:11 Kwathi bona isiqubuthu sibone bonyana uPowula wenzeni, sathoma ukurhuwelela ngelimi lesiLikhawoniya sathi: “Abozimu bafane nabantu behlela kithi!”" 
Acts14:12 Bathiya uBharinabhasi ibizo bona nguZewusi uPowula bathi nguHerimesi ngombana nguye ogade asikhulumi. 
Acts14:13 Umphristi kasingazimu uZewusi, ogade anethempeli ngaphandle kwedorobho, waletha iinkunzi namakhwa esangweni ledorobho. Yena nesiqubuthu bebafuna ukwenzela abapostoli imihlabelo." 
Acts14:14 Kodwana kuthe bona abapostoli, uBharinabhasi noPowula, bezwe ngalokho, badabula izambatho zabo bagijimela hlangana nesiqubuthu barhuwelela," 
Acts14:15 bathi: “Madoda! Nikwenzelani lokhu na? Nathi sibabantu njengani nje! Silapha ukuzokutjhumayela ivangeli, ukunitjhugulula ezintwenezi ezililize, nitjhugulukele kuZimu ophilako, owadala izulu nephasi nelwandle nakho koke okukilo." 
Acts14:16 Esikhathini esadlulako wavumela zoke izizwe bona zikhambe ngeendlela zazo. 
Acts14:17 Kodwana akhange aliselele bona kungabi nobufakazi ngezinto ezihle azenzako: Waninisela izulu elivela ezulwini wanipha nesikhathi esinomnotho somnyaka nenala yokudla bewazalisa iinhliziyo zenu ngokwenama.” 
Acts14:18 Ngitjho nangawo amezwi la abapostoli babhalelwa ukusola isiqubuthu bona singabenzeli umhlabelo. 
Acts14:19 Nje-ke kuthe amanye amaJuda avela e-Anthiyorhiya ne-Ikhoniyo nasele athumbele isiqubuthu esikhulu ngakiwo, akhanda uPowula ngamatje, amrhurhubisela ngaphandle kwedorobho, adlumbana bona ufile." 
Acts14:20 Kodwana kuthe bona abafundi bamzombe, wavuka wabuyela emva edorobheni. Ngelanga elilandelako yena noBharinabhasi baya eDerbe." 
Acts14:21 UPowula noBharinabhasi batjhumayela ivangeli ngeDerbe, bazuza abafundi abanengi. Nje-ke babuyela eListra, e-Ikhoniyo ne-Anthiyorhiya," 
Acts14:22 baqinisa bebakhuthaza abafundi bona baragele phambili ngokukholwa, bathi: “Kufuze sidlule ebunzimeni obunengi ngaphambi kobana singene embusweni kaZimu.”" 
Acts14:23 Kelinye nelinye ibandla bazikhethela abaphathi; ngomthandazo nokuzila babanikela kuZimu, ogade babeke ithemba labo kuye." 
Acts14:24 Sele badabule iPhisidiya, bafika ePhamfiliya;" 
Acts14:25 kwathi sele batjhumayele ilizwi ePherge, behlela e-Athaliya." 
Acts14:26 Ukusuka lapho bathayela emuva e-Anthiyorhiya, lapha bebanikelwe khona emseni kaZimu ngomsebenzi esebawuqedileko." 
Acts14:27 Nabafika e-Anthiyorhiya, babuthelela ibandla ndawonye balibikela koke uZimu akwenzileko ngabo, nokuthi wavula njani indlela bona abatjhili bakholwe." 
Acts14:28 Bahlala lapho isikhathi eside nabafundi. 
Acts15:1 Kwehla abathileko bavela eJudiya, bafundisa abazalwana, bathi: “Ngaphandle kobana nisokwe njengombana umthetho kaMosi usitjho, angekhe nasindiswa.”" 
Acts15:2 Kwaba khona ukuphambana nokuphikisana phakathi kwabo noPowula banoBharinabhasi. Nje-ke kwaquntwa bona uPowula noBharinabhasi nabanye abafundi baye eJerusalema bayokubonana nabapostoli nabaphathi ngendaba le. 
Acts15:3 Ibandla labathumela bona bakhambe, nje-ke basadabula iFunisiya neSamariya, babika bona abatjhili batjhugulukele njani kuZimu. Iindabezi zaletha ithabo elikhulu ebazalwaneni boke." 
Acts15:4 Kuthe bona bafike eJerusalema, bamukelwa libandla, abapostoli nabaphathi. Bababikela koke uZimu akwenzileko ngabo." 
Acts15:5 Kodwana amanye amakholwa ebegade asesiqhemeni sabaFarisi, asikima athi: “Abatjhili kufanele basokwe bebatjelwe bona bahloniphe umthetho kaMosi.”" 
Acts15:6 Abapostoli nabaphathi bahlangana ukuhlolisisa indaba le. 
Acts15:7 Emva kokuphikisana isikhathi eside, uPitrosi wasikima wathi: “Bafowethu, niyazi kusukela kade bona uZimu wangikhetha hlangana nani ukutjhumayela umlayezo wevangeli kabatjhili ngomlomami, khona bazakuzwa bebakholwe." 
Acts15:8 UZimu owazi ihliziyo, wabonisa bona nabo uyabamukela ngokubanikela uMoya oCwengileko njengombana enza kithi." 
Acts15:9 Akhange akhe enze umehluko hlangana nathi nabo, wahlambulula iinhliziyo zabo ngokukholwa." 
Acts15:10 Alo-ke kungani nifuna ukulinga uZimu ngokuthwesa abafundi umthwalo esingakghoni ukuwuthwala thina namkha abokhokho bethu na? 
Acts15:11 Nje-ke thina siyakholwa bona kungomusa weKosethu uJesu kobana sisindiswe; nabo ngokunjalo.” 
Acts15:12 Isiqubuthu soke sathula du salalela uBharinabhasi noPowula ebebasibikela ngeembonakaliso nangeemangaliso uZimu azenzileko ngabo hlangana nabatjhili. 
Acts15:13 Kuthe bona baqede ukukhuluma, uJakopo wathi; “Bafowethu, ngilalelani!" 
Acts15:14 USimoni usihlathululele bona ekuthomeni uZimu bekanetjisakalo kangangani ngokuthatha kabatjhili isizwe esibizwa ngebizo lakhe. 
Acts15:15 Amezwi wabaphorofidi avumelana poro nalokhu, njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa," 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Mhlokho ngizakuvuselela itende lakaDavida eliwileko. Ngilungise iindawo zalo ezonakeleko, ngibuyisele isithunzi salo, ngilakhe libe njengombana gade linjalo phambilini" 
Acts15:17 ukuze imisalela yabantu ifune uSomnini ngitjho nabo boke abatjhili ababizwa ngebizo lami. Kutjho uSomnini, owenza izintwezi" 
Acts15:18 ebezazeka ekadeni.’ 
Acts15:19 “Ngalokho kumkhumbulwami bona singabakhathazi abatjhili abatjhugulukela kuZimu. 
Acts15:20 Endaweni yalokhu, asibatloleleni incwadi sibatjele bona batjhide emanyaleni weenthombe, batjhide ebungwadleni, bangadli isilwana esikghanyiweko kanye nobubende" 
Acts15:21 ngombana eenkhathini zaphambilini umthetho kaMosi utjhunyayelwe kiwo woke amadorobho begodu bewafundwa ngemasinagogini woke amaSabatha.” 
Acts15:22 Yeke abapostoli nabaphathi kanye nebandla loke, baqunta ukukhetha amadoda athileko, bawathume e-Anthiyorhiya noPowula noBharinabhasi. Bakhetha uJudasi, okuthiwa nguBharisabhasi noSilasi okumadoda amabili agade abarholi hlangana nabazalwana." 
Acts15:23 Bathumela ngabo incwadi elandelako ethi: Abapostoli, abaphathi nabafowenu, kabakholwako abatjhili abahlala e-Anthiyorhiya, eSiriya neSilisiya. Siyabingelela." 
Acts15:24 Sizwile bona amanye amadoda wangekhethu asuka lapha ngaphandle kokulayelwa ngithi afese aniwurubaja abe ahlukumeza umkhumbulwenu ngamezwi. 
Acts15:25 Yeke sizwene soke bonyana sikhethe iinthunywa sizithumele kini kanye nabangani bethu esibathandako, uBharinabhasi noPowula," 
Acts15:26 amadoda adele ubuphilo bawo ngebanga lebizo leKosethu uJesu Krestu. 
Acts15:27 Yeke, sithumela uJudasi noSilasi, abazakufakaza esikutlolileko ngomlomo." 
Acts15:28 Nje-ke kubonakele kukuhle kuMoya oCwengileko nakithi kobana singanidisibezi ngalitho ngaphandle kwalokhu okufaneleko, kokuthi:" 
Acts15:29 Tjhidani ekudleni okuhlatjelwe iinthombe, ekudleni ububende nokukghanyiweko, nitjhide nebungwadleni. Naningenzi izintwenzi, nizabe nenza kuhle. Salani kuhle." 
Acts15:30 Sebalayelisiwe, bakhamba, behlela e-Anthiyorhiya lapha babuthelela ndawonye ibandla balinikela incwadi." 
Acts15:31 Mbala abantu bayifunda incwadi, bathokoza ngomlayezo okhuthazako." 
Acts15:32 UJudasi noSilasi nabo egade babaphorofidi, bakhuluma okunengi okukhuthazako nokuqinisa abazalwana." 
Acts15:33 Emva kokuhlala isikhatjhana lapho, abazalwana babaphekelela ngesibusiso sokuthula. Nje-ke babuyela kilabo egade babathumile." 
Acts15:34 Kodwana uSilasi wacabanga ukuhlala lapho. 
Acts15:35 UPowula noBharinabhasi basala e-Anthiyorhiya, bafundisa batjhumayela ilizwi leKosi bakanye nabanye abanengi." 
Acts15:36 Ngemva kwamalanga athileko uPowula wathi kuBharinabhasi: “Asibuyele emuva sithekele abazalwana kiyo yoke imizi lapha sakhe satjhumayela khona ilizwi leKosi, besibone nokuthi baraga njani.”" 
Acts15:37 UBharinabhasi bekafuna kukhanjwe noJwanisi okuthiwa nguMarkosi," 
Acts15:37 UBharinabhasi bekafuna kukhanjwe noJwanisi okuthiwa nguMarkosi," 
Acts15:38 kodwana uPowula wabona kungasikuhle bona bakhambe naye ngombana wabahlubuka basePhamfiliya, wangasaragela phambili nokusebenza nabo." 
Acts15:39 Kwavuka ukuphikisana phakathi kwabo, bebahlukana. UBharinabhasi wathatha uMarkosi bathaya baya eSayipurasi," 
Acts15:39 Kwavuka ukuphikisana phakathi kwabo, bebahlukana. UBharinabhasi wathatha uMarkosi bathaya baya eSayipurasi," 
Acts15:40 kodwana uPowula sele anikelwe bazalwana emseni weKosi, wakhetha uSilasi wakhamba." 
Acts15:41 Wadlula eSiriya neSilisiya, aqinisa amabandla." 
Acts16:1 UPowula wafika eDerbe neListra, lapha bekuhlala khona umfundi ekuthiwa nguThimothi; unina amJuda okholiweko, kodwana uyise amGirigi." 
Acts16:2 Abazalwana beListra ne-Ikhoniyo bebambuka. 
Acts16:3 UPowula bekafuna ukuthatha uThimothi akhambe naye, yeke wamsokisa ngebanga lamaJuda ahlala endaweni leyo ngombana boke bebasazi bona uyise liGirigi." 
Acts16:4 Lokha nabalokhu bakhamba umuzi nomuzi bebanande bakhuluma bona kufuze kulondwe iimphetho ezathathwa bapostoli nabaphathi eJerusalema. 
Acts16:5 Yeke amabandla aqiniswa ekukholweni akhula malanga woke. 
Acts16:6 UPowula noThimothi badabula isifunda seFrigiya neGalatiya, ngombana uMoya oCwengileko wabakhandela ukutjhumayela e-Asiya." 
Acts16:7 Kuthe bona bafike emkhawulweni weMusiya, balinga ukuya endaweni yeBhithiniya, kodwana nalapho uMoya wakaJesu akhange abavumele." 
Acts16:8 Alo-ke bakhamba badabula eMusiya behlela eTrowasi. 
Acts16:9 Phakathi kobusuku uPowula waba nombono wendoda yeMasedoniya egade ijamile imncenga ithi: “Akhese uze eMasedoniya hle, uzosisiza!”" 
Acts16:10 Kuthe bona uPowula abone umbono lo, sazilungiselela msinyana ukuya eMasedoniya, sikholwa bona uZimu usibizele ukuyokutjhumayela ivangeli kibo." 
Acts16:11 Sasuka eTrowasi ngomkhumbi sathayela poro eSamothirake, ngelanga elilandelako saya eNeyapoli." 
Acts16:12 Kusuka lapho saya eFilipi okulidorobho eliqakathekileko esifundeneso seMasedoniya eliphasi kombuso weRoma. Sahlala amalangana edorobheneli. 
Acts16:13 Ngelanga leSabatha saphumela ngaphandle kwesango ledorobho saya ngemlanjeni, lapha besilindele ukufunyana khona indawo yokuthandaza. Sahlala phasi sakhuluma nabafazi egade bahlangene lapho." 
Acts16:14 Omunye wabagade balalele bekungumma obizwa bona nguLidiya, amthengisi wezambatho ezibubende edorobheni leThiyathira. Gade alotjha uZimu; nje uZimu wavula ihliziywakhe bona ilalelisise lokho uPowula akutjhoko." 
Acts16:15 Kuthe bona yena nomndenakhe babhajadiswe, wasimemela endlinakhe wathi: “Naningithatha njengomuntu okholwa yiKosi, yizani nizokuhlala kwami.” Yeke wasitomatomela bona sihlale." 
Acts16:16 Langelinye nasiya endaweni yokuthandaza, sahlangatjezwa likhobokakazi ebelinommoya wobungoma. Belenzela abaninilo imali enengi ngokubhula kwalo." 
Acts16:17 Lalandela uPowula nathi, lirhuwelela lithi: “Amadoda la aziinsebenzi zakaZimu ongoPhezulu; banibikela indlela yokusindiswa!”" 
Acts16:18 Lakwenza lokhu amalanga amanengi, kufikela lapho uPowula wabe wanyenya khona waphendukela kilo, wathi emmoyeni: “Ebizweni lakaJesu Krestu ngiyakuyala bona uphume kuye!” Khonokho ummoya wobungoma waphuma kuye." 
Acts16:19 Kuthe bona abaninilo babone bona ithuba lokwenza imali ngalo alisekho, babamba uPowula noSilasi babadosela etatawini kobana baqalane nabomthetho." 
Acts16:20 Babaletha phambi kwabagwebi bathi: “Amadoda la amaJuda, begodu abanga ihlangahlangano edorobheni lekhethu" 
Acts16:21 ngokufundisa amasiko aphikisana nomthetho wethu thina esimaRoma bona siyamukele besiyenze.” 
Acts16:22 Isiqubuthu saba semdibini wokusahlela uPowula noSilasi; abagwebi bayala bona bahlutjuliswe bebarithwe. 
Acts16:23 Ngemva kokudulwa kabuhlungu badlhunywa ngesikhungweni, kwathiwa umphathisikhungo ababeke ilihlo elibukhali." 
Acts16:24 Ngemva kokwamukela umyalo lo, umphathisikhungo wabadlhunya ngesikhungweni esingaphakathi, wabopha iinyawo zabo hlangana neengaqa ezibudisi zeengodo." 
Acts16:25 Phakathi kobusuku uPowula noSilasi bebathandaza bavuma iingoma badumisa uZimu, ezinye iimbotjhwa zibalalele." 
Acts16:26 Khonokho kwaba khona ukusikinyeka okukhulu kwephasi kangangobana kwadengezela iinsekelo zesikhungo. Khonapho zoke iimvalo zesikhungo zavuleka, iimbopho zatjhaphuluka kizo zoke iimbotjhwa." 
Acts16:27 Umphathisikhungo wavuka, kwathi bona abone iimvalo zesikhungo zivulekile, warhwatjha isabulakhe wafuna ukuzibulala ngombana wadlumbana bona zoke iimbotjhwa zibalekile." 
Acts16:28 Kodwana uPowula warhuwelela wathi: “Ungazikhubazi ngombana soke sisesekhona.” 
Acts16:29 Umphathisikhungo wathi akukhanyiswe, wangena agijima waguqa phambi kweenyawo zakaPowula noSilasi aqhaqhazela." 
Acts16:30 Nje-ke waya nabo ngaphandle wababuza wathi: “Banimzana, kufuze ngenzeni ukuze ngisindiswe na?”" 
Acts16:31 Baphendula bathi: “Kholwa eKosini uJesu, nje-ke uzakusindiswa wena nomndenakho.”" 
Acts16:32 Yeke batjhumayela ilizwi leKosi kuye nakibo boke ebebasendlinakhe. 
Acts16:33 Ngalo i-awara lobusukwelo umphathisikhungo wabathatha wabahlambisa amanceba; nje-ke kwathi khonokho yena nawo woke umndenakhe babhajadiswa. 
Acts16:34 Sekabangenise ngendlinakhe, wabapha ukudla. Yena nomndenakhe bebanethabo ngombana gade sebakholwe kuZimu." 
Acts16:35 Ngelanga elilandelako ngamasa abagwebi bathumela amapholisa kumphathisikhungo nomyalo othi: “Thukululani amadoda lawo.” 
Acts16:36 Yeke umphathisikhungo watjela uPowula wathi: “Iinkhulu zinithumele umlayezo bona sinithukulule. Yeke phumani nikhambe ngokuthula.” 
Acts16:37 Kodwana uPowula wathi emapholiseni: “Basibetha phambi kwabantu ngaphandle kokusigweba, basidlhunya ngesikhungweni, thina esizizakhamuzi zombuso weRoma. Manjesi bafuna ukusibuyisela emva ngasese na? Awa! Iinkhulu azize ngokwazo kobana zizosikhupha.”" 
Acts16:38 Amapholisa athula amezwi la eenkhulwini. Kwathi bona zizwe bonyana uPowula noSilasi bebazizakhamuzi zombuso weRoma, zesaba." 
Acts16:39 Zeza kibo zazokuncancabeza. Zabakhupha ngesikhungweni, zababawa bona bakhambe edorobheni." 
Acts16:40 Emva kobana uPowula noSilasi baphume ngesikhungweni, baya endlini kaLidiya, lapha bahlangana khona nabazalwana. Kuthe sebabakhuthazile, bakhamba." 
Acts17:1 Kuthe uPowula noSilasi sebadabule e-Amfipolisi ne-Apoloniya, bafika eThesalonika, lapha bekukhona isinagogi lamaJuda." 
Acts17:2 Njengesiqhelo sakhe, uPowula wangena ngesinagogini waphikisana nawo ngemitlolo ecwengileko amaSabatha amathathu ngokulandelana;" 
Acts17:3 ahlathulula awabonisa kiyo bona uKrestu bekufanele afe abuye avuke godu kabafileko, asithi: “UJesu lo engikhuluma ngaye kini, kazi nguKrestu.”" 
Acts17:4 Amanye amaJuda akholwa abe alandela uPowula noSilasi. Senza njalo nesiqubuthu esikhulu samaGirigi ebegade esaba uZimu kanye nabafazi abanesithunzi abangasibancani ngesibalo. 
Acts17:5 Kodwana amaJuda aba nomona, abuthelela etatawini isiqhema sabolova abumba isitlamu kobana avuse umguruguru edorobheni. Isitlameso sasahlela indlu kaJasoni, sazumana noPowula noSilasi kobana sibakhuphele phambi kwewoma labantu." 
Acts17:6 Kuthe amaJuda nakangabafumaniko, adosela uJasoni nabanye abazalwana phambi kweenkhulu zedorobho, arhuwelela athi: “Amadoda la enze umonakalo iphaseli loke nje, njesi sele afike nalapha." 
Acts17:7 UJasoni ubamukele endlinakhe. Boke baphula imithetho yombusi omkhulu, ngokuthi batjho kukhona enye ikosi, ibizo layo nguJesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Ngokuzwa lokho isitlamu neenkhulu zedorobho zavungama. 
Acts17:9 Ngemva kobana iinkhulu zithethe imali yehlawulo kuJasoni nakabanye zabalisa bakhamba. 
Acts17:10 Kuthe bona kurhwaqele, abazalwana bathumela uPowula noSilasi eBheriya. Ekufikeni kwabo lapho baya ngesinagogini lamaJuda." 
Acts17:11 Abantu balapho bebakhanyelwe khulu kunabantu beThesalonika; nje-ke bamukela ilizwi ngokuzimisela okukhulu begodu bahlolisisa imitlolo malanga woke kobana zinjalo izintwezo na. 
Acts17:12 Inengi lamaJuda lakholwa; ukufaka phakathi abafazi bamaGirigi abanesithunzi namadoda amanengi wamaGirigi. 
Acts17:13 Kuthe lokha amaJuda weThesalonika nakezwa bona uPowula utjhumayela ilizwi lakaZimu eBheriya, nawo eza lapho kobana azokunyakazisa abe aphehle isiqubuthu." 
Acts17:14 Khonokho abazalwana bathumela uPowula eligwini lelwandle kodwana uSilasi noThimothi basala. 
Acts17:15 Amadoda abekakhamba noPowula amphekelela amfikisa e-Athene; abuyela emuva nomlayezo othi uSilasi noThimothi kufuze bamlandele msinyazana. 
Acts17:16 Kwathi uPowula, asabalindele e-Athene, wadana kwamambala ukubona idorobho lizele iinthombe zabosingazimu." 
Acts17:17 Yeke waphikisana namaJuda namaGirigi esaba uZimu ngesinagogini. Wenza njalo woke amalanga nebantwini ebebafunyaneka ematatawini. 
Acts17:18 Godu nezinye izazi zama-Ephikuru namaSitoyika zaphikisana naye. Abanye bathi: “Ongazizwako lo uzama ukuthini na?” Abanye baphawula bathi: “Kwangathi utjhumayela abosingazimu abatjhili.” Lokhu bakutjho ngombana bekatjhumayela ivangeli ngoJesu nokuvuka kwabafileko. 
Acts17:19 Nje-ke bamthatha bamusa phambi kwehlangano ye-Areyophagusi bathi: “Ungakhese usihlathululele bona iyini ifundiso etja oyikhulumako le? 
Acts17:20 Izinto ozikhulumakwezi, ziyasirara thina; yeke besithanda ukuzazi bona zitjho ukuthini.”" 
Acts17:21 (Woke ama-Athene nabaqhamuki abahlala lapho bebangazilibazisi ngalitho ngaphandle kokukhuluma nokuzwa izinto ezitja.) 
Acts17:22 Nje-ke uPowula wasikima phambi kwehlangano ye-Areyophagusi wathi: “Madoda we-Athene, ngiyabona bonyana nikholwe khulu ngazo zoke iindlela." 
Acts17:23 Kuthe nangikhambakhambako ngiqala eendaweni lapha nithandazela khona, ngifumene kujame i-aldari litlolwe lathi, ‘NgelakaZimu ongaziwako.’ Nje-ke lokho enikukhonza ningakwazi, ngikho engikutjhumayelako kini." 
Acts17:24 UZimu obumbe iphasi nakho koke okukilo, oyiKosi yezulu nephasi, akahlali ngemathempelini akhiwe babantu." 
Acts17:25 Begodu akakhonzwa ngezandla zabantu inga udinga ilitho ngombana nguye opha koke okuphilako ipilo, umphefumulo nezinto zoke." 
Acts17:26 Ngomuntu oyedwa wadala zoke izizwe kobana zihlale ebusweni balo loke iphasi. Wazibeka iinkhathi zokuphila kwazo waziquntela nemikhawulo lapha zizakuhlala khona. 
Acts17:27 Wakwenza lokho ukuze zimfune, mhlamunye zingamfunyana lokha nazimfunako, nanyana angasikude ngitjho nakubani wethu." 
Acts17:28 Ngaye siyaphila, siyakhambakhamba begodu sikhona, njengombana abanye beembongi zenu batjhwile bona, “ ‘Nathi siziinzukulwana zakhe.’" 
Acts17:29 “Yeke, njengombana siziinzukulwana zakaZimu, asikafaneli sidlumbane bonyana ubuZimu bufana negolide namkha isiliva nanyana ilitje eliqandulwe ngobuhlakani nelwazi lomuntu obhubhako." 
Acts17:30 Ngalokho uZimu wathalalisa iinkhathi zokungazi, kodwana kwanjesi uyayala bonyana kuphi nakuphi abantu boke baphenduke" 
Acts17:31 ngombana sele abeke ilanga azokugweba ngalo iphasi ngokulunga ngaloyo amkhethileko. Ngalokho ukukhombisile ngokwenza isiqiniseko sokumvusa kabafileko.” 
Acts17:32 Kuthe nabezwa ngokuvuka kwabafileko, abanye bamtshima, kodwana abanye bathi: “Sizakubuya sikulalele godu ngalokho.”" 
Acts17:33 Yeke uPowula wabasukela, wakhamba." 
Acts17:34 Kodwana abanye babo bamnamathela babamakholwa, sekubalwa nomAreyophagusi uDiyonisiyosi nomfazi okuthiwa nguDamarisi nabanye kanye nabo." 
Acts18:1 Ngemva kwalokho uPowula wasuka e-Athene waya eKorinte. 
Acts18:2 Lapho wafunyana umJuda ekuthiwa ngu-Akhwila obelethwa ePontusi, ogade aqeda ukubuya eTariyana nomkakhe uPrisila ngombana umbusi uKlawudiyusi bekayale woke amaJuda bona asuke eRoma. UPowula waya kibo." 
Acts18:3 Ngebanga lomsebenzakhe ofana nowabo, wahlala wasebenza nabo ngombana gade basenza ukuthunga amatende." 
Acts18:4 Njalo ngeSabatha bekaphikisana namaJuda namaGirigi ngesinagogini, alinga ukuwazuza." 
Acts18:5 Kuthe bona kufike uSilasi noThimothi bavela eMasedoniya, uPowula wazinikela ngokupheleleko ekutjhumayeleni, afakaza emaJudeni bona uJesu unguKrestu." 
Acts18:5 Kuthe bona kufike uSilasi noThimothi bavela eMasedoniya, uPowula wazinikela ngokupheleleko ekutjhumayeleni, afakaza emaJudeni bona uJesu unguKrestu." 
Acts18:6 Kuthe lokha nabamphikisako bakhuluma kumbi ngaye, wazibilayeza ngokuthintitha ithuli ezambathweni zakhe, wathi kibo: “Iingazi zenu azibe phezu kweenhloko zenu! Mina anginamlandu. Kusukela kwanjesi, ngizakuya kabatjhili.”" 
Acts18:7 Yeke watjhiya isinagogi waya endlini yomuntu okuthiwa nguTitiyusi Justusi, obekesaba uZimu, indlwakhe ihlanu kwesinagogi." 
Acts18:8 UKrisposi umphathi wesinagogi, wakholwa eKosini yena nawo woke umndenakhe; nabanengi ebezwa uPowula eKorinte, bakholwa babhajadiswa." 
Acts18:9 Ngobusuku obunye iKosi yakhuluma noPowula ngombono yathi kuye: “Ungesabi, kodwana raga ukhulume, ungathuli" 
Acts18:10 ngombana nginawe. Akakho noyedwa ozakukubeka isandla akulimaze ngombana banengi ngedorobheni le okubabantu bami.” 
Acts18:11 Yeke uPowula wahlala lapho umnyaka nesiquntu, afundisa ilizwi lakaZimu phakathi kwabo." 
Acts18:12 Kuthe bona uGaliyo abe mbusi we-Arhaya, amaJuda ahlangana asahlela uPowula amdosela phambi kwekundla," 
Acts18:13 athi: “Indoda le idosa abantu bona besabe uZimu, ngendlela ephambene nomthetho!”" 
Acts18:14 Kwathi uPowula asathi uyakhuluma, uGaliyo wathi emaJudeni: “Nangabe lokho bekulicala namkha ubukhohlakali obukhulu, bengizakwamukela ukusola kwenu maJuda." 
Acts18:14 Kwathi uPowula asathi uyakhuluma, uGaliyo wathi emaJudeni: “Nangabe lokho bekulicala namkha ubukhohlakali obukhulu, bengizakwamukela ukusola kwenu maJuda." 
Acts18:15 Kodwana njengombana kukuphikisana ngamezwi namabizo nangomthetho wenu, kulungiseni ngokwenu lokho. Angithandi ukuba mgwebi weendabezi!”" 
Acts18:16 Nje-ke wabaqotjha ekundleni. 
Acts18:17 Boke babhudungela uSosithenesi umphathi wesinagogi, bambetha phambi kwekundla. Kodwana uGaliyo akhange akunake lokho." 
Acts18:18 UPowula sele ahlezi isikhatjhana lapho, walayelisa abazalwana wathayela eSiriya aphekelelwa nguPrisila no-Akhwila. EKhengirheriya waguda ihlokwakhe ngombana gade angaphasi kwesifungo." 
Acts18:19 Kwathi nabafika e-Efesu wabatjhiya khona, kodwana yena waya ngesinagogini wakhulumisana namaJuda." 
Acts18:20 Kuthe lokha nabambawa bona ahlale nabo isikhatjhana, wala." 
Acts18:21 Kodwana ekubalayeliseni wathi: “UZimu navumako, ngizakubuya godu.” Yeke wathaya wasuka e-Efesu." 
Acts18:22 Kuthe bona afike eKhesariya, wakhuphuka wayokubingelela ibandla, emva kwalokho wehlela e-Anthiyorhiya." 
Acts18:23 Kwathi bona ahlale isikhatjhana lapho, wasuka, wakhamba wadabula esifundeni seGalatiya neseFrigiya aqinisa boke abafundi." 
Acts18:24 UmJuda othileko, okuthiwa ngu-Apolo, obelethwa e-Alekzandriya, weza e-Efesu. Gade asikhulumi esikwaziko ukukhuluma nesinelwazi ngemitlolo." 
Acts18:25 Yena-ke bekafundiswe ngendlela kaSomnini, ngokuzimisela okukhulu wakhuluma bewafundisa kuhle ngeendaba ezimayelana noJesu, nanyana bekasazi umbhabhadiso kaJwanisi kwaphela." 
Acts18:26 Nje-ke wathoma ukukhuluma ngesibindi ngesinagogini. Kodwana kuthe bona uPrisila no-Akhwila bamuzwe, bamthatha baya naye ekhaya bamhlathululela kuhle indlela kaZimu." 
Acts18:27 U-Apolo asafisa bona ayamele ngaphetjheya e-Arhaya, abazalwana bamkhuthaza babe batlolela abafundi kobana bamamukele. Ekufikeni kwakhe waba lisizo elikhulu kilabo abathe ngomusa kaZimu baba makholwa" 
Acts18:28 ngombana ngamandla amakhulu waphikisa amaJuda epepeneneni, atjengisa ngokwemitlolo bona uJesu unguKrestu." 
Acts19:1 Kuthe u-Apolo asesengeKorinte, uPowula wadabula esifundeni seGalatiya neseFrigiya weza e-Efesu, lapha afumana khona abafundi." 
Acts19:2 Wababuza wathi: “Namamukela uMoya oCwengileko lokha naniba makholwa na?” Baphendula bathi: “Awa, akhange besizwe nokuzwa bona kukhona uMoya oCwengileko.”" 
Acts19:3 Nje-ke wababuza wathi: “Alo-ke umbhabhadiso enawufumanako ngonjani na?” Baphendula bathi: “Mbhabhadiso kaJwanisi.” 
Acts19:4 UPowula wathi: “Umbhabhadiso kaJwanisi gade ungewokuphenduka, atjela abantu bona kufuze bakholwe kiloyo ozako ngemva kwakhe, okutjho uJesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Kwathi bona bezwe lokho, babhajadiswa ebizweni leKosi uJesu." 
Acts19:6 Kuthe uPowula sele abeke izandla phezu kwabo behlelwa nguMoya oCwengileko bakhuluma ngeenlimi bebaphorofida. 
Acts19:7 Sele baboke bebalitjhumi nambili. 
Acts19:8 UPowula wangena ngesinagogini wakhuluma lapho ngesibindi iinyanga ezintathu aphikisana nabo ngokulinga ukubabonisa umbuso kaZimu. 
Acts19:9 Kodwana lokha abanye babo nabathoma ukukhunyalala, bangafuni ukukholwa begodu bakhuluma kumbi ngeNdlela epepeneneni watjhida kibo wathatha nabafundi kanye naye. Imihla ngemihla bekabamba iinkulumo esikolweni sakaTiranusi." 
Acts19:10 Lokho kwathatha iminyaka emibili, kangangobana zoke izakhamuzi ze-Asiya, amaJuda nabatjhili, zezwa ilizwi leKosi." 
Acts19:11 UZimu wenza imikarisomraro engakajayeleki ngoPowula," 
Acts19:12 kangangobana iinsagadugu nezambatho ekhe zamthinta zalethwa kwabagulako, ukugula kwabo bekusuka nemimoya emimbi iphuma kibo." 
Acts19:13 Namanye amaJuda agade akhamba aqotjha amadimoni, nawo alinga ukusebenzisa ibizo leKosi uJesu phezu kwalabo ebebanemimoya emimbi. Bathi: “Ebizweni lakaJesu, uPowula atjhumayela ngaye, nginiyala bona niphume.”" 
Acts19:14 Abagade benza lokho bekumadodana alikhomba womphristi omkhulu omuJuda okuthiwa nguSikeva. 
Acts19:15 Kodwana ummoya omumbi wawaphendula wathi kiwo: “Ngiyamazi uJesu begodu ngiyazi ngoPowula, kodwana nina nibobani na?”" 
Acts19:16 Nje-ke indoda enommoya omumbi yabeqela yabahlula ngamandla boke njalo. Baphuma sele babaleka ngendlinapho babhunubhunu begodu banamanceba. 
Acts19:17 Kuthe lokho nakuzwakala kizo zoke izakhamuzi ze-Efesu okumaJuda nabatjhili, omunye nomunye wehlelwa kukwesaba, ibizo leKosi uJesu ladunyiswa." 
Acts19:18 Abanengi balabo abakholwako beza bavuma izono ngokudalula imikhuba yabo. 
Acts19:19 Inengi lalabo egade benza imilingo babutha iincwadi zabo, bazitjhisa phambi kwabantu baqalile. Kuthe nesele kuhlanganiswa inani leencwadi ezatjhako, kwafumaneka bona ziziimpaparwana zesiliva eziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu." 
Acts19:20 Ngendlela leyo ilizwi leKosi lakhula ngamandla, lahlula." 
Acts19:21 Emva kobana sekwenzekile koke lokho, uPowula wazimisela emmoyeni bonyana adabule eMasedoniya ne-Arhaya kobana adundubale adlulele eJerusalema. Wathi: “Emva kobana ngidlulile lapho kufuze ngithekele neRoma.”" 
Acts19:22 Yeke wathumela abasizi bakhe ababili uThimothi no-Erasitusi eMasedoniya, yena wahlala isikhathi eside e-Asiya." 
Acts19:23 Ngesikhatheso kwavuka isiphithiphithi esikhulu mayelana neNdlela. 
Acts19:24 Indoda ethileko ekuthiwa nguDemetriyusi, ebumba imifanekiso ngesiliva neyakha amathempedlana wesiliva ka-Aritemisi, yangenisa inzuzo ekulu kibososino." 
Acts19:25 Yababizela ndawonye kanye nabanye abanomsebenzi ofana newabo, yathi kibo: “Madoda, niyazi bona umnotho wethu uphuma emsebenzini lo." 
Acts19:26 Manje nani niyabona beniyazizwela ngokwenu bona akusinge-Efesu kwaphela kodwana pheze i-Asiya loke, uPowula lo udukise abanengi ngokubatjela bona abozimu abenziwe ngezandla, akusibo abozimu bamambala." 
Acts19:27 Nje-ke sekukhona ingozi ekulu, ingasi kwaphela bona lirhwebo lethu elizakulahlekelwa libizo lalo elihle, kodwana nokobana nethempeli lakazimukazi omkhulu u-Aritemisi lizokunyazwa begodu uzimukazi ngokwakhe, olotjhwa esifundeni se-Asiya nephasini loke, uzokululazeka isithunzi sakhe sobundlovukazi!”"
