Acts19:28 Kuthe bona bezwe lokho, bathukuthela bebarhuwelela, bathi: “Mkhulu u-Aritemisi we-Efesu!”" 
Acts19:29 Idorobho loke lazala ihlangahlangano, abantu badosa uGayusi no-Aristarirhusi okumaMasedoniya amabili agade akhamba noPowula, babasa ngendaweni yomboniso." 
Acts19:30 UPowula wafuna ukungena hlangana nesiqubuthu, kodwana abafundi bamalela." 
Acts19:31 Ngitjho neenkhulu zesifunda se-Asiya egade zibangani bakhe zathumela umlayezo zimncenga bona angalibhadi ngendaweni yomboniso. 
Acts19:32 Isiqubuthu besihlangahlangene: Abanye barhuwelela lokhu, abanye barhuwelela okhunye ngombana inengi labo belingazi bona kuhlangenwe ngani." 
Acts19:33 Abanye besiqubuthu barhuwelela imiyalo ku-Alekzandra ngombana nguye amaJuda ebegade amsunduzele phambili. Nje-ke yena waphakamisa isandla alinga ukuzivikela ebantwini. 
Acts19:34 Kodwana kuthe bonyana balemuke bona umuJuda, barhuwelela boke okufanako ama-awara amabili bathi: “Omkhulu ngu-Aritemisi wama-Efesu!”" 
Acts19:35 Kodwana kuthe lokha usosiba wedorobho nasele athulise isiqubuthu, wathi: “Zakhamuzi ze-Efesu! Angithi woke uyazi bona idorobho le-Efesu lilibulungelo lethempeli laka-Aritemisi omkhulu nesithombe esakhithika sivela ezulwini." 
Acts19:36 Yeke njengombana lokhu kuliqiniso elingaphikekiko nje, kumele nithule, ningenzi itshurhutshurhu." 
Acts19:37 Nilethe amadoda la lapha, okungasiwo abadlelezeli bethempeli namkha abaphoqi bakazimukazi wethu." 
Acts19:38 “Ngalokho nangabe uDemetriyusi nabososino abanaye banesililo nanoma ngobani, iinkundla zokugwebela zivulekile nabagwebi bakhona; abalethe iimangalo lapho." 
Acts19:39 Kodwana nangabe kukhona enikufunako ngaphezu kwalokho enithanda ukukwazi, kufuze ilungiswe embizweni yezakhamuzi yangokomthetho." 
Acts19:40 Nakungasinjalo sisengozini yokumangalelwa ngokuguruzela namhlanje ngombana asikho isizathu esingazilandulela ngaso ngesiphithiphithesi.” 
Acts19:41 Emva kokutjho lokhu, waqeda umhlangano." 
Acts20:1 Emva kobana ukuguruzela kuphele, uPowula wabizela abafundi ndawonye. Kuthe sele abakhuthaze ngamezwi, wabalayelisa wakhamba waya eMasedoniya." 
Acts20:2 Sele adabule eemfundenezo bewakhuthaza amakholwa ngamezwi amanengi, wafika eGirisi," 
Acts20:3 lapha ahlala khona iinyanga ezintathu. Begade asele azilungisela ukuthayela eSiriya, kodwana njengombana amaJuda gade sele enze ubukhwebetjhana ngaye, waqeda ngokuthi abuye ngeMasedoniya." 
Acts20:4 Bekaphekelelwa nguSopatrosi umsa kaPhuru weBheriya, ngu-Aristarirhusi noSekhundusi beThesalonika, nguGayusi weDerbe, nguThimothi, nguTikhikhusi noTrofimusi besifundeni se-Asiya." 
Acts20:5 Kodwana laba-ke basandulela, bayosilindela eTrowasi." 
Acts20:6 Thina-ke sathaya sisuka eFilipi emva komnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo safika kibo eTrowasi ngemva kwamalanga amahlanu; sahlala lapho amalanga alikhomba. 
Acts20:7 Ngelanga lokuthoma leveke, lokha nabesihlangene bona sihlephule isikwa, uPowula wakhuluma ebantwini. Njengombana gade azakukhamba ngakusasa, wasolo akhuluma bekwaba kuphakathi kobusuku." 
Acts20:8 Bekukhona iimbani ezinengi ngelawini elingaphezulu lapha besihlanganele khona. 
Acts20:9 Isokana, ekuthiwa ngu-Ewuterhusi ebelihlezi ngefesidereni lathoma layenda belabanjwa buthongo obunzima, khisibe uPowula bekasakhuluma. Ngokubindwa buthongo lawela phasi ukusuka emgangadelweni wesithathu; ladojwa lapho sele libhubhile." 
Acts20:10 Kodwana uPowula wehlela phasi waziphosa phezu kwalo walisingatha, wathi: “Ningatshwenyeki ngombana liyaphila.”" 
Acts20:11 Wabuyela godu emuva elawini elingehla, kwathi emva kobana sele ahlephule isikwa wagoma, waragela phambili wakhuluma bekwasa; wabese uyakhamba." 
Acts20:12 Abantu balithatha isokaneli balisa ekhaya liphila, iinhliziyo zabo zaba mhlophe." 
Acts20:13 Saraga saya emkhunjini sakhwela sathayela e-Asusi, lapha besizakufese sithathe khona uPowula. Bekahlele njalo ngombana yena gade azokukhamba ngeenyawo." 
Acts20:14 Kuthe bona ahlangane nathi e-Asusi, samkhweza saya naye eMithileni." 
Acts20:15 Sathaya ukusuka lapho, kwathi ngakusasa safika malungana neRhiyosi. Ngelanga elilandelako sabandamela eSamosi, kwathi ilanga emva kwalapho safika eMiletusi." 
Acts20:16 UPowula yena wacabanga ukuthaya adlule e-Efesu, khona angazukulahlekelwa sikhathi ngesifundeni se-Asiya ngombana bebarhabele ukuyokufika eJerusalema nakungakghoneka ngelanga lePentekoste." 
Acts20:17 UPowula wathumela umlayezo usuka eMiletusi usiya e-Efesu, abawa abaphathi bebandla bona bamhlangabeze." 
Acts20:18 Kuthe bona bafike, wathi kibo: “Nani niyazi bona bengiphila njani isikhathi soke nginani, kusukela elangeni lokuthomo engafika ngalo esifundeni se-Asiya." 
Acts20:19 Ngilotjhe iKosi ngokuzithoba okukhulu nangeenyembezi, nganyamezelela iinlingo engahlangana nazo ngobukhwebetjhana bamaJuda." 
Acts20:20 “Azange ngigodle ilitho ebelingaba lisizo kini, ngatjhumayela nginifundisa emtarini nendlu ngendlu." 
Acts20:21 Ngamemezela emaJudeni nakwabezizwe ukuphendukela kuZimu nekukholweni eKosini uJesu. 
Acts20:21 Ngamemezela emaJudeni nakwabezizwe ukuphendukela kuZimu nekukholweni eKosini uJesu. 
Acts20:22 Alo-ke, njengesibotjhwa kuMoya, ngisendleleni eya eJerusalema, kungekho engikwaziko bona kuzakwenzekani lapho kimi," 
Acts20:23 ngaphandle kokuthi uMoya oCwengileko ufakaza kimi emadorobheni woke ukuthi isikhungo nokuhlunguphazwa kungilindile. 
Acts20:24 Ubuphilo bami angisabuthathi njengento eligugu kimi, kwaphela nange ngaqeda ibanga lami nekonzwami engayamukela eKosini uJesu kobana ngifakaze ivangeli lomusa kaZimu." 
Acts20:25 “Nje-ke sengiyazi bona akakho noyedwa wenu kilabo engikhambe ngimemezela ivangeli kibo ozabe asangibona godu. 
Acts20:26 Ngalokho ngiyafakaza kini kilelilanga ngithi anginamlandu eengazini zabo boke abantu 
Acts20:27 ngombana akhange ngigodle ilitho kini ngokufakaza loke ihlelo lakaZimu. 
Acts20:28 Zilondeni ngokuzitjheja nina ngokwenu, nawo woke umhlambi uMoya oCwengileko anibeke bona nibe babonisi bawo kobana neluse ibandla lakaZimu azizuzele lona ngeengazi zeNdodanakhe." 
Acts20:29 Ngiyazi bona kuzakuthi nasele ngikhambile kuze hlangana nenu iimpisi ezikhwabithako, zangawuncenekeli umhlambi." 
Acts20:30 Ngitjho naphakathi kwenu kuzakuvela abanye abahlanakezela iqiniso ukuze bawunge abafundi babalandele. 
Acts20:31 Ngalokho qaphelani, nikhumbule bona iminyaka emithathu yoke ubusuku nemini akhange ngilise ukukhalimela omunye nomunye wenu ngeenyembezi." 
Acts20:32 “Nje-ke nginibeka kuZimu nelizwini lakhe lomusa, lona elikwazi ukunakha nokuninikela ilifa hlangana nabo boke abacwengisiweko." 
Acts20:33 Akhange ngikhanukele isiliva, igolide namkha izambatho zomuntu." 
Acts20:34 Nani ngokwenu niyazi bona ngezandla zamezi ngasebenzela iindingo zami nezalabo abanami. 
Acts20:35 Kikho koke lokhu, nginitjengise bona ngokusebenza kabudisi ngendlela le kufanele sibasize abadududu; sikhumbule amezwi weKosi uJesu eyawatjho yona ngokwayo yathi: ‘Kubusiseke khulu ukupha kunokwamukela!’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Kuthe bona atjho lokho, waguqa phasi nabo boke wathandaza." 
Acts20:37 Kwabakhona ukulila okukhulu kibo boke ngesikhathi bagona uPowula, bamcwanga emhlathini." 
Acts20:38 Bajabha khulu ngamezwi awatjhoko bona angekhe basambona godu. Nje-ke bamphekelela emkhunjini. 
Acts21:1 Kwathi sesihlukene nabo sathaya sanqomba eKhose, ngakusasa safika eRodosi. Ukusuka lapho saya ePatara." 
Acts21:2 Lapho safumana umkhumbi oya eFunisiya; sakhwela sathaya. 
Acts21:3 Sathi nasele sibona iSayipurasi, sadlula ngesewula yakhona sathayela eSiriya, sehlika eTirosi ngombana lapho umkhumbi gade uyokwehlisa ipahla." 
Acts21:4 Sesifunyene abafundi lapho, sahlala nabo amalanga alikhomba. NgoMoya oCwengileko batjela uPowula bona angalibhadi eJerusalema." 
Acts21:5 Kodwana kuthe bona amalanga wethu lapho aphele, sasuka bona siragele phambili nekhambo lethu. Boke abafundi, abomkabo nabantwababo basiphekelela besaphumela ngaphandle kwedorobho. Lapho-ke saguqa eligwini lelwandle sathandaza." 
Acts21:6 Emva kokulayelisana nabo sangena ngemkhunjini, bona babuyela emakhaya." 
Acts21:7 Saraga ngethayo lethu ukusuka eTirosi besafika ePitolemayisi; lapha safika sabingelela abazalwana sahlala nabo ilanga elilodwa. 
Acts21:8 Ngelanga elilandelako sakhamba safika eKhesariya, sangena kwaFlebhe umvangeli ongomunye wabalikhomba, sahlala kwakhe." 
Acts21:9 Yena ubanamadodakazi amane angakendi agade aphorofida. 
Acts21:10 Kuthe sisahlezi lapho amalangana, kwafika umphorofidi u-Agabhusi avela eJudiya." 
Acts21:11 Weza kithi wathatha ibhande lakaPowula, wazibopha ngalo iinyawo nezandla, wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguMoya oCwengileko, ‘Ngayo indlela le, umninibhandeli uzokubotjhwa maJuda ngeJerusalema, amkhaphele kabatjhili.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Kuthe bona sizwe lokho, thina nabanye abantu lapho, sancenga uPowula bona angakhuphukeli eJerusalema." 
Acts21:13 Kodwana uPowula waphendula wathi: “Nenzani, nilila kangaka nidanisa ihliziywami na? Angikalungeli kwaphela ukubotjhwa ngeJerusalema, kodwana nokufela khona ngebanga lebizo leKosi uJesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Sesihlulekile ukumvimba, sazithulela samukela sathi: “Intando yeKosi ayenziwe.”" 
Acts21:15 Emva kwamalangana lawo, sazilungiselela sakhuphukela eJerusalema." 
Acts21:16 Abanye babafundi beKhesariya bakhamba nathi, basisa ekhayeni kwaMnasoni weSayipurasi, ebegade amfundi omdala kobana sihlale khona." 
Acts21:17 Kuthe bona sifike ngeJerusalema amakholwa asamukela ngethabo. 
Acts21:18 Kwathi ngakusasa uPowula wakhamba nathi sayokubona uJakopo nabaphathi boke abebalapho. 
Acts21:19 Sele ababingelele, wabika koke ngakunye uZimu agade akwenze hlangana nabatjhili ngomsebenzakhe." 
Acts21:20 Kuthe bona bezwe lokho, badumisa uZimu. Nje-ke bathi kuPowula: “Uyabona mfowethu bonyana kuneenkulungwana ezinengi kangangani hlangana namaJuda ezimakholwa, begodu zoke zitjhisakalela umthetho." 
Acts21:21 Manje zitjeliwe ngawe bona wena ufundisa woke amaJuda ahlala eenarheni zabatjhili bona alise umthetho kaMosi; uwatjelile bonyana angasoki abantwana bawo begodu bangalandeli amasiko. 
Acts21:22 Alo, sizokwenza njani na? Nanyana kunjani azokuzwa bonyana ufikile," 
Acts21:23 yeke yenza lokho esikutjela khona: Kunamadoda amane lapha azibophe ngesifungo," 
Acts21:24 nje-ke khambisana nawo uhlanganele nawo esikweni lokuhlanjululwa ukhuphe iindleko zokugudwa kweenhloko zawo. Ngendlela le boke bazakwazi bona akukho iqiniso kilokho abatjelwe ngawe ngakho, kodwana bazakwazi bona nawe uphila njengaloyo ogcina umthetho kaMosi." 
Acts21:25 “Nakungabatjhili esele bamakholwa, sibathumele incwadi nesimiso sethu sokobana abatjhide kokuhlatjelwe abosingazimu, ebubendeni, kokukghanyiweko nebufebeni.”" 
Acts21:26 Ngomuso uPowula wathatha amadoda lawo, kwathi sele azihlambululile, wangena nawo ngethempelini, wabika emtarini ukupheleliswa kwamalanga wehlambuluko lokha kuzakwenziwa umhlabelo womunye nomunye wabo." 
Acts21:27 Kuthe amalanga alikhomba nakaya ngekupheleni, amaJuda we-Asiya agade abone uPowula ngethempelini atjitjizela isiqubuthu. Abamba uPowula," 
Acts21:28 arhuwelela athi: “Ma-Israyeli, sizani! Lo, mumuntu okhamba yoke indawo afundisa omunye nomunye, okuphambene nabantu bekhethu, umthetho nendawo le. Ngaphandle kwalokho sele angenise namaGirigi ngethempelini, yeke usilaphaze indawo ecwengileko le!”" 
Acts21:29 Ngebanga lokobana bebabone uTrofimusi we-Efesu anoPowula ngedorobheni, badlumbana bona uPowula bekamngenise ngethempelini." 
Acts21:30 Nje-ke idorobho loke laphithizela nabantu beza bagijimela ndawonye; babamba uPowula bamrhudulela ngaphandle kwethempeli kwavalwa neminyango khonokho. 
Acts21:31 Kuthe basathi balinga ukumbulala, kwafika ilizwi enduneni yebutho bona loke iJerusalema liyavungazela." 
Acts21:32 Khonokho yathatha amajoni nabaphathimabutho; yarhaba yehlela kibo. Kuthe bona abantu babone induna yebutho namajoni, balisa ukubetha uPowula." 
Acts21:33 Induna yafese yambamba yathi akabotjhwe ngeenketani ezimbili; yabuza bona ungubani nokobana wenzeni. 
Acts21:34 Abanye hlangana nesiqubuthu barhuwelela into yinye, abanye okhunye. Kwathi ngebanga lokobana ingakhange ikghone ukuzwisisa kuhle ngebanga lokuvungazela, yakanye yayala bona asiwe ekampeni yamajoni." 
Acts21:35 Kwathi uPowula sele afike emiqaqadweni, umguruguru wesiqubuthu wadlanga ngamandla kangangoba kwafuneka bona athwalwe majoni." 
Acts21:36 Isiqubuthu ebesilandela ngemva kwawo besisoloko sirhuwelela sithi: “Akasisusele thina!” 
Acts21:37 Kuthe sele bazomngenisa ngekampeni yamajoni, wathi enduneni: “Ngingaba nengingakutjhoko kuwe na?” Induna yamphendula yathi: “Kanti uyasazi isiGirigi na?" 
Acts21:38 Nakunjalo, alo, awusimrhali loya womGibhide okhe wathi mhlapha nje walinga ukuvukela umbuso ngokubutha ababulali abaziinkulungwana ezine waya nabo erhalawumbeni?”" 
Acts21:39 UPowula waphendula wathi: “Mina ngimJuda odabuka eTarsusi yeSilisiya, ngisisakhamuzi sedorobho eliqakathekileko. Yeke ngiyakubawa, akhe ungivumele ngikhulume ebantwinaba.”" 
Acts21:40 Sele afunyene imvumo, uPowula wajama phezu komqaqado waphakamisela abantu isandla. Kuthe bona bathule, wakhuluma nabo ngesiHebheru, wathi:" 
Acts22:1 “Bafowethu nabobaba, kwanjesi akhese nilalele ukuzivikela kwami kini!”" 
Acts22:2 Kwathi bona bamuzwe bonyana ukhuluma nabo ngesiHebheru, bathulisisa. Nje-ke wathi:" 
Acts22:3 “Kokwakho mina ngimJuda, ngabelethelwa eTarsusi yeSilisiya, kodwana ngakhulela khona edorobhenelo eenyaweni zakaGamaliyeli, ngafundiswa ngokutjhubileko ngokuya ngomthetho wabokhokho, ngitjhisakalela uZimu njengombana nani noke ninjalo namhlanje." 
Acts22:4 Abanengi egade bakhamba ngeNdlela le ngabazuma bekwaba sekufeni. Bengibopha amadoda nabafazi ngibaphosa ngesikhungweni," 
Acts22:5 njengombana nomphristi omkhulu nomkhandlu woke wabaphathi bangaba nobufakazi ngami. Ngamukela incwadi evela kibo itlolelwe abafowethu okumaJuda weDamaseku; ngaya lapho kobana ngiyokubopha, ngibalethe eJerusalema bona bazokuhlunguphazwa." 
Acts22:6 “Ngisatjhitjhinga njalo ngitjhidele eDamaseku, pheze emini ekulu, kwehla ezulwini umkhanyo omkhulu wamanyaza kimi mazombe." 
Acts22:7 Ngawela phasi ngezwa ilizwi lisithi kimi, ‘Sawula, Sawula! Ungizumelani na?’" 
Acts22:8 Ngabuza ngathi, ‘Ungubani wena, Kosi, na?’ Yathi kimi, ‘NginguJesu weNazaretha lo ozumana naye.’" 
Acts22:9 “Abantu ebenginabo bakubona ukukhanya, kodwana akhange balizwe ilizwi laloyo ogade akhuluma nami." 
Acts22:10 Ngabuza ngathi, ‘Alo-ke ngingenzani, Kosi, na?’ IKosi yathi kimi, ‘Vuka ukhambe uye ngeDamaseku, lapho-ke uzafese uzwe koke obekelwe bona ukwenze.’" 
Acts22:11 Njengombana bengingasaboni ngebanga lomkhanyo, labo ebebanami bangibamba ngesandla bangisa ngeDamaseku." 
Acts22:12 “Umuntu ekuthiwa ngu-Ananiyasi, indoda egade ilandela umthetho ngokupheleleko nekhulunywa kuhle maJuda ahlala lapho," 
Acts22:13 yeza kimi yajama hlanu kwami yathi, ‘Mfowethu Sawula, buya ubone godu!’ Khonokho ngabona godu bengayiqala." 
Acts22:14 Yathi kimi, ‘UZimu wabokhokho ukhethe wena bona wazi intando yakhe, ubone oLungileko wakhe bewuzwe iphimbo lomlomakhe;" 
Acts22:15 ngalokho uzakuba ngufakazakhe kibo boke abantu ngokubonileko nokuzwileko. 
Acts22:16 Alo, usalindeleni? Sikima ubhajadiswe, kuhlanjwe izono zakho ngokubiza ibizo lakhe!’" 
Acts22:17 “Kwathi sele ngibuyele eJerusalema, ngisathandaza ngethempelini, ngaba nesiyezi," 
Acts22:18 ngabona iKosi ikhuluma nami isithi, ‘Rhaba uphume msinyana eJerusalema ngombana abazubamukela ubufakazi bakho ngami.’" 
Acts22:19 Nje-ke ngathi, ‘Kosi, bayazi ngokwabo bona kelinye nelinye isinagogi bengibopha, ngibethe boke ebebagade bakholwa kuwe." 
Acts22:20 Godu lokha iingazi zakaStefani ufakazakho nazithulukako, gade ngijame mina ngokwami lapho, ngivumelana begodu ngiqale nezambatho zalabo abambulalako.’" 
Acts22:21 Yathi kimi, ‘Khamba ngombana ngizokuthumela kude kabatjhili.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Abantu bebalokhu balalele uPowula bekwaba semagameni lawo; emva kwalokho, bathoma ukurhuwelela bathi: “Msuseni onje ephasini ngombana akakafaneli ukuphila!”" 
Acts22:23 Kwathi basarhuwelela njalo, badabula izambatho zabo, bavusa nethuli," 
Acts22:24 induna yebutho yayala bona alethwe ngekampeni yamajoni; yahlongoza bona akahlolisiswe ngokurithwa khona kuzakwazeka bona itjhada elingakeli libangwe yini ngaye. 
Acts22:25 Kuthe basambhambalalisa bona bamrithe, uPowula wathi kumphathimabutho ebekajame lapho: “Kumthetho yini bona nirithe isakhamuzi sombuso weRoma singakabi ukulahlwa licala na?”" 
Acts22:26 Kuthe bona umphathimabutho ezwe lokho, walunga enduneni yebutho wathi kiyo: “Uzokwenzani ngomuntu lo? Usisakhamuzi sombuso weRoma!”" 
Acts22:27 Yeke induna yeza kuPowula yambuza yathi: “Akhese ungitjele, kanti wena usisakhamuzi sombuso weRoma na?” Yena wathi: “Iye.”" 
Acts22:28 Induna yathi: “Kwangibiza imali enengi mina ukufunyana ilungelwelo.” UPowula waphendula wathi: “Mina-ke ngisisakhamuzi ngokubelethwa.” 
Acts22:29 Khonokho labo egade kumele bamhlole bamkghaduka, induna nayo yangenwa livalo ngombana yalemuka bona uPowula sisakhamuzi sombuso weRoma nokobana beyimbophile." 
Acts22:30 Ngebanga lokobana induna beyifuna ukwazi bona yini into amaJuda amsola ngayo uPowula, ngelanga elilandelako yamthukulula beyayala abaphristi abakhulu nesigungu sabarholi bamaJuda soke bona khebahlangane. Yeke yathatha uPowula yamjamisa phambi kwabo." 
Acts23:1 UPowula waqala thwi phezu kwamadoda wesigungu sabarholi bamaJuda, wathi kiwo: “Bafowethu, ngiphile phambi kwakaZimu ngonembeza omsulwa bekube nanamhlanjesi.”" 
Acts23:2 Nje-ke umphristi omkhulu u-Ananiyasi wayala agade bajame hlanu kwakhe bona bamwahle umlomo lo. 
Acts23:3 Ngalokhu uPowula wathi kuye: “UZimu uzokuwahla wena ozenza msulwa! Uhlalele ukugweba mina ngomthetho, khisibe wena uyawephula ngokuthi bangibethe!”" 
Acts23:4 Abagade bajame hlanu kwakhe bathi: “Wena, uthuka umphristi omkhulu kaZimu na?”" 
Acts23:5 UPowula waphendula wathi: “Bafowethu, bengingazi bona mphristi omkhulu. Mbala kutloliwe kwathiwa, ‘Ungathuwelelisi umphathi wabantu bakho.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Kuthe bona uPowula abone bonyana abanye babaSadusi nokuthi abanye babaFarisi, warhuwelela esigungwini wathi: “Bafowethu, ngimFarisi oyindodana yabaFarisi. Nje-ke lapha ngimangalelwe ngendaba yokuthi nginethemba lokobanyana abafileko bazokuvuka.”" 
Acts23:7 Kuthe bona atjho lokho, kwathoma ukuphikisana phakathi kwabaFarisi nabaSadusi, ihlangano yahlukana phakathi" 
Acts23:8 ngombana abaSadusi bebathi akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko, begodu azikho iingilozi nemimoya; kodwana abaFarisi bebakholelwa kikho kokuthathu." 
Acts23:9 Itjhada laba likhulu bekwasikima abanye abafundisi bomthetho babaFarisi baphikisa ngamandla, bathi: “Asiboni ilitho elimbi endodeni le! Kuzokuthiwani nakube ummoya namkha ingilozi, ikhulume kuye na?”" 
Acts23:10 Lokha ukuphikisana kwabo nakuba namandla, induna yebutho beyesaba bona bazamtlebhula imitletlana uPowula. Yeke yayala amajoni bona ehle, afese amdzwebule ngekani amuse ekampeni yamajoni." 
Acts23:11 Kwathi ebusuku iKosi yajama hlanu kwakaPowula, yathi: “Yiba nesibindi! Njengombana ufakaze ngami eJerusalema, kufuze wenze njalo neRoma.”" 
Acts23:12 Kuthe sekusile amaJuda azibumba isicathana abe azibopha ngesifungo kobana angagomi namkha asele nanyana yini angakabulali uPowula. 
Acts23:13 Labo ebebazibumbe isicathana bebeqile ematjhumini amane. 
Acts23:14 Bona baya ebaphristini abakhulu nebaphathini, bathi: “Sesizibophe ngesifungo bona angekhe sagoma ilitho singakabulali uPowula." 
Acts23:15 Manje, nina nesigungu sabarholi bamaJuda thumelani ilizwi enduneni yebutho bona ithumele uPowula ehle eze kini, nizitjhaye sengathi nifuna ukwazisisa kuhle ngaye. Nje-ke thina sesilungele ukumsusa angakafiki.”" 
Acts23:16 Kodwana indodana kadadwabo lakaPowula yezwa ngendumba le, nje-ke yakhamba yangena ngekampeni yamajoni yabikela uPowula ngalokhu." 
Acts23:17 Yeke uPowula wabiza omunye wabaphathimabutho wathi kuye: “Thatha isokaneli ulise enduneni, kukhona elizakutjho kiyo.”" 
Acts23:18 Umphathimabutho walithatha, walisa enduneni, wafese wathi: “Isibotjhwa uPowula ungibizile wathi ngilethe isokaneli kuwe ngombana kukhona elifuna ukukutjho kuwe.”" 
Acts23:19 Induna yalibamba ngesandla yatjhidela nalo eqadi, yalibuza yathi: “Yini le ofuna ukungibikela yona?”" 
Acts23:20 Lona lathi: “AmaJuda avumelene bona azokubawa bonyana uthumele uPowula ehle eze esigungwini sababarholi bamaJuda kusasa, kubengathi bafuna ukwazi kabanzi ngaye." 
Acts23:21 Kodwana ungabalaleli ngombana phakathi kwawo kukhona amadoda angaphezu kwamatjhumi amane azabe abhaqile amlindele. Azibophe ngesifungo sokobana angekhe agoma namkha asela angakambulali. Kwanjesi nje, sele ajame ngehlelo, alindele kwaphela imvumo yakho.”" 
Acts23:22 Nje-ke induna yathi: “Ungatjeli noyedwa bona lokhu sewungazisile.” Yalilisa lakhamba. 
Acts23:23 Yabiza abaphathimabutho ababili, yathi kibo: “Zilungiseleleni ukukhamba namhlanje ngesimbi yethoba kusihlwa, niye eKhesariya namajoni amakhulu amabili, abakhweli beenjomani abamatjhumi alikhomba nabaphathi bemikhonto abamakhulu amabili." 
Acts23:24 Begodu nikelani noPowula ezinye iinjomani kobana akhwele, nimfikise aphephile kumbusi uFeliksi.”" 
Acts23:25 Nje-ke induna yatlola incwadi efundeka ngendlela le: 
Acts23:26 “Mina Klawudiyusi Lisiya, ngilotjhisa kuwe Feliksi Mbusi ohloniphekileko." 
Acts23:27 AmaJuda abamba indoda le, kwathi sele athi ayayiqedelela ngafika nebutho ngayisindisa ngombana ngilemukile nokobana isisakhamuzi sombuso weRoma." 
Acts23:28 Njengombana bengifuna ukwazi icala abamthwese lona, ngamletha esigungwini sabarholi bamaJuda." 
Acts23:29 Ngafumana bona bayimangalele ngomlandu malungana nomthetho wabo; kunganalitho elenza ifanele ukubulawa namkha ukuphoswa ngesikhungweni. 
Acts23:30 Kuthe sekudaluliwe kimi bona kukhona ubukhwebetjhana ngendoda leyo, ngathi angiyithumele kuwe msinyana. Ngibatjelile nabamangaleli bayo bona nabo abendlale indaba yabo phambi kwakho ngayo.”" 
Acts23:31 Nje-ke amajoni njengokuyalwa kwawo, athatha uPowula ebusuku amusa e-Antipatrisi." 
Acts23:32 Ngelanga elilandelako abakhweli beenjomani baragela phambili naye, amanye amajoni abuyela emuva ekampeni yamajoni." 
Acts23:33 Kuthe nabafika eKhesariya, banikela umbusi incwadi, bethula noPowula phambi kwakhe." 
Acts23:34 Umbusi wafunda incwadi, wabuza uPowula bona ubuya kisiphi isifunda. Kuthe bonyana afumane bona uvela eSilisiya," 
Acts23:35 wathi kuye: “Ngizokulalela indabakho nasele kufike abamangaleli bakho.” Yeke wayala bona aqalwe esigodlweni sakaHerode. 
Acts24:1 Ngemva kwamalanga amahlanu umphristi omkhulu u-Ananiyasi wehla weza nabaphathi negqwetha uTertulusi, bafese bendlala indababo ngoPowula phambi kombusi uFeliksi." 
Acts24:2 Kuthe bona uPowula abizwe, uTertulusi wathoma ukumbeka icala wathi: “Sibe nokuthula isikhathi eside ngawe begodu ukuthuthuka kube kunengi esizwenesi ngebanga lokuhlakanipha kwakho." 
Acts24:3 Lokho-ke, Feliksi odumileko, sikwamukela ngeendlela zoke endaweni zoke begodu siyathokoza." 
Acts24:4 Angifuni ukuba siqedamlozi, yeke, ngibawa ngobuntu bakho ukhe usilalele kafitjhani." 
Acts24:5 Indoda le siyifumane imumuntu oyipehli nebanga ukuhlubuka phakathi kwamaJuda ephasini loke, begodu imrholi wesiqhema ekuthiwa maNazaretha." 
Acts24:6 Yalinga ngitjho nokusilaphaza ithempeli, nje-ke sayibopha." 
Acts24:7 Kodwana kwafika induna uLisiya yayidzwebula ngamandla ezandleni zethu," 
Acts24:8 yabe yayala bona beze nayo kuwe kobana nawe ngokwakho uzoyihlola ngalokho esiyimangalele ngakho.” 
Acts24:9 AmaJuda nawo akufakazela lokho ngokugandelela bona koke kunjalo. 
Acts24:10 Kwathi uPowula sele akhonjwe mbusi bona akhulume, waphendula wathi: “Ngebanga lokobana ngiyazi bona sekuminyaka eminengi umgwebi esizwenesi ngalokho ngiziphendulela ngithabile." 
Acts24:11 Njengombana nawe ungazibonela nje, akukapheli ngitjho amalanga alitjhumi nambili ngikhuphukele eJerusalema kobana ngiyokuthandaza." 
Acts24:12 Akhange bangifumane ngiphikisana namunye ngethempelini namkha ngidunga abantu ngesinagogini namkha kukuphi edorobheni. 
Acts24:13 Begodu angekhe bakulethela ubufakazi bezinto abangithwesa umlandu ngazo njenganje. 
Acts24:14 Kodwana nakhu engikuvumako kuwe kobana ngesaba uZimu wabokhokho bami ngokulandela iNdlela leyo abathi kuqhema, godu ngiyakholwa kizo zoke izinto ezitlolwe emthethweni neencwadini zabaphorofidi." 
Acts24:15 Nginalo ithemba kuZimu, iye, ithemba nabo abalamukelako lokobana kuzakuba khona ukuvuka kwabafileko kwabo boke abalungileko nabangakalungi." 
Acts24:16 Yeke ngalinga ngamandlami woke bona ngibe nomkhumbulo otsengileko phambi koZimu nabantu. 
Acts24:17 “Nje-ke emva kweminyaka embalwa ngeza bona ngilethe izipho ebantwini bekhethu nokobana ngizokwenza imihlabelo. 
Acts24:18 Bengihlambulukile ngihlobile ngesikhathi bangifumana ngingetempeleni ngenza lokhu. Bekungekho isiqubuthu sabantu kimi kungekho nokuvungama. 
Acts24:19 Kodwana bekukhona amaJuda wesifundeni se-Asiya, wona-ke gade afanele abe khona azongithwesa umlandu phambi kwakho, nakube kukhona abanakho ngami." 
Acts24:20 Namkha bona laba, abakhulume bonyana ngiwuphi umlandu abawufumana kimi lokha nabe ngijame phambi kwesigungu sababarholi bamaJuda;" 
Acts24:21 ngaphandle kwento eyodwa engiyitjhwileko nangijame phambi kwabo ngathi, ‘Namhlanje ngimangalelwe ngendaba yokuvuka kwabafileko.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Nje-ke uFeliksi owakhe watjelwa kuhle ngeNdlela le, waqeda ikulumo le ngokuphawula wathi: “Ngizakuba nequnto lendaba le lokha induna uLisiya nasele yehlile yafika.”" 
Acts24:23 Wayala umphathimabutho bona amlonde ngesikhungweni, kodwana amvumele athukuluke angakhandeli nabangani bakhe bona bamnikele itjhejo alifunako." 
Acts24:24 Ngemva kwamalanga uFeliksi weza nomkakhe uDrusila obegade amJuda. Wabiza uPowula wamlalela lokha nakhuluma ngokukholwa kuKrestu Jesu. 
Acts24:25 UPowula asakhuluma ngokulunga, ukuzibamba nokuza kwelanga lokugwetjwa, uFeliksi wafikelwa kukwesaba wathi: “Okwanje ungakhamba, ngizakubiza godu nanginesikhathi.”" 
Acts24:26 Khonapho bekanethemba bona uPowula uzamfumbathisa. Ngesizathwesi bekanande ambiza bona akhulume naye. 
Acts24:27 Sekudlule iminyaka emibili, uPorkiyusi Festusi wangena esikhundleni sakaFeliksi njengombusi. Ngebanga lokobana uFeliksi afuna ukuthabisa amaJuda, walisa uPowula ngesikhungweni." 
Acts25:1 Amalanga amathathu emva kobana uFestusi afike esifundeni, wakhuphuka asuka eKhesariya waya eJerusalema," 
Acts25:2 lapha abaphristi abakhulu nabarholi bamaJuda bathwesa khona uPowula umlandu. Bancenga 
Acts25:3 uFestusi ngokuzibawela umusa bona uPowula alethwe eJerusalema. Bakwenza lokho ngokujamelene noPowula ngombana bebanobukhwebetjhana bokumlalela endleleni bambulale. 
Acts25:4 UFestusi wabaphendula ngokuthi uPowula sibotjhwa esilondwe eKhesariya, nokuthi msinyana nje yena ngokwakhe usophe ukuya lapho." 
Acts25:5 Wathi: “Nje-ke, akuthi labo abanegunya phakathi kwenu behle nami, begodu nakube kukhona okuyisolo ngendoda leyo, abayithwese umlandu.”" 
Acts25:6 Sele ahlezi nabo amalanga abunane ukuya kalitjhumi, wabuyela eKhesariya. Ngelanga elilandelako wahlala esihlalweni sokugweba, wayala bona uPowula alethwe." 
Acts25:7 Kwathi bona uPowula afike, amaJuda avela eJerusalema amzomba athoma ukumrhwayela ngemilandu ebudisi angeze aba nobufakazi ngayo." 
Acts25:8 Kodwana uPowula wazivikela, wathi: “Angikenzi ilitho elimbi malungana nomthetho wamaJuda nethempeli namkha kumbusi omkhulu.”" 
Acts25:9 Kodwana uFestusi afuna ukuthabisa amaJuda, wabuza uPowula wathi: “Uzakuthanda ukukhuphukela eJerusalema bona uyokugwetjwa khona phambi kwami ngemilandu othweswe yona le na?”" 
Acts25:10 UPowula wathi: “Ngijame phambi kwebandla lombusi omkhulu, lapha kufuze ngigwetjwe khona. Angikenzi ilitho elimbi emaJudeni, njengombana nawe usazi kuhle." 
Acts25:10 UPowula wathi: “Ngijame phambi kwebandla lombusi omkhulu, lapha kufuze ngigwetjwe khona. Angikenzi ilitho elimbi emaJudeni, njengombana nawe usazi kuhle." 
Acts25:11 Nangabe ngonile ngenza okumbi okungabangela bona ngigwetjelwe ukufa, angizami ukuphepha ukufa; kodwana nangabe akunalitho emilandwini abangibeka yona, akakho ongangibuyisela kibo. Ngidlulisela umlandu kumbusi omkhulu.”" 
Acts25:12 Kuthe bona uFestusi avunge nabaluleki bakhe, waphendula wathi: “Udlulisele umlandu kumbusi omkhulu, yeke uzokuya kumbusi omkhulu.”" 
Acts25:13 Ngemva kwesikhathi ikosi u-Agripa noBherinike beza eKhesariya bazokwamukela uFestusi. 
Acts25:14 Njengombana bebanamalangana bahlezi lapho, uFestusi wabendlalela indaba kaPowula, wathi: “Kukhona lapha umuntu owatjhiywa nguFeliksi asibotjhwa." 
Acts25:15 Kwathi lokha ngiye eJerusalema, abaphristi abakhulu nabaphathi bamaJuda bamthwesa umlandu, bangibawa bona ngimbone umlandu." 
Acts25:16 Kodwana ngabatjela bona akusiwo umkhuba wamaRoma ukubona umuntu umlandu angazange akhe abonane ubuso nobuso nabamangaleli bakhe, aphiwe nethuba lokuziphendulela ngomlandu abamthwese wona." 
Acts25:17 Kuthe bona bahlangane lapha, akhange bengisariyada. Ngelanga elilandelako ngahlala endawenami yokugweba ngathi bamngenise." 
Acts25:18 Abamthwesa umlandu nabasikimako, akhange bamthwese umlandu loyo ebengilindele bona bazamthwesa wona." 
Acts25:19 Koke abakubekako kuphikisana naye ngokukholwa kwabo nangomuntu okuthiwa nguJesu, owafako, uPowula akhuluma ngaye bona uyaphila." 
Acts25:20 Kuthe ngisararekile bona indaba le ngingayiphenyisisa njani, ngambuza bona angathanda ukuya eJerusalema kobana ayokugwetjwa lapho ngalokho athweswe khona na." 
Acts25:21 Kodwana kuthe lokha uPowula abawa bona alondwe ngesikhungweni bekube kulokha umbusi omkhulu aqunta khona, ngayala bona ahlale aqaliwe bengimthumele kumbusi omkhulu loyo.”" 
Acts25:22 U-Agripa wathi kuFestusi: “Indoda leyo ngifuna ukuyizwa ngokwami.” UFestusi wathi: “Uzayizwa kusasa.” 
Acts25:23 Nje-ke ngelanga elilandelako u-Agripa noBherinike bafika ngevunulo yakanokutjho. Bangena ngerhubheni neenduna zamajoni kanye namadoda adumileko wedorobho. Nje-ke uFestusi wayala bona uPowula angeniswe. 
Acts25:24 UFestusi wathi: “Ngwenyama Agripa nani noke enilapha nathi, niyayibona indoda le, woke umphakathi wamaJuda uyimangalele kimi eJerusalema nalapha, urhuwelela bona ayikafaneli ukube isaphila." 
Acts25:25 Kodwana ngifunyene bona ayikenzi ilitho elifanele bona ife; kuthe lokha nayidlulisela umlandu kumbusi omkhulu, ngahlosa bona ngiyithumele." 
Acts25:26 Kodwana anginalitho elidarhileko ngayo engingatlolela umbusi omkhulu ngalo. Yeke ngiyilethe phambi kwenu noke, khulukhulu phambi kwakho Ngwenyama Agripa! Khona kuzakuthi ngemva kokuyihlola, kube nento engingayitlola ngayo" 
Acts25:27 ngombana ngibona kwanga kukutlhoga umkhumbulo kimi ukuthumela isibotjhwa ngingakuphawuli lokho esimangalelwe ngakho.” 
Acts26:1 U-Agripa wathi kuPowula: “Unalo ilungelo lokuzikhulumela.” UPowula waphakamisa isandla sakhe wathoma ukuzivikela wathi: 
Acts26:2 “Kosi Agripa! Namhlanjesi ngizithatha njengomuntu onetjhudu bona ngibe nokuzivikela phambi kwakho ngazo zoke izinto amaJuda angithwesa umlandu ngazo," 
Acts26:3 khulukhulu ngombana wazi woke amasiko wamaJuda neempikiswano zawo. Yeke ngiyakubawa, bona ungilalele ngesineke." 
Acts26:4 “Woke amaJuda ayayazi ipilwami kusukela ngisemncani; iye, ipilo engayiphila kusukela ekuthomeni hlangana nabantu bekhethu nangeJerusalema." 
Acts26:5 Sekusikhathi eside bangazi begodu nabafuna ukufakaza bangatjho bona bengiphila njengelunga lesiqhema esiqinileko ekolweni yekhethu, ngiphila njengomFarisi." 
Acts26:6 Alo-ke manjesi ngijame lapha bona ngigwetjwe ngebanga lethemba lesithembiso uZimu asenza kibokhokho; 
Acts26:7 iye, isithembiso izizwe zekhethu ezilitjhumi nambili ebezithemba ukusifikelela, njengombana zilotjha imini nobusuku. Kungalo ithembeli, wena ohloniphekileko, ngimangalelwe maJuda!" 
Acts26:8 Alo, kubangelwa yini bona nanyana ngubani wenu afunyane kulikhuni ukukholwa ukuthi uZimu uyabavusa abafileko na?" 
Acts26:9 “Nami ngokwami ngikholisekile bona bekufanele ngenze okunengi okuphambene nebizo lakaJesu weNazaretha. 
Acts26:10 Kwakhona ngikho lokho engakwenza eJerusalema. Ngemvumo engayamukela ivela ebaphristini abakhulu ngaphosela abacwengileko abanengi ngesikhungweni. Kwathi nalokha agwetjwa intambo, nami ngakusekele lokho." 
Acts26:11 Ngeenkhathi ezinengi ngibahlunguphazele ngemasinagogini, ngilinga ukubakatelela bona bahlambalaze. Bengifutheke khulu ngabo kangangobana bengibalandelela nakwamanye amadorobho wabatjhili." 
Acts26:12 “Ngiso isizathweso esangenza bona ngiye eDamaseku ngegunya elivela ebaphristini abakhulu. 
Acts26:13 Kwathi emini ekulu ngisesendleleni, wena ohloniphekileko, ngabona umkhanyo omkhulu kunelanga uphazima, wangizombeleza nalabo ebengikhamba nabo." 
Acts26:14 Soke sawela phasi, ngezwa ilizwi lisithi kimi ngesiHebheru, ‘Sawula, Sawula, ungizumelani na? Kunzima kuwe ukurarha itlobo yesitlhorholojakomo.’" 
Acts26:15 Ngabuza ngathi: ‘Ungubani, wena Kosi na?’ IKosi yathi: ‘NginguJesu, ozumana naye." 
Acts26:16 Nje-ke, sikima ujame ngeenyawo zakho. Ngibonakele kuwe ngebanga lokobana ngizokukhetha ube sisebenzi nofakazi ngezinto ozibonileko ngami nangalokho engizakutjengisa khona." 
Acts26:17 Ngizokuphephisa ebantwini bekhenu nakwabatjhili engikuthumela kibo 
Acts26:18 bona uvule amehlwabo khona bazakusuka ebumnyameni beze ekukhanyeni; basuke emandleni kaSathana beze kuZimu ukuze bamukele ukulitjalelwa kwezono, babe nesabelo phakathi kwabacwengisiweko ngokukholwa.’" 
Acts26:19 “Ngalokho, kosi Agripa, akhange ngibe lihlongandlebe ngombono ovela ezulwini." 
Acts26:20 Kodwana ngathoma ukumemezela kabaseDamaseku, kwaba seJerusalema nakiyo inarha yeJudiya ngitjho nakwabatjhili bonyana baphenduke ezonweni babuyele kuZimu, benze imisebenzi ekhambisana nokuphenduka." 
Acts26:21 Kungebangelo amaJuda angidzwebule ngethempelini alinge ukungibulala. 
Acts26:22 Kodwana uZimu ungisize bekwaba kunamhlanjesi, kungakho ngijame lapha ngifakaza kabancani nakabakhulu. Angikhulumi okhunye ngaphandle kwalokho abaphorofidi noMosi abakutjhwileko bona kuzokwenzeka:" 
Acts26:23 UKrestu kufuze ahlupheke, nokuthi njengombana angewokuthoma ukuvuka kabafileko, uzakumemezela ukukhanya ebantwini bekhethu nakabatjhili.”" 
Acts26:24 Kuthe uPowula asazivikela njalo, uFestusi wamrhuwelela wathi: “Powula, uyahlanya na! Ukufunda khulu kuyakuhlanyisa!”" 
Acts26:25 UPowula waphendula wathi: “Angihlanyi, mhlonipheki Festusi, kodwana ngikhuluma iqiniso ngokuzizwisisa!" 
Acts26:26 Eqinisweni ikosi u-Agripa iyazi ngeendabezi, kiyo ngikhuluma ngesibindi, ngokwazi bonyana ayikho neyodwa yezintwezi engizizwako kiyo ngombana izintwezi akhange zenzeke emsithelweni." 
Acts26:27 Kosi Agripa, uyabakholwa abaphorofidi na? Ngiyazi bona uyabakholwa!”" 
Acts26:28 U-Agripa wathi kuPowula: “Ucabanga bona msinyana kangaka ungangiphendula umKrestu na?” 
Acts26:29 UPowula wamphendula wathi: “Namkha kumsinyana nanyana kungasinjalo, ngithandaza kuZimu bonyana kungabi nguwe wedwa, kodwana nabo boke abalaleleko namhlanje, sengathi bangaba ngilokhu engingikho, ngaphandle kweenketanezi!”" 
Acts26:30 Yeke ikosi yasikima nombusi noBherinike kanye nabo boke ebebahlezi nayo. 
Acts26:31 Kuthe bona basuke lapho bathi komunye nomunye: “Umuntu lo akakenzi ilitho bona angabe abulawe namkha afakwe ngesikhungweni.” 
Acts26:32 Nje-ke u-Agripa wathi kuFestusi: “Umuntu lo ngawuthukululwe ingathana umlandwakhe akhange awudlulisele kumbusi omkhulu.” 
Acts27:1 Kwathi bonyana kuquntwe bona kufuze sithayele eTariyana, basa uPowula nezinye iimbotjhwa kuJuliyasi umphathimabutho wombusi." 
Acts27:2 Sakhwela umkhumbi we-Adramitheno, ogade sewulungele ukusuka uye eligwini lelwandle e-Asiya, sathaya sakhamba siphekelelwa ngu-Aristarirhusi weMasedoniya ovela eThesalonika." 
Acts27:3 Ngelanga elilandelako safika eTsidoni; uJuliyasi waphatha uPowula kuhle, wamvumela bona ayokubona abangani bakhe, bamnikela lokho akufunako." 
Acts27:4 Sasuka lapho, sathayela ngehlangothini elivikeliweko leSayipurasi ngombana ummoya gade uphambene nathi." 
Acts27:5 Sadlulela elwandle eligudle indawo yeSilisiya nePhamfiliya, safika eMira ngeLisiya." 
Acts27:6 Lapho-ke umphathimabutho wafumana umkhumbi ovela e-Alekzandriya usiya eTariyana, wasikhweza kiwo." 
Acts27:7 Sathaya kancani amalanga amanengi ngobudisi obukhulu ukufika malungana neKinidu. Ummoya gade uphambene nathi; yeke, sathayela ngehlangothini elivikeliweko lesihlengeleni seKrete malungana neSalimone." 
Acts27:8 Sadlula lapho ngobudisi obukhulu besafika endaweni ekuthiwa siTjhaphululo esiHle eduze nedorobho leLaseya. 
Acts27:9 Njengombana besele kulahleke isikhathi esinengi nokuthaya bese kuyingozi ngombana nesikhathi sokuzila ukudla besele siphelile, uPowula wabayelelisa" 
Acts27:10 wathi: “Madoda, ngiyabona ikhambo lethu lizokuba nengozi nomonakalo omkhulu, kungabi ngowepahla nomkhumbi kwaphela kodwana nepilwethu isengozini.”" 
Acts27:11 Kodwana umphathimabutho walalela umpathimkhumbi nomninimkhumbi kunokulalela lokho okutjhiwo nguPowula. 
Acts27:12 Njengombana iligu bekungasiyo indawo elungele ukuhlala ebusika, inengi labona kungcono ukusuka lapho liye elwandle, lilinge ukufika eFinikisi, kuhlalwe khona ubusika boke. Leli bekuliligu leKrete eliqale esewula-tjingalanga netlhagu-tjingalanga." 
Acts27:13 Kwathi isewula isathoma ukuphephetha kuhle, badlumbana bona bangafikelela ibanga labo; yeke bakhuphula i-ankera bathoma ukuthayela eduze neligu leKrete." 
Acts27:14 Kodwana khonokho kwavunguza ummoya ovela ngetlhagwini-pumalanga ebekuthiwa yi-Ewurakiloni, waphephetha wehla ukusukela enarheni." 
Acts27:15 Ummoya wadudula umkhumbi wangasakghona ukujika uqalane nawo, yeke sawulisa bona usunduzwe mumoya." 
Acts27:16 Sesibalekele endaweni evikelekileko yesihlengele esincani ekuthiwa yiKhawuda, saphumelela kanzima ukulawula umkhunjana wokusindisa." 
Acts27:17 Sele bawukhwezile bathatha iintambo bawubophelela emkhunjini, besaba bona bangahle baphephukele emgwedlweni wetjhwabatjhwaba yeSiritisi; ngalokho behlisa iinlawulamkhumbi; umkhumbi wasunduzwa mumoya." 
Acts27:18 Isivunguvungu sawunawunana nathi, kwathi ngakusasa balahlela intundu yomkhumbi ngemanzini." 
Acts27:19 Ngelanga lesithathu balahla ngezandla zabo izinto ezisetjenziswa ngemkhunjini. 
Acts27:20 Kuthe lokha nasele kuphele amalanga amanengi, ilanga neenkwekwezi kungasabonakali, nommoya udlangile ngokuvunguza, salahlekelwa ngilo loke ithemba lokusinda." 
Acts27:21 Ngemva kobana amadoda ahlezi isikhathi eside anganakudla, uPowula wajama phakathi kwawo wathi: “Madoda, ngathana ningilalele sangasuka eKrete, ngabe niwuphephile woke umonakalo lo nokulahlekelwa okungaka." 
Acts27:22 Nje-ke ngibawa bona niqine idolo ngombana akakho noyedwa wenu ozakulahlekelwa yipilo; mkhumbi kwaphela ozakonakala. 
Acts27:23 Ebusuku bayizolo kuze ingilozi kaZimu engingowakhe nengimlotjhako yajama ngakimi," 
Acts27:24 yathi, ‘Ungesabi, Powula ngombana kufanele ujame phambi kombusi omkhulu; begodu qala, uZimu ukuphephisele boke othaya nabo.’" 
Acts27:25 Yeke madoda, qinani idolo ngombana ngikholwa kuZimu bona kuzakuba njengombana ngitjeliwe." 
Acts27:26 Kodwana sizakuphetjhulelwa kesinye isihlengele.” 
Acts27:27 Ngobusuku belanga letjhumi nane, sisaphetjhulwa mumoya ekweyameni ilwandle le-Adriya, pheze phakathi kobusuku, abathayi badlumbana bona sesitjhidele esebeni." 
Acts27:28 Nje-ke baphosa intambo yokulinganisa ukutjhinga, bafumana bona kumamitha amatjhumi amathathu nekhomba ngemva kokuthuthuka kancani babuyelela godu baphosa, bafumana kumamitha amatjhumi amabili nekhomba." 
Acts27:29 Ngokubethwa livalo bona umkhumbi ungahle utjhinge ngemadwaleni, behlisa ama-ankera amane ngemva komkhumbi bathandaza bona kuse." 
Acts27:30 Kwathi lokha abathayi nabalinga ukweqa ngemkhunjini, sele behlise umkhunjana ngelwandle batjhaya sengathi bayokubeka ama-ankerabo ngaphambi komkhumbi." 
Acts27:31 Nje-ke uPowula wathi emphathimabuthweni nemajonini: “Nangabe abathayi laba abahlali ngemkhunjini, angekhe nakwazi ukusinda.”" 
Acts27:32 Ngalokho amajoni aquntula iintambo ezibophe umkhunjana, bawulisa wawela ngemanzini." 
Acts27:33 Ngaphambi kobana kuse, uPowula wabakhuthaza boke bona bagome, asithi: “Namhlanje sekulilanga letjhumi nane nilindile, nizilile ningagomi ilitho." 
Acts27:34 Ngalokho ngiyanibawa bona nikhe nigome ilitjhwana; lokho kuzanisiza nifunyane amandla ngombana akukho namunye wenu ozakuncuthuka isihluthu sinye ehloko.” 
Acts27:35 Bona aqede ukutjho lokho, wathatha isikwa wathokoza kuZimu phambi kwabo boke, wasihlephula wathoma ukugoma." 
Acts27:36 Nje-ke boke bakhuthazeka bagoma nabo. 
Acts27:37 Sesisoke ngemkhunjini besimakhulu amabili namatjhumi alikhomba nesithandathu. 
Acts27:38 Sele bagomile basutha, benza umkhumbi bona ube lula ngokulahlela ikoroyi ngelwandle." 
Acts27:39 Kuthe bona kuse, akhange babone isebe, kodwana babona iligu elinetjhwabatjhwaba, bahlela bona bakhuphele umkhumbi khona nabe bekungakghonakala." 
Acts27:40 Yeke baquntula iintambo ezibambe ama-ankera, bawatjhiya ngemanzini. Kwathi khonokho batjhaphulula neentambo ebegade zibambe amaphini amabili amakhulu ebebanqophisa ngawo umkhumbi. Baphakamisa iseyila elikhulu eliphambili emkhunjini, baya eligwini." 
Acts27:41 Kodwana umkhumbi wabetha phezu komqoqo wetjhwabatjhwaba wabhajwa ngemanzini; ipumulo yomkhumbi yabambeka yabhalelwa kutjhida, isidunu sona saphulwa mamaza saba ziinquqwana." 
Acts27:42 Amajoni aluka iqhinga lokubulala zoke iimbotjhwa, khona zingazukghona ukududa zibaleke." 
Acts27:43 Kodwana ngokufisa ukusindisa uPowula, umphathimabutho wawakhalimela bona angakwenzi lokho. Wayala woke amadoda akghona ukududa bona eqe qangi adudele eligwini." 
Acts27:44 Aseleko bekazokulandela, abambelele phezu kwamapulanka nanyana phezu kwezinye iinqezwana eziphukileko emkhunjini. Ngendlela le, woke afika eligwini aphephile." 
Acts28:1 Emva kobana sisindile, sezwa bona isihlengelo besibizwa bona yiMalta." 
Acts28:2 Abantu balapho basibonisa isisa esingakavami. Njengombana besele lizokuna begodu kumakhaza, baphemba umlilo basihlalisa khona." 
Acts28:3 UPowula wabuthelela iinkuni, kwathi lokha nakazibeka phezu komlilo, kwaphuma inyoka ngebanga lokutjhisa, yanamathela esandleni sakhe." 
Acts28:4 Kwathi lokha abantu balapho nababona inyoka ilembelele esandleni sakaPowula bathi omunye komunye: “Umuntu lo ufuze ukuba mbulali, kuthi nanyana asinde elwandle, uDike akakamvumeli bona aphile.”" 
Acts28:5 Kodwana yena wathintithela inyoka leyo ngemlilweni angakalimali ndawo. 
Acts28:6 Bebalindele bona uzavuvuka namkha aduleke phasi afe; kodwana ngemva kokulindela isikhathi eside angenzeki ilitho, batjhugulula imikhumbulwabo, bathi unguzimu." 
Acts28:7 Mlenzana nalapho bekukhona indawo yendoda emrholi wesihlengeleneso ekuthiwa nguPhubhliyusi. Yena wasamukela ngommoya omuhle, sahlala amalanga amathathu sibathekeli bakhe." 
Acts28:8 Uyise lakaPhubhliyusi gade alele agula aphethwe mgomani nendeni. UPowula waya kuye wathandaza, wambeka izandla wampholisa." 
Acts28:9 Kuthe bona kwenzeke lokho, boke abantu abagulako besihlengeleni beza bapholiswa." 
Acts28:10 Basihlonipha ngeendlela ezinengi bekwathi nasele sikhamba balayitjha koke ebegade sikuhlonga ekhambeni lethu. 
Acts28:11 Emva kweenyanga ezintathu sathaya ngomkhumbi owaqeda ubusika boke ngesihlengeleni; bewungowe-Alekzandriya, uneenthombe zabosingazimu uKastori noPoluksi epumulwenawo." 
Acts28:12 Safika eSirakusa, sahlala lapho amalanga amathathu." 
Acts28:13 Sesizombelezile isihlengele safika eRegiyoni, kwathi emva kwelanga linye silapho, kwaphephetha isewula, ngelanga lesibili safika ePhothiyoli." 
Acts28:14 Safumana abanye abazalwana lapho, basibawa bona sihlale nabo amalanga alikhomba. Yeke saya eRoma." 
Acts28:15 Abazalwana beRoma sele bezwile ngathi, beza bazosihlangabeza. Abanye beza ngendlela ekuthiwa yi-Apiyusi ukufikela eForumi Apiyi kwathi abanye bafika ekumbeni yeenkhambi ebekuthiwa yiTiresi Taverinoni Kuthe bona uPowula ababone, wathokoza uZimu bewaqina idolo." 
Acts28:16 Kuthe bona sifike eRoma, uPowula wavunyelwa bona ahlale yedwa nejoni elimqalileko." 
Acts28:17 Ngemva kwamalanga amathathu uPowula wabiza abarholi bamaJuda wendawo bona bahlangane. Kwathi bona bahlangane, wathi kibo: “Bafowethu! Nanyana ngingakenzi ilitho elimbi ebantwini bekhethu nemasikweni esawafumana kibobamkhulu, ngabotjhwa ngeJerusalema, nganikelwa emaRomeni." 
Acts28:18 Wona sele angihlolile, afuna ukungithukulula ngombana belingekho ibanga lokobana ngingabeze ngibulawe." 
Acts28:19 Kodwana kuthe bona amaJuda akuphikise lokhu, ngakateleleka bona ngidlulisele indaba kumbusi omkhulu, nanyana bekungekho umlandu engingawuthwesa abantu bekhethu." 
Acts28:20 Kungebangeli ngibawe ukubonana nani, ngikhulumisane nani. Mbala, ngebanga lethemba laka-Israyeli ngibotjhwe ngeenketanezi.”" 
Acts28:21 Bona bathi kuye: “Azange sifumane incwadi evela eJudiya ekhuluma ngawe namkha kufike omunye wabafowethu nombiko nanyana kukhulunywe okuthileko okumbi ngawe. 
Acts28:22 Kodwana sifuna ukuzwa amazizo wakho ngombana siyazi bona koke nje, isiqhemesi sikhulunywa kumbi.”" 
Acts28:23 Kwathi sebabekelene naye ilanga, bafika lapha ahlala khona babanengi kwamambala. Kusukela ekuseni bekwaba sebusuku, wabahlathululela bewabafakazela ngombuso kaZimu, alinga ukubabonisa ngoJesu ngokudzubhula emthethweni wakaMosi nemitlolweni yabaphorofidi." 
Acts28:24 Abanye babo bathatheka ngamezwakhe, abanye akhange bafune ukukholwa." 
Acts28:25 Nje-ke baphikisana babodwa, kodwana bathoma ukukhamba ngemva kobana uPowula athe: “UMoya oCwengileko bekaqinisile nakakhuluma kibokhokho benu ngomphorofidi u-Isaya asithi," 
Acts28:26 ‘Khamba uye esizwenesi ufese uthi: “ ‘Nizokuzwa kodwana ningazwisisi; nizokubona kodwana ningatjheji. 
Acts28:27 Iye, iinhliziyo zabantwaba zibuthuntu neendlebe zabo azizwa, bavale namehlwabo. Nakungasinjalo bazakubona ngamehlwabo, bezwe ngeendlebe zabo, balemuke ngeenhliziyo zabo bebaphenduke bese ngiyabaphilisa.’" 
Acts28:28 “Nje-ke akwazeke kini bonyana isindiso kaZimu le ithunyelwe kabatjhili; bona bazakuzwa.” 
Acts28:29 Ngemva kobana uPowula atjho lokhu, amaJuda akhamba aphikisana wodwa kabuhlungu." 
Acts28:30 Iminyaka emibili yoke swana, wahlala endlini ayiqatjhileko, amukela boke abazombona;" 
Acts28:31 amemezela umbuso kaZimu, afundisa ngeKosi uJesu Krestu begodu akhuluma ngesibindi kungekho okumthiyako." 
Romans1:1 Incwadi le ivela kimi mina Powula, inceku kaKrestu Jesu, owabizelwa ekubeni mpostoli, wahlukaniselwa ivangeli lakaZimu." 
Romans1:2 Ivangeli lelo walethembisa ngaphambilini ngabaphorofidi bakhe emitlolweni ecwengileko. 
Romans1:3 Iye, ivangeli elimayelana neNdodanakhe eyaba sizukulwana sakaDavida ngokwenyama," 
Romans1:4 begodu yatjhunyayelwa ngamandla bona iyiNdodana kaZimu ukuya ngokoMoya wobucwenga ngokuvuswa kwayo ekufeni: uJesu Krestu iKosethu," 
Romans1:5 esamukela ngaye isisa nobupostoli ukuletha ukulalela ukukholwa hlangana nabatjhili ngebanga lebizo lakhe," 
Romans1:6 ngitjho nani ngokwenu enibizelwe kobana nibe ngebakaJesu Krestu. 
Romans1:7 Kibo boke abathandekako kuZimu abaseRoma, ababizelwe ekubeni ngabacwengileko: Akube kini umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba wethu neKosini uJesu Krestu." 
Romans1:8 Kokuthoma, ngithokoza uZimami ngoJesu Krestu ngani noke ngombana ukukholwa kwenu kutjhunyayelwa ephasini loke." 
Romans1:9 UZimu engimlotjha ngommoyami nengitjhumayela ivangeli leNdodanakhe, ungufakazami bonyana ngihlala nginikhumbula njalo emthandazwenami," 
Romans1:10 ngibawa bonyana entandwenakhe uZimu, ngigcine ngiphumelele ukuza kini." 
Romans1:11 Ngihlulukela ukunibona ukuze ngabelane nani ezinye zezipho zakaMoya, nginiqinise," 
Romans1:12 namkha sikhuthazaneni ekukholweni kwethu, iye ekukholweni kwenu nekukholweni kwami." 
Romans1:13 Angithandi bazalwana bona ningabi nelwazi lokobana bengifuna kangangani ukuza kini (kodwana bengiseze ngiqabelwa ukwenza njalo bekube nje) ukuze ngizuze isivuno phakathi kwenu njengombana ngenzile phakathi kwabo boke abatjhili. 
Romans1:14 Nginesibopho kumaGirigi nakabatjhili, kabahlakaniphileko nabanganalwazi," 
Romans1:15 ngikho ngitjhisekela ukutjhumayela ivangeli nakini eniseRoma. 
Romans1:16 Nje-ke anginanhloni ngevangeli ngombana limamandla kaZimu wokusindisa boke abakholwako, ukuthoma ngamaJuda namaGirigi." 
Romans1:17 Kilo kwembulwa ukulunga kwakaZimu ngokukholwa namayelana nokukholwa, njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Olungileko uzakuphila ngokukholwa.”" 
Romans1:18 Ubukhali bakaZimu bubonakala buvela ezulwini, behlela phezu kwakho koke okungakhambisani noZimu kanye nobukhohlakali balabo abavimba iqiniso ngokonakala kwabo." 
Romans1:19 Okwazekako ngoZimu kuyakhanya kibo ngombana uZimu ubavezele khona. 
Romans1:20 Soloko kwangesikhathi sokudalwa kwephasi, amandlakhe angapheliko kanye nemvelo yakhe yobuZimu, nanyana ingabonakali ngokwayo, phezu kobana ikhona, beyiseze izwisiswa begodu ibonwa ezintweni azidalileko. Ngalokho-ke abantu abanabo ubusithelo," 
Romans1:21 ngombana nanyana bebaseze bamazi uZimu, azange bebamhloniphe namkha bamthokoze, kodwana babe nemikhumbulo engatjho ilitho, neengqondo zabo ezingazisiko zafiphala." 
Romans1:22 Bazitjela bona bahlakaniphile, ngalokho baba ziindlhayela." 
Romans1:23 Banana iphazimulo kaZimu ongabhubhiko ngemifanekiso emfuziselo wabatu ababhubhako namkha yeenyoni namkha yeenlwana ezinemilenze emine namkha yeenrhurhubi. 
Romans1:24 Nje-ke uZimu wabanikela eenkanukweni zeenhliziyo zabo, emanyaleni nekuhlazisaneni ngemizimbabo" 
Romans1:25 ngombana banana iqiniso ngoZimu kobana bazuze amala, balotjha bebasebenzela okudaliweko kunoMdali, okunguye okufanele adunyiswe ngokungapheliko. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Ngebangelo-ke, uZimu wabanikela ekutjhisakaleni okuhlazisako. Abafazi bakhona balisa indlela yemvelo yamabhayi bangena kokungasiyimvelo," 
Romans1:27 ngokunjalo namadoda wakhona alisa indlela yemvelo yokuya emabhayini nomfazi, afuthelana ngokukhanukana wona. Amadoda enza ubuhlola namanye amadoda, ngalokho azamukelisa ngokwawo isibetho esifanele ubuhlola bawo." 
Romans1:28 Njengombana abantwabo bangazange bakhathalele ukumazi uZimu, yeke uZimu wabanikela emikhumbulweni eyonakeleko nezintweni ekungakameli zenziwe." 
Romans1:29 Bebazele ngayo yoke imihlobo yobukhohlakali, ubumbi, ubumarhamaru nezondo. Bazele ngomona, ukubulala, ukuphikisana, ikohliso, ubuqili, ihlebo," 
Romans1:30 ubugongodi, ukuhloya uZimu, ukuthukana, ukuzikhakhazisa, ukuzazi, ukusungula ubumbi, ukungalaleli ababelethi," 
Romans1:31 iye, baziindlhadlha, abakholwa, abananhliziyo begodu bafe ivalo." 
Romans1:32 Bayasazi isimiso sakaZimu sokobana labo abenza izinto ezinjalo bafanelwa kukufa, khonapho abazenzi kwaphela, kodwana bakwakwazela nalabo abazenzako." 
Romans2:1 Yeke awunalo izaba, nanyana ungaba ngubani, wena ogweba abanye; nawugweba omunye umuntu uzilahla wena ngombana uthi ugweba abanye nje khibe nawe wenza yona into abayenzako leyo." 
Romans2:2 Siyazi bona isigwebo sakaZimu kilabo abenza izinto ezinjalo singokweqiniso. 
Romans2:3 Alo-ke wena, nanyana ungaba ngubani, udlumbana bona nawugweba labo abenza okunjalo khonapho khibe nawe uyakwenza lokho, uzakuphunyurha esigwebeni sakaZimu na?" 
Romans2:4 Kghani unyaza umusa omkhulu kaZimu nokunyamezela kwakhe okubanzi na? Awuboni bonyana uZimu unomusa ngombana uhlose bona utjhuguluke na? 
Romans2:5 Kodwana ngobulikhuni bakho nangehliziyo engatjhugulukiko, uzikghubelelela itukuthelo ngelanga lelaka elizako lokha ukugweba okulungileko kwakaZimu nakwembulwako." 
Romans2:6 Uzakuvuza omunye nomunye ngokwemisebenzakhe: 
Romans2:7 Labo abaphikelele njalo ukwenza okulungileko, barhuluphele iphazimulo nedumo nokungabhubhi; uzobapha ukuphila okungapheliko." 
Romans2:8 Kodwana labo abazifunela kwabo nabangalaleli iqiniso, balalela ukukhohlakala, bazokwehlelwa lilaka netukuthelo." 
Romans2:9 Kuzokuba khona isizi neenhlungu kibo boke abenza ubumbi; kuzokuthoma ngomJuda kulandele umGirigi," 
Romans2:10 kodwana kibo boke abenza okulungileko, kuzokuba khona iphazimulo, idumo nokuthula; kuthome ngomJuda kulandele umGirigi" 
Romans2:11 ngombana uZimu akakhethi ubuso. 
Romans2:12 Boke abone bangaphandle komthetho, bazokubhujiswa bangaphandle komthetho; nabo boke abone bangaphasi komthetho, bazokugwetjwa ngomthetho." 
Romans2:13 Yeke akusibo abezwa umthetho abangabalungileko phambi kwakaZimu, kodwana ngabenza okutjhiwo mthetho, labo-ke ngibo abazokulungisiswa." 
Romans2:14 Lokha abatjhili, abanganawo umthetho, nabaphetha okutjhiwo mthetho ngaphandle kokuyalwa, labo-ke, nanyana banganawo umthetho, bamthetho ngokwabo." 
Romans2:15 Bayakhombisa bonyana lokho okufunwa mthetho kutlolwe ngeenhliziyweni zabo, okufakazelwa ngunembeza wabo, nemikhumbulo yabo evuthako iyabalahla namkha ibahlambulule" 
Romans2:16 ngelanga, ukuya ngokwevangeli lami, mhlana uZimu azokugweba ngalo imicabango efihlakeleko yabo boke, ngoJesu Krestu." 
Romans2:17 Wena-ke ozibiza ngomJuda bese uthembela emthethweni bewuzigqaje ngokuba nobudlelwano noZimu," 
Romans2:18 wazi intandwakhe bewuqunte nokobana ngikuphi okulungileko ngombana wena ukhamba ngomthetho; 
Romans2:19 begodu unesiqiniseko sokobana umhlahli wesiphofu, umkhanyo walabo abasebumnyameni;" 
Romans2:20 umyali weendlhayela, umfundisi wabantwana, unalo loke ilwazi lomthetho neqiniso," 
Romans2:21 alo-ke, wena ofundisa abanye, kubayini ungazifundisi wena na? Utjhumayela ngokujamelana nokweba khibe ngapha wena uyeba na?" 
Romans2:22 Wena ojamelene nokuhlobonga, uyahlobonga na? Wena onyenya abosingazimu, udlelezelelani amathempeli?" 
Romans2:23 Wena ozigqaja ngomthetho, uhlubukelani uZimu ngokwephula umthetho na?" 
Romans2:24 Iye, kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ibizo lakaZimu liyahlanjalazwa phakathi kwabatjhili ngebanga lakho.”" 
Romans2:25 Ukusoka kunobubhadekelo nakube uphetha umthetho, kodwana nawephula umthetho, ukusoka kwakho semlunga ungakasoki." 
Romans2:26 Yeke nakube labo abangakasoki baphetha okufunwa mthetho, ukungasoki kwabo akuzukuthathwa njengokusoka na?" 
Romans2:27 Ngalokho-ke abangakasoki enyameni kodwana abaphetha umthetho bazonilahla nina eninomthetho otloliweko begodu ninokusokwa kodwana nibe nephula umthetho. 
Romans2:28 Umuntu akabi mJuda ngokubonakala ngaphandle, ngokunjalo nokusoka kwamambala akusikho okubonakalako nokwangaphandle." 
Romans2:29 Kodwana umuntu uba mJuda ngaphakathi, ngokunjalo nokusoka kwamambala ngokwehliziyo, kuyinto kaMoya, akusingokwenyama. Umuntu onjalo ufunyana idumo kuZimu, ingasi ebantwini." 
Romans3:1 Kusiza ngani ukuba mJuda namkha kuqakatheke ngani ukusoka na? 
Romans3:2 Kusiza khulu ngazo zoke iindlela. Kokuthoma amaJuda aphathiswe umlayezo kaZimu. 
Romans3:3 Alo, kwenzakalani nakube abanye azange bathembeke na? Ukungakholwa kwabo kuzakwenza bona ukwethembeka kwakaZimu kube lilize na?" 
Romans3:4 Nakanye! Nanyana woke umuntu amleyimala, uZimu yena uneqiniso njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ukuze uhlanjululwe emezwinakho, uhlule ekugwebeni kwakho.”" 
Romans3:5 Kodwana nangabe ukungalungi kwethu kubonakalisa ukulunga kwakaZimu, sizokuthini na? Sithi uZimu akakalungi nasihlunguphaza ngetukuthelo na? (Ngikhuluma ngendlela yabantu)." 
Romans3:6 Nakanye! Nabegade kunjalo, uZimu ubezaligweba njani iphasi na?" 
Romans3:7 Kodwana nakube ngamangami iqiniso lakaZimu landisa iphazimulwakhe, ngisabekelwani-ke umlandu wokuba sisoni na?" 
Romans3:8 Kungebanga lani-ke singathi: “Asenzeni okumbi ukuze kuvele okuhle” na? Iye, sitjho njalo njengombana abantu abathileko nabasithukako bathi sitjho njalo. Abantwabo, ukulahlwa kwabo kubafanele." 
Romans3:9 Alo-ke sizakuthini na? Sizakuthi singcono kunabanye na? Awa, nakanye, ngombana sele sibamangalele boke labo ngokuthi bangaphasi kwamandla wesono, okutjho umJuda nomGirigi," 
Romans3:10 njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Akakho olungileko, ngitjho noyedwa tere." 
Romans3:11 Akakho noyedwa olemukako, akakho noyedwa ofuna uZimu." 
Romans3:12 Boke baphambukile, baphenduke baba msuqwa ndawonye. Akakho okhombisa isisa, akakho ngitjho noyedwa tere." 
Romans3:13 Imiphimbo yabo imaliba avulekileko; basebenzisa amalimabo ukukhohlisa. Isihlungu seenyoka singaphasi kweembhena zabo. 
Romans3:14 Imilomo yabo izele ukwethukana nobumunyu. 
Romans3:15 Iinyawo zabo zimsinyana ekuthululeni iingazi. 
Romans3:16 Icucu nesizi kusendlelenabo," 
Romans3:17 indlela yokuthula abayazi. 
Romans3:18 Ukwesaba uZimu akukho emehlwenabo.” 
Romans3:19 Gadesi sele sisazi bona nanyana yini etjhiwo mthetho, imalungana nalabo abangaphasi komthetho ukuze yoke imilomo ithuliswe, nephasi loke libe nokuziphendulela kuZimu." 
Romans3:20 Akunamuntu ozakulungisiswa phambi kwakhe ngemisebenzi etjhiwo mthetho ngombana emthethweni kuvela ilwazi lesono. 
Romans3:21 Kodwana kwanjesi, ngaphandle komthetho, ukulunga kwakaZimu sele kwembuliwe, begodu kufakazelwa mthetho nabaphorofidi," 
Romans3:22 ukulunga kwakaZimu ngokukholwa kuJesu Krestu kibo boke abakholwako. Nje-ke akunamehluko," 
Romans3:23 ngombana boke bonile, batlhayelelwa yiphazimulo kaZimu." 
Romans3:24 Kodwana kwanjesi sele balungisiswa ngomusakhe njengesipho ngokuhlengwa okukuKrestu Jesu," 
Romans3:25 uZimu anikela ngaye njengomhlabelo wesono ngeengazi zakhe, ngokukholwa. Wakwenza lokho ukubonisa ukulunga kwakhe ngombana ngokubekezela kwakhe kobuZimu, azange abale izono ezenziwe phambilini." 
Romans3:26 Lokho bekukubonisa kilesikhathi bonyana yena ngokwakhe ulungile begodu ulungisisa loyo okholwa kuJesu. 
Romans3:27 Alo-ke kuphi ukuzigqaja na? Akubalwa nokubalwa. Ngamuphi umthetho na? Ngomthetho wemisebenzi? Awa, kodwana ngomthetho wokukholwa." 
Romans3:28 Thina esiyiphetheko ngethi umuntu ulungisiswa ngokukholwa ngaphandle kwemisebenzi etjhiwo mthetho. 
Romans3:29 Kghani uZimu lo nguZimu wamaJuda kwaphela na? Akasuye nowabatjhili na? Iye, nabatjhili unguZimabo," 
Romans3:30 ngombana uZimu munye; begodu uzokulungisisa abasokileko ngeenzathu zokukholwa nabangakasoki ngakho ukukholwa lokho. 
Romans3:31 Alo-ke, ingabe siyawulahla umthetho ngebanga lokukholwa lokhu na? Nakanye! Kodwana esikhundleni salokho siyawuhlonipha umthetho." 
Romans4:1 Alo, sizakuthi yini ezuzwe ngu-Abrahamu ukhokho wethu ngokwenyama na?" 
Romans4:2 Yeke nangabe u-Abrahamu walungisiswa ngemisebenzi, khona-ke unakho angazigqaja ngakho kodwana ingasi phambi kwakaZimu." 
Romans4:3 Umtlolo uthini na? Kanti awuthi: “U-Abrahamu wakholwa uZimu, nje-ke kwabalelwa kuye njengokulunga.”" 
Romans4:4 Nje-ke kiloyo osebenzako, umrholo awuthathwa njengesipho kodwana kuyinto eyifanelo yakhe." 
Romans4:5 Kodwana kiloyo othi ngaphandle kwemisebenzi athembele kiloyo olungisisa abangakalungi, ukukholwa okunjalo kubalelwa bona kukulunga." 
Romans4:6 Ngokunjalo uDavida ukhuluma ngokubusiseka kwalabo uZimu ababalele ukulunga ngaphandle kwemisebenzi wathi: 
Romans4:7 “Babusisiwe labo abalitjalelwe iimphambeko zabo, abazono zabo ziditjizesiwe." 
Romans4:8 Ubusisiwe loyo uSomnini angeze asambalela isono.” 
Romans4:9 Alo kghani isibusiswesi siphezu kwabasokileko kwaphela namkha naphezu kwabangakasoki na? Thina sithi: Ukukholwa kwabalelwa u-Abrahamu njengokulunga. 
Romans4:10 Alo-ke lokhu kwabalelwa njani kuye na? Bekungaphambi kobana asoke namkha ngemva kokusoka na? Bekungasi ngemva kokusoka kwakhe kodwana bekungaphambili. 
Romans4:11 Wamukela itshwayo lokusoka njengesigibo sokulunga abe nakho ngokukholwa lokha nangakabi ukusoka. Ihloso bekukumenza ukhokho wabo boke abakholwa ngaphandle kobana basokwe, ngalokho-ke kwabalelwa kibo ukulunga." 
Romans4:12 Yeke unguyise wabasokileko, iye, abangakasoki kwaphela kodwana ababuye balandele isibonelo sokukholwa ukhokho wethu u-Abrahamu aba nakho ngaphambi kobana asokwe." 
Romans4:13 Isithembiso sokobana uzokuzuza iphasi azange size ku-Abrahamu namkha eenzukulwaneni zakhe ngomthetho kodwana seza ngokulunga okuza ngokukholwa. 
Romans4:14 Nakube ngabanamathela emthethweni abazokuba ziindlalifa, khona-ke ukukholwa kulilize nesithembiso sidududu." 
Romans4:15 Umthetho ubanga itukuthelo, kodwana lapha kunganamthetho khona, nokweqa akukho." 
Romans4:16 Ngalokho-ke sekuya ngokukholwa ukuze isithembiso sinzinze emseni besiqinisekiswe kizo zoke iinzukulwana zakhe, ingasi kwaphela labo abanamathele emthethweni kodwana nakilabo abahlanganyela ukukholwa kwaka-Abrahamu (ngombana ungubaba wethu soke," 
Romans4:17 njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ngikwenze uyise wezizwe ezinengi.”) phambi koZimu amkholwako, onikela abafileko ipilo abe abize izinto ezingekho kobana zibe khona." 
Romans4:18 Kwathi kunganathemba, yena waba nethemba, wakholwa bona uzokuba, “nguyise wezizwe ezinengi,” njengombana kwatjhiwo kuye kwathiwa: “Sizakuba njalo-ke isizukulwana sakho.”" 
Romans4:19 Azange abe buthakathaka ekukholweni lokha naqala umzimbakhe ebesele sewufana newofileko (ngombana besele pheze aneminyaka elikhulu ubudala) iye, nalokha nacabanga bona uSara uyinyumba." 
Romans4:20 Akunasiqabo esamenza bona azaze isithembiso sakaZimu, kodwana waqina amandla ekukholweni kwakhe, wadumisa uZimu," 
Romans4:21 anesiqiniseko ngokuzeleko bonyana uZimu unamandla wokwenza lokho akuthembisileko. 
Romans4:22 Ngalokho-ke ukukholwa kwakhe “kwabalelwa kuye njengokulunga.” 
Romans4:23 Nje-ke amezwi athi: “Kwabalelwa kuye”, ayengakatlolelwa yena yedwa," 
Romans4:24 kodwana thina soke. Kuzakubalelwa kithi thina esikholwa kuye owavusa uJesu iKosethu ekufeni," 
Romans4:25 owanikelwa ekufeni ngebanga leemphambeko zethu bewavuswa mayelana nokulungisiswa kwethu. 
Romans5:1 Yeke njengombana sesilungisiswe ngokukholwa, sinokuthula noZimu ngeKosethu uJesu Krestu," 
Romans5:2 esifunyene ngayo ubungeno emseni lo esidzimelele kiwo begodu siyazigqaja ethembeni lethu lokuhlanganyela ephazimulweni kaZimu. 
Romans5:3 Akusikho lokho kwaphela, kodwana godu siyazigqaja ekuhluphekeni kwethu, sisazi bonyana ukuhlupheka kuveza ukubekezela," 
Romans5:4 ukubekezela kuveza ukuziphatha, ukuziphatha kuveza ithemba," 
Romans5:5 yeke ithemba alisidanisi ngombana ithando lakaZimu lithelwe ngeenhliziyweni zethu ngoMoya oCwengileko esinikelwe yena. 
Romans5:6 Sathi sisesebuthakathaka, ngesikhathi esifaneleko uKrestu wafela abangakalungi." 
Romans5:7 Ngambala, akukavami bona umuntu afele olungisisiweko, nanyana mhlambe kwenzeka bona umuntu angahle afele olungileko." 
Romans5:8 Kodwana uZimu ubonise ithando lakhe kithi ngendlela yokobana sithe sisesezizoni, uKrestu wasifela." 
Romans5:9 Khulukhulu-ke kwanjesi, njengombana sele silungisisiwe ngeengazi zakhe, sizakusindiswa ngaye elakeni lakaZimu." 
Romans5:10 Nakube kwathi sisesezizitha, senziwa bona sibuyisane noZimu ngokufa kweNdodanakhe, kangangani-ke kwanjesi nasele sibuyisene naye, sizakusindiswa ngepilwakhe." 
Romans5:11 Kodwana ngaphezu kwalokho, sibuye sizigqaje kuZimu ngeKosethu uJesu Krestu, ngayo esamukele ukubuyisana." 
Romans5:12 Yeke njengombana isono seza ephasini ngomuntu munye, ukufa kwangena ngesono, ngaleyondlela ukufa kwadlulela kibo boke abantu ngombana boke bonile." 
Romans5:13 Isono besivele sikhona ephasinapha umthetho ungakabikhona, kodwana isono asibalelwa nakube umthetho awukho." 
Romans5:14 Khonapho ukufa kwaba namandla ukusukela ku-Adamu ukuya kuMosi, ngitjho naphezu kwalabo izono zabo ebezingafani nesiphambeko saka-Adamu omfuziselo waloyo obekazokuza." 
Romans5:15 Kodwana isipho somusa asifani nesiphambeko. Nakube abanengi bafa ngebanga lesiphambeko somuntu oyedwa, wavama kangangani-ke umusa kaZimu kanye nesipho somusa esavela ngomuntu oyedwa, okunguJesu Krestu, phezu kwabanengi." 
Romans5:16 Godu isipho somusa asifani nomphumela wesono somuntu munye; ngombana isigwebo eseza ngebanga lesiphambeko somuntu munye saletha ukulahlwa, kodwana isipho somusa eseza ngebanga leemphambeko zabanengi, saletha ukulungisiswa." 
Romans5:17 Nakube, ngebanga lesiphambeko somuntu oyedwa, ukufa kwabusa ngaye oyedwa loyo, bazokuba namandla kangangani-ke labo abazakwamukela umusa omkhulu kanye nesipho somusa sokulunga phezu kwepilo ngomuntu oyedwa, onguJesu Krestu." 
Romans5:18 Yeke njengombana isiphambeko somuntu oyedwa sarholela ekulahlweni kwabo boke, ngokunjalo-ke isenzo sokulunga somuntu oyedwa sirholela ekulungisisweni kanye nekuphileni kwabo boke." 
Romans5:19 Njengombana ngokungalaleli komuntu oyedwa abantu abanengi baba zizoni, ngokunjalo-ke ngokulalela komuntu oyedwa, abanengi bazakwenziwa abalungileko." 
Romans5:20 Kodwana umthetho wabekwa, ngaleyondlela ukuphambeka kwanda, nokho lapha kwande khona isono, nomusa uba kangako" 
Romans5:21 ukuze kuthi njengombana isono sabusa ngokufa, ngokunjalo-ke nomusa ubusa ngokulungisiswa okurholela ekuphileni okungapheliko ngoJesu Krestu iKosethu." 
Romans6:1 Alo-ke sizakuthini na? Kufanele sirage siphile esonweni ukuze kuvame umusa na? 
Romans6:2 Nakanye! Thina esesafa esonweni, singaraga njani siphile kiso na?" 
Romans6:3 Kghani anazi bonyana soke thina esabhabhadiselwa kuKrestu Jesu, sabhabhadiselwa ekufeni kwakhe na?" 
Romans6:4 Nje-ke sabulungwa kanye naye ngokubhabhadiselwa ekufeni ukuze kuthi njengombana uKrestu avuswa ekufeni ngephazimulo kaBaba, ngokunjalo nathi sikhambe epilweni etja." 
Romans6:5 Nangabe besihlanganiswe naye ekufeni kwakhe, ngambala sizokuhlanganiswa naye nekuvukeni kwakhe." 
Romans6:6 Siyazi bona umuntu wethu omdala wabethelwa naye esiphambanweni ukuze kuthi umzimba wesono ulahlwe, singabe sisaba makhoboka wesono" 
Romans6:7 ngombana nanyana ngubani ofileko, ukhululiwe emandleni wesono." 
Romans6:8 Kodwana nakube sife noKrestu, siyakholwa bonyana sizokuphila naye." 
Romans6:9 Siyazi bonyana njengombana uKrestu avuswa kabafileko, angekhe abuye afe godu, nokufa akusenawo amandla phezu kwakhe." 
Romans6:10 Ukufa akufako, wakufela esonweni kwaba kanye; kodwana ukuphila akuphilako, ukuphila kuZimu." 
Romans6:11 Ngokunjalo-ke nani kufanele nizithathe njengabafileko mayelana nesono, kodwana niphile kuZimu ngoKrestu Jesu." 
Romans6:12 Nje-ke ningasavumeli isono bona sibuye sibuse imizimba yenu ebhubhako besinenze bona nithobele iinkanuko zayo. 
Romans6:13 Ningabe nisanikela izitho zenu zomzimba esonweni kobana sizisebenzise njengeensetjenziswa zobukhohlakali, kodwana zinikeleni kuZimu njengalabo ababuyiswe ekufeni basiwa ekuphileni, ninikele izitho zemizimba yenu kuZimu njengeensetjenziswa zokulunga." 
Romans6:14 Ngaleyondlela isono angeze sabusa phezu kwenu njengombana ningasingaphasi komthetho kodwana ningaphasi komusa. 
Romans6:15 Alo sizakuthini na? Sizakona ngombana batjho asisingaphasi komthetho kodwana singaphasi komusa na? Nakanye! 
Romans6:16 Kghani anazi bona lokha nanizinikela kinanyana ngubani njengamakhoboka alalelako, niba makhoboka waloyo enimthobelako na? Ningaba makhoboka wesono esirholela ekufeni namkha nibe makhoboka wokulalela okurholela ekulungisisweni." 
Romans6:17 Kodwana akadunyiswe uZimu kobana nina enakhe naba makhoboka wesono, sele ningabalalelako ukuthoma ehliziyweni ukuya endleleni yesifundo enamukeliswa sona," 
Romans6:18 nokobana nikhululiwe esonweni, naba makhoboka wokulunga." 
Romans6:19 Ngikhuluma ngendlela ejayelekileko ngebanga lobuthakathaka benyama yenu. Njengombana nakhe nanikela izitho zenu njengamakhoboka wokusilapheleko esiphambekweni esikhulu khulu, nje-ke nikelani izitho zenu njengamakhoboka wokulunga kikho ukucwengiswa." 
Romans6:20 Lokha nanisesemakhoboka wesono, benitjhaphulukile mayelana nokulunga." 
Romans6:21 Alo, nazuzani nje ngezinto esele nineenhloni ngazo namhlanjesi na? Isiphetho sezintwezo kukufa." 
Romans6:22 Kodwana gadesi njengombana sele nikhululiwe esonweni benaba makhoboka kaZimu nje, umvuzo eniwufunyanako kucwengiswa. Isiphetho salokho kuphila okungapheliko." 
Romans6:23 Umvuzo wesono kukufa; kodwana isipho somusa kaZimu sikuphila okungapheliko ngoKrestu Jesu iKosethu. 
Romans7:1 Bazalwana, ngikhuluma nalabo abazi umthetho; kghani anazi bonyana umthetho uba sibopho phezu komuntu, kwaphela umuntu loyo nasaphilako na?" 
Romans7:2 Ngaleyondlela umfazi ngokomthetho ubopheleleke endodenakhe qobana isaphila; kodwana yahlongakala, uyatjhatjhululwa emthethweni omayelana nendodakhe." 
Romans7:3 Ekhabo lakhona, uzakubizwa bona sihlobongi nakube wenda kenye indoda khisibe yakhe isaphila. Kodwana nasele indodakhe ihlongakele, utjhaphulukile emthethweni lowo, nje-ke nakube wenda kenye indoda, akabi sihlobongi." 
Romans7:4 Nakini-ke kunjalo, bazalwana; nafa emthethweni ngomzimba kaKrestu ukuze nibe ngewomunye, loyo owavuswa ekufeni ukuze sithelele uZimu iinthelo." 
Romans7:5 Lokha nabesisaphila enyameni, iinkanuko zethu zokona, ebezivuswa mthetho, bezisebenza ezithweni zethu kobana sithele iinthelo zokufa." 
Romans7:6 Kodwana kwanjesi sitjhatjhululiwe emthethweni, safa kilokho ebekusibophile ukuze sibe makhoboka angasi ngaphasi komthetho wakade otloliweko kodwana angaphasi kwepilo etja yakaMoya." 
Romans7:7 Alo-ke sizakuthini na? Kghani sizakuthi umthetho usisono? Awa, nakanye! Nokho nagade kungasi ngebanga lomthetho, bengingekhe ngasazi isono. Bengingekhe ngazi bona kuyini ukukhanuka nabethana umthetho akhange uthi: “Ungakhanuki.”" 
Romans7:8 Kodwana isono safunyana ithuba ngomyalo, saveza kimi yoke imihlobo yekanuko. Ngaphandle komthetho, isono sife ukufa." 
Romans7:9 Ngakhe ngaphila ngaphandle komthetho. Kodwana kwathi nakufika umyalo, isono savuka," 
Romans7:10 yeke ngafa. Kwathi wona umyalo lowo obewufanele ungilethele ukuphila, wabonakala ukukufa kimi" 
Romans7:11 ngombana isono safunyana ithuba ngomyalo, sangilutha, bekwathi ngawo sangibulala." 
Romans7:12 Nje-ke umthetho ucwengile nomyalo ucwengile, ulungile begodu muhle." 
Romans7:13 Alo, kutjho bona lokho okuhle kwaletha ukufa kimi na? Awa, nakanye! Kwaba sisono esangena nokufa kimi ngokusebenzisa okuhle ukuze isono sibonakaliswe sisisono, begodu kuthi ngomyalo sibe sisono sakosono." 
Romans7:14 Siyazi bona umthetho ungewokommoya, kodwana mina ngingowenyama, ngathengiselwa ebukhobokeni ngaphasi kwesono." 
Romans7:15 Angizipheleli ngombana angenzi lokho engikuthandako, kodwana ngenza kanye lokho engingakufuniko." 
Romans7:16 Nje-ke, nakube ngenza lokho engingakufuniko, kutjho bona ngiyavuma bonyana umthetho muhle." 
Romans7:17 Emanyeni akusesengimi owenza lokho, kodwana ngikwenziswa sisono esikimi" 
Romans7:18 ngombana ngiyazi bona akunalitho elilungileko elihlala ngaphakathi kwami, lokho kusemvelwenami yenyama. Ngingathanda ukwenza okuhle kodwana ngiyabhalelwa bona ngikwenze" 
Romans7:19 ngombana angenzi okuhle engithanda ukukwenza, kodwana okumbi engingafuni ukukwenza, ngiyakwenza." 
Romans7:20 Nangabe ngenza lokho engingathandi ukukwenza, khona-ke angizipheleli, ngenziswa sisono esihlala ngaphakathi kwami." 
Romans7:21 Ngalokho-ke ngikufunyana kumthetho ongibusako wokobana nangifuna ukwenza okuhle, ubumbi bungilalele eduze." 
Romans7:22 Emanyeni ngithatjiswa mthetho kaZimu ngaphakathi kwami," 
Romans7:23 kodwana ngibona ezithweni zami kunomthetho omunye olwisana nomthetho womkhumbulwami, ungenza ngibe likhoboka lomthetho wesono ohlala ngaphakathi kwezitho zami." 
Romans7:24 Maye mina ngilisizi! Ngubani ozongikhulula kilomzimba wokufa na? 
Romans7:25 Akathokozwe uZimu ngoJesu Krestu iKosethu! Nje-ke ngomkhumbulwami ngilikhoboka emthethweni kaZimu, kodwana ngenyama yami ngilikhoboka emthethweni wesono." 
Romans8:1 Yeke akusekho ukulahlwa kilabo abakuKrestu Jesu 
Romans8:2 ngombana umthetho kaMoya wokuphila okuKrestu Jesu, ukukhululile emthethweni wesono newokufa." 
Romans8:3 Lokho umthetho ogade unganamandla wokukwenza ngebanga lokwenziwa buthakathaka yimvelo yesono, uZimu wakwenza ngokuthumela iNdodanakhe ngobujamo bomuntu wokona kobana ibe mhlabelo wehlambululo" 
Romans8:4 ukuze okulungileko okufunwa mthetho kuzaliseke kithi, thina esingakhambi ngokwenyama kodwana ngokoMoya." 
Romans8:5 Labo abaphila ngokwenyama babeka imikhumbulwabo ezintweni zenyama, kodwana abaphila ngokukaMoya babeka imikhumbulwabo kokukaMoya." 
Romans8:6 Ukubeka umkhumbulo kokwenyama kukukufa, kodwana ukubeka umkhumbulo kokukaMoya kukuphila kanye nokuthula." 
Romans8:7 Ngesizathweso-ke umkhumbulo osenyameni ulinaba kuZimu; awuthobeli umthetho kaZimu, ngambala angekhe wakghona ukuwuthobela." 
Romans8:8 Labo ababuswa yinyama angekhe bamthokozisa uZimu. 
Romans8:9 Kodwana nina anisisenyameni, nikuMoya ngombana uMoya kaZimu uhlala ngaphakathi kwenu. Umuntu onganaye uMoya kaKrestu akasuye wakaKrestu." 
Romans8:10 Kodwana nangabe uKrestu ungaphakathi kwenu, nanyana umzimba wenu ufile ngebanga lesono, ummoya wenu unokuphila ngebanga lokulunga." 
Romans8:11 Nangabe uMoya waloyo owavusa uJesu ekufeni, uphila ngaphakathi kwenu, loyo owavusa uKrestu ekufeni uzokunikela imizimba yenu ebhubhako ukuphila, ngaye uMoya ohlala ngaphakathi kwenu." 
Romans8:12 Nje-ke bazalwana, sinesibopho kodwana ingasi enyameni kobana singabe siphile ngokufuna kwayo." 
Romans8:13 Ngitjho ngombana naniphila ngokwenyama, nizokufa; kodwana naniphila ngokoMoya, nibulala izenzo ezimbi zomzimba, nizokuphila" 
Romans8:14 ngombana labo abarholwa nguMoya kaZimu, babantwana bakaZimu." 
Romans8:15 Azange namukeliswe ummoya onenza bona nibe makhoboka godu benesabe, kodwana namukele uMoya onenza nibe bantwana bakaZimu. Yeke ngaye siyabiza sithi: “Aba, Baba!”" 
Romans8:16 UMoya ngokwakhe ufakazela ummoya wethu bonyana sibantwana bakaZimu. 
Romans8:17 Nje-ke nakube sibantwana, kutjho bona siziindlalifa, iye, iindlalifa zakaZimu begodu siziindlalifa kanye noKrestu nakube ngambala sihlanganyela eenhluphekweni zakhe ukuze sihlanganyele naye ephazimulwenakhe." 
Romans8:18 Ngiyaqinisa bonyana iinhlupheko zesikhathesi azisililitho nazilinganiswa nephazimulo esizokwambulelwa yona. 
Romans8:19 Indalo ilindele ngetjisakalo yokulabalabela bona abantwana bakaZimu babonakaliswe. 
Romans8:20 Yeke indalo yenziwa into enganamsebenzi, ingasi ngokwentando yayo, kodwana ngokwentando yaloyo oyenze yaba njalo, ngethemba" 
Romans8:21 lokobana indalo leyo ngokwayo izokutjhatjhululwa ekubotjhweni kwayo, ibole bese ilethwa ekululekweni ephazimulako yabantwana bakaZimu." 
Romans8:22 Siyazi bona yoke indalo beyiquma inemirhelo bekube kunjesi; 
Romans8:23 begodu ingasi indalo kwaphela, kodwana nathi ngokwethu, thina esineenthelo zokuthoma zakaMoya, sibubulela ngaphakathi khibe silindele ngetjisakalo ukwenziwa abantwana bakaZimu, okukuhlengwa kwemizimba yethu." 
Romans8:24 Ngitjho ngombana sasindiswa ethembeni. Kodwana ithemba elibonwako akusilo ithemba ngombana ngubani onethemba ngento asele anayo na? 
Romans8:25 Kodwana nasinethemba ngalokho esingakakuboni, sikulindela ngokunyamezela." 
Romans8:26 Ngokunjalo uMoya uyasisiza ebuthakathakeni bethu ngombana asikwazi ekumele sikuthandazele. Kodwana uMoya ngokwakhe usithandazela ngokububula okungekhe kwahlathululwa ngamezwi. 
Romans8:27 UZimu ohlola iinhliziyo, uyakwazi okusemkhumbulweni kaMoya ngombana uMoya uthandazela abacwengileko ngokwentando kaZimu." 
Romans8:28 Siyazi bonyana kilabo abathanda uZimu, wenza bona koke kuhlangane bekubakhambele kuhle, iye, labo ababizwe ngokweminqopho yakhe." 
Romans8:29 Labo uZimu abazi ngaphambilini, wabakhethela bona bafane nesibumbeko seNdodanakhe ukuze ibe lizibulo emndenini omkhulu." 
Romans8:30 Labo abakhetha ngaphambilini, godu wababiza, nalabo ababizileko godu wabalungisisa, nalabo abalungisisako godu wabaphazimulisa." 
Romans8:31 Alo sizakuthini ngezintwezi na? Nakube uZimu ujame ngakithi, ngubani-ke ongajamelana nathi na?" 
Romans8:32 Yena ongazange agodle iNdodanakhe, kodwana wayinikela ngebanga lethu soke, akazukusinikela koke ngayo na?" 
Romans8:33 Ngubani ongamangalela abakhethiweko bakaZimu na? NguZimu olungisisako. 
Romans8:34 Ngubani olahla ngomlandu na? NguKrestu Jesu owafako, iye, owavuswa ekufeni, ohlezi ngesigomeni sakaZimu nosincengelako." 
Romans8:35 Ngubani ongasihlukanisa nethando lakaKrestu na? Kghani ingaba kutlhaga, ziinkathazo, kuzunywa, yindlala, kutlhoga izambatho, yingozi namkha yisabula na?" 
Romans8:36 Njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ngebanga lakho sibulawa imihla yoke, sesesifana nezimvu zokuhlatjwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Kodwana kikho koke lokho singaphezu kwabahluli ngaye owasithandako. 
Romans8:38 Nje-ke ngineqiniso lokobana akunalitho, nanyana kungaba kukufa, kuphila, ziingilozi, babusi, zizinto ezikhona, zizinto ezizakubakhona, mibuso," 
Romans8:39 kuphakama, kuzika, nanyana kungaba yini edaliweko ezasihlukanisa nethando lakaZimu kuKrestu Jesu iKosethu." 
Romans9:1 Ngikhuluma iqiniso kuKrestu, angirhwayi amanga; nonembezami uyakuqinisa lokho ngoMoya oCwengileko," 
Romans9:2 nangisithi nginokudabuka okukhulu nobuhlungu obungapheliko ehliziyweni yami. 
Romans9:3 Ngitjho ngombana bengingafisa bona mina ngokwami ngithukwe bengijutjwe kuKrestu ngebanga labazalwana bami, iye iinhlobo zami ngenyama." 
Romans9:4 Bona bama-Israyeli, baphiwe ukwenziwa abantwana bakaZimu, iphazimulo, iimvumelwano, ukunikelwa umthetho, ukulotjha kanye neenthembiso." 
Romans9:5 Bayinzalo yabokhokho lapha kuvela khona uMesiya ngokwenyama, ongikho koke, obusiswe nguZimu isiphelani. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Akusingathi ilizwi lakaZimu lihlulekile ngombana akusiwo woke ama-Israyeli angewakwa-Israyeli mbala. 
Romans9:7 Begodu akusibo boke abantwana baka-Abrahamu abaziinzukulwana zakhe zamambala, kodwana “iinzukulwana zakho zizokuthiyelelwa ngo-Isaka.”" 
Romans9:8 Lokhu kutjho bonyana abantwana bakaZimu akusibo benyama kodwana bantwana besithembiso ababalelwa eenzukulwaneni 
Romans9:9 ngombana nakhu okwatjhiwo sithembiso: “Ngesikhathi esifaneleko, ngaso lesisikhathi ngizakubuya, begodu noSara uzabe sele anendodana.”" 
Romans9:10 Akugcini lapho kwaphela, nakuRabega kwenzeka soneso lokha nagade azithwele abantwana bendoda yinye, engukhokho wethu u-Isaka." 
Romans9:11 Khonapho kwathi bangakabelethwa namkha benze nanyana yini ehle namkha embi (ukuze umnqopho kaZimu wokukhetha uragele phambili 
Romans9:12 ingasi ngokwemisebenzi kodwana ngokubizwa kwakhe) uRabega watjelwa kwathiwa: “Omkhulu uzakukhothamela omncani”," 
Romans9:13 njengombana umtlolo uthi: “UJakopo ngamthanda, kodwana u-Esewu ngamlahla.”" 
Romans9:14 Alo, sizakuthini na? Sizakuthi uZimu akakalungi? Awa, nakanye!" 
Romans9:15 Angithi wathi kuMosi: “Ngizokurhawukela engimrhawukelako, ngizwele engimzwelako.”" 
Romans9:16 Yeke akuyi ngentando yomuntu namkha ngamandlakhe, kodwana kuya ngomusa kaZimu" 
Romans9:17 ngombana umtlolo uthi kuFaro: “Ngakwenyusela khona lokhu kobana ngiveze amandlami ngawe nokobana ibizo lami libatjazwe kilo loke iphasi.” 
Romans9:18 Yeke urhawukela afuna ukumrhawukela, enze bukhuni afuna ukumenza bukhuni." 
Romans9:19 Wena-ke uzakuthi kimi: “Alo-ke, usasolelani na? Ngubani ongajamelana nentando yakhe na?”" 
Romans9:20 Kodwana ungubani-ke wena kobana ungaphendulana noZimu na? Okubunjiweko kungatjho njani kumbumbi ukuthi: “Ungibumbeleni ngaba nje na?” 
Romans9:21 Umbumbi akanalo ilungelo phezu komdaka na? Angithi ngawo umdaka lowo angabumba isitja esikhethekileko godu enze esinye esingakakhetheki? 
Romans9:22 Sizakwazi ngani nakube uZimu, ngokuthanda ukubonisa ubukhali bakhe kanye nokwazisa amandlakhe, ubekezelele khulu ngesineke izitja afanele azithukuthelele, ezibekelwe ukubhujiswa na?" 
Romans9:23 Sizakwazi ngani bona mhlambe wenze lokho ukuze kuthi lezo azibekele umusa, iye lezo azilungiselele umusa phambilini, azazise umnono wephazimulwakhe ayilungiselela zona na?" 
Romans9:24 Iye, kufaka ngitjho nathi asibizileko, ingasi hlangana namaJuda kwaphela kodwana naphakathi kwabatjhili." 
Romans9:25 Kunjengobana asitjho kuHosiya: “Abantu ebekungasibo bami, ngizababiza bona ngebami, naloyo obekangathandeki ngithi ‘unguthandiwe’.”" 
Romans9:26 “Nendaweni lapho kwathiwa kibo, “ ‘Anisibo abantu bami,’ lapho bazakubizwa bona babantwana bakaZimu ophilako.”" 
Romans9:27 U-Isaya umemezela ngo-Israyeli uthi: “Nanyana isibalo sama-Israyeli besingangetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle, misalela kwaphela ezakusindiswa." 
Romans9:28 Ngombana uSomnini uzosiphetha isigwebo sakhe ephasinapha ngokurhaba nangokuphelelisa.” 
Romans9:29 Kunjengombana u-Isaya atjhwile ngaphambilini ukuthi: “Nakube uSomnini uMninimandla woke ubengakasitjhiyeli isizukulwana, besizokuba njengeSodoma, sifane neGomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Alo, sizakuthini na? Abatjhili abangazange batjhabatjhekele ukulungisiswa, bakufumene, okutjho ukulungisiswa ngokukholwa," 
Romans9:31 kodwana ama-Israyeli ebegade atjhabatjhekela ukulungisiswa ngomthetho, azange aphumelele ukuthobela umthetho lowo." 
Romans9:32 Ngebanga lani na? Ngebanga lokobana angazange akutjhabatjhekele ngokukholwa kodwana kwaba inga kungokwezenzo zawo. Akhutjwa elitjeni elisikhubekiso," 
Romans9:33 njengombana kutlolwe kwathiwa: “Qalani, ngibeka eZiyoni, ilitje elizokwenza abantu bakhubeke, idwala elizobenza bawe, nje-ke loyo okholwa kuye, angeze ajabhiswa.”" 
Romans10:1 Bazalwana bami, isifiso sehliziywami kanye nomthandazwami kuZimu kukobana ama-Israyeli asindiswe." 
Romans10:2 Ngingafakaza bonyana anetjisakalo ngoZimu, kodwana akanawo umkhanyo." 
Romans10:3 Ngokungayeleli kwawo ukulunga okuvela kuZimu, afuna ukuzenzela kwawo, azange azinikele ekulungeni kwakaZimu."
