Romans10:4 Isiphetho somthetho nguKrestu ukuze kube nokulungisiswa kwabo boke abakholwako. 
Romans10:5 UMosi uhlathulula ukulunga okuza ngomthetho bunje: “Umuntu owenza izintwezi uzokuphila ngazo.” 
Romans10:6 Kodwana ukulunga okuvela ngokukholwa kuthi: “Ungadlumbani uthi, ‘Ngubani ozakwenyukela ezulwini na?’ ” (okutjho bona ayokwewula uKrestu)," 
Romans10:7 “namkha udlumbane uthi, ‘Ngubani ozakwehlela kabafileko na?’ ” (okutjho bona ayokwenyusa uKrestu ekufeni)." 
Romans10:8 Kodwana kuthini na? Kuthi: “Ilizwi lihlanu kwakho, lingemlonyenakho nangehliziywenakho.” Iye, ilizwi lokukholwa esilitjhumayelako." 
Romans10:9 Lokha nawuvuma ngomlomakho bona uJesu uyiKosi, bewukholwe ngehliziywakho bona uZimu wamvusa kabafileko, uzokusindiswa" 
Romans10:10 ngombana ukholwa ngehliziyo, ulungisiswe; uvume ngomlomo, usindiswe." 
Romans10:11 Umtlolo uthi: “Loyo okholwa kuye akasoze arhubutjhwa.” 
Romans10:12 Akunamehluko phakathi komJuda nomGirigi ngombana uSomnini unguSomnini wabo boke begodu unesisa kibo boke ababiza ibizo lakhe. 
Romans10:13 Nje-ke: “Boke ababiza ibizo lakaSomnini bazokusindiswa.” 
Romans10:14 Kodwana bangambiza njani nabangazange bakholwe kuye na? Begodu bangakholwa njani kuye nabangazange khebezwe ngaye na? Godu bazakuzwa njani ngaphandle kobana kube khona otjhumayela ngaye na? 
Romans10:15 Bazokutjhumayela njani ngaye nakube abakathunywa na? Njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Maye zithandeka kangangani iinyawo zalabo abaletha iindaba ezimnandi!” 
Romans10:16 Kodwana akusibo boke abalalele umlayezwethu ngombana u-Isaya wathi: “Somnini, ngubani okholwe umlayezwethu na?”" 
Romans10:17 Nje-ke, ukukholwa kuvela ngokuzwa nokuzwa kuvela elizwini lakaKrestu." 
Romans10:18 Kodwana ngiyabuza-ke: Abakezwa na? Mbala bezwile ngombana, “Amaphimbo wabo azwakele ephasini loke; namezwabo emaphethelweni womhlaba.”" 
Romans10:19 Godu ngiyabuza ngithi: “U-Israyeli akakazwisisi na?” Kokuthoma uMosi uthi: “Ngizonivusela isikhwele ngalabo abangasiso isizwe, nginithukuthelise ngesizwe esisidlhadlha.”" 
Romans10:20 U-Isaya ukhuluma ngesibindi uthi: “Ngifunyenwe ngabangazange bangifune, ngaziveza kabangazange bangibawe.”" 
Romans10:21 Kodwana ngo-Israyeli uthi: “Imini yoke ngilulele izandla zami ebantwini abangalaleliko nabanekani.” 
Romans11:1 Nje-ke ngiyabuza ngithi: UZimu ulahle abantu bakhe na? Awa, nakanye. Mina ngokwami ngimIsrayeli, isizukulwana saka-Abrahamu, ilunga lekoro kaBhenjamini." 
Romans11:2 UZimu akakalahli abantu bakhe ebekaseze abazi kwaphambilini. Anazi bona umtlolo uthini ngo-Elija na? Angithi wamangalela ama-Israyeli kuZimu ngokuthi: 
Romans11:3 “Somnini, babulele abaphorofidi bakho, bagiriza nama-aldarakho; sekusele mina ngedwa, nje-ke bazumana nepilwami.”" 
Romans11:4 Kodwana yathini ipendulo kaZimu kuye na? Angithi yathi: “Ngizibulungele abaziinkulungwana ezilikhomba abangazange bakhothamele uBhali.” 
Romans11:5 Kusesenjalo nanamhlanjesi, kunemisalela ekhethwe ngomusa." 
Romans11:6 Kodwana nakube kungomusa, khona-ke akusese ngenca yemisebenzi, nakungasinjalo umusa awusazokuba mumusa." 
Romans11:7 Alo, sizakuthini na? U-Israyeli wahluleka ukufumana lokho ebegade akufuna. Abakhethiweko bona bakufumana, kodwana inengi lenziwa laba likhuni," 
Romans11:8 njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “UZimu wabanikela ummoya wobuthongo, amehlo angaboniko neendlebe ezingezwako bekube kunamhlanjesi.”" 
Romans11:9 NoDavida uthi: “Itafula labo alibe sisifu nesirarejo, iye, isiqabo nesikhubekiso kibo!" 
Romans11:10 Amehlwabo akafiphazwe ukuze angaboni, imihlana yabo ayihlale ibhesile.”" 
Romans11:11 Godu ngabuza ngathi: Bakhutjiwe bebabhusukela phasi na? Awa, nakanye! Kodwana ngokukhutjwa kwabo, ukusindiswa kuze kabatjhili ukuze kuvuselwe u-Israyeli isikhwele." 
Romans11:12 Kodwana nakube ukuphambeka kwabo kumnono wephasini, nokuhlulwa kwabo kumnono kabatjhili, uzakuba ngangani-ke umnono ozakulethwa kupheleliswa kwabo!" 
Romans11:13 Ngikhuluma nani nina abatjhili. Njengombana ngimpostoli wabatjhili nje, ngiyawazisa umsebenzi lo," 
Romans11:14 ukuze ngivusele abantu bekhethu isikhwele, ngalokho ngisindise abanye babo." 
Romans11:15 Nakube ukulahlwa kwabo kukubuyisana kwabantu bephasi noZimu, kuzokuba yini-ke ukwamukelwa kwabo na? Kghani kuzakuba kuphila kwabafileko na?" 
Romans11:16 Nakube ingcenye yehlama enikelwe njengesilumo icwengile, khona-ke ihlama yoke icwengile; nakube umrabhu ucwengile, khona-ke neengala zicwengile." 
Romans11:17 Kodwana nakube iingala ezithileko bezephuliwe, kwathi wena olihlumela le-oliva yemmangweni, wahlonyelelwa esikhundleni sazo, wahlanganyela emrajini onothileko womuthi we-oliva," 
Romans11:18 ungazikhukhumezi eengalenezo. Nakube uyazikhukhumeza, khumbula bonyana akusuwe othwele umrabhu kodwana mrabhu othwele wena." 
Romans11:19 Uzakuthi: “Kwaquntwa iingala ukuze kuhlonyelelwe mina.” 
Romans11:20 Iye, lokho kuliqiniso. Zaquntwa ngebanga lokungakholwa kwazo, kodwana wena ujame ngebanga lokukholwa kwaphela. Nje-ke ungazikhukhumezi, kodwana jama ngokwesaba." 
Romans11:21 Nakube uZimu azange ababalele iingala zemvelo, nawe angeze akubabalela." 
Romans11:22 Qalani-ke ukulunga nobukhali bakaZimu: ubukhali bukilabo abawileko, kodwana umusa ukuwe kwaphela nawuragela phambili ngokuphila ekulungeni kwakhe; nakungasinjalo nawe uzakuquntwa." 
Romans11:23 Ngitjho nalabo abamaJuda nakube abaphikeleli ekungakholwini kwabo, bazakuhlonyelelwa ngombana uZimu unamandla wokubahlomelela godu." 
Romans11:24 Nakube uquntwe kilokho okumumuthi wama-oliva wommango ngemvelo bewahlonyelelwa emthini wama-oliva otjaliweko, ngokuphambene nemvelo, kuzokuba kangangani-ke eengaleni zemvelo lezi nazibuye zihlonyelelwe emthinazo wama-oliva na?" 
Romans11:25 Angithandi bazalwana bona ningabi nelwazi ngefihlakalo le ukuze ningakhohliseki: ukukhunyalala kwehlele ingcenye ka-Israyeli kufikela lapha isibalo esipheleleko sabatjhili singena khona soke. 
Romans11:26 Nje-ke woke u-Israyeli uzokusindiswa njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “EZiyoni kuzakuvela uMsindisi; afike aqede ukungalungi kuJakopo. 
Romans11:27 Lesi-ke sivumelwano sami nabo, lokha nangisusa izono zabo.”" 
Romans11:28 Mayelana nevangeli-ke amaJuda azizitha ngebanga lenu, kodwana ngokokukhethwa, athandiwe ngebanga labobamkhulwawo" 
Romans11:29 ngombana uZimu nakupha izipho, nalokha nakubizileko, akabuyi akwemuke." 
Romans11:30 Njengombana nakhe naba ngabangalaleli uZimu, namukeliswe umusa ngebanga lokungalaleli kwabo," 
Romans11:31 nabo-ke babe ngabangalaleliko ukuze nabo bamukeliswe umusa ngebanga lomusa kaZimu kini. 
Romans11:32 UZimu uvalele boke abantu ekungalalelini ukuze abe nomusa kibo boke. 
Romans11:33 Maye, uzike kangangani umnono wokuhlakanipha kanye nelwazi lakaZimu! Iingwebo zakhe aziphenyeki, neendlela zakhe azilemukeki." 
Romans11:34 Njengombana umtlolo ocwengileko uthi: “Ngubani owakhe wazi umkhumbulo kaSomnini? Ngubani owakhe waba mluleki wakhe na? 
Romans11:35 Ngubani owakhe wamupha isipho ukuze naye aphiwe na?” 
Romans11:36 Ngambala zoke izinto zavela kuye, zavela ngaye begodu zingezakhe. Akube kuye idumo ngokungapheliko! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Nje-ke bazalwana, ngebanga lesirhawu sakaZimu ngiyanirabhela bonyana ninikele imizimba yenu ibe mihlabelo ephilako, ecwengileko nethandekako kuZimu. Lokhu kukulotjha kwenu okwamukelekako." 
Romans12:2 Ningaziphathi njengokwemikhuba yephaseli, kodwana tjhugululwani ngokwenziwa kabutjha emikhumbulweni yenu ukuze nikghone ukuhlukanisa okuyintando kaZimu; okuhle, okwamukelekako nokupheleleko." 
Romans12:3 Ngomusa engiwuphiweko ngithi kini noke: Ningaziphatheli phezulu ngaphezu kwalokho eningikho, kodwana ziphatheni ngokuzigoba ukuya ngokwesilinganiso sokukholwa enikuphiwe nguZimu." 
Romans12:4 Njengombana emzimbeni munye sinamalungu amanengi, ngokunjalo amalungu lawo akenzi umsebenzi ofanako woke njalo." 
Romans12:5 Nje-ke thina esibanengi emzimbeni munye kuKrestu, ngamunye ngamunye simalunga womunye nomunye." 
Romans12:6 Sinezipho ezahlukeneko ukuya ngokomusa esiwuphiweko. Ophiwe ukuphorofida, akaphorofide ngokwesilinganiso sokukholwa kwakhe;" 
Romans12:7 ophiwe ukusebenza, akasebenze; ophiwe ukufundisa, akafundise;" 
Romans12:8 ophiwe ukuyala, akayale; ophiwe ukupha, akaphe ngokungagodli; ophiwe ukurhola, akarhole ngokukhuthala nophiwe ukurhawukela abanye, akakwenze ngethabo." 
Romans12:9 Ithando alibe ngelamambala; nyenyani ubumbi, nikakarele kokuhle." 
Romans12:10 Thandanani khulu ngethando lobuzalwana, niphalisane ngokuhloniphana." 
Romans12:11 Ningatlhayelelwa yitjisakalo kodwana hlalani nivutha emmoyeni, nilotjhe iKosi." 
Romans12:12 Thabani ethembeni, nibekezele eenhluphekweni, nikhuthale emthandazweni." 
Romans12:13 Hlanganyelani eendingweni zabacwengileko, niphathe kuhle abayeni." 
Romans12:14 Busisani labo abanizumako, iye, babusiseni ningabanikeleli." 
Romans12:15 Thabani kanye nalabo abathabileko, nilile kanye nalabo abalilako." 
Romans12:16 Philisanani ngokuzwana, ningazikhukhumezi, kodwana zimanyaniseni nabathobekileko. Ningazenzi inga nihlakaniphe ukudlula lokho eningikho." 
Romans12:17 Ningabuyiseli ubumbi ngobumbi, kodwana nakani okuhle phambi kwabo boke abantu." 
Romans12:18 Nakukghonekako ngokusemandlenenu, philisanani ngokuthula nabo boke abantu." 
Romans12:19 Bazalwana ningazibuyiseleli, kodwana nikelani itukuthelo kaZimu ithuba ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ukubuyiselela kungokwami, ngizokubuyiselela.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Romans12:20 Esikhundleni salokho, umtlolo uthi: “Nakube isitha sakho silambile, siphe ukudla sigome; nakube somile, siphe amanzi sisele. Ngokwenza njalo, uzabe inga udindela amalahle avuthako ehlokwaso.”" 
Romans12:21 Ungabindwa bubumbi kodwana wena kumele ubinde ubumbi ngobuhle. 
Romans13:1 Akube ngiloyo naloyo athobele ababusi ngombana awukho umbuso ongaveli kuZimu. Imibuso ekhona le ibekwe nguZimu. 
Romans13:2 Nje-ke nanyana ngubani ophikisana namandla wombuso, uphikisana nalokho okujanyiswe nguZimu. Labo abaphikisako bazakufumana isigwebo." 
Romans13:3 Ababusi abesabeki kilabo abaziphethe kuhle kodwana besabeka kilabo abaziphethe kumbi. Ungathanda bona ungabi nevalo nawubona isiphathimandla na? Khona-ke yenza okulungileko, sizakudumisa" 
Romans13:4 ngombana umbusi uyinceku kaZimu ukuze kube kuhle kuwe. Kodwana nawenza okumbi, uzokuphila ngevalo ngombana umbusi akayiphatheli ilize isabula. Uyinceku kaZimu kobana ahlunguphaze labo abenza ubumbi." 
Romans13:5 Ngesizathweso-ke kufanele umuntu azithobe, ingasi ngokwesabela ukuhlunguphazwa kwaphela kodwana nangebanga lakanembeza." 
Romans13:6 Kungakho nikhupha nemithelo nje, ngombana ababusi baziinsebenzi zakaZimu eziqalene nomsebenzi wona lo." 
Romans13:7 Banikeleni koke okubafaneleko, khuphani umthelo kofanelwe mthelo, ingeniso kofanelwe lingeniso, ihlonipho kofanelwe yihlonipho nedumo kofanelwe lidumo." 
Romans13:8 Ningabi nomlandu wokubamba umuntu ilitho, ngaphandle komlandu wokuthandana ngombana loyo othanda omunye sele awuzalisile umthetho ngokwenza njalo." 
Romans13:9 Imiyalo ethi: “Ungahlobongi, ungabulali, ungebi, ungafisi komunye” kanye neminye imiyalo ekhona, ihlanganiswe yoke emyalweni owodwa othi: “Thanda umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena.”" 
Romans13:10 Ithando alimtjhapheli umakhelwana, ngalokho ithando likuzaliseka komthetho." 
Romans13:11 Yenzani lokhu ngokuzwisisa isikhathi sanje. Isikhathi sesifikile sokobana nivuke ebuthongweni benu ngombana isindiswethu sele iseduze khulu kunangesikhathi esathoma ukukholwa ngaso. 
Romans13:12 Ubusuku sebuyadlula, ukukhanya sekutjhidele. Yeke asibekeleni ngeqadi izenzo zobumnyama, sihlome iinkhali zokukhanya." 
Romans13:13 Asiziphatheni ngokuhloniphekileko njengemini, kungabi ngokurhiribidela nokudakwa, kungabi ngobufebe nangamanyala begodu kungabi ngokucabana nangomona." 
Romans13:14 Esikhundleni salokho, yembathani iKosi uJesu Krestu, ninganikeli inyama ithuba lokwanelisa iinkanuko zayo." 
Romans14:1 Yamukelani loyo onokukholwa okutekatekako ngaphandle kokumgweba ngokunande niphikisana naye. 
Romans14:2 Ukukholwa komuntu omunye kumvumela bona agome nanyana yini, kodwana omunye onokukholwa okutekatekako uzigomela imirorho kwaphela." 
Romans14:3 Umuntu ogoma koke akangamqaleli phasi loyo okhethako. Naloyo ongagomi koke angamgwebi loyo osogoma yoke into ngombana naye uZimu umamukele. 
Romans14:4 Ungubani-ke wena bona ungazokugweba inceku yomunye umuntu na? Ukujama nokuwa kwayo kukumniniyo. Izakujama ngombana iKosi inamandla wokuyenza bona ijame. 
Romans14:5 Omunye umuntu uthi ilanga elinye liqakathekile kunelinye, omunye uthi woke amalanga ayafana. Ngiloyo naloyo akazanelise ehliziywenakhe." 
Romans14:6 Loyo onelanga alihloniphako, ulihloniphela ukudumisa iKosi. Naloyo ogoma inyama, uyigomela iKosi ngombana uthokoza uZimu. Naloyo ongagomiko, lokho ukwenzela iKosi begodu uthokoza uZimu." 
Romans14:7 Akakho noyedwa wethu oziphilelako, kanti-ke godu akakho noyedwa ozifelako" 
Romans14:8 ngombana nasiphilako, siphilela iKosi nalokha nasifako sifela iKosi. Nje-ke nanyana siyaphila namkha siyafa, singebeKosi." 
Romans14:9 Ngesizathweso uKrestu wafa, wabuye waphila godu ukuze abe yiKosi yabafileko nabaphilako." 
Romans14:10 Alo, umgwebelani-ke umfowenu na? Namkha kubayini uqalela umfowenu phasi na? Soke nje sizokujama phambi kwesihlalo sokugweba sakaZimu" 
Romans14:11 ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ngizifunga ngokwami.” Kutjho uSomnini. “Woke amadolo azokuguqa phambi kwami namalimu woke adumise uZimu.” 
Romans14:12 Nje-ke omunye nomunye wethu uzoziphendulela kuZimu. 
Romans14:13 Nje-ke asiliseni ukugwebana, kodwana endaweni yalokho tjhugululani imikhumbulwenu, ningabeki isiqabo namkha isisitho endleleni yomfowenu." 
Romans14:14 Ngiyazi begodu ngikholisekile eKosini uJesu bonyana akunanto esilaphele ngokwayo, kodwana iba ngesilapheleko kiloyo ocabanga bonyana isilaphele." 
Romans14:15 Nakube umzalwana wakho ukhubekiswa ngilokho okugomako, khona-ke awusakhambi ethandweni. Ungavumeli bona lokho okugomako kubhubhise loyo amfelako uKrestu." 
Romans14:16 Yeke ukulunga kwakho akungathathwa njengobumbi 
Romans14:17 ngombana umbuso kaZimu awusi kugoma nokusela, kodwana kulunga, kuthula nokuthokoza kuMoya oCwengileko." 
Romans14:18 Nje-ke loyo olotjha uKrestu, wamukelekile kuZimu begodu nabantu bayamvuma." 
Romans14:19 Ngalokho-ke asirhulupheleni lokho okuletha ukuthula nokwakhana. 
Romans14:20 Ungatjhabalalisi umsebenzi kaZimu ngebanga lokudla. Iye, ije koke ukudla kuhlwengile, kodwana akukalungi kobana wena uwise abanye ngalokho okugomako." 
Romans14:21 Kuhle ukuzigoba ungagomi inyama, ungaseli iwayini namkha ungenzi nanyana yini ezokubangela bona umzalwana wakho akhubeke." 
Romans14:22 Ukukholwa onakho akube yindabakho noZimu. Babusisiwe labo abanganasizathu sokuzilahla ngebanga lalokho abakubona kukuhle. 
Romans14:23 Kodwana labo abazazako bayalahlwa nakube bayagoma ngombana nabenza njalo bakhombisa ukungakhambi ngokukholwa. Nanyana yini engaveli ekukholweni isisono. 
Romans15:1 Thina esidzimeleleko kufanele sinyamezelele ukuhluleka kwabatekatekako, singazithabisi thina sodwa." 
Romans15:2 Ngiloyo naloyo wethu akathabise umakhelwanakhe, kube kuhle kuye, naye akheke." 
Romans15:3 UKrestu azange azithabise yena kwaphela, kodwana njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Iinhlamba zabakuthukako, ziwele phezu kwami.”" 
Romans15:4 Koke okwatlolwa ngaphambilini kwatlolelwa ukusifundisa ukuze kuthi ngokunyamezela nangokukhuthazeka kwemitlolo, sibe nethemba." 
Romans15:5 Sengathi uZimu wokubekezela newokukhuthazeka anganipha ukuphilisana ngokuzwana ngokukaKrestu Jesu 
Romans15:6 ukuze kuthi ngahliziyonye nangelizwi linye nidumise uZimu, uYise weKosethu uJesu Krestu." 
Romans15:7 Yamukelanani njengombana uKrestu anamukela ukuze kudunyiswe uZimu. 
Romans15:8 Ngiyanitjela ngithi uKrestu waba yinceku yabasokileko ngebanga leqiniso lakaZimu ukuze aqinise iinthembiso ezanikelwa abokhokho," 
Romans15:9 nokobana abatjhili badumise uZimu ngebanga lesirhawu sakhe njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Nje-ke ngizakudumisa Somnini, hlangana nezizwe; ngibhine iingoma zokudumisa ebizweni lakho.”" 
Romans15:10 Godu uthi: “Thabani nina abatjhili nikanye nabantu bakhe.” 
Romans15:11 Godu kwathiwa: “Dumisani uSomnini, noke nina abatjhili; abantu boke abamdumise.”" 
Romans15:12 Godu umphorofidi u-Isaya wabuye wathi: “Ipande yakaJese izakuza, iye, loyo ophakamela ukubusa abatjhili. Abatjhili bazakuba nethemba kuye.”" 
Romans15:13 Sengathi uZimu wethemba anganizalisa ngethabo loke kanye nokuthula ekukholweni ukuze nande ethembeni, ngamandla kaMoya oCwengileko." 
Romans15:14 Ngizizwa nginethemba ngani bazalwana bami kobana nina ngokwenu nizele beniphelele ngelwazi nelemuko begodu niyakwazi ukuyalana. 
Romans15:15 Nokho-ke nginitlolele ngesibindi kamanye amaphuzu ngokunikhumbuza ngebanga lomusa engiwuphiwe nguZimu 
Romans15:16 kobanyana ngibe yinceku kaKrestu Jesu kabatjhili. Ngiphiwe umsebenzi wobuphristi bona ngimemezele ivangeli lakaZimu ukuze abatjhili babe mnikelo owamukelekako kuye, bacwengiswe ngoMoya oCwengileko." 
Romans15:17 Yeke ngiyazigqaja kuKrestu Jesu emsebenzinami engiwenzela uZimu. 
Romans15:18 Ngalokho angizukuvelela, ngikhulume ngananyana yini ngaphandle kwalokho uKrestu akwenze ngami kobana ngizuze ukuzithoba kwabatjhili ngamezwi nangezenzo," 
Romans15:19 ngamandla weembonakaliso nemikarisomraro, ngamandla kaMoya kaZimu ukuze ngitjhumayele ivangeli lakaKrestu ukusuka eJerusalema ukuya mazombe ne-Iluriko." 
Romans15:20 Bekuseze kuyitjisakalo yami ukutjhumayela ivangeli lapha uKrestu angakaziwa khona ukuze ngingakheli esisekelweni somunye 
Romans15:21 njengombana umtlolo usithi: “Labo abangazange khebatjelwe ngaye bazakubona nalabo abangazange khebezwe ngaye bazakulemuka.” 
Romans15:22 Ngilokho-ke ebekuseze kungibamba kanenginengi ukuza kini. 
Romans15:23 Kodwana kwanjesi, njengombana kungasekho indawo ekumele ngisebenze kiyo eemfundenezi nje, begodu njengombana sele kuminyaka eminengi ngiseze ngihlulukela ukuza kini," 
Romans15:24 ngihlela ukuzonibona lokha nangiya eSipeyini. Nginethemba lokobana ngizazonibona nangidlulako nginikhombele bona ningisize ekhambeni lami lapho nasele ngihlezahlezi nani isikhatjhana. 
Romans15:25 Nokho-ke khona nje ngisaya eJerusalema ukuyokusiza abacwengileko lapho 
Romans15:26 ngombana bathaba kwamambala beMasedoniya nebe-Arhaya ukubuthelela umnikelo wokusiza abadududu eJerusalema. 
Romans15:27 Bakuthabela khulu ukwenza lokho begodu ngambala bebafanele babenzele ngombana nakube abatjhili bahlanganyela eembusisweni zamaJuda zakaMoya, kumele bahlanganyele namaJuda eembusisweni zabo zenyama." 
Romans15:28 Nje-ke nasele ngiwuqedile umsebenzi lo, begodu sele ngiqinisekisile bonyana bafunyana iinthelo lezi, ngizokuya eSipeyini ngidlule nginibona." 
Romans15:29 Ngiyazi bona lokha nangiza kini, ngizokuza ngokuphelela kwesibusiso sakaKrestu." 
Romans15:30 Ngiyanincenga bazalwana, ngeKosi yethu uJesu Krestu nangethando lakaMoya kobana nihlanganyele nami ekutjhabatjhekeni kwami ngokungithandazela kuZimu." 
Romans15:31 Iye, thandazani bonyana ngiphephe kabangakholwako eJudiya nokobana umsebenzami eJerusalema wamukeleke kabacwengileko lapho" 
Romans15:32 ukuze kuthi ngentando kaZimu, ngize kini ngethabo ngiphumule kanye nani." 
Romans15:33 Sengathi uZimu wokuthula angaba nani noke. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Ngiyambuka kini udadwethu uFuwebe, oyinceku yebandla leKhengirheriya." 
Romans16:2 Ngibawa bona nimamukele eKosini njengokufanele abacwengileko, nimsize ngakho koke angahle akudinge kini ngombana ube lisizo elikhulu kabanengi, nakimi." 
Romans16:3 Ngilotjhiselani kuPriska no-Akuyila, ababasebenzi kanye nami kuKrestu Jesu," 
Romans16:4 ababeka ipilwabo engozini ngebanga lami. Akusimi ngedwa obathokozako kodwana namabandla woke wabatjhili ayabathokoza. 
Romans16:5 Ngilotjhiselani nebandleni elihlanganyela emzini wabo. Yeningilotjhisele nemnganini wami othandekako u-Epayinetosi okwaba nguye umuntu wokuthoma esifundeni se-Asiya owatjhugulukela kuKrestu. 
Romans16:6 Lotjhisani nakuMariya, owanisebenzela kabudisi." 
Romans16:7 Lotjhisani u-Andronikha noJuniyasi abaziinhlobo zami ebengibotjhwe nabo. Baziwa khulu hlangana nabapostoli ngombana bona batjhugulukela kuKrestu qangi kunami. 
Romans16:8 Ningilotjhisele ku-Ampliyatusi, engimthanda khulu eKosini." 
Romans16:9 U-Uribanosi osisebenzi kanye nathi kuKrestu naye nimlotjhise kanye nomngani othandekako uStarhisi. 
Romans16:10 Lotjhisani u-Aphelesi ozizinywe bewamukeleka kuKrestu. Lotjhisani nakebomndeni ka-Aristobulusi 
Romans16:11 nakuHerodiyona isihlobo sami. Nilotjhise nakebomndeni kaNarikisu abaseKosini. 
Romans16:12 Ningilotjhisele nakuTrayifina noTrayifosa abaziinsebenzi eKosini. Ningakhohlwa uPherisisi othandekako naye osebenza nzima eKosini. 
Romans16:13 Ngilotjhiselani kuRufusi okhethiweko eKosini nakunina obekaseze angumma nakimi. 
Romans16:14 Ningilotjhisele ku-Asugikritusi, uFlegoni, uHerimesi, uPatrobhasi, uHerimasi kanye nabazwalana abanabo." 
Romans16:15 Lotjhisani uFilologosi, uJuliya, uNeriyusi nodadwabo, u-Olimpasi nabo boke abacwengileko abakanye nabo." 
Romans16:16 Lotjhisanani ngokukhethekileko. Amabandla woke kaKrestu ayanilotjhisa. 
Romans16:17 Ngiyanincenga bazalwana bona nibayelele labo ababanga ukwahlukana bese banibekela iinqabo endleleni yenu eziphikisana nesifundo enisifundileko. Khambelani kude nabo 
Romans16:18 ngombana abantu abanjalo abalotjhi iKosethu uKrestu, kodwana balotjha izisu zabo." 
Romans16:19 Boke sebezwile ngokuzithoba kwenu, nje-ke ngithabe khulu kwamambala ngani. Kodwana ngithanda bona nihlakaniphe kokuhle, nibe msulwa kokumbi." 
Romans16:20 Akusesekude bona uZimu wokuthula aqhoboze uSathana ngaphasi kweenyawo zenu. Sengathi umusa weKosi yethu uJesu ungaba nani. 
Romans16:21 Uyalotjhisa kini uThimothi esibambisene naye kanye noLukiyasi, uJasoni noSosipatrosi abaziinhlobo zami." 
Romans16:22 Mina Teritiyusi omtloli wencwadi le, ngiyanilotjhisa eKosini." 
Romans16:23 UGayusi osiphethe kuhle khulu nebandla loke lapha, naye uyalotjhisa. U-Erastusi omphathisikhwama wedorobhenapha kanye nomzalwana wethu uKwaritosi nabo bayalotjhisa." 
Romans16:24 Sengathi umusa weKosi yethu uJesu Krestu ungaba nani noke. Amen. 
Romans16:25 Kuye onamandla wokuniqinisa ngevangeli lami kanye nokutjhunyayelwa kwakaJesu Krestu, ngokwesambulo sefihlakalo ebeyiseze ifihlakele kusukela ekadeni," 
Romans16:26 kodwana kwanjesi esele yembuliwe bekwathi ngemitlolo yabaphorofidi, yaziswa kizo zoke izizwe ukuya ngomyalo kaZimu wanini nanini, ukuletha ukuzithoba kokukholwa," 
Romans16:27 iye, kuye okunguye yedwa uZimu ohlakaniphileko, akube lidumo isiphelani ngoJesu Krestu! Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 UPowula obizelwe ekubeni mpostoli kaKrestu Jesu ngokwentando kaZimu kanye nomfowethu uSosithenesi," 
1Corinthians1:2 kilo ibandla lakaZimu eKorinte, kilabo abacwengisiweko kuKrestu Jesu bebabizelwa ekucwengeni, bakanye nabo boke abakizo zoke iindawo, ababiza ibizo leKosi uJesu Krestu oyiKosabo neyethu:" 
1Corinthians1:3 Akube kini umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba neKosini uJesu Krestu. 
1Corinthians1:4 Ngihlala ngimthokoza uZimu ngani ngebanga lomusa wakhe eninikelwe wona kuKrestu Jesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 ukuze kuthi ezintweni zoke ninjinge ngokwekulumo nangelwazi lenu loke 
1Corinthians1:6 ngombana ubufakazi bethu ngoKrestu baqiniswa kini. 
1Corinthians1:7 Ngalokho azange nitlhayelelwe ngitjho nangesisodwa isipho sakaMoya ekulindeni kwenu ngokuncama ukubonakaliswa kweKosi uJesu Krestu. 
1Corinthians1:8 IKosi izoniqinisa bekube sekupheleni ukuze ningabi nomlandu ngelanga leKosi yethu uJesu Krestu. 
1Corinthians1:9 Uthembekile uZimu owanibizela ebudlelwaneni neNdodana yakhe, uJesu Krestu iKosi yethu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Ngiyanirabhela bazalwana ngebizo leKosi yethu uJesu Krestu bona noke nivumelane ukuze kungabikhona ukwahlukana phakathi kwenu. Bumbanani ngokupheleleko ngomkhumbulo munye nangombono munye. 
1Corinthians1:11 Ngitjho ngombana bazalwana bami, ngibikelwe yindlu kaRhilowesi bona kukhona ukunghwarana phakathi kwenu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kuthiwa omunye nomunye wenu ukhuluma kwakhe uthi: “Mina ngingewakaPowula”, omunye athi: “Mina ngingewaka-Apholo”, omunye athi: “Mina ngingewakaKhefasi”, omunye athi: “Mina ngingewakaKrestu”." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kghani uKrestu lo sele ahlukaniswe phakathi na? UPowula wakhe wanifela esiphambanweni? Nabhajadiswa ebizweni lakaPowula na? 
1Corinthians1:14 Nanje ngiyamthokoza uZimu ngombana azange ngibhabhadise namunye wenu ngaphandle kwakaKrisposi noGayusi. 
1Corinthians1:15 Ngalokho akungabikhona noyedwa ozahle asithi batjho wabhajadiswa ebizweni lami. 
1Corinthians1:16 Iye, ngabhabhadisa nomndeni kaStefana, ngaphezu kwalokho-ke angikhumbuli ngibhabhadisana nabanye abantu." 
1Corinthians1:17 UKrestu azange angithume bona ngizokubhabhadisa kodwana bona ngitjhumayele ivangeli, ingasi ngamezwi wokuhlakanipha kwabantu ukuze isiphambano sakaKrestu singakghuthulwa amandla waso." 
1Corinthians1:18 Umlayezo wesiphambano ubudlhadlha kilabo ababhubhako, kodwana kithi esisindiswako umamandla kaZimu." 
1Corinthians1:19 Ngitjho ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Ukuhlakanipha kwezazi ngizokutjhabalalisa, ngidide ukulemuka kwabahlakaniphileko.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Alo, siphike-ke isihlakaniphi na? Siphi isazimthetho? Uphi umazizoke walesisikhathi na? UZimu akakenzi ukuhlakanipha kwephaseli kwaba budlhadlha na?" 
1Corinthians1:21 Njengombana ekuhlakanipheni kwakaZimu, iphasi ngokuhlakanipha kwalo alizange limazi, yeke kwamthabisa uZimu bona kuthi ngobudlhadlha obutjhunyayelwako asindise labo abakholwako." 
1Corinthians1:22 AmaJuda afuna iimbonakaliso zemikarisomraro, amaGirigi wona afuna ukuhlakanipha," 
1Corinthians1:23 nanyana kunjalo thina sitjhumayela uKrestu abethelwe esiphambanweni; okusiqabo emaJudeni nobudlhadlha kabatjhili," 
1Corinthians1:23 nanyana kunjalo thina sitjhumayela uKrestu abethelwe esiphambanweni; okusiqabo emaJudeni nobudlhadlha kabatjhili," 
1Corinthians1:24 kodwana kilabo uZimu ababizileko, abamaJuda namaGirigi, sitjhumayela uKrestu omamandla kaZimu nokuhlakanipha kwakaZimu." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ubudlhadlha bakaZimu buhlakaniphile kunokwazi kwabantu nobuthakathaka bakaZimu bunamandla kunamandla wabantu. 
1Corinthians1:26 Khumbulani bona beninjani nanibizwako bazalwana. Inengi lenu beningakahlakaniphi ukuya ngokwesilinganiso sabantu; beningasibanengi ebenikwazi ukukhuluma, beningasibanengi ebenibelethelwe ekuhloniphekeni." 
1Corinthians1:27 UZimu wakhetha izinto ezibonakala zibudlhadlha emehlweni wephasi ukuhlazisa abahlakaniphileko; uZimu wakhetha izinto zephaseli ezibuthakathaka ukuhlazisa abanamandla. 
1Corinthians1:28 Iye, wakhetha lokho okuqalelwa phasi kwephaseli nokunyazekako, wakhetha nalokho okungekho ukuze achithe okukhona." 
1Corinthians1:29 Ngalokho-ke akungabikhona noyedwa ozazigqaja phambi kwakhe. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kungebanga lakhe kobana nibe kuKrestu Jesu kithi obe kuhlakanipha okuvela kuZimu, okutjho ukulunga kwethu, ukucwenga kanye nokuhlengwa kwethu" 
1Corinthians1:31 njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Akuthi loyo ozikhakhazisako, azikhakhazise eKosini.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Lokha nangifika kini bazalwana, azange ngize ngobugagu bokukhuluma namkha ngokuhlakanipha nangimemezela ubufakazi bakaZimu kini" 
1Corinthians2:2 ngombana ngaqunta ukungazi ilitho ngaphandle kwakaJesu Krestu, iye, yena abethelwe esiphambanweni." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ngize kini ngobuthakathaka nangokwesaba kanye nangokuqhaqhazela okukhulu. 
1Corinthians2:4 Umlayezwami kanye nokutjhumayela kwami bekungasi ngamezwi wokuhlakanipha nayengako, kodwana bekuveza amandla kaMoya" 
1Corinthians2:5 ukuze ukukholwa kwenu kungadzimeleli ekuhlakanipheni kwabantu kodwana emandleni kaZimu. 
1Corinthians2:6 Nokho-ke siyawukhuluma umlayezo wokuhlakanipha nasiphakathi kwabakhulileko, kodwana ingasi ukuhlakanipha kwephaseli namkha kwababusi besikhathesi, abazakubhubha baphele." 
1Corinthians2:7 Awa, sikhuluma ukuhlakanipha okufihlakeleko kwakaZimu. Iye, ukuhlakanipha ebekufihliwe nalokho uZimu akubekele iphazimulwethu ngaphambi kokuthoma kwesikhathi." 
1Corinthians2:8 Akakho ebabusini besikhathini lesi okulemukileko lokho ngombana nakube bebakulemukile, bebangekhe babethele iKosi yephazimulo." 
1Corinthians2:9 Kodwana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Akunalihlo elakubonako, akunandlebe eyakuzwako, akunamkhumbulo owakubambako lokho uZimu akulungiselele labo abamthandako.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Ngalokho uZimu ukwambulile lokho kithi ngoMoyakhe. 
1Corinthians2:11 Ngubani hlangana nabantu owazi imikhumbulo yomuntu ngaphandle kommoya womuntu ongaphakathi kwakhe na? Ngokunjalo-ke, akunamuntu owazi imizindlo kaZimu ngaphandle kwakaMoya kaZimu." 
1Corinthians2:12 Asikamukeli ummoya wephasi kodwana samukele uMoya obuya kuZimu ukuze sizwisise lokho uZimu asiphe khona ngesihle. 
1Corinthians2:13 Ngilokho-ke esikukhulumako, kungasi ngamezwi esiwafundiswe ngokuhlakanipha komuntu kodwana ngamezwi esiwafundiswe nguMoya, sizwakalisa iqiniso ngamezwi kaMoya." 
1Corinthians2:14 Umuntu onganaMoya akamukeli izinto ezivela kuMoya kaZimu ngombana zibudlhadlha kuye. Angeze azizwisise ngombana zizwisiswa ngokukaMoya. 
1Corinthians2:15 Umuntu kaMoya uhlolisisa koke kodwana yena ngokwakhe akakhambi ngokuhlolwa babantu. 
1Corinthians2:16 Ngitjho ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Ngubani owakhe wazi umkhumbulo kaSomnini kobana angabe amfundise na?” Nokho-ke thina sinomkhumbulo kaKrestu. 
1Corinthians3:1 Eqinisweni bazalwana, bengingekhe ngakhuluma nani njengabantu bakaMoya, kodwana bengizakukhuluma nani njengabantu benyama, iye, abasesemasana kuKrestu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nganondla ngebisi, ingasi ngokudla okuqinileko ngombana beningakakulungeli. Iye, nanje anikakulungeli" 
1Corinthians3:3 ngombana nisesebabantu benyama. Ngitjho ngombana nakhu kusesekhona umona nokucabana phakathi kwenu. Anisibo benyama naninjalo na? Anikaziphathi njengabantu abangakakhetheki na? 
1Corinthians3:4 Angithi omunye uthi: “Mina ngingewakaPowula.” Omunye athi: “Mina ngingewaka-Apholo.” Alo, anisibabantu abangakakhetheki naninjalo?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Ubegade ayini-ke u-Apholo loyo? UPowula yena uyini nje? Angithi sebaziinceku nje enakholwa ngazo kwaphela njengombana iKosi yabapha ngamunye umsebenzabo! 
1Corinthians3:6 Mina ngatjala imbewu, u-Apholo wayisezela, kodwana nguZimu owayikhulisako." 
1Corinthians3:7 Nje-ke bobabili, otjalako nosezelako abasililitho kodwana nguZimu yedwa okhulisako." 
1Corinthians3:8 Umuntu otjalako nosezelako banomnqopho munye, omunye nomunye uzokuvuzwa ukuya ngokomsebenzakhe." 
1Corinthians3:9 Thina sisebenza ndawonye singebakaZimu, nina niyisimu kaZimu begodu nimumakho kaZimu." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ngomusa uZimu angiphe wona, ngabeka isisekelo njengomakhi onekghono, nje-ke kukhona othileko owakhela phezu kwaso. Kodwana omunye nomunye kumele ayelele bona wakha njani." 
1Corinthians3:11 Ngitjho ngombana akekho omunye ongabeka isisekelo ngaphandle kwaloyo osele asibekile, okunguJesu Krestu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Nakube kukhona umuntu owakha phezu kwesisekelwesi, asebenzise igolide, isiliva, amatje abizako, iingodo, utjani namkha iinhlanga," 
1Corinthians3:13 umsebenzakhe uzokubonakaliswa ngalokho ongikho ngombana ilanga elikhethekileko lizowudalula. Uzokwambulwa ngomlilo begodu umlilo uzokuzizinya ubunjalo bomsebenzi womuntu. 
1Corinthians3:14 Nangabe umsebenzi womuntu owakhelwe esisekelweni uyadzimelela, uzakwamukeliswa umvuzo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Nakube uyatjha, uzakuloba; nokho yena ngokwakhe uzakusinda kodwana abe njengomuntu ophunyurhe emalangabini." 
1Corinthians3:16 Kghani anazi bona nina nilithempeli lakaZimu nokobana uMoya kaZimu uhlala ngaphakathi kwenu na? 
1Corinthians3:17 Loyo ochitha ithempeli lakaZimu, uZimu uzomchitha ngombana ithempeli lakaZimu licwengile." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ningazikhohlisi. Nakube nanyana ngubani wenu udlumbana bona uhlakaniphile ngokwesilinganiso sesikhathesi, kumele abe sidlhadlha ukuze abe ngohlakaniphileko." 
1Corinthians3:19 Ngitjho ngombana ukuhlakanipha kwephaseli kubudlhadlha phambi kwakaZimu ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ubamba abahlakaniphileko ebuqilini babo.” 
1Corinthians3:20 Umtlolo godu ubuye uthi: “USomnini uyazi bona imikhumbulo yabahlakaniphileko ililize.” 
1Corinthians3:21 Yeke, akungasabakhona ukuzigqaja ngomuntu ngombana koke kungekwenu" 
1Corinthians3:22 nanyana kungaba nguPowula, u-Apholo, uKhefasi namkha iphasi, ukuphila, ukufa, isikhathi sanje namkha esizako; koke kungekwenu." 
1Corinthians3:23 Kodwana nina ningebakaKrestu noKrestu ungewakaZimu. 
1Corinthians4:1 Kufanele kwazeke bona thina siziinceku zakaKrestu eziphathiswe iimfihlakalo zakaZimu. 
1Corinthians4:2 Yeke kuyadingeka bona labo abaphathisiweko babonakalise ukuthembeka kwabo. 
1Corinthians4:3 Kodwana kimi kuyinto encani bona ngingagwetjwa ngini namkha libandla labantu; iye, nami ngokwami angizigwebi." 
1Corinthians4:4 Unembeza wami akanaso isazela, nokho lokho akungenzi bona ngibe msulwa. YiKosi engigwebako." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ngalokho-ke ningagwebi ilitho kungakafiki isikhathi, lindani bekufike iKosi. Yona izokuveza emkhanyweni koke okufihlwe ebumnyameni beyembule neenhloso zeenhliziyo zabantu. Ngesikhatheso uZimu uzokwamukelisa omunye nomunye ukuthokozwa okumfaneleko." 
1Corinthians4:6 Nje-ke bazalwana, ngiqalise izintwezi kimi no-Apholo ngebanga lenu ukuze nifunde kithi lokho okutjhiwo sisitjho esithi: “Ningaphambuki kilokho okutloliweko.” Ngalokho-ke anisoze nakhetha umuntu oyedwa hlangana nabanye bese nizikhakhazisa ngaye." 
1Corinthians4:7 Kanti ngubani onenza nehluke phakathi kwabanye na? Yini eninakho eningazange nikwamukeliswe na? Khona-ke nakube nikwamukele, kubayini nizigqaje kube ngathi anikamukeliswa na?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Konjephana seniyasutha! Senaba ziinjinga! Senaba makhosi, iye ngaphandle kwethu! Maye ngifisa kangangani bona thana sele nimakhosi ukuze sibe makhosi kanye nani!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Ngitjho ngombana kubonakala inga uZimu thina bapostoli usibeke embukisweni ekugcineni komlandelande njengabantu abagwetjelwe ukufa ekundleni. Senziwe amabono wephasi loke, weengilozi ngitjho newabantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Thina sesesiziindlhayela zakaKrestu, kodwana nina niziinhlakaniphi kuKrestu! Thina sibuthakathaka, kodwana nina ninamandla! Niyahlonitjhwa, thina siyanyazwa!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Bekube ngalesisikhathi siyalamba besibulawe mrhawu, simaratha, siphethwe kumbi, sibozulani," 
1Corinthians4:12 sisebenza nzima ngezandla zethu. Nasithukiwako siyabusisa; nasizunywako siyakubekezelela lokho; 
1Corinthians4:13 nasiphudlhelwako siphendula ngokuthobeka. Bekube nje, siphenduke ifucufucu yephasi, iinzibi zelizwe." 
1Corinthians4:14 Anginitloleli lokhu ngombana ngifuna ukuniphathisa iinhloni, kodwana ngifuna ukuniyelelisa njengabantwana bami engibathandako." 
1Corinthians4:15 Sengitjho nanyana nineenkulungwana ezilitjhumi zabaluleki kuKrestu, aninabobaba abanengi ngombana kuKrestu Jesu mina ngibe nguyihlo ngevangeli." 
1Corinthians4:16 Nje-ke ngiyanirabhela bona ningilingise. 
1Corinthians4:17 Kungalokho nginithumela indodanami uThimothi engimthandako nothembekileko eKosini. Uzonikhumbuza ikambo yokuphila kwami kuKrestu Jesu evumelana nalokho engikufundisako kizo zoke iindawo emabandleni woke. 
1Corinthians4:18 Abanye benu sele bazikhukhumeza inga angeze bengiseza kini. 
1Corinthians4:19 Kanti-ke nangabe iKosi ivuma, ngizokuza msinyana. Nje-ke ekufikeni kwami, angizukufunyana kwaphela bona abantu abazikhukhumezako laba bakhuluma kangangani, kodwana ngizokufunyana nokobana banaliphi igunya." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ngitjho ngombana umbuso kaZimu awusikukhuluma kodwana umamandla. 
1Corinthians4:21 Alo, ninyula kuphi na? Ngifike kini ngiphethe iswazi, namkha ngize ngethando nangommoya ophasi na?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Eqinisweni kubikiwe bonyana kukhona ukuziphatha kumbi ngokwamabhayi phakathi kwenu, begodu okumhlobo ongenzekiko ngitjho naphakathi kwabarhedeni. Indoda ingena emabhayini nomkayise!" 
1Corinthians5:2 Kodwana ngapha nina niyazigqaja! Bekungakameli bona niphathwe ziinhloni, beningasaba nobudlelwano nomuntu owenze lokhu na?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Nanyana ngingekho kini siqu sami kodwana nginani ngommoya begodu sele ngimgwebile loyo owenze lokho njengombana bengizakwenza njalo nabegade ngiphakathi kwenu. 
1Corinthians5:4 Lokha nanihlangene ebizweni leKosi uJesu, nami ngibekhona ngommoya, namandla weKosi uJesu abe khona," 
1Corinthians5:5 nikelani indoda leyo kuSathana ukuze kubhujiswe imvelo yesono bese ummoyayo ubulungeke ngelanga leKosi. 
1Corinthians5:6 Ukuzikhukhumeza kwenu akukalungi. Anazi bonyana isibiliso esincani sibilisa yoke ihlama na? 
1Corinthians5:7 Lahlani isibiliso esidala ukuze nibe yihlama etja enganasibiliso, njengombana ninjalo, ngombana uKrestu oyimvana yethu yePhasika wenziwe umhlabelo." 
1Corinthians5:8 Ngalokho-ke asibulungeni umnyanya lo, kungabi ngesibiliso esidala, ekusibiliso seswili nokukhohlakala, kodwana kube sisikwa esinganasibiliso, isikwa sobuqotho neqiniso." 
1Corinthians5:9 Encwadini enganitlolela yona nganikhalima bonyana ningajayelani nabantu abaziphatha kumbi ngokwamabhayi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Angikhulumi ngabangakholwako abaziphethe kumbi, abamarhamaru, ababogalajana nabalotjha abosingazimu ngombana nange kunjalo bekuzakufuneka bonyana nisuke ephasinapha." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kodwana gadesi nginitlolela bonyana ningahlanganyeli nananyana ngubani ozibiza ngomzalwana kodwana khibe uziphethe kumbi ngokwamabhayi, omarhamaru, olotjha abosingazimu, othukanako, osidakwa noneswili. Nakungonjalo ningalingi nigome naye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Nginandabani nokugweba labo abangaphandle kwebandla na? Akukameli nigwebe abangebandleni na? 
1Corinthians5:13 UZimu uzabagweba labo abangaphandle. Angithi umtlolo uthi: “Qotjhani umuntu okhohlakeleko phakathi kwenu.” 
1Corinthians6:1 Nangabe omunye wenu unombango nomunye, vane athathe umbango lowo awuse kabangakholwako esikhundleni sokobana awulethe kabacwengileko na?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Anazi bonyana abacwengileko bazokugweba iphasi na? Yeke nakube nina nizokugweba iphasi, anikalungeli ukugweba amacala amancani na?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Anazi bona sizokugweba iingilozi na? Kangangani-ke izinto zepilo le na? 
1Corinthians6:4 Ngalokho-ke naninombango ngeendaba ezinjalo, vane nikhethe ngitjho namadoda aqalelwa phasi ebandleni kobana abe bagwebi na?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Ngitjho lokhu ukuze nibe neenhloni. Kuyakghoneka bona kungabikhona umuntu phakathi kwenu ohlakaniphe ngokwaneleko, ongabhalelwa kugweba umbango phakathi kwamakholwa na?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Kodwana esikhundleni salokho, umzalwana ugijimela ebandla ayokumangalela omunye umzalwana, koke lokho nikwenza phambi kwabantu abangakholwako!" 
1Corinthians6:7 Khona lokho ukufunyaneka nimangalelana kutjho khona bona senahlulwa kade. Kubayini ningafuni ukoniwa? Kubayini ningavumi ukudlelezelwa? 
1Corinthians6:8 Esikhundleni salokho, nina ngokwenu niyadlelezela beniphosise, koke lokho nikwenza kabanye abazalwana benu." 
1Corinthians6:9 Kghani anazi bona abakhohlakeleko abazukulidla ilifa lombuso kaZimu na? Ningakhohliswa: abaziphethe kumbi ngokomseme, abalotjha abosingazimu, abahlobongako, iintjhatjha zamadoda, abaduna abalalanako," 
1Corinthians6:10 amasela, abamarhamaru, iindakwa, abathukanako nabasozisako abazukulidla ilifa lombuso kaZimu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Abanye benu beninjalo, kodwana nahlanzwa, nacwengiswa, nalungisiswa ebizweni leKosi uJesu Krestu nangoMoya kaZimethu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Koke kuvumelekile kimi, kodwana akusikho koke okulisizo. Koke kuvumelekile kimi, kodwana akukho nakhunye okuzangibusa." 
1Corinthians6:13 Ukudla kungekwesisu, nesisu singesokudla, kodwana uZimu uzokubhubhisa kokubili. Umzimba awusingewokuziphatha kumbi ngokomseme, kodwana ungoweKosi neKosi ingeyomzimba." 
1Corinthians6:14 Ngamandlakhe uZimu wavusa iKosi ekufeni, nje-ke nathi uzosivusa." 
1Corinthians6:15 Anazi bona imizimba yenu izizitho zomzimba kaKrestu ngenyama na? Alo-ke, ngithathe izitho zakaKrestu ngiyozihlanganisa nezengwadla na? Awa, nakanye!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Kghani anazi bona loyo ozihlanganisa nengwadla uba nyamanye nayo na? Angithi kuthiwa: “Ababili bazakuba nyamanye.” 
1Corinthians6:17 Kodwana loyo ozihlanganisa neKosi, uba mmoya munye nayo." 
1Corinthians6:18 Balekelani imikhuba yokuziphatha kumbi ngokomseme. Zoke ezinye izono umuntu azenzako zingaphandle komzimbakhe, kodwana loyo owona ngokwamabhayi wonakalisa umzimbakhe." 
1Corinthians6:19 Anazi bona imizimba yenu ilithempeli lakaMoya oCwengileko ongaphakathi kwenu, enimamukele kuZimu nokobana anisingebenu na?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Nathengwa ngenani eliphezulu, ngalokho-ke hloniphani uZimu ngemizimba yenu." 
1Corinthians7:1 Malungana nalokho eningitlolele khona: Kuhle bona umuntu angathinti umfazi; 
1Corinthians7:2 kodwana ngebanga lobufebe esele bandile, kuhle bona leyo naleyo ndoda ibe nomfazi wayo, nomfazi abe nendoda yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:3 Indoda ayanelise umkayo nomfazi enze njalo. 
1Corinthians7:4 Umfazi akanalo igunya phezu komzimba wakhe, kodwana yindoda enalo; ngokunjalo nendoda ayinalo igunya phezu komzimba wayo, kodwana mfazi onalo." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ningagodlelani, ngaphandle kwalokha nanivumeleneko begodu kungekwesikhatjhana ukuze nizinikele emthandazweni. Ngemva kwalapho-ke nibuye godu nihlangane ukuze uSathana anganilingi ngebanga lokungakwazi kwenu ukuzibamba." 
1Corinthians7:6 Lokhu ngikutjho njengokuvumelana, ingasi njengomthetho." 
1Corinthians7:7 Bengifisa inga boke abantu bebangaba njengami; kodwana omunye nomunye umuntu unesiphiwo sakhe esibuya kuZimu, omunye unalesi kanti omunye unalesiya." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kabangakatjhadi kanye nabahlolokazi ngithi: Kuhle bona bahlale bangatjhadi njengami; 
1Corinthians7:9 kodwana nangabe abakghoni ukuzibamba, kumele batjhade ngombana kungcono ukutjhada kunokutjhiswa yikanuko." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kilabo abatjhadileko nginomyalo (ongabuyi kimi, kodwana obuya eKosini) othi: Umfazi akangahlukani nendoda yakhe;" 
1Corinthians7:11 kodwana nakube uyahlukana nayo, akahlale angakatjhadi njalo nakungasi njalo akabuyelane nendoda yakhe. Nendoda ayingatlhali umkayo." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kabanye ngithi (kutjho mina, akutjho iKosi): Nangabe umzalwana unomfazi ongakholwako, ovumako ukuhlala naye ije angakholwa njalo, akangamtlhali." 
1Corinthians7:13 Nangabe umfazi unendoda engakholwako begodu ivuma ukuhlala naye ije ingakholwa njalo, akangayitlhali." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ngitjho ngombana indoda engakholwako icwengisiwe ngomfazi wayo kanti nomfazi ongakholwako ucwengisiwe ngendodakhe ekholwako. Nakungasinjalo abantwana babo bebazakuba bantwana abangakahlambuluki, kodwana nje-ke bahlambulukile." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kodwana nakube ongakholwako uyatlhala, akatlhale. Indoda namkha umfazi okholwako akakabotjhelelwa nakunjalo. UZimu usibizele ekuphileni ngokuthula." 
1Corinthians7:16 Wazi ngani mfazi bona indoda yakho ingasindiswa ngawe na? Wazi ngani, wena ndoda bonyana umkakho angasindiswa ngawe na?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Omunye nomunye kumele ahlale endaweni iKosi embeke kiyo epilweni begodu nalapho uZimu ambizele khona. Lo-ke mthetho engiwubekako kiwo woke amabandla. 
1Corinthians7:18 Kukhona umuntu obesele asokiwe lokha nabizwako na? Akangabi njengongakasoki. Ukhona obegade angakabi ukusoka lokha nabizwako na? Akahlale anjalo angasoki. 
1Corinthians7:19 Ukusoka akusililitho nokungasoki akusililitho. Ukugcina imiyalo kaZimu ngikho okuqakathekileko. 
1Corinthians7:20 Omunye nomunye kumele ahlale angilokho ebegade angikho lokha uZimu nambizako. 
1Corinthians7:21 Bewulikhoboka lokha nawubizwako na? Akungakutshwenyi lokho, nanyana-ke nange unethuba lokukhululeka kuhle bona wenze njalo." 
1Corinthians7:22 Loyo obegade alikhoboka lokha nabizwa yiKosi, umumuntu weKosi okhululekileko; ngokunjalo nogade akhululekile lokha nabizwako, ulikhoboka lakaKrestu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Nathengwa ngenani eliphezulu, yeke ningabi makhoboka womuntu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Bazalwana, woke umuntu, njengombana anokuziphendulela kuZimu, akahlale ebujameni uZimu ambiza akibo." 
1Corinthians7:25 Nje-ke mayelana namatlawu: Anginawo umyalo obuya eKosini, kodwana ngigweba njengaloyo othembekako ngokomusa weKosi." 
1Corinthians7:26 Ngebanga lobudisi esele bukhona lobu, ngicabanga bona kuhle ukuzihlalela njengombana ninjalo." 
1Corinthians7:27 Utjhadile na? Ungatlhali. Awukatjhadi na? Ungasafuna umfazi. 
1Corinthians7:28 Kodwana nangabe uyathatha, awukenzi isono ngalokho, netlawu nalendako, alikoni ngalokho. Into nje kukobana loyo otjhadako uzokuqalana nemiraro eminengi epilweni, nje-ke ngilinga ukunibabalela kilokho." 
1Corinthians7:29 Engikutjhoko bazalwana kukobana isikhathi sifitjhani. Ukusuka gadesi, labo abanabafazi kumele baphile inga abanabafazi;" 
1Corinthians7:30 abazilileko babe njengabangakazili, abathabileko babe njengabangakathabi; abathenga okuthileko kube inga akusikho kwabo;" 
1Corinthians7:31 abasebenzisa izinto zephasi babe njengabangakanamatheli kizo. Ngitjho ngombana iphaseli ngokwesibumbeko salo sanje, liyadlula." 
1Corinthians7:32 Ngifuna bona ningatshwenyeki ngalitho. Indoda engakathathi ikhathalela iindaba zeKosi, ifuna ukwazi bona ingayithabisa njani iKosi." 
1Corinthians7:33 Kodwana ethetheko ikhathalela iindaba zephaseli, ifuna ukwazi bona ingamthabisa njani umkayo." 
1Corinthians7:34 Ipilo yayo ihlukene phakathi. Nomfazi ongakendi namkha itlawu likhathalela iindaba zeKosi: Ihloso yalo kuzinikela eKosini ngomzimba nangomphefumulo. Kodwana nakumfazi owendileko ukhathalela iindaba zephaseli, ufuna ukwazi bona angayithabisa njani indoda yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ngitjho lokhu ukuze nisizeke, ingasi ukuniqabela kodwana ukuze niphile ngendlela efaneleko ninokuzinikela okupheleleko eKosini." 
1Corinthians7:36 Nakube umuntu udlumbana bona wenza okungakafaneli malungana netlawu alibonileko, nalo nakube iminyaka yalo iyakhamba begodu lizizwela bona sele lifuna ukwenda, umuntu loyo akenze okufaneleko. Akoni ngalokho, abatjhade." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kodwana umuntu oqede nomkhumbulwakhe, ongakagandeleleki kodwana okghona ukujamela ilizwi lakhe, noqede nomkhumbulwakhe bona angendisi itlawu lakhe, naye loyo wenza kuhle." 
1Corinthians7:38 Naloyo owendisa itlawu lakhe wenza kuhle, kodwana ongalendisiko wenza kuhle khulu." 
1Corinthians7:39 Umfazi ubopheleleke endodeni yakhe qobana isaphila. Kodwana indoda yakhe yahlongakala, utjhaphulukile bona angenda nanyana kiyiphi ayithandako, kwaphela nakube iyakholwa eKosini." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ngesingami, kuhle bona ahlale anjalo angabe asenda, nokho ngiyacabanga bonyana nami nginoMoya kaZimu." 
1Corinthians8:1 Malungana nokudla okuhlatjelwe abosingazimu: Siyazi bona soke sinelwazi. Ilwazi liyakhukhumeza, kodwana ithando liyakha." 
1Corinthians8:2 Umuntu odlumbana bona kukhona akwaziko, akakabukwazi ngombana usafanele azi." 
1Corinthians8:3 Kodwana umuntu othanda uZimu waziwa nguZimu. 
1Corinthians8:4 Nje-ke, malungana nokugoma ukudla okuhlatjelwe abosingazimu: Siyazi bona usingazimu akasililitho ephasini nokobana akekho omunye uZimu ngaphandle kwaloyo oyedwa." 
1Corinthians8:5 Ngitjho nanyana kuthiwa kukhona okubizwa bona bozimu, nanyana kusezulwini namkha ephasini, (ngambala kunezinto ekuthiwa bozimu abanengi nekuthiwa ziinkosi ezinengi)" 
1Corinthians8:6 nokho kithi munye uZimu, uBaba, okuvela kuye zoke izinto begodu nesiphilela yena; yinye kwaphela iKosi, nguJesu Krestu, ngaye okwavela koke okukhona begodu nesiphila ngaye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kodwana akusibo boke abanelwazi leli. Abanye abantu basangenelele emikhubeni yabosingazimu kangangobana nabagoma ukudla okunjalo badlumbana bona kuhlatjelwe abosingazimu, nje-ke njengobana unembeza wabo abuthakathaka, uyasilaphazeka." 
1Corinthians8:8 Nokho ukudla akusitjhidezi eduze kwakaZimu; asibi bambi nasingagomiko, godu asibi ngabangcono nasigomako." 
1Corinthians8:9 Tjhejani nokho bonyana ikululeko yenu ingabi sikhubekiso kababuthakathaka. 
1Corinthians8:10 Ngitjho ngombana nakukhona ononembeza obuthakathaka, okubonako wena onelwazi leli ugoma ethempelini labosingazimu, akazukukhuthazeka bonyana agome lokho okuhlatjelwe abosingazimu na?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ngaleyondlela umzalwana obuthakathaka lo, uJesu amfelako, uzakulimala ngebanga lelwazi lakho." 
1Corinthians8:12 Lokha nanona kubazalwana benu ngalendlela, nilimaze unembeza wabo, nona kuKrestu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Yeke nakube lokho engikugomako kubanga bona umzalwana wami awele esonweni, angeze bengisakugoma ukuze ngingamkhubekisi." 
1Corinthians9:1 Angikakhululeki na? Angisuye umpostoli na? Angikaboni uJesu iKosi yethu na? Nina anisiwo umphumela womsebenzami eKosini na? 
1Corinthians9:2 Nanyana ngingeze ngaba mpostoli kabanye kodwana kini khona nginguye! Ngitjho ngombana nina nisigibo sobupostoli bami eKosini. 
1Corinthians9:3 Lokhu kukuziphendulela kwami kilabo abangisolako. 
1Corinthians9:4 Asinalungelo lokugonywako nokuselwako na? 
1Corinthians9:5 Asinalungelo lokukhamba nomfazi okholwako njengombana kwenza abanye abapostoli kanye nabafowabo leKosi kanye noKhefasi na? 
1Corinthians9:6 Namkha ngimi noBharinabhasi kwaphela ekumele sisebenzele ukudla na? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ngubani osebenza njengejoni ngeendleko zakhe na? Ngubani otjala isidiribe kodwana angagomi amadiribaso na? Ngubani owelusa umhlambi kodwana angaseli ibisi lawo na? 
1Corinthians9:8 Kghani ngitjho lokhu ngokususela ebantwini na? Umthetho awutjho njalo nawo na? 
1Corinthians9:9 Kutloliwe emthethweni kaMosi kwathiwa: “Ungafaki ikomo isifonyo nayibhula amabele.” Kghani uZimu ukhathalela iinkomo na? 
1Corinthians9:10 Kanti bekangakaqalisi kithi lokha nakhuluma lokhu na? Iye, lokhu kwatlolelwa thina ngombana lokha umlimi nalimako nombhuli nabhulako, lokho bakwenza ngethemba lokobana bazokwabelwa isivuno." 
1Corinthians9:11 Nakube sitjele imbewu kaMoya hlangana nani, kubudisi bonyana sivune kwenyama kini na?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Nakube abanye banelungelo lokondliwa phakathi kwenu, thina asikafaneli samukele ngaphezu kwalokho na? Kodwana azange khesilisebenzise ilungelweli. Esikhundleni salokho sinyamezelele yoke into kunobana siliye ivangeli lakaKrestu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Anazi bona labo abasebenza ngethempelini bafumana ukudla kwabo ethempelini nalabo abalotjha e-aldarini babelana lokho okulethwe e-aldarini na? 
1Corinthians9:14 Ngokunjalo-ke iKosi ikubekile bona labo abatjhumayela ivangeli bafanele bafumane isondlo sabo evangelini. 
1Corinthians9:15 Kodwana mina angizange ngisebenzise nalinye lamalungelo la. Nokho angitloli lokhu ngethemba lokobana nizangenzela izintwezo. Kungaba ngcono ngife kunobana umuntu angemuke ukuzikhakhazisa lokhu. 
1Corinthians9:16 Nokho nangitjhumayela ivangeli, angikwazi ukuzikhakhazisa ngombana ngikatelelekile bona ngitjhumayele. Maye mina nakube angitjhumayeli ivangeli!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Nakube ngitjhumayela ngokuzithandela kwami, nginomvuzo; nakube angikwenzi ngokuzithandela, kutjho bona ngiphetha lokho engikuphathisiweko." 
1Corinthians9:18 Alo-ke umvuzo wami uyini na? Sengilokhu kokuthi ekutjhumayeleni ivangeli, ngilitjhumayela simahla, ngalokho angisebenzisi ilungelo lami ekulitjhumayeleni." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ngitjho ngombana nanyana ngikhululekile begodu ngingasilikhoboka lomuntu, ngazenza ikhoboka labo boke ukuze ngizuze abanengi." 
1Corinthians9:20 KumaJuda ngaba njengomJuda ukuze ngizuze amaJuda. Kilabo abangaphasi komthetho, ngaba njengongaphasi komthetho (nanyana mina ngokwami ngingasingaphasi komthetho) ukuze ngizuze labo abangaphasi komthetho." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kilabo abanganamthetho, ngaba njengonganamthetho (nanyana ngingakatjhaphuluki emthethweni kaZimu, ngisemthethweni kaKrestu) ukuze ngizuze labo abanganamthetho." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kilabo ababuthakathaka, ngaba buthakathaka ukuze ngizuze ababuthakathaka. Ngibe ngikho koke kibo boke abantu ukuze kuthi ngeendlela zoke ngisindise abathileko." 
1Corinthians9:23 Koke lokhu ngikwenzela ivangeli ukuze nami ngibe nesabelo eembusisweni zalo. 
1Corinthians9:24 Anazi bona emgijimweni boke abagijimi bayagijima, kodwana umvuzo munye na? Gijima ngendlela yokobana ufunyane umvuzo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Boke abaphalisana emdlalweni bathoma ngokuzithabulula ngokuncamileko. Benza lokho ukuze bamukele isihlohlo esingekhe sabambelela; kodwana thina sikwenza kobana sizuze isihlohlo sesiphelani. 
1Corinthians9:26 Yeke angigijimi njengomuntu ovathazelako; angilwi njengomuntu ofutha ummoya. 
1Corinthians9:27 Awa, ngiyawukhandla umzimbami ngiwenze ikhoboka ukuze kuthi ngemva kobana ngitjhumayeze abanye, mina ngokwami ngingakhuthi ekwamukeleni umvuzo." 
1Corinthians10:1 Yeke angithandi bazalwana bona ningabi nelwazi lokobana abakhokho bethu boke bebangaphasi kwelifu begodu boke bayama elwandle. 
1Corinthians10:2 Boke babhabhadiselwa kuMosi ngelifini bangelwandle. 
1Corinthians10:3 Boke bagoma ukudla kunye kwakaMoya," 
1Corinthians10:4 basela isiselo sinye sakaMoya ngombana basela edwaleni lakaMoya ebelibaphekelela. Idwalelo belinguKrestu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Nanyana kunjalo uZimu azange athokoze ngenengi labo; iindumbu zabo zarhatjheka kilo loke irhalawumba. 
1Corinthians10:6 Izintwezi zenzeka kobana zibe sibonelo ukusikhandela bona singabeki iinhliziyo zethu ezintweni ezimbi njengombana benza bona. 
1Corinthians10:7 Ningabi balotjhi babosingazimu njengombana abanye babo benza ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Abantu bahlala phasi bagoma bebasela, basikima bagida.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Asingenzi izenzo zokukhohlakala ngokwamabhayi njengombana abanye babo benza, bekwathi ngelanga linye kwabhujiswa iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nantathu zabo." 
1Corinthians10:9 Asingayilingi iKosi, njengombana abanye babo benza, babulawa ziinyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Godu ningarhononi njengombana abanye babo benza, babulawa yingilozi ebhubhisako." 
1Corinthians10:11 Izintwezi zabehlela zaba sibonelo bezatlolwa njengesiyeleliso kithi thina esele sifikelwe kuphela kweenkhathi. 
1Corinthians10:12 Nje-ke nawudlumbana bona ujame udzimelele, yelela bona ungawi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Akunasilingo esiniwisileko ngaphandle kwalokho okujayelekileko ebantwini. Nje-ke uZimu uthembekile; angeze avume bona nilingwe ngaphezu kwamandlenu. Kodwana nanilingwako, uzaninikela nendlela yokuphepha ukuze nijamelane naso." 
1Corinthians10:14 Nje-ke, bangani bami abathandekako, balekelani ukulotjha abosingazimu." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ngikhuluma nabantu abavuthiweko, ziboneleni nina lokho engikutjhoko." 
1Corinthians10:16 Ikapho yokuthokoza esithokoza ngayo, ayisiyo yokuzibandakanya eengazini zakaKrestu na? Isikwa esisihlephulako akusiso sokuzibandakanya emzimbeni kaKrestu na?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Njengombana kunesikwa sinye nje, simzimba munye nanyana sibanengi ngombana soke sihlanganyela isikwa esisodwa." 
1Corinthians10:18 Khumbulani abantu bakwa-Israyeli: Kanti labo abagoma umhlabelo abahlanganyeli e-aldarini na? 
1Corinthians10:19 Alo, ngitjho bona umhlabelo owenzelwe usingazimu ulilitho namkha usingazimu ulilitho na?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Awa, nginqophe ekutheni imihlabelo yabarhedeni yenzelwe amadimoni; ingasi uZimu. Nje-ke angithandi bona nihlanganyele namadimoni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Angekhe nasela ikapho yeKosi godu nibuye nisele neyamadimoni. Angeze naba nehlanganyelo etafuleni leKosi nelamadimoni. 
1Corinthians10:22 Kghani sifuna ukuvusa isikhwele seKosi na? Sinamandla kunayo na? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Koke kuvumelekile” kodwana akusikho koke okusizako. Iye, “koke kuvumelekile” kodwana akusikho koke okwakhako." 
1Corinthians10:24 Akungabikhona ozifunela ubuhle bakhe, kodwana akafune nekwabanye." 
1Corinthians10:25 Gomani koke okuthengiswa esilarheni ngaphandle kokubuza imibuzo ngonembeza 
1Corinthians10:26 ngombana: “Iphasi nakho koke okukilo ngekwakaSomnini.” 
1Corinthians10:27 Nangabe ongakholwako animemela ekudleni, nithanda ukuya, gomani nanyana yini ebekwa phambi kwenu ngaphandle kokubuza imibuzo kanembeza." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kodwana nangabe omunye uthi kini: “Lokhu kuhlatjelwe abosingazimu,” ningabe nisakugoma ngebanga laloyo otjho njalo nangebanga lakanembeza," 
1Corinthians10:29 unembeza womunye umuntu, angitjho unembeza wenu. Ngitjho ngombana ilungelo lami lizakugwetjelwani ngonembeza womunye umuntu na?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Nangabe ngihlanganyela ekudleni ngokuthokoza, kubayini ngifanele ngilahlwe ngebanga lalokho engithokoza uZimu ngakho na?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Nje-ke nanyana niyagoma namkha niyasela namkha nenza nanyana yini, kwenzeni koke mayelana nedumo lakaZimu." 
1Corinthians10:32 Ningabangeli namunye bona akhubeke, kungaba mJuda, umGirigi namkha ibandla lakaZimu" 
1Corinthians10:33 njengombana nami ngilinga ukuthokozisa woke umuntu ngazo zoke iindlela. Angizifuneli mina ubuhle kodwana ubuhle babanengi ukuze basindiswe. 
1Corinthians11:1 Ngilingisani njengombana nami ngilingisa uKrestu. 
1Corinthians11:2 Ngiyanibuka ngombana ningikhumbula ezintweni zoke begodu nibambelela eemfundisweni njengombana ngazidlulisela kini. 
1Corinthians11:3 Kodwana ngifuna nazi bonyana ihloko yenye nenye indoda nguKrestu, ihloko yomfazi yindoda, kanti ihloko kaKrestu nguZimu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Enye nenye indoda ethandaza namkha ephorofida igubuzese ihloko irhubutjha ihlokwayo. 
1Corinthians11:5 Kodwana omunye nomunye umfazi othandaza namkha ophorofida angakagubuzesi ihloko urhubutjha ihlokwakhe, sekufana nalokha ihlokwakhe nayigudiweko." 
1Corinthians11:6 Nangabe umfazi akagubuzesi ihlokwakhe, kumele agude begodu nakube kulihlazo kobana umfazi arhune namkha agude, kumele agubuzese ihlokwakhe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Indoda ayikafaneli ukugubuzesa ihlokwayo ngombana imfanekiso nedumo lakaZimu; kodwana umfazi ulidumo lendoda. 
1Corinthians11:8 Ngitjho ngombana indoda ayizange ivele emfazini kodwana mfazi owavela endodeni. 
1Corinthians11:9 Indoda azange yadalelwa umfazi kodwana mfazi owadalelwa indoda. 
1Corinthians11:10 Ngebangelo namkha ngebanga leengilozi umfazi kumele abe netshwayo lokuphathwa ehlokwakhe. 
1Corinthians11:11 EKosini nokho umfazi akakazijameli ayedwa ngaphandle kwendoda, nendoda ayikazijameli iyodwa ngaphandle komfazi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Njengombana umfazi wavela endodeni, ngokunjalo nendoda ibelethwa mfazi. Kodwana koke kubuya kuZimu." 
1Corinthians11:13 Ziboneleni nina ngokwenu bona kufanele umfazi athandaze uZimu angakagubuzesi ihlokwakhe na? 
1Corinthians11:14 Imvelo ngokwayo ayinifundisi bonyana nakube indoda ineenhluthu ezide kulihlazo kiyo," 
1Corinthians11:15 kodwana umfazi naneenhluthu ezide kulidumo kuye na? Uphiwe iinhluthu ezide bona zibe sisembeso sakhe. 
1Corinthians11:16 Nakube ukhona ofuna ukuphika ikani ngalokhu, asinawo omunye umkhuba onjalo thina kanye namabandla akuZimu." 
1Corinthians11:17 Emiyalweni elandelako, anginakho ukunibonga ngombana imihlangano yenu ibanga umonakalo kunobana ibange ubuhle." 
1Corinthians11:18 Kokuthoma nje ngizwa batjho nanihlanganako njengebandla, kuba khona ukuhlukana phakathi kwenu, begodu ngithanda ukukukholwa lokho." 
1Corinthians11:19 Kufanele kube khona ukuhlukana phakathi kwenu ukuze kubonakale bona ngibaphi abaneqiniso. 
1Corinthians11:20 Lokha nanihlanganako, kusuke kungasiso isidlo seKosi enisigomako" 
1Corinthians11:21 ngombana nanigomako, omunye nomunye wenu uragela phambili agome ngaphandle kokulindela abanye. Omunye uhlala alambile kanti omunye uyadakwa." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kanti aninamakhaya lapha ningagomela beniselele khona na? Namkha ninyaza ibandla lakaZimu benirhubutjhe labo abanganalitho na? Ngizakuthini kini na? Nginibuke ngalokho na? Nakanye! 
1Corinthians11:23 Ngakwamukela eKosini lokho engikudlulisela kini kokuthi: IKosi uJesu ngobusuku eyakhatjhelwa ngabo, yathatha isikwa," 
1Corinthians11:24 kwathi sele ithokozile kuZimu, yasihlephula yathi: “Lokhu mzimba wami onikelwe nina, kwenzeni lokhu ukuze ningikhumbule.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Ngokunjalo, ngemva kobana sele bagomile, yabuye yathatha ikapho yathi: “Ikapho le isivumelwano esitjha eengazini zami. Kwenzeni lokhu njalo lokha naniyiselako ukuze ningikhumbule.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Yeke njalo lokha nanigoma isikwa lesi benisele nekapho le, nimemezela ukufa kweKosi kufikela beyibuye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ngalokho-ke loyo ogoma isikwa lesi namkha asele ikapho yeKosi ngokungakafaneli, uzakuba nomlandu wokona emzimbeni kanye neengazini zeKosi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Umuntu kumele azihlolisise ngaphambi kobana agome isikwa abe asele nekapho. 
1Corinthians11:29 Loyo ogomako abe asele ngaphandle kokuhlukanisa umzimba weKosi, uzigomela abe aziselele umlandu." 
1Corinthians11:30 Kungebangelo abanengi phakathi kwenu babuthakathaka begodu bayagula kanti inengi lenu sele lilele. 
1Corinthians11:31 Kodwana nakube besizigweba thina, besingeze sagwetjwa." 
1Corinthians11:32 Nasigwetjwa yiKosi, siyakhalinywa ukuze singalahlwa kanye nephasi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana, lokha nanihlanganako kobana nigome, lindanani." 
1Corinthians11:34 Nakube kukhona olambileko, akagome ekhaya ukuze kuthi nanihlanganako kungabi ngokokugwetjwa. Mhla ngibuyako ngizaninikela eminye imiyalo." 
1Corinthians12:1 Yeke mayelana neemphiwo zakaMoya, bazalwana angithandi bona ningabi nelwazi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Niyazi bona lokha nanisesebarhedeni, nathelelwa ngommoya wokudurha kobana nidlhemadlheme ngemva kweenthombembazwa ezingakhulumiko." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ngalokho-ke ngiyanitjela bonyana akakho ongakhuluma ngoMoya kaZimu athi: “UJesu akanikelelwe!” Godu akakho umuntu ongathi: “UJesu uyiKosi”, ngaphandle kobana atjho lokho ngoMoya oCwengileko." 
1Corinthians12:4 Kunemihlobo eyahlukeneko yezipho kodwana ngoMoya munye. 
1Corinthians12:5 Kunemisebenzi eyahlukeneko, kodwana ngeKosi yinye." 
1Corinthians12:6 Kunokusebenza okuhlukeneko, kodwana yena uZimu loyo nguye okwenza koke kibo boke abantu." 
1Corinthians12:7 Nje-ke omunye nomunye unikelwe ukuzibonakalisa kwakaMoya ukuze kusizeke woke umuntu. 
1Corinthians12:8 Omunye uphiwe ngoMoya umlayezo wokuhlakanipha, omunye uphiwe umlayezo welwazi ngaye uMoya loyo." 
1Corinthians12:9 Omunye uphiwe ukukholwa ngaye uMoya loyo, omunye uphiwe ezinye izipho zokuphilisa ngaye uMoya loyo." 
1Corinthians12:10 Omunye uphiwe amandla wemikarisomraro, omunye uphiwe ukuphorofida, omunye uphiwe ukuhlukanisa imimoya, omunye uphiwe ukukhuluma ngamalimi ahlukeneko, kanti omunye uphiwe ukurhumutjha amalimi lawo." 
1Corinthians12:11 Koke lokhu kumsebenzi kaMoya munye, begodu unikela omunye nomunye njengokubona kwakhe." 
1Corinthians12:12 Umzimba munye, nanyana unezitho ezinengi. Godu nanyana unezitho ezinengi, zibumba umzimba owodwa. Kunjalo-ke nangoKrestu" 
1Corinthians12:13 ngombana soke sabhajadiswa ngoMoya munye emzimbeni munye nanyana ungabamJuda namkha umGirigi, ikhoboka namkha otjhaphulukileko begodu soke saphiwa uMoya munye kobana sisele kuye." 
1Corinthians12:14 Nje-ke umzimba awukakhiwa ngesitho esisodwa kodwana ngezitho ezinengi. 
1Corinthians12:15 Nange inyawo lingathi: “Njengombana ngingasiso isandla nje, mina angisingewomzimba”, ngalokho angeze kwalenza bona lingabi yingcenye yomzimba." 
1Corinthians12:16 Godu nange indlebe ingathi: “Njengombana ngingasililihlo nje, angisingewomzimba”, ngalokho angeze kwayenza bona ingabi yingcenye yomzimba." 
1Corinthians12:17 Nakube umzimba woke bewungaba lilihlo, bewuzokuba kuphi umuzwa wokuzwa na? Nakube umzimba woke bewungaba yindlebe, bewuzokuba kuphi umuzwa wokunukelela na?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kodwana uZimu uhlele izitho zomzimba, esinye nesinye sazo saba ngendlela afuna bona sibe ngayo." 
1Corinthians12:19 Nabegade zoke njalo zisisitho sinye, umzimba bewuzokuba kuphi na?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Njengombana kunje, izitho zinengi, kodwana umzimba munye." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ilihlo angekhe latjho esandleni lathi: “Wena angikudingi” nehloko angeze yathi eenyaweni: “Nina anginidingi.” 
1Corinthians12:22 Esikhundleni salokho, izitho zomzimba ezibonakala inga zibuthakathaka, ziqakatheke khulu." 
1Corinthians12:23 Kanti-ke nezitho esicabanga bonyana azikahlonipheki kangako, sizihlonipha khulu. Izitho ezinganasithunzi ziphathwa ngeenhloni khulu," 
1Corinthians12:24 khisibe lezo ezinesithunzi azidingi ukuphathwa ngokukhethekileko. UZimu uhlanganise amalungu womzimba bewahloniphisa khulu izitho ezithathelwa phasi 
1Corinthians12:25 ukuze kungabikhona ukwahlukana emzimbeni, kodwana izitho zawo zikhathalelane ngokulinganako." 
1Corinthians12:26 Nangabe isitho esisodwa siyatlhaga, zoke ezinye zitlhaga kanye naso; nangabe isitho esisodwa siyahlonitjhwa, zoke ezinye zithaba naso." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nje-ke nina nimzimba kaKrestu, omunye nomunye wenu uyingcenye yawo." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ebandleni, uZimu ujamise koke ngerherho, ukuthoma ngabapostoli, kulandele abaphorofidi, kuze abafundisi bese kuba ngabenza imikarisomraro nalabo abaneemphiwo zokuphilisa, labo abakghona ukusiza abanye, labo abaneemphiwo zokuphatha kanye nalabo abaneemphiwo zokukhuluma ngamalimi ahlukeneko." 
1Corinthians12:29 Boke babapostoli na? Babaphorofidi boke na? Babafundisi boke na? Benza imikarisomraro boke na? 
1Corinthians12:30 Baneemphiwo zokuphilisa boke na? Boke bakhuluma ngamalimi na? Boke bayarhumutjha na? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kodwana tjhisekelani iimphiwo ezikulu. Nje-ke ngizonikhombisa indlela ezidlula zoke. 
1Corinthians13:1 Nanyana ngingakhuluma ngamalimi wabantu namkha weengilozi, kodwana nginganathando, sengifana nekoporo ebanga itjhada namkha isimbi elilako." 
1Corinthians13:2 Nanginesiphiwo sokuphorofida, ngikghona ukuzwisisa zoke iimfihlakalo begodu nginelwazi; nginokukholwa okutjhidisa iintaba, kodwana nginganathando, angisililitho." 
1Corinthians13:3 Nangipha abadududu koke enginakho benginikele umzimbami ekutjhisweni, kodwana nginganalo ithando, angisililitho." 
1Corinthians13:4 Ithando liyabekezela, ithando linesisa, alinamona, alizikhukhumezi, alizitjhayi;" 
1Corinthians13:5 aliziphathi ngendlela engakafaneli, alizifuneli kwalo, alinasicasucasu, alibibhi imilandu." 
1Corinthians13:6 Ithando alithokoziswa bubumbi kodwana lithabela iqiniso," 
1Corinthians13:7 lembesa yoke into, likholwa yoke into, lirhuluphela yoke into begodu linyamezelela koke." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ithando alihluleki. Kodwana lapha kuneemphorofido khona, zizakuphela; lapha kunamalimi khona, azakuthuliswa; lapha kunelwazi khona, lizakudlula." 
1Corinthians13:9 Ngitjho ngombana sazi ingcenye begodu siphorofida ingcenye," 
1Corinthians13:10 kodwana nasele kufika ukupheleliswa, ukungakapheleliswa kuyanyamalala." 
1Corinthians13:11 Nangisesemntwana bengikhuluma njengomntwana, ngicabanga njengomntwana, ngizwisisa njengomntwana. Kwathi lokha nangiba yindoda, ngahlukana neendlela zobuntwana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Kwagadesi sisabona lififi esibonibonini, kodwana ngesikhatheso sizokubonana ubuso nobuso. Okwanje ngazi ingcenye, ngesikhatheso ngizokwazi koke ngokuzeleko njengombana nami ngaziwa ngokuzeleko." 
1Corinthians13:13 Nje-ke okuthathu lokhu kujamile: ukukholwa, ithemba nethando. Kodwana okungaphezu kwakho koke lithando." 
1Corinthians14:1 Tjhisekelani ukuba nethando bese nirhuluphela iimphiwo zakaMoya, khulukhulu isiphiwo sokuphorofida." 
1Corinthians14:2 Loyo okhuluma ngamalimi akakhulumi nabantu kodwana ukhuluma noZimu. Akunamuntu omzwako; ukhuluma iimfihlakalo emmoyenakhe. 
1Corinthians14:3 Kodwana loyo ophorofidako ukhuluma nabantu ukuze baqine amandla, bakhuthazeke bebaduduzeke." 
1Corinthians14:4 Loyo okhuluma ngamalimi, uzakha yena emmoyeni, kodwana ophorofidako wakha ibandla." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ngithanda bona omunye nomunye wenu akhulume ngamalimi, kodwana kungcono bona niphorofide. Loyo ophorofidako mkhulu kunaloyo okhuluma ngamalimi, ngaphandle kwanange awarhumutjha ukuze ibandla lakheke." 
1Corinthians14:6 Nje-ke bazalwana, nange ngisiza kini ngifike ngikhulume ngamalimi, kuzonisiza ngani lokho na? Akunisizi ngalitho, ngaphandle kwanange nginilethela isambulo, ilwazi, isiphorofido namkha ilizwi lokuyala." 
1Corinthians14:7 Ngitjho nezintweni ezingaphiliko ezenza itjhada njengenghwani namkha iharibha, umuntu uzakwazi njani bona zilila ngayiphi indlela nakube akukho ukuhlukanisa ngomdumo na?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Godu nakube iporompita ayizwakali kuhle bona ibiza abantu bonyana baye epini, ngubani ozazilungiselela ipi na?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Ngokunjalo-ke nani, nakube anikhulumi okuzwakalako ngamalimi wenu, bazakuzwa njani abanye abantu bona nithini na? Nizabe nikhulumela emmoyeni." 
1Corinthians14:10 Kunamalimi okungazazeki bonyana manengi ephasinapha, kodwana akukho nalinye lawo elinganahlathululo." 
1Corinthians14:11 Nje-ke nakube angizwisisi okutjhiwo ngiloyo okhulumako, kutjho bona ngiliphandle kiloyo okhulumako, naye uliphandle kimi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Kunjalo nakini. Njengombana nitjhisekela ukwamukela iimphiwo zakaMoya nje, rhuluphelani khulu lezo ezakha ibandla." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ngalokho-ke nanyana ngubani okhuluma ngamalimi, kufanele athandaze bonyana akghone ukuhlathulula lokho akukhulumako." 
1Corinthians14:14 Ngitjho ngombana nangithandaza ngamalimi, kuthandaza ummoyami, kodwana umkhumbulwami awuhlanganyeli kilokho." 
1Corinthians14:15 Alo ngizakwenzanjani na? Ngizokuthandaza ngommoyami, ngithandaze nangomkhumbulwami, ngizokuvuma ngommoyami godu ngivume nangomkhumbulwami." 
1Corinthians14:16 Nakube udumisa uZimu ngommoyakho, angatjho njani loyo ozifunyana ahlangana nalabo abangazwisisiko ukuthi: “Amen” ekuthokozeni kwakho njengombana angazi bona uthini na?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Kungenzeka bona uthokoze ngokwaneleko, kodwana omunye umuntu akakheki ngalokho." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ngiyamthokoza uZimu bona ngikhuluma ngamalimi ukunedlula noke nje. 
1Corinthians14:19 Kodwana nangisebandleni, ngikhetha ukukhuluma amezwi abe mahlanu azwisisekako ukuyala abanye, kunobana ngikhulume amezwi alitjhumi leenkulungwana ngelimi elingaziwako." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bazalwana, lisani ukucabanga njengabantwana. Iye, malungana nobumbi, yibani masana, kodwana nibe ngabakhulileko ngengqondo." 
1Corinthians14:21 Emthethweni kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ngabantu bamalimi atjhili nangeembhena zamaphandle, ngizokukhuluma nabantwaba kodwana khonapho abazukungizwa. Kutjho uSomnini.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Nje-ke amalimi alitshwayo kabangakholwako, ingasi kabakholwako; kodwana ukuphorofida kungokwabakholwako, ingasi abangakholwako." 
1Corinthians14:23 Yeke nakube ibandla loke liyahlangana bese woke umuntu ukhuluma ngamalimi, khonapho kungene abangazwisisiko namkha abangakholwako, abazukucabanga bona niyarhapha na?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kodwana nange ongakholwako namkha omunye ongazwisisiko, angena khibe woke umuntu uyaphorofida, boke bazamenza azibone asisoni begodu alahlwe ngunembeza" 
1Corinthians14:25 bekuthi iimfihlo zehliziywakhe zivele etjhatjhalazini. Ngaleyondlela uzakuguqa phasi adumise uZimu arhuwelele athi: “Ngambala uZimu uphakathi kwenu.” 
1Corinthians14:26 Alo, sizakuthini bazalwana na? Lokha nanihlanganako, omunye nomunye akabe nerhubo, ilizwi lokufundisa, umbono, ilimi namkha irhumutjho lalo. Koke lokhu akwenzelwe ukuqiniswa kwebandla." 
1Corinthians14:27 Nakube kukhona ukukhuluma ngamalimi, akukhulume babili namkha babe bathathu batjhidelane, kuthi oyedwa arhumutjhe." 
1Corinthians14:28 Nakube akekho orhumutjhako, okhulumako loyo akathule ebandleni, akhulumele ngehliziyweni noZimu." 
1Corinthians14:29 Akukhulume abaphorofidi ababili namkha abathathu, abanye bahlolisise lokho okutjhiwoko." 
1Corinthians14:30 Nakube kufika isambulo kiloyo ohlezi phasi wokuthoma akathule 
1Corinthians14:31 ngombana ningaphorofida noke ngokudlhegana ukuze woke umuntu afunyane umlayezo kanye nokukhuthazwa. 
1Corinthians14:32 Imimoya yabaphorofidi ithobela abaphorofidi 
1Corinthians14:33 ngombana uZimu akasinguZimu wesiphithiphithi, kodwana ungowokuthula. Njengakiwo woke amabandla wabacwengileko," 
1Corinthians14:34 abafazi abathule emabandleni. Abakavunyelwa ukukhuluma kodwana kufanele bazithobe njengombana kusitjho umthetho. 
1Corinthians14:35 Nakube kukhona abafuna ukukwazi, ababuze emadodeni wabo emakhaya ngombana kulihlazo bona umfazi akhulume ebandleni." 
1Corinthians14:36 Konjephana ilizwi lakaZimu livele ngani na? Namkha lifikelele nina kwaphela na? 
1Corinthians14:37 Nakube umuntu udlumbana bona umphorofidi namkha unesiphiwo sakaMoya, akamukele bona lokhu enginitlolela khona kumyalo weKosi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Nakuphayela eqadi lokhu, naye uzokuphayelwa eqadi." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana, tjhisekelani ukuphorofida, ningakuvimbeli ukukhuluma ngamalimi!" 
1Corinthians14:40 Kodwana koke akwenziwe ngendlela efaneleko nehlelekileko. 
1Corinthians15:1 Bazalwana, ngithanda ukunikhumbuza ngevangeli engalitjhumayela kini, enalamukelako nenidzimelele kilo." 
1Corinthians15:2 Ngilo ivangeleli enisindiswa ngalo nanikakarela elizwini enganitjhumayeza lona. Nakungasinjalo, nizabe nikholelwe ilizwe." 
1Corinthians15:3 Engakwamukelako ngakudlulisela kini ngombana kuyinto yokuthoma eqakathekileko kobana uKrestu wafela izono zethu ukuya ngokwemitlolo," 
1Corinthians15:4 wabulungwa, wavuka kabafileko ngelanga lesithathu, njengombana imitlolo isitjho." 
1Corinthians15:5 Wabonakala kuPitrosi, godu wabonakala kubapostoli abalitjhumi nambili." 
1Corinthians15:6 Ngemva kwalapho, wabonakala kubazalwana abangaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu ngesikhathi esisodwa, inengi labo elisaphilako, nanyana-ke abanye sebalala nje." 
1Corinthians15:7 Godu wabonakala kuJakopo, ngemva kwalapho wabonakala kibo boke abapostoli." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ekugcineni wabonakala nakimi mina onjengaloyo obelethwe ngendlela engakajayeleki. 
1Corinthians15:9 Ngitjho ngombana ngingomncancani kubapostoli, nje-ke abengikafaneli nokubizwa bona ngimpostoli ngombana ngahlukumeza ibandla lakaZimu." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kodwana ngebanga lesirhawu sakaZimu ngingilokhu engingikho begodu isirhawu sakhe kimi azange sibe lilize. Awa, ngasebenza khulu kunabo boke, kodwana bekungasimi, bekusirhawu sakaZimu ebesinami." 
1Corinthians15:11 Nje-ke nanyana bekungimi namkha bekungibo, leli ngilo ivangeli esilitjhumayelako begodu ngilo enalikholwako." 
1Corinthians15:12 Nakube uKrestu utjhunyayelwa bona uvusiwe kabafileko, bangatjho njani-ke abanye benu bonyana akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko na?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Kodwana nakube akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko, khona-ke kutjho bona noKrestu azange avuswe." 
1Corinthians15:14 Nje-ke nakube uKrestu azange avuswe, khona-ke ukutjhumayela kwethu kulilize lakolize, nokukholwa kwenu kunjalo." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ngaphezu kwalapho, kutjho bona sifunyaniswa sibofakazi bamanga ngoZimu ngombana sifakaze ngaye bonyana wavusa uKrestu kabafileko." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ngitjho ngombana nakube abafileko abavuswa, khona-ke kutjho bona noKrestu azange avuswe." 
1Corinthians15:17 Nje-ke nakube uKrestu azange avuswe, kukhomba bona ukukholwa kwenu kulilize lakolize, nisahlezi ezonweni zenu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Yeke nalabo esele balala bakuKrestu kutjho bona balahlekile-ke. 
1Corinthians15:19 Nakube ithemba lethu kuKrestu lingelokuphila lokhu kwaphela, khona-ke singebokulilelwa ukudlula boke abantu." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kodwana ngambala uKrestu uvusiwe kabafileko, yena osithelo sokuthoma sabaleleko." 
1Corinthians15:21 Njengombana ukufa kweza ngomuntu, kunjalo nokuvuka kwabafileko kuza ngomuntu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Njengombana ku-Adamu boke bayafa, ngokunjalo kuKrestu boke bazakuvuswa." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kodwana omunye nomunye ngedlhego lakhe: Kuzokuthoma uKrestu ntangi bese kuthi nabuyako, kuvuke labo abangebakhe." 
1Corinthians15:24 Nje-ke isiphetho sizakufika lokha nanikela umbuso kuZimu uBaba ngemva kobana atjhabalalise yoke imibuso, ubukhosi namandla" 
1Corinthians15:25 ngombana kumele abuse bekufike lapha arabhalalisa khona zoke izitha zakhe ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe. 
1Corinthians15:26 Isitha sokugcina esizokubhujiswa, kukufa" 
1Corinthians15:27 ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Ubeke koke ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe.” Nje-ke nawuthi “yoke into” ibekwe ngaphasi kwakhe, kuyakhanya bonyana lokhu akufaki uZimu phakathi, okunguye obeka zoke izinto ngaphasi kwakaKrestu." 
1Corinthians15:28 Nasele enze lokhu, yeke iNdodana ngokwayo izakwenziwa bona ibe ngaphasi koZimu okunguye obeka zoke izinto ngaphasi kwayo ukuze kuthi yena Zimu abe ngongaphezu kwakho koke." 
1Corinthians15:29 Alo-ke nakube akukho ukuvuka kwabafileko, bazokwenzanjani labo ababhabhadiselwa abafileko na? Nakube abafileko abakazokuvuswa nakanye, kubayini abantu babhajadiswe ngenca yabo na?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Nakungithi-ke khona kubayini sizifake engozini umzuzu nomzuzu na? 
1Corinthians15:31 Mina ngifa ngamalanga, iye, ngitjho njalo bazalwana kanjengombana ngambala ngizigqaja ngani kuKrestu Jesu iKosi yethu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Nakube bengilwa neembandana ezinelunya e-Efesu ngebanga lomuntu tle, bengizakuthi ngizuzeni nje? Nakube abafileko angeze bavuswa, khona-ke asizaliseni ikulumo ethi: “Asigomeni, sisele ngombana ngomuso siyokufa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Ningakhohliswa! “Ukujayelana nabantu abakhohlakeleko konakalisa isimilo esihle.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Qaqulukani njengombana nifanele, nilise ukona ngombana kukhona abathileko abangayeleli uZimu. Ngitjho lokhu khona nizakhe khenizikhuze." 
1Corinthians15:35 Kodwana omunye angase abuze athi: “Abafileko bavuswa njani na? Bazokuvuka ngomzimba onjani na?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Ubudlhadlha obungaka! Okutjalileko angeze kwamila ngaphandle kobana kufe qangi. 
1Corinthians15:37 Lokha nawutjalako, awutjali umzimba ngesingawo kodwana utjala imbewu kwaphela kungaba mhlambe ngeyekoroyi namkha okhunye nje." 
1Corinthians15:38 UZimu nguye onikela imbewu leyo umzimba njengokuhlosa kwakhe. Unikela omunye nomunye umhlobo wembewu umzimba wayo. 
1Corinthians15:39 Inyama yoke ayifani: Abantu bamhlobo othileko wenyama, iinlwana ziimhlobo omunye, iinyoni nazo ziimhlobo omunye neenhlambi ngokunjalo." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ikhona-ke nemizimba yezulwini nemizimba yephasini, kodwana ukuphazimula kwemizimba yezulwini kukodwa, nokuphazimula kwemizimba yephasini nakho kukodwa." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ikhona iphazimulo yelanga, nenye iphazimulo yenyezi godu nenye iphazimulo yeenkwekwezi ngombana iinkwekwezi ziyahlukahlukana ngephazimulo." 
1Corinthians15:42 Kuzokuba njalo-ke ngokuvuka kwabafileko. Okutjalwako kuyabola, okuvuswako akuboli." 
1Corinthians15:43 Kutjalwa ngokudelwa, kuvuswa ngephazimulo. Kutjalwa ngobuthakathaka, kuvuswa ngamandla." 
1Corinthians15:44 Kutjalwa kumzimba wenyama, kuvuswa kumzimba wommoya. Nakube kukhona umzimba wenyama, kukhona nomzimba wommoya." 
1Corinthians15:45 Ngokunjalo kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Umuntu wokuthoma u-Adamu, waba sibunjwa esiphilako,” u-Adamu wokugcina waba nguMoya ophilisako." 
1Corinthians15:46 KoMoya akusikho okweza qangi, kodwana ngokwemvelo, ngemva kwalapho-ke kwaba ngokoMoya." 
1Corinthians15:47 Umuntu wokuthoma wavela ethulini lephasi, wesibili wavela ezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:48 Indlela angayo umuntu wephasi, banjalo nalabo abangebephasi. Indlela angayo umuntu wezulwini, banjalo nalabo abangebezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:49 Njengombana sinomfuziselo womuntu wephasi, ngokunjalo sizokuba nomfuziselo womuntu wezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:50 Ngiyatjho kini bazalwana ngithi inyama neengazi angekhe kwalidla ilifa lombuso kaZimu, nokubolako angekhe kwalidla ilifa lokungaboliko." 
1Corinthians15:51 Lalelani nginitjele nasi ifihlakalo: Asizukulala soke, kodwana soke sizokutjhugululwa" 
1Corinthians15:52 ngomzuzwana, iye, ngokuphazima kwelihlo, nakulila iporompita yokugcina. Kuzokulila iporompita, abafileko bavuswe bangasenakho ukubola bese siyatjhugululwa-ke." 
1Corinthians15:53 Lokhu okubolako kumele kuzembathise okungaboliko bese kuthi okubhubhako kuzembathise okungabhubhiko. 
1Corinthians15:54 Nasele okubolako kwembathiswe okungaboliko, nokubhubhako sekwembathiswe okungabhubhiko, sizakuzaliseka-ke isitjho esitloliweko esithi: “Ukufa kurhiribidelwe kuhlula”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Kufa kuphi ukuhlula kwakho na? Kufa, liphi iliva lakho na?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Iliva lokufa sisono, namandla wesono mthetho." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kodwana akathokozwe uZimu osipha ukuhlula ngeKosi yethu uJesu Krestu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana bami abathandekako, dzimelelani. Akungabi nento eninyakazisako. Hlalani njalo nizinikele ngokupheleleko emsebenzini weKosi ngombana niyazi bonyana ukuzikhandla kwenu eKosini akusingelize." 
1Corinthians16:1 Malungana nomnikelo obuthelelelwa abantu bakaZimu, yenzani njengalokho engakutjela amabandla weGalatiya." 
1Corinthians16:2 Elangeni leSabatha, omunye nomunye wenu akabekele ngeqadi inani elithileko ukuya ngokwenzuzo yakhe ukuze kuthi nangizako ngifunyane woke umnikelo sele ubuthelelwe." 
1Corinthians16:3 Nangifikako ngizakukhupha iincwadi zokwethula labo enibakhethileko bona base isipho senu eJerusalema. 
1Corinthians16:4 Nangabe nami kufanele bona ngikhambe, bazangiphekelela." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ngizakuza kini lapho eKorinte emva kokudabula eMasedoniya ngombana ngihlose ukudabula khona eMasedoniya.
