1Corinthians16:6 Kungenzeka ngihlalahlale nani isikhatjhana, mhlamunye bengiqede ubusika boke ngilapho ukuze ningisize ekhambeni lami nanyana kuphi lapha ngiya khona." 
1Corinthians16:7 Angifuni ukunibona ngidlula nje, kodwana ngirhuluphela bona ngizakuba nesikhathi sokuhlala nani, iKosi nayivumako." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kodwana ngizokuhlala e-Efesu bekufike iPentekoste 
1Corinthians16:9 ngombana ngivulelwe umnyango omkhulu wokusebenza ngepumelelo, kanti-ke banengi nabaphikisana nami." 
1Corinthians16:10 UThimothi nafika lapho kini, qinisekisani bonyana akunalitho alesabako ngombana wenza umsebenzi weKosi njengami." 
1Corinthians16:11 Yeke akungabikhona namunye omnyazako! Nasele akhamba, mlayeliseni ngokuthula abuyele kimi ngombana ngimlindele kanye nabazalwana." 
1Corinthians16:12 Malungana nomzalwana wethu u-Apholo: Ngimkhuthaze ngamandla bona eze kini kanye nabazalwana. Ubengakazimiseli ukuza njenganje, kodwana uzakuza nafunyene ithuba." 
1Corinthians16:13 Hlalani niqaphile, nijame nidzimelele ekukholweni, nibe nesibindi, niqine." 
1Corinthians16:14 Koke enikwenzako, kwenzeni ngethando." 
1Corinthians16:15 Bazalwana, ngiyanincenga njengombana nisazi bonyana umndeni kaStefana ube ngewokuthoma ukwamukela ukukholwa e-Arhaya, begodu uzinikele khulu emsebenzini wabacwengileko," 
1Corinthians16:16 zithobeni ebantwini abanjalo nakibo boke abanye abahlanganyela emsebenzini lo. 
1Corinthians16:17 Ngithabe tle ngokufika kwakaStefana, uFortunatu no-Arhayiko ngombana banikele ngalokho ebeninganakho." 
1Corinthians16:18 Bawuvuselele ummoyami kanye newenu, nje-ke bahlonipheni abanjalo." 
1Corinthians16:19 Ayanilotjhisa amabandla wesifundeni se-Asiya. U-Akhwila noPriska banilotjhise khulu eKosini nebandla elihlanganyela emzinabo nalo linilotjhisile. 
1Corinthians16:20 Boke abazalwana abalapha bayanilotjhisa. Lotjhisanani ngokukhethekileko. 
1Corinthians16:21 Mina Powula ngitlola ukulotjhisa lokhu ngesami isandla. 
1Corinthians16:22 Nangabe umuntu akathandi iKosi, akanamathelwe manikelela. Yewuze Kosi!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Umusa weKosi uJesu Krestu awube nani. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ithando lami kini noke kuKrestu Jesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Mina Powula umpostoli kaKrestu Jesu ngokwentando kaZimu, noThimothi umzalwana, silotjhisa ibandla lakaZimu eKorinte nabo boke abacwengileko abakilo loke le-Arhaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Akube kini umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba neKosini uJesu Krestu. 
2Corinthians1:3 Akathokozwe uZimu onguyise weKosi yethu uJesu Krestu nonguyise wesirhawu noZimu wenduduzo yoke," 
2Corinthians1:4 osiduduza kizo zoke iinhlupheko zethu ukuze sikwazi ukududuza labo abasesizini nanyana kungelinjani ngenduduzo esiyifunyene kuZimu. 
2Corinthians1:5 Njengombana iinhlupheko zakaKrestu zivamile kithi, nokududuzwa kwethu kwandile ngoKrestu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Nasikhathazekako, kungebanga lokududuzwa kanye nokusindiswa kwenu; nasiduduzwako, kungebanga lokududuzwa kwenu okuveza kini ukubekezelela ngesineke iinhlupheko nathi esizithweleko." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ithemba lethu ngani lidzimelele ngombana siyazi bonyana njengombana nihlanganyela eenhluphekweni zethu, ngokufanako nihlanganyela ekududuzweni kwethu." 
2Corinthians1:8 Asithandi bona ningabi nelwazi bazalwana mayelana nobuhlungu esabuthwala esifundeni se-Asiya. Sagandeleleka khulu, kwaba ngaphezu kwamandla wethu besalahlekelwa nalithemba lokuphila." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ngambala sazizwela inga sigwetjelwe ukufa. Nokho lokhu kwenzeka ukuze singazithembi thina kodwana sithembe uZimu okunguye ovusa abafileko. 
2Corinthians1:10 Yena owasiphephisa ekufeni okungakaya, uzakubuye asisindise; ithemba lethu silibeke kuye bona uzakubuye asisindise godu" 
2Corinthians1:11 njengombana nani nihlanganyele ekusisizeni ngemithandazo yenu. Nje-ke abanengi bazasithokozela malungana nomusa ongaka esiwuphiwe ngemithandazo yabanengi. 
2Corinthians1:12 Iye, nakhu ukuzigqaja kwethu: Unembeza wethu uyafakaza bonyana ephasinapha, khulukhulu mayelana nobudlelwano bethu nani, saziphatha ngokucwenga nangokuthembeka okuvela kuZimu. Senza njalo ingasi ngokokuhlakanipha kwephaseli kodwana ngokomusa kaZimu." 
2Corinthians1:13 Asinitloleli ilitho eningekhe nakwazi ukulifunda namkha ukulizwisisa. Nje-ke ngiyathemba bonyana 
2Corinthians1:14 njengombana ningakasizwisisi ngokupheleleko, nizakuzwisisa ngokuzeleko bonyana ningazigqaja ngathi njengombana nathi sizozigqaja ngani ngelanga leKosi uJesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Njengombana benginesiqiniseko ngalokhu, bengifuna ukuza kini qangi ukuze nikwazi ukuba nomusa obuyelelweko." 
2Corinthians1:16 Bengifuna ukudlula kinapho ngizonibona lokha nangiya eMasedoniya godu ngidlule lapho nasele ngibuya khona ukuze ningisize endlelenami yokuya eJudiya. 
2Corinthians1:17 Kghani nidlumbana bona bengizaza nangihlela lokhu na? Ngenza amahlelo wami ngokwamazinga wabantu, ngilungele ukuthi, “Iye, iye”, khonapho ngithi, “Awa, awa” na?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ngokuthembeka kwakaZimu, umyalezwethu kini awusi ngu: “Iye; awa”." 
2Corinthians1:19 INdodana kaZimu uJesu Krestu eyatjhunyayelwa phakathi kwenu ngimi noSilasi kanye noThimothi beyingasi ngu “Iye; awa”, kodwana kiyo kuhlala kungu “Iye” kwaphela." 
2Corinthians1:20 Kiyo, esinye nesinye isithembiso sakaZimu singu “Iye”. Yeke ngalokho ngayo sithi “Amen” kilo idumo lakaZimu." 
2Corinthians1:21 Kodwana nguZimu osiqinisako sikanye nani kuKrestu bewasizesa," 
2Corinthians1:22 ngokusibeka itshwayo lakhe, wasipha noMoya wakhe ngeenhliziyweni zethu njengesibekiso." 
2Corinthians1:23 Nje-ke, ngibiza uZimu bona abe ngufakazi wokobana kube ngebanga lokuniphephisa ukungabuyi kwami ngize eKorinte." 
2Corinthians1:24 Angitjho bona sibusa phezu kokukholwa kwenu, kodwana siziinsebenzi kanye nani ukuze nithabe ngombana nidzimelele ekukholweni." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ngaqeda nomkhumbulwami bona ngingasanithekela ngobuhlungu 
2Corinthians2:2 ngombana nakube nginizwisa ubuhlungu, akekho ongangithokozisa ngaphandle kwaloyo engimzwise ubuhlungu." 
2Corinthians2:3 Yeke ngatlola njengombana ngenzile ukuze kuthi nasele ngifikile, ngingazwiswa ubuhlungu ngilabo ebekumele ngathana bayangithokozisa ngombana nginethemba ngani noke kobana ukuthaba kwami kuzakuba kuthaba kwenu noke." 
2Corinthians2:4 Nganitlolela ngokukhathazeka okukhulu nangobuhlungu behliziyo kanye nangeenyembezi, ingasi ukunidabukisa kodwana ukunazisa ukuzika kwethando enginalo ngani." 
2Corinthians2:5 Nakube kukhona obange ubuhlungu, akakabubangi kimi kodwana ngandlelathize ububange kini noke, nokho angingezeleli nangitjho njalo." 
2Corinthians2:6 Isibetho abethwe ngaso linengi labantu simanele umuntu onjalo. 
2Corinthians2:7 Nje-ke esikhundleni salokho kumele nimlibalele benimduduze ukuze angabhudungelwa lisizi elidluleleko. 
2Corinthians2:8 Ngalokho ngiyanincenga bonyana nibonakalise ithando lenu kuye. 
2Corinthians2:9 Kungebangelo ngitlolile kobana nginizizinye bengazi bona nizithobile kikho koke. 
2Corinthians2:10 Enimlibalelako nami ngiyamlibalela. Engikulibaleleko, nakube kukhona, kube ngebanga lenu phambi kwakaKrestu" 
2Corinthians2:11 ukuze uSathana angasibindi ngombana asikalalisi amehlo ngamaqhingakhe. 
2Corinthians2:12 Kuthe lokha nangifika eTrowasi kobana ngitjhumayele ivangeli lakaKrestu, ngavulelwa umnyango eKosini." 
2Corinthians2:13 Kodwana azange ngibe nokuthula ngombana azange ngifunyane umzalwana uTitosi lapho. Yeke ngabalayelisa, ngabuyela eMasedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Akathokozwe uZimu ohlala asirhola njalo ngedwendwe lokuhlula kuKrestu nophutjheza ngathi iphunga elimnandi lelwazi lakhe yoke indawo. 
2Corinthians2:15 KuZimu siliphunga elimnandi lakaKrestu hlangana nalabo abasindiswako nalabo ababhubhako. 
2Corinthians2:16 Komunye sisivunda sokufa, komunye siliphunga lokuphila. Ngubani ongangomthwalo lo na?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Thina asisinjengabo abanengi, asikhambi sikhangisa ngelizwi lakaZimu ukuzenzela inzuzo. Kodwana kuKrestu sikhuluma phambi koZimu ngobuqotho njengabantu abathunywe nguye." 
2Corinthians3:1 Kghani sele sithome ukuzibuka godu na? Nakanye, abe asidingi iincwadi zokusethula kini namkha ezivela kini njengombana abanye basenza." 
2Corinthians3:2 Nina ngokwenu niyincwadi yethu etlolwe eenhliziyweni zethu bona yaziwe beyifundwe babantu boke. 
2Corinthians3:3 Niyabonakala bona niyincwadi kaKrestu, umphumela womsebenzethu. Iye, incwadi engakatlolwa ngomsobo kodwana ngoMoya kaZimu ophilako, engakatlolelwa emqebethwini kodwana eenhliziyweni zabantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ithemba elinjalo ngelethu ngoKrestu phambi koZimu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Akutjho bona siyakghona thina ngokwethu ukuzizuzela ilitho, kodwana nguZimu osikghonisako." 
2Corinthians3:6 Iye, nguye osenze sakghona njengeenceku zesivumelwano esitjha, ingasi zomthetho kodwana zakaMoya ngombana umthetho uyabulala kodwana uMoya uyaphilisa." 
2Corinthians3:7 Yeke, nakube ikonzo yokufa egobhodlhwe ngamagama emqebethwini yeza ngephazimulo kangangobana ama-Israyeli ahlulwa kuqala uMosi ebusweni ngebanga layo iphazimulo esebusweni bakhe, iphazimulo leyo esele iphelelwe mamandla," 
2Corinthians3:8 kuzokuba kangangani-ke ukuza kwekonzo kaMoya ngephazimulo na? 
2Corinthians3:9 Nakube bekunephazimulo ekonzweni yokulahlwa, iphazimula kangangani-ke ikonzo eletha ukulungisiswa na?" 
2Corinthians3:10 Ngambala lokho ebekuseze kunephazimulo, sele kulahlekelwe yiphazimulo leyo ngebanga lokufika kwephazimulo ekulu" 
2Corinthians3:11 ngombana nakube lokho okuphelako kweza ngephazimulo, yikulu kangangani-ke iphazimulo yalokho okungapheliko na?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Yeke, njengombana sinethemba elinjalo nje, sinesibindi tle." 
2Corinthians3:13 Thina asisinjengoMosi obekazigubuzesa ngesiyaya ukuze ama-Israyeli angamgqolozeli lokha iphazimulo leyo nayinyamalalako. 
2Corinthians3:14 Kodwana imikhumbulwabo yathundubazwa ngombana bekube kunamhlanjesi isiyayeso sisese njengombana besinjalo lokha nakufundwa isivumelwano esidala. Azange sisuswe ngombana sisuka kwaphela lokha umuntu nakuKrestu. 
2Corinthians3:15 Iye, bekube kunamhlanjesi njalo lokha nakufundwa uMosi, isiyaya sembesa imikhumbulwabo," 
2Corinthians3:16 kodwana lokha umuntu natjhugulukela eKosini, isiyaya siyasuswa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Nje-ke iKosi inguMoya, lapha kunoMoya kaSomnini khona kunekululeko." 
2Corinthians3:18 Yeke soke thina esinobuso obungakathweswa isiyaya, thina esibona iphazimulo kaSomnini inga ibonakaliswe esibonibonini, siyatjhugululwa bona sibe nobujamo obufanako ukusuka kelinye izinga lephazimulo ukuya kelinye ngombana lokhu kuvela eKosini, enguMoya." 
2Corinthians4:1 Yeke, njengombana kungomusa kaZimu bona sibe nekonzo le, asililahli ithemba." 
2Corinthians4:2 Kunalokho silahle iindlela zokufihla izinto eziphathisa iinhloni, salile ukwenza ubuqili namkha ukuphambanisa ilizwi lakaZimu, kodwana ngokubeka iqiniso epepeneneni, siyazibuka kunembeza womuntu woke phambi koZimu." 
2Corinthians4:3 Ngitjho nanyana ivangeli lethu lifihlakele, lifihlakele kilabo ababhubhako." 
2Corinthians4:4 Uzimu wesikhathesi ufiphaze imikhumbulo yabangakholwako ukuze bangaboni umkhanyo wevangeli lephazimulo kaKrestu omfuziselo kaZimu. 
2Corinthians4:5 Asizitjhumayeli thina, kodwana sitjhumayela uJesu Krestu njengeKosi, thina sibe makhoboka wenu ngebanga lakhe." 
2Corinthians4:6 Yeke uZimu owathi: “Umkhanyo awukhanye ebumnyameni,” nguye owakhanyisa eenhliziyweni zethu ukusinikela umkhanyo welwazi lephazimulo kaZimu ebusweni bakaJesu Krestu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kodwana sinamagugu la ngezitjeni zomdaka ukuze kutjengiswe bonyana amandla amakhulu la ngewakaZimu begodu akaveli kithi. 
2Corinthians4:8 Siyahlunguphazwa ngeendlela zoke kodwana asitshidlhwa, siyakakamala kodwana asipheli amandla." 
2Corinthians4:9 Siyazunywa kodwana asilahlwa, simadlhwa phasi kodwana asibhujiswa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Sihlala sithwele emizimbeni yethu ukufa kwakaJesu ukuze kuthi ukuphila kwakhe nakho kwembulwe emizimbeni yethu. 
2Corinthians4:11 Thina esiphilako sihlala sinikelwa ekufeni ngebanga lakaJesu ukuze ukuphila kwakhe kwembulwe emizimbeni yethu efako. 
2Corinthians4:12 Ngaleyondlela, kithi kusebenza ukufa kodwana kini kusebenza ukuphila." 
2Corinthians4:13 Kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Ngakholwa, ngalokho ngakhuluma.” Nathi sakholwa, yeke sakhuluma" 
2Corinthians4:14 ngombana siyazi bona loyo owavusa iKosi uJesu nathi uzosivusa kanye noJesu begodu uzosiletha sikanye nani ebukhoneni bakhe. 
2Corinthians4:15 Iye, koke kungebanga lenu ukuze kuthi umusa wandise ukuthokoza, kilo idumo lakaZimu, njengombana ufikelela abantu ngobunengi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ngalokho asipheli amandla. Nanyana umzimba wethu ngaphandle uluphala, ingaphakathi lethu livuselelwa imihla ngemihla." 
2Corinthians4:17 Iinhlupheko zethu ezilula nezesikhatjhana zisilungiselela isilinganiso esikhulu sephazimulo engaphezu kokulinganiswa 
2Corinthians4:18 ngombana asiqali lokho okubonwako kodwana siqale okungabonwako. Okubonwako kungekwesikhatjhana kodwana okungabonwako kungekwanini nanini. 
2Corinthians5:1 Siyazi bona nakudilika idladla lephasinapha esihlala ngakilweli, sinesakhiwo esivela kuZimu, ikumba engakenziwa ngezandla, engeyanini nanini ezulwini." 
2Corinthians5:2 Nasingaphakathi kwedladleli siyabubula, silangazelela ukwembathiswa ubuhlalo bethu bezulwini" 
2Corinthians5:3 ngombana nasembathisiweko, angeze safunyanwa sibulanzi." 
2Corinthians5:4 Nasisahlezi ngedladlenapha, siyabubula begodu siyadisibezeka ngombana asifisi ukwambulwa kodwana sifuna ukumbathiswa ngobuhlalo bethu bezulwini ukuze kuthi okubhubhako kuginywe kuphila." 
2Corinthians5:5 Yeke nguZimu owasidalela sona isizathwesi bewasipha noMoya njengesibambiso. 
2Corinthians5:6 Nje-ke sihlala sinesibindi ngaso soke isikhathi, nanyana sisazi bonyana nasisesekhaya ngemzimbeni lo, sikude neKosi" 
2Corinthians5:7 ngombana sikhamba ngokukholwa, asikhambi ngokubona." 
2Corinthians5:8 Iye, sinesibindi begodu sinyula bona siwutjhiye umzimba lo, siyokuhlala neKosi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Nje-ke nanyana sisekhayapha namkha sele sikhambile, sikwenza kube mnqopho wethu ukuyithokozisa iKosi." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ngitjho ngombana soke sifanelwe kuvela phambi kwesihlalo sokugweba sakaKrestu ukuze ngiloyo naloyo amukeliswe umvuzo walokho akwenzileko nasesengemzimbenapha, kungaba ngokuhle namkha okumbi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ngalokho-ke njengombana thina sikwazi bona kuyini ukwesaba iKosi, silinga ukuzuza nabanye, nokho thina siyazeka kuZimu. Ngiyathemba bona nakunembeza wenu siyazeka." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ngalokho asizidumisi kini, kodwana sininikela ithuba lokobana nizigqaje ngathi ukuze nikwazi ukuphendula labo abazigqaja ngokubonakala emehlweni ebangeni lokobana bazigqaje ngokusehliziyweni." 
2Corinthians5:13 Nangabe siqaleka sirhapha, akutshwenyi, sirhaphela uZimu. Nangabe asirhaphi, kungebanga lenu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ithando lakaKrestu liyasiraga ngombana siyakholelwa bona munye owafela boke, nje-ke boke bafile." 
2Corinthians5:15 Wafela boke ukuze kuthi labo abaphilako bangasaziphileli bona, kodwana baphilele yena owabafelako bewavuswa." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ukusukela gadesi, yeke asisazukwazi umuntu ngokwenyama ngitjho nanyana sakhe sazi uKrestu ngokwenyama nje, nokho asisamazi njalo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Nje-ke umuntu nasele akuKrestu, sewunesibumbeko esitjha: koke okudala kudlulile, qala, koke sele kwenziwe kwaba kutjha." 
2Corinthians5:18 Koke lokhu kuvela kuZimu owasibuyisela kuye ngoKrestu bewasinikela ikonzo yokubuyisana," 
2Corinthians5:19 okutjho bona uZimu wabuyisela iphasi kuye ngoKrestu. Azange abale iimphambeko zalo, kodwana wasinikela umyalezo wokubuyisana." 
2Corinthians5:20 Nje-ke thina sibazenda bakaKrestu ngombana uZimu uzwakalisa isimemezelo sakhe ngathi. Yeke siyanincenga ebizweni lakaKrestu bona nibuyisane noZimu. 
2Corinthians5:21 Wamenza bona abe sisono ngebanga lethu loyo ongazange asazi isono ukuze kuthi kuye sibe ngabalungisisiweko bakaZimu. 
2Corinthians6:1 Njengeensebenzi zakaZimu ezisebenza ndawonye, siyanincenga bona ningawamukeleli ilize umusa kaZimu" 
2Corinthians6:2 ngombana uthi: “Ngesikhathi esifaneleko ngakulalela, ngelanga lesindiso ngakusiza.” Qalani, kwanje kusikhathi esifaneleko, qalani, kwanje kulilanga lesindiso!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Asibeki isiqabo endleleni yomuntu ukuze kungafunyanwa iphoso emsebenzini wethu. 
2Corinthians6:4 Kodwana njengeenceku zakaZimu sizibuka ngazo zoke iindlela: ngokunyamezela okukhulu, ngokuhlunguphazwa, ngobudisi, ngamatlhuwiso," 
2Corinthians6:5 ngokubethwa, ngokubotjhwa, ngemiguruguru, ngokutjhikatjhika, ngokungalali ebusuku kanye nangendlala." 
2Corinthians6:6 Iye, sizibuka ngokuhlanzeka, ngelwazi, ngokubekezela, ngobumnene, ngokucwengeka kuMoya oCwengileko, ngethando lamambala" 
2Corinthians6:7 nangokukhuluma iqiniso emandleni kaZimu. Lokho sikwenza ngeenkhali zokulunga ngesidleni nangesinceleni. 
2Corinthians6:8 Ekuhlonitjhweni nekurhubutjhweni, ebumbini nebumnandini. Siphathwa njengabakhohlisi nanyana sineqiniso nje;" 
2Corinthians6:9 siphathwa njengabantu abangaziwako nanyana saziwa nje; siphathwa njengabantu abafako, kodwana qalani siyaphila; siphathwa njengabantu abahlunguphaziweko, kodwana abangakabulawa." 
2Corinthians6:10 Siphathwa njengabantu abanesizi, kodwana sihlala sinamile; sinjengabadududu, kodwana senza abanengi babe ziingwili; sinjengabanganalitho khisibe sinakho koke." 
2Corinthians6:11 Sikhulume sitjhaphulukile kini maKorinte, sanivulela iinhliziyo zethu." 
2Corinthians6:12 Asikanigodleli amazizo wethu kodwana nina nisigodlele wenu. 
2Corinthians6:13 Nje-ke ngokwenana, ngikhuluma nani njengabantwana, nani-ke vulani iinhliziyo zenu ngokupheleleko." 
2Corinthians6:14 Ningazihlanganisi nabangakholwako. Kunabudlelwano bani phakathi kwabalungileko nabangakalungi na? Namkha kunahlanganyelo bani phakathi komkhanyo nobumnyama na? 
2Corinthians6:15 Unasivumelwano bani uKrestu noBheliyara na? Namkha yini ikholwa elingayabelana nomuntu ongakholwako na? 
2Corinthians6:16 Linasivumelwano bani ithempeli lakaZimu nabosingazimu na? Thina silithempeli lakaZimu ophilako, njengombana uZimu wathi: “Ngizokuhlala ngaphakathi kwabo bengikhambe hlangana nabo, ngibe nguZimabo, bona babe babantu bami.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Ngalokho-ke: “Phumani phakathi kwabo, nizahlukanise nabo; ningathinti ilitho elisilapheleko, yeke ngizakuza kini. Kutjho uSomnini." 
2Corinthians6:18 Mina ngizakuba nguYihlo, nina-ke nibe madodana namadodakazami. Kutjho uSomnini uMninimandla woke.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Njengombana sineenthembiswezi nje bathandekako, asizihlambululeni kikho koke ukusilaphala komzimba nekomphefumulo, siphelelise ukucwengeka ngokwesaba uZimu." 
2Corinthians7:2 Akhe nisivulele indawo eenhliziyweni zenu. Akunamuntu esimonileko, akunamuntu esimtjhaphisileko, akakho nesimcaphazileko." 
2Corinthians7:3 Angitjho lokhu ukuze nginilahle ngombana ngikhe ngatjho bona niseenhliziyweni zethu, sizokufa ndawonye besiphile ndawonye." 
2Corinthians7:4 Nginesibindi khulu ngani begodu nginegugu khulu ngani. Ngigcwele ukududuzeka begodu ngithabe khulu ngazo zoke iinhlupheko zethu. 
2Corinthians7:5 Kwamambala nanyana sesifikile eMasedoniya, imizimba yethu azange ifumane ukuphumula, kodwana sakhathazeka ngeendlela zoke; kwaba yipikiswano ngaphandle, ngaphakathi saba nokwesaba." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kodwana uZimu oduduza abadanileko, wasiduduza ngokufika kwakaTitosi," 
2Corinthians7:7 ingasi ngokuza kwakhe kwaphela, kodwana nangokududuzeka akufumana lapho kini. Wasitjela ngokungihlulukela kwenu, isililo senu nangetjisakalo eninayo ngami. Yeke ngathokoza ngaphezu kokwenza." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ngitjho nanyana nganizwisa ubuhlungu ngencwadi yami leya, angizisoli ngayo. Iye, nanyana khengazisola phambilini nangibona bona nginizwise ubuhlungu ngencwadi leyo nje, nokho kwase kwaba sikhatjhana." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kwanjesi ngiyathaba, ingasi ngombana nganizwisa ubuhlungu, kodwana ngebanga lokobana ubuhlungu benu bunenze bona nitjhuguluke ngombana nezwa ubuhlungu obuvela kuZimu. Ubuhlungobo basetjenziswa nguZimu. Nje-ke thina azange sinikhubaze nakancani." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ubuhlungu obuvela kuZimu buveza ukutjhuguluka okudosela esindisweni begodu abulethi ukuzisola kodwana ubuhlungu obuvela ephasini buveza ukufa. 
2Corinthians7:11 Qalani bona ubuhlungu enabuzwiswa nguZimu buveze ukukhuthala okungangani kini, iye, ukuzimisela okungakaya kobana nizikhuphe emlandwini, ekwesabeni, ekulangazeleleni, ekutjhisekeleni nekuhlunguphazweni. Nizibonakalise ninganamlandu kikho koke malungana nalokho." 
2Corinthians7:12 Nje-ke nanyana nginitlolele, azange ngenze lokho ngebanga laloyo owonileko, namkha ngebanga laloyo owoniweko, kodwana ngenzela bona ukusitjhisekela kwenu kwazeke kini phambi koZimu." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ngalokho siyaduduzeka. Phezu kokududuzeka kwethu, sathokoza khulu ngokuthaba kwakaTitosi ngombana noke nje namenza bona umkhumbulwakhe uphole." 
2Corinthians7:14 Nakube bengiseze ngizikhakhazisa ngani kuye, azange ngibe neenhloni, kodwana kube njengokweqiniso lakho koke ebesikutjho kini. Yeke ukuzikhakhazisa kwethu kuTitosi nakho kubonakele kuliqiniso." 
2Corinthians7:15 Nje-ke ithando lakhe ngani landa khulu nakakhumbula ukuzithoba kwenu noke nokumamukela kwenu ngokwesaba nokuthuthumela. 
2Corinthians7:16 Ngithabile ngombana nginethemba elipheleleko ngani. 
2Corinthians8:1 Sifuna bona nazi bazalwana ngomusa kaZimu ophiwe amabandla weMasedoniya 
2Corinthians8:2 ukuthi ngesikhathi esinzima sokuhlukunyezwa, ithabo lawo elingapheliko kanye nobuchaka bawo obukhulu buphuphume baba mnotho wokuphana kiwo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ngingafakaza bona anikela ngokuzithandela kwawo ukuya ngamandlawo, ngitjho nangaphezu kwalokho anakho." 
2Corinthians8:4 Asincenga khulu bona nawo aphiwe ithuba lokuhlanganyela kilomsebenzi emakholweni. 
2Corinthians8:5 Nje-ke lokhu thina besingakakulindeli. Athoma ngokuzinikela wona qangi eKosini, kwathi ngokwentando kaZimu, azinikela nakithi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Yeke sabawa uTitosi bona njengombana sele athomile nje, akaqedelele umsebenzi womusa lo hlangana nani." 
2Corinthians8:7 Njengombana sele nikghona ezintweni zoke nje, ekukholweni, ekukhulumeni, elwazini, ekutjhisekeni okukhulu nethandweni lethu kini, sifuna bona nikghone nekunikeleni ngomusa." 
2Corinthians8:8 Akutjho bona nginibethela umthetho kodwana nginitjengisa bona abanye bakhuthele kangangani. Ngithanda bona nani nibonakale bonyana ithando lenu likhulu kangangani. 
2Corinthians8:9 Niyawazi umusa weKosi yethu uJesu Krestu kobana nanyana bekanjingile, kodwana ngebanga lenu waba sichaka ukuze kuthi ngobuchaka bakhe nina ninjinge." 
2Corinthians8:10 Nje-ke endabeni le, ngibeka nasi iseluleko sami: Kunilungele nina enithome qangi, ingasi ukwenza kwaphela, kodwana ukuba netjisakalo kusukela kwemnyakeni ophelileko." 
2Corinthians8:11 Yeke, kuqedeleleni lokho ukuze ukutjhisekela kwenu kulinganiswe ngokukuphetha ukuya ngalokho eninakho." 
2Corinthians8:12 Nangabe ukutjhisekela kukhona, isipho siyamukeleka ukuya ngalokho umuntu anakho, ingasi ukuya ngalokho umuntu anganakho." 
2Corinthians8:13 Angitjho bona kumele abanye bathwale ludlana khisibe nina niyagandeleleka, kodwana ngifuna ukulingalinganisa izinto phakathi" 
2Corinthians8:14 kwalokho okunengi eninakho nokutlhoga kwabo ukuze kuthi okunengi abanakho kwanelise iindingo zenu bese kuba nokulingalingana. 
2Corinthians8:15 Njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Loyo onokunengi, azange abe nokunengi khulu, naloyo onokuncani azange abe nokuncani khulu.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Akathokozwe uZimu obeke ehliziyweni kaTitosi ukutjhisekela okufana nalokho enginakho ngani. 
2Corinthians8:17 Azange amukele isibawo sethu nje kwaphela, kodwana njengombana anokutjhisekela okudlula kwaphambilini, uzonikhambela ngokuzithandela kwakhe." 
2Corinthians8:18 Simthumela kinapho kanye nomzalwana odumileko hlangana nawo woke amabandla ngokutjhumayela kwakhe ivangeli. 
2Corinthians8:19 Akusikho lokho kwaphela, kodwana ukhethwe mabandla bona akhambe nathi lokha nasikhambisa indaba yomnikelo esiwunakekelako kobana sidumise iKosi ngokwayo kanye nokubonakalisa ukukhuthala kwethu ekusizeni." 
2Corinthians8:20 Silinga bona kungabikhona umuntu osisolako ngesipho somusa esisisebenzakwesi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Sibinge bona senze okufaneleko, ingasi phambi kwakaZimu kwaphela kodwana naphambi kwabantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Sithumele kanye nabo umzalwana wethu esamzizinya kanengana, safumana akhuthele ezintweni ezinengi, kodwana kwanjesi sele anokutjhisekela okukhulu kunaphambilini ngebanga lokunethemba kwakhe okukhulu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Yena-ke uTitosi lo, umhlanganyeli kanye nomsebenzisani wami emsebenzini wenu lo. Nakubazalwana bethu bona, baziinthunywa zamabandla, idumo lakaKrestu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Nje-ke akuthi epepeneneni, nitjengise ubufakazi bethando lenu kibo nesizathu sethu sokuzikhakhazisa ngani." 
2Corinthians9:1 Akutlhogeki bona ngingabe nginitlolele mayelana nomnikelo omalungana nabacwengileko 
2Corinthians9:2 ngombana ngiyakwazi ukutjhisekela kwenu engizikhakhazisa ngakho ngani ebantwini beMasedoniya ngisithi, i-Arhaya lazilungiselela kwanyakenye. Ngalokho ukutjhisekela kwenu kudlhudlhe abanengi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Nje-ke ngithumela abazalwana kini ukuze ukuzikhakhazisa kwethu ngani kungabonakali kulilize. Kufanele nilunge njengombana bengithe sele nazilungiselela kade. 
2Corinthians9:4 Nakungasinjalo nange kungenzeka bona amaMasedoniya akhambe nami, afunyane bona anikalungisi, sizakuhlatjwa ziinhloni besivaleke imilomo ngani emsebenzini lo." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kungakho ngibone kuqakathekile ukuncenga abazalwana kobana bakhambe ngaphambi kwenu, bayokuje balungiselela ngaphambili, isipho esikhulu enathembisa ngaso ukuze sihlale silungile njengesipho enisikhuphe ngokuthanda kwenu ingasi ngokugandelelwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Khumbulani lokhu: “Loyo otjala ngokunconcosela, uzokuvuna okunconcoselweko, naloyo otjala okunengi uzakuvuna okunengi.”" 
2Corinthians9:7 Ngiloyo naloyo akanikele njengokuzibekela kwakhe ehliziyweni yakhe, kungabi ngokutsitsila namkha ngokugandelelwa ngombana uZimu uyamthanda loyo onikela ngethabo." 
2Corinthians9:8 UZimu unamandla wokwenza bona woke umusa wande kini ukuze kikho koke ngeenkhathi zoke, nasele ninakho koke enikudingako, nande ngayo yoke imisebenzi emihle" 
2Corinthians9:9 njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Wahlakaza ngokunabileko, wabela abachakileko. Ukulunga kwakhe kujame isiphelani.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Loyo opha umtjali imbewu kanye nesikwa njengokudla, uzonibonelela abe andise nesilulu sembewenu, akhulise isivuno sokulunga kwenu." 
2Corinthians9:11 Nizakwenziwa abanjingileko ngazo zoke iindlela ukuze niphane ngeenkhathi zoke bese kuthi ngathi, ukuphana kwenu kube kuthokoza uZimu." 
2Corinthians9:12 Umsebenzi eniwenzako lo, awuphakeli iindingo zabantu bakaZimu nje kwaphela, kodwana uphuphuma iindlela ezinengi ezahlukeneko zokuletha ukuthokoza kuZimu." 
2Corinthians9:13 Ngebanga lomsebenzi enizibonakalise ngawo lo, abantu bazakudumisa uZimu ngokuzithoba okukhambisana nokutjhumayela kwenu ivangeli lakaKrestu kanye nomusa wenu omkhulu ekwabelaneni nabo kanye nabantu boke." 
2Corinthians9:14 Nabanithandazelako, iinhliziyo zabo zizakunamathela kini ngebanga lomusa omkhulu uZimu aniphe wona." 
2Corinthians9:15 Akathokozwe uZimu ngesipho sakhe esingahlathululekiko! 
2Corinthians10:1 Mina Powula ngenyama, ngiyanincenga ngobumnene nangokuthobeka kwakaKrestu, iye, mina engizithobako lokha nangiphambi kwenu, kodwana nginesibindi lokha nangingekho kini!" 
2Corinthians10:2 Ngithi kini nangilapho, akungatlhogeki bona bengikhombise isibindi hlengiphikisana nalabo abadlumbana bona senza izinto ngokwenyama." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ngambala siphila njengabantu, kodwana asilwi ipi ngokwenyama." 
2Corinthians10:4 Thina iinkhali zepi yethu akusizo zenyama, kodwana zinamandla kaZimu kobana zitjhabalalise iinsekelo. Sitjhabalalisa ukuphikisana" 
2Corinthians10:5 kanye nazo zoke iinqabo ezizikhukhumezako ezijanyiswa kobana zijamelane nelwazi lakaZimu begodu yoke imikhumbulo siyithumbela ekuthobeleni uKrestu. 
2Corinthians10:6 Silungele ukuhlunguphaza koke ukungalaleli lokha ukulalela kwenu nasele kuphelelisiwe. 
2Corinthians10:7 Qalani lokho okuphambi kwenu. Nakube niyazithemba bona ningebakaKrestu, zikhumbuzeni bona, njengombana ningebakaKrestu, nathi singibo." 
2Corinthians10:8 Nje-ke ngitjho nanyana ngizikhakhakhakhazisa khudlwana ngegunya lethu iKosi esiphe lona kobana sinakhe singanigirizi, angeze ngaba neenhloni ngalokho." 
2Corinthians10:9 Angifuni ukubonakala inga ngilinga ukunithusela ngeencwadi zamezi 
2Corinthians10:10 ngombana kuthiwa: “Nakuziincwadi zakhe zona, zinesisindo begodu zitjhubile, kodwana yena siqu sakhe akanasithunzi, nekulumakhe ayazisi.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Abanjalo abalemuke bonyana lokho esikutjho ngencwadi nasingekho kibo, sizakutjho nalokha nasinabo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Asizifanisi namkha sizilinganise nabanye balabo abazibukako. Kodwana nabazilinganisako bebazifanise omunye nomunye, ababonisi ukuhlakanipha." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kodwana thina asizuzikhukhumeza ukudlula isilinganiso kodwana sizakuba ngaphakathi kwesilinganiso uZimu asibekele sona, besifikelele ngitjho nakini." 
2Corinthians10:14 Asikadluleleli ekuzigqajeni kwethu njengombana bekuzokuba njalo nakube besingakafiki kini ngombana thina singabokuthoma abafika kini ngevangeli lakaKrestu. 
2Corinthians10:15 Nje-ke asizikhakhazisi ngokudluleleko ngemisebenzi yabanye. Kodwana ithemba lethu kukobana ukukholwa kwenu nakulokhu kwanda, nomkhakha wokusebenza kwethu phakathi kwenu nawo uzakwandiswa khulu;" 
2Corinthians10:16 iye, ukuze sikwazi ukutjhumayela ivangeli nemazweni angaphetjheya kwenu, ngaphandle kokuzikhakhazisa ngomsebenzi osele wenziwe endaweni yomunye umuntu." 
2Corinthians10:17 Umtlolo uthi: “Loyo ozikhakhazisako, akazikhakhazise kuSomnini”" 
2Corinthians10:18 ngombana abathokozwako akusingilabo abazibukako kodwana kuthokozwa ababukwa yiKosi. 
2Corinthians11:1 Sengathi beninganginyamezelela ebudlhadlheni bami obuncanobu, iye, akhese ningibekezelele hle!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Nginetjhisakalo ngani, iye, nginetjhisakalo kaZimu ngombana nganendisa endodeni eyodwa, enguKrestu ukuze nginethule kuye nilitlawu lakotlawu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kodwana nginevalo ngani kobana njengombana u-Efa akhohliswa yinyoka enobuqili, imikhumbulo yenu nayo ingahle iyengwe ekuzinikeleni kwenu kuKrestu okuqotho nokumsulwa." 
2Corinthians11:4 Ngitjho ngombana nakufika umuntu afese atjhumayele omunye uJesu ohlukileko kilo esimtjhumayelako, namkha nanamukela omunye ummoya ohlukileko kilowo eniwamukeleko, namkha ivangeli elihlukileko kilelo esele nilamukele, niba msinyana ekuzinikeleni kokunjalo." 
2Corinthians11:5 Angikhumbuli nokho bona ngingonyazeka kunabo boke abapostoli abadumilekwabo. 
2Corinthians11:6 Mhlambe iye, ngilitjhapha ekukhulumeni, kodwana angisilo itjhapha elwazini; lokhu sakubonakalisa kini ngazo zoke iindlela, nakizo zoke izinto." 
2Corinthians11:7 Kghani ngonile ngokuzithoba kwami ukuze nina niphakanyiswe ngebanga lokobana ngatjhumayela ivangeli lakaZimu kini ngesihle na? 
2Corinthians11:8 Ngaphamba amanye amabandla ngokwamukela isekelo kiwo ukuze ngisize nina. 
2Corinthians11:9 Ngesikhathi ngisesenani begodu ngiswele, azange ngitlhagele namunye wenu ngombana iindingo zami bezithwelwe bangani bami beMasedoniya. Ngaleyondlela ngazibamba begodu ngizokuragela phambili nokuzibamba ekubeni mthwalo kini." 
2Corinthians11:10 Njengombana iqiniso lakaKrestu lingaphakathi kwami nje, ukuzikhakhazisa kwami angeze kwathuliswa eemfundeni ze-Arhaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Kubayini na? Kghani kungombana nginganithandi na? Awa, uZimu uyazi bona nginithanda tle." 
2Corinthians11:12 Engikwenzako ngizokuraga ngikwenze ukuze ngingabaphi ithuba labo abalifunela ukuthathwa inga balingana nathi kilokho abazikhukhumeza ngakho. 
2Corinthians11:13 Abazikhukhumezakwabo babapostoli bamala, iinsebenzi ezinekohliso, bazenza inga babapostoli bakaKrestu!" 
2Corinthians11:14 Akumangazi lokho! Ngitjho noSathana uyazitjhatjhanisa azenze ingilozi yokukhanya. 
2Corinthians11:15 Nje-ke akurari lokha iinceku zakhe nazo nazizitjhatjhanisako zizenze inga ziziinceku zokulunga. Isiphetho sazo sizakufanelana nezenzo zazo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ngiyabuyelela ngithi akungabi noyedwa odlumbana bona ngisidlhayela. Kodwana nakube kunjalo, khona-ke ngamukelani njengesidlhayela ukuze nami ngikwazi ukuzikhakhakhakhazisa." 
2Corinthians11:17 Lokho engikutjhoko mayelana nesibindi sokuzikhakhazisesi, angikutjho ngegunya leKosi, kodwana ngikutjho njengesidlhayela." 
2Corinthians11:18 Njengombana abanengi bazikhukhumeza ngokwephaseli nje, nami-ke ngizozikhukhumeza" 
2Corinthians11:19 ngombana ninyamezelela iindlhayela ngethabo, khisibe nina nihlakaniphile." 
2Corinthians11:20 Lokha umuntu nanenza amakhoboka, adla ngani, adlala ngani, adlhodlhomela ngani namkha aniwakala ebusweni, seniyambekezelela." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ngivuma ngeenhloni kobana saba buthakathaka khulu kilokho. Kodwana nanyana yini umuntu angazikhukhumeza ngakho, ngikhuluma njengesidlhayela, nami ngizikhukhumeza ngakho lokho." 
2Corinthians11:22 BamaHebheru na? Nami nginguye. Bama-Israyeli na? Nami nginguye. Baziinzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu na? Nami ngingiso. 
2Corinthians11:23 Baziinceku zakaKrestu na? Ngikhuluma njengehlanya, ngiyinceku engcono kunabo. Ngisebenze ukudlula bona, ngabanjwa kanengi kunabo, ngabethwa kanenginengi begodu kube kanengi ngijika emlonyeni wokufa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kwaba mahlandla amahlanu ngirithwa maJuda imivuvu ematjhumi amathathu nethoba. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ngadulwa bekwaba kathathu ngeentonga. Ngakghadlhwa ngamatje ihlandla elilodwa. Amahlandla amathathu ngaphahlazelwa umkhumbi, kwathi ubusuku nemini ngasunduzelwa ngelwandle." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ngibe sekukhambeni kanenginengi, ngaba sengozini yemilambo. Ngibe sengozini yabagongodi, ngaba sengozini yabantu bekhethu. Ngibe sengozini yabatjhili, ngaba sengozini nangingedorobheni. Ngibe sengozini nangiselwandle, ngaba sengozini kubazalwana bamala." 
2Corinthians11:27 Ngisebenze nzima ngazikhandla, ngasikhathi ngingalali. Ngiphethwe yindlala nomrhawu, ngahlala nginganakudla. Ngiququdwe makhaza nginganazambatho." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ngaphandle kwakho koke lokhu, ngihlala ngiqalene nokukhathazeka kwami okukhulu ngamabandla woke." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ngubani obuthakathaka mina ngingabi buthakathaka na? Ngubani okhubekiswako mina ngingatjhi na? 
2Corinthians11:30 Nakube kufanele ngizikhakhazise, ngizozikhakhazisa ngezinto ezikhombisa ubuthakathaka bami." 
2Corinthians11:31 UZimu onguYise weKosi uJesu, ekumele adunyiswe isiphelani, uyazi bonyana angileyi amala." 
2Corinthians11:32 Ngemzini weDamaseku, umbusi ongaphasi kwekosi u-Areta wathumela abalindi bona balinde umuzi wamaDamaseku ukuze ngibotjhwe." 
2Corinthians11:33 Kodwana ngehliswa ngesiqwebu ngefesidere elisemthangaleni, kwaba kuphunyurha kwami njalo ezandleni zakhe." 
2Corinthians12:1 Kufanele ngizikhakhazise nanyana kungasizi ilitho nje. Kodwana ngizakuragela phambili emibonweni nezambulweni zeKosi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Ngazi umuntu othileko kuKrestu, ekwathi eminyakeni elitjhumi nane edlulileko wanyuselwa ezulwini lesithathu. Ukuthi bekangemzimbeni namkha bekangasi ngemzimbeni, angazi, kwazi uZimu." 
2Corinthians12:3 Iye, ngiyazi bona umuntu loyo, nanyana bekangemzimbeni namkha bekangasi ngemzimbeni angazi, kwazi uZimu." 
2Corinthians12:4 Nokho yena wanyuselwa epharadesi. Wezwa izinto ezingakhulumekiko, iye, izinto umuntu angakavunyelwa bona azikhulume." 
2Corinthians12:5 Yeke ngizazikhakhazisa-ke ngomuntu onjalo, kodwana angeze ngazikhakhazisa ngokwami ngaphandle kobuthakathaka bami." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ngitjho nanyana bengingathanda ukuzikhakhazisa, bengingeze ngaba sidlhayela ngombana bengizabe ngikhuluma iqiniso. Kodwana ngiyalisa ukuzikhakhazisa ukuze kungabikhona ocabanga khulu ngami ukudlula lokho engikwenzako namkha engikukhulumako." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ngafakwa iliva enyameni ukuze ngingazikhukhumezi ngebanga lezambulo ezikulu engizibonako. Nje-ke ilivelo lisithunywa sakaSathana angititinya ngalo. 
2Corinthians12:8 Kwabe kwaba mahlandla amathathu ngincenga uSomnini bonyana alikhuphe kimapha. 
2Corinthians12:9 Kodwana wathi kimi: “Umusa wami ukwanele ngombana amandla wami apheleliswa ebuthakathakeni.” Nje-ke ngizazikhakhazisa khulu ngobuthakathaka bami ukuze amandla kaKrestu ahlale phezu kwami. 
2Corinthians12:10 Kungebangelo, ngenca kaKrestu, ngiyakuthabela ukuba buthakathaka, ukuthukwa, ukuba sebudisini, ukuzunywa nokuhlupheka. Ngitjho ngombana lokha nangibuthakathaka, ngiba namandla." 
2Corinthians12:11 Sese ngiphenduke isidlhayela, kodwana ngini eningenzisileko. Emanyeni bekumele kube ngini eningibukako ngombana anginyazeki nakancani ebapostolini abadumilekwaba, ngitjho nanyana ngingasililitho nje." 
2Corinthians12:12 Amatshwayo wobupostoli, okutjho iimbonakaliso, iimangaliso nemikarisomraro, kwenziwa phakathi kwenu ngesineke esikhulu." 
2Corinthians12:13 Yini eyanenza bona nilulazeke kunamanye amabandla ngaphandle kobana angizange ngibe mthwalo kini na? Yeningilibalele ebutjhaphenobo! 
2Corinthians12:14 Qalani, sele ngilungele ukuza kini kilelihlandla lesithathu. Angizukuba mthwalo kini ngombana angifuni ipahla yenu kodwana ngifuna nina. Angithi abantwana abakameli ukondla ababelethi kodwana babelethi ekumele bondle abantwana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ngingathaba ukuninikela koke enginakho nami bengizinikele ngokwami. Nakube nginithanda khulu, nina nizangithanda kancani na?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Akhe kuthatheke-ke bona azange ngibe mthwalo kini. Nokho nithi batjho njengombana ngibe nobuqili, nganidlelezela." 
2Corinthians12:17 Ngakhe nganidlelezela ngamanye wamadoda engawathumela kini na? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ngakhombela uTitosi bona eze kini, ngamthuma nomunye umzalwana wethu. UTitosi azange anidlelezele. Kghani wakhe wanidlelezela? Azange siziphathe njalo nathi na? Azange sikhambe emagadangweni afanako na?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Kghani soke isikhathesi beniseze nidlumbana bona sizivikela kini na? Awa, thina besikhuluma phambi koZimu sikuKrestu begodu koke esikwenzako, bangani abathandekako, sikwenzela ukuqinisa nina." 
2Corinthians12:20 Nginevalo lokobana ekufikeni kwami ngingahle nginifunyane ningasi ngilokho engikufisako, nani ningahle ningifunyane ngingasi ngilokho enikufisako. Godu nginevalo lokobana mhlambe kungaba khona ukucabana, umona, ukuthukuthelelana, umrhobholo, ukuthukana, ukuhlebana, ukuzazi nesiphithiphithi." 
2Corinthians12:21 Iye, nginevalo lokobana nangifikako godu, uZimami angangithoba phambi kwenu, mhlambe bengililele abanengi abona ngaphambilini kodwana bangeze baphenduka ekusilaphaleni kwabo, ekuziphatheni kumbi ngokwamabhayi kanye nemanyaleni abawenzileko." 
2Corinthians13:1 Sekungekwesithathu ngisiza kini: “Yoke indaba kumele iqiniswe ngabofakazi ababili namkha abathathu.” 
2Corinthians13:2 Ngabayelelisa labo abonako ngaphambilini kanye nabo boke abanye, godu ngisabayelelisa nanje nanyana ngingekho phakathi kwabo, njengombana ngenza lokha nangiphakathi kwenu nanginikhambele kwesibili. Ngithi angisoze ngaba nesirhawu" 
2Corinthians13:3 njengombana nithi nifuna ubufakazi bona uKrestu ukhulume ngami. Yena akasibuthakathaka ekusebenzeni ngani kodwana unamandla hlangana nani. 
2Corinthians13:4 Yena wabethelwa ebuthakathakeni kodwana waphila ngamandla kaZimu. Sibuthakathaka kuye, kodwana ekusebenzeni kwethu ngani, sizokuphila naye ngamandla kaZimu." 
2Corinthians13:5 Zihlolisiseni bona nisaphila ekukholweni na. Zizizinyeni. Kanti anilemuki bonyana uJesu Krestu ungaphakathi kwenu na? Nakungasinjalo khona-ke kutjho bona anikayiphumeleli ihlolo. 
2Corinthians13:6 Ngiyathemba bona nizakufunyana bonyana thina azange sibhalelwe. 
2Corinthians13:7 Sithandaza kuZimu bona ningenzi ilitho elingakalungi. Ingasi bona sibonakalise ebantwini bonyana siphumelele ihlolo, kodwana kobana nenze okulungileko ngitjho nanyana kubonakala inga sibhalelwe." 
2Corinthians13:8 Ngitjho ngombana akunalitho esingalenza ukujamelana neqiniso ngaphandle kobana silijamele," 
2Corinthians13:9 ngombana sihlala sithabile njalo lokha nasibuthakathaka kodwana nina ninamandla. Nje-ke imithandazwethu kukobana nipheleliswe. 
2Corinthians13:10 Kungalokho ngitlola izintwezi nangingekho phakathi kwenu ukuze kuthi nangizako ngingafiki ngibe bukhali ekusebenziseni kwami igunya, iye, igunya engaliphiwa yiKosi kobana nginakhe ingasi bona nginigirize." 
2Corinthians13:11 Kokugcina bazalwana, yenisale kuhle. Phikelelani ukupheleliswa, nilalele isibawo sami. Yibani hliziyonye, nihlale ngokuthula. UZimu wethando nokuthula uzakuba nani." 
2Corinthians13:12 Lotjhisanani ngokwangana okukhethekileko. 
2Corinthians13:13 Boke abazalwana bayanilotjhisa. 
2Corinthians13:14 Umusa weKosi uJesu Krestu, ithando lakaZimu nobudlelwana bakaMoya oCwengileko, akube nani noke." 
Galatians1:1 UPowula, ompostoli ongaveli ebantwini namkha ongakezi ngabantu kodwana ngoJesu Krestu noZimu uBaba, owavusa uJesu ekufeni," 
Galatians1:2 kanye nabo boke abazalwana abanami, silotjhisa amabandla aseGalatiya:" 
Galatians1:3 Sithi sinifisela umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba neKosini uJesu Krestu," 
Galatians1:4 owazinikela ngebanga lezono zethu kobana asihlangule esikhathini lesi sobukhohlakali ukuya ngokwentando kaZimethu nonguBaba. 
Galatians1:5 Akadunyiswe ngokungapheliko! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ngiyarareka ngombana nimsinyana kangaka ukuhlubuka loyo owanibiza ngomusa kaKrestu, naphendukela evangelini elehlukileko," 
Galatians1:7 ekhabo lakhona ekungasilivangeli nokuba livangeli. Kuyabonakala bona kunabantu abanihlangahlanganisako, abalinga ukona ivangeli lakaKrestu." 
Galatians1:8 Kodwana nanyana kungaba ngithi namkha ingilozi evela ezulwini ingatjhumayela elinye ivangeli ngaphandle kwalelo esanitjhumayeza lona, ayithuweleliswe!" 
Galatians1:9 Njengombana besele sitjhwile, ngisabuyelela godu ngithi: Nakube kunomuntu onitjhumayeza ivangeli ngaphandle kwalelo esanitjhumayeza lona, akathuweleliswe loyo." 
Galatians1:10 Kghani nje-ke ngizifunela ukuthandwa babantu namkha nguZimu na? Kghani ngifuna ukuthabisa abantu? Nakube bengisafuna ukuthabisa abantu, bengingeze ngaba likhoboka lakaKrestu." 
Galatians1:11 Akhese nginitjele bazalwana bona ivangeli engilitjhumayelakweli akusiyinto ethonywe babantu. 
Galatians1:12 Akhange ngilamukele emuntwini, godu azange ngafundiswa lona. Kodwana ngalifumana ngokwambulelwa nguJesu Krestu." 
Galatians1:13 Nizwile ngepilo ebengiyiphila phambilini ebuJudeni bona bengilitlhagisa kangangani ibandla lakaZimu, ngilinga ukulitjhabalalisa." 
Galatians1:13 Nizwile ngepilo ebengiyiphila phambilini ebuJudeni bona bengilitlhagisa kangangani ibandla lakaZimu, ngilinga ukulitjhabalalisa." 
Galatians1:14 Besele nginendima ekulu ebuJudeni, sele ngiphala namaJuda amanengi abontanga begodu bengitjhabatjheka khulu ngamasiko wabobaba." 
Galatians1:14 Besele nginendima ekulu ebuJudeni, sele ngiphala namaJuda amanengi abontanga begodu bengitjhabatjheka khulu ngamasiko wabobaba." 
Galatians1:15 Kodwana uZimu owangihlukanisela ngingakabelethwa, wangibiza ngomusa wakhe, wakuthabela" 
Galatians1:16 ukubonakalisa iNdodanakhe kimi ukuze ngimtjhumayele kabatjhili. Azange ngikhulumisane nenyama neengazi 
Galatians1:17 namkha ngiye eJerusalema ukuyokubonana nalabo ebegade babapostoli ngaphambi kwami. Kodwana ngasuka khonokho ngaya e-Arabhiya, kwathi ngemva kwesikhathi ngabuyela eDamaseku." 
Galatians1:18 Ngemva kweminyaka emithathu, ngakhuphukela eJerusalema kobana ngiyokwazana noPitrosi. Yeke ngahlala naye amalanga alitjhumi nahlanu." 
Galatians1:19 Akhange ngibabone abanye abapostoli ngaphandle kwakaJakopo, umfowabo leKosi." 
Galatians1:20 Lokhu enginitlolela khona kuliqiniso phambi kwakaZimu. 
Galatians1:21 Ngemva kwalokho ngaya eSiriya neSilisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Bengingaziwa ubuso nobuso emabandleni weJudiya akuKrestu. 
Galatians1:23 Bebezwe kwaphela umbiko ngami othi: “Umuntu obegade azumana nathi phambilini, kwanjesi sele atjhumayela ukukholwa ebegade alinga ukukutjhabalalisa.”" 
Galatians1:24 Yeke badumisa uZimu ngebanga lami. 
Galatians2:1 Ngemva kweminyaka elitjhumi nane godu ngabuyela eJerusalema, kilelihlandla bengikhamba noBharinabhasi, ngathatha noTitosi." 
Galatians2:2 Ngaya ngebanga lesambulo engasifumanako, ngafese ngendlala phambi kwabo ivangeli engilitjhumayela phakathi kwabatjhili. Kodwana lokhu ngakwenza ngasese kilabo ebebabonakala inga babarholi, ngokwesaba bona umgijimo engiwugijimako nengiwugijimileko ungabi lilize lakolize." 
Galatians2:3 Kodwana ngitjho noTitosi obegade akhamba nami, azange akatelelwe bona asoke nanyana bekamGirigi njalo." 
Galatians2:4 Indaba le ivuswe kukuthi kube nabafowethu bamala abazifake hlangana nathi kobana bazozihlolisa ikululeko esinayo kuKrestu Jesu bese basenze amakhoboka. 
Galatians2:5 Kodwana azange sibanikele ithuba nakancani ngombana besifuna bona iqiniso levangeli likghone ukuhlala phakathi kwenu. 
Galatians2:6 Kodwana nakungilabo ababonakala inga babarholi, nanyana bebangibo kwamambala, akwenzi mehluko lokho, uZimu akagwebi ngokuqala ijamo lomuntu, abantwabo azange bafake ilitho emlayezwenami." 
Galatians2:7 Kunalokho, babona bonyana ngiphathiswe umsebenzi wokutjhumayela ivangeli kabatjhili, njengombana uPitrosi bekatjhumayela kumaJuda." 
Galatians2:8 UZimu obegade asemsebenzini kaPitrosi njengompostoli kumaJuda, bekasemsebenzinami njengompostoli wabatjhili." 
Galatians2:9 UJakopo, uKhefasi noJwanisi baba ziinsika, bangisekela mina noBharinabhasi ngokuhlanganyela, bavuma umusa engiphathiswe wona. Bavuma nokobona thina siye kabatjhili, bona baye kumaJuda." 
Galatians2:10 Into nje abayibawako kukobanyana sikhumbule abadududu, ebekuyinto ebengivele ngitjhisakalela ukuyenza." 
Galatians2:11 Kwathi bona uPitrosi afike e-Anthiyorhiya ngajamelana naye ubuso nobuso ngombana bekusemtarini bona utjhaphile. 
Galatians2:12 Ngaphambi kobana kufike abantu abathileko abavela kuJakopo, bekagoma nabatjhili. Kodwana kuthe bona kufike abantwabo, watsomuka, wazihlukanisa nabatjhili ngombana bekesaba labo abangebesiqhema esisokako." 
Galatians2:13 Amanye amaJuda amlandela ekubeni bazenzisi, nje-ke ngokuzenzisa kwabo noBharinabhasi wayengeka." 
Galatians2:14 Ngathi nangibona bonyana abakhambi ngendlela yeqiniso levangeli, ngathi kuPitrosi phambi kwabo boke: “Wena umJuda, kodwana khonapho uphila njengotjhili ingasi njengomJuda. Alo, kuzanjani-ke bona ukatelele abatjhili ukulandela imikhuba yamaJuda na?”" 
Galatians2:15 “Thina esimaJuda ngokubelethwa, singasizo ‘izoni ezitjhili’," 
Galatians2:16 siyazi bona umuntu akalungisiswa ngokuthobela umthetho, kodwana ngokukholwa kuJesu Krestu. Nathi-ke sibeke ukukholwa kwethu kuKrestu Jesu ukuze silungisiswe ngokukholwa kuKrestu ingasi ngokuthobela umthetho ngombana akunamuntu ozakulungisiswa ngokuthobela umthetho." 
Galatians2:17 Nakube thina silinga ukulungisiswa kuKrestu, khibe ngapha sisesezizoni, lokho kuzabe kutjho bona uKrestu ukhuthaza ukona na? Awa, nakanye!" 
Galatians2:18 Nakube ngakha kabutjha lokho engakutjhabalalisako, ngiyazibonakalisa bona ngisisephulamthetho." 
Galatians2:19 Ngomthetho ngafa emthethweni ukuze ngiphilele uZimu. 
Galatians2:20 Ngabethelwa kanye noKrestu Jesu, nje-ke akusese ngimi ophilako, kodwana nguKrestu ophila ngaphakathi kwami. Ipilo engiyiphila emzimbeni lo, ngiyiphila ngokukholwa eNdodaneni kaZimu, eyangithandako beyanikela ipilwayo ngebanga lami." 
Galatians2:21 Angiwubekeli eqadi umusa kaZimu ngombana nakube ukulunga kungafumaneka ngomthetho, kutjho bona uKrestu wafela ilize.”" 
Galatians3:1 Nina ndlhadlha zamaGalatiya! Niloywe ngubani na? Emehlwenenu besele kwazeka bona uJesu Krestu wabethelwa. 
Galatians3:2 Akhe nginibuze okukodwa nakhu: Namukele uMoya ngemisebenzi yomthetho namkha ngokuzwa ngokukholwa na? 
Galatians3:3 Kanti niziindlhayela kangaka na? Ngemva kobana nithome ngoMoya, senigcina ngenyama na?" 
Galatians3:4 Nahlupheka kangaka ngelize na? Nakube mbala bekungelize! 
Galatians3:5 Kghani loyo oninikela uMoya abe enze imikarisomraro phakathi kwenu ukwenza lokho ngemisebenzi yomthetho namkha ngokuzwa ukukholwa na? 
Galatians3:6 Yeke u-Abrahamu “wakholwa uZimu, kwabalelwa kuye bona kukulunga”." 
Galatians3:7 Yazini-ke bona labo abakholwako babantwana baka-Abrahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Yeke umtlolo, ngokubona bona uZimu uzakulungisisa abatjhili ngokukholwa, watjhumayela ivangeli ku-Abrahamu ngaphambilini, wathi: “Zoke izizwe zizakubusiswa kuwe.”" 
Galatians3:9 Ngalokho-ke labo abanokukholwa babusiswa kanye no-Abrahamu, indoda yokukholwa." 
Galatians3:10 Boke abathembela ekuthobeleni umthetho banikelelwe ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Bathuwelelisiwe boke abangakhambi ngokuya ngalokho okutlolwe encwadini yomthetho.” 
Galatians3:11 Kuyakhanya bona akakho olungisiswa ngomthetho phambi koZimu ngombana, “Olungileko uzakuphila ngokukholwa”." 
Galatians3:12 Umthetho awukanzinzi ekukholweni, kunalokho, “Loyo owenza koke lokho uzakuphila ngakho.”" 
Galatians3:13 UKrestu wasihlenga esithuwelelisweni somthetho ngokobana yena abe sithuweleliso esikhundleni sethu ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Umuntu ohlonywe esigodweni uthuweleliswe nguZimu”," 
Galatians3:14 ukuze kuthi ngoKrestu Jesu isibusiso saka-Abrahamu sehlele phezu kwabatjhili, khona sizakwamukela isithembiso sakaMoya ngokukholwa." 
Galatians3:15 Bazalwana, akhe ngikhulume okujayelekileko ebantwini: Njengombana kungekho umuntu ongachitha namkha angezelele amezwi welifa nasele litloliwe, kunjalo-ke nangalokhu." 
Galatians3:16 Nje-ke iinthembiso zenziwa ku-Abrahamu nesizukulwaneni sakhe. Umtlolo awuthi, “neenzukulwaneni” okutjho abantu abanengi, kodwana uthi, “nesizukulwaneni”, okutjho umuntu munye onguKrestu." 
Galatians3:17 Engikutjhoko ngilokhu: Umthetho owafakwa eminyakeni emakhulu amane namatjhumi amathathu ngemva kwalokho, awusisusi isivumelwano esenziwa nguZimu phambilini bese ngalokho ususe isithembiso." 
Galatians3:18 Yeke nakube ilifa liya ngomthetho, khona-ke alisayi ngesithembiso; kodwana uZimu ngomusa wakhe walinikela u-Abrahamu ngesithembiso." 
Galatians3:19 Alo, bewuyini-ke umnqopho womthetho na? Wengezwa ngebanga lamacala kufikela lapha kuza khona isizukulwana esenzelwa isithembiso. Umthetho wafakwa ziingilozi ngesandla somlamuli." 
Galatians3:20 Yeke umlamuli akasingewomuntu oyedwa, kodwana uZimu munye." 
Galatians3:21 Alo-ke, umthetho ujamelene neenthembiso zakaZimu na? Awa, nakanye! Nakube umthetho bewunikelwe bona uphe ipilo, khona-ke ukulunga bekuzakuza ngomthetho." 
Galatians3:22 Kodwana umtlolo uthi iphaseli loke nje lisibotjhwa sesono ukuze kuthi okwathenjiswa ngokukholwa kuJesu Krestu, kunikelwe labo abakholwako." 
Galatians3:23 Ngaphambi kobana ukukholwa kufike, umthetho bewusibambile usenze iimbotjhwa, wasivalela bekwaba kulapha kutjhatjhululwa khona ukukholwa." 
Galatians3:24 Yeke umthetho ngiwo owabekwa bona usidosele kuKrestu ukuze silungisiswe ngokukholwa. 
Galatians3:25 Njengombana kwanjesi ukukholwa sekufikile, umthetho akusesengiwo osinqophisako." 
Galatians3:26 Noke nibantwana bakaZimu ngokukholwa kuKrestu Jesu 
Galatians3:27 ngombana noke nina enabhabhadiselwa kuKrestu nembethe uKrestu. 
Galatians3:28 AkunamJuda, akunamGrigi, ikhoboka namkha otjhaphulukileko, omduna namkha omsikazi ngombana nimunye noke kuKrestu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Nakube ningebakaKrestu, khona-ke niziinzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu, neendlalifa ngokwesithembiso." 
Galatians4:1 Kodwana ngithi lokha indlalifa nayisesemntwana, ayehluki kunekhoboka, nanyana imnini walo loke ilifa." 
Galatians4:2 Iba ngaphasi kwabeluleki nabaphatheli bayo bekufike isikhathi esibekwe nguyise. 
Galatians4:3 Ngokunjalo-ke nathi nasisesebantwana besisebukhobokeni ngaphasi kwemigomo yephasi. 
Galatians4:4 Kodwana isikhathi nasele siphelelisiwe, uZimu wathumela iNdodanakhe, ebelethwe ngowesifazana, yabelethelwa ngaphasi komthetho," 
Galatians4:5 ukuzokuhlenga labo abangaphasi komthetho ukuze nathi sifunyane ilungelo elizeleko lamadodana. 
Galatians4:6 Ngebanga lokobana nimadodanakhe, uZimu wathumela uMoya weNdodanakhe ngeenhliziyweni zethu, uMoya orhuwelela uthi: “Aba! Baba!”" 
Galatians4:7 Yeke awusese likhoboka kodwana sele uyindodana. Njengombana uyindodana, uZimu godu ukwenze waba yindlalifa." 
Galatians4:8 Phambilini lokha ningakamazi uZimu, benimakhoboka walabo ngokwemvelo abangasibo abozimu." 
Galatians4:9 Kodwana njengombana sele nimazi uZimu namkha ngingathi senisaziwa nguZimu, kubayini-ke senibuyela eemfundisweni ezibuthakathaka nezililize na? Nithanda ukuba makhoboka wazo godu na?" 
Galatians4:10 Nihlonipha amalanga akhethekileko, iinyanga, iinkhathi neminyaka!" 
Galatians4:11 Nginevalo ngani, kobana mhlamunye ngidlale ngamandlami ngani." 
Galatians4:12 Ngiyanirabhela, bazalwana, yibani njengami ngombana nami nginjengani. Anikangoni ngalitho." 
Galatians4:13 Njengombana nisazi, bekungebanga lokugula bona ngithome ngani ukutjhumayela ivangeli." 
Galatians4:14 Nanyana ukugula kwami kube sizizinyo kini, azange ninginyaze namkha ningiphoqe. Esikhundleni salokho ningamukele sengathi ngiyingilozi kaZimu, iye, kwanga nginguKrestu Jesu ngenyama." 
Galatians4:15 Kwenzekeni ngalo loke ithabo lenu na? Ngingafakaza bona nabe gade nenze njalo, benizokukhupha amehlwenu ninginikele wona." 
Galatians4:16 Alo, sengisisitha senu ngokunitjela iqiniso na?" 
Galatians4:17 Abantwabo batjhisekela ukunizuza, kodwana ingasi ebuhleni. Abakufunako kukunahlukanisa nathi ukuze nani nibatjhisekele." 
Galatians4:18 Kuhle bona nitjhiseke, kwaphela nakube kungomnqopho omuhle begodu kuhlale kunjalo, ingasi kwaphela lokha nanginani." 
Galatians4:19 Bantwana bami enginomrhelo ngabo kufikela uKrestu abunjwe ngaphakathi kwenu," 
Galatians4:20 maye bengilangazela kangangani ukuba nani ngitjhugulule ilizwi lami ngombana ngirareke khulu ngani! 
Galatians4:21 Akhe ningitjele nina enithanda ukuba ngaphasi komthetho, anilemuki bona umthetho uthini na?" 
Galatians4:22 Angithi kutloliwe bona u-Abrahamu bekanamadodana amabili, enye ingeyekhobokakazi, enye ingeyomkakhe okhululekileko." 
Galatians4:23 Indodanakhe yekhobokakazi yabelethwa ngendlela ejayelekileko, kodwana indodanakhe yomfazi okhululekileko yabelethwa ngebanga lesithembiso." 
Galatians4:24 Izintwezi ziimfanekiso kwaphela ngombana abafazi bajamele iimvumelwano ezimbili. Isivumelwano esisodwa ngesibuya entabeni iSinayi begodu sibeletha abantwana abazokuba makhoboka: Lokho kutjho uHagari. 
Galatians4:25 UHagari ujamele intaba yeSinayi ese-Arabhiya begodu ukhambisana nomuzi lo weJerusalema ngombana usebukhobokeni kanye nabantwana bawo. 
Galatians4:26 Kodwana iJerusalema eliphezulu likhululekile begodu lingumma wethu 
Galatians4:27 ngombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Yewuthabe wena mfazi oyinyumba iye, wena ongabelethi abantwana, phuma urhahlawule wena onganamirhelo ngombana banengi abantwana bomfazi onganabani kunebaloyo onendoda.”" 
Galatians4:28 Nje-ke nina bazalwana, njengo-Isaka nibantwana besithembiso." 
Galatians4:29 Ngesikhatheso indodana ebelethwe ngokujayelekileko yatlhorisa indodana ebelethwe ngamandla kaMoya. Kunjalo nagadesi. 
Galatians4:30 Kodwana umtlolo uthini na? Uthi: “Qotjha umfazi olikhoboka nendodanakhe ngombana yona ayisoze yaba nesabelo elifeni nendodana yomfazi okhululekileko.” 
Galatians4:31 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana, thina asisibo abantwana bomfazi olikhoboka, kodwana singebomfazi okhululekileko." 
Galatians5:1 UKrestu wasikhulula kobana sibe ngabakhululekileko. Ngalokho jamani niqine, ningazidisibezi godu ngejogi lobukhoboka." 
Galatians5:2 Lalelani, mina Powula ngithi kini, nakube niyasoka, uKrestu angekhe aba nesizo nakancani kini." 
Galatians5:3 Godu ngiyaqinisa kuye woke umuntu osokako bona ubophelekile ukuthobela woke umthetho. 
Galatians5:4 Nina enilinga ukulungisiswa ngomthetho nahlukanisiwe noKrestu, ningaphandle komusa kaZimu." 
Galatians5:5 Kodwana ngoMoya silinde ngokukholwa ithemba lokulungisiswa," 
Galatians5:6 ngombana kuKrestu Jesu, ukusoka nokungasoki akwenzi mahluko. Into eqakathekileko kukholwa okuzibonakalisa ngethando." 
Galatians5:7 Beseze nigijima kuhle. Ngubani oniliyileko kobana ningasalalela iqiniso na? 
Galatians5:8 Ukuyengwa okunjalo akuveli konibizako. 
Galatians5:9 Ingumelo encani ibilisa ihlama yoke. 
Galatians5:10 Nginethemba eKosini bona anizukuba nomkhumbulo owahlukileko. Loyo onihlangahlanganisako, uzakuthwala isibetho nanyana kungaba ngubani." 
Galatians5:11 Bazalwana, nakube ngisatjhumayela ukusoka, alo ngisazunyelwani na? Ngaleyondlela isikhubekiso sesiphambano siphelisiwe." 
Galatians5:12 Nakubatjitjizelabo bona, sengathi bangathuwelela baziqandule bona ngokwabo." 
Galatians5:13 Nina bazalwana, nibizelwe ekululekweni, kodwana ningasebenzisi ikululeko yenu njengethuba enyameni. Kunalokho sebenzelanani ngethando" 
Galatians5:14 ngombana woke umthetho uzaliseka egameni linye lokuthi: “Thanda umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena.” 
Galatians5:15 Kodwana nanihlalele ukulumana benirhiribidelane, yeke yelelani bona ningaqedani." 
Galatians5:16 Yeke ngithi kini: Khambani ngoMoya ukuze ninganelisi iinkanuko zenyama," 
Galatians5:17 ngombana iinkanuko zenyama ziphambene nokufunwa nguMoya, kanti nokufunwa nguMoya kuphambene neenkanuko zenyama. Iye, izintwezi ziphambene, khona ningazukwenza enikuthandako." 
Galatians5:18 Kodwana nanibuswa nguMoya, anisingaphasi komthetho." 
Galatians5:19 Kodwana imisebenzi yenyama isemtarini: bufebe, kusilaphala, manyala," 
Galatians5:20 kulotjha abosingazimu, buloyi, yizondo, kucabana, mumona, kubanga umguruguru, kuzicabangela wedwa, kuphikisana, kukwahlukana," 
Galatians5:21 yikanuko, budakwa, kurhiribidela nokhunye okunjalo. Ngiyaniyelelisa njengombana ngenza phambilini, bona labo abaphila ngalendlela asoze balidla ilifa lombuso kaZimu." 
Galatians5:22 Kodwana iinthelo zakaMoya zilithando, kujabula, kuthula, kubekezela, kulunga, kukwethembeka," 
Galatians5:23 bumnene nokuzithiba. Akunamthetho olwisana nokunjalo. 
Galatians5:24 Labo abangebakaKrestu Jesu babethele esiphambanweni inyama kanye nemizwa neenkanuko zayo. 
Galatians5:25 Nakube siphila ngoMoya, khona-ke asikhambe ngoMoya." 
Galatians5:26 Asingazikhukhumezi, sirhugane begodu simonakalelane." 
Galatians6:1 Bazalwana, nakube kukhona obhajwe esonweni, nina enilawulwa nguMoya, mfakeni endleleni ngommoya omuhle. Kodwana zitjhejeni kobana nani ningalingeki." 
Galatians6:2 Thwalisanani imithwalo yenu, ngaleyondlela nizabe nizalisa umthetho kaKrestu." 
Galatians6:3 Nakube umuntu udlumbana bona ulilitho ije angasililitho, uyazikhohlisa." 
Galatians6:4 Omunye nomunye kufanele ahlolisise imisebenzakhe. Ngemva kwalokho-ke angazikhakhazisa ngokungokwakhe, ingasi ngokwabanye" 
Galatians6:5 ngombana omunye nomunye kufanele athwale umthwalo wakhe. 
Galatians6:6 Akuthi nanyana ngubani ofundiswa ilizwi, abelane naloyo omfundisako kizo zoke izinto ezihle." 
Galatians6:7 Ningakhohliswa, uZimu akaphoqwa. Umuntu uvuna akutjalileko." 
Galatians6:8 Otjalela iinkanuko zakhe uzakuvuna ukubhubha okuvela kizo, kodwana otjalela uMoya, uzakuvuna ukuphila okungapheliko kuye uMoya." 
Galatians6:9 Asingadinwa ukwenza okulungileko ngombana ngesikhathi esifaneleko sizakuvuna nakube asipheli amandla. 
Galatians6:10 Nje-ke, njengombana sinethuba, asenzeni okuhle kibo boke abantu, khulukhulu kilabo abangebokukholwa." 
Galatians6:11 Qalani, nginitlolele ngokudarhileko ngesami isandla!" 
Galatians6:12 Abantu abathanda ukubukwa enyameni, ngibo abazonikatelela bona nisoke. Benza lokho ukuze bangazunywa ngebanga lesiphambano sakaKrestu." 
Galatians6:13 Sengitjho nalabo abasokako abawuthobeli umthetho; kodwana khonapho bathanda bona nisoke ukuze bazikhakhazise ngenyama yenu. 
Galatians6:14 Kodwana mina angingazikhakhazisi ngalitho ngaphandle kwesiphambano seKosethu uJesu Krestu, ngayo ekubethelwe iphasi kimi, nami ngabethelwa kilo." 
Galatians6:15 Ukusoka nokungasoki akutjho ilitho, okukhulu kukobana umuntu abe sidalwa esitjha." 
Galatians6:16 Akube kuthula nomusa kibo boke abakhamba ngomthetho lo, ngitjho naku-Israyeli kaZimu!" 
Galatians6:17 Ukusuka gadesi, akungabe kusaba nomuntu ongitshwenyako ngombana emzimbenami nginamatshwayo kaJesu." 
Galatians6:18 Sengathi umusa weKosethu uJesu Krestu ungaba nani, bazalwana. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 UPowula umpostoli kaKrestu Jesu ngokwentando kaZimu, kibo abacwengileko abase-Efesu nabathembekileko kuKrestu Jesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Akube kini ukuthula nomusa ovela kuZimu uBaba neKosi uJesu Krestu. 
Ephesians1:3 Akadunyiswe uZimu nonguYise weKosethu uJesu Krestu, osibusisileko embusweni wezulu ngazo zoke iimbusiso zakaMoya kuKrestu." 
Ephesians1:4 Wasikhethela kuye ngaphambi kokudalwa kwephasi kobana sibe ngabacwengileko nabamsulwa ebusweni bakhe. Ngethando 
Ephesians1:5 waqunta ngaphambilini bona sithathwe njengabantwana bakhe ngoJesu Krestu, ukuya ngokuthanda kwakhe nangentando yakhe," 
Ephesians1:6 kiyo indumiso yomusa wakhe ophazimulako asinikele wona ngesihle ngaloyo amthandako! 
Ephesians1:7 Kuye sinesihlengo ngeengazi zakhe, ukucolelwa kwezono, ukuya ngomusa omkhulu kaZimu" 
Ephesians1:8 awuthela phezu kwethu ngokuhlakanipha koke nangokuzwisisa. 
Ephesians1:9 Wasazisa ngokuhlakanipha koke nangokulemuka iimangaliso zentando yakhe, ukuya ngokomnqopho wakhe awuveza ngoKrestu" 
Ephesians1:10 njengehlelo lokupheleliswa kweenkhathi, ukuhlanganisa zoke izinto kuye, iye, izinto ezisezulwini nezisephasini." 
Ephesians1:11 Kuye godu sakhethwa, saquntelwa ngaphambilini ukuya ngehlelo laloyo owenza koke ngokukhambisana nehloso yentando yakhe," 
Ephesians1:12 ukuze kuthi thina ebesingebokuthoma ukwethemba kuKrestu, sidumise iphazimulwakhe." 
Ephesians1:13 Nani-ke nafakwa kuKrestu lokha nanizwa ilizwi leqiniso, ivangeli lesindiso yenu. Senikholiwe, nabekwa kuye itshwayo ngesigibo, ekunguMoya oCwengileko owathenjiswako." 
Ephesians1:14 Yena osibambiso esiqinisa ilifa lethu bekufike ukuhlengwa kwalabo abaselifeni lakaZimu, kilo idumo lephazimulwakhe." 
Ephesians1:15 Ngalokho-ke, soloko ngezwa ngokukholwa kwenu eKosini uJesu kanye nethando lenu kibo boke abacwengileko," 
Ephesians1:16 azange ngilise ukunithokoza, ngihlala nginikhumbula emithandazwenami." 
Ephesians1:17 Ngihlala ngikhombela bona uZimu weKosethu uJesu Krestu, uBaba wephazimulo, aniphe uMoya wokuhlakanipha nesambulo ukuze nimazi ngcono." 
Ephesians1:18 Godu ngithandazela bona inga amehlo weenhliziyo zenu angavuleka ukuze nazi ithemba anibizela kilo, umnono welifa lakhe eliphazimulako kabacwengileko" 
Ephesians1:19 namandla wakhe angalinganisekiko ngobukhulu, kithi abakholwako. Amandla lawo afana nokusebenza kwesiphanga sakhe," 
Ephesians1:20 avusa ngawo uKrestu kabafileko, wambeka ngesigomeni sakhe embusweni wezulu," 
Ephesians1:21 ngaphezu kwakho koke ukubusa kanye negunya, amandla nobukhosi kanye namabizo woke angabizwa ngawo, ingasi esikhathinesi kwaphela kodwana nakileso esizako." 
Ephesians1:22 UZimu wabeka koke ngaphasi kweenyawo zakaKrestu, wambeka bona abe yihloko phezu kwakho koke kwebandla," 
Ephesians1:23 elimzimba wakhe nelikuzaliseka kwakhe ozalisa koke ngazo zoke iindlela. 
Ephesians2:1 Nakungini, benifile eemphambekweni nezonweni zenu," 
Ephesians2:2 ebenijayele ukuphila kizo lokha nabegade nilandela iindlela zephaseli nezombusi wombuso womkayi, okumumoya osebenza phakathi kwalabo abangalaleliko." 
Ephesians2:3 Soke nje sakhe saphila phakathi kwazo ngesinye isikhathi, sanelisa iinkanuko zemvelo yethu yokonakala, salandela iinkanuko nemikhumbulwayo. Njengabo boke, ngokwemvelo besizizinto zokulahlwa." 
Ephesians2:4 Kodwana ngebanga lethando lakhe elikhulu, uZimu onothileko ngomusa," 
Ephesians2:5 wasenza saphila ngoKrestu nanyana besifile ngeemphambeko. Yeke kungomusa bona nibe ngabasindisiweko. 
Ephesians2:6 UZimu wasivusa naye bewasihlalisa kanye naye embusweni wezulu kuKrestu Jesu 
Ephesians2:7 ukuze kuthi eenkhathini ezizako akhombise umnono ongalinganisekiko womusa wakhe, obonakaliswe esiseni sakhe kithi ngoKrestu Jesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Nje-ke kungomusa kobana nibe ngabasindisiweko ngokukholwa begodu lokhu akuveli kini, kodwana kusisipho sakaZimu," 
Ephesians2:9 akuveli ngemisebenzi ukuze kungabikho ozozikhakhazisa. 
Ephesians2:10 Thina simsebenzi wezandla zakhe, kuKrestu Jesu kobana senze imisebenzi emihle uZimu asilungiselele yona ngaphambilini ukuze siphile kiyo." 
Ephesians2:11 Ngalokho khumbulani bona phambilini labo abazibiza bona “ngabasokako” (basitjho ukusoka okwenziwa emzimbeni ngezandla zomuntu) bebanibiza bona ningabatjhili ngokubelethwa. 
Ephesians2:12 Khumbulani bona ngesikhatheso beninganabudlelwano noKrestu, benininwa ekubeni zizakhamuzi zakwa-Israyeli, beningabalwa nesivumelwaneni sesithembiso. Beninganathemba begodu ninganaZimu ephasini." 
Ephesians2:13 Kodwana nina ebenikude noKrestu Jesu, senitjhideziwe ngeengazi zakhe." 
Ephesians2:14 Yena ngokwakhe ukuthula kwethu, iye, loyo owenza ababili baba munye, watjhabalalisa isiqabo okumthangala wobutha owahlukanisako," 
Ephesians2:15 ngokuphelisa enyamenakhe umthetho nemiyalo yawo kanye neemiso zawo. Umnqopho wakhe bekukubumba kuye umuntu oyedwa ngokuhlanganisa ababili, ngalokho enze ukuthula," 
Ephesians2:16 kuthi emzimbeni owodwa lowo enze ababili babuyisane noZimu esiphambanweni aphelisa ngaso ubutha. 
Ephesians2:17 Alo-ke, uKrestu weza watjhumayela ukuthula kini nina ebenikude nakilabo ebebaseduze," 
Ephesians2:18 ngombana ngaye, soke sikghona ukufikelela kuBaba ngoMoya munye." 
Ephesians2:19 Ngalokho-ke, anisesemiqhamuka namaphandle, kodwana nizizakhamuzi kanye nabantu bakaZimu begodu nimalunga womndeni kaZimu." 
Ephesians2:20 Nakhelwe phezu kwesisekelo sabapostoli nabaphorofidi ngoKrestu Jesu ngokwakhe, olilitje elisisekelo." 
Ephesians2:21 Kuye kuhlanganiswe umakhiwo woke, uphakame ube lithempeli elicwengileko kuSomnini." 
Ephesians2:22 Nani-ke, niyakhiwa ndawonye kuye kobana nibe yindlu lapha kuhlala khona uZimu ngoMoya wakhe." 
Ephesians3:1 Ngebangelo-ke, mina Powula engisibotjhwa sakaKrestu Jesu, esikhundleni senu nina abatjhili," 
Ephesians3:2 ngineqiniso bona nizwile ngokuphathwa komusa wakaZimu enganikelwa wona mayelana nani," 
Ephesians3:3 okutjho ifihlakalo engaziswa yona ngesambulo njengombana sengatlola kafitjhazana. 
Ephesians3:4 Nanifunda lokhu, ningalemuka umqondo wami mayelana nefihlakalo kaKrestu," 
Ephesians3:5 engazange yaziswe abantu eenzukulwaneni ezinye njengombana sele yambulwe nguMoya kubapostoli nabaphorofidi bakhe abacwengileko. 
Ephesians3:6 Ifihlakalo leyo kukobana abatjhili baziindlalifa kanye nathi, bamalunga womzimba munye begodu babahlanganyeli besithembiso kuKrestu Jesu ngebanga levangeli." 
Ephesians3:7 Mina ngenziwa inceku yevangeli leli ngokwesipho somusa kaZimu engawuphiwa ngokusebenza kwamandla wakhe. 
Ephesians3:8 Nanyana mina ngingomncancani kunabo boke abacwengileko, ngaphiwa umusa lo, kobana ngitjhumayele kabatjhili umnono kaKrestu ongaphenyekiko," 
Ephesians3:9 nokulemukisa boke abantu ukubona bonyana liyini ihlelo lefihlakalo ebeyifihlwe kwekadeni kuZimu owadala koke. 
Ephesians3:10 Ihloso yakhe bekukukobana gadesi, ngokusebenzisa ibandla, ukuhlakanipha kwakaZimu okubonakalisiweko kuvezwe ebabusini neemphathimandleni zombuso wezulwini," 
Ephesians3:11 ngokwehloso yakhe yanini nanini ayiphelelisa ngoKrestu Jesu iKosethu. 
Ephesians3:12 Kuye nangokukholwa kuye, singaya kuZimu ngokukhululeka nangesibindi." 
Ephesians3:13 Yeke ngiyanirabhela, ningapheli amandla ngalokho enginihluphekela ngakho, okulidumo lenu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ngesizathwesi ngiguqa phambi kwakaBaba," 
Ephesians3:15 imindeni yoke yezulwini nephasinapha ebizwa ngaye. 
Ephesians3:16 Inga ngomnono wephazimulwakhe anganiqinisa ngamandla ngoMoyakhe ongaphakathi kwenu," 
Ephesians3:17 ukuze uKrestu ahlale eenhliziyweni zenu ngokukholwa. Njengombana nidzimelele benasekeleka ethandweni lakaKrestu, ngithandazela bona" 
Ephesians3:18 nibe namandla kanye nabo boke abacwengileko, nilemuke ububanzi, ubude, ukuphakama nokutjhinga kwethando lakhe." 
Ephesians3:19 Godu nilazi ithando lakaKrestu elidlula ilwazi loke ukuze nizaliswe ngalo kufikela esilinganisweni sakho koke ukuphelela kwakaZimu. 
Ephesians3:20 Yeke loyo onamandla wokwenza okukhulu ngokungalinganisekiko ukudlula lokho esikukhombelako namkha esikucabangako, ukuya ngamandla wakhe asebenza ngaphakathi kwethu," 
Ephesians3:21 akube kuye idumo ebandleni nakuKrestu Jesu iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana! Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 Yeke, mina sibotjhwa ngebanga leKosi ngiyanincenga bonyana niphile ipilo efanelana nokubizwa kwenu," 
Ephesians4:2 ngokobana nizithobe ngokupheleleko, nibe mnene, ninyamezele benibekezelelane ngethando." 
Ephesians4:3 Yenzani ngakho koke okusemandlenenu ukulonda ubunye bakaMoya ngesibopho sokuthula. 
Ephesians4:4 Munye umzimba noMoya munye; njengombana nanibizwako nabizelwa ethembeni linye," 
Ephesians4:5 eKosini yinye, ekukholweni kunye nembhajadisweni munye," 
Ephesians4:6 kuZimu munye nonguYise wabo boke, ongaphezu kwakho koke begodu ngakho koke nakikho koke." 
Ephesians4:7 Kodwana soke siphiwe umusa ukuya ngokwesilinganiso sesipho sakaKrestu. 
Ephesians4:8 Yeke kungakho kuthiwa: “Lokha nenyukela ekuphakameni, wathumba abathunjiweko, wabela abantu izipho.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Alo-ke ukuthi: “Wenyuka” kutjho ukuthini ngaphandle kokobana wakhe wehlela phasi eengcenyeni eziphasi zephasi na? 
Ephesians4:10 Loyo owehlako, nguye kanye owenyukela ngaphezu kwawo woke amazulu ukuze azalise iphasi loke." 
Ephesians4:11 Nguye owabela abanye bona babe bapostoli, abanye babe baphorofidi, abanye babe bavangeli, abanye babe belusi kanye nabafundisi," 
Ephesians4:12 ukulungiselela abacwengileko imisebenzi yokulotjha ukuze kwakheke umzimba kaKrestu," 
Ephesians4:13 kufikela lapha soke siba munye khona ekukholweni nelwazini leNdodana kaZimu. Iye sikhule besifikelele ekuzuzeni isilinganiso soke sokuphelela kwakaKrestu. 
Ephesians4:14 Nje-ke asisesebantwana abawunawunwa mamaza, baphetjhulelwe le na le ngiyo yoke imimoya kanye nabantu abanobuqili ngamaqhingabo wekohliso." 
Ephesians4:15 Esikhundleni salokho, asikhulumeni iqiniso ngethando, ngakho koke sikhulele kiloyo oyihloko okunguKrestu" 
Ephesians4:16 nokuhlangana kuye umzimba woke, ubumbane ndawonye ngamalungu woke onikelwa wona lokha isitho ngasinye nasisebenza ngendlela efaneleko, kwakheke umzimba, udzimelele ethandweni." 
Ephesians4:17 Yeke nginitjela lokhu begodu ngifakaza eKosini bonyana ningasaphili njengabatjhili emikhumbulwenabo elilize lakolize. 
Ephesians4:18 Imikhumbulwabo isebumnyameni, bahlukaniswe nendlela yokuphila evela kuZimu ngokungayeleli kwabo ngebanga lobukhuni beenhliziyo zabo." 
Ephesians4:19 Nasele bangasenanhloni, bazineka emanyaleni ukuze benze koke ukusilaphala, baragela phambili ngokukhanuka okungaphezu kwalokho." 
Ephesians4:20 Kodwana nina azange nifunde uKrestu ngendlela enjalo," 
Ephesians4:21 ngombana sele nezwa ngaye benafundiswa ngaye ngokweqiniso elikuJesu. 
Ephesians4:22 Nafundiswa mayelana neendlela zenu zokuphila zaphambilini, kobana nilise imikhuba yenu yaphambilini eyonakaliswe ziinkanuko zayo zekohliso;" 
Ephesians4:23 kobana nenziwe butjha emikhubeni yemikhumbulwenu," 
Ephesians4:24 nembathe ubuntu obutjha obubunjwe bafuza uZimu, ekulungeni kweqiniso nangokucwengeka." 
Ephesians4:25 Yeke lisani amanga, ngiloyo naloyo akhulume iqiniso nomakhelwanakhe ngombana soke simalungu womzimba munye." 
Ephesians4:26 Thukuthelani, kodwana ningoni. Akungatjhingi ilanga nisathukuthele," 
Ephesians4:27 ningamnikeli ithuba uSathana. 
Ephesians4:28 Owebako akalise ukweba, kodwana akasebenze, enze okuhle ngezandla zakhe ukuze akwazi ukuba nelitho azalabela abaswelako." 
Ephesians4:29 Ningavumi bona ngemilonyeni yenu kuphume iinkulumo ezimbi ezilihlazo, kodwana nikhulume lokho okulisizo ekwakheni abanye ngokweendingo zabo ukuze kusizakale labo abalaleleko." 
Ephesians4:30 Ningamdabukisi uMoya oCwengileko kaZimu enabekwa ngaye itshwayo mayelana nelanga lokuhlengwa. 
Ephesians4:31 Akuphele koke: ubumunyu, itukuthelo, ilaka, ukubangelana itjhada, ukukhulumana kumbi, kanye nabo boke ubumbi." 
Ephesians4:32 Yibani mnene, nirhawukelane, nilibalelane njengombana noZimu anilibalela ngoKrestu." 
Ephesians5:1 Yeke yibani balingisi bakaZimu njengabantwana abathandekako," 
Ephesians5:2 niphile ipilo yethando njengombana uKrestu asithanda wabe wazinikela ngenca yethu, waba mnikelo onuka kamnandi kanye nomhlabelo kuZimu." 
Ephesians5:3 Kodwana phakathi kwenu akungabikho ukuziphatha kumbi ngokwamabhayi, nanyana kungaba ngiliphi ihlobo lokusilaphala namkha lomrhawu ngombana lokho akukalungeli abantu abacwengileko bakaZimu." 
Ephesians5:4 Akungabikho amanyala, iinkulumo zobudlhadlha namkha isikhathi samahlaya angayi ngandlela, kodwana kunalokho yibani nokuthokoza." 
Ephesians5:5 Ngambala qinisekani ngalokhu: Akunasifebe, umuntu osilapheleko namkha omarhamaru njengaloyo olotjha abosingazimu, ozakuba nesabelo elifeni lombuso kaKrestu noZimu." 
Ephesians5:6 Ningakhohliswa mumuntu ngamezwi angatjho ilitho ngombana ngebanga lezinto ezinjalo itukuthelo kaZimu yehlela labo abangalaleliko. 
Ephesians5:7 Nje-ke ningabi nobudlelwano nabo. 
Ephesians5:8 Nani nakhe naba bumnyama, kodwana gadesi sele nikukhanya eKosini. Philani njengabantwana bokukhanya" 
Ephesians5:9 ngombana isithelo sokukhanya sinabo boke ubuhle, ukulunga neqiniso" 
Ephesians5:10 bese nifunyane bona yini okuthokozisa iKosi. 
Ephesians5:11 Ningabi nandaba nezinto ezililize ezenziwa babantu, izinto ezisebumnyameni, kunalokho zivezeni ekukhanyeni izintwezo." 
Ephesians5:12 Kulihlazo ngitjho nokutjho bona abangalaleliko benzani ngemsitheleni. 
Ephesians5:13 Kodwana koke okuvezwa kukhanya kuba semtarini 
Ephesians5:14 ngombana kukhanya okwenza koke kubonakale. Kungalokho kuthiwa: “Phaphama wena oleleko, uvuke kabafileko, nje-ke uKrestu uzakukhanya kuwe!”" 
Ephesians5:15 Ngalokho-ke tjhejisisani bona niziphethe njani, ningabi ziindlhayela, kodwana nihlakaniphe" 
Ephesians5:16 ngokusebenzisa elinye nelinye ithuba ngombana imihla le esiphila kiyo mimbi. 
Ephesians5:17 Ningabi ziindlhayela, kodwana lemukani bona iyini intando kaZimu." 
Ephesians5:18 Ningadakwa liwayini ngombana lidosela ekukhohlakaleni. Esikhundleni salokho zaliswani ngoMoya oCwengileko. 
Ephesians5:19 Khulumisanani ngamarhubo, ngeenhlabelelo nangeengoma zakaMoya. Vumani benirhubele iKosi niyidumise ngeenhliziyo zenu," 
Ephesians5:20 nihlale njalo nithokoza uZimu uBaba ngakho koke, ebizweni leKosethu uKrestu Jesu." 
Ephesians5:21 Thobelanani ngokuhlonipha uKrestu. 
Ephesians5:22 Bafazi, thobelani amadoda wenu sengathi nithobela iKosi" 
Ephesians5:23 ngombana indoda iyihloko yomfazi, njengombana uKrestu ayihloko yebandla elimzimba wakhe begodu yena aMsindisi walo." 
Ephesians5:24 Njengombana ibandla limthobela uKrestu, ngokunjalo nabafazi kumele bathobele amadoda wabo kikho koke." 
Ephesians5:25 Madoda, thandani abafazi benu njengombana uKrestu athanda ibandla, wadela ukuphila kwakhe ngebanga lalo." 
Ephesians5:26 Walicwengisa, walihlanza ngamanzi nangelizwi lakhe" 
Ephesians5:27 begodu waliletha kuye lilibandla elinephazimulo, elinganachaphazi, ukutjhwabana namkha umphambo wananyana yini kodwana licwengile begodu limsulwa." 
Ephesians5:28 Ngokunjalo namadoda kufanele athande abafazi bawo njengombana athanda imizimba yawo. Othanda umkakhe uzithanda yena ngokwakhe. 
Ephesians5:29 Akakho owakhe wazonda umzimbakhe kodwana ngiloyo naloyo uyawondla awutlhogomele, njengombana noKrestu asenza ebandleni" 
Ephesians5:30 ngombana sizizitho zomzimbakhe. 
Ephesians5:31 “Ngalokho-ke indoda izokutjhiya uyise nonina inamathele kumkayo, nje-ke ababili labo babe nyamanye.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Yifihlakalo ekulu le, kodwana ngikhuluma ngoKrestu nebandla." 
Ephesians5:33 Nokho-ke omunye nomunye wenu kumele athande umkakhe njengombana azithanda yena, nomfazi kumele ahloniphe indodakhe." 
Ephesians6:1 Bantwana, thobelani ababelethi benu eKosini ngombana lokhu kulungile." 
Ephesians6:2 “Hlonipha uyihlo nonyoko.” Lo myalo wokuthoma onesithembiso," 
Ephesians6:3 esithi “ukuze kunikhambele kuhle nokobana nibe nepilo ede ephasinapha”. 
Ephesians6:4 Nani bobaba, ningabathukuthelisi abantwabenu, esikhundleni salokho bakhuliseni esifundisweni nemyalweni weKosi." 
Ephesians6:5 Makhoboka, thobelani abaphathi benu bephasini ngehlonipho, ngokwesaba nangobuqotho behliziyo, njengombana beningenza kuKrestu." 
Ephesians6:6 Ningakwenzi ngombana nifuna ukuthenga amehlwabo nabanibeke ilihlo, kodwana thembekani nanyana bangekho, njengamakhoboka kaKrestu, yenzani intando kaZimu ngeenhliziyo zenu ezipheleleko." 
Ephesians6:7 Yenzani umsebenzi wenu ngommoya omuhle kube ngathi anenzeli abantu kodwana nenzela iKosi," 
Ephesians6:8 njengombana nisazi bonyana iKosi izokuvuza omunye nomunye ngakho koke okuhle akwenzako, nanyana alikhoboka namkha atjhaphulukile." 
Ephesians6:9 Nani baphathi, phathani amakhoboka wenu ngayo yona leyondlela. Ningabasongeli njengombana nisazi bonyana yena loyo oMphathi wabo newenu usezulwini begodu akathengi amehlo wabantu." 
Ephesians6:10 Kokugcina, qinani eKosini nemandleni wayo amakhulu!" 
Ephesians6:11 Hlomani zoke iinhlabano zakaZimu ukuze nikghone ukulema nijamelane namaqhinga kaSathana," 
Ephesians6:12 ngombana asibindani nenyama neengazi, kodwana sibindana nababusi, iimphathimandla, imibuso yephasi elisemnyameneli kanye nemibutho yemimoya emimbi esemkayini." 
Ephesians6:13 Nje-ke hlomani zoke iinhlabano zakaZimu ukuze kuthi nakufika ilanga lobumbi, nikghone ukudzimelela ningatjhidi bekuthi nasele nenze koke, nibonakale nisajamile." 
Ephesians6:14 Dzimelelani-ke, nizibophe ngebhande leqiniso edinini, ukulunga kube sivikelo senu sesifuba," 
Ephesians6:15 iinyawo zenu zembathe ukulungela ukukhambisa ivangeli lokuthula. 
Ephesians6:16 Phezu kwakho koke lokhu, phakamisani ukukholwa kube sihlangu senu enikghona ukucima ngaso yoke imisubela evuthako yokhohlakeleko." 
Ephesians6:17 Yamukelani isindiso ibe sikupuru, ilizwi lakaZimu libe yisabula kaMoya." 
Ephesians6:18 Thandazani nikuMoya ngeenkhathi zoke ngayo yoke imihlobohlobo yemithandazo kanye neembawo. Nisakhumbule lokho, yelelani begodu ngeenkhathi zoke hlalani nithandazela boke abacwengileko." 
Ephesians6:19 Nami ningithandazele ukuze kuthi njalo nangivula umlomo, ngiphiwe amezwi wokobana ngitjhumayele ifihlakalo yevangeli ngesibindi," 
Ephesians6:20 engimzenda walo ngibotjhiwe. Thandazani bona ngilitjhumayele ngesibindi njengombana ngifanele. 
Ephesians6:21 UTirhikosi umfowethu othandekako nosisebenzi esithembekako seKosi, uzanitjela koke ukuze nani nazi bonyana ngivuke njani nokobana ngenzani." 
Ephesians6:22 Kungebangelo ngimthumela kinapho ukuze nazi bona sivuke njani begodu anikhuthaze. 
Ephesians6:23 Ukuthula akube kubazalwana nethando elinokukholwa okuvela kuZimu uBaba neKosini uJesu Krestu. 
Ephesians6:24 Akube mumusa kibo boke abathanda iKosethu uJesu Krestu ngalo loke ithando elingapheliko. 
Philippians1:1 UPowula noThimothi, iinceku zakaKrestu Jesu, kibo boke abacwengileko kuKrestu Jesu abaseFilipi, bakanye nabaphathi namagosa:" 
Philippians1:2 Akube kini umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba wethu neKosini uJesu Krestu. 
Philippians1:3 Ngihlala ngithokoza uZimu njalo nanginikhumbulako. 
Philippians1:4 Kiyo yoke imithandazwami, nginithandazela ngethabo," 
Philippians1:5 ngebanga lokuhlanganyela kwenu evangelini ukusuka ngelanga lokuthoma bekube gadesi. 
Philippians1:6 Ngineqiniso bona loyo owathoma umsebenzi omuhle phakathi kwenu, uzawuraga abe awuqedelele bekube lilanga lakaKrestu Jesu." 
Philippians1:7 Kuhle kimi ukuzizwela ngalendlela ngani noke ngombana nginithwele ehliziyweni yami! Iye ngombana nihlanganyele nami emseni kaZimu, ekubotjhweni kwami nekuvikeleni kanye nekuqiniseni ivangeli." 
Philippians1:8 UZimu ungufakazi wami bona nginihlulukela kangangani noke ngesirhawu sakaKrestu Jesu. 
Philippians1:9 Nginithandazela bona ithando lenu lihlale liphuphuma njalo, elwazini nelemukweni loke" 
Philippians1:10 ukuze nikwazi ukuhlolisisa okulungileko, nibe msulwa beningasoleki bekube lilanga lakaKrestu." 
Philippians1:11 Niveze iinthelo zokulunga eziza ngoJesu Krestu, kube yiphazimulo nedumo kuZimu." 
Philippians1:12 Ngithanda bona nazi bazalwana bonyana izinto ezenzekileko kimi eqinisweni zaba lisizo ekuthuthukiseleni phambili ivangeli. 
Philippians1:13 Ngalokho-ke, sele kwazeka kibo boke abalindi besigodlo nakiwo woke umuntu bonyana ngibotjhwe ngebanga lakaKrestu." 
Philippians1:14 Nje-ke inengi labazalwana sele linesibindi eKosini ngebanga lokubotjhwa kwami, sele batjhumayela ngesibindi nangaphandle kokwesaba." 
Philippians1:15 Iye, abanye batjhumayela uKrestu ngomona nangombango, kodwana abanye batjhumayela ngommoya omuhle." 
Philippians1:16 Laba besibili bakwenza ngethando, basazi bonyana ngibekwe lapha kobana ngivikele ivangeli." 
Philippians1:17 Kodwana laba bokuthoma batjhumayela uKrestu ngomrhobholo, ingasi ngokwethembeka, bahlose ukwengeza amatshwenyeko wami ekubotjhweni kwami."
