Philippians1:18 Alo, kutshwenya ngani nje lokho? Okuqakathekileko kukobana uKrestu utjhunyayelwa ngazo zoke iindlela nanyana ngeenhloso zamanga namkha ngeqiniso; mina ngiyathokoza ngalokho. Iye ngizokuragela phambili ngithokoze" 
Philippians1:19 ngombana ngiyazi bona ngemithandazo yenu nesizo elivela kuMoya kaJesu Krestu, lokhu kuzakuba kukhululeka kwami." 
Philippians1:20 Kuyitjisakalo yerhuluphelwami kanye nethemba lokobana angizukurhubutjhwa ngitjho nanyana kungaba ngayiphi indlela, kodwana ukukhuluma kwami ngesibindi, uKrestu uzakuphakanyiswa gadesi njengombana kunjalo ngemihla emzimbenami, nanyana kungaba ngokuphila namkha ngokufa." 
Philippians1:21 Ngambala, kimi ukuphila nguKrestu, ukufa yinzuzo." 
Philippians1:22 Nakube ngimele ngiphile emzimbeni, lokho kutjho bona kuzakuba msebenzi oneenthelo kimi, nje-ke angazi bona ngikuphi engikwenyulako." 
Philippians1:23 Ngiphakathi kokubili: Isifiso sami kukobana ngemuke ngiyokuba noKrestu ngombana lokho kungcono khulu. 
Philippians1:24 Kodwana ukuphila emzimbeni kuqakatheke khulu ngebanga lenu. 
Philippians1:25 Njengombana ngineqiniso ngalokhu nje, ngiyazi bonyana ngizakuhlala ngingakhambi ngiragele phambili nani noke ngebanga lokuragela phambili kanye nethabo lenu ekukholweni." 
Philippians1:26 Ngalokho ngizazibandakanya ngokungapheliko ekuzikhakhaziseni kwenu kuKrestu Jesu lokha nangiza kini godu. 
Philippians1:27 Kwaphela philani ngendlela efanele ivangeli lakaKrestu ukuze kuthi nanyana ngiyabuya ngizonibona namkha ngingekho phakathi kwenu, nangizwa ngani, ngizakwazi bonyana nijamile begodu nidzimelele nimunye, nilwela ukukholwa kwevangeli nibambisene ngomkhumbulo owodwa." 
Philippians1:28 Yeke ningethuswa ngabajamelene nani ngombana kibo, lokho kusibonakaliso sokubhubha kwabo. Kodwana kini kukusindiswa kwenu. Lokhu kusisenzo sakaZimu." 
Philippians1:29 Yena uniphe ithuba ingasi lokulotjha uKrestu kwaphela kodwana nelokuhlupheka ngebanga lakhe," 
Philippians1:30 njengombana ninomtjhikatjhika ofana nalowo enangibona ngiphakathi kwawo, nagadesi nizwa bonyana ngisesenawo." 
Philippians2:1 Yeke nakube kukhona ukukhuthazeka kuKrestu, nakukhona ukududuzwa okuvela ethandweni, kukhona nehlanganyelo kaMoya godu kukhona umusa nezwelo," 
Philippians2:2 khona-ke phelelisani ithabo lami ngokuba nomkhumbulo owodwa, nibe nethando elilodwa, ngokuba mmoya munye begodu nibe hliziyonye." 
Philippians2:3 Ningenzi ilitho ngehliziyo ede namkha ngokuzitjhaya kodwana ngokuzithoba, nithathe abanye bona bangcono kunani." 
Philippians2:4 Ngiloyo naloyo angazitjheji yena kwaphela kodwana akatjheje neemfuno zabanye. 
Philippians2:5 Yibani nomkhumbulo onjengalowo ebegade ukuKrestu Jesu," 
Philippians2:6 owathi nanyana gade anejamo lakaZimu, azange azilinganise noZimu njengento yokuphangwa." 
Philippians2:7 Kodwana wazehlisa, wathatha ijamo lekhoboka, wabelethwa njengomuntu. Wafunyaneka anejamo lomuntu." 
Philippians2:8 Wazithoba, walalela bekwaba sekufeni, ngitjho ukufa esiphambanweni." 
Philippians2:9 Ngalokho uZimu wamphakamisa, wamnikela ibizo elingaphezu kwamabizo woke," 
Philippians2:10 ukuze kuthi ebizweni lakaJesu, woke amadolo aguqe, walabo abasezulwini, abasephasini nabangaphasi kwephasi," 
Philippians2:11 namalimi woke avume bona uJesu Krestu uyiKosi, kube lidumo lakaZimu uBaba." 
Philippians2:12 Ngalokho-ke bathandekako, njengombana beniseze ningilalela njalo, ingasi kwaphela nangikhona, kodwana khulukhulu nangingekho, yenzani isindiswenu ibe yipumelelo ngokwesaba nangokuthuthumela" 
Philippians2:13 ngombana nguZimu osebenza ngaphakathi kwenu, owenza bona nikghone begodu nisebenze ngokwentando yakhe." 
Philippians2:14 Yenzani koke ngaphandle kokurhonona nokuphikisana," 
Philippians2:15 ukuze ningasoleki begodu nibe msulwa, nibe bantwana bakaZimu abanganabala hlangana nesizukulwana esiphambeneko nesikhohlakeleko, eniphazima hlangana naso njengeenkwekwezi ephasini." 
Philippians2:16 Kungebanga lokukakarela kwenu elizwini lokuphila ukobana ngizikhakhazise ngelanga lakaKrestu ngokuthi ukugijima namkha ukujuluka kwami azange kube lilize. 
Philippians2:17 Kodwana nanyana ngingathululwa njengomnikelo wokuselwako phezu komhlabelo kanye nomnikelo wokukholwa kwenu, ngithokoza bengithabe nani noke," 
Philippians2:18 ngokunjalo nani kumele nithokoze benithabe kanye nami. 
Philippians2:19 Nginethemba eKosini uJesu bonyana ngizakuthumela uThimothi msinyana kini ukuze nami ngithokoziswe ziindaba ezivela kini. 
Philippians2:20 Anginaye omunye onjengaye onetjisakalo engazenzisiko ngepilo yenu. 
Philippians2:21 Boke abanye bazifunela kwabo, abanandaba nokufunwa nguJesu Krestu." 
Philippians2:22 Kodwana niyazi bona uThimothi uzibonakalise kangangani ngombana usebenze nami emsebenzini wevangeli njengendodana nayisebenza noyise. 
Philippians2:23 Ngalokho-ke ngitjhisekela ukumthumela msinyazana nasele ngibonile bonyana iindaba zami zijame njani. 
Philippians2:24 Nginethemba eKosini bona nami ngokwami ngizakuza msinyana kini. 
Philippians2:25 Kodwana ngibone kuqakathekile bona ngithumele kini u-Ephafrodithu umfowethu osisebenzi nolibutho kanye nami, godu nosithunywa senu enamthumela bona azokutjheja iindingo zami." 
Philippians2:26 Bekatjhisekela ukuzonibona noke, kodwana wakhathazeka ngombana besele nizwile bona bekagula." 
Philippians2:27 Ngambala bekagula kangangobana wapheze wahlongakala. Kodwana uZimu wamrhawukela begodu ingasi yena yedwa kodwana nami ukuze ngingabi nesizi phezu kwesizi. 
Philippians2:28 Ngalokho ngizimisele khulu ukumthumela kini ukuze kuthi nanimbonako godu, nithabe, kunciphe isizi lami." 
Philippians2:29 Yeke mamukeleni kuKrestu ngethabo loke, abanjalo nibaphathe ngehlonipho" 
Philippians2:30 ngombana upheze wahlongakala ngebanga lokusebenzela uKrestu, wabeka ipilwakhe engozini ukuze ajamele imisebenzi eningazange nifikelele ukungenzela yona." 
Philippians3:1 Kokugcina bazalwana, thabani eKosini. Ukubuyelela ukunitlolela ebenginitlolele khona phambilini akungikhathazi, kodwana kukulondeka kini." 
Philippians3:2 Yelelani izinja, niyelele iinsebenzi ezimbi, yelelani labo ababacwiyi." 
Philippians3:3 Ngithi esisokileko, iye, thina esilotjha ngoMoya kaZimu. Sizikhakhazisa ngoKrestu Jesu, asinathemba enyameni," 
Philippians3:4 nanyana nami nginazo iinzathu zokuba nethemba enyameni. Nakube kukhona odlumbana bona uneenzathu zokwethembela enyameni, zami-ke zingaphezulu." 
Philippians3:5 Ngasokwa elangeni lobunane, ngililunga lesizwe sakwa-Israyeli, ekorweni yakwaBhenjamini, ngimHebheru obelethwe maHebheru; ngehlangothini lomthetho khona ngimFarisi." 
Philippians3:6 Ngokokutjhisekela, ngingowazumana nebandla, nakukulungisiswa ngokomthetho, ngimsulwa." 
Philippians3:7 Kodwana koke ebengikubala njengenzuzo, namhlanjesi sengikuthatha njengokulahlekelwa ngebanga lakaKrestu." 
Philippians3:8 Ngaphezu kwalapho, ngithatha koke njengokulahlekelwa ngebanga lokuqakatheka okukhulu kokwazana noKrestu Jesu iKosami. Ngebanga lakhe ngilahlekelwe ngikho koke, yeke koke lokho ngikuthatha njengeenzibi ukuze ngizuze uKrestu," 
Philippians3:9 ngifunyanwe ngimunye naye. Angisenakho ukulunga okungekwami okuvela emthethweni kodwana okuvela ngokukholwa kuKrestu, okukulunga okuvela kuZimu nokudzimelele ekukholweni." 
Philippians3:10 Ngifuna ukwazi uKrestu namandla wokuvuka kwakhe ekufeni kanye nokuhlanganyela ekuhluphekeni kwakhe ngokuba njengaye ekufeni kwakhe," 
Philippians3:11 nakube ngingahle ngifikelele ekuvusweni kwabafileko. 
Philippians3:12 Ingasi bona sele ngikufumene lokho namkha sele ngifikile emnqopheni, kodwana ngihlabela phambili kobana ngikwenze kube ngekwami ngombana uKrestu Jesu ungenze ngaba ngewakhe." 
Philippians3:13 Bazalwana angitjho bona sengikuzuzile lokho, kodwana yinye into engiyenzako: Ngikhohlwa okungemva kwami, ngihlabele phambili ngamandla kokuphambili kwami." 
Philippians3:14 Yeke ngihlabela phambili nginqophe esiphethweni kobana ngizuze umvuzo wokubizwa kwezulwini okungekwakaZimu ngoKrestu Jesu. 
Philippians3:15 Akuthi soke-ke thina esesikhulile eKosini sibe nomkhumbulo onjalo. Yeke nakube nicabanga ngokwahlukileko ngananyana yini, nalokho uZimu uzanambululela khona." 
Philippians3:16 Kwaphela asibambeleleni kilokho esele sinakho. 
Philippians3:17 Bazalwana, hlanganyelani nabanye ekulandeleni isibonelo sami, niqale labo abaphila ngokwesibonelo esanibonisa sona." 
Philippians3:18 Abanengi njengombana ngakhe nganitjela ngabo phambilini, nanje engisanitjela ngabo ngeenyembezi, baphila njengezitha zesiphambano sakaKrestu." 
Philippians3:19 Isiphetho sabo kubhujiswa; uzimabo sisisu nedumo labo lisemanyalenabo, imikhumbulwabo inamathele ezintweni zephasi." 
Philippians3:20 Kodwana thina ikhaya lethu lisezulwini, lapha silindele khona uMsindisi, iKosi uJesu Krestu." 
Philippians3:21 Uzakutjhugulula imizimba yethu ethobekileko ukuze ifane nomzimba wephazimulwakhe ngamandla amenza akghone ukwenza koke bona kube ngaphasi kwelawulo lakhe. 
Philippians4:1 Nje-ke, bazalwana abathandekako nengibahlulukeleko, nina enikuthaba kwami kanye nesihlohlo sami, kakarelani eKosini ngayo indlela leyo, bathandekako." 
Philippians4:2 Ngiyala u-Eyodiya noSuntirhe bona babe nomkhumbulo munye eKosini. 
Philippians4:3 Iye, nawe ngiyakukhombela mnganami bona usize abomma laba ngombana batjhikatjhika nami emsebenzini wevangeli, bakanye noKlemente nabo boke abasebenzisana nami, labo amabizwabo angencwadini yokuphila." 
Philippians4:4 Thabani njalo eKosini, ngiyabuyelela godu ngithi: Thabani!" 
Philippians4:5 Ukuthobeka kwenu akwaziwe babantu boke. IKosi sele iseduze. 
Philippians4:6 Ningakhathazeki ngalitho kodwana kikho koke, iimbawo zenu azaziwe nguZimu ngomthandazo nangokuncenga okunokuthokoza." 
Philippians4:7 Ukuthula kwakaZimu okudlula koke ukuzwisisa, kuzakubulunga iinhliziyo zenu nemikhumbulwenu kuKrestu Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Kokugcina bazalwana nanyana yini eliqiniso, ehloniphekako, elungileko, emsulwa, ethokozisako, eyazisako, iye, nakukhona ubuhle begodu nakukhona nanyana yini efanele idunyiswe, zindlani ngayo." 
Philippians4:9 Ragelani phambili nokwenza enakufunda, nakwamukela, nakuzwa benakubona ngikwenza, yeke uZimu wokuthula uzakuba nani." 
Philippians4:10 Kulithabo elikhulu kimi eKosini bona ekugcineni nibe nethuba lokuvuselela ukungitjheja kwenu. Beniseze ningitjheja, kodwana beninganathuba lokukubonisa lokho." 
Philippians4:11 Angikhulumi ngebanga lokuswela, kodwana ngikhuluma ngombana ngifundile ukwaneliswa ngalokho enginakho." 
Philippians4:12 Ngiyazi bona kunjani ukungabi nokwaneleko, godu ngiyazi bona kunjani ukuba nakho koke. Kikho koke nakibo boke ubujamo ngafunda ifihlakalo yokwaneliswa nanyana ngisutha namkha ngilamba." 
Philippians4:13 Ngikghona ukwenza yoke into ngaloyo ongiqinisako. 
Philippians4:14 Nokho kwaba kuhle kini kobana nihlanganyele eenhluphekweni zami. 
Philippians4:15 Khulukhulu nina eniseFilipi, niyazi bona emihleni yokuthoma kwevangeli, nangisuka eMasedoniya, akunabandla elahlanganyela nami endabeni yokupha nokwamukela ngaphandle kwenu kwaphela." 
Philippians4:16 Ngitjho nalokha nabengiseThesalonika, nangithumelela isizo elimalungana neendingo zami bekwaba kanengana." 
Philippians4:17 Akusi kukobanyana ngifuna isipho, kodwana ngifuna inzuzo ebalelwa ngakini." 
Philippians4:18 Ngifumene yoke ikokhelo bekwaba ngaphezulu; nganeliseke ngokupheleleko njengombana ngamukele izipho eningithumele zona ngo-Epafrodithu, umnikelo wephunga elimnandi, okumhlabelo owamukelekako nothokozisa uZimu." 
Philippians4:19 Yeke uZimami uzakwanelisa esinye nesinye isidingo senu ngokomnono wakhe ephazimulweni ekuKrestu Jesu. 
Philippians4:20 KuZimethu nonguBaba, akube nedumo loke ngokungapheliko! Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Lotjhisani boke abacwengileko abakuKrestu Jesu. Abazalwana abanami lapha bayanilotjhisa. 
Philippians4:22 Boke abacwengileko bayanilotjhisa, khulukhulu labo bekumba kaKhesari." 
Philippians4:23 Sengathi umusa weKosethu uJesu Krestu ungaba nani. 
Colossians1:1 UPowula ompostoli kaJesu Krestu ngokwentando kaZimu, noThimothi umfowethu," 
Colossians1:2 kibo abazalwana abacwengileko nabathembekileko kuKrestu abaseKolose: Sengathi ningaba nomusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba wethu. 
Colossians1:3 Sihlala simthokoza njalo uZimu, uYise weKosethu uJesu Krestu, nasinithandazelako," 
Colossians1:4 ngombana sizwile ngokukholwa kwenu kuKrestu Jesu, nangethando eninalo kibo boke abacwengileko," 
Colossians1:5 ngebanga lethemba enibekelwe lona ezulwini. Senikhe nezwa ngalelithemba ngaphambilini elizwini leqiniso, okutjho ivangeli," 
Colossians1:6 iye, lona lelo esele lifikile kini. Njengombana lithela iinthelo begodu landa nephasi loke, ngokunjalo lithela iinthelo naphakathi kwenu soloko kwamhla nalizwako nabe nazi nomusa kaZimu ngeqiniso." 
Colossians1:7 Lokhu nakufunda ku-Ephafrasi othandekako noyinceku kanye nathi. Usisebenzi sakaKrestu esithembekileko ngebanga lenu 
Colossians1:8 begodu nguye osazise ngethando eninalo ngoMoya. 
Colossians1:9 Ngalokho-ke nathi solo kwamhlana sizwa ngalo, azange silise ukunithandazela, sinibawela bona nizaliswe ngelwazi lentando kaZimu kikho koke ukuhlakanipha kanye nelemuko elivela kuMoya." 
Colossians1:10 Siyanithandazela bona niphile ipilo efanele iKosi, beniyithabise ngakho koke, nithele iinthelo kiwo woke umsebenzi omuhle, nikhule nekumazini uZimu," 
Colossians1:11 niqiniswe ngawo woke amandla emandlenakhe amakhulu ukuze nibe nokudzimelela okukhulu kanye nokubekezela. Ngethabo 
Colossians1:12 nithokoze uBaba owanenza bona nifanelwe sisabelo elifeni labacwengileko embusweni wokukhanya. 
Colossians1:13 Wasikhupha emandleni wobumnyama, wasibeka embusweni weNdodanakhe ethandekako," 
Colossians1:14 esinokuhlengwa nokulitjalelwa kwezono zethu kiyo. 
Colossians1:15 UKrestu umfanekiso wakaZimu ongabonakaliko, ulizibulo lakho koke okubunjiweko" 
Colossians1:16 ngombana koke kwabunjwa ngaye: okusezulwini nephasinapha, okubonakalako nokungabonakaliko, kungaba mibuso namkha ubukhosi namkha ababusi neemphathimandla. Koke kwabunjwa ngaye, kwabunjelwa yena." 
Colossians1:17 Yena ngokwakhe waba khona koke kungakabikhona begodu koke kudzimelele ngaye. 
Colossians1:18 Uyihloko yomzimba, okulibandla; usithomo, izibulo labavuswa ekufeni, ukuze abe ngewokuthoma kikho koke." 
Colossians1:19 Yeke kwamthabisa uZimu bona ubuyena obupheleleko bakhe buhlale ngaphakathi kwakhe 
Colossians1:20 ukuze kuthi ngaye abuyisele koke kuye nanyana kungaba ngokusephasini namkha okusezulwini, ngokwenza ukuthula ngeengazi zakhe ezathululwa esiphambanweni." 
Colossians1:21 Nani ebegade nikude noZimu, nimanaba emikhumbulweni yenu ngebanga lezinto ezimbi ebenizenza," 
Colossians1:22 nokho sele abuyisene nani ngomzimba kaKrestu wenyama, ngokufa kwakhe ukuze aniveze nicwengile, nimsulwa begodu ningasoleki phambi kwakhe." 
Colossians1:23 Lokho kwenzeka kwaphela nakube nani nihlala nidzimelele benikakarele esisekelweni sokukholwa, ngaphandle kokutjhida ethembeni elathenjiswa livangeli enalizwako nelatjhunyayelwa kikho koke okudaliweko ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, mina Powula engaba sisebenzi salo." 
Colossians1:24 Nje-ke ngiyathaba ekuhluphekeni kwami ngenca yenu, begodu emzimbenami ngiphelelisa lokho okutlhayeleko ekuhluphekeni kwakaKrestu ngebanga lomzimbakhe, okutjho ibandla." 
Colossians1:25 Ngenziwe isikhonzi salo ngokomsebenzi kaZimu enganikelwa wona ngani, ukuzwakalisa ilizwi lakaZimu ngokupheleleko," 
Colossians1:26 ekuyifihlakalo ebeyifihliwe kiso soke isikhathi sekadeni kanye neenzukulwaneni, kodwana gadesi sele yambulelwe abacwengileko bakhe." 
Colossians1:27 UZimu waqunta bona kwazeke kibo bonyana umnono wephazimulo yefihlakalwakhe le mkhulu kangangani hlangana nabatjhili; ifihlakalo leyo inguKrestu okini nolithemba lephazimulo. 
Colossians1:28 Nje-ke nguye esimtjhumayelako, siyelelise woke umuntu besibafundise koke ukuhlakanipha kwakhe ukuze silethe woke umuntu aphelele kuKrestu." 
Colossians1:29 Iye, ngikho lokhu engikusebenzelako, ngitjhabatjheka ngawo woke umfutho awuvusa ngamandla ngaphakathi kwami." 
Colossians2:1 Ngithanda nazi bonyana ngirubaruba kangangani ngani nangalabo abaseLawodikeya, boke abanengi esingazange khesibonane nabo ubuso nobuso." 
Colossians2:2 Lokhu ngikwenzela bona iinhliziyo zabo zikhuthazeke, bahlanganiswe ethandweni ukuze babe nawo woke umnono wokuzwisisa okuqinisiweko godu babe nelwazi lefihlakalo kaZimu, okutjho uKrestu" 
Colossians2:3 okufunyaneka kuye woke amagugu afihliweko wokuhlakanipha nelwazi. 
Colossians2:4 Nginitjela lokhu ukuze kungabikhona ozanikhohlisa ngeempikiswano eziyengako," 
Colossians2:5 ngombana nanyana ngingekho kini siqu sami, kodwana nginani ngommoya. Begodu ngithabela ukubona ukuhleleka kwenu nokudzimelela kokukholwa kwenu kuKrestu." 
Colossians2:6 Njengombana senamukela uKrestu Jesu iKosi, ragelani phambili ngokuphila nikuye," 
Colossians2:7 nidzimelele benakhiwe kuye, niqinile ekukholweni njengombana nafundiswa, nivame ukuthokoza." 
Colossians2:8 Yelelani-ke bona kungabikhona namunye onithumba ngobuhlakani nangekohliso elilize, ngokwefundiso yabantu esekeleke phezu kwemimoya yephasi, ingasi kuKrestu," 
Colossians2:9 ekuhlala kuye emzimbenakhe koke ukuphelela kwakaZimu. 
Colossians2:10 Ngalokho-ke nani seniphelelisiwe kuye oyihloko yemibuso neyamandla woke. 
Colossians2:11 Kuye godu nasokwa ngokusokwa kwakaMoya, ngokuhlubula imvelo yokona, ingasi ngokusoka okwenziwa ngezandla zomuntu kodwana ngokusoka okwenziwa nguKrestu." 
Colossians2:12 Njengombana nabulungwa naye ngombhabhadiso, khona-ke navuswa kanye naye ngokukholwa emandleni kaZimu, owamvusa ekufeni." 
Colossians2:13 Nani-ke ebegade nifile ngokona kwenu nangokungasoki enyameni yenu, uZimu wanenza abaphilako kanye naye lokha nakasithethelela kizo zoke iimphambeko zethu." 
Colossians2:14 Wasula okutloliweko kanye nemiyalo yakhona ebegade ilwisana nathi begodu ijamelene nathi, wakususa lokho, wakubethela esiphambanweni." 
Colossians2:15 Wamuka ababusi neemphathimandla iinhlabano zabo wabenza ihlaya etjhatjhalazini, wabahlula esiphambanweni." 
Colossians2:16 Nje-ke akungabi namunye onilahla ngokudla nanyana ngokusela, namkha ngeminyanya, ukuthwasa kwenyanga namkha ngamaSabatha." 
Colossians2:17 Lokho kusithunzi nje salokho okuzako, kodwana okungikho kungekwakaKrestu." 
Colossians2:18 Akungabikhona umuntu onitjhaphisako, othanda ukuzenza othobileko khisibe ulotjha iingilozi abe akakarele emibonweni, azikhukhumeze ngelize emikhumbulwenakhe yenyama." 
Colossians2:19 Onjalo sele alahlekelwe ngiloyo oyihloko, lapha umzimba woke usekeleke khona begodu uhlanganiswe malungu nemisipha, ukhule ngokukhula okuvela kuZimu." 
Colossians2:20 Njengombana nafa kanye noKrestu benakhululwa eemfundisweni zemimoya yephaseli, kubangelwa yini-ke bona niziphathe njengabantu bephaseli na? Kubayini nithobele imiyalo ethi," 
Colossians2:21 “Ungakuphathi lokhu! Unganandiphi lokhu! Ungakunamathi lokhuya!” na? 
Colossians2:22 Yoke imiyalo le itjho izinto ezibhubhako, kumithetho neemfundiso zabantu nje kwaphela." 
Colossians2:23 Iye, ibonakala inesifaniso sokuhlakanipha ekukhuthazeni ukulunga nokuzithoba kokuzenzisa, okulungele umzimba nje kwaphela kodwana kube kungasizi ngalitho ekuzithibeni eenkanukweni zenyama yabo." 
Colossians3:1 Nakube navuswa noKrestu, khona-ke funani izinto zaphezulu, lapho uKrestu ahlezi khona ngesigomeni sakaZimu." 
Colossians3:2 Bekani imikhumbulwenu ezintweni zezulwini, ningatjheji zephasi" 
Colossians3:3 ngombana nafa, nje-ke ipilwenu ifihliwe kuKrestu okuZimu." 
Colossians3:4 Lokha uKrestu okuphila kwenu nakabonakaliswako, nani nizokubonakaliswa kanye naye ephazimulweni." 
Colossians3:5 Nje-ke bulalani koke okukini okungekwemvelo yephasini: ubudzewuri, ukusilaphala, ikanuko, iimfiso ezimbi nobumarhamaru, okukulotjha abosingazimu." 
Colossians3:6 Ngebanga lakho koke lokhu itukuthelo kaZimu izokwehlela kilabo abangalaleliko. 
Colossians3:7 Lezo ziindlela nani ebegade nizilandela lokha nanisaphila ipilo enjalo. 
Colossians3:8 Kodwana kwanjesi kufanele nilahle zoke izinto ezinjalo: itukuthelo, ilaka, izondo, ukuhlambalaza nokukhuluma amahlazo." 
Colossians3:9 Ningaleyelani amanga, njengombana sele nihlubule ubunina obudala nemikhuba yabo nje," 
Colossians3:10 begodu senembethe ubunina obutjha, obuvuselelwe elwazini ngokomfuziselo wombumbi wabo." 
Colossians3:11 Ekuvuselelweni lokho, akusekho umGirigi nomJuda, osokiweko nongakasokwa, otjhili, umSkithi, amakhoboka nabatjhaphulukileko." 
Colossians3:12 Yeke njengabakhethiweko bakaZimu, abacwengileko nabathandekako, yembathani isirhawu, ukulunga, ukuthobeka, ubumnene nokubekezela." 
Colossians3:13 Bekezelelanani nakube omunye uneensolo ngomunye; libalelanani njengombana neKosi yanilibalela, iye nani kumele nilibalele." 
Colossians3:14 Ngaphezu kwakho koke lokhu, zembathiseni ngethando lona elibopha koke ndawonye kuzwane." 
Colossians3:15 Ukuthula kwakaKrestu akubuse eenhliziyweni zenu, iye lokho enabizelwa kikho emzimbeni munye. Begodu yibani nokuthokoza." 
Colossians3:16 Ilizwi lakaKrestu alihlale ngaphakathi kwenu ngokupheleleko; fundisanani beniyalane ngakho koke ukuhlakanipha; vumelani uZimu amarhubo, iingoma kanye nomvumo wokukholwa ngokuthokoza eenhliziyweni zenu." 
Colossians3:17 Koke enikwenzako, kungaba ngelizwi namkha ngezenzo, kwenzeni koke ebizweni leKosi uJesu, ngayo nithokoze uZimu uBaba." 
Colossians3:18 Bafazi, thobelani amadoda wenu ngombana kuyifanelo yenu eKosini." 
Colossians3:19 Madoda, thandani abafazi benu, ningabakhahlamezi." 
Colossians3:20 Bantwana, lalelani ababelethi benu kikho koke ngombana lokho kuyayithokozisa iKosi." 
Colossians3:21 Bobaba, ningabathukuthelisi abantwana benu, khona bangazukudana." 
Colossians3:22 Makhoboka, thobelani abaphathi benu bephasinapha kikho koke, kungabi kwaphela nabanibeke ilihlo ngombana nifuna ukubathabisa, kodwana akube ngokuthembeka ngehliziyo yoke, nesabe iKosi." 
Colossians3:23 Koke enikwenzako, kwenzeni ngehliziyo epheleleko kube ngathi nikwenzela iKosi ingasi abantu," 
Colossians3:24 njengombana nisazi bonyana eKosini nizakwamukeliswa ilifa njengomvuzo wenu. Khumbulani bona nilotjha iKosi. 
Colossians3:25 Ngambala loyo owenza okungakalungi, uzakwamukeliswa nanyana yini engakalungi ayenzileko begodu akukho ukukhetha ubuso." 
Colossians4:1 Baphathi, phathani amakhoboka wenu ngokulunga nangefanelo ngombana niyazi bonyana nani ninomphathi ezulwini." 
Colossians4:2 Zinikeleni ngokupheleleko emthandazweni, nilinde kiwo ngokuthokoza." 
Colossians4:3 Sithandazelani nathi kobana uZimu asivulele ithuba lokutjhumayela ukuze sizwakalise ifihlakalo kaKrestu, engingesikhungweni ngebanga layo." 
Colossians4:4 Thandazani bona ngiyibonakalise kuhle njengombana ngifanele. 
Colossians4:5 Ziphatheni ngokuhlakanipha ebantwini abatjhili, nisebenzise kuhle loke ithuba eninalo." 
Colossians4:6 Ikulumo yenu ayibe nomusa njalo, inungwe ngetswayi ukuze nazi bona niphendule njani woke umuntu." 
Colossians4:7 UTirhikosi uzanitjela zoke iindaba ngami, ungumfowethu othandekako, isikhonzi esithembekileko nenceku kanye nami eKosini." 
Colossians4:8 Kungebangelo ngimthumela kini ukuze nazi bona siphile njani nokobana akhuthaze iinhliziyo zenu. 
Colossians4:9 Uzabe akhambisana no-Onesimusi, umfowethu othembekileko nothandekako, ongomunye wenu. Bazanitjela ngakho koke okwenzekako lapha." 
Colossians4:10 U-Aristarirhusi osibotjhwa kanye nami uthe nginivuse, iye yena noMarkosi umzawakhe kaBharinabhasi enayalwa ngaye bona nafikako nimamukele." 
Colossians4:10 U-Aristarirhusi osibotjhwa kanye nami uthe nginivuse, iye yena noMarkosi umzawakhe kaBharinabhasi enayalwa ngaye bona nafikako nimamukele." 
Colossians4:11 UJesu okuthiwa nguJustosi naye uthe nginivuse. Laba-ke ngibo bodwa abangebokusoka hlangana nabasebenza kanye nami embusweni kaZimu, begodu bayinduduzo kimi njalo." 
Colossians4:12 No-Ephafrasi ongomunye wenu noyinceku kaJesu Krestu uthe nginivuse. Njalo emthandazwenakhe uhlala anilwela ukuze niqine nidzimelele begodu niqinisekisiwe kikho koke okusentandweni kaZimu. 
Colossians4:13 Nami ngiyamfakazela bona unisebenzele nzima kanye nalabo abaseLawodikeya kanye nabaseHerapholisi. 
Colossians4:14 ULukasi, udorhodera othandekako, noDemasi bayanilotjhisa." 
Colossians4:15 Yeningilotjhisele kubazalwana abaseLawodikeya nakuNimfasi kanye nebandla elihlanganela kwakhe. 
Colossians4:16 Nasele incwadi le ifundiwe phakathi kwenu, idluliseleni nebandleni lamaLawodikeya kobana ifundwe nakhona, nani qinisekisani bona niyayifunda evela eLawodikiya." 
Colossians4:17 Yithini ku-Arirhipusi: “Qinisekisa bona uqeda umsebenzi owawamukela eKosini.” 
Colossians4:18 Mina Powula ngitlola isilayeliso lesi ngesandla sami. Khumbulani iinketani zami. Sengathi umusa wakaZimu ungaba nani. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Mina Powula, uSilasi noThimothi; kiwo amaThesalonika alibandla lakaZimu, uBaba wethu, neKosethu uJesu Krestu: Akube kini umusa nokuthula." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Sihlala simthokoza njalo uZimu ngani noke; siyanikhumbula nemithandazweni yethu. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Sikhumbula njalo phambi koZimethu nonguBaba, umsebenzenu weenthelo zokukholwa, ukutjhabatjheka kwenu okuvezwa lithando kanye nokubekezela kwenu ngebanga lethemba eninalo eKosinethu uJesu Krestu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Siyazi bazalwana abathandwa nguZimu bona unikhethile 
1Thessalonians1:5 ngombana ivangeli lethu leza kini ingasi ngamezwi nje kwaphela kodwana ngamandla kaMoya oCwengileko nangokukholwa okukhulu. Niyazi bona besiphila njani phakathi kwenu ngebanga lenu. 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nani naba balingisi bethu nebeKosi; phezu kobana beniqalene neenhlupheko ezikulu, namukela ilizwi ngethabo enalinikelwa nguMoya oCwengileko." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Ngaleyondlela nibe sibonelo kiwo woke amakholwa eMasedoniya ne-Arhaya 
1Thessalonians1:8 ngombana ukuzwakala kwelizwi kwavela kini, ingasi eMasedoniya ne-Arhaya kwaphela. Ukukholwa kwenu kuZimu sekwazeka yoke indawo, yeke akusatlhogeki bona sitjho ilitho ngakho" 
1Thessalonians1:9 ngombana bona ngokwabo ngibo abasibikelako bona nasamukela njani. Bayafakaza ngendlela enatjhugulukela ngayo kuZimu, nafulathela ukulotjha abozinyana kobana nilotjhe uZimu weqiniso nophilako." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Noke nihlala nilindele ukubuya kweNdodana yakhe ezulwini, ayivusa kabafileko, iNdodana leyo nguJesu osisindisa elakeni elizako." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Bazalwana, niyazi nani ngokwenu bona ukunithekela kwethu akhange kube lilize." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Phambilini sahlutjhwa begodu sathukwa khulu eFilipi njengombana nisazi, kodwana ngesizo lakaZimethu sazidela kobana sizonitjela ngevangeli lakhe phezu kobana besiqalene nokuphikiswa okukhulu." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ukutjhumayela kwethu akuveli kokulahlekisako namkha kokusilapheleko begodu asilingi ukunidlelezela," 
1Thessalonians2:4 kodwana sikhuluma njengamadoda akhethwe nguZimu kobana siphathiswe ivangeli. Asikhulumeli ukuthabisa abantu, kodwana sikhulumela ukuthabisa uZimu ozizinya iinhliziyo zethu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Niyazi bona asizange sisebenzise ubuqili namkha sizitjhatjhanise sifihle ubumarhamaru; uZimu ungufakazi wethu. 
1Thessalonians2:6 Besingafuni idumo ebantwini, sengitjho nakini imbala namkha kinanyana ngubani. Njengabapostoli bakaKrestu, nanyana besinegunya lokuba mthwalo kini," 
1Thessalonians2:7 besizithobile phakathi kwenu sifana nomma onakekela abantwabakhe. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Besinithanda kangangombana sathokozela ukwabelana nani ingasi ivangeli lakaZimu kwaphela kodwana ngitjho namaphilwethu ngombana nibe ngabathandeka khulu kithi. 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ngiyathemba bona niyakhumbula bazalwana, ukutjhikatjhika kwethu kanye neenhlupheko zethu; sasebenza ubusuku nemini ukuze singabi mthwalo womuntu nasitjhumayela ivangeli lakaZimu kini." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nina nibofakazi, ngitjho noZimu imbala, bokobana besicwengile, silungile begodu simsulwa phakathi kwenu nina enakholwako." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Niyazi bona sinani besiphethene kuhle njengobaba nabantwabakhe," 
1Thessalonians2:12 sanikhuthaza, saniduduza besanitjitjizela bona niphile ipilo efanele uZimu onibizela embuswenakhe nephazimulwenakhe." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Nje-ke sithokoza uZimu ngokungapheliko ngombana lokha nanimukela ilizwi lakaZimu enalizwa kithapha, nalamukela, ingasi njengelizwi lomuntu kodwana njengombana linjalo, ilizwi lakaZimu, elisebenza phakathi kwenu nina enikholwako." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Nina bazalwana, nibe balingisi bamabandla kaZimu aseJudiya akuKrestu Jesu: Abantu benarha yekhenu banihlunguphaze ngokufanako namabandla ahlunguphazwa maJuda," 
1Thessalonians2:15 abulala iKosi uJesu kanye nabaphorofidi, nathi asiqotjha lapha. Azange athabise uZimu begodu anelunya kibo boke abantu," 
1Thessalonians2:16 enza imizamo yokobana singakhulumi nabatjhili ukuze bangasindiswa. Ngokwenza njalo alokhu akghubelela izono zawo bezafika esiqongolweni. Ilaka lakaZimu selifikelele phezu kwawo. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kodwana bazalwana, lokha nasahlukaniswe nani kwesikhatjhana (ngenyama ingasi ngokwemikhumbulo), ngokunihlulukela kwethu okukhulu, senza imizamo yokobana sibonane nani." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ngambala besifuna ukuza kini, mina Powula bengifuna khulu bekwaba mahlandla amanengi, kodwana uSathana wasivimba." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Nje-ke liyini ithemba lethu, ithabo namkha isihlohlo sethu esizakuphazimula ngaso ebukhoneni beKosethu uJesu lokha nayibuyako na? Akusingini na?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ngambala nina niyiphazimulo nethabo lethu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Nje-ke kwathi nasele singasakghoni ukunyamezela, saqunta ukuzihlalela sisodwa e-Athene." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Sathumela uThimothi umfowethu nesibambisene naye emsebenzini kaZimu wokutjhumayela ivangeli lakaKrestu, kobana azoniqinisa abe anikhuthaze ngebanga lokukholwa kwenu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ukuze kungabikho namunye wenu ozakusikinywa mitlhago le. Ngambala nina ngokwenu nazi kuhle bona lokhu ngilokho esibekelwe khona. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Emanyeni, lokha nabesiphakathi kwenu, sanitjela ngaphambilini bona sizokutlhagiswa, yeke kube njalo njengombana nisazi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ngalokho-ke, kuthe nasele ngingasakghoni, ngathumela bona ngizwe ngokukholwa kwenu; bengesaba bona mhlambe umlingi unilingile nokobana umsebenzethu sele uphenduke ilize." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kodwana uThimothi uqeda ukufika ubuya kini, usilethele iindaba ezimnandi mayelana nokukholwa kwenu kanye nethando lenu. Godu usitjele bona nihlala nisikhumbula ngokuhle begodu nihlulukela ukusibona njengombana nathi sihlulukela ukunibona." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana, kilo loke isizi lethu nokuzunywa kwethu, sikhuthazekile ngani ngokukholwa kwenu" 
1Thessalonians3:8 ngombana sesizizwela ukuphila njengombana nidzimelele eKosini nje. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Singamthokoza njani uZimu ngokwaneleko ngani ngalo loke ithabo esizizwela lona phambi kwakaZimethu ngebanga lenu na? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Sithandaza ngamandla imini nobusuku ukuze sibonane nani ubuso nobuso, sivuselele koke okutlhayelako ekukholweni kwenu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Sengathi uZimethu nonguBaba kanye neKosethu uJesu ngokwakhe, anganqophisa indlelethu yokuza kini." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Godu kwanga iKosi inganandisa beniphuphume ngethando omunye komunye nakibo boke, njengombana nathi sinithanda ngokuphuphumako." 
1Thessalonians3:13 IKosi ayiniphe amandla ngokweenhliziyo kikho ukucwenga ukuze nibe msulwa phambi koZimethu nonguBaba, ekufikeni kweKosethu uJesu nabo boke abacwengileko." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Kokugcina bazalwana, siyanibawa besiyanikhuthaza eKosini uJesu kobana njengombana nafunda kithi bona nifanele niziphathe njani ukuze nithokozise uZimu, njengombana vele nisenza; vamani ukwenza njalo imihla ngemihla." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Niyayazi imiyalo esaninikela yona ngeKosi uJesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Lokho kuyintando kaZimu, ukucwengiswa kwenu: khambelani kude nobufebe;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 omunye nomunye wenu akwazi ukulawula umzimbakhe, kube ngokucwenga nangokuhlonipha," 
1Thessalonians4:5 kungabi ngokokutjha ngeenkanuko njengabatjhili abangamaziko uZimu. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Akungabikho owona namkha ocaphaza umfowabo ngokuthileko ngombana iKosi imbuyiseleli wakho koke lokhu njengombana sikhe sanitjela phambilini besaniyelelisa. 
1Thessalonians4:7 UZimu akakasibizeli ekusilaphaleni, kwaphela ufuna bona sibe msulwa." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Nje-ke nanyana ngubani owala lokhu akali umthetho womuntu kodwana wala uZimu, onguye oninikela uMoyakhe oCwengileko." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Nje-ke malungana nethando labazalwana anidingi bona kube khona onitlolelako ngombana nina ngokwenu senifundiswe nguZimu ukuthandana. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Eqinisweni, niyabathanda boke abazalwana kilo loke leMasedoniya. Kodwana siyanikhuthaza bathandekako bonyana nivame ukwenza njalo." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Zikhuthazeni ukuphila ngokuthula, nitjheje iindaba eziqalene nani, nisebenze ngezandla zenu njengombana saniyala" 
1Thessalonians4:12 ukuze niziphathe kuhle kabatjhili, ningazesami ngabanye abantu." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Yeke bazalwana asithandi bonyana ningabi nelwazi mayelana nalabo abahlongakeleko ukuze ningalili njengombana kwenza abanganathemba. 
1Thessalonians4:14 Njengombana sikholwa bona uJesu wahlongakala wabuye wavuka, ngokunjalo-ke, ngoJesu, uZimu uzokuletha kanye naye labo abahlongakeleko." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Sinitjela lokhu ngelizwi leKosi kobana thina esiphilako, esiseleko bekubuye iKosi, angeze sabandulela nakanye abahlongakeleko." 
1Thessalonians4:16 IKosi ngokwayo izokwehla ivela ezulwini ngelizwi elikhulu, ngephimbo lengilozi ekulu nangokuzwakala kweporompita kaZimu, abahlongakalele kuKrestu bazokuvuka qangi." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Yeke thina-ke esisaphilako, esiseleko, sizokuhlwithelwa emafini kanye nabo sihlangabeze iKosi emkayini, nje-ke sizabe sineKosi isiphelani." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ngalokho-ke khuthazanani ngamezwi la. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Bazalwana, mayelana neenkhathi namalanga anidingi ukutlolelwa ilitho" 
1Thessalonians5:2 ngombana nina nazi kuhle bona ilanga leKosi lizakufika njengesela ebusuku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Lokha nabathi: “Kunokuthula nokuphepha,” khonapho-ke bazakwehlelwa kurhayila msinyana, kube njengemirhelo eyehlela umfazi osidisi, yeke angeze kwabakhona ukuphunyurha." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kodwana nina bazalwana, anikho ebumnyameni kobana ilangelo linganithelekela njengesela." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nina noke nje nibantwana bokukhanya nabantwana bemini; asisibo bebusuku namkha bobumnyama. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ngalokho-ke asingalali njengombana kwenza abanye, kodwana asihlaleni siphapheme begodu siqaqulukile" 
1Thessalonians5:7 ngombana labo abalalako balala ebusuku nabadakwako badakwa ebusuku. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kodwana njengombana thina singebemini nje, asiqaqulukeni, sembathe isivikelasifuba sokukholwa nethando, isikoporo sethu kube lithemba nesindiso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 UZimu akakasibekeli itukuthelo kodwana usibekele ukufunyana isindiso ngeKosethu uJesu Krestu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 owasifelako ukuze kuthi nanyana siphapheme namkha silele, siphile kuye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nje-ke khuthazanani omunye nomunye bese niyakhana njengombana nivele nisenza. 
1Thessalonians5:12 Siyanincenga bazalwana bona nibahloniphe labo abasebenza hlangana nani, abaniphetheko eKosini nabanelulekako." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Baphatheni ngethando elikhulu ngebanga lomsebenzabo. Hlalisanani ngokuthula. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Godu siyaniyala bazalwana bona nikhalime ababhereleleko, nikhuthaze abaneenhliziyo ezibuthakathaka, nisize ababogabogako, yibani nesineke ngabo boke." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Qinisekisani bonyana kungabikho phakathi kwenu obuyisela ubumbi ngobumbi, kodwana hlalani njalo nirhuluphela ukwenza okuhle omunye komunye nakibo boke abantu." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Thokozani ngeenkhathi zoke. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Thandazani njalo ningalisi. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Thokozani kibo boke ubujamo ngombana lokho kuyintando kaZimu kuKrestu Jesu ngani. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Ningamcimi uMoya. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Ningawanyazi amezwi womphorofidi 
1Thessalonians5:21 kodwana hlolisisani koke, nibambelele kokulungileko." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Tjhidani kinanyana ngiliphi ihlobo lobumbi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Sengathi uZimu wokuthula ngokwakhe anganicwengisa ngokupheleleko, ummoya wenu, umkhumbulo kanye nomzimba wenu ulondeke begodu ube msulwa ekubuyeni kweKosethu uJesu Krestu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Yena onibizako uthembekile begodu uzakwenza lokho. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bazalwana abathandekako, sithandazelani." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Lotjhisani boke abazalwana ngokuncwangana okucwengileko. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Nginiyala ngesifungo phambi kweKosi bona incwadi le ifundwe kibo boke abazalwana. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Sengathi umusa weKosethu uJesu Krestu ungaba nani noke. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Mina Powula, uSilasi noThimothi; kilo ibandla lamaThesalonika elikuZimu onguBaba wethu, neKosini yethu uJesu Krestu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Akube kini umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu onguBaba, neKosini yethu uJesu Krestu." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Bazalwana, sifanele sihlale simthokoza uZimu ngaso soke isikhathi ngani. Iye, kufanele senze njalo ngombana ukukholwa kwenu kuya kusanda nokuthandana kwenu noke kuyakhula." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ngalokho thina ngokwethu sizigabazisa ngani hlangana namabandla wakaZimu ngokubekezela kanye nokukholwa kwenu esikhathini soke sokuzunywa kanye nokuhlutjhwa kwenu. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Koke lokhu kubufakazi bokobana isigwebo sakaZimu silungile. Nje-ke ngalokho nizakubalwa njengabalungele umbuso kaZimu eniwutlhagela kangaka lo. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Ngambala kuyinto elungileko kuZimu bona abuyiselele ngokubahlunguphaza labo abanihlunguphazako," 
2Thessalonians1:7 aphumuze abahlunguphaziweko kanye nathi. Lokho uyokwenza mhlana iKosi uJesu Krestu yembulwa, ivela ezulwini, ikanye neengilozi zayo ezinamandla," 
2Thessalonians1:8 isiza ngomlilo wamalangabi. Izokuhlunguphaza labo abangamaziko uZimu nalabo abangalaleli ivangeli leKosethu uJesu. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Bazakuhlunguphazwa ngesibetho sokubhujiswa okungapheliko, basuswe phambi kweKosi nephazimulweni yobukhosi bayo," 
2Thessalonians1:10 lokha nayiza kobana izokuphazimuliswa ngibo boke abacwengileko bayo begodu ibatjazwe ngibo boke abayikholwako ngombana nakholelwa ebufakazini bethu. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nje-ke sihlala sinithandazela, sisolo sikhombela bona uZimethu anenze nibe ngabafanele ibizo lakhe, begodu azalise ngamandlakhe koke ukutjhisekela kanye nomsebenzi wokukholwa kwenu" 
2Thessalonians1:12 ukuze ibizo leKosethu uJesu liphazimuliswe kini, nani kube njalo kiyo ngokomusa kaZimethu kanye neKosi uJesu Krestu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Mayelana nokubuya kweKosethu uJesu Krestu nokubuthanela kwethu kiyo, siyanirabhela, bazalwana" 
2Thessalonians2:2 ningabi msinyana ekudidekeni engqondweni namkha nethuswe nanyana kungaba ngesiphorofido, ngelizwi namkha ngencwadi, kube ngathi ivela kithi, kuthiwe ilanga lokubuya kweKosi selisemnyango." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Akungabikho onikhohlisa ngananyana ngayiphi indlela ngombana ilangelo alizukuza ngaphambi kobana kufike ukuhlubuka qangi bekwembulwe emtarini loyo onganamthetho, obekelwe ukubhujiswa." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Yena uzokuphikisa abe aziphakamise phezu kwananyana yini ebizwa ngoZimu namkha ekukulotjhwa kwakaZimu ukuze azibeke ethempelini lakaZimu, azibize bona unguZimu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Anisakhumbuli nanginitjela ngezintwezi lokha nangisesenani na? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Nje-ke seniyazi bona yini emliyileko ukuze avezwe nasele kufike isikhathi sakhe. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ifihlakalo yonganamthetho sele isebenza, kodwana kwaphela kufikela lapha loyo obambezelako asuswa khona." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ngemva kwalapho-ke, loyo onganamthetho uzakwambulwa, iye, loyo iKosi uJesu ngomphefumulo womlomayo ezamrhayila ekubonakaleni kokuza kwayo." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ukufika konganamthetho kubonakala ekusebenzeni kwakaSathana, osebenzisa woke amandla, amatshwayo, iimangaliso zamala" 
2Thessalonians2:10 kanye nayo yoke imihlobo yekohliso ekhohlakeleko kilabo ababhubhako ngombana bale ukuthanda iqiniso bebasindiswe. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ngalokho-ke uZimu ubathumelela ukudurha okunamandla, okubarholela ekukholweni amala" 
2Thessalonians2:12 ukuze balahlwe boke abangazange bakholwe iqiniso, kodwana bathokoziswa ngokungakalungi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kodwana sifanele sithokoze uZimu njalo ngani bazalwana abathandwa yiKosi ngombana uZimu wakhetha nina njengeenthelo zokuthoma mayelana nokusindiswa ngokucwengiswa nguMoya nangokukholwa eqinisweni. 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ngesizathweso, wanibiza ngokutjhumayela kwethu ivangeli ukuze nifunyane iphazimulo yeKosethu uJesu Krestu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Yeke-ke, bazalwana qinani isibindi, nikakarele eemfundisweni esanifundisa zona, kungaba ngelizwi lomlomethu namkha ngencwadethu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Sengathi iKosethu uJesu Krestu ngokwayo noZimu uBaba wethu owasithandako bewathi ngesisa sakhe wasipha ukududuzeka okungapheliko kanye nethemba elihle," 
2Thessalonians2:17 ingaduduza iinhliziyo zenu beyiziqinise ngawo woke umsebenzi omuhle kanye nangelizwi. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Kokugcina bazalwana, sithandazelani ukuze ilizwi leKosi lirhatjheke ngamandla, iKosi idunyiswe kizo zoke iindawo njengombana kunjalo phakathi kwenu." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Iye, nisithandazele bona siphephe ebantwini abakhohlakeleko nabambi ngombana akusibo boke abanokukholwa." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kodwana iKosi ithembekile, izanipha amandla beyiniphephise komumbi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Nje-ke sinethemba eKosini ngani, kobana izinto esanifundisa zona niyazenza begodu nizokuragela phambili ngokuzenza." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Sengathi iKosi inganqophisa iinhliziyo zenu ethandweni lakaZimu, nekunyamezeleni kwakaKrestu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Nje-ke siyaniyala bazalwana ebizweni leKosethu uJesu Krestu bona niwagegede amakholwa aphila ngokubherelela, ingasi ngokweemfundiso abazifunyene kithi" 
2Thessalonians3:7 ngombana nani niyazi bonyana nifanele ukulingisa thina; azange sibherelele lokha nabe siphakathi kwenu. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Akakho noyedwa esakhe sagoma isikwa sakhe simahla, kodwana besisebenza sijuluka ubusuku nemini ukuze singabi mthwalo kini." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Akutjho bona besinganamalungelo wokunidisibeza, kodwana besifuna ukuninikela isibonelo ekumele nisilandele." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ngitjho nalokha nasisesenani, saninikela umyalo lo othi: “Nakube umuntu akafuni ukusebenza, khona-ke akangagomi.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Sizwile bonyana abanye benu baphila ngobuvila, bayehla bayenyuka, bazidlhunya eendabeni zabanye." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Yeke abantu abanjalo siyabayala besiyabancenga eKosini uJesu Krestu bonyana abenze umsebenzabo kuhle, basebenzele isikwa sabo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Bazalwana, ningadinwa kukwenza okulungileko." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Qaphelani labo abangalaleli esikutjho ngencwadini le, ningahlanganyeli nabo khona bazakuba neenhloni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Nokho ningabaphathi njengezitha kodwana bayeleliseni njengamakholwa. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Nje-ke sengathi iKosi yokuthula ngokwayo inganipha ukuthula ngeenkhathi zoke nangazo zoke iindlela. IKosi ayibe nani noke. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ngimi uPowula, ngesandla sami otlole isilayeliso lesi. Leli litshwayo lazo zoke iincwadi zami, yindlela engitlola ngayo." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Sengathi umusa weKosethu uJesu Krestu ungaba nani noke. 
1Timothy1:1 UPowula, umpostoli kaKrestu Jesu ngomyalo kaZimu uMsindisi wethu noKrestu Jesu ithemba lethu," 
1Timothy1:2 kuThimothi indodanami ngenyama ekukholweni. Akube mumusa, isirhawu nokuthula okubuya kuZimu uBaba, nakuKrestu Jesu iKosethu." 
1Timothy1:3 Njengombana ngakubawa mhlana ngilunge eMasedoniya, hlala e-Efesu ukuze uyale abathileko bona bangafundisi ifundiso ehlukileko" 
1Timothy1:4 begodu bangazinikeli eendatjaneni zeentolwana nezomlibo ongapheliko wokubelethana. Izinto ezinjalo zikhuthaza ukuphikisana kunobana zikhuthaze umsebenzi kaZimu ekukholweni. 
1Timothy1:5 Ihloso yomyalo lo lithando elivela ehliziyweni emhlophe nesazelweni esimsulwa kanye nekukholweni okungazenzisiko. 
1Timothy1:6 Abanye baphambukile kilokho, baphendukela eenkulumeni ezingatjho ilitho." 
1Timothy1:7 Bafuna ukuba bafundisi bomthetho khisibe abakuzwisisi lokho abakutjhoko namkha lokho abakuqinisako ekulumenabo. 
1Timothy1:8 Siyazi bona umthetho ulungile lokha umuntu nawusebenzisa ngendlela efaneleko. 
1Timothy1:9 Begodu siyazi bona umthetho awukabekelwa olungileko, kodwana ubekelwe izeqamthetho namahlongandlebe, abangatjhiswako ngoZimu nabazizoni, abanameswe nabarhubutjhekileko, ababulala aboyise nabonina, abababulali," 
1Timothy1:10 iimfebe, abaduna abalalanako, nabarhweba ngamathunjwa, abakhuluma amala nabaphula iinthembiso abazifungeleko kanye nalabo abenza ezinye izinto eziphambene nefundiso eliqiniso," 
1Timothy1:11 nekhambisana nevangeli elihle lakaZimu obusisekileko, angiphathisa lona." 
1Timothy1:12 Ngiyamthokoza uKrestu Jesu iKosethu owangipha amandla ngombana wangithemba wangibeka emsebenzinakhe," 
1Timothy1:13 ngitjho nanyana begade ngimhlambalazi, ngimzumi wabantu begodu nginenturhu. Kodwana ngarhawukelwa ngombana ngenza lokho ngokungazi ngesikhathi ngingakholwa." 
1Timothy1:14 Yeke umusa weKosi wawululelwa ngobunengi kimi kanye nokukholwa nethando elikuKrestu Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Liqinisile ilizweli begodu lifanele ukwamukelwa: Iye, uKrestu Jesu weza ephasinapha ukuzokusindisa izoni, engingesikhulu sazo." 
1Timothy1:16 Kodwana ebangenelo ngarhwukelwa ukuze kuthi ngami mina soni esikhulu, uKrestu Jesu akhombise ukunyamezela kwakhe okukhulu, ngokwenza isibonelo kilabo abasazokukholwa kuye babe nokuphila okusiphelani." 
1Timothy1:17 Kiyo iKosi yesiphelani, engasoze yafa, engabonwako, enguZimu yedwa, akube lidumo nephazimulo nini nanini. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Thimothi ndodanami, ngikunikela umyalo lo ukuya ngokweemphorofido ezenziwe ngawe phambilini khona kuzakuthi nawuzilandelako, ulwe ukulwa okuhle," 
1Timothy1:19 udzimelele ekukholweni nesazelweni esihle; okuthe abanye ngokukudela lokho, umkhumbi wabo wokukholwa waphahlazeka." 
1Timothy1:20 Hlangana nabo ngingabala uHimenewu no-Alekzandra, engibanikele kuSathana ukuze bafunde ukungahlambalazi." 
1Timothy2:1 Kokuthoma ngiyabawa bona ukuncenga, ukuthandaza, ukubawela abanye nokuthokoza kwenzelwe abantu boke," 
1Timothy2:2 amakhosi nazo zoke iimphathimandla ukuze siphile kuhle nangokuthula, sikhambe ngakho koke ukwesaba uZimu nangokuhlonipheka." 
1Timothy2:3 Lokhu kuhle begodu kuyathandeka phambi kwakaZimu uMsindisi wethu," 
1Timothy2:4 othanda bona boke abantu basindiswe bebafikelele elwazini leqiniso 
1Timothy2:5 ngombana munye uZimu begodu munye umlamuli hlangana noZimu nabantu, mumuntu uKrestu Jesu;" 
1Timothy2:6 owazinikela ukuze abe sihlengo sabo boke. Lokhu kwaba bufakazi esikhathini esifaneleko. 
1Timothy2:7 Ngebanga lalokho ngakhethwa bona ngibe mtjhumayeli nompostoli. Ngikhuluma iqiniso, angileyi amala, iye, ngibe mfundisi wabatjhili ngokukholwa nangeqiniso." 
1Timothy2:8 Nje-ke ngithanda bona eendaweni zoke amadoda athandaze aphakamise izandla ezicwengileko, anganalo ilaka nokuphikisana." 
1Timothy2:9 Godu ngithanda bona nabafazi bembathe kuhle nangokuhloniphekileko, kube zizambatho ezifaneleko, bazikghabise ngendlela ehloniphekako, kungabi ngeenhluthu zabo ezilukiweko namkha ngegolide namkha ngamatje aligugu nanyana ngezambatho ezibizako;" 
1Timothy2:10 kodwana akube ngemisebenzi emihle, njengombana kufanele abafazi abathi besaba uZimu." 
1Timothy2:11 Umfazi akafunde ngokuthula ngakho koke ukuzithoba. 
1Timothy2:12 Angivumeli umfazi afundise namkha abe negunya phezu kwendoda kodwana akathule 
1Timothy2:13 ngombana u-Adamu wabunjwa qangi, kwalandela u-Efa;" 
1Timothy2:14 kanti-ke godu akusuye u-Adamu owakhohliswako kodwana mfazi, waba sisephulamthetho." 
1Timothy2:15 Kodwana uzakusindiswa ngokubeletha, kwaphela nakube abantwanabo bahlala ekukholweni, ethandweni, ekucwengeni nangokuziphatha kuhle." 
1Timothy3:1 Liqinisile ilizwi elithi: Nangabe umuntu ulangazelela ukuba mbonisi, usuke athanda umsebenzi omuhle." 
1Timothy3:2 Nje-ke umbonisi akabe ngongasolekiko, onomfazi munye, onommoya ophasi, ovuthiweko, ohloniphekako, ophatha kuhle iinkhambi nonekghono lokufundisa." 
1Timothy3:3 Angabi sidakwa nesilwi, kodwana abe ngozothileko nongananturhu, angabi ngothanda imali." 
1Timothy3:4 Abe ngowazi ukuphatha umzakhe kuhle nabantwana bakhe balawuleke babe nehlonipho. 
1Timothy3:5 Nangabe umuntu akakwazi ukuphatha umzakhe kuhle, alo, angaliphatha njani ibandla lakaZimu na?" 
1Timothy3:6 Akungabi mumuntu osanda ukuphenduka, nakanjalo angahle azikhukhumeze bese uwele esigwebeni sinye noSathana." 
1Timothy3:7 Kufanele abe mumuntu onebizo elihle kabangaphandle, khona angazukuhlazeka abanjwe sisifu sakaSathana." 
1Timothy3:8 Ngokunjalo namadikoni. Nawo kufanele ahlonipheke, angabi mamenemene, azinikelele ewayinini elinengi namkha abe marhamaru ngemalini;" 
1Timothy3:9 kufuze akakarele efihlakalweni yokukholwa ngesazelo esimsulwa. 
1Timothy3:10 Akahlolisiswe ntangi, kuthi nangasolekiko avunyelwe ukuba magosa." 
1Timothy3:11 Ngokunjalo-ke nabafazi kufanele bahlonipheke, bangabi ngabahlebako kodwana babe nommoya ophasi, bathembeke kikho koke." 
1Timothy3:12 Amadikoni akabe nomfazi oyedwa, akwazi ukuphatha kuhle abantwana nemizi yawo." 
1Timothy3:13 Labo abasebenze kuhle njengamadikoni, bazizuzela ubujamo obuhle nesibindi esikhulu ekukholweni kuKrestu Jesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Ngethemba ukuza kuwe msinyana kodwana ngikutlolela imiyalo le ukuze kuthi 
1Timothy3:15 nakungenzeka ngiriyade, wazi bona umuntu kufuze aziphathe njani endlini kaZimu, okulibandla lakaZimu ophilako noyisika nesisekelo seqiniso." 
1Timothy3:16 Ngaphandle kokuzaza, yikulu ifihlo yokukholwa kwethu ethi: Owazibonakalisa enyameni, walungisiswa ngoMoya, wabonwa ziingilozi, wamenyezelwa hlangana nabatjhili, ephasini abantu bakholwa kuye, wenyuselwa ephazimulweni." 
1Timothy4:1 UMoya oCwengileko ukutjho ngokukhanyako bona ngamalanga wokuphela abanye bayokuhlubuka ekukholweni banake imimoya ekhohlisako neemfundiso zamadimoni. 
1Timothy4:2 Iimfundiso ezinjalo zifafazwa bazenzisi bamala abanesazelo esomeleliswe ngesimbi etjhisako. 
1Timothy4:3 Bakhandela ukuthathana begodu bathi akuzilwe ukudla okwadalwa nguZimu bona kwamukelwe ngokuthokoza ngilabo abakholwako nabalaziko iqiniso. 
1Timothy4:4 Koke okudalwe nguZimu kulungile, akukho okufanele bona kulahlwe nangabe kwamukelwa ngokuthokoza" 
1Timothy4:5 ngombana vane sekucwengiswe ngelizwi lakaZimu nangomthandazo. 
1Timothy4:6 Nangabe ubeka izintwezi phambi kwabazalwana, uyokuba sisebenzi esihle sakaKrestu Jesu, esizondla ngelizwi lokukholwa nefundiso elungileko osele ukakarele kiyo." 
1Timothy4:7 Wale iinolwani ezisilapheleko zeenlukazi, kunalokho zijayeze ipilo yokwesaba uZimu" 
1Timothy4:8 ngombana ukujayeza ukuthabulula umzimba kusiza kancani, kodwana ukwesaba uZimu kusiza kikho koke ngombana kunesithembiso sokuphila lokhu nalokho okuzako." 
1Timothy4:9 Ilizweli liqinisile begodu kufanele lamukelwe ngokupheleleko. 
1Timothy4:10 Nje-ke ngalokho sisebenza kabudisi begodu siyatjhikatjhika ngombana sibeke ithemba lethu kuZimu ophilako oMsindisi wabo boke abantu, khulukhulu labo abakholwako." 
1Timothy4:11 Yewuyale ngezintwezo uphele ufundise ngazo. 
1Timothy4:12 Akungabikhona umuntu onyaza ubutjha bakho, kodwana yiba sibonelo kabakholwako ngokukhuluma nangokuziphatha, ngethando, ngokukholwa nangepilo emsulwa." 
1Timothy4:13 Khuthalela ukufunda imitlolo, ukukhuthaza nokufundisa bengifike." 
1Timothy4:14 Ungasiliseleli isiphiwo esikuwe owasamukeliswa ngesiphorofido nangokubekwa izandla baphathi bebandla. 
1Timothy4:15 Khuthalela ukwenza zoke izintwezo, uzinikele kizo ukuze ukuthuthuka kwakho kubonakale kibo boke." 
1Timothy4:16 Uzeluse wena kanye nefundiso yakho, uphikelele ezintwenezo ngombana ngokwenza lokho uzazisindisa wena nabakuzwako." 
1Timothy5:1 Ungamkhahlamezi umuntu omdala, kodwana khuluma naye njengoyihlo, nabaduna abatjha njengabafowenu," 
1Timothy5:2 abadala abasikazi ubaphathe njengabonyoko kuthi abasesebatjha ubaphathe njengabodadwenu ngobumsulwa obupheleleko. 
1Timothy5:3 Hlonipha abahlolokazi abanganabani. 
1Timothy5:4 Nangabe umhlolokazi unabantwana namkha abazukulu, kufanele bafunde maqangi ukubonakalisa izenzo zokukholwa kwabo emndeninabo bese baba nembuyiselo kubabelethi babo ngombana lokho kuyathokozeka kuZimu." 
1Timothy5:5 Umhlolokazi onganabani, osele asele yedwa, ubeke ithemba lakhe kuZimu, uhlala ekuncengeni nekuthandazeni ubusuku nemini." 
1Timothy5:6 Kodwana umhlolokazi ozinikelele ebumnandini, ufe asaphila." 
1Timothy5:7 Yewuyale ngezintwezi ukuze bangasoleki. 
1Timothy5:8 Kodwana nangabe umuntu akabatjheji bekhabo, khulukhulu bomndenakhe, ulahle ukukholwa begodu mumbi kunongakholwako." 
1Timothy5:9 Umhlolokazi ongaphasi kweminyaka ematjhumi asithandathu nogade ende endodeni yinye, akangafakwa erhelweni," 
1Timothy5:10 nakube akanayo imisebenzi emihle njengokukhulisa kuhle abantwana, ukuphatha kuhle abayeni, ukuqopha iinyawo zabacwengileko, ukusiza abahlunguphaziweko nokuzinikela ekwenzeni okuhle nanyana ngayiphi indlela." 
1Timothy5:11 Kodwana abahlolokazi abasesebatjha ungabatlolisi erhelweni ngombana nasele iinkanuko zemizimba yabo ziba ngaphezu kokuzinikela kwabo kuKrestu, bazokufuna ukwenda." 
1Timothy5:12 Ngokwenza njalo bazibangela ukulahlwa ngombana basephulile isithembiso sabo sokuthoma. 
1Timothy5:13 Ngaphezu kwalokho bafunda ukuvilapha nokutjharhathela emizini. Abavilaphi nje kwaphela kodwana bayahleba, bathanda iindaba zabanye, bakhulume nalokho okungakafaneli bona bakutjho." 
1Timothy5:14 Nje-ke bengingathanda bona abahlolokazi abasesebatjha babuye bende babelethe, baphathe kuhle imizabo, khona inaba lethu lingazukufumana ithuba lokukhuluma kumbi ngathi." 
1Timothy5:15 Ngikhuluma nje abanye sebagwilikile balandela uSathana. 
1Timothy5:16 Nangabe umfazi okholwako unabahlolokazi emndenini, akabasize; umthwalo ungabi semahlombe webandla, khona lizakwazi ukusiza abahlolokazi abanganabani." 
1Timothy5:17 Abaphathi abaphethe kuhle kufanele bahlonitjhwe ngokubuyelelweko, khulukhulu labo abakhuthalele ukutjhumayela nokufundisa" 
1Timothy5:18 ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Ungafaki ikomo isifonyo lokha nayibhula ibhali nekoroyi.” Begodu uthi: “Isisebenzi sifanelwa mrholo waso.” 
1Timothy5:19 Umlandu othweswe umphathi ungawamukeli ngaphandle kwabofakazi ababili nanyana abathathu. 
1Timothy5:20 Abonako ubakhalimele phambi kwabo boke, khona nabanye bazakusaba." 
1Timothy5:21 Ngikuyala phambi kwakaZimu noKrestu Jesu kanye neengilozi ezikhethiweko kobana ulonde imiyalo le ngokungathandi ukubukwa, begodu ungenzi ilitho ngokukhetha." 
1Timothy5:22 Ungarhabi ubeke izandla phezu kwananyana ngubani, begodu ungahlanganyeli ezonweni zabanye; hlala umsulwa." 
1Timothy5:23 Ungabe usasela amanzi wodwa, kodwana thatha newayini kancancani ngebanga lesisu sakho nokubogaboga kwakho okuvamileko." 
1Timothy5:24 Izono zabanye zisebaleni begodu zibandulela ekugwetjweni, kanti-ke zabanye ziyabalandela." 
1Timothy5:25 Godu ngokunjalo nemisebenzi elungileko isebaleni, sengitjho naleyo engabonakali kuhle ayisitheki." 
1Timothy6:1 Akuthi boke abangaphasi kwejogi lobukhoboka, bahloniphe abanikazi babo kikho koke ukuze kungahlanjalazwa ibizo lakaZimu nefundiso." 
1Timothy6:2 Amakhoboka asebenzela abanikazi abakholwako kufanele angabanyazi ngombana babazalwana. Kunalokho akabasebenzele khulu ngombana labo abazuzako ngemisebenzawo makholwa kanye nabathandekako. Kufanele bona ufundise bewukhuthaze ngezintwezi. 
1Timothy6:3 Umuntu onefundiso ehlukileko nengakhambisani namezwi aphilileko weKosethu uJesu Krestu kanye nefundiso ekhambisana nokwesaba uZimu," 
1Timothy6:4 ukhukhumele onjalo begodu akazi ilitho. Unekanuko embi yokuphikisana, godu unombango wamezwi abanga ukufelana umona, umbango, ukuhlambalaza nokuzindlekelelana ngokumbi;" 
1Timothy6:5 iye, ubanga ukulwa phakathi kwalabo abanemikhumbulo eyonakeleko nabalahlekelwe liqiniso, abadlumbana bona ukulotjha uZimu kuyindlela yokuzuza umnotho." 
1Timothy6:6 Ije vele, ukumesaba uZimu nokwaneliswa kuyinzuzo ekulu" 
1Timothy6:7 ngombana seza ephasinapha singanalitho, kusebaleni bona sizakugoduka singanalitho godu." 
1Timothy6:8 Kodwana nasinokudla nezambatho, asaneliswe ngilokho." 
1Timothy6:9 Abathanda ukunjinga bawela ekulingweni begodu balutheka ngeenkanuko ezinobudlhadlha nezilimazako, ezidosela abantu ekonakalisweni nekubhujisweni." 
1Timothy6:10 Ngombana ukuthanda imali kumrabhu wakho koke okumbi. Abanye ngokulangazela ukunjinga bahlubuke ekukholweni bebazihlaba ngeenhlungu ezinengi. 
1Timothy6:11 Kodwana wena-ke muntu kaZimu, kubalekele koke lokho uphikelele ukulunga, ukumesaba uZimu, ukukholwa, ithando, ukunyamezela nobumnene." 
1Timothy6:12 Yilwa ukulwa okuhle kokukholwa, ubambelele ekuphileni okungapheliko owabizelwa kikho nowenza ngakho isivumo esihle phambi kwabofakazi abanengi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ngiyakuyala phambi kwakaZimu ophilisa koke naphambi kwakaKrestu Jesu owafakaza phambi kwakaPontiyasi Pilatu, wavuma isivumo esihle" 
1Timothy6:14 kobana ulonde umyalo ngaphandle komphambo namkha ukusoleka bekube sekubonakaleni kweKosethu uJesu Krestu," 
1Timothy6:15 uZimu azakubonakalisa ngesikhathi esifaneleko, yena ongothokozwako nokunguye yedwa uMninimandla, iKosi yamakhosi noMbusi wababusi." 
1Timothy6:16 Nguye yedwa ophila isiphelani nohlala ekukhanyeni okungekhe kwatjhidelwa kikho, ongazange abonwe mumuntu nongabonwako, alibe kuye idumo namandla ngokungapheliko. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Bayale abanothileko esikhathini sanamhlanje bonyana bangazikhukhumezi namkha bathembele emnothweni ophelako, kodwana kuZimu osinjingisa ngakho koke bona sithokoze ngakho." 
1Timothy6:18 Bayale benze okuhle, banothe ngemisebenzi emihle; baphane babele abanye." 
1Timothy6:19 Ngalokho bazabe bazibulungela umnotho osisekelo sangomuso ukuze babambelele ekuphileni ekungikho. 
1Timothy6:20 Thimothi, londa kuhle ophathiswe khona. Bethela mthalazeni ukukhuluma okulilize nokuphikisana okuthiwa kulilwazi kungasilo," 
1Timothy6:21 okuthe abanye balivuma balahlekelwa mnqopho wokukholwa. Umusa weKosi awube nani noke! 
2Timothy1:1 UPowula umpostoli wakaKrestu Jesu ngokwentando kaZimu ngokuya ngeenthembiso zepilo kuKrestu Jesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kuThimothi, indodanami ethandekako. Akube mumusa, isirhawu nokuthula kwakaZimu uBaba noKrestu Jesu iKosethu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ngiyamthokoza uZimu engimlotjha ngesazelo esimsulwa njengombana abokhokho bami gade basenza. Ngikukhumbula njalo emithandazwenami emini nebusuku. 
2Timothy1:4 Ngokukhumbula iinyembezi zakho, ngilangazelela ukukubona khona ihliziywami izakuzala ithabo." 
2Timothy1:5 Godu ngikhunjuzwa ukukholwa kwakho kweqiniso, iye, ukukholwa okwathoma kwaba kugogwakho uLowisi nonyoko uYunike, engineqiniso bona kuhlezi kuwe." 
2Timothy1:6 Ngalokho ngiyakukhumbuza bona uvuselele isiphiwo sakaZimu esikuwe ngokubekwa izandla zami 
2Timothy1:7 ngombana uZimu akhange asiphe ummoya wobutjhatjha, kodwana wamandla, wethando nowokuzikhalima." 
2Timothy1:8 Nje-ke ungabi neenhloni ngokufakaza ngeKosi nangami mina sibotjhwa sayo, kodwana hlanganyela nami ebuhlungwini ngebanga levangeli, uzeyame ngamandla kaZimu," 
2Timothy1:9 owasisindisa bewasibiza ngebizo elicwengileko, kungasi ngemisebenzi yethu kodwana ukuya ngokwehloso nomusa wakhe. Umusa lo sanikelwa wona ngoKrestu zingakabi ukuba khona iinkhathi," 
2Timothy1:10 kodwana kwanjesi sewambulelwe ngokufika koMsindisi wethu uKrestu Jesu, owaqeda ukufa waletha ukuphila nokungabhubhi ekukhanyeni ngevangeli." 
2Timothy1:11 Ngebanga levangeli ngakhethwa bona ngibe mtjhumayeli, mpostoli nomfundisi;" 
2Timothy1:12 kungalokho ngisebunzimeni obungaka. Nokho-ke anginanhloni ngombana ngiyamazi loyo engikholwa kuye, begodu ngiyethemba bona unamandla wokulonda lokho okubekwe kimi bekube mhlokho." 
2Timothy1:13 Bambelela esifundweni esiphilileko owasizwa kimi ngokukholwa nangethando elikuKrestu Jesu. 
2Timothy1:14 Okuhle okubekwe kuwe, kulonde ngoMoya oCwengileko ohlala kithi." 
2Timothy1:15 Uyazi bona boke abase-Asiya sebangihlanukele, ngitjho aboFigelo no-Erimogenesi." 
2Timothy1:16 Kwanga iKosi ingaba nomusa endlini ka-Onesiforu ngombana bephele angivusela begodu angananhloni ngami njengombana bengibotjhiwe. 
2Timothy1:17 Iye, lokha nakaseRoma wangibhudula bewangifunyana." 
2Timothy1:18 Kwanga iKosi ingenza kobana azuze umusa weKosi mhlokho! Begodu nawe wazi kuhle bona kungangani alotjha ngakho e-Efesu. 
2Timothy2:1 Nje-ke wena ndodanami, qina emseni okuKrestu Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Lokho owangizwa ngikufundisa phambi kwabofakazi abanengi, kudlulisele ebantwini abathembekileko abazakwazi nabo ukukufundisa abanye." 
2Timothy2:3 Hlanganyela ekuhluphekeni njengebutho elihle lakaKrestu Jesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Akakho ophuma ipi khisibe usazilibazisa ngokwekhaya; ibutho liphikelela ukuthokozisa indunalo. 
2Timothy2:5 Ngokunjalo ophalisanako akathunjiswa unongorwana angakaphalisani ngokomthetho. 
2Timothy2:6 Umlimi ozibulalisa ngokulima, nguye ekufanele amukele maqangi iinthelo." 
2Timothy2:7 Yelela engikutjhoko ngombana iKosi izakunikela ilemuko ezintweni zoke. 
2Timothy2:8 Khumbula uJesu Krestu owavuswa kabafileko ongowomlibo kaDavida, ngokwevangeli lami" 
2Timothy2:9 engihlupheka ngalo kufikela lapha ngabotjhwa khona njengeselelesi. Kodwana ilizwi lakaZimu alikabotjhwa lona. 
2Timothy2:10 Ngalokho nginyamezelela koke ngebanga labakhethiweko ukuze nabo bamukeliswe isindiso ekuKrestu Jesu kanye nephazimulo yanini nanini. 
2Timothy2:11 Siliqiniso isitjho esithi: “Nangabe safa naye sizokuphila naye godu. 
2Timothy2:12 Nasinyamezelako sizakubusa naye, nangabe siyamphika naye uyosiphika." 
2Timothy2:13 Nangabe asikathembeki, yena uyokuhlala njalo athembekile ngombana angekhe aziphika.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Bakhumbuze ngalokho, ubakhalimele phambi koZimu bona bangaphosani ngamezwi ngombana akusizi ngalitho, kodwana kukhubekisa abalaleli." 
2Timothy2:15 Khuthalela bona uziveze kuZimu uthembekile, usisebenzi esingananhloni, esifundisa ilizwi leqiniso ngokutjhejisisa." 
2Timothy2:16 Ikulumo elilize nesilapheleko iphayele ngeqadi ngombana ithuwelelisa abantu ekoneni. 
2Timothy2:17 Ukukhuluma kwabo kuzakuba njengesilonda esibhibhidlhako. Phakathi kwabo nguHimenewu noFileto," 
2Timothy2:18 abaphaphalaze eqinisweni ngokuthi bathi ukuvuka kwabafileko sekwadlula, batjhabalalise nokukholwa kwabanye." 
2Timothy2:19 Nokho isisekelo sakaZimu sinzinzile, sinephawu elithi: “USomnini uyabazi labo ekungebakhe,” nokuthi: “Ngiloyo naloyo obiza ibizo leKosi akadede ebukhohlakalini.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Ngendlini ekulu kunezitja ekungasizo zegolide nesiliva kwaphela, kodwana zekhuni nezomdaka. Ezinye zisetjenziselwa okukhethekileko ezinye okujayelekileko." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngalokho nangabe umuntu uyazihlanza ezintwenezo, uzakuba sisitja esihloniphekileko esinobuphulukelo kumniniso nesilungele yoke imisebenzi emihle." 
2Timothy2:22 Balekela iinkanuko zobutjha, utjhisekele ukulunga, ukukholwa, ithando nokuthula, kanye nalabo ababiza iKosi ngehliziyo emsulwa." 
2Timothy2:23 Iinkulumo zobudlhayela nokuphikisana okunganalwazi ukuphephe ngombana uyazi bona lokho kubanga ukurarana. 
2Timothy2:24 Isisebenzi seKosi asikafaneli sibe nenturhu, kodwana asibe nomusa kibo boke nelisu lokufundisa, sinyamezele," 
2Timothy2:25 sisole abaphikisana naso ngesizotha, mhlamunye uZimu angahle abaphe ithuba lokuphenduka balazi iqiniso." 
2Timothy2:26 Iye, bangahle baphephe esifini sakaSathana ababanjwe kiso ngokuthunjwa kokwenza intando yakhe." 
2Timothy3:1 Yazi lokhu bona ngemihla yokuphela kuzokufika iinkhathi ezibudisi kwamambala. 
2Timothy3:2 Abantu bazakuba ngabazithandako, abathanda imali, abazikhukhumezako, abazigqajako, abahlambalazako, abangalaleli ababelethi, abangathokoziko, abangakahlanzeki," 
2Timothy3:3 abanganathando, abangavumi ukubuyisana, abahlebako, abangazigobiko, abakhohlakeleko, abahloye okuhle," 
2Timothy3:4 abakhaphelako, abawalazelako, abazitjhayako, abathanda injabulo kunobanyana bathande uZimu;" 
2Timothy3:5 banesimilo sokwesaba uZimu khisibe baphika amandla wakhona. Abanjalo ubaphephe. 
2Timothy3:6 Kilabo kunabakhukhutha bangene izindlu bafike bathumbe besifazana abanyariyako, abadiselwa zizono zabo nabaphethwe ziinkanuko ezahlukeneko;" 
2Timothy3:7 bahlala bafundiswa, kodwana abafiki ekulazini iqiniso." 
2Timothy3:8 NjengoJanesi noJambresi bajamelana noMosi, ngokunjalo nalabo bajamelene neqiniso; kubabantu abanemikhumbulo eyonakeleko, bahlulekile ekukholweni." 
2Timothy3:9 Kodwana angeze bathuthuka ngombana njengendabeni yamadoda amabili la, ubudlhayela babo buzakuba setjhatjhalazini kibo boke." 
2Timothy3:10 Nje-ke wena wayilandela ifundiswami, ukuziphatha kwami, ihloswami yepilo, ukukholwa kwami, ukunyamezela kwami, ithando lami, ukuqinisela kwami," 
2Timothy3:11 ukuzunywa nokutshwenywa okwangehlela e-Anthiyorhiya, e-Ikhoniyo neListra. Ukuzunywa okunje ngakunyamezelela begodu iKosi yangihlenga kikho koke lokhu." 
2Timothy3:12 Mbala, boke abathanda ukuphila ipilo emsulwa kuKrestu Jesu bazakuzunywa." 
2Timothy3:13 Kodwana iinkhohlakali nabakhohlisi bazakuragela phambili ebumbini, badukisa nabo badukiswa." 
2Timothy3:14 Kodwana wena kakarela kilokho okufundileko nakilokho onesiqiniseko ngakho, ukwazi bona ukufunde kubani." 
2Timothy3:15 Kwebuntwaneni wayazi imitlolo ecwengileko enamandla yokukupha ukuhlakanipha kube kusindiswa ngokukholwa kuKrestu Jesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Yoke imitlolo iphefumulelwe nguZimu, begodu ilungele ukufundisa, ukukhalima, ukunqophisa imitjhapho nokuyala ekulungeni," 
2Timothy3:17 khona umuntu kaZimu azakufanela bona abe ngolungele ukwenza yoke imisebenzi emihle. 
2Timothy4:1 Ngiyakuyala ngiqinisile phambi kwakaZimu noKrestu Jesu ozakugweba abaphilako nabafileko nangokuvela kokubonakala kwakhe nombuso wakhe, ngithi:" 
2Timothy4:2 Tjhumayela ilizwi, ulungele ukulizwakalisa kusikhathi esifaneleko nanyana kungasiso: Sola, ukhalimele, ukhuthaze ngokubafundisa ngesineke esikhulu" 
2Timothy4:3 ngombana siyeza isikhathi lapho abantu bangeze bakhambisana khona nefundiso ephilileko. Kunalokho bazozibuthelelela abafundisi kobana banelise ubuzikazikani beendlebe zabo. 
2Timothy4:4 Bazokufulathela iqiniso badlhemadlheme ngemva kweenolwana. 
2Timothy4:5 Kodwana wena zigobe ezintweni zoke, unyamazele ebunzimeni, wenze umsebenzi womvangeli, uphelelisele ukusebenza kwakho." 
2Timothy4:6 Mina-ke sengilungele ukuphalaka njengomhlabelo; isikhathi sami sokugoduka sesifikile. 
2Timothy4:7 Ngilwile ukulwa okuhle, ngiliqedile ibanga lami, ngilondile ukukholwa." 
2Timothy4:8 Kwanje sengibekelwe isihlohlo sokulunga iKosi emgwebi olungileko ezanginikela sona mhlokho; kungasingimi kwaphela kodwana nabo boke abalangazelela ukubonakala kwayo. 
2Timothy4:9 Yenza msinyana uze lapha uzongibona 
2Timothy4:10 ngombana uDemasi ngokuthanda zephasi lanamhlanje, ungitjhiyile waya eThesalonika; uKresikesi uye eGalatiya, uTitosi eDalimathiya." 
2Timothy4:11 NguLukasi kwaphela engihlezi naye. Uthathe uMarkosi uze naye lapha ngombana ulisizo emsebenzinami. 
2Timothy4:11 NguLukasi kwaphela engihlezi naye. Uthathe uMarkosi uze naye lapha ngombana ulisizo emsebenzinami. 
2Timothy4:12 UThirhikhu ngimthume e-Efesu. 
2Timothy4:13 Nawuzako, ungiphathele isambatho sami engasitjhiya kuKaripo eTrowasi. Yewungiphathele neencwadi zami, khulukhulu imisongo." 
2Timothy4:14 Kambe u-Alekzandra, umkhandi wedzila wangenzela phasi; iKosi iyombuyisela ngemisebenzakhe." 
2Timothy4:15 Umlemuke nawe ngombana wajamelana khulu namezwi wethu. 
2Timothy4:16 Akakho noyedwa owangisekelako mhlana ngiziphendulela kokuthoma ekundleni, kodwana boke bangisukela; kwanga lokho angeze kwabalelwa kibo." 
2Timothy4:17 Kodwana iKosi yaba nami yangipha amandla ukuze kumenyezelwe ngami umlayezo ngokupheleleko nabatjhili boke bawuzwe. Ngalokho ngephulwa emlonyeni webhubezi. 
2Timothy4:18 IKosi iyongihlenga ingikhuphe kikho koke okumbi, ingise embuswenayo wezulwini ngiphephile. Akube kiyo iphazimulo ngokungapheliko. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Ungilotjhisele kuPriska no-Akhwila kanye nendlu ka-Onesiforu. 
2Timothy4:20 U-Erastu wasala eKorinte, uTrofimu yena ngamtjhiya agula eMiletu." 
2Timothy4:21 Yeke phuthuma uze lapha ubusika bungakangeni! Bayakulotjhisa abo-Ebhulu noPudesi, uLinusi, uKlawudiya nabo boke abazalwana." 
2Timothy4:22 IKosi ayibe nommoyakho. Umusa weKosi ube nani noke! 
Titus1:1 UPowula ikhoboka lakaZimu nompostoli wakaJesu Krestu, ngebanga lokukholwa kwabakhethiweko bakaZimu nangokwazi iqiniso elimayelana nokwesaba uZimu," 
Titus1:2 ethembeni lepilo engapheliko uZimu ongaleyi amala akuthembisa koke kungakathomi; 
Titus1:3 kwathi ngesikhathi esifaneleko wembula ilizwi lakhe ngokumemezela engaphathiswa khona ngomyalo kaZimu uMsindisi wethu. 
Titus1:4 KuTitosi umntwanami wamambala ngokukholwa esikuhlanganyeleko soke. Akube kuwe umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba nakuKrestu Jesu uMsindisethu. 
Titus1:5 Ngakutjhiya eKrete ngehloso yokobana uhlele okuseleko ngokufaneleko, ukhethe abaphathi bebandla kiyo yoke imizi, njengombana ngakuyala:" 
Titus1:6 kube mumuntu ongasolekiko, onomfazi munye, onabantwana abakholwako nabangasoleki ngobukhohlakali nokungezwa;" 
Titus1:7 ngombana umbonisi njengomphathi weendaba zakaZimu kufanele angasoleki, angazigqaji, angapheli ihliziyo, angabi sidakwa, angabi ngosisilwi nomarhamaru;" 
Titus1:8 kunalokho kufanele abe ngophatha kuhle abayeni, othanda okulungileko, oziphethe kuhle, oqotho, ohlanzekileko nozikhalimako." 
Titus1:9 Kufanele akakarele aqinise elizwini elithembekileko ngokwefundiso ukuze akwazi ukutjhumayela ngefundiso ehle, ahlule abaphikisana nayo," 
Titus1:10 njengombana babanengi abangalaleliko nabakhuluma ilize begodu ababaluthi, khulukhulu labo ekungebokusoka." 
Titus1:11 Kufuze bathuliswe ngombana badanisa imindeni ngokufundisa okungakafaneli ngebanga lenzuzo embi. 
Titus1:12 Omunye wabo ogade amphorofidi wekhabo wathi: “AmaKrete anamanga ngaso soke isikhathi, aziinlwana eziziinkhohlakali, aziinrhiribedeli ezimavila.”" 
Titus1:13 Ubufakazobo buliqiniso. Ngebangeli kumele ubakhalime msinyana, khona bazakuba nokukholwa okuthe tjha," 
Titus1:14 bangalaleli iinolwana zamaJuda namkha imiyalo yalabo abadela iqiniso. 
Titus1:15 Kwabahlanzekileko koke kuhlanzekile, kodwana akukho okuhlanzekileko kwabakhohlakeleko nabangakholwako ngombana iingqondo zabo nemikhumbulwabo vele yonakele." 
Titus1:16 Bazitjhaya sengathi bayamazi uZimu kodwana ngezenzo zabo bayamlandula. Bayanyenyisa, abezwa, abakalungeli ukwenza nanyana yini elungileko." 
Titus2:1 Kodwana nakunguwe, fundisa okukhambisana nesifundo esifaneleko." 
Titus2:2 Tjela amadoda amadala bona abe nesizotha, ahlonipheke, abe ngabhadlileko, azwisiseke ekukholweni okuphilileko, ethandweni nekunyamezeleni." 
Titus2:3 Ngokunjalo fundisa abafazi abadala bona baziphathe ngokuhlonipheka okuletha ukucwenga, bangabi ngabahlebako namkha amakhobokakazi wewayini, kodwana ababe ngabafundisa okuhle" 
Titus2:4 ukuze bakwazi ukukhuthaza abomalukazana ukuthanda amadodabo nabantwababo," 
Titus2:5 bazibambe, babe msulwa, baphathe kuhle imizabo, babe nesisa, bathobele abayeni babo ukuze ilizwi lakaZimu lingarhubutjhwa." 
Titus2:6 Ngokunjalo khuthaza amasokana bona azibambe. 
Titus2:7 Wena-ke zibonakalise kikho koke usibonelo semisebenzi emihle; ekufundiseni kwakho ubonise ubuqotho nokuncama," 
Titus2:8 ube nekulumo ephilileko engeze yasoleka ukuze kuthi nanyana ngubani omjamelani adane kungabi nalitho elimbi angalitjho ngathi. 
Titus2:9 Fundisa iinceku kobona zithobele abanikazi, zibenzele okubathokozisako kikho koke, zingaphikisani nabo," 
Titus2:10 zingabebeli kodwana zikhombise ukuthembeka okupheleleko ukuze kuthi ezintweni zoke zihlobise ifundiso kaZimu uMsindisi wethu. 
Titus2:11 Umusa kaZimu ubonakalisiwe ukuletha isindiso kibo boke. 
Titus2:12 Usifundisa bona sihloboke ubumbi neenkanuko zephasi, siphile ngokuziphatha kuhle, ngokulunga nangokwesaba uZimu esikhathini sanamhlanje." 
Titus2:13 Iye, lokho sikwenze nasilokhu sisalindele ithemba elibusisiweko nokwambulwa kwephazimulo kaZimethu omkhulu noMsindisi wethu uJesu Krestu," 
Titus2:14 owazinikela ngebanga lethu ukuze asihlenge ekukhohlakaleni koke, azihlambululele abantu bakhe abatjhisekela imisebenzi emihle." 
Titus2:15 Fundisa izintwezo; ukhuthaze bewukhalime ngegunya loke. Akungabikhona namunye okunyazako. 
Titus3:1 Bakhumbuze bona bathobele ababusi neemphathimandla, babe ngabalalelako bebazimisele emisebenzini yoke emihle," 
Titus3:2 bangakhulumi kumbi nanyana kubani; bangabi zizilwi kodwana babe ngabathobekileko, bakhombise ukuba nommoya ophasi komunye nomunye." 
Titus3:3 Nathi ngokwethu khesaba ziindlhayela, saba mahlongandlebe, sadukiswa, saba makhoboka wemihlobohlobo yeenkanuko nokuzithokozisa. Saphila ebumbini nemoneni, sahloywa nathi sahloya abanye." 
Titus3:4 Kodwana lokha ukulunga nethando lakaZimu uMsindisethu nalibonakaliswako," 
Titus3:5 wasisindisa, ingasi ngebanga lemisebenzi yokulunga esiyenzileko, kodwana ngebanga lomusa wakhe, ngokuhlanjwa kokuzalwa butjha nokuvuselelwa ngoMoya oCwengileko," 
Titus3:6 othelwe phezu kwethu ngobunengi ngoJesu Krestu uMsindisi wethu 
Titus3:7 ukuze kuthi sesilungisisiwe ngomusa wakhe, sibe ziindlalifa ngokwethemba lokuphila okungapheliko." 
Titus3:8 Liqinisile ilizwi leli. Ngithanda bona ugandelele ezintweni lezi khona kuzakuthi labo abakholwa kuZimu bayelele ukuzinikela ekwenzeni imisebenzi emihle. Izinto lezo zihle begodu zilisizo kibo boke. 
Titus3:9 Kodwana gegeda iimpikiswano zobudlhayela, imilando yokubelethana kanye nokusolana ngomthetho ngombana lokho akusizi begodu kulilize." 
Titus3:10 Umuntu obanga ukuhlukana emva kobana sele elulekwe kanye namkha kabili umale 
Titus3:11 ngombana uyazi bona onjalo uphambukile, wonakele sele azigwebe yena." 
Titus3:12 Lokha nangithumela kuwe u-Arithema namkha uThikiku, yiza msinyana kimi eNikhopholi ngombana ngizimisele ukudlela ubusika lapho." 
Titus3:13 Linga ngamandlakho woke uthumele umjameli uZena no-Apholo utjheje bona bangatlhogi ilitho endleleni. 
Titus3:14 Abantu bethu kufanele bafunde ukuzinikela ekwenzeni imisebenzi emihle, khona bazakwazi ukusiza lapho kuhlongeka khona, bangabi ngabanganazo iinthelo." 
Titus3:15 Boke abanami lapha bayakulotjhisa. Lotjhisa abasithandako ekukholweni. Umusa awube nani noke. 
Philemon1:1 UPowula osibotjhwa sakaKrestu Jesu noThimothi umzalwana wethu, kuFilimoni isinini sethu esithandekako nosisebenzi kanye nathi;" 
Philemon1:2 kudade u-Aphiya, ku-Arirhiphusi olibutho kanye nathi kanye nebandleni elingendlinakho:" 
Philemon1:3 Akube kini umusa nokuthula okuvela kuZimu uBaba neKosini uJesu Krestu. 
Philemon1:4 Ngithokoza uZimu ngeenkhathi zoke lokha nangikukhumbula emithandazwenami 
Philemon1:5 ngombana ngiyezwa ngethando lakho nokukholwa onakho eKosini uJesu nakibo boke abacwengileko. 
Philemon1:6 Ngithandaza bona ubudlelwano bakho ekukholweni bube nepumelelo, ube nokuzwisisa okupheleleko ezintweni zoke esinazo kuKrestu." 
Philemon1:7 Ithando lakho lingilethele ithabo elimangazako nokukhuthazeka ngombana iinhliziyo zabacwengileko zivuselelekile ngawe, mzalwana." 
Philemon1:8 Ngalokho, nanyana nginesibindi kuKrestu sokukuyala bona wenze okufaneleko," 
Philemon1:9 nokho ngebanga lethando ngiyakuncenga. Nje-ke mina Powula njengomuntu osele amdala nosibotjhwa sakaKrestu Jesu njenganje," 
Philemon1:10 ngikubawa ngo-Onesimu indodanami engibe nguyise ngesikhathi sokubotjhwa kwami: 
Philemon1:11 Ngaphambilini gade angasilo isizo kuwe, kodwana manjesi sele alisizo kimi nakuwe." 
Philemon1:12 Nje-ke ngimthumela bona abuyele kuwe njengomuntu oyihliziywami. 
Philemon1:13 Bengithanda bona ahlale nami kobana angisize esikhundleni sakho ngesikhathi ngisesesibotjhwa ngebanga levangeli. 
Philemon1:14 Kodwana angithandi ukwenza ilitho ngaphandle kwemvumo yakho ukuze izenzo zakho ezihle zibe ngezokuzithandela kungabi yinto yokwenziswa. 
Philemon1:15 Mhlamunye kungebangelo ahlukana nawe isikhatjhana khona azakubuyiselwa kuwe unomphela," 
Philemon1:16 angaseselikhoboka kodwana sele angaphezu kwekhoboka, amfowethu othandeka khulukhulu kimi, alo, kangangani-ke kuwe enyameni neKosini." 
Philemon1:17 Nje-ke nangabe ungithatha njengomhlanganyeli nawe, mamukele njengombana bewuzakwamukela mina." 
Philemon1:18 Nangabe kukhona akone ngakho, namkha akubamba khona, kubalele kimi lokho." 
Philemon1:19 Iye, mina Powula, ngitlola ngesandla sami, ngithi: Ngizakuhlawula lokho! Bengingakathandi ukukukhumbuza bona wena ngokwakho ungibamba ubuwena." 
Philemon1:20 Iye mfowethu, ngenzela isisa ngebanga leKosi, uvuselele ihliziywami kuKrestu." 
Philemon1:21 Nginethemba ngokulalela kwakho, ngikutlolela lokhu ngisazi bona uzakwenza ngokungaphezu kwalokho engikubawako." 
Philemon1:22 Okhunye godu nakhu: Ngilungiselani ilawu labayeni ngombana nginethemba bona ngemithandazo yenu ngizakubuyiselwa kini. 
Philemon1:23 U-Ephafrasi obotjhwe nami ngebanga lakaKrestu Jesu, uyanilotjhisa," 
Philemon1:24 ngokunjalo noMarkosi, u-Aristarirhusi, uDemasi noLukasi ababalingani bami." 
Philemon1:24 ngokunjalo noMarkosi, u-Aristarirhusi, uDemasi noLukasi ababalingani bami." 
Philemon1:25 Sengathi umusa weKosi uJesu Krestu ungaba nani noke. 
Hebrews1:1 UZimu wakhuluma ekadeni kibokhokho bethu ngabaphorofidi ngeenkhathi ezinengi nangeendlela ezahlukahlukeneko," 
Hebrews1:2 kodwana ngemihla yokuphela le ukhulume nathi ngeNdodana ayibeke bona ibe yindlalifa yezinto zoke, yona abumba ngayo izulu nephasi." 
Hebrews1:3 Yona isibonakaliso sephazimulo kaZimu nomfuziselo wamambala wobuyena bakhe; iphethe izinto zoke ngelizwi layo elinamandla. Lapho sele ikwenzile ukuhlanjululwa kwezono, yahlala ngesigomeni sakaSomandla ezulwini." 
Hebrews1:4 Nje-ke yaba yikulu khulu kuneengilozi njengombana nebizo elizuzileko lilikhulu kunelazo 
Hebrews1:5 ngombana ngiyiphi yeengilozi uZimu akhe atjho kiyo athi: “Wena uyiNdodanami, namhlanje ngikubelethile,” namkha athi: “Ngizakuba nguYise yona izakuba yiNdodanami.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Godu kwathi lokha uZimu nakaletha izibulo lakhe ephasinapha, wathi: “Zoke iingilozi zakaZimu azililotjhe.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Nakakhuluma ngeengilozi, uthi: “Wenza iingilozi zakhe imimoya, iinsebenzi zakhe zibe malangabi womlilo.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Kodwana ngeNdodana uthi: “Isihlalo sakho, Zimu, ngesanini nanini nokulunga kuzakuba yintonga yobukhosi bakho." 
Hebrews1:9 Uthande ukulunga, wazonda ikohlakalo. Ngalokho-ke Zimu, uZimakho ukuzese ngamafutha wethabo ngaphezu kwabalingani bakho.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Godu uthi: “Somnini, ekuthomeni wabeka iinsekelo zephasi namazulu amsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Hebrews1:11 Zona izintwezo zizakubhubha, kodwana wena ujamile. Iye, zoke zizakuphela njengengubo;" 
Hebrews1:12 uzazibhinca njengesambatho, zitjhuguluke njengengubo. Kodwana wena uzakuhlala unjalo neminyakakho angeze yaphela.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Kodwana ngiyiphi yeengilozi akhe atjho kiyo athi: “Hlala ngesigomeni sami, kufikela lapha ngenza khona amanabakho abe sinabelo seenyawo zakho” na?" 
Hebrews1:14 “Kanti iingilozi azisiyo yoke imimoya elotjhako nethunyelwe bona isize labo abazokuzuza isindiso na?” 
Hebrews2:1 Nje-ke kufuze siyelele khulu ngalokho esikuzwileko ukuze singatjhidi kikho. 
Hebrews2:2 Nakube ilizwi elakhulunywa ngeengilozi laqiniseka nokobana esinye nesinye isiphambeko nokungalaleli kwamukela isibetho esifaneleko," 
Hebrews2:3 alo, thina sizakuphunyurha njani nasithembela isindiso ekulu kangaka na? Iye, isindiso eyathoma yamenyezelwa yiKosi, yaqiniswa kithi ngilabo abayizwako." 
Hebrews2:4 NoSomnini wafakazela isindiso leyo ngamatshwayo, ngeemangaliso nangemikarisomraro ehlukahlukeneko kanye nangezipho zakaMoya oCwengileko ezabiwe ngokwentando yakhe." 
Hebrews2:5 UZimu azange abeke iphasi elizako nesikhuluma ngalo leli eengilozini. 
Hebrews2:6 Kodwana omunye ufakazile endaweni ethileko wathi: “Uyini-ke obhubhako bona ungabe umkhumbule, bekayini wephasi bona ungabe umbeke abe mphathi na?" 
Hebrews2:7 Mbala umenze waba ngaphasana kweendalwa zezulu, wamthwesa ukuhlonitjhwa nobukhosi!" 
Hebrews2:8 Wamenza waba mphathi womsebenzi wezandla zakho; wabeka koke ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe.” Nje-ke ngokubeka koke ngaphasi komuntu, kutjho bona uZimu wanikela koke ngaphasi kwelawulo lomuntu. Nokho okwanje, asikaboni koke kungaphasi kwelawulo lomuntu." 
Hebrews2:9 Kodwana siyambona uJesu owenziwa waba mncani kuneengilozi kwesikhatjhana; njenganje sele athweswe isihlohlo esinephazimulo nedumo ngebanga lokubandezeleka kwakhe ngokufa. 
Hebrews2:10 Koke kukhona ngoZimu begodu kungokwakhe. Nje-ke lokha nakaqunta ukurholela inengi labantwana bakhe ephazimulwenakhe kwafaneleka bona enze umsindisi wabo abe ngopheleleko ngokuhlupheka. 
Hebrews2:11 Iye, ngombana loyo ocwengisako nalabo abacwengiswako bamndeni munye. Kungesizathweso uJesu angananhloni zokubabiza bonyana bafowabo," 
Hebrews2:12 asithi: “Nje-ke ngizakumemezela ibizo lakho kubafowethu, ngikudumise phakathi kwebandla lamakholwa.”"
