Hebrews2:13 Godu uthi: “Ngizokuthembela njalo kuZimu.” Abuye athi: “Nakhu lapha ngikhona nabantwana engabaphiwa nguZimu.” 
Hebrews2:14 Njengombana abantwana bahlanganyela inyama neengazi, naye ngokwakhe wahlanganyela khona lokho ukuze kuthi ngokufa kwakhe amchithe loyo ogade anamandla wokufa, okutjho uSathana." 
Hebrews2:15 Wenza lokho bona athukulule boke labo abathi ngesikhathi soke sokuphila kwabo babotjhelelwa ebukhobokeni ngebanga lokwesaba ukufa. 
Hebrews2:16 Kwamambala kuyakhanya bonyana akakezi ukuzokusiza iingilozi, kodwana iinzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Nje-ke kwamfanela ukuba njengabafowabo kikho koke, khona azakuba mphristi omkhulu onesirhawu nothembekileko emsebenzini kaZimu, abe yihlawulo yokubuyisana kwezono zabantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Njengombana naye ngokwakhe wazizinywa ngalokho ahlupheka ngakho, yeke unamandla wokusiza labo abazizinywako." 
Hebrews3:1 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana abacwengileko, enibahlanganyeli ekubizweni kwezulwini, bekani umkhumbulwenu kuJesu ongumPostoli nomPhristi omkhulu wesivumo sethu." 
Hebrews3:2 Wathembeka kiloyo owamkhethako wambeka njengoMosi owabegade anjalo kiyo yoke indlu kaZimu. 
Hebrews3:3 Nje-ke uJesu kufunyaneke bona ufanele idumo elikhulu kunoMosi; lokho kunjengombana umakhi wendlu anedumo elikhulu kunendlu ngokwayo. 
Hebrews3:4 Ngileyo naleyo indlu yakhiwe mumakhi wayo, kodwana uZimu umumakhi wakho koke okukhona." 
Hebrews3:5 UMosi bekathembeke njengenceku kiyo yoke indlu yakaZimu bekube bufakazi balokho ebekuzakukhulunywa ngakho esikhathini esizako. 
Hebrews3:6 UKrestu njengeNdodana bekathembekile endlini kaZimu. Thina-ke siyindlu yakhe nangabe sihlala njalo sibambelele ethembeni esizibuka ngalo. 
Hebrews3:7 Yeke, njengombana uMoya oCwengileko uthi: “Namhlanjesi nanizwa ilizwi lakhe," 
Hebrews3:8 ningaqinisi iinhliziyo zenu njengeMeriba nanjengelangeni lelo eMasa, erhalawumbeni," 
Hebrews3:9 lapha aboyihlomkhulu bangizizinya khona nanyana besele babone imisebenzami. 
Hebrews3:10 Iminyaka ematjhumi amane, isizukulwaneso sangikghabhudlha. Nje-ke ngathi, ‘Sibabantu abaphambene ngehliziyo neendlela zami asiziyeleli.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Ngalokho ngafunga elakeni lami ngathi, ‘Angeze bangene ekuphumuleni kwami.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Nje-ke bazalwana, tjhejani bona kungabikhona noyedwa wenu onehliziyo embi engakholwako ebangela bonyana ahlubuke kuZimu ophilako." 
Hebrews3:13 Kodwana khuthazanani imihla ngemihla, ije kusathiwa “namhlanje” ukuze kungabikhona namunye wenu oqinileko ngebanga lesono esikhohlisako" 
Hebrews3:14 ngombana sesibahlanganyeli noKrestu, nangabe kwaphela sibambelela ethembeni lethu bekube sekupheleni." 
Hebrews3:15 Njengombana kuthiwa: “Namhlanjesi nanizwa ilizwi lakhe, ningaqinisi iinhliziyo zenu njengeMeriba nanjengelangeni lelo eMasa.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Bobani labo abezwa bebamhlubuka na? Angithi ngilabo boke abakhutjhwa nguMosi eGibhide na? 
Hebrews3:17 Bobani labo abathukuthelela iminyaka ematjhumi amane na? Angithi ngilabo abonako, iindumbu zabo zaradlhwa erhalawumbeni?" 
Hebrews3:18 Wafunga kibobani bona angeze bangena ekuphumuleni kwakhe, nakungasi ngilabo ebebanganandlebe na?" 
Hebrews3:19 Nje-ke sesiyabona bonyana bahluleka ukungena ngebanga lokungakholwa kwabo. 
Hebrews4:1 Yeke, njengombana isithembiso sokungena ekuphumuleni kwakhe sisesenjalo, asiyeleleni bonyana kungabikhona noyedwa wenu ozakufunyanwa abhalelwa kufikelela ekuphumuleni" 
Hebrews4:2 ngombana nathi satjhunyayezwa ivangeli njengabo. Kodwana ilizwi abalizwako akhange libasize ngombana akhange bakholwe labo ebegade balitjhumayela. 
Hebrews4:3 Nje-ke thina esikholwako siyangena ekuphumuleni njengombana yena uthe: “Ngafunga elakeni lami ngathi, ‘Angekhe bangena ekuphumuleni kwami.’ ” Wakutjho lokhu nanyana umsebenzakhe besele uphelelisiwe kwasekusekelweni kwephasi." 
Hebrews4:4 Kwenye indawo emitlolweni mayelana nelanga lekhomba kwathiwa: “Ngelanga lekhomba, waphumula kiwo woke umsebenzakhe.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Kubuye kuthiwe: “Angekhe bangena enarheni leyo, inarha ebebayophumula kiyo.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Kusabasalele abanye kobana bangene ekuphumuleni nalabo abatjhunyayelwa qangi ivangeli abangazange bangene ngebanga lokungalaleli. 
Hebrews4:7 Yeke usabeke elinye ilanga, ekuthiwa ngalo “namhlanje” okwathi ngemva kwesikhathi eside wakhuluma ngoDavida, njengombana besele kukhulunyiwe kwathiwa: “Namhlanje, nanizwa ilizwi lakhe, ningazenzi zibe likhuni iinhliziyo zenu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Iye, ngathana uJotjhuwa wabanikela ukuphumula, uZimu ubengekhe akhuluma muva ngelinye ilanga." 
Hebrews4:9 Nje-ke kusabasalele abantu bakaZimu ukuphumula kweSabatha 
Hebrews4:10 ngombana loyo osuke angene ekuphumuleni kwakaZimu, uyaphumula godu nemisebenzinakhe njengoZimu aphumula kweyakhe." 
Hebrews4:11 Nje-ke asikhuthaleleni ukungena ekuphumulenokho ukuze kungabikhona namunye kithi owako ngokulandela isibonelo sokungalaleli kwabo. 
Hebrews4:12 Mbala ilizwi lakaZimu liphilile, linamandla, libukhali kunesabula esika mahlangothi womabili. Lihlaba lingene beliyofika ehlanganweni yomphefumulo nommoya, amalungu nommongo; likwazi ukuhlukanisa imicabango nemizindlo yehliziyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Akukho nokukodwa okubunjiweko okusithekileko phambi kwakaZimu. Koke kwambuliwe phambi kobuso bakhe, kusemtarini emehlweni waloyo esizaziphendulela kuye." 
Hebrews4:14 Njengombana sinomphristi omkhulu owadabula amazulu, uJesu iNdodana kaZimu, asibambeleleni siqine ekukholweni kwethu esikuvumako" 
Hebrews4:15 ngombana asinaye umphristi omkhulu ongakwazi ukuzwelana nobuthakathaka bethu, kodwana ozizinywe ngeendlela zoke njengathi." 
Hebrews4:16 Ngalokho-ke asitjhidele ngesibindi esihlalweni somusa, khona sizakwamukeliswa isirhawu, sizuze umusa, sisizeke ngesikhathi esifaneleko." 
Hebrews5:1 Ngiloyo naloyo umphristi omkhulu okhethwe hlangana nabantu ubekelwe bona abajamele kuZimu, ukunikela iminikelo nemihlabelo yezono." 
Hebrews5:2 Uyakwazi ukunyamezelela ngesisa labo abanganalwazi nabaphambukako njengombana naye ngokwakhe uyabazi ubuthakathaka; 
Hebrews5:3 kungalokho kufanele bona anikele umhlabelo ngenca yezono zakhe nangenca yezono zabantu. 
Hebrews5:4 Akakho ozikhethela ukuba sesikhundlenesi, kodwana uba kiso ngokubizwa nguZimu njengo-Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Ngokunjalo noKrestu azange azinikele idumo ngokuba muphristi omkhulu kodwana waphakanyiswa ngiloyo owathi kuye: “Wena uyiNdodanami, namhlanje ngikubelethile,”" 
Hebrews5:6 njengombana atjho kwenye indawo wathi: “Wena umphristi ngokungapheliko ngokwendlela yakaMalkitsedekhi.” 
Hebrews5:7 Ngesikhathi uJesu asesephasinapha bephele enze imithandazo nokubawela abanye ngesililo esikhulu nangeenyembezi kiloyo ogade anamandla wokumsindisa ekufeni. Begodu bekalalelwa ngombana bekazinikela ngokuzithoba. 
Hebrews5:8 Sengitjho nanyana bekayiNdodana, wafunda ukulalela ngalokho ahlupheka ngakho" 
Hebrews5:9 begodu nalapho sele aphelelisiwe, waba mthombo wesindiso wabo boke abamlalelako," 
Hebrews5:10 bewabekwa nguZimu bona abe mphristi omkhulu ngokwendlela yakaMalkitsedekhi. 
Hebrews5:11 Kusesenokunengi esingakutjho mayelana nalokhu, kodwana kulikhuni ukunihlathululela ngombana nithathela kude ukuzwa." 
Hebrews5:12 Nanyana ngesikhathesi bekufanele ngathana senibafundisi, kodwana nisadinga omunye ozokubuya anifundise godu, anitatayise anithomise phasi kancani eemfundisweni zelizwi lakaZimu. Nisadinga ibisi kunokudla okuqinileko." 
Hebrews5:13 Loyo omunyako usuka asesemntwana, nje-ke akakalemuki ilizwi lokulunga." 
Hebrews5:14 Kodwana ukudla okuqinileko kungokwabakhulileko, asebajayele ukusebenzisa umkhumbulwabo, iye, labo asebanakho ukuhlukanisa okuhle nokumbi." 
Hebrews6:1 Nje-ke asilise iimfundiso zokuthoma ngoKrestu siragele phambili kokuvuthiweko; singabuyi sithome phasi sibeke isisekelo: ngokuphenduka emisebenzini efileko nokukholwa kuZimu," 
Hebrews6:2 isifundiso ngokubhajadiswa, ngokubekwa izandla, ngokuvuka kwabafileko nangokugwetjwa isiphelani." 
Hebrews6:3 Sizakwenza lokho uZimu nakavumako. 
Hebrews6:4 Kulikhuni ukubuya baphenduke labo abakhe bakhanyiselwa, banandipha isiphiwo sezulwini, badlelana noMoya oCwengileko," 
Hebrews6:5 banandipha ubumnandi belizwi lakaZimu namandla wephasi elitjha elizako," 
Hebrews6:6 nasele khebahlubuka kulikhuni ukubaphendula ngombana ngokuhlubuka kwabo babuye godu bayibethele esiphambanweni iNdodana kaZimu bayithela ngehlazo epepeneneni. 
Hebrews6:7 Ihlabathi emunya amanzi aphele ayinele nemilisa iintjalo ezilisizo kilabo abayilimileko, ibusiswa nguZimu." 
Hebrews6:8 Kodwana nangabe kumila kiyo ameva nekhula, ayinamsebenzi walitho begodu isengozini yokobana inikelelwe nguZimu nesiphelo sayo kutjhiswa ngomlilo." 
Hebrews6:9 Nanyana sikhuluma nje bathandekako, sineqiniso lezinto ezingcono mayelana nani, iye, izinto eziphathelene nokusindiswa." 
Hebrews6:10 UZimu akasuye ongakalungi, angekhe alibale umsebenzi eniwubonakalisileko ngebanga lakhe nisiza abacwengileko njengombana nenza nanjesi." 
Hebrews6:11 Sikhanuka bona omunye nomunye wenu abonakalise ukukhuthala okunjalo ukuze niqinisekise ithemba lenu bekube sekupheleni; 
Hebrews6:12 ningadondi, kodwana nilingise labo abathi ngokukholwa nangokunyamezela bazuza ilifa lesithembiso." 
Hebrews6:13 Lokha uZimu athembisa u-Abrahamu, wazifunga ngaye ngombana kungekho omkhulu kunaye angamfunga," 
Hebrews6:14 wathi: “Kwamambala ngizokubusisa nokukubusisa, ngikwandise khulu.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Ngokunjalo u-Abrahamu ngokunyamezela wazuza isithembiso. 
Hebrews6:16 Kanengi abantu bafunga ngaloyo omkhulu kunabo nesifungo esiqinisa okukhulunyiweko siqeda koke ukuphikisana. 
Hebrews6:17 Ngebanga lokobana uZimu wathanda khulu bona kubakhanyele kamhlophe labo abaziindlalifa zesithembiso, ukungaphenduki kobujamo behloswakhe wabuqinisa ngesifungo." 
Hebrews6:18 Wakwenza lokhu ukuze ngezinto ezimbili lezo ezingaphendukiko angekhe kwenzeke bona aleye amala; kuthi thina esiphephele kuye sikhuthale ngamandla sibambelele ethembeni elibekwe phambi kwethu. 
Hebrews6:19 Iye, ithembeli sinalo, liliqiniso nobudzimelelo bomphefumulo, kulithemba elingena endaweni ecwenge khulu ngemva kwetjhila lesisitho," 
Hebrews6:20 lapha uJesu owasandulelako, waba sigijimi sokuthomo esangena lapho ngebanga lethu, sele aba mphristi ngokungapheliko ngokwendlela yakaMalkitsedekhi." 
Hebrews7:1 UMalkitsedekhi lo bekuyikosi yeSalema, amphristi wakaZimu ongoPhezulu. Nguye owahlangabeza u-Abrahamu lokha nakabuya ukuyokubulala amakhosi, bewambusisa;" 
Hebrews7:2 nje-ke u-Abrahamu wamabela kwetjhumi kwakho koke. Kokuthoma, ibizo lakhe litjho, “ikosi yokulunga”; nokuthi ikosi yeSalema okutjho, “ikosi yokuthula”." 
Hebrews7:3 Ubenganayise, angananina, anganamndeni, ngitjho namalanga wokuthoma namkha wokuphela kwepilo. UnjengeNdodana kaZimu, uhlala amphristi ngokungapheliko." 
Hebrews7:4 Akhese nibone-ke bonyana bekamkhulu kangangani: U-Abrahamu ukhokho wethu, wamabela okwetjhumi kwalokho akuthumbe epini." 
Hebrews7:5 Ngitjho nalabo abaziinzukulwana zakaLevi abamukela ubuphristi, banomyalo emthethweni wokuthatha kwetjhumi ebantwini, okutjho ebantwini bekhabo, iye, sengitjho nanyana abantu bekhababo baziinzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Kodwana lo obengabalwa esizukulwaneni sabo, wathatha kwetjhumi ku-Abrahamu bewambusisa loyo owamukela iinthembiso." 
Hebrews7:7 Angekhe kwaphikwa bona omncani ubusiswa ngomkhulu. 
Hebrews7:8 Lapha-ke abamukela kwetjhumi kubabantu abafako, kodwana lapho wamukelwa ngiloyo ofakazelwa bonyana uyaphila." 
Hebrews7:9 Kuhlekuhle kungathiwa noLevi owamukela kwetjhumi, wakhokha kwetjhumi ngenca ka-Abrahamu" 
Hebrews7:10 ngombana gade asese sedinini lakakhokho wakhe lokha nakahlangatjezwa nguMalkitsedekhi. 
Hebrews7:11 Nangabe ukupheleliswa kwafunyaneka ngobuphristi bakaLevi njengombana isizwe samukela umthetho ngaphasi kobuphristobu; bekusadingeke ngani-ke ukukhuluma ngobuphristi obunye obuvuka ngokwendlela kaMalkitsedekhi, kunalobo bendlela ka-Aroni na?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ngombana nangabe kukhona ukuphendulwa kobuphristi, khona-ke kuyafuneka bona kuphendulwe nomthetho." 
Hebrews7:13 Kodwana loyo okukhulunywa izintwezi ngaye, ungowesinye isizwe ekungazange khekube khona noyedwa kiso owakhe walotjha e-aldarini" 
Hebrews7:14 ngombana kuyaziwa bona iKosethu isizukulwana sakaJuda, begodu mayelana nesizweso uMosi akazange atjho ilitho ngobuphristi." 
Hebrews7:15 Nje-ke kusemtarini lokha nakuvuka omunye umphristi onjengoMalkitsedekhi," 
Hebrews7:16 iye, loyo obe mphristi ingasi ngokomyalo weenzukulwana zenyama kodwana ngamandla wepilo engabhubhiko." 
Hebrews7:17 Ngombana kufakazwa ngaye kuthiwa: “Wena umphristi ngokungapheliko ngokwendlela kaMalkitsedekhi.” 
Hebrews7:18 Umthetho omdala wenziwa ilize ngombana gade ubuthakathaka begodu ungasizi. 
Hebrews7:19 Njengombana umthetho ungazange uphelelise ilitho, ngakwelinye ihlangothi kunesingeniso sethemba elingcono ekungalo singatjhidela kuZimu." 
Hebrews7:20 Nokho ithembelo azange libe ngaphandle kwesifungo ngombana abanye ababekwa emsebenzini wobuphristi bangena kiwo ngaphandle kwesifungo," 
Hebrews7:21 kodwana lo waba mphristi ngaphandle kwesifungo ngebanga laloyo owathi kuye: “USomnini ufungile begodu angeze azisole, wathi, ‘Wena umphristi ngokungapheliko.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Ngebanga lalokho uJesu waba siqiniseko sesivumelwano esingcono. 
Hebrews7:23 Nje-ke abaphristabo baba banengi ngesibalo ngebanga lokobana bebaliywa kukufa bona baragele phambili ngomsebenzabo; 
Hebrews7:24 kodwana uJesu unobuphristi obungapheliko ngombana uphila isiphelani. 
Hebrews7:25 Ngalokho unamandla wokusindisa ngesikhathi soke labo abeza kuZimu ngaye ngombana uhlala njalo abancengela. 
Hebrews7:26 Nje-ke mbala kwasifanela thina bona sibe nomphristi omkhulu onje, ocwengileko, ongasolekiko, onganamphambo, owahlukaniswe kwabazizoni bewaphakanyiswa ngaphezu kwamazulu." 
Hebrews7:27 Ngokuhlukileko kunabanye abaphristi abakhulu, akadingi ukwenza imihlabelo ilanga nelanga, kokuthoma ngebanga lezono zakhe bese kube ngezono zabantu; yena wakwenza lokho kwaba kanye kibo boke mhlana anikela ukuphila kwakhe." 
Hebrews7:28 Umthetho ubeka abantu ababuthakathaka bona ibe baphristi abakhulu, kodwana ilizwi lesifungo eleza ngemva komthetho, lijamisa iNdodana eyenziwa opheleleko ngokungapheliko." 
Hebrews8:1 Ummongo walokho esikutjhoko ngilokhu: Sinomphristi omkhulu ohlezi ngesigomeni sesihlalo sobukhosi emazulwini," 
Hebrews8:2 usikhonzi endaweni ecwengileko netendeni lamambala elajanyiswa nguSomnini ingasi mumuntu. 
Hebrews8:3 Ngiloyo naloyo umphristi omkhulu ubekelwe bona anikele ngeminikelo nangemihlabelo. Nje-ke bekufanele bona naye umphristi wethu omkhulu abe nelitho azokunikela ngalo. 
Hebrews8:4 Ngathana bekusephasinapha bekangekhe abe mphristi ngombana bakhona abaphristi abanikela ngeminikelo ngokomthetho. 
Hebrews8:5 Bona balotjha endaweni emfanekiso nesithunzi salokho okusezulwini. Kungakho uMosi ngesikhathi azakwakha itende lesivumelwano, wayalwa kwathiwa: “Qinisekisa bonyana wenza koke lokhu ngomfanekiso owakhonjiswa wona entabeni.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Kodwana manjesi uJesu wamukela ukulotjha okusezingeni eliphezulu, begodu ngokudluleleko ungumlamuleli wesivumelwano esingcono nesisekelwe phezu kweenthembiso ezingcono." 
Hebrews8:7 Nangathana bekungekho okusolekako esivumelwaneni sokuthoma, kwamambala bekungekhe sisafuneka sesibili." 
Hebrews8:8 Kodwana uZimu uyasisola isizwe sakhe, nakasithi: “Qalani isikhathi siyeza, lapha ngizakwenza khona isivumelwano esitjha nendlu ka-Israyeli kanye neyakaJuda. Kutjho uSomnini." 
Hebrews8:9 Asizukufana nesivumelwano engasenza naboyise nangibabamba ngesandla kobana ngibakhuphe eGibhide ngombana bona bephula isivumelwano sami, lokha mina nangimphathi wabo. Kutjho uSomnini." 
Hebrews8:10 Nasi isivumelwano engizosenza nendlu ka-Israyeli ngemva kwesikhatheso. Kutjho uSomnini. Ngizakubeka umthethwami emikhumbulwenabo ngiwutlole eenhliziyweni zabo. Ngizakuba nguZimabo, bona babe babantu bami." 
Hebrews8:11 Umuntu angeze asafundisa omunye womphakathi namkha umfowabo athi, ‘Yazi uSomnini’ ngombana boke bazabe bangazi, ukusukela komncani ukuya komkhulu. Kutjho uSomnini." 
Hebrews8:12 Mbala ngizakucolela ubukhohlakali babo, ngingasakhumbula icala labo.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Ngokukhuluma athi, “isivumelwano esitjha”, wenze bonyana sokuthoma sibe ngesidala; nje-ke okudala nokulupheleko kuseduze nokunyamalala." 
Hebrews9:1 Nje-ke nesivumelwano sokuthoma besinemithetjhwana obekulotjhwa ngayo ngendaweni ecwengileko. 
Hebrews9:2 Kwakhiwa itende lokuhlanganela; ngaphakathi kwendawo yalo yokuthoma bekunelithi leembani, itafula nezikwa ezibekwa phambi kwakaZimu, leyo bekuyindawo ecwenge khulu." 
Hebrews9:3 Ngemva kwerharideni lesibili bekukhona indawo okuthiwa yindawo ecwenge khulu. 
Hebrews9:4 Ngaphakathi kwayo bekukhona i-aldari legolide lokutjhisela itjhwalo nomfaji wesivumelwano otshidzwe woke ngegolide. Ngaphakathi kwawo bekubulungwe umjeka ophethe imana, intonga ka-Aroni eyakhe yahluma amakari nomqebethu wesivumelwano." 
Hebrews9:5 Ngaphezu komfaji bekunamakerubhi wephazimulo engamele isihlalo somusa. Okwanje asikwazi ukukhuluma ngokugcweleko ngezintwezi. 
Hebrews9:6 Ngokunjalo, lokha koke sele kuhlelekile ngendlela le, abaphristi bangena njalonjalo ngengcenyeni yokuthoma yetende lokuhlanganela bona benze umsebenzabo wokulotjha." 
Hebrews9:7 Kodwana engcenyeni yesibili kungena kwaphela umphristi omkhulu kanye ngomnyaka; akangeni ngaphandle kokuthatha iingazi anikela ngazo mayelana naye nangenca yezono ezenziwe babantu ngephoso. 
Hebrews9:8 Ngalokhu uMoya oCwengileko utjengisa bona indlela yokungena endaweni ecwenge khulu ayikavuleki, mlunga ingcenye yokuthoma yetende isajamile." 
Hebrews9:9 Lokho kumfanekiso wesikhathesi, ekutjengiswa ngakho bona iminikelo nemihlabelo enikelweko azange iphelelise isazelo somlotjhi." 
Hebrews9:10 Kodwana beyiphathelene nokudla nokusela kanye nemihlobohlobo yokuhlambuluka ekuziimiso ezimalungana nomzimba bekube sikhathi sehlelo elitjha. 
Hebrews9:11 UKrestu selafikile njengomphristi omkhulu wezinto ezihle esele zikhona, wangena ngetendeni elikhulu neliphelele ukudlula, elingakenziwa ngezandla okutjho elingasilo lalokhu okudaliweko." 
Hebrews9:12 Wangena kwaba kanye kwaphela endaweni ecwenge khulu, kungasi ngeengazi zeembuzi namathole, kodwana ngeengazi zakhe ngokwazo wasizuzela ukuhlengwa okungapheliko." 
Hebrews9:13 Iingazi zeembuzi nezeenkomo kanye nokufafazwa ngomlotha wethokazi elitjhisiweko kuhlambulula labo abasilaphazweko ukuze babe ngabahlwengileko ngokomzimba. 
Hebrews9:14 Khulu kangangani-ke iingazi zakaKrestu owazinikela ngokwakhe kuZimu ngoMoya oCwengileko wesiphelani anganamphambo, zizakuhlanza isazelo sethu emisebenzini efileko ukuze silotjhe uZimu ophilako." 
Hebrews9:15 Ngalokho uKrestu umlamuleli wesivumelwano esitjha ukuze kuthi labo ababiziweko bamukele isithembiso selifa elingapheliko. Nje-ke ukufa kwakhe kwenzeke ukuze abahlenge eemphambekweni zesivumelwano sokuthoma. 
Hebrews9:16 Lapha kunencwadi yelifa, kufanele kube khona ubufakazi bokufa kwaloyo owayitlolako" 
Hebrews9:17 ngombana incwadi yelifa isebenza kwaphela nasele kubhujiwe ngebanga lokobana ayisebenzi nakube loyo owayitlolako usaphila. 
Hebrews9:18 Kungalokho nesivumelwano sokuthoma singazange sajanyiswa kungakaphalazwa iingazi. 
Hebrews9:19 UMosi sele amemezele woke umyalo womthetho ebantwini boke, wathatha iingazi zamathole neembuzi, amanzi, uboya obububende nehisopi wafafaza umsongo wencwadi ngokwawo nabantu boke," 
Hebrews9:20 asithi: “Qalani, lezi ziingazi zesivumelwano uZimu anijamisele sona.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Ngokunjalo uMosi wafafaza iingazi etendeni lokuhlanganela nakizo zoke izinto ezisetjenziswa kilo. 
Hebrews9:22 Ukuya ngokomthetho pheze zoke izinto zihlanjululwa ngeengazi, ngaphandle kokuphalaka kweengazi akukho ukulitjalelwa kwezono." 
Hebrews9:23 Ngokunjalo bekufanele bona imifanekiso yezinto zezulwini ihlanjululwe ngalokho. Kodwana izinto zezulwini zifuna imihlabelo engcono kunaleya 
Hebrews9:24 ngombana uKrestu azange angene endaweni ecwengileko eyakhiwe ngezandla zabantu emfanekiso nje waleyo ekungiyo, kodwana wangena ezulwini ngokwalo, khona azasijamela phambi kwakaZimu." 
Hebrews9:25 Yena azange azinikele kanenginengi njengomphristi omkhulu lokha nakangena endaweni ecwengileko iminyaka ngeminyaka neengazi ezingasizo zakhe. 
Hebrews9:26 Ngathana bekunjalo bekufanele ahlupheke kanenginengi kusukela ekusekelweni kwephasi. Kodwana ubonakaliswe kanye kwaphela ekupheleni kwesikhathi bona asuse izono ngokuzinikela kwakhe. 
Hebrews9:27 Njengombana kujanyisiwe bona abantu bafe kanye, emva kwalokho kube kugwetjwa," 
Hebrews9:28 nje-ke noKrestu sele anikelwe kanye kobana athwale izono zabanengi, uzakubuye abonakale kwesibili, angakezi bonyana uzokuthwala isono kodwana ukusindisa labo abamlindeleko." 
Hebrews10:1 Njengombana umthetho unesithunzi sezinto ezihle ezizako, ungasibo ubujamo bamambala bazo izintwezo, angeze ngayo leyo mihlabelo enikelwa mlibe qobe mnyaka ilungisise labo abatjhidelako." 
Hebrews10:2 Nangathana bekungasinjalo, beyingeze yaliswa bona ingasanikelwa na? Lokho kutjho bona abalotjhi bebazobe bahlanjululwe kwaba kanye bangasenaso isazelo sesono." 
Hebrews10:3 Kodwana kunalokho imihlabelo leyo isikhumbuzo sesono umnyaka nomnyaka 
Hebrews10:4 ngombana akwenzeki bona iingazi zeenkunzi nezeembuzi zisuse izono. 
Hebrews10:5 Ngesizathweso uKrestu nakafika ephasinapha wathi: “Imihlabelo neminikelo yeenthoro awuyithokozeli; kodwana ungilungisele umzimba; 
Hebrews10:6 iye, imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyehlambululo awuyibizi." 
Hebrews10:7 Nje-ke ngithe, ‘Qala, ngizile njengombana ngitlolelwe njalo emsongweni. Ngiyathanda ukwenza intandwakho Zimami.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Kokuthoma uthe: “Imihlabelo neminikelo, iye, iminikelo yokutjhiswa neyesono azange uyibize namkha uthokoze ngayo.” Yona inikelwa ngokuya ngokomthetho." 
Hebrews10:9 Godu uthe: “Qala ngize bona ngizokwenza intando yakho.” Ususe kokuthoma kobana ajamise kwesibili. 
Hebrews10:10 Kungentando yakhe leyo sicwengisiwe kwaba kanye ngomnikelo womzimba kaJesu Krestu. 
Hebrews10:11 Ngiloyo naloyo umphristi ujama emsebenzinakhe ilanga nelanga, anikela kanenginengi yona iminikelo leyo engasoze yasusa izono." 
Hebrews10:12 Kodwana uKrestu sele anikele kwaba kanye ngomhlabelo owodwa ngebanga lezono, wahlala ngesidleni sakaZimu." 
Hebrews10:13 Kusukela kwangesikhatheso ulindele izitha zakhe bonyana zenziwe sinabelo seenyawo zakhe 
Hebrews10:14 ngombana ngomhlabelo owodwa uphelelise boke abahlanjululweko. 
Hebrews10:15 Godu uMoya oCwengileko ufakaza kithi ngalokho; kokuthoma uthi: 
Hebrews10:16 “Nasi isivumelwano engizasenza nabo ngemva kwesikhatheso; ngizakubeka umthethwami emikhumbulwenabo, ngiwutlole eenhliziyweni zabo. Kutjho uSomnini.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Godu ungezelela ngokuthi: “Mbala ngizakucolela ubukhohlakali babo, ngingasakhumbula icala labo.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Lapha kunokulitjalelwa kwalokho, akusekho umhlabelo wesono." 
Hebrews10:19 Ngalokho bazalwana, njengombana sinesiqiniseko sokungangena endaweni ecwengileko ngeengazi zakaJesu," 
Hebrews10:20 ngendlela etja nephilako asivulela yona ngetjhila elisithileko okutjho ngenyama yakhe," 
Hebrews10:21 begodu njengombana sinomphristi omkhulu wendlu kaZimu," 
Hebrews10:22 asibandameleni ngehliziyo eqinisileko, ngethemba elipheleleko lokukholwa; iinhliziyo zethu zifafaziwe esazelweni esimbi nemizimba yethu ihlanzwe ngamanzi ahlanzekileko." 
Hebrews10:23 Nje-ke asibambisiseni ethembeni lokukholwa kwethu esikuvumako ngaphandle kokuzaza ngombana uthembekile loyo othembisileko. 
Hebrews10:24 Asitjhejeni bona singakhuthazana njani ethandweni nemisebenzini emihle; 
Hebrews10:25 singakudeli ukuhlangana njengombana kunjalo kwabanye; kodwana asikhuthazaneni omunye nomunye, khulukhulu njengombana nibona bonyana ilanga selitjhidele." 
Hebrews10:26 Nakube siyakhunyalala siraga ngokona emva kokobana sesamukele ukwazi kweqiniso, awusekho umhlabelo wokuhlawulela izono," 
Hebrews10:27 kwaphela ukulindela ukugwetjwa okusabekako nobukhali bomlilo obuzakuqothula amaphikakani. 
Hebrews10:28 Odelela umthetho kaMosi uzakufa ngaphandle kokurhawukelwa ngabofakazi ababili namkha abathathu. 
Hebrews10:29 Alo, ucabanga bona uzakuhlunguphazwa kangangani loyo oqalela phasi iNdodana kaZimu, athi iingazi zesivumelwano ezimcwengisako zisilaphele abuye ahlambalaze noMoya womusa na?" 
Hebrews10:30 Ngombana siyamazi loyo owathi: “Ukubuyiselela kungokwami; ngimi ozakubuyisela.” Wabuye wathi: “USomnini uzakugweba isizwe sakhe.” 
Hebrews10:31 Kuyinto esabekako ukuwela esandleni sakaZimu ophilako. 
Hebrews10:32 Khumbulani amalanga waphambilini, ekwathi senikhanyiselwe, naqinisela ebunzimeni obukhulu beenhlupheko." 
Hebrews10:33 Ngesinye isikhathi vane phele kubukiswe ngani emtarini nibandezelekile; kesinye isikhathi nibahlanganyeli nalabo abaphathwa njalo. 
Hebrews10:34 Nazwelana nalabo ababotjhiweko; nakhonapho navuma ukumukwa ipahla yenu ngokwazi bona nina ninepahla engcono ehlala unomphelo. 
Hebrews10:35 Nje-ke ningaphelelwa lithemba lenu, linomvuzo omkhulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Nidinga ukunyamezela khona kuzakuthi senenze intando kaZimu, namukele isithembiso:" 
Hebrews10:37 Ngombana sekusikhatjhana esifitjhani, “ozako uyeza, angekhe ariyade." 
Hebrews10:38 Olungileko wami uzakuphila ngokukholwa; kodwana nangabe uhlehlela emuva; umphefumulwami awuzukuthokoza ngaye.” 
Hebrews10:39 Kodwana thina asisibo abahlehlela emuva babhujiswe, kodwana sihlangana nalabo abakholwako basindiswe." 
Hebrews11:1 Nje-ke ukukholwa kukuqiniseka ngezinto esinethemba ngazo, kuliqiniso ngalokho esingakuboniko." 
Hebrews11:2 Ngakho abokhokho bamukela ubufakazi obuhle. 
Hebrews11:3 Iye, ngokukholwa sizwisisa bona iphasi labunjwa ngelizwi lakaZimu, nokobana lokho okubonwako kwabunjwa ngezinto ezingabonwako." 
Hebrews11:4 Ngokukholwa u-Abela wanikela kuZimu ngomhlabelo owamukelekako ukudlula wakaKayini. Ngalokho wafakazelwa bona ulungile noZimu ngokwakhe wafakaza ngokwamukela iminikelo yakhe; yeke ngokukholwa usakhuluma nanyana aselafa. 
Hebrews11:5 Ngokukholwa u-Inogo wenyuswa ukuze angaboni ukufa. Akazange asabonwa ngombana uZimu gade asele amthethe. Nje-ke ufakazelwa bonyana angakathathwa bekathokozise uZimu. 
Hebrews11:6 Kodwana ngaphandle kokukholwa akwenzeki ukumthokozisa uZimu ngombana loyo otjhidela kuZimu kufanele akholwe bona ukhona nokobanyana uyabavuza labo abamfunako. 
Hebrews11:7 Ngokukholwa uNowa asele ayeleliswe nguZimu mayelana nesehlakalo ebe singakabonakali, wamukela isiyeleliso wakha umkhumbi ukuze asindise indlu yakhe. Ngalokho wenza iphasi libe nomlandu, wabe waba yindlalifa yokulunga ngokukholwa." 
Hebrews11:8 Ngokukholwa u-Abrahamu walalela lokha nakabizwako bona aphume aye endaweni ebe azoyamukeliswa njengelifa; nje-ke waphuma angazi lapha aya khona. 
Hebrews11:9 Ngokukholwa wahlala isikhatjhana enarheni yesithembiso njengomqhamuka: Aphila ematendeni njengombana kwenza u-Isaka noJakopo ebebaziindlalifa zesithembisweso kanye naye 
Hebrews11:10 ngombana bekalindele umuzi oneensekelo, umakhi nomenzi wawo kunguZimu." 
Hebrews11:11 Ngokukholwa u-Abrahamu wafumana amandla wokubeletha selaluphele nanyana uSara umkakhe bekayinyumba ngombana bekasazi bonyana wethembekile othembisako. 
Hebrews11:12 Ngalokho, ngomuntu munye nanyana besele kumlunga afile, kwabelethwa iinzukulwana ezinengi njengeenkwekwezi zezulu nanjengetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle engabalekiko." 
Hebrews11:13 Boke laba bafa basekukholweni bangazange bamukeliswe ebebakuthenjisiweko, kodwana bakubona bathokoza ngakho kusesekude nabo. Iye, bebavumile bona bamiqhamuka neenkhonzi ephasini." 
Hebrews11:14 Abantu abakhuluma ngendlela le, bayatjengisa bona bafuna iphasi elingelabo." 
Hebrews11:15 Nangathana bebahlala bakhumbula inarha abaphuma kiyo, bebazakuba nethuba lokubuyela emva." 
Hebrews11:16 Kunalokho bebakhanukela iphasi elingcono, okutjho lezulwini. Yeke uZimu akananhloni ukubizwa bona unguyisabo ngombana ubalungisele umuzi." 
Hebrews11:17 Ngokukholwa u-Abrahamu nakazizinywako, wanikela ngendodanakhe u-Isaka. Iye, loyo owamukela isithembiso walungela ukunikela indodanakhe ekukuphela kwayo," 
Hebrews11:18 loyo okwathiwa ngaye: “Iinzukulwana zakho zizokuthiyelelwa ngo-Isaka.” 
Hebrews11:19 U-Abrahamu bekasazi bona uZimu uyabavusa nabafileko, kungalokho ngokulinganisa ngekulumo, wamukela u-Isaka njengobuya ekufeni." 
Hebrews11:20 Ngokukholwa u-Isaka wabusisa uJakopo no-Esewu mayelana nelikusasa labo. 
Hebrews11:21 Ngokukholwa uJakopo sele azokufa wabusisa leyo naleyo yamadodana kaJosefa; wakhothama ngokulotjha adzimelele ngedondolo lakhe ebekaliphethe. 
Hebrews11:22 Ngokukholwa uJosefa asele azakwenyuka, wakhuluma ngokufuduka kwaka-Israyeli eGibhide bewalayeza ngokungcwatjwa kwakhe." 
Hebrews11:23 Ngokukholwa uMosi asele abelethiwe, wafihlwa babelethi bakhe iinyanga ezintathu ngombana babona bonyana umntwana obekamuhle; begodu azange bawesabe umyalo obekwe yikosi." 
Hebrews11:24 Ngokukholwa uMosi aselakhulile wala bona kuthiwe uyindodana yendodakazi kaFaro," 
Hebrews11:25 kunalokho wenyula ukuphathwa makghwakghwa nabantu bakaZimu kunobanyana athabe isikhatjhana esonweni. 
Hebrews11:26 Bekasithi ukuthukwa ngebanga lakaKrestu kumnono omkhulu kunamafa weGibhide ngombana gade aqale umvuzo ozako ngaphambili. 
Hebrews11:27 Ngokukholwa wayitjhiya iGibhide angesabi ilaka lekosi ngombana waphikelela sengathi uyambona ongabonwako. 
Hebrews11:28 Ngokukholwa wajamisa iPhasika nokufafaza ngeengazi ukuze umbhubhisi angathinti amazibulo. 
Hebrews11:29 Ngokukholwa bakwa-Israyeli beyama ilwandle loMgaba sengathi bakhamba ehlabathini eyomileko, okwathi lokha amaGibhide athi alinga ukweyama, atjhingela." 
Hebrews11:30 Ngokukholwa imithangala yeJerikho yawa ngemva kobana isele izonjelezwe amalanga alikhomba. 
Hebrews11:31 Ngokukholwa ingwadla enguRarhabi ayizange ibhubhe nalabo abangakhange bakholwa ngombana yamukela kuhle iinhloli. 
Hebrews11:32 Ngingaraga ngithini? Asisekho isikhathi sokukhuluma ngoGidiyoni, uBharaki, uSamsoni, uJafta, uDavida, uSamyela nabaphorofidi," 
Hebrews11:33 okwathi ngokukholwa bahlula imibuso, benza ukulunga, bamukela iinthembiso bavala imilomo yamabhubezi," 
Hebrews11:34 bacima imililo evutha ngamandla, baphunyurha etlobeni yesabula, bazuza amandla ebuthakathakeni, baba ziingorho epini namabutho wabarhali abhebhula iinthende." 
Hebrews11:35 Ngokukholwa besifazana babuye babuyiselwa iinhlobo ngokuvuswa ekufeni. Abanye bahlunguphazwa, akhange bavume ukuthukululwa ukuze bazuze ukuvuka okuhle." 
Hebrews11:36 Abanye bahlunguphazwa ngokuphoqwa nokurithwa, iye, ngitjho nangokubotjhwa nokudlhunywa ngeenkhungweni." 
Hebrews11:37 Bakghadlhwa ngamatje, baphadlhulwa kabili, babulawa ngesabula. Bazulazula bembethe iinkhumba zezimvu nezeembuzi. Bebahlubule, bazwiswa ubuhlungu, bahlukunyezwa." 
Hebrews11:38 Iphasi belingakabafaneli; bandinda emarhalawumbeni neentabeni, emikghotheni nemadongeni wephasi." 
Hebrews11:39 Boke labo nanyana kufakazwa kuhle ngabo ngokukholwa, azange bamukele ngesikhatheso lokho ebebathenjiswe khona" 
Hebrews11:40 ngombana uZimu gade sele asibonelele ngokuhle ukuze ngaphandle kwethu bangapheleliswa. 
Hebrews12:1 Ngalokho, njengombana sizonjelezwe lilifu elingaka labofakazi, asilahleni koke okudisibezako, ngitjho nesono esisinamathele kangaka, sigijime ibanga esibekelwe lona ngokubekezela;" 
Hebrews12:2 siqale kuJesu umthomisi nomphelelisi wokukholwa kwethu, okwathi esikhundleni setokozo ebe ibekwe phambi kwakhe, wanyamezelela isiphambano angakhathaleli ukurhubutjhwa; uhlezi ngesidleni sesihlalo sobukhosi sakaZimu." 
Hebrews12:3 Myeleleni loyo owanyamezelela ukuphikiswa kangaka zizoni, khona iinhliziyo zenu zingazukudana namkha niphelelwe lithemba." 
Hebrews12:4 Ekujamelaneni kwenu nesono, anikalwi bekube sekuthulukeni kweengazi." 
Hebrews12:5 Kumbe senikhohlwe umyalo onikhuthaza njengabantwana, othi: “Ndodanami, unganyazi ukuyala kwakaSomnini, ungapheli amandla nakukhalimelako" 
Hebrews12:6 ngombana uSomnini ubetha loyo amthandako, ahlunguphaze leyo naleyo indodana ayithandako.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Nyamezelelani ukukhalinywa; uZimu uniphatha njengabantwana: Konje ukhona umntwana ongakhalinywa nguyise na? 
Hebrews12:8 Nakube anikhalinyelwa njengabo boke abakhalinywako, khona nimavezandlebe, anisibo abantwana bangekhaya." 
Hebrews12:9 Ngaphezu kwalokho, sibe nabobaba bephaseli abasikhalimeleko sabahlonipha; alo, kufuze sizithobe kangangani-ke kuBaba wemiphefumulwethu bona siphile na?" 
Hebrews12:10 Abobaba bethu basikhalimela kwesikhatjhana njengombana babona kufanele, kodwana uZimu usikhalimela kobana kusizeke thina, iye, sihlanganyele naye ekucwengeni kwakhe." 
Hebrews12:11 Okwanje ukukhalinywa kubonakala kubuhlungu kunokuthokoza, kodwana emva kwalokho kuhloma iinthelo zokulunga kilabo ababandulwe ngikho." 
Hebrews12:12 Ngalokho qinisani izandla zenu ezibuthakathaka namadolwenu agedlako," 
Hebrews12:13 nenzele iinyawo zenu imizila enqophileko ukuze nosigoga angatshinyeki kodwana aqinelele. 
Hebrews12:14 Phikelelani bona nihlalisane ngokuthula nabantu boke kanti godu nibe nokucwengeka ngombana onganakho lokho angeze ambona uSomnini. 
Hebrews12:15 Tjhejani bona kungabikhona osalelako ekufunyaneni umusa kaZimu ukuze kungamili umrabhu obabako obanga ukonakala begodu kusilaphale abanengi ngawo. 
Hebrews12:16 Godu tjhejani bona kungabikhona oziphatha kumbi namkha onganandaba njengo-Esewu, owathengisa ubuzibulo bakhe ngokudla kwesikhatjhana sinye." 
Hebrews12:17 Niyazi bona kwathi muva lokha nakafuna ukuba yindlalifa yokubusiswa, waphayelwa ngeqadi ngombana gade angekhe asaphendula umkhumbulo kayise, sengitjho nanyana gade afisa lokho ngokuchiphiza iinyembezi." 
Hebrews12:18 Anikezi kilokho eningakuthinta, okumlilo ovuthako, ubumnyama, isikhwitjhikhwitjhi nesiwuruwuru," 
Hebrews12:19 nalapho kulila khona ipalapala nelizwini ekuthi lokha nalikhulumako lenze abalizwako bancenge bona kungasabi nelinye elikhulunywa kibo 
Hebrews12:20 ngombana gade bangekhe bakujamele ebekutjhiwo ngilo bona: “Ngitjho nanyana kungaba silwana esithinta intaba le, asikhandwe ngamatje sibulawe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Mbala, umbono loyo bewesabeka kangokuthi uMosi wabe wathi: “Ngiyahlengezela ngevalo.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Kodwana nina nize entabeni yeZiyoni nemzini wakaZimu ophilako, iJerusalema lezulwini nemgidini wewoma leengilozi," 
Hebrews12:23 iye, nize ebandleni lamazibulo atloliswe ezulwini, kumgwebi onguZimu wabo boke, emiphefumulweni yabantu abalungisisiweko," 
Hebrews12:24 ngitjho nakuJesu omlamuleli wesivumelwano esitjha nekufafazweni kweengazi ezikhuluma amezwi womusa kunezikaKayini. 
Hebrews12:25 Tjhejani-ke bona ningamfulatheli okhulumako ngombana nakube azange baphunyurhe labo abafulathela loyo owabayelelisako asephasinapha, khulu kangangani nakube sidela loyo osiyelelisa asezulwini?" 
Hebrews12:26 Ngesikhatheso ilizwi lakhe lasikinya iphasi, kodwana kwanjesi uthembisile wathi: “Ngizokubuya godu ngisikinye kungabi liphasi nje kwaphela kodwana nezulu imbala.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Lokho kokuthi: “Ngizokubuya godu” kuphawula ukususa lokho okusikinywako, okutjho okudaliweko ukuze kuthi lokho okungekhe kwasikinywa kusale kujame njalo." 
Hebrews12:28 Yeke asithokozeni ngokwamukeliswa umbuso ongekhe wasikinywa, ngalokho asinikeleni kuZimu ukulotjha okwamukelekako ngehlonipho nangokwesaba" 
Hebrews12:29 ngombana uZimethu umlilo oqothulako. 
Hebrews13:1 Aliragele phambili ithando lokuzwana. 
Hebrews13:2 Ningalibali ukwamukela abayeni ngombana ngokwenza njalo abanye bangenisa iingilozi bangalemuki. 
Hebrews13:3 Khumbulani labo ababotjhiweko, kube sengathi nani nibotjhwe kanye nabo, iye, nalabo abaphethwe kumbi ngombana nani nisesemzimbeni lo." 
Hebrews13:4 Ukuthathana akuhlonitjhwe ngibo boke, umseme ungasilaphazwa ngombana iinhlobongi neengwadla uZimu uzozigweba." 
Hebrews13:5 Zilondeni ningabi marhamaru kodwana yaneliswani ngeninakho ngombana wathi: “Angekhe nganitjhiya namkha nganilahla.” 
Hebrews13:6 Ngalokho singatjho ngesibindi sithi: “USomnini umsizi wami, angeze ngesaba; umuntu angangenzani na?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Khumbulani abarholi benu, okutjho labo abakhuluma ilizwi lakaZimu kini; nikhumbule isiphetho sepilo abayiphilileko, nilingise ukukholwa kwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 UJesu Krestu unguye izolo, namhlanje nanini nanini." 
Hebrews13:9 Ningaluthwa ziimfundiso ezingaziwako nezimihlobohlobo ngombana kuhle bona ihliziyo iqiniswe ngomusa ingasi ngokulandela imithetho yokudla, ekuyinto engazange ibasize ngalitho abayilandelako." 
Hebrews13:10 Thina sine-aldari, labo abalotjha etendeni lokuhlanganela abanalungelo lokudla kilo" 
Hebrews13:11 ngombana iindumbu zeenlwana lezo iingazi zazo ezingeniswa endaweni ecwengileko mphristi omkhulu njengomhlabelo wesono zitjhiselwa ngaphandle kwekampa. 
Hebrews13:12 Ngokunjalo-ke noJesu naye wahlunguphazwa ngaphandle kwesango ukuze acwengise abantu ngeengazi zakhe. 
Hebrews13:13 Ngalokho asiye kuye ngaphandle komuzi, sifese sithwale ihlazo alinyamezelelako!" 
Hebrews13:14 Lokho kungombana lapha asinawo umuzi ojame ngokungapheliko, kodwana siqale umuzi ozako." 
Hebrews13:15 Nje-ke ngaye, asinikeleni umhlabelo wokudumisa kuZimu, okutjho iinthelo zeembhena ezivuma ibizo lakaJesu." 
Hebrews13:16 Ningalibali kukwenza okuhle kwabanye nokwabelana ngombana iminikelo enjalo uZimu uyayithabela. 
Hebrews13:17 Lalelani abarholi benu nibathobele ngombana bahlala njalo beluse imiphefumulwenu njengabantu abazazilanda ngayo. Nje-ke abenze umsebenzabo ngokuthaba kungabi ngokunyama ngombana lokho angeze kwanisiza ngalitho. 
Hebrews13:18 Sithandazelani ngombana siyazi bona sinesazela esimsulwa begodu sithanda bona siphile ipilo ehloniphekileko kikho koke. 
Hebrews13:19 Nginibawa khulu bona nikwenze lokhu ukuze ngibuyiselwe kini msinyana. 
Hebrews13:20 UZimu wokuthula, owavusa kwabafileko iKosethu uJesu Krestu, umalusi omkhulu wezimvu ngeengazi zesivumelwano esijame ngokungapheliko," 
Hebrews13:21 sengathi anganiphelelisa ngakho koke okuhle ukuze nenze intando yakhe; begodu kwanga angasebenza phakathi kwenu ngoJesu Krestu okuthandekako kuye. Akube kuye iphazimulo nini nanini. Amen. 
Hebrews13:22 Ngiyabawa bazalwana, lamukeleni ngesineke ilizwi lami lokukhuthaza ngombana nginitlolele ngokufitjhani." 
Hebrews13:23 Ngithanda nazi bonyana umzalwana wethu uThimothi sele akhutjhiwe ngesikhungweni. Nange angafika msinyana, ngizokuza naye sizonibona." 
Hebrews13:24 Silotjhiselani kibo boke abaniphetheko nakibo boke abacwengileko. Bayalotjhisa kini abazalwana beTariyana. 
Hebrews13:25 Sengathi umusa wakaZimu ungaba nani noke! Amen. 
James1:1 UJakopo, inceku kaZimu neyeKosi uJesu Krestu, ulotjhisa kizo zoke iinkoro ezilitjhumi nambili ezihlakazeke hlangana neziziwe." 
James1:2 Bazalwana, lokha nanehlelwa mihlobohlobo yeenlingo, nikuthathe ngokuthi lithabo lodwa," 
James1:3 ngombana niyazi bona ukulingwa kokukholwa kwenu kuveza ukunyamezela. 
James1:4 Ukunyamezela kwenu akuveze imisebenzi epheleleko khona nizakuba ngabavuthiweko nabapheleleko, ningatlhayeli ilitho." 
James1:5 Nangabe kukhona hlangana nani onganabo ubuhlakani, akabawe uZimu opha boke ngaphandle kokusola, uzakuphiwa." 
James1:6 Kodwana akabawe ngokukholwa, angazazi; ngombana ozazako ufana namaza welwandle aphetjhulwa mumoya." 
James1:7 Nje-ke onjalo angadlumbani bona iKosi izamamukelisa ilitho 
James1:8 ngombana uneenhliziyo ezimbili, uyaphenduphenduka eendleleni zakhe zoke." 
James1:9 Umzalwana ophasi azibuke ngokuphakanyiswa kwakhe," 
James1:10 onjingileko azibuke ngokwehliswa kwakhe ngombana uzakunyamalala njengelikhwa emmangweni. 
James1:11 Ilanga liyaphuma libalele litjhwabise ummango; amakhwa wakhona ayathintitheka nobuhle bawo bunyamalale. Kunjalo-ke nangenjinga, phakathi kwepilwayo izakwehlelwa kukhwahla." 
James1:12 Ubusisiwe onyamezelako ekulingweni ngombana nasele aphumelele ekulingweni kwakhe, uzakwamukeliswa isihlohlo sokuphila iKosi eyasithembisa labo abayithandako." 
James1:13 Umuntu nakalingwako akukafaneli athi: “Ngilingwa nguZimu,” ngombana uZimu angekhe alingwa ngokumbi, begodu naye akalingi muntu." 
James1:14 Kodwana loyo naloyo ulingwa, adoswe ziinkanuko zakhe abe ayengeke." 
James1:15 Yeke ikanuko nasele ibambile, izala isono, kuthi isono nasele sikhulile sizale ukufa." 
James1:16 Bazalwana abathandekako, ningakhohliswa." 
James1:17 Zoke izipho ezilungileko nazo zoke iimphiwo ezipheleleko zivela phezulu; zehla zivela kuBaba wokukhanya okungekho kuye ukuhlanuka ngitjho nesithunzi esitjhugulukako. 
James1:18 Ngentando yakhe wasibeletha kabutjha ngelizwi leqiniso khona sizakuba mazibulo wazo zoke iimbunjwa zakhe. 
James1:19 Bazalwana abathandekako, yelelani lokhu: Ngiloyo naloyo akarhabe ukuzwa kodwana angaphenduli msinyana, ariyade ukuthukuthela" 
James1:20 ngombana ilaka lomuntu alivezi ipilo yokulunga uZimu ayifunako. 
James1:21 Yeke lahlani izenzo zeensila nokuziphatha ngokukhohlakala; ngokuzithoba namukele ilizwi elitjalwe ngaphakathi kwenu elinganisindisa. 
James1:22 Yibani ngabenza ilizwi, ningabi ngabalizwako kwaphela bese niyazikhohlisa." 
James1:23 Loyo olalela ilizwi kodwana angenzi elikutjhoko ufana nomuntu oqala ubuso bakhe esibonibonini," 
James1:24 kuthi ngemva kokuziqala, asuke akhambe akhohlwe bona gade anjani." 
James1:25 Kodwana oqalisisa emthethweni opheleleko nowetjhaphuluko, akhambe ngawo, angabi mlaleli okhohlwako kodwana abe ngowenzako, loyo-ke uzakuba ngobusisiweko ekwenzeni kwakhe." 
James1:26 Umuntu odlumbana bona ulikholwa kodwana angalibambi ilimu lakhe, uyazikhohlisa ehliziywenakhe nokukholwa kwakhe kulilize." 
James1:27 Ukukholwa okumsulwa nokungikho phambi kwakaZimu onguBaba ngilokhu: kukhambela iintandani nabahlolokazi ekubandezelekeni kwabo nokuzilonda ungasilaphazwa liphasi. 
James2:1 Bazalwana bami enikholwa yiKosethu yephazimulo uJesu Krestu, ningabandlululi muntu." 
James2:2 Nangabe kungena umuntu emhlanganweni wenu ofake idzilamunwana yegolide embethe zakanokutjho, kubuye kungene osichaka embethe maratha," 
James2:3 bese nitjheja loyo owembethe zakanokutjho ngokuthi “nasi isihlalo esihle esilungele wena”, komaratha nithi “jama lapha wena” namkha nithi “hlala phasi eenyaweni zami”," 
James2:4 ngokwenza njalo nizabe ningakabandlululi phakathi kwenu ngokuzenza abagwebi ngemikhumbulo emimbi na? 
James2:5 Lalelani bazalwana abathandekako: UZimu akakakhethi abachakileko bephaseli kobana banothe ngokukholwa, babe ziindlalifa zombuso awuthembisa labo abamthandako na?" 
James2:6 Kodwana nina niyamrhubutjha ochakileko. Akusibo abanjingileko abanigandelelako bebanidosele phambi kwesigungu sababusi na? 
James2:7 Akusibo abahlambalaza ibizo elihle enibizwa ngalo na? 
James2:8 Kwamambala nizabe nenza okufaneleko nanilonda umthetho wobukhosi njengombana kutloliwe kwathiwa: “Thanda umuntu omunye njengombana uzithanda wena!” 
James2:9 Kodwana nanibandlululako, nenza isono begodu nilahlwa ngomthetho njengabaweqako." 
James2:10 Nangabe umuntu ulonda woke umthetho kodwana aphule munye wawo unomlandu wawo woke 
James2:11 ngombana loyo owathi “ungahlobongi” wabuye wathi “ungabulali”. Nangabe awuhlobongi kodwana uyabulala, usiseqamthetho." 
James2:12 Khulumani bese nenza njengalabo abazokugwetjwa mthetho oletha ikululeko 
James2:13 ngombana ukugweba akunasirhawu kiloyo ongazange abonise isirhawu, nokho isirhawu siyahlula phezu kwesigwebo." 
James2:14 Bazalwana bami, kusizani umuntu athi unokukholwa kodwana anganayo imisebenzi na? Ukukholwa kwakhe kungamsindisa na?" 
James2:15 Nakube umfo namkha udade ukhamba hlubule begodu akanakudla 
James2:16 bese omunye wenu athi kibo “khambani ngokuthula, nifuthumale, nisuthe”, lokho kusizani naninganikeli lokho okudingekako ngokomzimba na?" 
James2:17 Ngokunjalo-ke, nokukholwa nakunganamisebenzi, kufile." 
James2:18 Kodwana omunye uzakuthi: “Wena unokukholwa, mina nginemisebenzi.” Ngitjengisa ukukholwa kwakho ngaphandle kwemisebenzi, nami ngemisebenzami ngizakutjengisa ukukholwa kwami." 
James2:19 Uyakholwa bona uZimu munye na? Wenza kuhle; namadimoni ayakholwa abe ahlengezele. 
James2:20 Wena siyila ndina, ufuna ukutjengiswa bona ukukholwa ngaphandle kwemisebenzi kulilize na?" 
James2:21 Kanti ukhokho wethu u-Abrahamu akhange alungisiswe ngemisebenzi lokha nakanikela ngo-Isaka indodanakhe e-aldarini na? 
James2:22 Uyabona-ke bonyana ukukholwa kwasebenza kanye nezenzo zakhe, nokobana ukukholwa kwapheleliswa ngemisebenzi." 
James2:23 Nje-ke kwazaliseka umtlolo othi: “U-Abrahamu wakholwa kuZimu, kwabalelwa kuye njengokulunga,” begodu wabizwa bona umngani kaZimu." 
James2:24 Niyabona bonyana umuntu ulungisiswa ngemisebenzi, ingasi ngokukholwa kwaphela." 
James2:25 Kwaba njalo nangoRarhabu ingwadla, walungisiswa ngemisebenzi lokha nakamukela iinthunywa wabuye wazikhupha ngenye indlela." 
James2:26 Njengombana nomzimba nawunganammoya ufile, ngokunjalo nokukholwa nakunganamisebenzi kufile." 
James3:1 Bazalwana, ningabi bafundisi abanengi ngombana niyazi bonyana thina esifundisako sizokugwetjwa khulu." 
James3:2 Soke sineemphoso ezinengi; nangabe umuntu akaphosisi kilokho akutjhoko kutjho bona uphelele, uyakwazi ukubamba umzimba woke ngetomu." 
James3:3 Nasifaka amatomu emilonyeni yeenjomani bona zisilalele, sikghona ukunqophisa yoke imizimba yazo." 
James3:4 Akhese niqale nemikhumbi, nanyana imikhulu kangangani beyiragwe mimoya enamandla, nokho inqotjhiswa ngephinyana, inqombe lapha umtjhayeli afuna iye khona." 
James3:5 Linjalo-ke nelimu, lisisitho esincani kodwana lizigabazisa ngezinto ezikulu. Akhese niqale, umlilo omncani uthungela ihlathi elikhulu." 
James3:6 Ilimu nalo limlilo, liliphasi lokonakala ezithweni zomzimba wethu, lisilaphaza umzimba woke, lithungela yoke ipilo khisibe lona lithungelwa sirhogo." 
James3:7 Yoke imihlobo yeenlwana, yeenyoni, yeenrhurhubi neendalwa zelwandle iyathanjiswa, iye, ithanjiswa babantu," 
James3:8 kodwana akakho umuntu okwazi ukuthambisa ilimu; libubumbi obuyaluzako, lizele isihlungu esibulalako." 
James3:9 Ngalo sidumisa uSomnini uBaba, kuthi ngalo godu sinikelele abantu abenziwe ngomfanekiso kaZimu." 
James3:10 Emlonyeni owodwa kuphuma ukudumisa nokunikelela. Bazalwana, akukafaneli bona kube njalo." 
James3:11 Kungenzeka bona emthonjeni owodwa kuphume amanzi amnandi nababako na? 
James3:12 Bazalwana bami, kghani umuthi wamakhiwani uyathela iinthelo zama-oliva namkha isidiribe sithele amakhiwani na? Angeze kwenzeka bona umthombo onetswayi uveze amanzi amnandi." 
James3:13 Ngubani ohlakaniphileko nolemukako hlangana nani na? Ngepilo ehle akatjengise imisebenzakhe ngokuzithoba okunokuhlakanipha. 
James3:14 Kodwana naninomona obabako, nobumarhamaru eenhliziyweni zenu, musani ukuzikhakhazisa ngalokho, ningabi nobuqili eqinisweni." 
James3:15 Ukuhlakanipha okunjalo akuveli ezulwini kodwana kungokwephasi, kunobusathana" 
James3:16 ngombana lapha kunomona nomrhobholo khona, kuzokuba khona ihlangahlangano nazo zoke izenzo zobukhohlakali." 
James3:17 Kodwana ubuhlakani obuvela ezulwini, kokuthoma nje bumsulwa, bunokuthula, bunobumnene, buthobekile, bunobubele neenthelo ezihle, abunakuzaza nokuzenzisa." 
James3:18 Isivuno sokulunga sitjalwa ngokuthula ngilabo abenza ukuthula. 
James4:1 Izipi nokuphambana kuvelaphi hlangana nani na? Akuveli eenkanukweni zenu ezilwa njalo nani na? 
James4:2 Niyafisa kodwana anifumani ilitho; ngalokho niyabulala. Nifuna izinto kodwana anizifikeleli, ngalokho niyararana nilwe. Aninalitho ngombana anibawi." 
James4:3 Niyabawa ningaphiwa ngombana nibawa kumbi kobana nithokozise iinkanuko zenu. 
James4:4 Nina nhlobongi, anazi bona ukuthanda iphasi kububutha kuZimu na? Ngalokho okhanuka bona abe mngani wephasi, uzenza isitha sakaZimu." 
James4:5 Kghani nidlumbana bona kulilize lokho okutjhiwo mtlolo nawuthi “uMoya uZimu ambeke bona ahlale kithi, unesikhwele” na?" 
James4:6 Kodwana upha umusa ngokweqileko, ngalokho umtlolo uthi: “UZimu ujamelana nabazikhukhumezako, kodwana abazithobako ubapha umusa.”" 
James4:7 Nje-ke zithobeni kuZimu, nijamelane noSathana, uzanibaleka." 
James4:8 Tjhidelani kuZimu naye uzakutjhidela kini. Hlambani izandla zenu nina zoni, nihlambulule iinhliziyo zenu nina beenhliziyo ezimbili." 
James4:9 Tshwenyekani, nidabuke, nilile; ukuhleka kwenu akuphenduke isililo nokuthaba kwenu kube kudana." 
James4:10 Zithobeni phambi kweKosi, yona-ke izaniphakamisa." 
James4:11 Ningahlebani bazalwana. Loyo ohleba umzalwana namkha amgwebe umzalwana, uhleba umthetho, agwebe umthetho. Nangabe ugweba umthetho, awusuye umenzi womthetho, kodwana umugwebi wawo." 
James4:12 Munye obetha umthetho, benguye omugwebi onamandla wokusindisa nokurhayila. Kodwana wena ungubani bona ungagweba umfowenu na?" 
James4:13 Lalelani-ke nina enithi: “Namhlanjesi namkha kusasa sizakuya edorobheni leli namkha kileliya, sihlale umnyaka sirhwebe, sifumane inzuzo.”" 
James4:14 Anilazi ikusasa. Alo, kuyini ukuphila kwenu na? Niyikungu evela ibonakale isikhatjhana bese iyanyamalala." 
James4:15 Yeke, kufuze nithi: “USomnini nakathandako, sizakuphila bese senza lokhu nalokhuya.”" 
James4:16 Kunalokho niyazikhukhumeza ekuzigabaziseni kwenu; koke ukuzigabazisa okunjalo kumbi. 
James4:17 Okwaziko ukwenza okuhle ahluleke ukukwenza, uyona." 
James5:1 Nje-ke lalelani nina njinga; lilani nirhahlawule ngebanga leenhlupheko ezizanehlela. 
James5:2 Umnotho wenu wonakele neengubo zenu zidliwa yitshwele. 
James5:3 Igolide nesiliva lenu kukghorile, ukukghora lokho kuzokuba bufakazi obujamelene nani, kudle imizimba yenu njengomlilo. Nibuthelele umnotho emihleni le yokugcina." 
James5:4 Qalani, umvuzo weensebenzi ezisebenza emasiminenu eniwugodle ngobukhwebetjhana uyalila; begodu ukulila kwabavuni kufikile eendlebeni zakaSomnini uMinimandlawoke." 
James5:5 Ephasinapha niphile ngokuzigedla nokuzithokozisa, ninonisele iinhliziyo zenu mayelana nelanga lokuhlatjwa." 
James5:6 Nilahle benabulala onganacala, iye, onganiphikisiko." 
James5:7 Ngalokho nyamezelani, bazalwana, bekufike ilanga lokubuya kweKosi uJesu. Qalani, umlimi ulindela isithelo sephasi esiligugu, asinyamezelele bekube lizulu lokuthoma nelokugcina." 
James5:8 Nani-ke nyamezelani niqunge isibindi ngombana ilanga lokubuya kweKosi uJesu libandamele. 
James5:9 Bazalwana, ningavungamelani ukuze ningagwetjwa; qalani, uMgwebi ujame emnyango." 
James5:10 Thathani ukunyamezela nokuhlupheka kwabaphorofidi abakhuluma ebizweni lakaSomnini njengesibonelo. 
James5:11 Qalani, sibathatha bona babusisiwe labo abanyamezelako. Nezwa ngokunyamezela kwakaJobho, benabona umnqopho kaSomnini kobana mbala uSomnini unezwelo nesirhawu." 
James5:12 Ngaphezu kwakho koke bazalwana, ningafungi; kungaba ngezulu namkha ngephasi nanyana nangasiphi isifungo. U-iye wenu akabe ngu-iye; u-awa wenu abe ngu-awa ukuze ningalahlwa." 
James5:13 Kukhona ohluphekako hlangana nani na? Akathandaze. Kukhona owenamileko na? Akadumise. 
James5:14 Kukhona ogulako hlangana nani na? Akabize abaphathi bebandla bamthandazele bebamzese ngamafutha ebizweni lakaSomnini. 
James5:15 Umthandazo wokukholwa uzamsindisa ogulako, uSomnini amvuse, nanyana enze izono uzakulitjalelwa zona." 
James5:16 Ngalokho-ke vumani izono omunye komunye, nithandazelane ukuze niphiliswe. Umthandazo wolungileko unamandla begodu uyasebenza." 
James5:17 U-Elija bekamumuntu ofana nathi, wathandaza ngokuncama bona izulu lingani, mbala azange lana ephasini iminyaka emithathu neenyanga ezintandathu." 
James5:18 Wabuye wathandaza godu, umkayi wawulula izulu, iphasi labuye lathela iinthelo zalo." 
James5:19 Bazalwana bami, nangabe omunye hlangana nani uduka eqinisweni, omunye ambuyise," 
James5:20 yazini bona loyo obuyise isoni ekulahlekeni kwaso, usindise umphefumulwaso ekufeni begodu ugubuzesa nezono ezinengi." 
1Peter1:1 UPitrosi umpostoli kaJesu Krestu, kibo abakhethiweko, abaziinkhambi ephasinapha nabahlakazeke kilo loke lePontusi, leGalatiya, leKaphadosiya, le-Asiya neleBhithiniya;" 
1Peter1:2 iye, abakhethwe ngokwazi ngaphambili kwakaZimu uBaba, ngokomsebenzi ocwengisako wakaMoya mayelana nokulalela uJesu Krestu kanye nokufafazwa ngeengazi zakhe: Akwandiswe umusa nokuthula kini." 
1Peter1:3 Akadunyiswe uZimu uYise weKosethu uJesu Krestu, owathi ngomusa wakhe omkhulu wasipha ukubelethwa kabutjha ethembeni eliphilako ngokuvuswa kwakaJesu Krestu kabafileko," 
1Peter1:4 kobana sibe nelifa elingabhubhiko, elingasilaphazekiko nelingapheliko enibulungelwe lona ezulwini;" 
1Peter1:5 iye, nina enilondwa mamandla kaZimu ngokukholwa kube kusindiswa esele kulungele ukwembulwa ngesikhathi sokuphela." 
1Peter1:6 Kilokho niyathaba nanyana gadesi nimele nihlupheke isikhatjhana esincani kiyo yoke imihlobohlobo yeenlingo 
1Peter1:7 ukuze kuthi iqiniso lokukholwa kwenu okuligugu kunegolide elibhubhako, nakuzizinywa ngomlilo, kuveze idumo, iphazimulo nokuhlonitjhwa lokha uJesu nakembulwako." 
1Peter1:8 Niyamthanda nanyana ningakhange nimbone; niyakholwa kuye nanyana ningamboni njenganje begodu niyathokoza ngethabo elingekhe lahlathululwa nelibabazekako 
1Peter1:9 ngombana namukela umphumela wokukholwa kwenu, iye, ukusindiswa kwemiphefumulwenu." 
1Peter1:10 Mayelana nesindiso leyo, abaphorofidi abaphorofida ngomusa obewuzonehlela, bahlolisisa bebaphenyisisa ngayo," 
1Peter1:11 bafunisisa bona ngisiphi isikhathi nobujamo uMoya kaKrestu obegade akibo aphawula ngaso lokha nakafakaza ngaphambili ngokuhlupheka ebekubekelwe uKrestu nephazimulo ebeyizakulandela. 
1Peter1:12 Kwembulwa kibo bonyana bebangazilotjhi bona kodwana nina, lokha nebebakhuluma ngalokho nani esele nikuzwa ngalabo abatjhumayela iindaba ezimnandi ngoMoya oCwengileko ovela ezulwini. Iye, sengitjho nezinto iingilozi ebezifuna ukuzibona." 
1Peter1:13 Ngalokho lungiselelani iingqondo zenu, nizithibe; nibeke loke ithemba lenu emseni kaKrestu enizakuphiwa wona lokha nakabonakaliswako." 
1Peter1:14 Njengabantwana abalalelako, ningaphendukeli eenkanukweni enanikizo phambilini ekungazini kwenu." 
1Peter1:15 Kunalokho, njengombana owanibizako acwengile, yibani ngabacwengileko kikho koke ukukhamba kwenu" 
1Peter1:16 ngombana umtlolo ocwengileko uthi: “Yibani ngabacwengileko ngombana mina ngicwengile.” 
1Peter1:17 Nangabe nimbiza bona nguBaba, loyo ogweba boke abantu ukuya ngokwemisebenzi yabo ngaphandle kokubandlulula, khona-ke philani ngokwesaba esikhathini sokuba ziinkhonzi kwenu." 
1Peter1:18 Kufuze nazi bona ekukhambeni kwenu okulilize enakuzuza kiboyihlomkhulu, azange nahlengwa ngezinto ezibhubha njengesiliva negolide," 
1Peter1:19 kodwana ngeengazi eziligugu zakaKrestu, iye, njengezemvana enganamphambo namkha isibazi." 
1Peter1:20 Yena wajanyiswa ngaphambilini iphasi lingakasekelwa, kodwana wabonakaliswa eenkhathini zokuphela ngebanga lenu." 
1Peter1:21 Ngaye nakholwa kuZimu owamvusa kabafileko wamnikela iphazimulo ukuze ukukholwa nethemba lenu kudzimelele kuZimu. 
1Peter1:22 Nje-ke, njengombana senihlambulule imiphefumulwenu ngokuthobela iqiniso ukuze nibe nobudlelwano bethando lamambala kubazalwana benu, yeke thandanani omunye nomunye ngehliziyo epheleleko." 
1Peter1:23 Senibelethwe kabutjha, ingasi ngembewu ebhubhako kodwana ngengabhubhiko, iye, ngelizwi lakaZimu eliphila ngokungapheliko" 
1Peter1:24 ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Mbala, boke abantu bafana notjani, nedumo labo loke lifana nelikhwa lommango: Utjani buyatjhwaba nelikhwa libune," 
1Peter1:25 kodwana ilizwi lakaSomnini lijame ngokungapheliko.” Ilizwelo ziindaba ezimnandi ezatjhunyayelwa kini. 
1Peter2:1 Ngalokho-ke lahlani boke ubumbi nobuqili, ukuzenzisa, umona nayo yoke ihlebo." 
1Peter2:2 Njengamasana langazelelani ibisi elicwebileko lokommoya ukuze ngalo nikhule esindisweni," 
1Peter2:3 nakube seninandiphile bona iKosi ilungile. 
1Peter2:4 Bandamelani kiyo, ililitje eliphilako, elininwe babantu kodwana kuZimu likhethekile begodu liligugu;" 
1Peter2:5 nani-ke njengamatje aphilako, nakhelwe endlini yokommoya kobana nibe buphristi obucwengileko, ninikele imihlabelo yokommoya eyamukelekako kuZimu ngoJesu Krestu." 
1Peter2:6 Ngitjho ngombana umtlolo uthi: “Qala, ngibekile eZiyoni ilitje, iye, ilitje lejika elikhethekileko neliligugu; loyo okholwa kilo angekhe adaniswe.”" 
1Peter2:7 Nje-ke kini nina enikholwako liligugu, kodwana kilabo abangakholwako, “Ilitje abakhi abalininako, seliphenduke laba yihloko yejika”," 
1Peter2:8 begodu “Lililitje elibakhubako, iye, ilitje elibawisako.” Bayakhubeka ngombana akhange balalele ilizwi njengombana bebajanyiselwe ukwenza." 
1Peter2:9 Kodwana nina nisisizwe esikhethiweko, ubuphristi bobukhosi, isizwe esicwengileko, abantu ekungebakaZimu kobana nitjhumayele imisebenzi yamandla yaloyo owanibiza bona niphume ebumnyameni nize ekukhanyeni kwakhe okukarisako." 
1Peter2:10 Phambilini beningasibo abantu, kodwana kwanjesi nisisizwe sakaZimu. Nakhe naswela umusa, kodwana kwanjesi niwamukelisiwe." 
1Peter2:11 Bathandekako, ngiyanincenga njengemiqhamuka namathunjwa kobana nitjhide eenkanukweni zenyama ezilwa nomphefumulo." 
1Peter2:12 Philani ipilo elungileko hlangana nabangakholwako ukuze kuthi nanyana banisola ngokwenza okumbi, babone imisebenzenu emihle badumise uZimu ngelanga lamatlhuwo." 
1Peter2:13 Ngebanga leKosi, thobelani zoke iinjamiso ezijanyiswe ziimphathimandla, nanyana kungezekosi njengombana ingekulu," 
1Peter2:14 namkha zababusi abathunywe ngiyo kobana bahlunguphaze labo abenza okumbi nokudumisa labo abenza okuhle 
1Peter2:15 ngombana injalo intando kaZimu, yeke ngokwenza okuhle kufuze nithulise ukungazi kweendlhayela." 
1Peter2:16 Njengabatjhaphulukileko, philani njengabatjhaphulukileko, nokho ningasebenzisi ukutjhaphuluka kwenu bona kube sibhibho sokumbi, kodwana philani njengeenceku zakaZimu." 
1Peter2:17 Hloniphani boke abantu, nithande abazalwana, nesabe uZimu benihloniphe umbusi." 
1Peter2:18 Nina nsebenzi, thobelani abaphathi benu ngayo yoke ihlonipho, ingasi labo abanomusa nesineke kwaphela, kodwana nalabo ababukhali" 
1Peter2:19 ngombana kuhle ukubekezelela ubuhlungu bokuphathwa ngokungakafaneli ngebanga lakaZimu. 
1Peter2:20 Nakube niyanyamezela nanidulwako ngokwenza okumbi, lokho kunivuza ngani? Kodwana naninyamezelela ukuhlutjhwa ngebanga lokwenza okuhle, lokho kuyathokozeka kuZimu." 
1Peter2:21 Kokwakho, nabizelwa khona lokho ngombana noKrestu wahlupheka ngebanga lenu, wanitjhiyela isibonelo bona nilandele emtlhaleni wakhe." 
1Peter2:22 “Ongazange enze isono, akhange kufunyanwe ikohliso emlonyenakhe.”" 
1Peter2:23 Kwathi athukwa, akhange azibuyiselele; kwathi ahlutjhwa, akhange asongele; kodwana wazibeka kiloyo ogweba ngokulungileko." 
1Peter2:24 Yena ngokwakhe wathwala izono zethu emzimbenakhe emthini ukuze sife esonweni siphile ekulungeni. Ngemivuvu yakhe naphiliswa 
1Peter2:25 ngombana beninjengezimvu ezidurhileko, kodwana kwanjesi seniphendukele kuMelusi nomnakekeli wemiphefumulwenu." 
1Peter3:1 Ngokunjalo nani bafazi, thobelani amadodenu ukuze kuthi nanyana kukhona amanye angalaleli ilizwi, azuzeke ngaphandle kwekulumo, kodwana ngokuziphatha kwabafazi bawo," 
1Peter3:2 lokha nakabona ikambo yenu ehlanzekileko nehloniphekileko. 
1Peter3:3 Ukuhloba kwenu akungabi ngekwangaphandle kokweluka iinhluthu nokokwembatha izambatho zegolide namkha zakanokutjho. 
1Peter3:4 Kodwana ukuhloba kwenu akube ngokomuntu wangaphakathi, iye, ngobuhle obungapheliko bommoya wesizotha nothobekileko, okuyinto eligugu phambi kwakaZimu." 
1Peter3:5 Mbala, leyo yindlela abafazi bekadeni abacwengileko nebebabeka ithemba labo kuZimu, ebebahloba ngayo. Bebathobela amadodabo," 
1Peter3:6 njengoSara obegade athobela u-Abrahamu abe ambize ngekosi. Nani-ke senibe madodakazakhe mlunga nje nenza okulungileko, ningesabi ilitho." 
1Peter3:7 Ngokunjalo nani madoda, philisanani nabo ngokubazwisisa, nibacabangele ngokwazi bona babuthakathaka begodu nabo baziindlalifa zomusa wokuphila kanye nani; kwenzeni lokho ukuze imithandazo yenu ingaliyeki." 
1Peter3:8 Kokugcina yibani mmoya munye noke, nizwelane, nithandane, nibe nehliziyo enesisa nokuthobeka." 
1Peter3:9 Ningabuyiseli ubumbi ngobumbi namkha ihlamba ngehlamba; kunalokho buyiselelani ngokubusisa ngombana nabizelwa ukwenza njalo ukuze nizuze isibusiso. 
1Peter3:10 “Loyo othanda ukuphila nokubona amalanga amahle, akalonde ilimu lakhe ebumbini, neembhena zakhe ekukhulumeni ikohliso." 
1Peter3:11 Akatjhide ebumbini enze okulungileko; akafune ukuthula akulandelele. 
1Peter3:12 Mbala amehlo kaSomnini aphezu kwabalungileko, iindlebe zakhe zivulekele imithandazwabo, kodwana ubuso bakaSomnini bujamelene nalabo abenza ukukhohlakala.”" 
1Peter3:13 Alo, ngubani onganilimaza nanitjhisekela ukwenza okulungileko na?" 
1Peter3:14 Kodwana nanyana nihlupheka ngebanga lokulunga, nizakubusiswa! Ningesabi okwesatjwa babantu begodu ningethuswa." 
1Peter3:15 Kodwana eenhliziyweni zenu yesabani uKrestu njengeKosi. Nihlale nilungele ukuphendula loyo onibuza ngesizathu sethemba elikini. 
1Peter3:16 Kodwana lokho nikwenze ngobumnene nangehlonipho. Nibe nesazelo esimsulwa ukuze kuthi nabaninyefulako labo abanithukako ngokuziphatha kuhle kwenu kuKrestu, babe neenhloni." 
1Peter3:17 Kungcono ukuhlupheka ngokwenza okulungileko nangabe lokho kuyintando kaZimu, kunokuhlupheka ngokwenza okumbi," 
1Peter3:18 ngombana noKrestu wahlupheka kwaba kanye ngenca yezono zethu. Iye, olungileko wafela abangakalungi ukuze anilethe kuZimu. Wabulawa ngokwenyama, kodwana wavuswa ngoMoya," 
1Peter3:19 okwathi ngaye wayokutjhumayeza imimoya ebotjhiweko," 
1Peter3:20 iye, leyo engazange ilalele ngesikhathi uZimu ayilindele ngokunyamezela emihleni kaNowa, ngeenkhathi zokwakhiwa komkhumbi, okwathi abambalwa ebebabunane basinda ngamanzi." 
1Peter3:21 Amanzi lawo ajamele umbhabhadiso, enisindiswa ngawo nani, kungabi ngokususa isila yomzimba, kodwana ukubawa isazelo esimsulwa kuZimu ngokuvuka kwakaJesu Krestu ekufeni," 
1Peter3:22 osele anyukela ezulwini, uhlezi ngesidleni sakaZimu, kubekwe ngaphasi kwakhe iingilozi, iimphathimandla nemibuso." 
1Peter4:1 Njengombana uKrestu wahlupheka enyameni, nani hlomani ilemuko elinjalo ngombana ohluphekileko enyameni ukulisile ukona." 
1Peter4:2 Ngalokho esikhathini sokuphila kwakhe asesenyameni, akasaphili eenkanukweni zabantu, kodwana sele aphila ngentando kaZimu." 
1Peter4:3 Iye, isikhathi esidlulileko besanele ukwenza okuthandwa ngabatjhili, niphila emanyaleni, eenkanukweni, ebudakweni, ekurhiribideleni, ematjhadeni nekulotjheni abosingazimu ekuyinto esinyenyiso." 
1Peter4:4 Bayarareka ngokungasahlanganyeli nabo ematjhadeni wokuziphatha ngameswe kwabo nokuthukana. 
1Peter4:5 Kodwana kuzakufanela bona baziphendulele kiloyo osele alungele ukugweba abaphilako nabafileko. 
1Peter4:6 Ngilokho okwabangela bona ivangeli litjhunyayelwe nakabafileko ukuze bagwetjwe enyameni njengabantu boke kodwana baphile kuZimu ngokommoya. 
1Peter4:7 Ukuphela kwezinto zoke kubandamele, yeke ncamani nizikhuze ukuze nikwazi ukuthandaza." 
1Peter4:8 Kikho koke lokhu, thandanani ngombana ithando lisibekela izono ezinengi." 
1Peter4:9 Yamukelanani ngaphandle kokurhonona. 
1Peter4:10 Loyo naloyo owamukele isipho somusa, akasisebenzise ukusiza abanye njengenceku elungileko yomusa owandileko wakaZimu." 
1Peter4:11 Okhulumako akakhulume kube njengokwamezwi kaZimu, osebenzako kube njengokwamandla uZimu amuphe wona ukuze kikho koke kudunyiswe uZimu ngoJesu Krestu. Kuye akube lidumo namandla nini nanini. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Bazalwana, ningarareki ngokulingwa okubuhlungu kangaka enikuzwako, kube sengathi nehlelwa ziziga." 
1Peter4:13 Kodwana thokozani njengabahlanganyele noKrestu eenhlungwini ukuze nani nisase mhlana iphazimulwakhe yembulwako. 
1Peter4:14 Nibusisiwe nabanithukako ngebanga lebizo lakaKrestu ngombana uMoya wephazimulo newakaZimu uphezu kwenu. 
1Peter4:15 Akungabikhona kini ohlupheka ngombana ambulali, alisela, iselelesi namkha osibhidlamnyanya;" 
1Peter4:16 kodwana nangabe nihlupheka ngombana nibalandeli bakaKrestu, ningabi neenhloni ngalokho, kodwana dumisani uZimu ngombana nibizwa ngebizwelo." 
1Peter4:17 Sekusikhathi sokobana ukugwetjwa kuthome endlini kaZimu. Alo, nakube kuthoma ngathi sizokuba yini isiphetho salabo abangalaleli ivangeli lakaZimu?" 
1Peter4:18 Umtlolo uthi: “Nakube kulikhuni bona umuntu olungileko asindiswe, alo, kangangani-ke kokhohlakeleko nosisoni na?”" 
1Peter4:19 Yeke akuthi labo abahlupheka ngentando kaZimu, bathembele kuMdali othembekileko, baragele phambili ngokwenza okuhle." 
1Peter5:1 Nje-ke, njengomphathi nofakazi weenhlupheko zakaKrestu, begodu nanjengaloyo omhlanganyeli wephazimulo ezakwambulwa, ngincenga abaphathi phakathi kwenu, ngithi:" 
1Peter5:2 Yelusani umhlambi kaZimu eniwuphetheko, ingasi ngokugandelelwa, kodwana ngokuthanda kwehliziyo njengombana uZimu athanda bona nenze, ingasi ngenzuzo elihlazo, kodwana ngetjisakalo yokuzinikela." 
1Peter5:3 Ningazenzi amakhosi kilabo enibaphetheko, kodwana nibe ziimbonelo emhlambini." 
1Peter5:4 Kuzakuthi mhlana uMelusi omkhulu abonakalako, nizuze isihlohlo sephazimulo esingabhabhukiko." 
1Peter5:5 Ngendlela enjalo nani lutjha, thobelani abadala. Noke yembathani ukuthobelana ekusebenzisaneni kwenu omunye komunye ngombana: “UZimu ujamelene nabazikhukhumezako. Kodwana ubehlisela umusa abazithobileko.”" 
1Peter5:6 Nje-ke zithobeni ngaphasi kwesandla esinamandla sakaZimu, khona azaniphakamisa ngesikhathi esifaneleko." 
1Peter5:7 Fumbelani woke amatshwenyeko wenu kuye ngombana yena uyanikhathalela. 
1Peter5:8 Zikhalimeni nihlale niqaphile; isitha senu uSathana utjhagala hlangana nani njengengwenyama ebhodlako, efuna ezomrhiribidela." 
1Peter5:9 Jamelanani naye ninzinzile ekukholweni ngombana niyazi bona abazalwana benu ephasini loke bangaphasi kokubandezeleka okunjalo. 
1Peter5:10 Kodwana ngemva kokuhlupheka kwesikhatjhana, uZimu womusa woke owanibizela ephazimulweni engapheliko kuKrestu, yena ngokwakhe uzanivuselela, anisekele, aniqinise abe anakhe." 
1Peter5:11 Akube kuye amandla nini nanini. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Nginitlolele incwajana efitjhani le ngisizwa nguSilvanu engimthatha njengomfowethu othembekileko; nginikhuthaza, ngifakaza kobana koke lokhu kumumusa weqiniso kaZimu, yeke kakarelani kiwo." 
1Peter5:13 Ibandla leBhabheli elikhethwe kanye nani, liyalotjhisa. UMarkosi indodanami naye uyalotjhisa."

1Peter5:14 Bingelelanani ngokubingelela okukhethekileko nokunethando. Ukuthula akube nani noke nina enikuKrestu. 
2Peter1:1 USimoni Pitrosi oyinceku nompostoli kaJesu Krestu, kilabo abamukele ukukholwa okuligugu njengokwethu ngokulunga kwakaZimethu noMsindisi uJesu Krestu." 
2Peter1:2 Sengathi kungavama kini umusa nokuthula ekwazini uZimu noJesu iKosethu. 
2Peter1:3 Amandlakhe akhethekileko asiphe koke esikudingako ekuphileni nekukholweni ngokwazi kwakhe loyo owasibiza ngephazimulo nokulunga kwakhe. 
2Peter1:4 Ngalokho wasipha iinthembiso eziligugu nezikulu ukuze kuthi ngazo nibalekele iinkanuko zokonakala okusephasineli, nibe bahlanganyeli besimilo esihle sokukholwa." 
2Peter1:5 Ngesizathwesi-ke khuthalani bona ningezelele ukukholwa kwenu ngokuhle, nokuhle ngelwazi;" 
2Peter1:6 ilwazi ngokuzibamba, ukuzibamba ngokunyamezela, ukunyamezela ngokwesaba uZimu;" 
2Peter1:7 ekumesabeni uZimu ningezelele ukuzwana, ekuzwaneni ithando." 
2Peter1:8 Nangabe izintwezi ninazo begodu zivamile phakathi kwenu, zinenza bona ningabi ngabavilaphako nabanganazo iinthelo ekwazini iKosethu uJesu Krestu." 
2Peter1:9 Loyo okungekho kuye izintwezi ubona lififi, usiphofu begodu ukhohliwe bonyana ukhe wahlanjululwa ezonweni zakhe ngaphambilini." 
2Peter1:10 Ngalokho-ke bazalwana, khuthalani khulu nibonise ukubizwa nokukhethwa kwenu ngombana nanenza lokho angekhe nakhubeka." 
2Peter1:11 Ngendlela leyo nizakwamukeliswa ngokuphuphumako ukungena embusweni ongapheliko weKosethu noMsindisi, uJesu Krestu." 
2Peter1:12 Ngalokho ngizimisele ukuhlala nginikhumbuza ngezintwezi, nanyana senizazi begodu nibambelele eqinisweni esele ninalo." 
2Peter1:13 Ngikubona kufanele bona ngivuselele imikhumbulwenu ije nje ngisaphila ngemtlhatlhaneni omzimba lo 
2Peter1:14 ngombana ngiyazi bona ukususwa komtlhatlhanami lo sekuseduze, njengombana neKosethu uJesu Krestu seyikukhanyisile nje lokho kimi." 
2Peter1:15 Yeke ngizokwenza imizamo yoke bona kuthi emva kokugoduka nikwazi ukuhlala nikhumbula izintwezi. 
2Peter1:16 Eqinisweni besingalandeli iintolwana zobuhlakani ngesikhathi sinazisa amandla nokufika kweKosethu uJesu Krestu, kodwana besingilabo ababona ngamehlo amandla wobukhosi bakhe." 
2Peter1:17 Wamukela idumo nephazimulo kuZimu uBaba, nakafikelwa lilizwi ngobukhosi bephazimulo lisithi: “Le yiNdodanami engiyithandako, engithaba khulu ngayo.”" 
2Peter1:18 Thina ngokwethu sazizwela ilizwelo livela ezulwini, lokha nabesinaye entabeni ecwengileko." 
2Peter1:19 Sinelizwi lesiphorofido eliqinisekisiweko. Nizabe nenza kuhle nanililalelako kube ngathi kusibani esikhanyisako ebumnyameni, bekube yitathakusa nekhwezi lokusa liphumele eenhliziyweni zenu." 
2Peter1:20 Ngaphezu kwakho koke kufanele nilemuke kuhle bona asikho isiphorofido somtlolo esingahlathululwa mumuntu ngokwazi kwakhe 
2Peter1:21 ngombana asikho isiphorofido esakhe seza ngentando yomuntu; kodwana abantu bakhuluma okungekwakaZimu, basunduzwa nguMoya oCwengileko." 
2Peter2:1 Abaphorofidi bamanga bebavele bakhona hlangana nabantu, njengombana kuzakubakhona abafundisi bamanga phakathi kwenu abazakungenisa ngasese iimfundiso ezibhubhisako. Bazakuphika ngitjho noMbusi owabahlawulelako, ngalokho-ke bazilethela ngokwabo ukurhayilwa okumsinyana." 
2Peter2:2 Nanyana kunjalo, abanengi bazakulandela ukukhohlakala kwabo, begodu ngebanga labo, indlela yeqiniso izokurhubutjhwa." 
2Peter2:3 Ngokuba marhamaru kwabo bazonidlelezela ngamezwi wobugalajani. Kwakade balengelwa kulahlwa nokubhujiswa kwabo akukayathi. 
2Peter2:4 Ngitjho nakade uZimu azange ababalele iingilozi ezonako, kodwana wazilahlela ngesirhogweni, wazifaka ngemigodini enzima tshu bonyana zilindele ngapho ukugwetjwa kwazo." 
2Peter2:5 Godu azange arhawukele iphasi lekadeni, kodwana wamlonda uNowa umtjhumayeli wokulunga kanye nabanye abalikhomba, ngesikhathi aletha umthwalela ephasini labangamesabiko uZimu;" 
2Peter2:6 iye, imizi yeSodoma neGomora wayirhayila ngokuyiphendula yaba mlotha, wayenza isibonelo salokho okuzakwenzeka kilabo abangamesabiko." 
2Peter2:7 Godu wahlangula noLoti olungileko obegade asele akhamba ngamanyala wegandelelo leenkhohlakali ezinganamthetho," 
2Peter2:8 ngombana ngokuhlala hlangana nazo, indoda elungileko leyo yawurubajeka emphefumulwenayo ngokubona nokuzwa ilanga nelanga imikhubabo yobuhlongandlebe." 
2Peter2:9 Ngalokho uSomnini uyakwazi ukusindisa labo abamesabako ekulingweni; kuthi abangakalungi ababekele ukuhlunguphazwa ngelanga lokugwetjwa," 
2Peter2:10 khulukhulu labo abazifaka eenkanukweni zenyama zokonakala nabangahloniphi abaphathi. Bamaphikakani, bayazitjhaya begodu abesabi nokuhlambalaza abacwengileko," 
2Peter2:11 khisibe nanyana iingilozi zizikulu ngeenkhwepha nangamandla, azibamangaleli ngehlamba phambi kwakaSomnini." 
2Peter2:12 Kodwana laba abahlambalazako banjengeembandana ezinganamkhumbulo, ezizalelwe ukubanjwa nokubulawa. Bahlambalaza ngezinto abangazaziko; nje-ke nabo bazokubhujiswa njengazo iimbandanezo," 
2Peter2:13 bamukeliswe ukuhlupheka ngokwenza kwabo okumbi. Ukuthaba kwabo kukwenza ihlazo emini libalele. Baziingilamkhuba neembhidlamnyanya bazithabisa ngeenkanuko zabo ezimbi. 
2Peter2:14 Banamehlo azele ukuhlobonga nanamathele ekoneni; bayenga abangakanzinzi epilweni. Ihliziywabo ijayele ukuba marhamaru; babantwana bamanikelela. 
2Peter2:15 Batjhiye indlela enqophileko badurha, balandela indlela kaBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori owathanda umvuzo wekohlakalo." 
2Peter2:16 Kodwana wakhalinywa ngeemphambeko zakhe: Udumbana osimumu wakhuluma ngelizwi lomuntu wavimbela ukuhlanya komphorofidi loyo. 
2Peter2:17 Labo bamithombo enganamanzi nekungu ephetjhulwa siwuruwuru; yeke bagcinelwe ubumnyama obuphathekako. 
2Peter2:18 Bakhuluma amezwi wokuzitjhaya alilize, bakhohlisa ngeenkanuko zabantu benyama abasanda ukuphunyuka kilabo abaphambukileko." 
2Peter2:19 Babathembisa ikululeko, khisibe bona ngokwabo bamakhoboka wokonakala ngombana umuntu ulikhoboka lalokho okumbusako." 
2Peter2:20 Ngambala, emva kobanyana baphunyurhe ekusilaphaleni kwephaseli ngokwazi iKosethu noMsindisi uJesu Krestu, sele godu bararelwe kikho begodu bahlulekile; nje isiphetho sabo sele sisimbi khulu kunekuthomeni." 
2Peter2:21 Bekuyoba ngcono kibo thana akhange bayazi indlela yokulunga kunokuba kuthi sebayazile babuye bawufulathela umyalo ocwengileko owethulwa kibo. 
2Peter2:22 Kubehlele njengesaga nasithi: “Inja ibuyela emahlanzenayo,” nokuthi, “Isavukazana esihlanjisiweko sibuyela edakeni.”"

2Peter3:2 iye, kobana nikhumbule amezwi akhulunywe baphorofidi abacwengileko nemiyalo yeKosi noMsindisi ngabapostoli benu." 
2Peter3:3 Kokuthoma kufuze nizwisise lokhu bonyana emalangeni wokuphela kuzakufika abanyefuli banyefule balandele iinkanuko zabo zokonakala 
2Peter3:4 basithi: “Siphi isithembiso sokuza kwakhe ngombana soloko kwalala abobaba, zoke izinto ziraga njengombana bezinjalo kusukela ekuthomeni kwendalo.”" 
2Peter3:5 Yeke bathanda ukukhohlwa lokhu bona kwekadeni amazulu bekavele akhona ngelizwi lakaZimu, nokobana iphasi ladaleka emanzini begodu ngamanzi lanzinza;" 
2Peter3:6 okwathi ngawo amanzi, ilizwe ebelikhona labhubha ngokurhurhulwa." 
2Peter3:7 Kodwana ngelizwelo izulu nephasi okukhona gadesi kubekelwe umlilo, kulondiwe bekube lilanga lokugwetjwa nelokubhujiswa kwabangamesabiko uZimu." 
2Peter3:8 Yeke-ke bathandekako, ningalibali bona kuSomnini ilanga elilodwa lifana nekulungwana yinye yeminyaka, neminyaka eyikulungwana ifana nelanga elilodwa." 
2Peter3:9 USomnini akasibuthaka ngesithembiso sakhe njengombana abanye bacabanga. Kunalokho uyaninyamezelela, akathandi bonyana kubhubhe namunye, kodwana kobana boke baphenduke." 
2Peter3:10 Kodwana ilanga lakaSomnini lizakufika njengesela, nje-ke amazulu azakudlula ngokukhulu ukuhlokoma, koke kuzakupheliswa ngomlilo, iphasi nemisebenzi ekilo kuzakutjhiswa." 
2Peter3:11 Njengombana zoke izintwezi zizakupheliswa, alo-ke kufanele nibe babantu abanjani epilweni yokucwenga nekumesabeni uZimu na?" 
2Peter3:12 Iye, ekulindeleni nekurhabeleni ukufika kwelanga lakaZimu ngombana amazulu azakuthungelwa ngomlilo apheliswe nakho koke kuzakuncibilikiswa ngomlilo!" 
2Peter3:13 Kodwana ukuya ngokwesithembiso sakhe, silindele amazulu amatjha nephasi elitjha, lapho kuyokuba khona ukulunga." 
2Peter3:14 Ngalokho-ke bathandekako, njengombana nilindele lokhu, tjhisekelelani bona nifunyanwe nguye ninokuthula begodu ninganabala namkha umphambo," 
2Peter3:15 nizibalele ukunyamezela kwakaSomnini njengesindiso. Kube njengombana nomzalwana wethu othandekako uPowula anitlolelako ukuya ngokuhlakanipha akuphiweko," 
2Peter3:16 nakakhuluma ngalokhu eencwadini zakhe zoke. Kukhona ezinye zezinto ezibukhuni ukuzizwisisa, okuzizinto abanganalemuko nabangakaqini bazihlanakezelela ukubhujiswa kwabo, njengombana benza nakezinye iincwadi zemitlolo." 
2Peter3:17 Ngalokho nina bathandekako, njengombana senikwazi lokhu, yelelani, nakungasinjalo ningahle nithatheke ngemitjhapho yabantu abangenamthetho beze niwe ekuqineni kwenu." 
2Peter3:18 Kodwana khulani emseni nelwazini leKosethu noMsindisi uJesu Krestu. Idumo alibe kuye gadesi bekube ngokungapheliko. Amen. 
1John1:1 Lokho ebekukhona ekuthomeni, esakuzwako, sakubona ngamehlwethu, sakuqala besakuthinta ngezandla zethu, sinitjhumayeza khona mayelana nelilizwi lokuphila."

1John1:2 Ukuphilokho kwabonakaliswa, sakubona nje-ke sifakaza ngakho; sitjhumayela kini ukuphila okungapheliko ebegade kukuBaba, nje-ke kwambulwa kithi."

Jude1:4 Nje-ke sebangene ngokukhukhutha labo okwatlolwa ngabo ekadeni bona bangabokulahlwa. Bababantu abangesabi uZimu nabaphendulela umusa kaZimethu emesweni begodu baphika okunguye kwaphela uMnikazi wethu, iKosi uJesu Krestu."

Jude1:6 Ngitjho neengilozi ezingazange zibulonde ubukhosi bazo, kodwana zatjhiya ikhaya lazo, uzilonde eenketanini zesiphelani ebumnyameni obuzikileko zilindele ilanga elikhulu lokugwetjwa." 
Jude1:7 Ngokufanako, iSodoma neGomora kanye nemizi ebhodileko yazibandakanya emabayini ngendlela emameswe nedazukileko, yaba sibonelo sokuhlunguphazwa ngokutjhiswa ngomlilo wesiphelani."

Revelation1:1 Isambulo sakaKrestu asinikelwa nguZimu bonyana abonise iinceku zakhe okufanele kwenzeke msinyana. Lokho wakwenza ngokuthumela ingilozi ukuyobonisa inceku yakhe uJwanisi," 
Revelation1:2 owafakaza ngelizwi lakaZimu nangoJesu Krestu nangakho koke akubonileko.

Revelation1:5 nakuJesu Krestu ufakazi othembekileko, olizibulo labafileko noMbusi wamakhosi wephasi. Kuye osithandako nowasihlenga ezonweni zethu ngeengazi zakhe," 
Revelation1:6 wasenza saba mbuso, saba baphristi bokulotjha uZimu uYise; akube kuye iphazimulo nobukhosi nini nanini. Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Qalani nango asiza ngamafu, amehlo woke azambona, ngitjho nalabo abamgwazako; izizwe zoke zephasi zizokulila ngaye. Iye, kuzokuba njalo! Amen." 
Revelation1:8 “Mina ngingu-Alfa no-Omega,” kutjho uSomnini uZimu, okhona nogade avele akhona nozako."
