Revelation1:12 Nje-ke ngaphenduka ngaqala bonyana ngibone bona bekungelikabani ilizwi ebelikhuluma kimi. Ekuphendukeni kwami ngakhangwa zizinti zeembani ezilikhomba zegolide; 
Revelation1:13 hlangana nezinti lezo ngabona ofana neNdodana yoMuntu embethe izambatho ezide, aqakanise nentambo yegolide esifubeni sakhe." 
Revelation1:14 Ihloko neenhluthu zakhe bezimhlophe twa njengoboya obumhlophe; amehlwakhe anjengamalangabi womlilo," 
Revelation1:15 iinyawo zakhe ziphazima njengedzila etsengiswe ngemlilweni; ilizwi lakhe libhodla njengamanzi amanengi. 
Revelation1:16 Esandleni sakhe bekaphethe iinkwekwezi ezilikhomba, emlonyenakhe kwavela isabula ebukhali ncazombili, ubuso bakhe baphazima njengelanga elibaleleko." 
Revelation1:17 Ngathi nangimbonako ngaduleka phasi eenyaweni zakhe njengofileko. Wabeka isandla sakhe sesidla phezu kwami wathi: “Ungesabi, ngingewokuthoma newokuphela;" 
Revelation1:18 ngingophilako! Bengifile, kodwana qala-ke sengiphila ngokungapheliko, begodu ngiphethe iinhluthulelo zokufa nezephasi labafileko." 
Revelation1:19 Tlola-ke okubonileko, okukhona nalokho okuzakwenzeka emva kwalokhu." 
Revelation1:20 Ifihlakalo yeenkwekwezi ezilikhomba ozibonileko ngesidleni sami kanye nezinti zegolide zeembani ezilikhomba zingilokhu: Iinkwekwezi ezilikhomba ziziingilozi zamabandla alikhomba nezinti zeembani ezilikhomba zegolide zimabandla alikhomba.” 
Revelation2:1 “Kiyo ingilozi yebandla le-Efesu tlola uthi: Naku umlayezo waloyo ophethe iinkwekwezi ezilikhomba esandleni sakhe sesidla, okhamba hlangana nezinti zeembani zegolide ezilikhomba:" 
Revelation2:2 Ngiyayazi yoke imisebenzi yakho, ukukhuthala nokunyamezela kwakho. Ngiyazi bona uyabhalelwa ukubanyamezelela abambi; kodwana wabalinga labo abathi bona babapostoli khisibe abasibo, wabafumana barhwaya amanga." 
Revelation2:3 Wathi unokunyamezela, watshwenywa khulu ngebanga lebizo lami, awuzange udinwe." 
Revelation2:4 Kodwana nginalokhu ngawe: Ulilahlile ithando lakho lokuthoma. 
Revelation2:5 Khumbula lapho uwe khona, uphenduke wenze imisebenzi ebewuyenza ekuthomeni. Nakungasinjalo ngizokuza kuwe, ngisuse ilithi lesibani endawenalo nawungaphendukiko." 
Revelation2:6 Kodwana kuwe kukhona lokhu kokuthi uzonde imisebenzi yamaNikholawo, engiyizondako nami." 
Revelation2:7 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni. “Loyo owahlulako ngiyomnikela ilungelo lokobanyana adle emthini wokuphila osepharadesi lakaZimu.” 
Revelation2:8 “Godu kiyo ingilozi yebandla leSmirna tlola uthi: Naka amezwi avela kiloyo ongowokuthoma newokuphela, owafako wabuye waphila godu:" 
Revelation2:9 Ngiyabazi ubudisi nobuchaka bakho kodwana khisibe unjingile; ngazi nehlamba yalabo abathi bamaJuda bangasiwo kodwana balisinagogi lakaSathana. 
Revelation2:10 Ungesabi lokho ozakuhlupheka ngakho. Yelela, uSathana usazokudlhunya abanye benu ngesikhungweni ukuze nizizinywe, nibe nobudisi amalanga alitjhumi. Thembeka bekube sekufeni, ngizakupha isihlohlo sokuphila." 
Revelation2:11 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni. “Ohlulako akasoze oniwa kukufa kwesibili.” 
Revelation2:12 “Kiyo ingilozi yebandla lePhergamu tlola uthi: Naka amezwi waloyo ophethe isabula ebukhali ngapha nangapha: 
Revelation2:13 Ngiyakwazi lapho uhlala khona, iye, lapha uSathana ajamise khona isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi. Nokho ubambelele ebizweni lami begodu azange uphike ukukholwa kimi ngitjho nemihleni ka-Antiphasi, ufakazi wami othembekileko, owabulawelwa hlangana nani lapha uSathana aphila khona." 
Revelation2:14 Kodwana kukhona okungangiphathi kuhle ngawe: Kukhona abathileko hlangana nani ababambelele eemfundisweni zakaBhalamu, owafundisa uBhalaki bona abeke isikhubekiso phambi kwabakwa-Israyeli, kobana badle okuhlatjelwe iinthombe nokuziphatha ngobufebe." 
Revelation2:15 Ngokunjalo nahlangana nani godu kukhona nabanye abalandela iimfundiso zamaNikholawo. 
Revelation2:16 Nje-ke phenduka! Nakungasinjalo ngiyeza kuwe masinyana kobana ngilwe nabo ngesabula yomlomami. 
Revelation2:17 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni. “Ohlulako ngizomupha imana ethukusiweko; ngimnikele ilitje elimhlophe ekutlolwe kilo ibizo elitjha elingaziwa mumuntu ngaphandle kwaloyo olamukelako.” 
Revelation2:18 “Kiyo ingilozi yebandla leThiyathira tlola uthi: Naka amezwi weNdodana kaZimu, enamehlo inga malangabi womlilo, iinyawo zayo ziphazima njengedzila etsengiswe ngemlilweni ithi:" 
Revelation2:19 Ngiyayazi imisebenzakho, ithando nokukholwa kwakho, ukulotjha nokunyamezela kwakho nokuthi imisebenzakho idlula yokuthoma." 
Revelation2:20 Kodwana indabami ngawe kukobana unyamezelela umfazi okuthiwa nguJezebheli, ozibiza athi umphorofidi bona afundise iinsebenzi zami bona zenze ubufebe nokudla okuhlatjelwe iinthombe." 
Revelation2:21 Ngamnikela ithuba lokuphenduka, kodwana akhange afune ukuphenduka ebufebeni bakhe." 
Revelation2:22 Yelela-ke, ngizomphosela embhedeni weenhlungu, kuthi labo ahlobonga nabo ngibaphosele ekubandezelekeni okukhulu nakube abaphenduki emisebenzinakhe." 
Revelation2:23 Ngizobabhubhisa abantwana bakhe; amabandla woke azakwazi bona nginguloyo ohlola iziso neenhliziyo begodu ngizokuvuza omunye nomunye wenu ngokwemisebenzakhe. 
Revelation2:24 “Nje-ke ngithi kini nakwabanye abaseThiyathira, labo abanganamatheli efundisweni le nabangakafundi lokho ekuthiwa ngokuzikileko kwakaSathana, ‘Angisanithwesi omunye umthwalo," 
Revelation2:25 kwaphela bambelelani kilokho eninakho bengifike.’ 
Revelation2:26 “Loyo owahlulako, enze imisebenzami bekube sekupheleni, ngiyomupha ilungelo lokubusa izizwe." 
Revelation2:27 Uzozibusa ngentonga yesimbi, aziphahlaze zibe ziincucwana njengembiza yomdaka, iye, njengalokha nami ngamukela kuBaba." 
Revelation2:28 Godu ngizomnikela ikhwezi lokusa. 
Revelation2:29 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni.” 
Revelation3:1 “Kiyo ingilozi yebandla leSardisi tlola uthi: Naka amezwi waloyo ophethe imimoya elikhomba yakaZimu kanye neenkwekwezi ezilikhomba, uthi ngiyayazi imisebenzakho begodu udume ngelokuthi uyaphila kanti ufile." 
Revelation3:2 Yeke, vuka uqinise lokho okuseleko nobekusele kuzokufa ngombana ngifunyene imisebenzakho ingakapheleli phambi kwakaZimami." 
Revelation3:3 Nje-ke khumbula lokho okwamukeleko wakuzwa; kulalele uphenduke. Kodwana nawungaphaphamiko, ngizokukhokhobela njengesela, angekhe wazi bona ngizokufika kuwe ngasiphi isikhathi." 
Revelation3:4 Nokho kusesekhona abantu abambalwa eSardisi abangakasilaphazi izambatho zabo; bazokukhamba nami bembethe ezimhlophe ngombana bafanele. 
Revelation3:5 Ngokunjalo nohlulako uzokwembathiswa ezimhlophe, ibizo lakhe angekhe ngalesula encwadini yabaphilako; ngizolivuma phambi kwakaBaba naphambi kweengilozi zakhe." 
Revelation3:6 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni.” 
Revelation3:7 “Kiyo ingilozi yebandla leFiladelfiya tlola uthi, Naka amezwi waloyo ocwengileko noqinisileko, loyo ophethe isihluthulelo sakaDavida, ovula kungavali muntu, avale kungavuli muntu, uthi:" 
Revelation3:8 Ngiyayazi imisebenzakho. Qala, ngibeke phambi kwakho umnyango ovulekileko nongekhe wavalwa mumuntu. Ngiyazi bonyana unamandla amancani, nokho amezwami uwalondile nebizo lami akhange uliphike." 
Revelation3:9 Labo abalisinagogi lakaSathana, abathi bamaJuda khisibe abasiwo kodwana baleya amanga, ngizobenza beze bazokuguqa eenyaweni zakho bebalemuke bonyana ngikuthandile wena." 
Revelation3:10 Njengombana uwulondile umyalo wami wokunyamezela ngesineke, nami-ke ngizokuhlenga nakufika isikhathi sokulingwa esizokwehlela loke ilizwe kobana kuzizinywe abakhileko ephasini." 
Revelation3:11 Ngiyeza masinyana; londa lokho onakho ukuze kungabikhona okwemuka isihlohlo sakho. 
Revelation3:12 Ohlulako ngizomenza isika ethempelini lakaZimami; angeze asasuka kilo. Ngizokutlola kuye ibizo lakaZimami nebizo lomuzi kaZimami, iJerusalema elitjha eliyokwehla livela kuZimami ezulwini. Iye, ngitlole phezu kwakhe nebizo lami elitjha." 
Revelation3:13 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni.” 
Revelation3:14 “Kiyo ingilozi yebandla leLawodikhiya tlola uthi: Naka amezwi ka-Amen, ufakazi othembekileko noqinisileko, osisusa salokho okubunjwe nguZimu, uthi:" 
Revelation3:15 Ngiyayazi imisebenzakho nokobana awuqandi, awutjhisi. Bengifisa bona ngathana bewungoqandako namkha otjhisako." 
Revelation3:16 Alo, njengombana ubuthuku nje, ungatjhisi ungaqandi, ngizokukhafula." 
Revelation3:17 Wena uthi, ‘Nginjingile, ngizibulungele umnotho, nje-ke angisweli litho.’ Awuziboni bonyana nguwe osidwedwe, wokurhawukelwa, ochakileko, ongaboniko nohlubule." 
Revelation3:18 Ngalokho ngiyakweluleka bona uthenge kimi igolide elicoliswe ngomlilo khona uzakuba ngonjingileko; thenga nezambatho ezimhlophe khona uzakwembatha ufihle ihlazo lobubhunubhunu bakho; iye, uthenge nesizelo ongasitjhatjha emehlwenakho ukuze ubone." 
Revelation3:19 Labo engibathandako ngiyabasola bengibakhalimele; nje-ke tjhiseka, uphenduke!" 
Revelation3:20 Qala, ngijame emnyango ngiyakokoda! Nakube umuntu uzwa ilizwi lami avule, ngizakungena kuye ngidle naye, naye adle nami." 
Revelation3:21 Ohlulako ngizomnikela ilungelo lokuhlala nami esihlalweni sami sobukhosi, kuzakuba njengombana nami ngahlula bengahlala noBaba esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi." 
Revelation3:22 “Onendlebe akezwe lokho uMoya akutjhoko emabandleni!” 
Revelation4:1 Ngemva kwalokhu, ngaqala ngabona ezulwini umnyango uvulekile. Ilizwi lokuthoma engalizwako likhuluma nami belinjengeporompita, lisithi: “Akhese unyukele lapha ngizokutjengisa bona kuzokwenzekani emva kwalokhu!”" 
Revelation4:2 Khona lapho ngaba kuMoya, ngabona isihlalo sobukhosi ezulwini kukhona obekahlezi kiso." 
Revelation4:3 Loyo obekahlezi lapho bekabonakala anjengelitje lejasiperi nesardiyo; begodu esihlalweni sobukhosi mazombe kunezungu leKosi elibonakala inga yimabula. 
Revelation4:4 Esihlalweni sobukhosi mazombe bekunezinye iinhlalo ezimatjhumi amabili nane, phezu kwazo kuhlezi abaphathi abamatjhumi amabili nane, bembethe izambatho ezimhlophe bathwele neehlohlo zegolide." 
Revelation4:5 Khona esihlalweni sobukhosi lapho kwabaneka imibani, kwezwakala umdumo neensaba zokuraramba. Phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi leso kwavutha iimbani ezilikhomba ezimimoya elikhomba yakaZimu." 
Revelation4:6 Godu phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi bekunokuthileko okuqaleka inga lilwandle lerhalasi, kudarhe njengekristali. Esihlalweni sobukhosi mazombe nangemahlangothini woke waso kukhona iimbunjwa ezine eziphilako, zigcwele amehlo ngaphambili nangemuva." 
Revelation4:7 Isibunjwa sokuthoma besifana nengwenyama, sesibili sifana nekunzi, sesithathu sinobuso bomuntu, sesine sifana nekhozi eliphaphako." 
Revelation4:8 Iimbunjwa ezine lezi bezineempiko ezisithandathu ngasinye, zembethwe mamehlo ngaphakathi nangaphandle. Bezingaqedi ukurhuba imini nobusuku zithi: “Ucwengile, ucwengile, ucwengile, uSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke, obekavele akhona, okhona nozako!”" 
Revelation4:9 Kwathi lokha iimbunjwa eziphilakwezi nazimdumisa, zimhlonipha begodu zimthokoza loyo ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi, iye, yena ophila nini nanini," 
Revelation4:10 abaphathi abamatjhumi amabili nane bawa phasi phambi kwaloyo ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi balotjha loyo ophila isiphelani; baphosa iinhlohlo zabo phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi bathi: 
Revelation4:11 “Ufanele wena Somnini Zimethu, ukwamukela idumo, ubukhosi namandla ngombana nguwe owabumba koke begodu koke okukhona kwadalwa ngentando yakho.”" 
Revelation5:1 Nje-ke ngabona umsongo ngesidleni saloyo ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi utlolwe ngaphakathi nangaphandle, unanyathiselwe amaphawu alikhomba." 
Revelation5:2 Ngabese ngibona ingilozi enamandla imemezela ngelizwi elikhulu ithi: “Ngubani ofanele ukunamulula amaphawu alikhomba abe avule umsongo na?” 
Revelation5:3 Bekungekho namunye ezulwini, ephasini nangaphasi kwephasi owaba namandla wokusongulula umsongo alunguze ngaphakathi kwawo." 
Revelation5:4 Ngadinda isililo ngombana bekunganamuntu ongasongulula umsongo alunguze ngaphakathi kwawo. 
Revelation5:5 Yeke omunye wabaphathi wathi kimi: “Ungalili! Qala, iNgwenyama yekoro yakwaJuda emurabhu kaDavida ihlulile kobana ikwazi ukunamulula umsongo namaphawu wawo alikhomba.”" 
Revelation5:6 Nje-ke ngabona iMvana ijame kwanga ihlatjiwe, iphakathi kwesihlalo sobukhosi naphakathi kwezinye iimbunjwa eziphilako kanye nahlangana nabaphathi. Beyineempondo ezilikhomba namehlo alikhomba okumimoya elikhomba yakaZimu ethunyelwe kilo loke iphasi." 
Revelation5:7 Yaya yawuthatha umsongo esidleni saloyo ogade ahlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi. 
Revelation5:8 Kuthe bona iwuthathe, iimbunjwa ezine eziphilako nabaphathi abamatjhumi amabili nane baguqa phambi kweMvana, omunye nomunye aphethe iharibha nezitja zegolide zizele itjhwalo, okumithandazo yabacwengileko." 
Revelation5:9 Zavuma irhubo elitjha zathi: “Ufanele wena ukuthatha umsongo, unamulule amaphawu ngombana gade uhlatjiwe, ngeengazi zakho wahlengela uZimu abacwengileko abavela kenye nenye ikoro, ilimi, abantu nesizwe," 
Revelation5:10 wabenza umbuso, baba baphristi bokulotjha uZimethu, begodu bazakubusa ephasini.”" 
Revelation5:11 Nje-ke ngaqala, ngezwa ilizwi leengilozi ezinengi zizombe isihlalo sobukhosi, iindalwa ezine eziphilako nabaphathi. Bekuziingidigidi neenkulungwana ngeenkulungwana," 
Revelation5:12 zirhuba ngelizwi elikhulu zithi: “Ikufanele iMvana eyahlatjwako ukwamukela amandla nomnono, ukuhlakanipha nobukhosi, idumo, iphazimulo nokubatjazwa!”" 
Revelation5:13 Yeke ngezwa zoke iimbunjwa ezulwini nephasini, iye, nezingaphasi kwephasi nangelwandle, ngitjho nakho koke okukikho kukhalela kusithi: “Kiloyo ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi nakiyo iMvana akube lidumo, iphazimulo namandla ngokungapheliko nini nanini.”" 
Revelation5:14 Iimbunjwa ezine eziphilako zathi: “Amen,” nabaphathi bawa phasi, balotjha." 
Revelation6:1 Nje-ke ngabona iMvana inamulula elinye lamaphawu alikhomba; ngezwa esinye seembunjwa ezine eziphilako sirhuwelela inga mdumo sithi: “Yewuze!” 
Revelation6:2 Ngithe nangiqalako ngabona injomani emhlophe, umkhweli wayo gade aphethe umsebe; nje-ke wanikelwa isihlohlo, waphuma angohlulako, wahlula." 
Revelation6:3 Kuthe lokha iMvana nayinamulula iphawu lesibili, ngezwa isibunjwa sesibili esiphilako simemeza sithi: “Yewuze!”" 
Revelation6:4 Nje-ke kwaphuma enye injomani ebovu be; umkhweli wayo wavunyelwa bona asuse ukuthula ephasini ukuze abantu babulalane, begodu wanikelwa isabula ekulu." 
Revelation6:5 Kuthe lokha iMvana nayinamulula iphawu lesithathu, ngezwa isibunjwa sesithathu esiphilako simemeza sithi: “Yewuze!” Nje-ke ngaqala, qala bekunenjomani enzima, umkhweli wayo aphethe iinlinganiso ezimbili esandleni sakhe." 
Revelation6:6 Ngezwa okungathi lilizwi hlangana neembunjwa ezine eziphilako lisithi: “Isiqwebu sinye sekoroyi ngesipaparwana neenqwebu ezintathu zebhali ngesipaparwana, kodwana ungoni amafutha we-oliva newayini!”" 
Revelation6:7 Lokha iMvana nayinamulula iphawu lesine ngezwa isibunjwa sesine simemeza sithi: “Yewuze!” 
Revelation6:8 Ngithe nangiqalako, naso injomani etshetlha ibizo lomkhweli wayo nguKufa, alandelwa nguHadesi. Banikelwa amandla phezu kwengcenye yesine yephasi bona babulale ngesabula, ngendlala, ngezifo nangeembandana zommango." 
Revelation6:9 Lokha iMvana nayinamulula iphawu lesihlanu, ngabona ngaphasi kwe-aldari imiphefumulo yalabo egade babulewe ngebanga lelizwi lakaZimu nangebanga lobufakazi ababe nabo." 
Revelation6:10 Barhuwelela bathi: “Somnini Somandla, wena ocwengileko noqinisileko, kuzabe kube nini ngaphambi kobana ugwebe begodu usibuyiselele ngeengazi zethu na?”" 
Revelation6:11 Nje-ke omunye nomunye wanikelwa isambatho esimhlophe bekwathiwa akhe baphumule kwesikhatjhana bekuphelele isibalo seenceku abakanye nazo nesabazalwana ebebasazokubulawa njengabo. 
Revelation6:12 Lokha iMvana nayinamulula iphawu lesithandathu, ngaqala, qala bekunokusikinyeka kwephasi okukhulu: Ilanga lafiphala laba nzima njengomsizi, inyanga yaba njengeengazi;" 
Revelation6:13 iinkwekwezi zesibhakabhaka zawela ephasini njengomuthi wamakhiwani nawuthintitha iinthelo zawo zebusika lokha nawusikinywa mumoya. 
Revelation6:14 Isibhakabhaka sanyamalala njengomsongo nawusongeka wenyuka, iintaba neenhlengele zatjhidiswa eendaweni zazo." 
Revelation6:15 Amakhosi wephasi, ababusi, iinkhulu, iinjinga neemphathimandla, omunye nomunye, olikhoboka nokhululekileko, bazifihla emarharheni naphakathi kwamadwala weentaba;" 
Revelation6:16 barhuwelela iintaba namadwala bathi: “Welani phezu kwethu nisisithe ebusweni balowo ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi nebukhalini beMvana! 
Revelation6:17 Mbala ilanga elesabekako lelaka labo lifikile! Alo, ngubani ongalijamela na?”" 
Revelation7:1 Ngemva kwalokho ngabona iingilozi ezine zijame emagumbini womane wephasi. Bezibambe imimoya emine yephasi khona kungazukuba khona ummoya ovunguzako ephasinapha namkha elwandle nanyana uphephule umuthi. 
Revelation7:2 Ngabona enye ingilozi ikhuphuka ngepumalanga iphethe iphawu lakaZimu ophilako. Yarhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu iingilozi ezine ebezinikelwe amandla wokona iphasi nelwandle," 
Revelation7:3 yathi kizo: “Ningaloni iphasi, ilwandle namkha imithi singakagibi iphawu eempandla zeenceku zakaZimethu.”" 
Revelation7:4 Godu ngezwa isibalo salabo abagitjwa ngephawu, bebaziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amane nane bagitjwe ekorweni enye nenye yabantu bakwa-Israyeli:" 
Revelation7:5 Iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaJuda; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaRubeni; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaGadi; 
Revelation7:6 iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yaka-Atjheri; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaNafitali; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaManase; 
Revelation7:7 Iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaSimiyoni; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaLevi; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yaka-Isakari; 
Revelation7:8 iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaZebuloni; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaJosefa; iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakaBhenjamini. 
Revelation7:9 Ngemva kwalokho ngaqala ngabona isiqubuthu esikhulu ebesingekhe sabalwa ngobunengi. Besivela kizo zoke izizwe, iinkoro, abantu neenlimi, sijame phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi naphambi kweMvana sembethe okumhlophe siphethe amatjhwaba womuthi wesundu ngezandla." 
Revelation7:10 Sarhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu sathi: “Isindiso ingeyakaZimethu ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi neyeMvana!” 
Revelation7:11 Iingilozi zoke bezijame esihlalweni sobukhosi mazombe, godu kuzombe abaphathi neembunjwa ezine eziphilako. Boke labo bawa ngobuso bathi mbo phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi balotjha uZimu," 
Revelation7:12 bathi: “Amen. “Idumo nephazimulo, ukuhlakanipha, ukuthokozwa nokuhlonitjhwa, iye, amandla neenkhwepha akube kuZimethu nini nanini! Amen.”" 
Revelation7:13 Omunye wabaphathi wangibuza wathi: “Bobani laba abembethe ezimhlophe begodu bavelaphi na?” 
Revelation7:14 Ngathi kuye: “Kosami, nguwe owaziko.” Nje-ke wathi kimi: “Laba ngibo abavela ekuhluphekeni okukhulu. Bazihlanzile iingubo zabo bazenza zaba mhlophe eengazini zeMvana." 
Revelation7:15 Kungakho bajame phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi sakaZimu, “bamlotjha imini nobusuku ngethempelini lakhe, iye, loyo ohlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi uyobafukamela." 
Revelation7:16 Abayokulamba, abasayokoma, abasayokutjhiswa lilanga nanyana sivuthevuthe" 
Revelation7:17 ngombana iMvana ephakathi kwesihlalo sobukhosi izakuba ngumelusi wabo. Izabadosela emithonjeni yamanzi wokuphila, uZimu abasule zoke iinyembezi emehlweni wabo.”" 
Revelation8:1 Kuthe lokha iMvana nayinamulula iphawu lekhomba, kwathula pheze isiquntu se-awara ezulwini, kwathi du." 
Revelation8:2 Nje-ke ngabona iingilozi ezilikhomba zijame phambi kwakaZimu; zanikelwa iimpalapala ezilikhomba. 
Revelation8:3 Kwasuka enye ingilozi iphethe idengela legolide letjhwalo yajama e-aldarini. Yanikelwa itjhwalo elinengi bona ilinikele nemithandazo yabo boke abacwengileko phezu kwe-aldari legolide, okutjho eliphambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi." 
Revelation8:4 Intuthu yetjhwalo kanye nemithandazo yabacwengileko yenyukela phambi kwakaZimu isuka esandleni sengilozi. 
Revelation8:5 Nje-ke ingilozi yathatha idengela yalizalisa ngomlilo we-aldarini, yawurhatjha ephasini; kwaba khona ukuduma nokuraramba, ukuphazima kombani nokusikinyeka kwephasi." 
Revelation8:6 Iingilozi ezilikhomba ebeziphethe iimporompita ezilikhomba zalungela ukuzivuthela. 
Revelation8:7 Ingilozi yokuthoma yavuthela iporompita yayo, kwaba khona isinanja nomlilo kuvangene neengazi, kwathululelwa phezu kwephasi. Ingcenye yesithathu yephasi yatjhiswa; godu nengcenye yesithathu yemithi nakho koke okubutjani kwatjha kwalotha." 
Revelation8:8 Ingilozi yesibili yavuthela iporompita yayo, kwabonakala isigidija esifana nentaba sinephuka umlilo, saphoswa ngelwandle. Ingcenye yesithathu yelwandle yaphenduka iingazi." 
Revelation8:9 Ingcenye yesithathu yalokho okuphilako ngelwandle kwafa nengcenye yesithathu yemikhumbi yoniwa. 
Revelation8:10 Ingilozi yesithathu yavuthela iporompita, ikwekwezi ekulu yawa ezulwini ibaneka njengesihlothi esivuthako; yawela engcenyeni yesithathu yemilambo nemithonjeni yamanzi." 
Revelation8:11 Ibizo lekwekwezi leyo kwathiwa liNghana. Ingcenye yesithathu yamanzi yaphenduka yababa, kwafa abanengi ngamanzi lawo ngombana besele ababa." 
Revelation8:12 Ingilozi yesine yavuthela iporompita yayo, kwathi ingcenye yesithathu yelanga, ingcenye yesithathu yenyezi nengcenye yesithathu yeenkwekwezi, iye, koke kwengcenye yesithathu yomkhanyo wakhona kwafiphala; azange kusaba khona ukukhanya engcenyeni yesithathu yemini, ngokunjalo nobusuku." 
Revelation8:13 Ngisaqalile njalo, ngezwa ikhozi liphapha hlangana nesibanga lilila ngelizwi elikhulu lithi: “Maye! Maye! Maye kibo abakhileko ephasini! Bazozizwa ngokuzwakala kwezinye zeempporompita ezisazokuvuthelwa ziingilozi ezintathu.”" 
Revelation9:1 Ingilozi yesihlanu yavuthela iporompita, ngabona ikwekwezi ebeyikhithike ezulwini yawela ephasini; yona-ke yanikelwa isihluthulelo somgodi onganamkhawulo." 
Revelation9:2 Yavula umgodi onganamkhawulo kwaphuma intuthu ngesiwulwini kwanga intuthu yekehla yomlilo; ilanga nesibanga kwafiphala ngebanga lentuthu ephuma ngesiwulwini. 
Revelation9:3 Hlangana nentuthu kwavela isikhonyani sehlela ephasini, sona saphiwa igunya bona sibe namandla njengeempephenu zephasi." 
Revelation9:4 Sakhalinywa bona singarhayili utjani bephasi nanyana yini ehlaza, iye, nanyana ngiwuphi umuthi, kwaphela abantu labo abanganaphawu lakaZimu eempandla zabo." 
Revelation9:5 Savunyelwa bona sibazwise ubuhlungu iinyanga ezihlanu kodwana singababulali. Ubuhlungu esabazwisa bona, bebufana nobuhlungu bepephenu lokha nayitinyela umuntu." 
Revelation9:6 Ngemihla leyo abantu bayokwenyula ukufa kodwana ukufa angekhe kubafikele; iye, bazokuthanda bonyana bafe kodwana ukufa kuzobabalekela." 
Revelation9:7 Godu isikhwenyani saqaleka njengeenjomani ezilungiselwe ipi. Eenhloko zaso besinalokho okufana neenhlohlo zegolide; ubuso baso bebufana nobabantu," 
Revelation9:8 iinhluthu zaso zifana nezabafazi, kuthi amazinyo waso afane newamabhubezi." 
Revelation9:9 Besineemvikelo zesifuba ezinjengeemviko zesimbi; itjhada leempiko zaso belifana netjhada leenkarana ezinengi ezibotjhelwe iinjomani ezigijimela epini. 
Revelation9:10 Besinemisila etinyela njengeempephenu; begodu imisila leyo inamandla wokulimaza abantu iinyanga ezihlanu. 
Revelation9:11 Sinekosi yaso ekuyingilozi yomgodi onganamkhawulo; ibizo layo ngesiHebheru ngu-Abadoni, ngesiGirigi kuthiwa ngu-Apholiyoni." 
Revelation9:12 Umaye wokuthoma udlulile. Nje-ke abomaye ababili basazokuza. 
Revelation9:13 Ingilozi yesithandathu yavuthela ipalapala, ngezwa ilizwi livela eempondweni ezine ze-aldari legolide phambi kwakaZimu," 
Revelation9:14 lathi engilozini yesithandathu ebeyiphethe iporompita: “Akhe utjhaphulule iingilozi ezine ezikhungeke emlanjeni omkhulu iYufrathe!” 
Revelation9:15 Ngokunjalo-ke, zatjhatjhululwa iingilozi ezine ebegade sele zilungiselelwe i-awara, ilanga, inyanga nomnyaka kobana zibhubhise okwesithathu kwabantu." 
Revelation9:16 Isibalo samabutho akhwele iinjomani besiziingidi ezimakhulu amabili; ngokunjalo ngezwa isibalo sawo. 
Revelation9:17 Nje-ke nasi indlela engabona ngayo iinjomani embonweni wami: Abakhweli bazo bebafake iimvikelo zeemfuba zombala onjengomlilo, umbala ohlaza njengesibhakabhaka nezimthubi. Iinhloko zeenjomani bezifana neenhloko zamabhubezi; emilonyeni yazo kwaphuma umlilo, intuthu nesibabuli." 
Revelation9:18 Ngeenhluphekwezo kwabhujiswa isithathu sabantu, okutjho ngomlilo, ngentuthu nangesibabuli okwaphuma emlonyeni weenjomani." 
Revelation9:19 Amandla weenjomanezo gade asemilonyeni nemisileni yazo ngombana imisila yazo leyo beyinjengeenyoka, ineenhloko ekungizo eziyingozi yokulimaza." 
Revelation9:20 Inengi labantu elingazange libulawe ngeenhluphekwezi, akhange liphenduke emisebenzini yalo eliyenzako namkha lilise ukulotjha amadimoni neenthombembunjwa zegolide, zesiliva, zekoporo, zelitje nekhuni ezingakwazi ukubona, ukuzwa namkha ukukhamba." 
Revelation9:21 Begodu azange baphenduke ekubulaleni, ebuloyini, ekungwadleni nekwebeni kwabo." 
Revelation10:1 Ngabona enye ingilozi enamandla amakhulu yehla ezulwini, iphuthelwe lilifu inezungu leKosi ehloko. Ubuso bayo bebunjengelanga nemilenzayo injengeensika zomlilo." 
Revelation10:2 Ngesandleni sayo beyiphethe umsongo omncani ovuliweko. Beyitlakalajile ibeke inyawo layo langesidleni elwandle, langesinceleni yalibeka ehlabathini." 
Revelation10:3 Yarhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu elizwakala njengokubhodla kwebhubezi. Kuthe nayirhuwelelako, kwezwakala imidumo elikhomba." 
Revelation10:4 Lokha nakuzwakala imidumo elikhomba nami besele ngizilungiselele ukutlola, kodwana ngezwa ilizwi livela ezulwini lisithi: “Kugibe ngephawu lokho okukhulunywe midumo elikhomba, ungakutloli.”" 
Revelation10:5 Ingilozi engayibonako itlakalajele ngelwandle nehlabathini yaphakamisela isidla ezulwini," 
Revelation10:6 yafunga ngaloyo ophila nini nanini, owabumba izulu nokukilo, iphasi nokukilo, ilwandle nokukilo, yathi: “Angekhe kusaba khona ukuriyada!" 
Revelation10:7 Kodwana emalangeni lokha ingilozi yekhomba nasele izokuvuthela ipalapala yayo, ifihlakalo kaZimu izakupheleliswa njengombana amemezela eencekwini zakhe, abaphorofidi.”" 
Revelation10:8 Nje-ke ilizwi engalizwako likhuluma lisezulwini labuye lakhuluma nami godu lathi: “Khamba uyokuthatha umsongo ovulekileko esandleni sengilozi etlakalajele phezu kwelwandle nehlabathini.” 
Revelation10:9 Yeke ngaya engilozini ngafese ngayibawa bona inginikele umsongo omncani loyo. Yona yathi kimi: “Yewuwuthathe uwugome! Uzokubaba ngendeni yakho kodwana ube mnandi njengeliju ngemlonyeni wakho.” 
Revelation10:10 Ngawuthatha-ke umsongo omncani loyo esandleni sengilozi ngawugoma. Waba mnandi njengeliju ngemlonyeni wami, kodwana kuthe lokha nangiqedako ukuwugoma, wangijikela wababa ngendeni." 
Revelation10:11 Nje-ke kwathiwa kimi: “Kufanele ubuye uphorofide godu ngabantu abanengi, ngezizwe, ngeenlimi nangamakhosi.”" 
Revelation11:1 Nganikelwa ilithi lokulinganisa elinjengedondolo bekwathiwa kimi: “Sikima ulinganise ithempeli ne-aldari lakaZimu, ubale nalabo abalotjha lapho," 
Revelation11:2 kodwana ungayilinganisi ikundla engaphandle kwethempeli, ilise ngombana inikelwe izizwe begodu zizokugadanga emzini ocwengileko iinyanga ezimatjhumi amane nambili." 
Revelation11:3 Ngizokunikela abofakazi bami ababili amandla wokuphorofida amalanga ayikulungwana enamakhulu amabili namatjhumi asithandathu.” 
Revelation11:4 Labo bangiyo imithi emibili ye-oliva nezinti ezimbili zesibani ezijame phambi kwakaSomnini iKosi yephasi. 
Revelation11:5 Nakukhona ofuna ukubakhubaza, kuphuma umlilo emilonyeni yabo iqothule amanaba wabo; ngileyo-ke indlela ekuthi loyo olinga ukubalimaza ekufuze abulawe ngayo." 
Revelation11:6 Banegunya lokuvala isibhakabhaka ukuze izulu lingani ngesikhathi abatjhumayela ngaso. Begodu banegunya lokuphendula amanzi abe ziingazi nokumadlha iphasi nanyana ngasiphi isifo ngokuthanda kwabo. 
Revelation11:7 Kuzakuthi lokha nasele baqede ubufakazi babo, isibandana siphume ngemgodini onganamkhawulo silwe nabo, sibahlule besibabulale." 
Revelation11:8 Iindumbu zabo ziyokurabhalala eendleleni zomuzi omkhulu obizwa ngokwesiphorofido bona yiSodoma neGibhide, lapha godu neKosi yabo yabethelwa khona." 
Revelation11:9 Abantu abavela emindenini, eenkorweni, eenlimini nezizweni bayokurhudulela iindumbu zabo amehlo amalanga amathathu nesiquntu bebangavumi bona zibulungwe." 
Revelation11:10 Abantu bephasi bazakucanasa ngabo bebagidinge ngokuphana izipho. Lokho bazakwenza ngombana abaphorofidi ababilabo babe lihlupho ebantwini abahlala ephasini. 
Revelation11:11 Kodwana ngemva kwamalanga amathathu nesiquntu kwangena kibo ummoya ophilisako uvela kuZimu, nje-ke basikima bajama ngeenyawo, kwathi labo abababonako bafikelwa kukwesaba." 
Revelation11:12 Bezwa ilizwi livela ezulwini lisithi kibo: “Yenyukani nize lapha!” Benyukela-ke ezulwini ngelifu amanaba wabo abaqalile. 
Revelation11:13 Khonokho kwaba khona ukusikinyeka kwephasi bekwadilika kwetjhumi komuzi. Kwafa abantu abaziinkulungwana ezilikhomba ekusikinyekeni lokho; inengi lesaba beladumisa uZimu wezulwini. 
Revelation11:14 Umaye wesibili sekadlulile; masinyana kuza umaye wesithathu. 
Revelation11:15 Nje-ke ingolozi yekhomba yavuthela ipalapala yayo, kwezwakala amezwi ahlokomako ezulwini asithi: “Umbuso wephasi sewuphenduke umbuso wakaSomnini nowakaKrestu begodu uzakubusa nini nanini.”" 
Revelation11:16 Abaphathi abamatjhumi amabili nane abahlezi phambi koZimu bawa mbo ngobuso balotjha uZimu," 
Revelation11:17 bathi: “Siyakuthokoza Somnini, Zimu Mninimandlawoke, wena okhona nogade uvele ukhona, iye, siyakuthokoza ngombana uthethe amandlakho amakhulu, uthomile uyabusa." 
Revelation11:18 Izizwe zithukuthele kodwana ilaka lakho lifikile, okusikhathi sokugweba labo abangasekho ukuze uvuze iinceku zakho okubaphorofidi; iye, kuvuzwe nabacwengileko bakho okungilabo abesaba ibizo lakho, abakhulu nabancani begodu kubhujiswe labo ababhubhisa iphasi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Ithempeli lakaZimu ezulwini lavuleka petle, kwabonakala i-aldari lesivumelwano lingethempelinapho; begodu bekukhona ukubaneka kwemibani, ukuraramba, ukutletlebula kokuduma kwezulu, ukusikinyeka kwephasi kanye namagidija wesinanja." 
Revelation12:1 Kwavela isibonakaliso esimangazako ezulwini: Umfazi embethe ilanga, inyezi ingaphasi kweenyawo zakhe, ehloko athwele isihlohlo seenkwekwezi ezilitjhumi nambili." 
Revelation12:2 Bekasidisi begodu alila ngemirhelo. 
Revelation12:3 Kwabonakala esinye isibonakaliso ezulwini. Qala nango unomrhaso omkhulu obomvu, oneenhloko ezilikhomba, iimpondo ezilitjhumi neenhlohlo ezilikhomba eenhlokweni zakhe." 
Revelation12:4 Umsila wakhe wawola ingcenye yesithathu yeenkwekwezi zezulu, waziwululela ephasini. Nje-ke unomrhaso wajama phambi komfazi obekasele azokubeletha ukuze azokudla umntwanakhe loyo emva kobana abelethiwe." 
Revelation12:5 Wabeletha umsana oyokubusa izizwe zoke ngentonga yesimbi. Nje-ke umntwana womfazi loyo wahlwithwa wasiwa esihlalweni sakaZimu sobukhosi; 
Revelation12:6 umfazi yena wabalekela erhalawumbeni lapha bekanendawo ayilungiselwa nguZimu ukuze ondliwe lapho amalanga ayikulungwana namakhulu amabili anamatjhumi asithandathu. 
Revelation12:7 Kwaba khona ipi ezulwini; uMikhayeli neengilozi zakhe bekalwa nonomrhaso; unomrhaso neengilozi zakhe bazibuyiselela," 
Revelation12:8 kodwana bebanganamandla aneleko yeke bahlulwa nendawabo yangasabikhona ezulwini. 
Revelation12:9 Ngalokho waphoswa phasi unomrhaso omkhulu, inyoka endala ekuthiwa nguMtjoli noSathana, umkhohlisi wephasi loke; iye, waphoselwa ephasini neengilozi zakhe zalahlwa naye." 
Revelation12:10 Yeke ngezwa ilizwi elikhulu ezulwini lisithi: “Nje-ke kufike isindiso, amandla nombuso kaZimethu; igunya lingelakaKrestu ngombana ummangaleli wabazalwana bethu wehliselwe phasi; iye, loyo obamangalela phambi kwakaZimu ubusuku nemini." 
Revelation12:11 Bona bamhlula ngeengazi zeMvana nangelizwi lobufakazi babo begodu akhange banconcosele ipilo yabo bekwaba sekufeni. 
Revelation12:12 Ngalokho thokozani-ke nina mazulu, nani noke enihlala kiwo! Kodwana maye kuwe phasi, nawe lwandle! Mbala uSathana wehlela kini ugcwele ilaka uyadlhabhaza ngombana uyazi bona isikhathi sakhe sifitjhani.”" 
Revelation12:13 Kuthe bona unomrhaso abone bonyana upharwe phasi ephasini, wazuma umfazi osanda ukubeletha umntwana womsana." 
Revelation12:14 Kodwana umfazi waphiwa iimpiko ezimbili zekhozi elikhulu bona aphaphele endaweni alungiselelwe yona ngerhalawumbeni, lapha azakondliwa khona kwesikhatjhana, iinkhatjhana nengcenye yesikhathi, lapha inyoka ingeze yamfikela khona." 
Revelation12:15 Nje-ke kwabhubhudlha amanzi aphuma ngemlonyeni wenyoka kwaba inga mlambo ngemva komfazi kobana akhukhulwe. 
Revelation12:16 Kodwana iphasi laba lisizo emfazini loyo; lavula umlomo walo laginya amanzi agade abhubhudlha emlonyeni wakanomrhaso. 
Revelation12:17 Ngalokho unomrhaso wabila khulu ngomfazi loyo, nje-ke wasuka wayokusahlela boke abantwana bakhe, okutjho labo abalalela imiyalo yakaZimu nababambelele ebufakazini bakaJesu." 
Revelation12:18 Nje-ke unomrhaso wajama eligwini lelwandle. 
Revelation13:1 Ngabona isibandana senyuka siphuma elwandle, sineempondo ezilitjhumi neenhloko ezilikhomba. Phezu kweempondo zaso lezo bekuneenhlohlo ezilitjhumi kuthi phezu kweenhloko kube namagama weenhlamba." 
Revelation13:2 Isibandana engasibonako besifana nengwe, iinyawo zaso zifana nezebhere, umlomo ufana newebhubezi. Nje-ke unomrhaso wasinikela amandla nesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi kanye negunya." 
Revelation13:3 Enye yeenhloko zesibandana beyinenceba lokufa, kodwana incebelo besele lipholile. Yeke ngokurareka okukhulu, iphasi loke lalandela isibandana." 
Revelation13:4 Abantu balotjha unomrhaso ngombana bekathwese isibandana igunya, begodu balotjha isibandana bathi: “Ngubani ofana nesibandana, ngubani ongalwa naso na?”" 
Revelation13:5 Isibandana sanikelwa umlomo okhuluma okuphakamileko namezwi wehlamba; begodu savunyelwa bona sisebenzise igunya laso iinyanga ezimatjhumi amane nambili. 
Revelation13:6 Savula umlomo waso sakhuluma iinhlamba kuZimu, sithuka ibizo nethaberinakeli lakhe kanye nalabo abahlala ezulwini." 
Revelation13:7 Godu savunyelwa bona silwe nabacwengileko sibahlule. Saphiwa igunya phezu kweenkoro, kwemindeni, kweenlimi nezizwe." 
Revelation13:8 Boke abantu abakhe ephasini bazasilotjha, iye, woke loyo ibizo lakhe elingakatlolwa encwadini yokuphila yeMvana eyahlatjwako kusukela ekusekelweni kwephasi." 
Revelation13:9 Onendlebe akezwe! 
Revelation13:10 Nangabe kukhona ogade azakuthunjwa, akaye ekuthunjweni! Nangabe kukhona ogade azakubulawa ngesabula, uzakubulawa ngesabula! Lokhu kubiza ukubekezela nokukholwa kwabacwengileko." 
Revelation13:11 Nje-ke ngabona godu esinye isibandana senyuka sivela ephasini. Besineempondo ezimbili njengemvana kodwana besikhuluma njengonomrhaso. 
Revelation13:12 Besisebenzisa loke igunya lesibandana sokuthoma, siqalile. Sakatelela iphasi nabo boke abahlala kilo bona balotjhe isibandana sokuthoma, leso inceba laso lokufa ebesele lipholile." 
Revelation13:13 Sagila iimbonakaliso ezikulu sabe senza nomlilo ophuma ezulwini, wehlele ephasini phambi kwabantu baqalile." 
Revelation13:14 Begodu ngeembonakaliso esaphiwa bona sizenze phambi kwesibanda sokuthoma, sakhohlisa abakhileko ephasini. Sabatjela bona babumbe isithombesibunjwa sesibanda ebegade sinengozi yesabula, kodwana nokho sabuye saphila." 
Revelation13:15 Saphiwa amandla bona senze isithombesibunjwa sesibanda siphefumule ukuze isithombesibunjwa esimfanekiso leso sikhulume. Begodu senza nokobana labo abangalotjhi umfanekiso wesibanda leso babulawe. 
Revelation13:16 Godu sakatelela boke, okutjho omncani nomkhulu, onjingileko nochakileko, okhululekileko nolikhoboka bonyana babekwe iphawu esandleni sabo sangesidleni namkha epandla" 
Revelation13:17 ukuze kungabikhona ongathenga namkha athengise nakanganalo iphawu, okutjho ibizo lesibanda namkha isibalo sebizo laso." 
Revelation13:18 Lokhu kubiza ukuhlakanipha: Nje-ke akuthi nanyana ngubani ozwisisako abale isibalo sesibanda namkha isibalo sebizo laso ngombana isibalo saso ngesomuntu. Isibalo saso simakhulu amathandathu namatjhumi asithandathu nesithandathu. 
Revelation14:1 Nje-ke ngaphakamisa amehlo, qala naso iMvana ijame entabeni iZiyoni; beyikanye neenkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amane nane zalabo ebebatlolwe ibizo layo nelakaYise eempandla zabo." 
Revelation14:2 Ngezwa ilizwi livela ezulwini lihlokoma njengamanzi amanengi, lizwakala njengokuraramba kokuduma kwezulu okwesabekako. Ilizwi engalizwako lalinjengelababethi ababetha amaharibha." 
Revelation14:3 Bebavuma ingoma etja phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi naphambi kweembunjwa ezine eziphilako nabaphathi. Gade angekho obekangafunda ingoma leyo ngaphandle kwalabo abaziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amane nane ebebahlengwe ephasini. 
Revelation14:4 Laba, ngilabo abangazange bazisilaphaze ngabesifazi ngombana bebasesemsulwa njengamancele. Ngibo-ke abalandela iMvana nanyana kukuphi lapha iya khona. Bebahlengwe ebantwini bafana neenthelo zokuthoma ezisilumo kuZimu nakiyo iMvana" 
Revelation14:5 begodu emilonyeni yabo azange kufunyanwe amanga; bamsulwa. 
Revelation14:6 Nje-ke ngabona enye ingilozi iphapha phezulu esibangeni, iphethe ivangeli lesiphelani kobana ilitjhumayele kilabo abaphila ephasini. Iye, ezizweni zoke, eenkorweni, eenlimini nemindenini." 
Revelation14:7 Yarhuwelela yathi: “Mesabeni uZimu nimphazimulise ngombana isikhathi sakhe sokugweba sesifikile! Mlotjheni loyo owenza izulu nephasi, ilwandle nemithombo yamanzi.”" 
Revelation14:8 Nje-ke enye ingilozi yesibili yalandela yathi: “Liwile, liwile iBhabheli elikhulu! Ngilo elenza bona zoke izizwe zisele iwayini lelaka lobungwadla balo!”" 
Revelation14:9 Kwalandela enye ingilozi yesithathu isitjho ngelizwi elikhulu ithi: “Nanyana ngubani olotjha isibandananomfanekiso waso, amukele iphawu epandla namkha esandleni sakhe," 
Revelation14:10 naye uzakusela iwayini lelaka lakaZimu; aliselele ngekatjheni yobukhali bakhe lingakavanganiswa nalitho. Uzakuhlunguphazwa ngomlilo nangesibabuli phambi kweengilozi ezicwengileko naphambi kweMvana. 
Revelation14:11 Intuthu yomlilo walabo abahlunguphaziweko yenyuka nini nanini. Ubusuku nemini akukho ukuphumula kilabo abalotjha isibandananomfanekiso waso, iye, komunye nomunye owamukela iphawu lebizo laso.”" 
Revelation14:12 Lokhu kubiza ukunyamezela kwabacwengileko, iye, labo abalalela imiyalo kaZimu, banamathele ekukholweni kuJesu." 
Revelation14:13 Ngezwa ilizwi libuya ezulwini lisithi: “Tlola uthi: Babusisiwe labo abafako bafela kuSomnini kusukela gadesi.” UMoya ocwengileko uthi: “Iye, bazakuphumula ekukhandlekeni kwabo ngombana imisebenzi yabo izabalandela.”" 
Revelation14:14 Ngithe nangiqalako ngabona ilifu elimhlophe kuhlezi kilo ofana neNdodana yoMuntu, anesihlohlo segolide ehloko aphethe nesegere ngesandla." 
Revelation14:15 Kwavela enye ingilozi ngethempelini irhuwelela loyo ohlezi phezu kwelifu isithi: “Khupha isegere yakho uvune ngombana isikhathi sokuvuna sifikile nesivuno sephasi sesivuthiwe.” 
Revelation14:16 Nje-ke loyo ohlezi phezu kwelifu wakghedlha ngesegere ephasini, iphasi lavunwa." 
Revelation14:17 Kwathumbuka enye ingilozi ivela ethempelini lezulwini, nayo beyiphethe isegere ebukhali ngesandla." 
Revelation14:18 Kwavela enye ingilozi ithumbuka e-aldarini, bekuyingilozi enamandla phezu komlilo, yarhuwelela loyo obekaphethe isegere ebukhali yathi: “Khupha isegere yakho ebukhali ubuthelele iintjhutha zesidiribe sephasi ngombana amadiribe waso avuthiwe.”" 
Revelation14:19 Nje-ke ingilozi yahlahla ngesegere yayo ephasini yabuthelela isivuno sesidiribe sephasi; yasiphosa ngebutlhodlhelweni obukhulu bewayini lelaka lakaZimu. 
Revelation14:20 Ubutlhodlhelo bewayini bagadangwa ngaphandle komuzi, kwavinyilika iingazi ebutlhodlhelweni zaba zinengi zaphakama bekwaba sematomini weenjomani, kwaba libanga ebelingaba mamayela angaba makhulu amabili." 
Revelation15:1 Ngabona esinye isibonakaliso esikhulu nesirarako ezulwini: Bekuziingilozi ezilikhomba egade zineenhlupheko ezilikhomba, ekungezokugcina ngombana ngazo ilaka lakaZimu liphelisiwe." 
Revelation15:2 Ngabona lokho okwabonakala sengathi lilwandle lerhalasi livangene nomlilo nalabo ebebahlule isibandananomfanekiso waso kanye nesibalo sebizo laso. Bebajame eduze nelwandle lerhalasi baphethe amaharibha abawanikelwe nguZimu ezandleni zabo. 
Revelation15:3 Bavuma irhubo lakaMosi inceku kaZimu kanye nerhubo leMvana, basithi: “Mikhulu iyababazeka imisebenzakho, wena Somnini Zimu Mninimandla! Zilungile begodu ziliqiniso iindlela zakho, wena Kosi yezizwe zoke." 
Revelation15:4 Somnini, ngubani ongekhe akwesaba begodu adumise ibizo lakho na? Lokhu kungebanga lokobana nguwe wedwa ocwengileko. Izizwe zoke ziyokufika zilotjhe phambi kwakho ngombana iingwebo zakho zisepepeneneni.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ngemva kwalokho ngaqala, ngabona ithempeli elilitende lobufakazi ezulwini livulekile." 
Revelation15:6 Ethempelinapho kwaphuma iingilozi ezilikhomba neenhlupheko ezilikhomba, zembethe ilineni elidarhileko, ziqakanise imitletlana yegolide eemfubeni zazo." 
Revelation15:7 Nje-ke esinye seembunjwa ezine eziphilako sanikela iingilozi ezilikhomba izitja ezilikhomba zegolide zizele ubukhali bakaZimu ophila nini nanini. 
Revelation15:8 Ithempeli lazala intuthu yephazimulo ebuya ebukhosini nemandleni kaZimu. Begodu bekangekho ongangena ngethempelini zingakapheli iinhlupheko ezilikhomba zeengilozi ezilikhomba. 
Revelation16:1 Nje-ke ngezwa ilizwi elikhulu livela ethempelini likhuluma eengilozini ezilikhomba lithi: “Khambani niyokuthululela phezu kwephasi izitja ezilikhomba zelaka lakaZimu!” 
Revelation16:2 Yasuka ingilozi yokuthoma yafese yathulula isitja sayo ephasini. Kwathumbuka iinlonda ezimbi phezu kwalabo ebebanephawu lesibanda begodu balotjha nesithombe somfanekiso waso. 
Revelation16:3 Ingilozi yesibili yathululela isitja sayo phezu kwelwandle, laphenduka labangathi ziingazi zesidumbu, kwafa koke okuphilako ngelwandle." 
Revelation16:4 Ingilozi yesithathu yathululela isitja sayo ngemilanjeni nangemithonjeni, khona kwaphenduka iingazi." 
Revelation16:5 Ngezwa ingilozi yamanzi ithi: “Ulungile wena okhona nogade uvele ukhona; iye, wena ocwengileko ngombana ugwebile ngalokho." 
Revelation16:6 “Ngebanga lokobana baphalaze iingazi zabacwengileko nabaphorofidi, ngikho nje ubanikele iingazi bona bazisele ngombana kubafanele!”" 
Revelation16:7 Ngezwa i-aldari liphendula lithi: “Iye, Somnini Zimu Mninimandla, iingwebo zakho zilungile begodu ziliqiniso!”" 
Revelation16:8 Ingilozi yesine yathululela isitja sayo elangeni; lavunyelwa bona litjhise abantu ngesivuthevuthe salo," 
Revelation16:9 batjha ngomtjhiso obukhali kodwana bathuka ibizo lakaZimu okunguye ogade alawula phezu kweenhlupheko lezo; begodu azange baphenduke bona bamdumise. 
Revelation16:10 Ingilozi yesihlanu yathululela isitja sayo phezu kwesihlalo sobukhosi sesibandana, umbuso waso wabhijwa lilifu elinzima; abantu baziluma amalimu ngebanga lobuhlungu." 
Revelation16:11 Bahlambalaza uZimu wezulwini ngebanga leenhlungu neenlonda zabo, begodu azange baphenduke ezenzweni zabo." 
Revelation16:12 Yesithandathu ingilozi yathululela isitja sayo ngemlanjeni omkhulu iYufrathe, amanzi wakhona atjha ukuze kulungiselwe amakhosi avela epumalanga indlela." 
Revelation16:13 Ngabona imimoya emithathu esilapheleko efana neenrhwarhwa iphuma ngemlonyeni wakanomrhaso nangemlonyeni wesibanda godu nangemlonyeni womphorofidi wamanga. 
Revelation16:14 Lokhu kumimoya yamadimoni agila iziga; begodu iya emakhosini wephasi loke ukuwabutha bona alwe ipi ngelanga elikhulu lakaZimu uMninimandlawoke. 
Revelation16:15 Yelela, ngiza njengesela! Ubusisiwe loyo ohlala aphaphele begodu embethe ukuze angazukukhamba bhunubhunu bekubonwe ihlazo lakhe." 
Revelation16:16 Yeke imimoya yahlanganisa amakhosi endaweni ebizwa ngesiHebheru bona yi-Arimagedoni. 
Revelation16:17 Ingilozi yekhomba yathululela isitja sayo esibangeni; kwaphuma ilizwi elikhulu ethempelini livela esihlalweni sobukhosi lathi: “Sekwenzekile!” 
Revelation16:18 Kwabonakala imibani, ukuraramba, ukutletlebula kokuduma kwezulu nokusikinyeka okukhulu kwephasi okungazange khekube khona soloko kwaba khona abantu ephasini; mbala kwaba kusikinyeka okukhulu!" 
Revelation16:19 Umuzi omkhulu waphadlhuka iingcenye ezintathu nemizi yezizwe yawa. UZimu wakhumbula iBhabheli elikhulu, walinikela iwayini lelaka lobukhali bakhe." 
Revelation16:20 Zoke iinhlengele zabaleka neentaba azange zisatholakala. 
Revelation16:21 Isinanja esineengidija ezinobudisi obungaba makhilogremu amatjhumi amane nahlanu, sawulukela phezu kwabantu sehla ezulwini. Abantu bahlambalaza uZimu ngebanga lobuhlungu besinanja ngombana besesabeka kokufa." 
Revelation17:1 Nje-ke kweza kimi enye yeengilozi ezilikhomba iphethe izitja ezilikhomba yathi kimi: “Yewuze, ngithanda ukukutjengisa isigwebo sengwadlakazi ehlezi phezu kwamanzi amanengi," 
Revelation17:2 iye, leyo amakhosi wephasi agile nayo imikhuba yobungwadla, bekwathi ngewayini lobungwadla bayo kwadakwa abahlezi ephasini.”" 
Revelation17:3 Nje-ke ingilozi leyo yangithwala ngoMoya yangisa erhalawumbeni. Lapho ngabona umfazi ahlezi phezu kwesibanda esibubende ebesigcwele amabizo wehlamba, sineenhloko ezilikhomba neempondo ezilitjhumi." 
Revelation17:4 Umfazi loyo bekembethe okububende nokutlerebede begodu azihlobise ngegolide, ngobuphaziphazi nangamatje amahle aligugu. Ngesandla sakhe bekaphethe ikapho yegolide ebeyizele amanyala nokusilaphala kokuhlobonga kwakhe." 
Revelation17:5 Epandla yakhe bekunebizo elitlolwe ifihlo ethi: “Bhabheli elikulu, nina weengwadla namanyala wephasi.”" 
Revelation17:6 Ngabona bona umfazi loyo bekadakwe ziingazi zabacwengileko neengazi zabofakazi bakaJesu. Kuthe lokha nangimbonako, ngabamba ongenzasi." 
Revelation17:7 Kodwana ingilozi yathi kimi: “Urarwa yini kangaka na? Ngizokutjela ifihlakalo yomfazi lo kanye neyesibanda esimthweleko esineenhloko ezilikhomba neempondo ezilitjhumi. 
Revelation17:8 Isibandana osibonileko sakhe saba khona kodwana kwanjesi asisekho; nje-ke sele sizokukhuphuka ngemgodini onganamkhawulo bese siyabhujiswa. Abantu bephasi amabizo wabo angakatlolwa encwadini yokuphila kwasesisekelweni sephasi, bazokumangala lokha nababona isibandanangombana sakhe saba khona kodwana kwanjesi asisekho khisibe nokho sizakuba khona." 
Revelation17:9 “Lokhu kubiza ingqondo enokuhlakanipha: Iinhloko ezilikhomba ziziintaba ezilikhomba okuhlezi kizo umfazi loyo; begodu zimakhosi alikhomba," 
Revelation17:10 phakathi kwawo amahlanu awile, kuphila yinye, enye ayikafiki; kodwana lokha nasele ifikile kufuze ihlale ikhona kwesikhatjhana." 
Revelation17:11 Nakusibanda esakhe saba khona kwanjesi asisekho, kuhlekuhle siyikosi yobunane kodwana singenye yalawa alikhomba kwaphela siyokubhujiswa." 
Revelation17:12 “Iimpondo ezilitjhumi ozibonileko zimakhosi alitjhumi agade angakanikelwa ubukhosi bonyana abuse, kodwana asazokunikelwa ilungelo lokobana abe makhosi abuse isikhathi esifitjhani kanye nesibanda." 
Revelation17:13 Woke anehloso eyodwa, banikela isibandanaamandla nelungelo labo lokubusa." 
Revelation17:14 Azokulwa neMvana kodwana iMvana yona izawahlula ngombana iyiKosi yamakhosi noMbusi wababusi; nalabo abangakiyo ngababiziweko, abakhethiweko nabathembekileko.”" 
Revelation17:15 Nje-ke ingilozi yathi kimi: “Amanzi owabonileko lapho kuhlezi khona ingwadla, ababantu, aziinqubuthu, azizizwe neenlimi." 
Revelation17:16 Iimpondo ezilitjhumi ozibonileko, zona kanye nesibandana zizakuzonda ingwadla; zizayenza umonakalo ibe hlubule; zizakudla inyama yayo beziyiqothule ngomlilo." 
Revelation17:17 UZimu ukubekile eenhliziyweni zazo bona zenze ihloso yakhe ngokuvuma bona zinikele umbuso wazo esibandeni kufikela lapha amezwi kaZimu apheleliswa khona. 
Revelation17:18 “Umfazi ombonileko umumuzi omkhulu obusa ngaphezu kwamakhosi wephasi.” 
Revelation18:1 Emva kwalokho ngabona enye ingilozi yehla ibuya ezulwini. Beyinegunya elikhulu; iphasi lenziwa bona likhanye ngebanga lephazimulo yayo. 
Revelation18:2 Yarhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu yathi: “Liwile! Liwile iBhabheli elikhulu! Seliyindawo yokuhlala amadimoni, isikhungo sayo yoke imimoya esilapheleko, isikhungo seenyoni zoke ezisilapheleko, isikhungo sazo zoke iinbadana ezisilapheleko nezizondekileko." 
Revelation18:3 Ngebanga lokobana zoke izizwe zisele iwayini elihlanyisako lobungwadla balo, amakhosi wephasi ahlobonge nalo, nabarhwebi bephasi banjingile ngomnotho wokutamasa kwalo.”" 
Revelation18:4 Nje-ke ngezwa elinye ilizwi ezulwini lisithi: “Phumani niphele kilo, bantu bami ukuze ningahlanganyeli nezono zalo, nokobana ningamukeli iinhlungu zalo." 
Revelation18:5 Izono zalo zidindelelene, zifika ezulwini begodu uZimu ukhumbule ukonakala kwalo." 
Revelation18:6 Liphatheni njengombana nalo lenzile; libuyiseleleni ngokubuyelelweko kilokho elikwenzileko; niqarhe ngokubuyelelweko ekatjheni elayiqarhako. 
Revelation18:7 Njengokuzidumisa nokutamasa kwalo, linikeleni isilinganiso sehlupheko nesizi elingako ngombana lizitjela ehliziywenalo lithi, ‘Ngihlezi njengendlovukazi, angisuye umhlolokazi, begodu nesizi angekhe ngalibona!’" 
Revelation18:8 Ngalokho iinhlungu zalo zizakufika ngelanga linye, iye, izifo, ukulila nendlala. Lizakutjhiswa ngomlilo ngombana unamandla uSomnini uZimu, oligwebako.”" 
Revelation18:9 Amakhosi wephasi agade ahlobonga nalo begodu aphila nalo ngokutamasa, ayokulilela apongoloze ngalo lokha nakabona ukwenyuka kwentuthu yokutjha kwalo." 
Revelation18:10 Azakujama buqamamana ngokwesaba ukuhlunguphazwa kwalo athi: “Maye, maye kuwe, muzi omkhulu, Bhabheli muzi onamandla! Ukugwetjhwa kwakho kukufikele nge-awara linye.”" 
Revelation18:11 Abarhwebi bephasi bayapongoloza bebalililele ngombana akusekho muntu othenga ipahla emikhunjini yabo: 
Revelation18:12 ipahla yegolide, isiliva, ubuphaziphazi namatje aligugu, amatjhila amahle, abubende, asilika natlerebede, iinhlobohlobo zekhuni elinamakha, zoke iimpahla zezinyo lendlovu, iimpahla zesigodo esibizako, ikoporo, isimbi namamabula," 
Revelation18:13 isinamoni, ezinye iinungo, itjhwalo, iimonyo, iwayini, namafutha we-oliva, ipuphu yekoroyi nokuziintoro, iinkomo nezimvu, iinjomani neenkarana, amakhoboka namaphilo wabantu." 
Revelation18:14 “Isithelo ogade usikhanukela sisukile kuwe. Woke umnotho wakho nobuphaziphazi bakho, kuphelile kuwe. Angekhe kusafunyanwa.”" 
Revelation18:15 Abarhwebi abathengisa ipahla leyo bebazuza umnotho kilo, bazakujamela buqamamana ngokwesaba ukuhlunguphazwa kwalo, bazakulila barhahlawule," 
Revelation18:16 bathi: “Uzazizwa, uzazizwa umuzi omkhulu! Wena owembethe amatjhila amahle, okububende nokutlerebede, okghatjiswe ngegolide, ngobuphaziphazi nangamatje aligugu!" 
Revelation18:17 Mbala woke umnotho lo urhayilwe nge-awara linye.” Boke abaphathi bemikhumbi, abathaya elwandle, abathayi ngemikhumbi nabo boke abarhweba elwandle, bajamela kude," 
Revelation18:18 barhahlawula isililo lokha nababona intuthu yokutjha kwalo, bathi: “Ngiwuphi umuzi owakhe wafana nomuzi omkhulu lo?”" 
Revelation18:19 Bazirhatjha ngethuli eenhloko zabo badazuluka balila bathi: “Maye! Maye kiwo umuzi omkhulu, okwathi boke ebebanemikhombi elwandle, banotha ngebanga lobunjinga bawo! Nge-awara linye sephenduke waba lirubhi." 
Revelation18:20 Thabani ngokubhubha kwawo, nina mazulu, nani abacwengileko, abapostoli nabaphorofidi ngombana uZimu uwugwebile wanibuyiselela ngawo.”" 
Revelation18:21 Yeke ingilozi enamandla yadobha ilitje elinjengelokusila yaliphosa ngelwandle, yathi: “Ngiyo-ke le indlela iBhabheli, umuzi omkhulu eliyokuphoswa ngayo phasi, lingabe lisabonwa godu." 
Revelation18:22 Umkenenezo wombethi weharibha nabakhaleli, wabavuthela iimfudu neempalapala, awusoze usazwakala kuwe nososino wananyana ngiliphi irhwebo, akasoze asafunyanwa kuwe; ngitjho itjhada elibangwa lilitje lokusila angekhe libuye godu lizwakale ngaphakathi kwakho." 
Revelation18:23 Angekhe kusakhanya isibani kuwe; itjhada lokusina kwedwendwe angekhe lisezwakala kuwe; abarhwebi bakho bebaziinkhulu zephasi, begodu ngobuloyi bakho walutha zoke izizwe." 
Revelation18:24 “Ngaphakathi kwakho kwafunyanwa iingazi zabaphorofidi, zabacwengileko nezalabo ababulawako ephasini.”" 
Revelation19:1 Emva kwalokhu ngezwa ekungathi lilizwi lesiqubuthu esikhulu elihlokomako ezulwini lisithi: “Haleluya! Isindiso, iphazimulo namandla ngekwakaZimethu" 
Revelation19:2 ngombana ukugweba kwakhe kulungile bekumsulwa. Ugwebe ingwadla eyaziwako neyonakalise iphasi ngobungwadla bayo begodu iingazi zeenceku zakhe uzibuyiselele kiyo.” 
Revelation19:3 Barhuwelela godu bathi: “Haleluya! Intuthu yenyuka kiyo ngokungapheliko.” 
Revelation19:4 Abaphathi abamatjhumi amabili nane neembunjwa ezine eziphilako zaguqa zalotjha uZimu onzinze esihlalweni sobukhosi zithi: “Amen! Haleluya!” 
Revelation19:5 Kwezwakala ilizwi livela esihlalweni sobukhosi lisithi: “Dumisani uZimethu noke nina nceku zakhe, iye, noke nina enimesabako, abancani nabakhulu!”" 
Revelation19:6 Ngezwa godu ekungathi lilizwi lesiqubuthu esikhulu elihlokoma njengokurhuba kwamanzi amanengi nomdumo omkhulu wokuraramba lirhuwelela lisithi: “Haleluya! USomnini uZimethu, uMninimandlawoke uyabusa." 
Revelation19:7 Asithokoze sithabe, siphakamise idumo lakhe ngombana ubukhazi beMvana sebufikile, umlobokazi wayo selazilungisile." 
Revelation19:8 Unikelwe bona embathe itjhila elidarhileko nelihlanzekileko.” Mbala, itjhila elidarhileko lizizenzo ezilungileko zabacwengileko." 
Revelation19:9 Nje-ke ingilozi yathi kimi: “Tlola uthi babusisiwe labo abamenyelwe ebukhazini beMvana.” Begodu yangezelela ngokuthi: “La mamezwi wakaZimu aqinisileko.” 
Revelation19:10 Ngalokho ngaguqa eenyaweni ngayilotjha kodwana yona yathi kimi: “Ungakwenzi lokho! Ngiyinceku kanye nawe nabazalwane bakho ababambelele ebufakazini bakaJesu. Lotjha uZimu ngombana ubufakazi bakaJesu bumumoya wokuphorofida.” 
Revelation19:11 Ngabona izulu livulekile, kwaba khona injomani emhlophe. Umkhweli wayo ubizwa bona nguThembekile noQiniso begodu ngokulunga ugweba asuse ipi." 
Revelation19:12 Amehlo wakhe anjengamalangabu womlilo, ehloko yakhe kuneenhlohlo ezinengi; begodu unebizo elitloliweko kodwana lingekhe laziwa mumuntu ngaphandle kwakhe kwaphela." 
Revelation19:13 Wembethe iphuraphura edlhunywe ngeengazini nebizo lakhe kuthiwa nguLizwi lakaZimu. 
Revelation19:14 Amabutho wezulwini amlandela akhwele iinjomani ezimhlophe; embethe itjhila elidarhe okumhlophe nokunganamphambo. 
Revelation19:15 Emlonyenakhe kuphuma isabula ebukhali, ngayo urhayila izizwe begodu uzazibusa ngentonga yesimbi. Uzakugadangela ubutlhodlhelo bobukhali nebelaka lakaZimu uMninimandlawoke." 
Revelation19:16 Esambathweni sakhe nenyonga yakhe kutlolwe ngokugobhodlhwa ibizo elithi: “IKosi yamakhosi noMbusi wababusi.” 
Revelation19:17 Ngabona ingilozi ijame elangeni, irhuwelela zoke iinyoni eziphapha esibangeni ngelizwi elikhulu ithi: “Yizani nibuthane esidlweni esikhulu sakaZimu," 
Revelation19:18 iye, nizozitika ngenyama yamakhosi, yeenduna, yeengorho, yeenjomani neyabakhweli bazo; ngitjho nenyama yabo boke abatjhaphulukileko nabamakhoboka, abancani nabakhulu.”" 
Revelation19:19 Nje-ke ngabona isibandana namakhosi wephasi kanye namabutho wawo kubuthenwe bona kususwe ipi nalowo okhwele injomani namabutho wakhe. 
Revelation19:20 Sabanjwa isibandanasabotjhwa kanye nomphorofidi wamanga ogade agila iimangaliso phambi kwaso alutha ngazo labo ebebamukele iphawu lesibandana nalabo ebebalotjha umfanekiso waso. Labo bobabili baphoswa basaphila ngelitsheni lomlilo ovutha isibabuli. 
Revelation19:21 Inengi labulawa ngesabula eyaphuma emlonyeni waloyo okhwele injomani; nje-ke zoke iinyoni zayidla bezayiqala nje inyama yeendumbu zabo. 
Revelation20:1 Nje-ke ngabona ingilozi yehla ivela ezulwini, ngesandleni sayo iphethe isihluthulelo somgodi onganamkhawulo neketani ekulu." 
Revelation20:2 Yabamba unomrhaso okutjho inyoka endala (godu ebizwe bona nguDeveli noSathana) yambopha ikulungwana yeminyaka," 
Revelation20:3 yamphosela ngemgodini onganamkhawulo, yamvalela ngci beyabeka iphawu phezu kwakhe khona angazubuya aluthe izizwe bekuphele ikulungwana yeminyaka. Emva kwalokho kufanele athukululwe kwesikhatjhana." 
Revelation20:4 Ngabona iinhlalo zobukhosi, labo ebebahlezi kizo banikelwa amandla wokugweba. Ngabona nemiphefumulo yalabo abaquntwe iinhloko ngebanga lobufakazi babo ngoJesu nangelizwi lakaZimu. Abazange balotjhe isibandananamkha umfanekiso waso; begodu abazange babekwe iphawu laso eempandla zabo namkha ezandleni zabo. Babuya baphila bebabusa noKrestu ikulungwana yeminyaka." 
Revelation20:5 Inengi labahlongakeleko azange livuke bekwaphela ikulungwana yeminyaka. Lokhu kukuvuka ekufeni kokuthoma. 
Revelation20:6 Babusisiwe begodu bacwengile labo abanesabelo ekuvukeni kokuthoma. Ukufa kwesibili akunamandla phezu kwalaba, kodwana bayokuba baphristi bakaZimu nebakaKrestu begodu bayokubusa naye iminyaka eyikulungwana." 
Revelation20:7 Kuyokuthi lokha iminyaka eyikulungwana nasele iphelile, uSathana akhutjhwe ngesikhungweni sakhe," 
Revelation20:8 aphumele ukukhohlisa izizwe emagumbini amane wephasi, ezinguGogi noMagogi, azihlanganise kobana zizokulwa ipi; ubunengi bazo bunjengetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle." 
Revelation20:9 Zaphuma zarhwanta zidabula iphasi zazonbeleza indawo yabacwengileko kanye nomuzi othandekako. Kodwana kwehla umlilo ezulwini wabaqothula. 
Revelation20:10 USathana ogade abakhohlisile waphoswa ngelitsheni lomlilo nesibabuli, lapho isibandanakanye nomphorofidi wamanga bakhona, bayokutshwenywa isiphelani ubusuku nemini." 
Revelation20:11 Ngabona isihlalo sobukhosi esikhulu nesimhlophe naloyo ohlezi kiso. Iphasi nesibhakabhaka kwabaleka phambi kwakhe, kwanyamalala." 
Revelation20:12 Ngabona abafileko, abakhulu nabancani, bajame phambi kwesihlalo sobukhosi neencwadi zavulwa. Godu kwavulwa nenye incwadi ekuyincwadi yokuphila. Abafileko bagwetjwa ukuya ngemisebenzi abayenzileko, kwaya njengombana kutloliwe eencwadini." 
Revelation20:13 Ilwandle lakhupha boke abafileko ebebakilo. Ukufa nendawo yabafileko kwakhupha abafileko ebebahlezi kikho; boke bagwetjwa ukuya ngokwemisebenzi abayenzileko. 
Revelation20:14 Ukufa nendawo yabafileko kwaphoswa ngelitsheni lomlilo. Lokhu kukukufa kwesibili, ilitsha lomlilo." 
Revelation20:15 Loyo ibizo lakhe elingazange lifunyanwe encwadini yokuphila waphoswa ngelitsheni lomlilo. 
Revelation21:1 Nje-ke ngabona izulu elitjha nephasi elitjha ngombana izulu lokuthoma nephasi lokuthoma besele kudlulile, nelwandle belingasekho." 
Revelation21:2 Ngabona umuzi ocwengileko, iJerusalema elitjha, lehla livela kuZimu ezulwini, lilungiswe njengomlobokazi aqobotjhelele umyeni wakhe." 
Revelation21:3 Ngezwa ilizwi elikhulu livela esihlalweni sobukhosi lithi: “Qala indlu kaZimu seyihlangana nabantu. Uyokuhlala nabo njengoZimu wabo bona babe sisizwe sakhe, iye, uZimu ngokwakhe uzakuba nabo abe nguZimu wabo." 
Revelation21:4 Uzokwesula zoke iinyembezi emehlwenabo. Ukufa angekhe kusaba khona, ngitjho nokulila nobuhlungu angekhe kusaba khona ngombana izinto zokuthoma zidlulile.”" 
Revelation21:5 Loyo osesihlalweni sobukhosi wathi: “Qala, ngenza koke kube kutjha!” Wathi godu: “Kutlole lokhu ngombana amezwi la athembekile begodu aliqiniso.”" 
Revelation21:6 Nje-ke wathi kimi: “Sekwenziwe! Mina ngingu-Alfa no-Omega, ukuthoma nokuphela. Owomileko ngizamseza amanzi ngesihle emthonjeni wamanzi wokuphila." 
Revelation21:7 Loyo oyokuhlula uzakudla ilifa lezintwezo begodu mina ngizakuba nguZimakhe yena abe mntwanami. 
Revelation21:8 Kodwana amatjhatjha, abangakholwako, abasilapheleko, ababulali, iinhlobongi, abenza imilingo, abalotjha abosingazimu nabo boke abaleya amanga isabelo sabo sizakuba selitsheni elivuthako lomlilo nesibabuli, okukukufa kwesibili.”" 
Revelation21:9 Enye yeengilozi ezilikhomba eziphethe izitja ezilikhomba ezizele iinhlupheko ezilikhomba zokuphela, yeza kimi yafese yathi: “Yiza ngikutjengise umlobokazi, umkaMvana.”" 
Revelation21:10 KuMoya yangithwala yangisa entabeni ekulu nephakamileko, yangitjengisa umuzi ocwengileko okutjho iJerusalema, wehlela phasi uvela ezulwini kuZimu." 
Revelation21:11 Bewunephazimulo kaZimu nokukhanya okunjengobuphaziphazi obuligugu njengelitje elihle khulu ijasiperi elidarhe njengomabula. 
Revelation21:12 Bewunomthangala omkhulu ophakemeko onamasango alitjhumi nambili alindwe ziingilozi ezilitjhumi nambili. Emasangweni bekutlolwe ngokugobhodlha amabizo alitjhumi nambili weenkoro zakwa-Israyeli. 
Revelation21:13 Bekunamasango amathathu ngeswazini langepumalanga, amathathu ngetlhagwini, amathathu ngesewula namathathu ngetjingalanga." 
Revelation21:14 Begodu umthangala womuzi bewuneensekelo ezilitjhumi nambili obekutlolwe kizo amabizo wabapostoli abalitjhumi nambili beMvana. 
Revelation21:15 Ingilozi eyangikhulumisako beyiphethe ilithi lokulinganisa legolide kobana ilinganise ngalo umuzi namasango wawo kanye nemithangala yawo. 
Revelation21:16 Umuzi bewendlaleke unguncazine, ubude nobubanzi bawo kulingana. Nje-ke yalinganisa umuzi ngelithi layo kwaba makhilomitha aziinkulungwana ezimbili namakhulu amabili; iye, ubude bawo bungangobubanzi nokuphakama kwawo." 
Revelation21:17 Godu yalinganisa umthangala, kwaba mamitha amatjhumi alikhomba namabili ngokwesilinganiso sabantu ingilozi eyasisebenzisako." 
Revelation21:18 Umthangala wakhiwe ngejasiperi, khisibe umuzi wakhiwe ngegolidembala, udarhe njengerhalasi." 
Revelation21:19 Iinsekelo zomthangala womuzi zihlotjiswe ngemihlobo yoke yamatje amahle: lokuthoma lijasipi, lesibili kuyisafaya, lesithathu kuyikhalikedoni, lesine kuyisimaragidu," 
Revelation21:20 lesihlanu kuyisaridoniksi, lesithandathu kuyisaridiyu, lekhomba kuyikrisolithe, lobunane kuyibherili, lethoba kuyithophazi, letjhumi kuyikrisopirasi, letjhumi nanye kuyiyakintu, letjhumi nambili kuyi-amethisi." 
Revelation21:21 Amasango alitjhumi nambili kumamatje aligugu, alitjhumi nambili; ngilelo nalelo sango lililitje eliligugu ngokwalo. Indlela yomuzi iligolide, ikhanya ubone ngale njengerhalasi." 
Revelation21:22 Azange ngalibona ithempeli hlangana nomuzi ngombana ithempeli lawo linguSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke neMvana. 
Revelation21:23 Umuzi lo awudingi ilanga namkha inyezi bona kuyikhanyisele ngombana iphazimulo kaZimu imkhanyo wawo neMvana isibani sawo. 
Revelation21:24 Izizwe zephasi ziyokukhamba emkhanyweni wawo, amakhosi wephasi ayokuletha idumo lawo kiwo." 
Revelation21:25 Amasango wawo angekhe avalwa ilanga loke nobusuku angekhe baba khona lapho. 
Revelation21:26 Abantu bayokwethula kiwo ubuphaziphazi nedumo lezizwe. 
Revelation21:27 Kodwana akukho okusilapheleko okuyongena kiwo okutjho owenza amanyala namkha othoma amanga, kwaphela abatlolwe encwadini yokuphila yeMvana." 
Revelation22:1 Ingilozi yangitjengisa umlambo wamanzi wokuphila, udarhe njengerhalasi, ugeleza uvela esihlalweni sobukhosi bakaZimu neMvana," 
Revelation22:2 ubhubhudlha udabula hlangana nendlela yomuzi. Nca zombili zomlambo kwamila umuthi wokuphila oneenthelo ezimihlobo elitjhumi nambili, uhloma iinthelo zawo inyanga nenyanga; amakari wawo angawokwelapha izizwe." 
Revelation22:3 Angeze kusabakhona ilitho lamanikelela elizakufunyaneka lapho. Isihlalo sobukhosi sakaZimu neMvana sizokuba kiwo neenceku zakhe zizamlotjha. 
Revelation22:4 Zizakubona ubuso bakhe nebizo lakhe litlolwe eempandleni zazo. 
Revelation22:5 Angeze kusabakhona ubusuku, abasadingi ukukhanya kwesibani nanyana kwelanga ngombana uZimu uSomnini uzokuba kukhanya kwabo, bazakubusa naye nini nanini." 
Revelation22:6 Ingilozi yathi kimi: “Amezwi la athembekile aliqiniso ngombana uSomnini uZimu wemimoya yabaphorofidi, wathumela ingilozi yakhe bona izokutjengisa iinceku zakhe lokho okuzokwenzeka msinyana.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Yelelani, ngiyeza msinyana! Ubusisiwe loyo obulunga amezwi wesiphorofido sencwadi le.”" 
Revelation22:8 Mina Jwanisi nginguye owezwako bewabona izintwezi. Kuthe lokha nangizizwako ngizibona, ngawela phasi eenyaweni zengilozi ebigade ingitjengisa zona," 
Revelation22:9 kodwana yona yathi kimi: “Ungakwenzi lokho! Ngiyinceku kanye nawe nabazalwana bakho, abaphorofidi kanye nalabo ababulunga amezwi wencwadi le. Yeke, lotjha kwaphela uZimu!”" 
Revelation22:10 Yathi kimi: “Ungavali amezwi wencwadi yesiphorofido le ngombana isikhathi siseduze. 
Revelation22:11 Loyo owenza okukhohlakeleko akahlale enza okukhohlakeleko; kuthi osilapheleko ahlale angosilapheleko; kodwana olungileko akahlale enza ukulunga nocwengileko ahlale acwengile.” 
Revelation22:12 “Yelela, ngiyeza msinyana; ngiphethe umvuzo kobana ngikhokhele loyo naloyo ngokwemisebenzi yakhe." 
Revelation22:13 Mina ngingu-Alfa no-Omega, wokuthoma nowamaphelelo, iye, ukuthoma nokuphela." 
Revelation22:14 “Babusisiwe labo abahlanza izembatho zabo ukuze babe nelungelo emthini wokuphila, bangene emzini ngamasango." 
Revelation22:15 Ngaphandle kunezinja, abaloyi, iinhlobongi, ababulali, abalotjha iinthombe nabo boke abathanda nabenza ikohliso." 
Revelation22:16 “Ngimi mina Jesu engithumele ingilozi yami kini kobana izokufakaza ngezintwezi emabandleni. Ngimurabhu nomlibo kaDavida, ikhwezi lokusa elinyamazelako.”" 
Revelation22:17 UMoya nomlobokazi bathi: “Yiza!” Nozwako akatjho athi: “Yiza!” Omunye nomunye owomileko akeze; nanyana ngubani othandako akathathe amanzi wokuphila ngesihle. 
Revelation22:18 Ngilemukisa woke ozwa amezwi wesiphorofido sencwadi le: Ngithi nangabe kukhona owengezelela ilitho kiwo, uZimu uyokungezelela iinhlupheko ezihlathululwe encwadini le;" 
Revelation22:19 nangabe kukhona ophungula emazwini wesiphorofido sencwadi le, uZimu uzakususa isabelo sakhe emthini wokuphila nemzini ocwengileko, ekuzizinto ezihlathululwe encwadini le." 
Revelation22:20 Ofakazako ngezintwezi uthi: “Kwamambala, ngiyeza msinyana.” Amen. Yewuze Kosi Jesu!"
